# OpenCode-Base 组件库 API 完整方法字典
> Java 25 多模块 Maven 项目 | 基础包名: `cloud.opencode.base`
> 本文档列出所有 43 个模块的每个类、每个公共方法及功能说明，作为系统开发的方法字典。

---

## 目录

1. [opencode-base-core](#1-opencode-base-core) - 核心工具 (95 classes)
2. [opencode-base-string](#2-opencode-base-string) - 字符串工具
3. [opencode-base-collections](#3-opencode-base-collections) - 集合工具
4. [opencode-base-io](#4-opencode-base-io) - IO 工具
5. [opencode-base-functional](#5-opencode-base-functional) - 函数式编程
6. [opencode-base-crypto](#6-opencode-base-crypto) - 加密组件
7. [opencode-base-hash](#7-opencode-base-hash) - 哈希组件
8. [opencode-base-lock](#8-opencode-base-lock) - 锁组件
9. [opencode-base-pool](#9-opencode-base-pool) - 对象池
10. [opencode-base-cache](#10-opencode-base-cache) - 缓存组件
11. [opencode-base-json](#11-opencode-base-json) - JSON 组件
12. [opencode-base-xml](#12-opencode-base-xml) - XML 组件
13. [opencode-base-yml](#13-opencode-base-yml) - YAML 组件
14. [opencode-base-serialization](#14-opencode-base-serialization) - 序列化组件
15. [opencode-base-date](#15-opencode-base-date) - 日期时间
16. [opencode-base-lunar](#16-opencode-base-lunar) - 农历组件
17. [opencode-base-cron](#17-opencode-base-cron) - Cron 表达式
18. [opencode-base-money](#18-opencode-base-money) - 金额组件
19. [opencode-base-id](#19-opencode-base-id) - ID 生成
20. [opencode-base-event](#20-opencode-base-event) - 事件总线
21. [opencode-base-config](#21-opencode-base-config) - 配置管理
22. [opencode-base-log](#22-opencode-base-log) - 日志组件
23. [opencode-base-observability](#23-opencode-base-observability) - 可观测性
24. [opencode-base-i18n](#24-opencode-base-i18n) - 国际化
25. [opencode-base-email](#25-opencode-base-email) - 邮件组件
26. [opencode-base-sms](#26-opencode-base-sms) - 短信组件
27. [opencode-base-web](#27-opencode-base-web) - Web 工具
28. [opencode-base-oauth2](#28-opencode-base-oauth2) - OAuth2 组件
29. [opencode-base-captcha](#29-opencode-base-captcha) - 验证码组件
30. [opencode-base-parallel](#30-opencode-base-parallel) - 并行计算
31. [opencode-base-reflect](#31-opencode-base-reflect) - 反射工具
32. [opencode-base-deepclone](#32-opencode-base-deepclone) - 深拷贝
33. [opencode-base-classloader](#33-opencode-base-classloader) - 类加载
34. [opencode-base-test](#34-opencode-base-test) - 测试工具
35. [opencode-base-image](#35-opencode-base-image) - 图片处理
36. [opencode-base-pdf](#36-opencode-base-pdf) - PDF 处理
37. [opencode-base-feature](#37-opencode-base-feature) - 功能开关
38. [opencode-base-timeseries](#38-opencode-base-timeseries) - 时序数据
39. [opencode-base-tree](#39-opencode-base-tree) - 树形结构
40. [opencode-base-expression](#40-opencode-base-expression) - 表达式引擎

43. [opencode-base-graph](#43-opencode-base-graph) - 图论算法

## 1. opencode-base-core

核心基础工具模块（95个类），提供数组、数字、字符、位运算、Bean、断言、元组、流、转换、异常、线程、反射、缓存等。

### Joiner
`public final class Joiner` - Joiner - Fluent string joining utility / 连接器 - 流式字符串连接工具

- `public static Joiner on(char separator)` - Creates a joiner that uses the given separator. / 创建使用给定分隔符的连接器。
- `public static Joiner on(String separator)` - Creates a joiner that uses the given separator. / 创建使用给定分隔符的连接器。
- `public Joiner skipNulls()` - Returns a joiner that skips null values. / 返回跳过空值的连接器。
- `public Joiner useForNull(String nullText)` - Returns a joiner that replaces null values with the given text. / 返回用给定文本替换空值的连接器。
- `public Joiner withFormatter(Function<Object, String> formatter)` - Returns a joiner that formats values using the given function. / 返回使用给定函数格式化值的连接器。
- `public String join(Object... parts)` - Joins the given objects into a string. / 将给定对象连接成字符串。
- `public String join(Iterable<?> parts)` - Joins the given iterable into a string. / 将给定的可迭代对象连接成字符串。
- `public String join(Iterator<?> parts)` - Joins the given iterator into a string. / 将给定的迭代器连接成字符串。
- `public <A extends Appendable> A appendTo(A appendable, Object... parts)` - Appends the joined string to the given appendable. / 将连接后的字符串追加到给定的可追加对象。
- `public <A extends Appendable> A appendTo(A appendable, Iterable<?> parts)` - Appends the joined string to the given appendable. / 将连接后的字符串追加到给定的可追加对象。
- `public <A extends Appendable> A appendTo(A appendable, Iterator<?> parts)` - Appends the joined string to the given appendable. / 将连接后的字符串追加到给定的可追加对象。
- `public StringBuilder appendTo(StringBuilder sb, Object... parts)` - Appends the joined string to the given StringBuilder. / 将连接后的字符串追加到给定的 StringBuilder。
- `public StringBuilder appendTo(StringBuilder sb, Iterable<?> parts)` - Appends the joined string to the given StringBuilder. / 将连接后的字符串追加到给定的 StringBuilder。
- `public MapJoiner withKeyValueSeparator(char separator)` - Returns a map joiner using the given key-value separator. / 返回使用给定键值分隔符的映射连接器。
- `public MapJoiner withKeyValueSeparator(String separator)` - Returns a map joiner using the given key-value separator. / 返回使用给定键值分隔符的映射连接器。

### MoreObjects
`public final class MoreObjects` - MoreObjects - Extended Object utilities, including toString helper / 扩展对象工具类 - 包含 toString 辅助工具

- `public static <T> T firstNonNull(T first, T second)` - Returns the first of two given parameters that is not null. / 返回两个参数中第一个非空的值，如果都为空则返回 null。
- `public static ToStringHelper toStringHelper(Object self)` - Creates a ToStringHelper for the given instance. / 为给定实例创建 ToStringHelper，类名将用作前缀。
- `public static ToStringHelper toStringHelper(Class<?> clazz)` - Creates a ToStringHelper with the given class name. / 使用给定类创建 ToStringHelper。
- `public static ToStringHelper toStringHelper(String className)` - Creates a ToStringHelper with the given string as the class name. / 使用给定字符串作为类名创建 ToStringHelper。

### OpenArray
`public final class OpenArray` - Array Utility Class - Comprehensive array operations for primitive and object arrays / 数组工具类 - 提供原始类型和对象数组的综合操作

- `public static <T> T[] newArray(Class<T> componentType, int length)` - Creates an array of the specified component type and length. / 创建指定类型和长度的数组
- `public static <T> T[] of(T... elements)` - Creates an array containing the specified elements. / 创建包含指定元素的数组
- `public static <T> T[] nullToEmpty(T[] array, Class<T[]> type)` - Converts a null array to an empty array of the specified type. / 将 null 数组转换为空数组
- `public static int[] nullToEmpty(int[] array)` - Converts a null int array to an empty int array. / 将 null int 数组转换为空数组
- `public static long[] nullToEmpty(long[] array)` - Converts a null long array to an empty long array. / 将 null long 数组转换为空数组
- `public static <T> T[] add(T[] array, T element)` - Appends an element to the end of the array. / 在数组末尾添加元素
- `public static <T> T[] add(T[] array, int index, T element)` - Inserts an element at the specified index. / 在指定位置插入元素
- `public static <T> T[] addAll(T[] array1, T... array2)` - Concatenates two arrays into a new array. / 合并两个数组
- `public static <T> T[] insert(int index, T[] array, T... values)` - Inserts multiple elements at the specified index. / 在指定位置插入多个元素
- `public static int[] insert(int index, int[] array, int... values)` - Inserts multiple int elements at the specified index. / 在指定位置插入多个 int 元素
- `public static <T> T[] remove(T[] array, int index)` - Removes the element at the specified index. / 删除指定索引的元素
- `public static <T> T[] removeElement(T[] array, T element)` - Removes the first occurrence of the specified element. / 删除指定元素（首次出现）
- `public static <T> T[] removeAll(T[] array, int... indices)` - Removes elements at multiple indices. / 删除多个索引位置的元素
- `public static int[] removeAll(int[] array, int... indices)` - Removes elements at multiple indices from an int array. / 删除多个 int 数组索引位置的元素
- `public static <T> T[] subarray(T[] array, int startInclusive, int endExclusive)` - Returns a subarray from startInclusive (inclusive) to endExclusive (exclusive). / 获取子数组（从 startInclusive 到 endExclusive）
- `public static int[] subarray(int[] array, int startInclusive, int endExclusive)` - Returns an int subarray from startInclusive to endExclusive. / 获取 int 子数组
- `public static long[] subarray(long[] array, int startInclusive, int endExclusive)` - Returns a long subarray from startInclusive to endExclusive. / 获取 long 子数组
- `public static byte[] subarray(byte[] array, int startInclusive, int endExclusive)` - Returns a byte subarray from startInclusive to endExclusive. / 获取 byte 子数组
- `public static void swap(Object[] array, int offset1, int offset2)` - Swaps two elements in the array. / 交换数组中两个位置的元素
- `public static void swap(int[] array, int offset1, int offset2)` - Swaps two elements in an int array. / 交换 int 数组中两个位置的元素
- `public static void swap(Object[] array, int offset1, int offset2, int len)` - Swaps a series of elements of the given length starting at two offsets. / 交换数组中两个位置开始的指定长度元素序列。
- `public static <T> void reverse(T[] array)` - Reverses the order of the elements in the array. / 反转数组
- `public static void reverse(int[] array)` - Reverses the order of the elements in an int array. / 反转 int 数组
- `public static <T> void shuffle(T[] array)` - Randomly shuffles the elements of the array. / 打乱数组
- `public static void rotate(Object[] array, int distance)` - Rotates the elements of the array by the given distance (positive = right, negative = left). / 按指定距离旋转数组元素（正数向右，负数向左）。
- `public static <T> boolean contains(T[] array, T element)` - Returns true if the array contains the specified element. / 检查数组是否包含指定元素
- `public static boolean contains(int[] array, int element)` - Returns true if an int array contains the specified element. / 检查 int 数组是否包含指定元素
- `public static <T> int indexOf(T[] array, T element)` - Returns the index of the first occurrence of the element in the array. / 查找元素索引
- `public static <T> int indexOf(T[] array, T element, int startIndex)` - Returns the index of the first occurrence of the element starting from startIndex. / 从指定索引开始查找元素首次出现的位置。
- `public static <T> int lastIndexOf(T[] array, T element)` - Returns the index of the last occurrence of the element in the array. / 从后向前查找元素最后一次出现的索引。
- `public static <T> Optional<T> getFirst(T[] array)` - Returns the first element of the array wrapped in an Optional. / 获取数组第一个元素
- `public static <T> Optional<T> getLast(T[] array)` - Returns the last element of the array wrapped in an Optional. / 获取数组最后一个元素
- `public static boolean isEmpty(Object[] array)` - Returns true if the array is null or has length zero. / 检查数组是否为空
- `public static boolean isEmpty(int[] array)` - Returns true if an int array is null or has length zero. / 检查 int 数组是否为空
- `public static boolean isNotEmpty(Object[] array)` - Returns true if the array is not null and has at least one element. / 检查数组是否非空
- `public static boolean isSameLength(Object[] array1, Object[] array2)` - Returns true if both arrays have the same length. / 检查两个数组长度是否相同
- `public static boolean isSorted(int[] array)` - Returns true if the int array is sorted in ascending order. / 检查 int 数组是否已排序
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> boolean isSorted(T[] array)` - Returns true if the Comparable array is sorted in ascending order. / 检查 Comparable 数组是否已按升序排序。
- `public static int[] toPrimitive(Integer[] array)` - Converts an Integer array to an int array. / Integer 数组转 int 数组
- `public static int[] toPrimitive(Integer[] array, int valueForNull)` - Converts an Integer array to an int array with a specified value for null elements. / 将 Integer 数组转为 int 数组，空元素用指定值替换。
- `public static long[] toPrimitive(Long[] array)` - Converts a Long array to a long array. / Long 数组转 long 数组
- `public static double[] toPrimitive(Double[] array)` - Converts a Double array to a double array. / Double 数组转 double 数组
- `public static boolean[] toPrimitive(Boolean[] array)` - Converts a Boolean array to a boolean array. / Boolean 数组转 boolean 数组
- `public static byte[] toPrimitive(Byte[] array)` - Converts a Byte array to a byte array. / Byte 数组转 byte 数组
- `public static char[] toPrimitive(Character[] array)` - Converts a Character array to a char array. / Character 数组转 char 数组
- `public static Integer[] toObject(int[] array)` - Converts an int array to an Integer array. / int 数组转 Integer 数组
- `public static Long[] toObject(long[] array)` - Converts a long array to a Long array. / long 数组转 Long 数组
- `public static Double[] toObject(double[] array)` - Converts a double array to a Double array. / double 数组转 Double 数组
- `public static Boolean[] toObject(boolean[] array)` - Converts a boolean array to a Boolean array. / boolean 数组转 Boolean 数组
- `public static Byte[] toObject(byte[] array)` - Converts a byte array to a Byte array. / byte 数组转 Byte 数组
- `public static Character[] toObject(char[] array)` - Converts a char array to a Character array. / char 数组转 Character 数组
- `public static <T> List<T> toList(T... array)` - Converts an array to a mutable List. / 数组转 List
- `public static <T> Set<T> toSet(T... array)` - Converts an array to a Set. / 数组转 Set
- `public static <K, V> Map<K, V> toMap(Object[][] array)` - Converts a two-dimensional array to a Map. Each sub-array must contain at least two elements. / 将二维数组转换为 Map，每个子数组至少包含两个元素。
- `public static <T> T[] filter(T[] array, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Filters the array, returning a new array containing only elements matching the predicate. / 过滤数组，返回仅包含匹配谓词元素的新数组。
- `public static <T, R> R[] map(T[] array, Function<T, R> mapper, Class<R> targetType)` - Maps each element of the array using the given mapper function. / 映射数组

### OpenBase64
`public final class OpenBase64` - Base64 Encoding/Decoding Utility Class - Standard, URL-safe and MIME encoding support / Base64 编解码工具类 - 支持标准、URL安全和MIME编码

- `public static String encode(byte[] data)` - Encodes a byte array to a Base64 string / 将字节数组编码为 Base64 字符串
- `public static String encode(String data)` - Encodes a string to Base64 (using UTF-8) / 将字符串编码为 Base64（使用 UTF-8）
- `public static String encode(String data, Charset charset)` - Encodes a string to Base64 (with specified charset) / 将字符串编码为 Base64（指定字符集）
- `public static byte[] encodeToBytes(byte[] data)` - Encodes a byte array to a Base64 byte array / 将字节数组编码为 Base64 字节数组
- `public static byte[] decode(String base64)` - Decodes a Base64 string to a byte array / 将 Base64 字符串解码为字节数组
- `public static String decodeToString(String base64)` - Decodes a Base64 string to a string (using UTF-8) / 将 Base64 字符串解码为字符串（使用 UTF-8）
- `public static String decodeToString(String base64, Charset charset)` - Decodes a Base64 string to a string (with specified charset) / 将 Base64 字符串解码为字符串（指定字符集）
- `public static byte[] decode(byte[] base64Bytes)` - Decodes a Base64 byte array / 将 Base64 字节数组解码
- `public static String encodeUrlSafe(byte[] data)` - Encodes a byte array using URL-safe Base64 (uses - and _ instead of + and /, no padding) / URL 安全编码（使用 - 和 _ 替代 + 和 /，无填充）
- `public static String encodeUrlSafe(String data)` - Encodes a string using URL-safe Base64 / URL 安全编码字符串
- `public static byte[] decodeUrlSafe(String base64)` - Decodes a URL-safe Base64 string to a byte array / URL 安全解码
- `public static String decodeUrlSafeToString(String base64)` - Decodes a URL-safe Base64 string to a string / URL 安全解码为字符串
- `public static String encodeMime(byte[] data)` - Encodes using MIME Base64 (line break every 76 characters) / MIME 编码（每 76 字符换行）
- `public static byte[] decodeMime(String base64)` - Decodes a MIME Base64 string / MIME 解码
- `public static String encodeNoPadding(byte[] data)` - Encodes without padding character = / 编码但不添加填充字符 =
- `public static String encodeUrlSafeNoPadding(byte[] data)` - Encodes using URL-safe Base64 without padding / URL 安全编码且无填充
- `public static boolean isBase64(String str)` - Checks whether the string is valid Base64 / 检查字符串是否为有效的 Base64 编码
- `public static boolean isBase64UrlSafe(String str)` - Checks whether the string is valid URL-safe Base64 / 检查字符串是否为有效的 URL 安全 Base64 编码
- `public static OutputStream encodingWrap(OutputStream out)` - Creates a Base64 encoding output stream wrapper / 创建 Base64 编码输出流包装器
- `public static InputStream decodingWrap(InputStream in)` - Creates a Base64 decoding input stream wrapper / 创建 Base64 解码输入流包装器
- `public static OutputStream encodingWrapUrlSafe(OutputStream out)` - Creates a URL-safe Base64 encoding output stream wrapper / 创建 URL 安全 Base64 编码输出流包装器
- `public static InputStream decodingWrapUrlSafe(InputStream in)` - Creates a URL-safe Base64 decoding input stream wrapper / 创建 URL 安全 Base64 解码输入流包装器

### OpenBit
`public final class OpenBit` - Bit Manipulation Utility Class - Set, clear, flip, test, count, rotate and manipulate bits / 位操作工具类 - 设置、清除、翻转、测试、计数、旋转位

- `public static int setBit(int value, int position)` - Sets the bit at the specified position / 设置指定位置的位
- `public static long setBit(long value, int position)` - Sets the bit at the specified position (long) / 设置指定位置的位（long）
- `public static int clearBit(int value, int position)` - Clears the bit at the specified position / 清除指定位置的位
- `public static long clearBit(long value, int position)` - Clears the bit at the specified position (long) / 清除指定位置的位（long）
- `public static int flipBit(int value, int position)` - Flips the bit at the specified position / 翻转指定位置的位
- `public static long flipBit(long value, int position)` - Flips the bit at the specified position (long) / 翻转指定位置的位（long）
- `public static boolean testBit(int value, int position)` - Tests whether the bit at the specified position is set / 测试指定位置的位是否被设置
- `public static boolean testBit(long value, int position)` - Tests whether the bit at the specified position is set (long) / 测试指定位置的位是否被设置（long）
- `public static int countBits(int value)` - Counts the number of set bits (number of 1s) / 计算设置的位数（1 的个数）
- `public static int countBits(long value)` - Counts the number of set bits (long) / 计算设置的位数（long）
- `public static int countLeadingZeros(int value)` - Counts the number of leading zeros / 计算前导零数量
- `public static int countLeadingZeros(long value)` - Counts the number of leading zeros (long) / 计算前导零数量（long）
- `public static int countTrailingZeros(int value)` - Counts the number of trailing zeros / 计算尾随零数量
- `public static int countTrailingZeros(long value)` - Counts the number of trailing zeros (long) / 计算尾随零数量（long）
- `public static int rotateLeft(int value, int distance)` - Rotates bits to the left / 左旋转位
- `public static long rotateLeft(long value, int distance)` - Rotates bits to the left (long) / 左旋转位（long）
- `public static int rotateRight(int value, int distance)` - Rotates bits to the right / 右旋转位
- `public static long rotateRight(long value, int distance)` - Rotates bits to the right (long) / 右旋转位（long）
- `public static int reverse(int value)` - Reverses all bits / 反转所有位
- `public static long reverse(long value)` - Reverses all bits (long) / 反转所有位（long）
- `public static int reverseBytes(int value)` - Reverses the byte order / 反转字节顺序
- `public static long reverseBytes(long value)` - Reverses the byte order (long) / 反转字节顺序（long）
- `public static int extractField(int value, int position, int length)` - Extracts a bit field / 提取位字段
- `public static long extractField(long value, int position, int length)` - Extracts a bit field (long) / 提取位字段（long）
- `public static int insertField(int value, int fieldValue, int position, int length)` - Inserts a bit field / 插入位字段
- `public static long insertField(long value, long fieldValue, int position, int length)` - Inserts a bit field (long) / 插入位字段（long）
- `public static int createMask(int bits)` - Creates a bit mask / 创建位掩码
- `public static long createMaskLong(int bits)` - Creates a bit mask (long) / 创建位掩码（long）
- `public static boolean isPowerOfTwo(int value)` - Checks whether the value is a power of two / 检查是否为 2 的幂
- `public static boolean isPowerOfTwo(long value)` - Checks whether the value is a power of two (long) / 检查是否为 2 的幂（long）
- `public static int nextPowerOfTwo(int value)` - Rounds up to the next power of two / 向上舍入到下一个 2 的幂
- `public static long nextPowerOfTwo(long value)` - Rounds up to the next power of two (long) / 向上舍入到下一个 2 的幂（long）
- `public static int highestOneBitPosition(int value)` - Gets the position of the highest set bit / 获取最高有效位的位置
- `public static int highestOneBitPosition(long value)` - Gets the position of the highest set bit (long) / 获取最高有效位的位置（long）
- `public static int lowestOneBitPosition(int value)` - Gets the position of the lowest set bit / 获取最低有效位的位置
- `public static int lowestOneBitPosition(long value)` - Gets the position of the lowest set bit (long) / 获取最低有效位的位置（long）

### OpenBoolean
`public final class OpenBoolean` - Boolean Utility Class - Conversion, logical operations and validation for boolean values / 布尔工具类 - 布尔值转换、逻辑运算和验证

- `public static boolean toBoolean(Boolean value)` - Converts Boolean to boolean (null-safe, null returns false) / Boolean 转 boolean（null 安全，null 返回 false）
- `public static boolean toBoolean(String str)` - Converts a string to boolean / 字符串转 boolean
- `public static boolean toBoolean(int value)` - Converts an integer to boolean (0 is false, others are true) / 整数转 boolean（0 为 false，非 0 为 true）
- `public static Boolean toBooleanObject(boolean value)` - Converts boolean to Boolean (boxed) / boolean 转 Boolean
- `public static Boolean toBooleanObject(String str)` - Converts a string to Boolean (null-safe) / 字符串转 Boolean（null 安全）
- `public static String toString(Boolean value)` - Converts Boolean to string representation / Boolean 转字符串
- `public static String toStringYesNo(Boolean value)` - Converts to yes/no string / 转为 yes/no 字符串
- `public static String toStringOnOff(Boolean value)` - Converts to on/off string / 转为 on/off 字符串
- `public static String toStringYN(Boolean value)` - Converts to Y/N string / 转为 Y/N 字符串
- `public static int toInteger(boolean value)` - Converts boolean to integer (true=1, false=0) / boolean 转整数（true=1, false=0）
- `public static int toInteger(Boolean value)` - Converts Boolean to integer (null=0) / Boolean 转整数（null=0）
- `public static boolean isTrue(Boolean value)` - Checks whether the value is true / 判断是否为 true
- `public static boolean isFalse(Boolean value)` - Checks whether the value is false / 判断是否为 false
- `public static boolean isNotTrue(Boolean value)` - Checks whether the value is not true (null or false) / 判断是否不为 true（null 或 false）
- `public static boolean isNotFalse(Boolean value)` - Checks whether the value is not false (null or true) / 判断是否不为 false（null 或 true）
- `public static boolean negate(boolean value)` - Negation operation / 取反操作
- `public static Boolean negate(Boolean value)` - Negation operation (Boolean, null returns null) / 取反操作（Boolean，null 返回 null）
- `public static boolean and(boolean... values)` - Logical AND operation / 逻辑与操作
- `public static boolean or(boolean... values)` - Logical OR operation / 逻辑或操作
- `public static boolean xor(boolean... values)` - Logical XOR operation / 逻辑异或操作
- `public static int compare(boolean x, boolean y)` - Compares two Boolean values / 比较两个 Boolean

### OpenChar
`public final class OpenChar` - Character Utility Class - Type checking, case conversion, ASCII and Unicode operations / 字符工具类 - 类型检查、大小写转换、ASCII和Unicode操作

- `public static boolean isLetter(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is a letter / 检查是否为字母
- `public static boolean isDigit(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is a digit / 检查是否为数字
- `public static boolean isAlphanumeric(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is a letter or digit / 检查是否为字母或数字
- `public static boolean isWhitespace(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is whitespace / 检查是否为空白字符
- `public static boolean isAscii(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is ASCII (0-127) / 检查是否为 ASCII 字符 (0-127)
- `public static boolean isPrintableAscii(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is a printable ASCII character (32-126) / 检查是否为可打印 ASCII 字符 (32-126)
- `public static boolean isControl(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is a control character / 检查是否为控制字符
- `public static boolean isUpperCase(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is uppercase / 检查是否为大写字母
- `public static boolean isLowerCase(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is lowercase / 检查是否为小写字母
- `public static boolean isHexDigit(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is a hex digit / 检查是否为十六进制数字
- `public static boolean isOctalDigit(char ch)` - Checks whether the character is an octal digit / 检查是否为八进制数字
- `public static char toUpperCase(char ch)` - Converts to uppercase / 转为大写
- `public static char toLowerCase(char ch)` - Converts to lowercase / 转为小写
- `public static char toggleCase(char ch)` - Toggles the case / 切换大小写
- `public static String toString(char ch)` - Converts character to string (cache-optimized) / 字符转字符串（缓存优化）
- `public static int toCodePoint(char ch)` - Converts to a Unicode code point / 转为 Unicode 码点
- `public static char fromCodePoint(int codePoint)` - Converts from a code point to a character / 从码点转字符
- `public static String toHexString(char ch)` - Converts to a hexadecimal string / 转十六进制字符串
- `public static String toUnicode(char ch)` - Converts to Unicode representation (\\uXXXX) / 转 Unicode 表示 (\\uXXXX)
- `public static int toDigit(char ch)` - Converts character to its numeric value (0-9) / 字符转数字值（0-9）
- `public static int toDigit(char ch, int radix)` - Converts character to its numeric value with the specified radix / 字符转数字值（指定进制）
- `public static String repeat(char ch, int count)` - Repeats the character n times / 重复字符 n 次
- `public static boolean equalsIgnoreCase(char ch1, char ch2)` - Compares two characters ignoring case / 比较两个字符（忽略大小写）
- `public static int getNumericValue(char ch)` - Gets the numeric value of the character / 获取字符的数值（用于比较）
- `public static boolean inRange(char ch, char start, char end)` - Checks whether the character is within the specified range / 检查字符是否在指定范围内

### OpenCharset
`public final class OpenCharset` - Charset Utility Class - Charset conversion, detection and common charset constants / 字符集工具类 - 字符集转换、检测和常用字符集常量

- `public static Charset GBK()` - Returns the GBK charset / 返回 GBK 字符集
- `public static Charset GB2312()` - Returns the GB2312 charset / 返回 GB2312 字符集
- `public static Charset GB18030()` - Returns the GB18030 charset / 返回 GB18030 字符集
- `public static Charset charset(String charsetName)` - Gets charset by name, null-safe (returns UTF-8) / 获取字符集，null 安全（返回 UTF-8）
- `public static Charset charset(String charsetName, Charset defaultCharset)` - Gets charset by name with a default value / 获取字符集，带默认值
- `public static Optional<Charset> charsetOptional(String charsetName)` - Safely gets the charset / 安全获取字符集
- `public static Charset defaultCharset()` - Gets the system default charset / 获取系统默认字符集
- `public static byte[] toBytes(String str)` - Converts a string to a byte array (UTF-8) / 字符串转字节数组（UTF-8）
- `public static byte[] toBytes(String str, Charset charset)` - Converts a string to a byte array (specified charset) / 字符串转字节数组（指定字符集）
- `public static byte[] toBytes(String str, String charsetName)` - Converts a string to a byte array (specified charset name) / 字符串转字节数组（指定字符集名称）
- `public static String toString(byte[] bytes)` - Converts a byte array to a string (UTF-8) / 字节数组转字符串（UTF-8）
- `public static String toString(byte[] bytes, Charset charset)` - Converts a byte array to a string (specified charset) / 字节数组转字符串（指定字符集）
- `public static String toString(byte[] bytes, String charsetName)` - Converts a byte array to a string (specified charset name) / 字节数组转字符串（指定字符集名称）
- `public static String convert(String str, Charset sourceCharset, Charset targetCharset)` - Converts string encoding between charsets / 转换字符串编码
- `public static String convert(String str, String sourceCharset, String targetCharset)` - Converts string encoding using charset names / 转换字符串编码（字符集名称）
- `public static boolean isSupported(String charsetName)` - Checks whether the charset name is valid / 检查字符集名称是否有效
- `public static boolean canEncode(String str, Charset charset)` - Checks whether the string can be encoded with the specified charset / 检查字符串是否可用指定字符集编码
- `public static Charset detect(byte[] bytes)` - Detects the likely charset of a byte array (simple detection) / 检测字节数组可能的字符集（简单检测）
- `public static boolean hasNonAscii(String str)` - Checks whether the string contains non-ASCII characters / 检查是否包含非 ASCII 字符
- `public static boolean isAscii(String str)` - Checks whether the string is pure ASCII / 检查是否为纯 ASCII 字符串
- `public static String gbkToUtf8(String gbkStr)` - Converts GBK string to UTF-8 / GBK 转 UTF-8
- `public static String utf8ToGbk(String utf8Str)` - Converts UTF-8 string to GBK / UTF-8 转 GBK
- `public static String iso8859ToUtf8(String isoStr)` - Converts ISO-8859-1 string to UTF-8 / ISO-8859-1 转 UTF-8
- `public static byte[] removeBom(byte[] bytes)` - Removes the UTF-8 BOM header / 移除 UTF-8 BOM 头
- `public static boolean hasBom(byte[] bytes)` - Checks whether the byte array has UTF-8 BOM / 检查是否有 UTF-8 BOM
- `public static byte[] addBom(byte[] bytes)` - Adds UTF-8 BOM to byte array / 添加 UTF-8 BOM
- `public static Reader newReader(InputStream in)` - Creates a UTF-8 Reader from InputStream / 创建 UTF-8 Reader
- `public static Reader newReader(InputStream in, Charset charset)` - Creates a Reader with specified charset / 创建指定字符集的 Reader
- `public static Writer newWriter(OutputStream out)` - Creates a UTF-8 Writer from OutputStream / 创建 UTF-8 Writer
- `public static Writer newWriter(OutputStream out, Charset charset)` - Creates a Writer with specified charset / 创建指定字符集的 Writer

### OpenClass
`public final class OpenClass` - Class Utility Class - Class loading, type checking, generics handling and class reflection / 类工具类 - 类加载、类型检查、泛型处理和类反射

- `public static ClassLoader getClassLoader()` - Returns the default ClassLoader for the current thread or this class. / 获取默认类加载器
- `public static ClassLoader getClassLoader(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns the ClassLoader for the specified class. / 获取指定类的 ClassLoader
- `public static Class<?> loadClass(String className)` - Loads and initializes the class with the given name. / 加载类
- `public static Class<?> loadClass(String className, boolean initialize)` - Loads the class with the given name, optionally initializing it. / 加载类（不初始化）
- `public static Class<?> loadClass(String className, ClassLoader classLoader)` - Loads and initializes the class using the specified ClassLoader. / 加载类（指定 ClassLoader）
- `public static Class<?> loadClassSafely(String className)` - Safely loads the class, returning null if it does not exist. / 安全加载类（不存在返回 null）
- `public static Optional<Class<?>> loadClassOptional(String className)` - Safely loads the class, returning an Optional. / 安全加载类（返回 Optional）
- `public static boolean isPresent(String className)` - Returns true if the class with the given name is present on the classpath. / 检查类是否在类路径中
- `public static boolean isPresent(String className, ClassLoader classLoader)` - Returns true if the class is present using the specified ClassLoader. / 检查类是否存在（指定 ClassLoader）
- `public static boolean isPrimitive(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class represents a primitive type. / 检查是否为原始类型
- `public static boolean isPrimitiveWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is a primitive wrapper type. / 检查是否为原始类型包装类
- `public static boolean isPrimitiveOrWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is a primitive type or its wrapper. / 检查是否为原始类型或包装类
- `public static boolean isArray(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class represents an array type. / 检查是否为数组类型
- `public static boolean isCollection(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is a Collection or Map type. / 检查是否为集合类型
- `public static boolean isInterface(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is an interface. / 检查是否为接口
- `public static boolean isAbstract(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is abstract. / 检查是否为抽象类
- `public static boolean isEnum(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is an enum type. / 检查是否为枚举类型
- `public static boolean isRecord(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is a record type. / 检查是否为 Record 类型
- `public static boolean isSealed(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is a sealed type. / 检查是否为 sealed 类型
- `public static boolean isInnerClass(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is a non-static inner class. / 检查是否为内部类
- `public static boolean isAnonymousClass(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is an anonymous class. / 检查是否为匿名类
- `public static boolean isLocalClass(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is a local class. / 检查是否为本地类
- `public static boolean isLambdaClass(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class was generated by a lambda expression. / 检查是否为 Lambda 类
- `public static boolean isAssignable(Class<?> superType, Class<?> subType)` - Returns true if subType is assignable to superType (considering primitive/wrapper conversion). / 检查类型是否可赋值（考虑原始/包装转换）
- `public static Class<?> getWrapperClass(Class<?> primitiveType)` - Returns the wrapper class corresponding to the given primitive type. / 获取原始类型的包装类
- `public static Class<?> getPrimitiveClass(Class<?> wrapperType)` - Returns the primitive type corresponding to the given wrapper class. / 获取包装类对应的原始类型
- `public static Class<?> getComponentType(Class<?> arrayClass)` - Returns the component type of the given array class. / 获取数组的组件类型
- `public static Class<?> getArrayClass(Class<?> componentType)` - Returns the array type for the given component type. / 获取数组类型
- `public static String getSimpleName(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns the simple name of the class. / 获取类的简单名称
- `public static String getShortName(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns the short name of the class (last segment of the fully-qualified name). / 获取类的短名称
- `public static String getFullName(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns the fully-qualified name of the class. / 获取类的完全限定名
- `public static String getPackageName(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns the package name of the class. / 获取包名
- `public static String getPackageName(String className)` - Returns the package name extracted from the fully-qualified class name string. / 从类名字符串提取包名
- `public static String classNameToPath(String className)` - Converts a class name to a resource path by replacing '.' with '/'. / 类名转资源路径
- `public static String pathToClassName(String path)` - Converts a resource path to a class name by replacing '/' with '.'. / 资源路径转类名
- `public static List<Class<?>> getSuperClasses(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns all superclasses of the given class, excluding Object. / 获取所有父类（不含 Object）
- `public static Set<Class<?>> getAllInterfaces(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns all interfaces implemented by the class, including inherited interfaces. / 获取类实现的所有接口（包括继承的）
- `public static Set<Class<?>> getAllSuperTypes(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns all superclasses and interfaces of the given class. / 获取所有父类和接口
- `public static Class<?> getCommonSuperClass(Class<?> class1, Class<?> class2)` - Returns the closest common superclass of two classes, or Object.class if none. / 获取两个类的最近共同父类
- `public static Type[] getTypeArguments(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns the type parameters declared on the given class. / 获取类的泛型参数
- `public static Type[] getSuperclassTypeArguments(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns the actual type arguments of the generic superclass of the given class. / 获取父类的实际泛型参数
- `public static Type[] getInterfaceTypeArguments(Class<?> clazz, Class<?> interfaceClass)` - Returns the actual type arguments for the specified interface on the given class. / 获取指定接口的实际泛型参数
- `public static Class<?> resolveTypeArgument(Class<?> clazz, Class<?> genericClass)` - Resolves the first type argument for the given generic superclass or interface. / 解析泛型父类或接口的第一个类型参数
- `public static <T> T getDefaultValue(Class<T> clazz)` - Returns the default value for the given type (null for non-primitive types). / 获取类型的默认值（非原始类型返回 null）
- `public static Object getPrimitiveDefaultValue(Class<?> primitiveType)` - Returns the default value for the given primitive type. / 获取原始类型的默认值
- `public static URL getResource(String resourceName)` - Returns the URL of the resource with the given name from the classpath. / 获取类路径上的资源 URL
- `public static InputStream getResourceAsStream(String resourceName)` - Returns an InputStream for reading the named resource from the classpath. / 获取资源的输入流
- `public static URL getCodeSourceLocation(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns the code source location URL for the given class. / 获取类的代码源位置
- `public static String getJarPath(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns the JAR file path for the given class, or null if not in a JAR. / 获取类所在的 JAR 文件路径
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates a new instance of the given class using its no-arg constructor. / 使用无参构造函数创建类实例

### OpenEnum
`public final class OpenEnum` - Enum Utility Class - Validation, retrieval, mapping, filtering and conversion for enum types / 枚举工具类 - 枚举类型的验证、获取、映射、过滤和转换

- `public static <E extends Enum<E>> E getEnumByName(Class<E> enumClass, String name)` - Gets an enum value by name / 按名称获取枚举值
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>> E getEnumByNameSafely(Class<E> enumClass, String name, E defaultValue)` - Safely gets an enum value with a default / 安全获取枚举值（带默认值）
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>> Optional<E> getEnumByNameOptional(Class<E> enumClass, String name)` - Gets an Optional-wrapped enum value / 获取 Optional 包装的枚举值
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>> E getEnumByNameIgnoreCase(Class<E> enumClass, String name)` - Gets an enum value by name ignoring case / 忽略大小写获取枚举值
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>, V> E getEnumByValue(Class<E> enumClass, V value,` - Gets an enum by a custom value / 按自定义值获取枚举
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>, V> E getEnumByValue(Class<E> enumClass, V value,` - Gets an enum by a custom value with a default / 按自定义值获取枚举（带默认值）
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>> List<E> getEnumList(Class<E> enumClass)` - Gets a list of all enum values / 获取所有枚举值列表
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>> EnumSet<E> getEnumSet(Class<E> enumClass)` - Gets an EnumSet of all enum values / 获取所有枚举值集合
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>, K> Map<K, E> getEnumValueMap(Class<E> enumClass,` - Creates an enum value map / 创建枚举值映射
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>> List<String> getEnumNames(Class<E> enumClass)` - Gets a list of enum names / 获取枚举名称列表
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>> boolean isValidEnum(Class<E> enumClass, String name)` - Validates whether the enum name is valid / 验证枚举名称是否有效
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>> boolean isValidEnumIgnoreCase(Class<E> enumClass, String name)` - Validates whether the enum name is valid (case-insensitive) / 验证枚举名称是否有效（忽略大小写）
- `public static int ordinal(Enum<?> enumValue)` - Gets the ordinal of the enum value / 获取枚举的 ordinal
- `public static String name(Enum<?> enumValue)` - Gets the name of the enum value / 获取枚举的名称
- `public static <E extends Enum<E>> E getByOrdinal(Class<E> enumClass, int ordinal)` - Gets an enum value by its ordinal / 根据 ordinal 获取枚举值

### OpenHex
`public final class OpenHex` - Hexadecimal Utility Class - Hex encoding, decoding and validation / 十六进制工具类 - 十六进制编解码和验证

- `public static String encodeHex(byte[] data)` - Converts byte array to lowercase hex string / 字节数组转十六进制字符串（小写）
- `public static String encodeHexUpper(byte[] data)` - Converts byte array to uppercase hex string / 字节数组转十六进制字符串（大写）
- `public static char[] encodeHexChars(byte[] data)` - Converts byte array to hex char array / 字节数组转十六进制字符数组
- `public static char[] encodeHexChars(byte[] data, boolean toLowerCase)` - Converts byte array to hex char array / 字节数组转十六进制字符数组
- `public static String byteToHex(byte b)` - Converts a single byte to a hex string / 单字节转十六进制字符串
- `public static byte[] decodeHex(String hex)` - Converts hex string to byte array / 十六进制字符串转字节数组
- `public static byte[] decodeHex(char[] hex)` - Converts hex char array to byte array / 十六进制字符数组转字节数组
- `public static boolean isHexNumber(String str)` - Checks whether the string is a hex number / 判断是否为十六进制数
- `public static boolean isHexString(String str)` - Checks whether the string is a valid hex string / 判断是否为有效的十六进制字符串
- `public static String format(String hex)` - Formats hex string with spaces between each byte pair / 格式化十六进制字符串（每两位加空格）
- `public static String normalize(String hex)` - Removes spaces and separators from a hex string / 移除十六进制字符串中的空格和分隔符
- `public static String toHex(int value)` - Converts an integer to a hex string / 整数转十六进制字符串
- `public static String toHex(long value)` - Converts a long to a hex string / 长整数转十六进制字符串
- `public static int toInt(String hex)` - Converts a hex string to an integer / 十六进制字符串转整数
- `public static long toLong(String hex)` - Converts a hex string to a long / 十六进制字符串转长整数

### OpenMath
`public final class OpenMath` - Math Utility Class - High-precision arithmetic, statistics and number theory operations / 数学工具类 - 高精度运算、统计和数论操作

- `public static BigDecimal add(BigDecimal a, BigDecimal b)` - High-precision addition of two BigDecimal values. / 高精度加法
- `public static BigDecimal subtract(BigDecimal a, BigDecimal b)` - High-precision subtraction of two BigDecimal values. / 高精度减法
- `public static BigDecimal multiply(BigDecimal a, BigDecimal b)` - High-precision multiplication of two BigDecimal values. / 高精度乘法
- `public static BigDecimal divide(BigDecimal a, BigDecimal b, int scale)` - High-precision division with half-up rounding. / 高精度除法
- `public static BigDecimal divide(BigDecimal a, BigDecimal b, int scale, RoundingMode mode)` - High-precision division with specified rounding mode. / 高精度除法（指定舍入模式）
- `public static double round(double value, int scale)` - Rounds a double value to the specified number of decimal places using half-up rounding. / 四舍五入保留指定小数位
- `public static double ceil(double value, int scale)` - Rounds a double value up to the specified number of decimal places. / 向上取整
- `public static double floor(double value, int scale)` - Rounds a double value down to the specified number of decimal places. / 向下取整
- `public static double mean(double... values)` - Calculates the arithmetic mean of the given values. / 计算平均值
- `public static double median(double... values)` - Calculates the median of the given values. / 计算中位数
- `public static double variance(double... values)` - Calculates the population variance of the given values. / 计算方差
- `public static double stdDev(double... values)` - Calculates the population standard deviation of the given values. / 计算标准差
- `public static double sum(double... values)` - Calculates the sum of the given double values. / 计算总和
- `public static long sum(long... values)` - Calculates the sum of the given long values using overflow-safe addition. / 计算 long 数组的总和（溢出安全）
- `public static int sum(int... values)` - Calculates the sum of the given int values using overflow-safe addition. / 计算 int 数组的总和（溢出安全）
- `public static int gcd(int a, int b)` - Greatest Common Divisor (GCD) / 最大公约数（GCD）
- `public static long gcd(long a, long b)` - Greatest Common Divisor (long) / 最大公约数（long）
- `public static int lcm(int a, int b)` - Least Common Multiple (LCM) / 最小公倍数（LCM）
- `public static long lcm(long a, long b)` - Least Common Multiple (long) / 最小公倍数（long）
- `public static long factorial(int n)` - Calculates the factorial of n (n must be in [0, 20]). / 阶乘
- `public static BigInteger factorialBig(int n)` - Calculates the factorial of n as a BigInteger (arbitrary precision). / 阶乘（大数）
- `public static boolean isPrime(long n)` - Returns true if n is a prime number. / 素数判断
- `public static long fibonacci(int n)` - Returns the n-th Fibonacci number. / 斐波那契数列
- `public static long pow(long base, int exponent)` - Computes base raised to the power of exponent using overflow-safe multiplication. / 求幂（溢出安全）
- `public static long modPow(long base, long exponent, long modulus)` - Computes (base ^ exponent) mod modulus using BigInteger. / 模幂运算
- `public static int abs(int value)` - Absolute value (safe: throws on Integer.MIN_VALUE instead of returning negative). / 绝对值（安全：Integer.MIN_VALUE 时抛出异常）
- `public static long abs(long value)` - Absolute value (long, safe: throws on Long.MIN_VALUE instead of returning negative). / 绝对值（long，安全）
- `public static int signum(int value)` - Returns the signum of the value: -1, 0, or 1. / 符号函数
- `public static int signum(long value)` - Returns the signum of the long value: -1, 0, or 1. / 符号函数（long）
- `public static boolean isEven(int value)` - Returns true if the value is even. / 是否为偶数
- `public static boolean isOdd(int value)` - Returns true if the value is odd. / 是否为奇数
- `public static boolean isNegative(int value)` - Returns true if the value is negative. / 是否为负数
- `public static boolean isPositive(int value)` - Returns true if the value is positive. / 是否为正数

### OpenNumber
`public final class OpenNumber` - Number Utility Class - Validation, parsing, conversion, formatting and arithmetic / 数字工具类 - 数字验证、解析、转换、格式化和算术运算

- `public static boolean isNumber(String str)` - Returns true if the string represents a valid number. / 检查字符串是否为数字
- `public static boolean isInteger(String str)` - Returns true if the string represents a valid integer. / 检查字符串是否为整数
- `public static boolean isLong(String str)` - Returns true if the string can be parsed as a long value. / 检查字符串是否为 long 类型整数
- `public static boolean isDouble(String str)` - Returns true if the string can be parsed as a double value. / 检查字符串是否为 double 类型数字
- `public static boolean isCreatable(String str)` - Returns true if the string can be created as a Number (including hex and octal). / 检查字符串是否可创建为 Number（包括十六进制和八进制）
- `public static boolean isParsable(String str)` - Returns true if the string can be parsed as a decimal number (no hex/octal). / 检查字符串是否可解析为十进制数字
- `public static int toInt(String str, int defaultValue)` - Parses the string as an int, returning the default value on failure. / 解析字符串为 int，失败返回默认值
- `public static long toLong(String str, long defaultValue)` - Parses the string as a long, returning the default value on failure. / 解析字符串为 long，失败返回默认值
- `public static float toFloat(String str, float defaultValue)` - Parses the string as a float, returning the default value on failure. / 解析字符串为 float，失败返回默认值
- `public static double toDouble(String str, double defaultValue)` - Parses the string as a double, returning the default value on failure. / 解析字符串为 double，失败返回默认值
- `public static BigDecimal toBigDecimal(String str)` - Parses the string as a BigDecimal, returning null on failure. / 解析字符串为 BigDecimal，失败返回 null
- `public static BigDecimal toBigDecimal(String str, BigDecimal defaultValue)` - Parses the string as a BigDecimal, returning the default value on failure. / 解析字符串为 BigDecimal，失败返回默认值
- `public static BigInteger toBigInteger(String str)` - Parses the string as a BigInteger, returning null on failure. / 解析字符串为 BigInteger，失败返回 null
- `public static OptionalInt tryParseInt(String str)` - Tries to parse the string as an int, returning OptionalInt.empty() on failure. / 尝试解析字符串为 int，返回 Optional
- `public static OptionalLong tryParseLong(String str)` - Tries to parse the string as a long, returning OptionalLong.empty() on failure. / 尝试解析字符串为 long，返回 Optional
- `public static OptionalDouble tryParseDouble(String str)` - Tries to parse the string as a double, returning OptionalDouble.empty() on failure. / 尝试解析字符串为 double，返回 Optional
- `public static int saturatedCast(long value)` - Converts a long to an int, clamping to Integer.MAX_VALUE or Integer.MIN_VALUE on overflow. / 将 long 转为 int，溢出时截断
- `public static int checkedCast(long value)` - Converts a long to an int, throwing ArithmeticException on overflow. / 将 long 转为 int，溢出时抛出异常
- `public static int saturatedCast(BigDecimal value)` - Converts a BigDecimal to an int, clamping on overflow. / 将 BigDecimal 转为 int，溢出时截断
- `public static int compare(int x, int y)` - Compares two int values. / 比较两个 int 值
- `public static int compare(long x, long y)` - Compares two long values. / 比较两个 long 值
- `public static int compare(double x, double y)` - Compares two double values. / 比较两个 double 值
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> T max(T a, T b)` - Returns the larger of two Comparable values. / 返回两个值中的较大值
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> T min(T a, T b)` - Returns the smaller of two Comparable values. / 返回两个值中的较小值
- `public static int max(int... array)` - Returns the maximum value in the int array. / 返回数组中的最大值
- `public static int min(int... array)` - Returns the minimum value in the int array. / 返回数组中的最小值
- `public static long max(long... array)` - Returns the maximum value in the long array. / 返回 long 数组中的最大值
- `public static long min(long... array)` - Returns the minimum value in the long array. / 返回 long 数组中的最小值
- `public static int clamp(int value, int min, int max)` - Clamps the value to the range [min, max]. / 限制值在指定范围内
- `public static long clamp(long value, long min, long max)` - Clamps the long value to the range [min, max]. / 限制值在指定范围内
- `public static double clamp(double value, double min, double max)` - Clamps the double value to the range [min, max]. / 限制值在指定范围内
- `public static int constrainToRange(int value, int min, int max)` - Constrains the value to the range [min, max] (alias for clamp). / 限制值在指定范围内（clamp 别名）
- `public static boolean inRange(int value, int min, int max)` - Returns true if the value is within the range [min, max]. / 检查值是否在范围内 [min, max]
- `public static boolean inRange(long value, long min, long max)` - Returns true if the long value is within the range [min, max]. / 检查值是否在范围内
- `public static BigDecimal add(Number... values)` - High-precision addition of multiple Number values. / 高精度加法
- `public static BigDecimal subtract(BigDecimal a, BigDecimal b)` - High-precision subtraction. / 高精度减法
- `public static BigDecimal multiply(BigDecimal a, BigDecimal b)` - High-precision multiplication. / 高精度乘法
- `public static BigDecimal divide(BigDecimal a, BigDecimal b, int scale)` - High-precision division with half-up rounding. / 高精度除法
- `public static BigDecimal divide(BigDecimal a, BigDecimal b, int scale, RoundingMode mode)` - High-precision division with specified rounding mode. / 高精度除法
- `public static BigDecimal round(BigDecimal value, int scale)` - Rounds the BigDecimal value to the specified scale using half-up rounding. / 四舍五入保留指定小数位
- `public static BigDecimal round(BigDecimal value, int scale, RoundingMode mode)` - Rounds the BigDecimal value to the specified scale with the given rounding mode. / 使用指定舍入模式保留小数位
- `public static double round(double value, int scale)` - Rounds the double value to the specified number of decimal places. / 四舍五入
- `public static BigDecimal roundHalfEven(BigDecimal value, int scale)` - Rounds the BigDecimal value using banker's rounding (HALF_EVEN). / 银行家舍入（四舍六入五成双）
- `public static String format(double value, String pattern)` - Formats a double value using the given pattern. / 格式化数值
- `public static String format(BigDecimal value, String pattern)` - Formats a BigDecimal value using the given pattern. / 格式化数值
- `public static String formatPercent(double value, int scale)` - Formats a double value as a percentage string with the given number of decimal places. / 格式化为百分比字符串
- `public static String formatMoney(BigDecimal value)` - Formats a BigDecimal value as a currency string. / 格式化为货币

### OpenObject
`public final class OpenObject` - Object Utility Class - Comprehensive object operations / 对象工具类 - 全面的对象操作支持

- `public static boolean isNull(Object obj)` - Returns true if the object is null. / 检查对象是否为 null
- `public static boolean isNotNull(Object obj)` - Returns true if the object is not null. / 检查对象是否非 null
- `public static boolean isEmpty(Object obj)` - Returns true if the object is considered empty. / 检查对象是否为空
- `public static boolean isNotEmpty(Object obj)` - Returns true if the object is not considered empty. / 检查对象是否非空
- `public static boolean isAnyNull(Object... values)` - Returns true if any of the values is null. / 检查是否任意一个为 null
- `public static boolean isAllNull(Object... values)` - Returns true if all of the values are null. / 检查是否全部为 null
- `public static boolean isAnyEmpty(Object... values)` - Returns true if any of the values is empty. / 检查是否任意一个为空
- `public static boolean isAllEmpty(Object... values)` - Returns true if all of the values are empty. / 检查是否全部为空
- `public static <T> T defaultIfNull(T object, T defaultValue)` - Returns the object if non-null, otherwise returns the default value. / 如果对象为 null 则返回默认值
- `public static <T> T defaultIfNull(T object, Supplier<T> defaultSupplier)` - Returns the object if non-null, otherwise invokes the supplier for the default value. / 如果对象为 null 则调用 Supplier 获取默认值
- `public static <T> T defaultIfEmpty(T object, T defaultValue)` - Returns the object if non-empty, otherwise returns the default value. / 如果对象为空则返回默认值
- `public static <T> T firstNonNull(T... values)` - Returns the first non-null value from the array, or null if all are null. / 返回数组中第一个非 null 的值
- `public static <T> T firstNonNull(Supplier<T> defaultSupplier, T... values)` - Returns the first non-null value, falling back to the supplier if all are null. / 返回第一个非 null 的值，如果都为 null 则调用 Supplier
- `public static <T> T requireNonNullElseGet(T obj, Supplier<? extends T> supplier)` - Returns the object if non-null, otherwise invokes the supplier (JDK 9+ style). / 如果对象非 null 则返回，否则调用 Supplier
- `public static <T, R> R nullSafeGet(T obj, Function<T, R> getter)` - Null-safe property accessor: applies the getter and returns null if the object is null. / null 安全的属性获取
- `public static <T, R> R nullSafeGet(T obj, Function<T, R> getter, R defaultValue)` - Null-safe property accessor with default value. / null 安全的属性获取（带默认值）
- `public static <T, R> Optional<R> nullSafeGetOptional(T obj, Function<T, R> getter)` - Null-safe property accessor returning an Optional. / 链式 null 安全获取（返回 Optional）
- `public static boolean equals(Object obj1, Object obj2)` - Null-safe equality check. / null 安全的对象比较
- `public static boolean notEquals(Object obj1, Object obj2)` - Returns true if the two objects are not equal. / 检查两个对象是否不相等
- `public static boolean deepEquals(Object obj1, Object obj2)` - Performs a deep equality comparison of two objects. / 深度比较两个对象
- `public static <T extends Comparable<? super T>> int compare(T c1, T c2)` - Compares two Comparable objects, with null treated as less than non-null. / 比较两个 Comparable 对象（null 小于非 null）
- `public static <T extends Comparable<? super T>> int compare(T c1, T c2, boolean nullGreater)` - Compares two Comparable objects with configurable null ordering. / 比较两个 Comparable 对象（可配置 null 顺序）
- `public static <T extends Comparable<? super T>> T max(T a, T b)` - Returns the larger of the two Comparable values. / 返回较大值
- `public static <T extends Comparable<? super T>> T min(T a, T b)` - Returns the smaller of the two Comparable values. / 返回较小值
- `public static boolean isBasicType(Object obj)` - Returns true if the object is a primitive type or its wrapper. / 检查是否为基本类型或其包装类型
- `public static boolean isArray(Object obj)` - Returns true if the object is an array. / 检查是否为数组
- `public static boolean isPrimitiveArray(Object obj)` - Returns true if the object is a primitive array. / 检查是否为原始类型数组
- `public static boolean isInstance(Object obj, Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the object is an instance of the specified class. / 检查对象是否为指定类的实例
- `public static Class<?> getType(Object obj)` - Returns the runtime type of the object, or null if the object is null. / 获取对象的类型
- `public static boolean isWrapperType(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is a primitive wrapper type. / 检查是否为包装类型
- `public static boolean isPrimitiveOrWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Returns true if the class is a primitive type or its wrapper. / 检查是否为原始类型或包装类型
- `public static int hashCode(Object... values)` - Computes the hash code for the given values. / 计算对象的哈希值
- `public static int identityHashCode(Object obj)` - Returns the identity hash code of the object. / 获取对象的身份哈希值
- `public static <T> T clone(T obj)` - Clones the object if it implements Cloneable, otherwise returns null. / 克隆对象
- `public static <T> T cloneIfPossible(T obj)` - Clones the object if possible, otherwise returns the original. / 克隆对象，如果无法克隆则返回原对象
- `public static byte[] serialize(Serializable obj)` - Serializes the object to a byte array. / 序列化对象为字节数组
- `public static <T> T deserialize(byte[] bytes)` - Deserializes a byte array to an object. / 反序列化字节数组为对象
- `public static String toString(Object obj)` - Returns a string representation of the object, or "null" if the object is null. / 返回对象的字符串表示，null 返回 "null"
- `public static String toString(Object obj, String nullDefault)` - Returns a string representation of the object, or the specified default if null. / 返回对象的字符串表示，null 返回指定默认值
- `public static String toDebugString(Object obj)` - Returns a debug string with the object's class name, identity hash and value. / 返回包含类名、身份哈希和值的调试字符串
- `public static <T> Optional<T> toOptional(T obj)` - Wraps the object in an Optional. / 将对象包装为 Optional

### OpenRadix
`public final class OpenRadix` - Radix Conversion Utility Class - Binary, octal, decimal, hexadecimal and custom radix conversion / 进制转换工具类 - 二进制、八进制、十进制、十六进制及自定义进制转换

- `public static String decimalToBinary(long value)` - Converts decimal to binary / 十进制转二进制
- `public static String decimalToOctal(long value)` - Converts decimal to octal / 十进制转八进制
- `public static String decimalToHexadecimal(long value)` - Converts decimal to hexadecimal / 十进制转十六进制
- `public static String decimalToHexadecimalLower(long value)` - Converts decimal to hexadecimal (lowercase) / 十进制转十六进制（小写）
- `public static String toBase(long value, int radix)` - Converts decimal to any radix (2-36) / 十进制转任意进制（2-36）
- `public static String toBaseExtended(long value, int radix)` - Converts decimal to any radix (2-62, extended) / 十进制转任意进制（2-62，扩展）
- `public static long binaryToDecimal(String binary)` - Converts binary to decimal / 二进制转十进制
- `public static long octalToDecimal(String octal)` - Converts octal to decimal / 八进制转十进制
- `public static long hexadecimalToDecimal(String hex)` - Converts hexadecimal to decimal / 十六进制转十进制
- `public static long fromBase(String value, int radix)` - Converts any radix to decimal (2-36) / 任意进制转十进制（2-36）
- `public static long fromBaseExtended(String value, int radix)` - Converts any radix to decimal (2-62, extended) / 任意进制转十进制（2-62，扩展）
- `public static String binaryToHex(String binary)` - Converts binary to hexadecimal / 二进制转十六进制
- `public static String hexToBinary(String hex)` - Converts hexadecimal to binary / 十六进制转二进制
- `public static String octalToHex(String octal)` - Converts octal to hexadecimal / 八进制转十六进制
- `public static String hexToOctal(String hex)` - Converts hexadecimal to octal / 十六进制转八进制
- `public static String convert(String value, int sourceRadix, int targetRadix)` - General radix conversion / 通用进制转换
- `public static String formatBinary(long value)` - Formats binary (groups of 4) / 格式化二进制（每 4 位一组）
- `public static String formatHex(long value)` - Formats hexadecimal (groups of 2) / 格式化十六进制（每 2 位一组）
- `public static boolean isBinary(String str)` - Checks if the string is a valid binary string / 验证是否为有效的二进制字符串
- `public static boolean isOctal(String str)` - Checks if the string is a valid octal string / 验证是否为有效的八进制字符串
- `public static boolean isHexadecimal(String str)` - Checks if the string is a valid hexadecimal string / 验证是否为有效的十六进制字符串

### OpenStream
`public final class OpenStream` - Stream Utility Class - Enhanced Stream operations with JDK 25 Gatherers support / Stream 工具类 - 增强的 Stream 操作，支持 JDK 25 Gatherers

- `public static <T> Stream<T> of(T... elements)` - Creates a stream from varargs / 从可变参数创建Stream
- `public static <T> Stream<T> from(Iterable<T> iterable)` - Creates a stream from an iterable / 从Iterable创建Stream
- `public static <T> Stream<T> from(Iterator<T> iterator)` - Creates a stream from an iterator / 从Iterator创建Stream
- `public static <T> Stream<T> from(Optional<T> optional)` - Creates a stream from an optional / 从Optional创建Stream
- `public static IntStream range(int startInclusive, int endExclusive)` - Creates an int range stream / 创建整数范围Stream
- `public static IntStream rangeClosed(int startInclusive, int endInclusive)` - Creates an int range stream (closed) / 创建闭区间整数范围Stream
- `public static LongStream range(long startInclusive, long endExclusive)` - Creates a long range stream / 创建长整数范围Stream
- `public static <T> Stream<T> generate(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Generates an infinite stream / 生成无限Stream
- `public static <T> Stream<T> iterate(T seed, UnaryOperator<T> next)` - Generates an infinite stream with seed / 使用种子生成无限Stream
- `public static <T> Stream<T> iterate(T seed, Predicate<T> hasNext, UnaryOperator<T> next)` - Generates a finite stream with seed and predicate / 使用种子和谓词生成有限Stream
- `public static <T> List<List<T>> batch(Stream<T> stream, int batchSize)` - Splits stream into batches of fixed size / 将Stream分割成固定大小的批次
- `public static <T> Stream<List<T>> batchStream(Collection<T> source, int batchSize)` - Creates a stream of batches / 创建批次流
- `public static <T> Stream<List<T>> slidingWindow(Collection<T> source, int windowSize)` - Creates a sliding window stream / 创建滑动窗口流
- `public static <T> Stream<List<T>> slidingWindow(Collection<T> source, int windowSize, int step)` - Creates a sliding window stream with custom step / 创建自定义步长的滑动窗口流
- `public static <T> Stream<List<T>> tumblingWindow(Collection<T> source, int windowSize)` - Creates a tumbling window stream (non-overlapping) / 创建翻滚窗口流(不重叠)
- `public static <A, B, R> Stream<R> zip(` - Zips two streams into pairs / 将两个流合并成对
- `public static <T> Stream<IndexedValue<T>> zipWithIndex(Stream<T> stream)` - Zips stream with indices / 将流与索引合并
- `public record IndexedValue<T>(long index, T value)` - Indexed value record / 带索引的值记录
- `public static <T> Stream<T> merge(Stream<T>... streams)` - Merges multiple streams / 合并多个流
- `public static <T> Stream<T> interleave(Stream<T> streamA, Stream<T> streamB)` - Interleaves two streams / 交错合并两个流
- `public static <T> Stream<T> filterNulls(Stream<T> stream)` - Filters nulls from stream / 从流中过滤空值
- `public static <T, K> Stream<T> distinctBy(Stream<T> stream, Function<T, K> keyExtractor)` - Distinct by key / 按键去重
- `public static <T> Stream<T> takeWhile(Stream<T> stream, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Takes elements while predicate is true / 在谓词为真时获取元素
- `public static <T> Stream<T> dropWhile(Stream<T> stream, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Drops elements while predicate is true / 在谓词为真时跳过元素
- `public static <T> Optional<T> findFirst(Stream<T> stream, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Finds first matching element / 查找第一个匹配元素
- `public static <T> boolean anyMatch(Stream<T> stream, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Checks if any element matches / 检查是否有元素匹配
- `public static <T> boolean allMatch(Stream<T> stream, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Checks if all elements match / 检查是否所有元素都匹配
- `public static <T> boolean noneMatch(Stream<T> stream, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Checks if no elements match / 检查是否没有元素匹配
- `public static <T> List<T> toUnmodifiableList(Stream<T> stream)` - Collects to unmodifiable list / 收集为不可变列表
- `public static <T> Set<T> toUnmodifiableSet(Stream<T> stream)` - Collects to unmodifiable set / 收集为不可变集合
- `public static <T, K> Map<K, T> toMap(Stream<T> stream, Function<T, K> keyMapper)` - Collects to map with key extractor / 使用键提取器收集为Map
- `public static <T, K, V> Map<K, V> toMap(` - Collects to map with key and value extractors / 使用键和值提取器收集为Map
- `public static <T, K> Map<K, List<T>> groupBy(Stream<T> stream, Function<T, K> keyMapper)` - Groups by key / 按键分组
- `public static <T> Map<Boolean, List<T>> partitionBy(Stream<T> stream, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Partitions by predicate / 按谓词分区
- `public static <T> String joining(Stream<T> stream, CharSequence delimiter)` - Joins to string / 连接为字符串
- `public static <T> String joining(` - Joins to string with prefix and suffix / 使用前缀和后缀连接为字符串
- `public static <T, R> List<R> parallelMap(` - Processes in parallel with limited concurrency / 使用有限并发进行并行处理
- `public static <T, R> List<R> parallelMap(Collection<T> source, Function<T, R> mapper)` - Processes in parallel and collects results / 并行处理并收集结果
- `public static <T> List<T> parallelFilter(Collection<T> source, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Filters in parallel / 并行过滤
- `public static <T> long count(Stream<T> stream)` - Counts elements / 统计元素数量
- `public static int sumInt(IntStream stream)` - Gets sum of integers / 获取整数和
- `public static long sumLong(LongStream stream)` - Gets sum of longs / 获取长整数和
- `public static double sumDouble(DoubleStream stream)` - Gets sum of doubles / 获取双精度数和
- `public static OptionalDouble averageInt(IntStream stream)` - Gets average of integers / 获取整数平均值
- `public static <T> Optional<T> max(Stream<T> stream, Comparator<T> comparator)` - Gets max element / 获取最大元素
- `public static <T> Optional<T> min(Stream<T> stream, Comparator<T> comparator)` - Gets min element / 获取最小元素
- `public static <T> Stream<T> peek(Stream<T> stream, Consumer<T> action)` - Peeks at each element for debugging / 查看每个元素用于调试
- `public static <T> Stream<T> limit(Stream<T> stream, long maxSize)` - Limits stream size / 限制流大小
- `public static <T> Stream<T> skip(Stream<T> stream, long n)` - Skips first n elements / 跳过前n个元素
- `public static <T> Stream<T> sorted(Stream<T> stream, Comparator<T> comparator)` - Sorts stream / 排序流
- `public static <T> Stream<T> flatten(Stream<Stream<T>> stream)` - Flattens nested streams / 展平嵌套流
- `public static <T> Stream<T> flattenCollections(Stream<? extends Collection<T>> stream)` - Flattens nested collections / 展平嵌套集合

### OpenStringBase
`public final class OpenStringBase` - Basic String Utility Class - Minimal string operations for core module / 基础字符串工具类 - 核心模块的最小字符串操作

- `public static boolean isEmpty(CharSequence cs)` - Checks if empty (null or length is 0) / 检查是否为空（null 或长度为 0）
- `public static boolean isNotEmpty(CharSequence cs)` - Checks if not empty / 检查是否非空
- `public static boolean isBlank(CharSequence cs)` - Checks if blank (null, empty, or contains only whitespace) / 检查是否为空白（null、空或只含空白字符）
- `public static boolean isNotBlank(CharSequence cs)` - Checks if not blank / 检查是否非空白
- `public static boolean hasLength(CharSequence cs)` - Checks if it has length (non-null and length > 0) / 检查是否有长度（非 null 且长度 > 0）
- `public static boolean hasText(CharSequence cs)` - Checks if it has text (non-blank) / 检查是否有文本（非空白）
- `public static int length(CharSequence cs)` - Gets length in a null-safe manner / null 安全获取长度
- `public static String defaultIfEmpty(String str, String defaultValue)` - Returns default value when empty / 空时返回默认值
- `public static String defaultIfBlank(String str, String defaultValue)` - Returns default value when blank / 空白时返回默认值
- `public static String nullToEmpty(String str)` - Converts null to empty string / null 转为空字符串
- `public static String emptyToNull(String str)` - Converts empty string to null / 空字符串转为 null
- `public static String trimToNull(String str)` - Returns null if empty after trim / trim 后为空则返回 null
- `public static String trimToEmpty(String str)` - Returns empty string if empty after trim / trim 后为空则返回空字符串
- `public static boolean equals(CharSequence cs1, CharSequence cs2)` - Null-safe string comparison / null 安全的字符串比较
- `public static boolean equalsIgnoreCase(String str1, String str2)` - Null-safe case-insensitive comparison / null 安全的忽略大小写比较
- `public static String trim(String str)` - Safe trim / 安全 trim
- `public static String toLowerCase(String str)` - Safe lowercase conversion / 安全转小写
- `public static String toUpperCase(String str)` - Safe uppercase conversion / 安全转大写
- `public static boolean startsWith(String str, String prefix)` - Checks if the string starts with the specified prefix / 检查是否以指定前缀开始
- `public static boolean endsWith(String str, String suffix)` - Checks if the string ends with the specified suffix / 检查是否以指定后缀结束
- `public static boolean contains(CharSequence str, CharSequence searchStr)` - Checks if the string contains the specified substring / 检查是否包含指定子串

### Ordering
`public abstract class Ordering<T>` - Ordering - Fluent comparator builder / 排序器 - 流式比较器构建器

- `public static <T extends Comparable<? super T>> Ordering<T> natural()` - Returns an ordering that uses the natural order of the values. / 返回使用值的自然顺序的排序器。
- `public static <T> Ordering<T> from(Comparator<T> comparator)` - Creates an ordering from an existing comparator. / 从现有比较器创建排序器。
- `public static <T, U extends Comparable<? super U>> Ordering<T> from(` - Creates an ordering by extracting a comparable key. / 通过提取可比较的键创建排序器。
- `public static <T, U> Ordering<T> from(` - Creates an ordering by extracting a key and using a comparator. / 通过提取键并使用比较器创建排序器。
- `public static <T> Ordering<T> allEqual()` - Returns an ordering that treats all values as equal. / 返回将所有值视为相等的排序器。
- `public static <T> Ordering<T> explicit(T... valuesInOrder)` - Returns an ordering based on the iteration order of explicit values. / 返回基于显式值迭代顺序的排序器。
- `public static <T> Ordering<T> explicit(List<T> valuesInOrder)` - Returns an ordering based on the iteration order of explicit values. / 返回基于显式值迭代顺序的排序器。
- `public Ordering<T> reversed()` - Returns the reverse ordering. / 返回反向排序器。
- `public Ordering<T> nullsFirst()` - Returns an ordering that treats null as less than all other values. / 返回将 null 视为最小值的排序器。
- `public Ordering<T> nullsLast()` - Returns an ordering that treats null as greater than all other values. / 返回将 null 视为最大值的排序器。
- `public Ordering<T> thenComparing(Comparator<? super T> secondary)` - Returns a compound ordering with a secondary comparator. / 返回具有次要比较器的复合排序器。
- `public <U extends Comparable<? super U>> Ordering<T> thenComparing(` - Returns a compound ordering using a key extractor. / 使用键提取器返回复合排序器。
- `public <F> Ordering<F> onResultOf(Function<F, ? extends T> function)` - Returns an ordering that applies a function before comparing. / 返回在比较前应用函数的排序器。
- `public T min(T a, T b)` - Returns the minimum of two values. / 返回两个值中的最小值。
- `public final T min(T first, T second, T... rest)` - Returns the minimum of the given values. / 返回给定值中的最小值。
- `public T min(Iterable<T> iterable)` - Returns the minimum value in an iterable. / 返回可迭代对象中的最小值。
- `public T max(T a, T b)` - Returns the maximum of two values. / 返回两个值中的最大值。
- `public final T max(T first, T second, T... rest)` - Returns the maximum of the given values. / 返回给定值中的最大值。
- `public T max(Iterable<T> iterable)` - Returns the maximum value in an iterable. / 返回可迭代对象中的最大值。
- `public List<T> leastOf(Iterable<T> iterable, int k)` - Returns the k smallest elements in the given iterable. / 返回给定可迭代对象中最小的 k 个元素。
- `public List<T> greatestOf(Iterable<T> iterable, int k)` - Returns the k greatest elements in the given iterable. / 返回给定可迭代对象中最大的 k 个元素。
- `public List<T> sortedCopy(Iterable<T> iterable)` - Returns a sorted copy of the given iterable. / 返回给定可迭代对象的排序副本。
- `public List<T> immutableSortedCopy(Iterable<T> iterable)` - Returns an immutable sorted copy of the given iterable. / 返回给定可迭代对象的不可变排序副本。
- `public boolean isOrdered(Iterable<T> iterable)` - Returns true if the iterable is sorted according to this ordering. / 如果可迭代对象按此排序器排序则返回 true。
- `public boolean isStrictlyOrdered(Iterable<T> iterable)` - Returns true if the iterable is strictly sorted according to this ordering. / 如果可迭代对象按此排序器严格排序则返回 true。

### Preconditions
`public final class Preconditions` - Preconditions Class - Parameter validation and state checking (Guava-style) / 前置条件类 - 参数验证和状态检查（Guava 风格）

- `public static <T> T checkNotNull(T reference)` - Checks that the object is not null, otherwise throws NullPointerException. / 检查对象非 null，否则抛出 NullPointerException
- `public static <T> T checkNotNull(T reference, String errorMessage)` - Checks that the object is not null, otherwise throws NullPointerException with message. / 检查对象非 null（带消息）
- `public static <T> T checkNotNull(T reference, String template, Object... args)` - Checks that the object is not null, otherwise throws NullPointerException with formatted message. / 检查对象非 null（带格式化消息）
- `public static void checkArgument(boolean expression)` - Checks the argument condition, otherwise throws IllegalArgumentException. / 检查参数条件，否则抛出异常
- `public static void checkArgument(boolean expression, String errorMessage)` - Checks the argument condition, otherwise throws IllegalArgumentException with message. / 检查参数条件（带消息）
- `public static void checkArgument(boolean expression, String template, Object... args)` - Checks the argument condition, otherwise throws IllegalArgumentException with formatted message. / 检查参数条件（带格式化消息）
- `public static void checkState(boolean expression)` - Checks the state condition, otherwise throws IllegalStateException. / 检查状态条件，否则抛出异常
- `public static void checkState(boolean expression, String errorMessage)` - Checks the state condition, otherwise throws IllegalStateException with message. / 检查状态条件（带消息）
- `public static void checkState(boolean expression, String template, Object... args)` - Checks the state condition, otherwise throws IllegalStateException with formatted message. / 检查状态条件（带格式化消息）
- `public static int checkElementIndex(int index, int size)` - Checks if the element index is valid [0, size) / 检查元素索引是否有效 [0, size)
- `public static int checkElementIndex(int index, int size, String desc)` - Checks if the element index is valid [0, size) / 检查元素索引是否有效 [0, size)
- `public static int checkPositionIndex(int index, int size)` - Checks if the position index is valid [0, size] / 检查位置索引是否有效 [0, size]
- `public static int checkPositionIndex(int index, int size, String desc)` - Checks if the position index is valid [0, size] / 检查位置索引是否有效 [0, size]
- `public static void checkPositionIndexes(int start, int end, int size)` - Checks if the position range is valid [start, end] and end <= size. / 检查位置范围是否有效

### Range
`public final class Range<C` - Range - A contiguous span of values / 范围 - 连续的值域

- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> closed(C lower, C upper)` - Creates a closed range [lower, upper]. / 创建闭区间 [lower, upper]。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> open(C lower, C upper)` - Creates an open range (lower, upper). / 创建开区间 (lower, upper)。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> closedOpen(C lower, C upper)` - Creates a closed-open range [lower, upper). / 创建左闭右开区间 [lower, upper)。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> openClosed(C lower, C upper)` - Creates an open-closed range (lower, upper]. / 创建左开右闭区间 (lower, upper]。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> atMost(C upper)` - Creates a range with no lower bound (-∞, upper]. / 创建无下界范围 (-∞, upper]。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> lessThan(C upper)` - Creates a range with no lower bound (-∞, upper). / 创建无下界范围 (-∞, upper)。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> atLeast(C lower)` - Creates a range with no upper bound [lower, +∞). / 创建无上界范围 [lower, +∞)。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> greaterThan(C lower)` - Creates a range with no upper bound (lower, +∞). / 创建无上界范围 (lower, +∞)。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> all()` - Creates a range containing all values (-∞, +∞). / 创建包含所有值的范围 (-∞, +∞)。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> singleton(C value)` - Creates a singleton range [value, value]. / 创建单值范围 [value, value]。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> encloseAll(C... values)` - Creates the minimal range enclosing all given values. / 创建包含所有给定值的最小范围。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> Range<C> encloseAll(Iterable<C> values)` - Creates the minimal range enclosing all values in the iterable. / 创建包含可迭代对象中所有值的最小范围。
- `public boolean hasLowerBound()` - Returns true if this range has a lower bound. / 如果此范围有下界返回 true。
- `public boolean hasUpperBound()` - Returns true if this range has an upper bound. / 如果此范围有上界返回 true。
- `public Optional<C> lowerEndpoint()` - Returns the lower endpoint if present. / 返回下界端点（如果存在）。
- `public Optional<C> upperEndpoint()` - Returns the upper endpoint if present. / 返回上界端点（如果存在）。
- `public BoundType lowerBoundType()` - Returns the lower bound type. / 返回下界类型。
- `public BoundType upperBoundType()` - Returns the upper bound type. / 返回上界类型。
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Returns true if this range is empty. / 如果此范围为空返回 true。
- `public boolean contains(C value)` - Returns true if this range contains the given value. / 如果此范围包含给定值返回 true。
- `public final boolean containsAll(C... values)` - Returns true if this range contains all given values. / 如果此范围包含所有给定值返回 true。
- `public boolean containsAll(Iterable<C> values)` - Returns true if this range contains all values in the iterable. / 如果此范围包含可迭代对象中所有值则返回 true。
- `public boolean encloses(Range<C> other)` - Returns true if this range encloses another range. / 如果此范围包含另一个范围返回 true。
- `public boolean isConnected(Range<C> other)` - Returns true if this range is connected to another range. / 如果此范围与另一个范围相连则返回 true。
- `public Range<C> intersection(Range<C> other)` - Returns the intersection of this range with another. / 返回此范围与另一个范围的交集。
- `public Range<C> span(Range<C> other)` - Returns the minimal range enclosing both this range and another. / 返回包含此范围和另一个范围的最小范围。
- `public Optional<Range<C>> gap(Range<C> other)` - Returns the gap between this range and another, if any. / 返回此范围与另一个范围之间的间隙（如果有）。
- `public Range<C> canonical(Function<C, C> nextValue)` - Returns a canonical form of this range using the given domain. / 使用给定域返回此范围的规范形式。
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### Splitter
`public final class Splitter` - Splitter - Fluent string splitting utility / 分割器 - 流式字符串分割工具

- `public static Splitter on(char separator)` - Creates a splitter that uses the given character as separator. / 创建使用给定字符作为分隔符的分割器。
- `public static Splitter on(String separator)` - Creates a splitter that uses the given string as separator. / 创建使用给定字符串作为分隔符的分割器。
- `public static Splitter on(Pattern pattern)` - Creates a splitter that uses the given pattern as separator. / 创建使用给定模式作为分隔符的分割器。
- `public static Splitter onPattern(String regex)` - Creates a splitter that uses the given regex pattern as separator. / 创建使用给定正则模式作为分隔符的分割器。
- `public static Splitter fixedLength(int length)` - Creates a splitter that splits strings into fixed-length parts. / 创建将字符串分割为固定长度部分的分割器。
- `public Splitter omitEmptyStrings()` - Returns a splitter that omits empty strings from results. / 返回从结果中省略空字符串的分割器。
- `public Splitter trimResults()` - Returns a splitter that trims whitespace from results. / 返回从结果中修剪空白的分割器。
- `public Splitter trimResults(Function<String, String> trimFunction)` - Returns a splitter that trims results using the given function. / 返回使用给定函数修剪结果的分割器。
- `public Splitter limit(int limit)` - Returns a splitter that limits the number of parts. / 返回限制部分数量的分割器。
- `public Iterable<String> split(CharSequence input)` - Splits the given string and returns an iterable of parts. / 分割给定字符串并返回部分的可迭代对象。
- `public List<String> splitToList(CharSequence input)` - Splits the given string and returns a list of parts. / 分割给定字符串并返回部分的列表。
- `public Stream<String> splitToStream(CharSequence input)` - Splits the given string and returns a stream of parts. / 分割给定字符串并返回部分的流。
- `public MapSplitter withKeyValueSeparator(char separator)` - Returns a map splitter using the given key-value separator. / 返回使用给定键值分隔符的映射分割器。
- `public MapSplitter withKeyValueSeparator(String separator)` - Returns a map splitter using the given key-value separator. / 返回使用给定键值分隔符的映射分割器。
- `public MapSplitter withKeyValueSeparator(Splitter kvSplitter)` - Returns a map splitter using the given splitter for key-value pairs. / 返回使用给定分割器处理键值对的映射分割器。

### Stopwatch
`public final class Stopwatch` - Stopwatch - A lightweight timing utility for measuring elapsed time / 秒表 - 用于测量经过时间的轻量级计时工具

- `public static Stopwatch createUnstarted()` - Creates an unstarted stopwatch / 创建未启动的秒表
- `public static Stopwatch createStarted()` - Creates and starts a stopwatch / 创建并启动秒表
- `public Stopwatch start()` - Starts or resumes the stopwatch / 启动或恢复秒表
- `public Stopwatch stop()` - Stops the stopwatch / 停止秒表
- `public Stopwatch reset()` - Resets the stopwatch to zero and stops it / 重置秒表为零并停止
- `public boolean isRunning()` - Returns whether the stopwatch is currently running / 返回秒表是否正在运行
