- `public Duration elapsed()` - Returns the elapsed time as a Duration / 返回经过的时间（Duration 格式）
- `public long elapsed(TimeUnit unit)` - Returns the elapsed time in the specified time unit / 返回指定时间单位的经过时间
- `public long elapsedNanos()` - Returns the elapsed time in nanoseconds / 返回经过的纳秒数
- `public long elapsedMillis()` - Returns the elapsed time in milliseconds / 返回经过的毫秒数
- `public long elapsedSeconds()` - Returns the elapsed time in seconds / 返回经过的秒数
- `public String toString()` - Returns a human-readable string representation of the elapsed time. / 返回人类可读的经过时间字符串。

### Suppliers
`public final class Suppliers` - Suppliers - Utility methods for working with Supplier instances / Supplier 工具类 - 处理 Supplier 实例的工具方法

- `public static <T> Supplier<T> memoize(Supplier<T> delegate)` - Returns a supplier that caches the instance supplied by the delegate and returns the cached value. / 返回缓存委托提供值的 Supplier。
- `public static <T> Supplier<T> memoizeWithExpiration(Supplier<T> delegate, long duration, TimeUnit unit)` - Returns a supplier that caches the instance with expiration. / 返回带过期时间的缓存 Supplier。
- `public static <T> Supplier<T> memoizeWithExpiration(Supplier<T> delegate, Duration duration)` - Returns a supplier that caches the instance with expiration. / 返回带过期时间的缓存 Supplier（Duration）。
- `public static <F, T> Supplier<T> compose(Function<? super F, T> function, Supplier<F> delegate)` - Returns a new supplier that applies the given function to the value from the delegate. / 返回将函数应用于委托值的新 Supplier。
- `public static <T> Supplier<T> synchronizedSupplier(Supplier<T> delegate)` - Returns a supplier that synchronizes on itself before calling the delegate's get method. / 返回调用前同步的 Supplier。
- `public static <T> Supplier<T> ofInstance(T instance)` - Returns a supplier that always returns the same instance. / 返回一个始终返回相同实例的 Supplier。

### OpenAssert
`public final class OpenAssert` - Assertion Utility - Comprehensive assertion methods for validation / 断言工具类 - 用于验证的全面断言方法

- `public static <T> T notNull(T object, String message)` - Asserts that the object is not null / 断言对象非 null
- `public static <T> T notNull(T object, String template, Object... args)` - Asserts that the object is not null (with formatted message) / 断言对象非 null（带格式化参数）
- `public static void isTrue(boolean expression, String message)` - Asserts that the condition is true / 断言条件为 true
- `public static void isTrue(boolean expression, String template, Object... args)` - Asserts that the condition is true (with formatted message) / 断言条件为 true（带格式化参数）
- `public static void isFalse(boolean expression, String message)` - Asserts that the condition is false / 断言条件为 false
- `public static void state(boolean expression, String message)` - Asserts the state condition / 断言状态条件
- `public static <T extends CharSequence> T notEmpty(T cs, String message)` - Asserts that the string is not empty / 断言字符串非空
- `public static <T extends CharSequence> T notBlank(T cs, String message)` - Asserts that the string is not blank / 断言字符串非空白
- `public static void matchesPattern(CharSequence input, String pattern, String message)` - Asserts that the string matches the pattern / 断言字符串匹配正则
- `public static <T extends Collection<?>> T notEmpty(T collection, String message)` - Asserts that the collection is not empty / 断言集合非空
- `public static <T extends Map<?, ?>> T notEmpty(T map, String message)` - Asserts that the Map is not empty / 断言 Map 非空
- `public static <T> T[] notEmpty(T[] array, String message)` - Asserts that the array is not empty / 断言数组非空
- `public static <T> T[] noNullElements(T[] array, String message)` - Asserts that the array has no null elements / 断言数组无 null 元素
- `public static <T extends Iterable<?>> T noNullElements(T iterable, String message)` - Asserts that the collection has no null elements / 断言集合无 null 元素
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> T inclusiveBetween(T start, T end, T value)` - Asserts that the value is within inclusive bounds [start, end] / 断言值在包含边界的范围内 [start, end]
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> T inclusiveBetween(T start, T end, T value, String message)` - Asserts that the value is within inclusive bounds [start, end] (with message) / 断言值在包含边界的范围内 [start, end]
- `public static void inclusiveBetween(long start, long end, long value)` - Asserts that the long value is within inclusive bounds / 断言 long 值在包含边界的范围内
- `public static void inclusiveBetween(double start, double end, double value)` - Asserts that the double value is within inclusive bounds / 断言 double 值在包含边界的范围内
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> T exclusiveBetween(T start, T end, T value)` - Asserts that the value is within exclusive bounds (start, end) / 断言值在排除边界的范围内 (start, end)
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> T exclusiveBetween(T start, T end, T value, String message)` - Asserts that the value is within exclusive bounds (start, end) (with message) / 断言值在排除边界的范围内 (start, end)
- `public static void exclusiveBetween(long start, long end, long value)` - Asserts that the long value is within exclusive bounds / 断言 long 值在排除边界的范围内
- `public static void exclusiveBetween(double start, double end, double value)` - Asserts that the double value is within exclusive bounds / 断言 double 值在排除边界的范围内
- `public static void validIndex(int index, int size)` - Asserts that the index is valid [0, size) / 断言索引有效 [0, size)
- `public static void validIndex(int index, int size, String message)` - Asserts that the index is valid [0, size) (with message) / 断言索引有效 [0, size)
- `public static <T> T[] validIndex(T[] array, int index, String message)` - Asserts that the array index is valid / 断言数组索引有效
- `public static <T extends CharSequence> T validIndex(T chars, int index, String message)` - Asserts that the character sequence index is valid / 断言字符序列索引有效
- `public static <T extends Collection<?>> T validIndex(T collection, int index, String message)` - Asserts that the collection index is valid / 断言集合索引有效
- `public static void isInstanceOf(Class<?> type, Object obj, String message)` - Asserts that the object is an instance of the specified type / 断言对象是指定类型的实例
- `public static void isAssignableFrom(Class<?> superType, Class<?> subType, String message)` - Asserts that the type is assignable / 断言类型可赋值

### BeanPath
`public final class BeanPath` - Bean Path Utility Class - Nested property path access / Bean 路径访问工具 - 嵌套属性路径访问

- `public static Object get(Object bean, String path)` - Gets a property value by path / 通过路径获取属性值
- `public static <T> T get(Object bean, String path, Class<T> targetType)` - Gets a property value by path (with type) / 通过路径获取属性值（带类型）
- `public static <T> Optional<T> getOptional(Object bean, String path, Class<T> targetType)` - Safely gets the value (returns Optional) / 安全获取（返回 Optional）
- `public static void set(Object bean, String path, Object value)` - Sets a property value by path / 通过路径设置属性值
- `public static void setWithCreate(Object bean, String path, Object value)` - Sets a property value by path (auto-creating intermediate objects) / 通过路径设置属性值（自动创建中间对象）
- `public static boolean exists(Object bean, String path)` - Checks whether the path exists / 检查路径是否存在
- `public static boolean isNull(Object bean, String path)` - Checks whether the path value is null / 检查路径值是否为 null
- `public static boolean isNotNull(Object bean, String path)` - Checks whether the path value is not null / 检查路径值是否非 null
- `public static List<PathSegment> parsePath(String path)` - Parses the path into a list of segments / 解析路径为段列表
- `public static String getParentPath(String path)` - Gets the parent path / 获取路径的父路径
- `public static String getLastSegment(String path)` - Gets the last segment of the path / 获取路径的最后一段
- `public static String joinPath(String... segments)` - Concatenates paths / 拼接路径
- `public record PropertySegment(String value) implements PathSegment` - Property segment / 属性段
- `public record IndexSegment(String value, int index) implements PathSegment` - Index segment / 索引段
- `public record MapKeySegment(String value, String key) implements PathSegment` - Map Key 段

### OpenBean
`public final class OpenBean` - Bean Utility Class - JavaBean property operations and conversions / Bean 工具类 - JavaBean 属性操作和转换

- `public static void copyProperties(Object source, Object target)` - Copies properties with matching names and types / 复制属性（同名同类型属性）
- `public static void copyProperties(Object source, Object target, String... ignoreProperties)` - Copies properties with ignored properties / 复制属性（带忽略属性）
- `public static void copyProperties(Object source, Object target, Map<String, String> propertyMapping)` - Copies properties with property name mapping / 复制属性（带属性映射）
- `public static void copyProperties(Object source, Object target, PropertyConverter converter)` - Copies properties with a converter / 复制属性（带转换器）
- `public static <T> T copyToNew(Object source, Class<T> targetClass)` - Copies to a new object / 复制到新对象
- `public static <T> T copyToNew(Object source, Class<T> targetClass, String... ignoreProperties)` - Copies to a new object with ignored properties / 复制到新对象（带忽略属性）
- `public static void deepCopyProperties(Object source, Object target)` - Deep copies properties including nested objects / 深度复制属性（包括嵌套对象）
- `public static Map<String, Object> toMap(Object bean)` - Converts a Bean to a Map / Bean 转 Map
- `public static Map<String, Object> toMap(Object bean, String... ignoreProperties)` - Converts a Bean to a Map with ignored properties / Bean 转 Map（带忽略属性）
- `public static Map<String, Object> toMapNonNull(Object bean)` - Converts a Bean to a Map with only non-null properties / Bean 转 Map（仅包含非空属性）
- `public static Map<String, Object> toUnderlineKeyMap(Object bean)` - Converts a Bean to a Map with underline keys / Bean 转 Map（驼峰转下划线 key）
- `public static <T> T toBean(Map<String, ?> map, Class<T> beanClass)` - Converts a Map to a Bean / Map 转 Bean
- `public static <T> T toBean(Map<String, ?> map, Class<T> beanClass, Map<String, String> propertyMapping)` - Converts a Map to a Bean with property name mapping / Map 转 Bean（带属性映射）
- `public static <T> T toBeanFromUnderlineKey(Map<String, ?> map, Class<T> beanClass)` - Converts a Map with underline keys to a Bean / Map 转 Bean（下划线 key 转驼峰）
- `public static Object getProperty(Object bean, String propertyName)` - Gets a property value / 获取属性值
- `public static <T> T getProperty(Object bean, String propertyName, Class<T> targetType)` - Gets a property value with type conversion / 获取属性值（带类型转换）
- `public static <T> Optional<T> getPropertyOptional(Object bean, String propertyName, Class<T> targetType)` - Safely gets a property value returning an Optional / 安全获取属性值（返回 Optional）
- `public static void setProperty(Object bean, String propertyName, Object value)` - Sets a property value / 设置属性值
- `public static void setPropertyWithConvert(Object bean, String propertyName, Object value)` - Sets a property value with type conversion / 设置属性值（带类型转换）
- `public static void setProperties(Object bean, Map<String, ?> properties)` - Sets multiple properties in batch / 批量设置属性
- `public static List<PropertyDescriptor> getPropertyDescriptors(Class<?> beanClass)` - Gets all property descriptors / 获取所有属性描述符
- `public static Optional<PropertyDescriptor> getPropertyDescriptor(Class<?> beanClass, String propertyName)` - Gets the specified property descriptor / 获取指定属性描述符
- `public static List<String> getPropertyNames(Class<?> beanClass)` - Gets all property names / 获取所有属性名
- `public static List<String> getReadablePropertyNames(Class<?> beanClass)` - Gets all readable property names / 获取所有可读属性名
- `public static List<String> getWritablePropertyNames(Class<?> beanClass)` - Gets all writable property names / 获取所有可写属性名
- `public static boolean hasProperty(Class<?> beanClass, String propertyName)` - Checks whether a property exists / 检查属性是否存在
- `public static Class<?> getPropertyType(Class<?> beanClass, String propertyName)` - Gets the property type / 获取属性类型
- `public static boolean equals(Object bean1, Object bean2)` - Compares two Beans for equality on all properties / 比较两个 Bean 是否相等（所有属性）
- `public static boolean equals(Object bean1, Object bean2, String... properties)` - Compares two Beans for equality on specified properties / 比较两个 Bean 是否相等（指定属性）
- `public static Map<String, Object[]> diff(Object bean1, Object bean2)` - Gets the differing properties between two Beans / 获取两个 Bean 的差异属性
- `public static Map<String, Object[]> diff(Object bean1, Object bean2, String... properties)` - Gets the differing properties between two Beans for specified properties. / 获取两个 Bean 的差异属性（指定属性）
- `public static boolean isEmpty(Object bean)` - Checks whether the Bean is empty (all properties are null or primitive default). / 检查 Bean 是否为空（所有属性为 null 或原始默认值）
- `public static boolean hasNonNullProperty(Object bean)` - Checks whether there is any non-null property / 检查是否有任意非空属性
- `public static List<String> getNonNullPropertyNames(Object bean)` - Gets all non-null property names / 获取所有非空属性名
- `public static <T> T fromRecord(Record record, Class<T> beanClass)` - Converts a Record to a Bean / Record 转 Bean
- `public static <T extends Record> T toRecord(Object bean, Class<T> recordClass)` - Converts a Bean to a Record / Bean 转 Record

### PropertyConverter
`public interface PropertyConverter` - Property Converter Interface - Custom property conversion strategy / 属性转换器接口 - 自定义属性转换策略


### PropertyDescriptor
`public final class PropertyDescriptor` - Bean Property Descriptor - Describes a single bean property / Bean 属性描述符 - 描述单个 Bean 属性

- `public PropertyDescriptor(String name, Class<?> type, Method readMethod,` - Constructs a PropertyDescriptor / 构造属性描述符
- `public String name()` - Gets the property name / 获取属性名称
- `public Class<?> type()` - Gets the property type / 获取属性类型
- `public Method readMethod()` - Gets the read method (getter) / 获取读方法（getter）
- `public Method writeMethod()` - Gets the write method (setter) / 获取写方法（setter）
- `public Field field()` - Gets the underlying field / 获取对应字段
- `public boolean isReadable()` - Checks whether this property is readable / 是否可读
- `public boolean isWritable()` - Checks whether this property is writable / 是否可写
- `public boolean hasField()` - Checks whether this property has a corresponding field / 是否有对应字段
- `public Object getValue(Object bean)` - Gets the property value from the given bean / 获取属性值
- `public void setValue(Object bean, Object value)` - Sets the property value on the given bean / 设置属性值
- `public Type getGenericType()` - Gets the generic type of this property / 获取泛型类型
- `public <A extends Annotation> A getAnnotation(Class<A> annotationClass)` - Gets the specified annotation from this property / 获取属性注解
- `public boolean hasAnnotation(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Checks whether this property has the specified annotation / 检查是否有指定注解
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### BeanBuilder
`public class BeanBuilder<T>` - Bean Builder - Fluent builder for JavaBeans / JavaBean 构建器 - JavaBean 的流式构建器

- `public BeanBuilder(Class<T> beanClass)` - Creates a builder for the given bean class / 为给定 Bean 类创建构建器
- `public static <T> BeanBuilder<T> of(Class<T> beanClass)` - Creates a bean builder / 创建构建器
- `public static <T> BeanBuilder<T> from(T source)` - Creates a builder from an existing instance / 从现有实例创建构建器
- `public BeanBuilder<T> set(String propertyName, Object value)` - Sets a property value / 设置属性
- `public <V> BeanBuilder<T> set(Function<T, V> getter, V value)` - Type-safe property setting (using getter method reference) / 类型安全设置属性（使用 getter 方法引用）
- `public BeanBuilder<T> setIfNotNull(String propertyName, Object value)` - Conditionally sets a property (sets when non-null) / 条件设置属性（非 null 时设置）
- `public BeanBuilder<T> setIf(boolean condition, String propertyName, Object value)` - Conditionally sets a property / 条件设置属性
- `public BeanBuilder<T> setAll(Map<String, Object> props)` - Sets multiple properties in batch / 批量设置属性
- `public BeanBuilder<T> configure(Consumer<BeanBuilder<T>> consumer)` - Configuration callback / 配置回调
- `public T build()` - Builds the bean instance / 构建 Bean 实例
- `public T buildAndValidate(Consumer<T> validator)` - Builds and validates / 构建并验证

### Builder
`public interface Builder<T>` - Builder Interface - Functional interface for object building / 构建器接口 - 对象构建的函数式接口


### MapBuilder
`public class MapBuilder<K, V>` - Map Builder - Fluent builder for Map instances / Map 构建器 - Map 实例的流式构建器

- `public MapBuilder()` - Creates a default HashMap builder / 创建默认 HashMap 构建器
- `public MapBuilder(Supplier<Map<K, V>> mapSupplier)` - Creates a builder with specified map supplier / 使用指定 Map 供应商创建构建器
- `public static <K, V> MapBuilder<K, V> of()` - Creates a map builder / 创建构建器
- `public static <K, V> MapBuilder<K, V> of(Supplier<Map<K, V>> mapSupplier)` - Creates a map builder with specified map implementation / 创建构建器（指定 Map 实现）
- `public static <K, V> MapBuilder<K, V> hashMap()` - Creates a HashMap builder / 创建 HashMap 构建器
- `public static <K, V> MapBuilder<K, V> linkedHashMap()` - Creates a LinkedHashMap builder / 创建 LinkedHashMap 构建器
- `public static <K extends Comparable<K>, V> MapBuilder<K, V> treeMap()` - Creates a TreeMap builder / 创建 TreeMap 构建器
- `public MapBuilder<K, V> put(K key, V value)` - Adds a key-value pair / 添加键值对
- `public MapBuilder<K, V> putIfNotNull(K key, V value)` - Conditionally adds a key-value pair (adds when non-null) / 条件添加键值对（非 null 时添加）
- `public MapBuilder<K, V> putIf(boolean condition, K key, V value)` - Conditionally adds a key-value pair / 条件添加键值对
- `public MapBuilder<K, V> putAll(Map<? extends K, ? extends V> m)` - Adds in batch / 批量添加
- `public MapBuilder<K, V> remove(K key)` - Removes a key / 移除键
- `public MapBuilder<K, V> unmodifiable()` - Sets the map as unmodifiable / 设置为不可变
- `public MapBuilder<K, V> configure(Consumer<MapBuilder<K, V>> consumer)` - Configuration callback / 配置回调
- `public Map<K, V> build()` - Builds the map instance / 构建 Map 实例
- `public int size()` - Gets the current size / 获取当前大小
- `public boolean containsKey(K key)` - Checks whether the key exists / 检查是否包含键

### OpenBuilder
`public final class OpenBuilder` - Builder Utility Class - Unified entry point for builders / 构建器工具类 - 构建器统一入口

- `public static <T> BeanBuilder<T> ofBean(Class<T> beanClass)` - Creates a JavaBean builder / 创建 JavaBean 构建器
- `public static <T> BeanBuilder<T> from(T source)` - Creates a JavaBean builder from an existing instance / 从现有实例创建 JavaBean 构建器
- `public static <T extends Record> RecordBuilder<T> ofRecord(Class<T> recordClass)` - Creates a Record builder / 创建 Record 构建器
- `public static <T extends Record> RecordBuilder<T> fromRecord(T record)` - Creates a builder from an existing Record / 从现有 Record 创建构建器
- `public static <K, V> MapBuilder<K, V> ofMap()` - Creates a Map builder / 创建 Map 构建器
- `public static <K, V> MapBuilder<K, V> ofMap(Supplier<Map<K, V>> mapSupplier)` - Creates a Map builder with specified implementation / 创建 Map 构建器（指定实现）
- `public static <K, V> MapBuilder<K, V> ofHashMap()` - Creates a HashMap builder / 创建 HashMap 构建器
- `public static <K, V> MapBuilder<K, V> ofLinkedHashMap()` - Creates a LinkedHashMap builder / 创建 LinkedHashMap 构建器
- `public static <K extends Comparable<K>, V> MapBuilder<K, V> ofTreeMap()` - Creates a TreeMap builder / 创建 TreeMap 构建器

### RecordBuilder
`public class RecordBuilder<T` - Record Builder - Fluent builder for Java Records / Record 构建器 - Java Record 的流式构建器

- `public RecordBuilder(Class<T> recordClass)` - Creates a builder for the given record class / 为给定 Record 类创建构建器
- `public static <T extends Record> RecordBuilder<T> of(Class<T> recordClass)` - Creates a new builder for the given record class / 创建构建器
- `public static <T extends Record> RecordBuilder<T> from(T record)` - Creates a builder from an existing record instance / 从现有 Record 创建构建器
- `public RecordBuilder<T> set(String componentName, Object value)` - Sets a component value / 设置组件值
- `public RecordBuilder<T> setIfNotNull(String componentName, Object value)` - Sets a component value only if the value is not null / 条件设置组件值（非 null 时设置）
- `public RecordBuilder<T> setIf(boolean condition, String componentName, Object value)` - Conditionally sets a component value / 条件设置组件值
- `public RecordBuilder<T> setAll(Map<String, Object> props)` - Sets multiple component values at once / 批量设置组件值
- `public RecordBuilder<T> configure(Consumer<RecordBuilder<T>> consumer)` - Applies a configuration callback to this builder / 配置回调
- `public T build()` - Builds the record instance / 构建 Record 实例
- `public T buildAndValidate(Consumer<T> validator)` - Builds the record and validates it with the given validator / 构建并验证

### CompareUtil
`public final class CompareUtil` - Compare Utility - Generic comparison operations for Comparable types / 比较工具 - Comparable 类型的通用比较操作

- `public static int compare(Object first, Object second)` - Compares two Comparable values. Falls back to string comparison for non-Comparable. / 比较两个 Comparable 值，非 Comparable 则回退到字符串比较。
- `public static boolean equals(Object first, Object second)` - Checks if two objects are equal using Objects#equals. / 使用 Objects.equals 检查两个对象是否相等。

### ContainerUtil
`public final class ContainerUtil` - Container Utility - Generic size/empty operations for Collection, Map, Array, etc. / 容器工具 - Collection、Map、Array 等的通用大小/空操作

- `public static int size(Object obj)` - Returns the size of the container object. / 返回容器对象的大小。
- `public static boolean isEmpty(Object obj)` - Checks if the container object is empty. / 检查容器对象是否为空。
- `public static boolean isNotEmpty(Object obj)` - Checks if the container object is not empty. / 检查容器对象是否非空。

### AttributeConverter
`public interface AttributeConverter<X, Y>` - AttributeConverter - SPI for bidirectional type conversion between two types. / 属性转换器 - 两种类型之间双向转换的 SPI。


### Convert
`public final class Convert` - Unified Type Conversion Entry - Static methods for type conversion / 统一类型转换入口 - 类型转换的静态方法

- `public static Integer toInt(Object value)` - Converts to Integer / 转换为 Integer
- `public static Integer toInt(Object value, Integer defaultValue)` - Converts to Integer with default value / 转换为 Integer，带默认值
- `public static Long toLong(Object value)` - Converts to Long / 转换为 Long
- `public static Long toLong(Object value, Long defaultValue)` - Converts to Long with default value / 转换为 Long，带默认值
- `public static Double toDouble(Object value)` - Converts to Double / 转换为 Double
- `public static Double toDouble(Object value, Double defaultValue)` - Converts to Double with default value / 转换为 Double，带默认值
- `public static Float toFloat(Object value)` - Converts to Float / 转换为 Float
- `public static Float toFloat(Object value, Float defaultValue)` - Converts to Float with default value / 转换为 Float，带默认值
- `public static Short toShort(Object value)` - Converts to Short / 转换为 Short
- `public static Short toShort(Object value, Short defaultValue)` - Converts to Short with default value / 转换为 Short，带默认值
- `public static Byte toByte(Object value)` - Converts to Byte / 转换为 Byte
- `public static Byte toByte(Object value, Byte defaultValue)` - Converts to Byte with default value / 转换为 Byte，带默认值
- `public static Boolean toBool(Object value)` - Converts to Boolean / 转换为 Boolean
- `public static Boolean toBool(Object value, Boolean defaultValue)` - Converts to Boolean with default value / 转换为 Boolean，带默认值
- `public static Character toChar(Object value)` - Converts to Character / 转换为 Character
- `public static Character toChar(Object value, Character defaultValue)` - Converts to Character with default value / 转换为 Character，带默认值
- `public static String toStr(Object value)` - Converts to String / 转换为 String
- `public static String toStr(Object value, String defaultValue)` - Converts to String with default value / 转换为 String，带默认值
- `public static int[] toIntArray(Object value)` - Converts to int array / 转换为 int 数组
- `public static long[] toLongArray(Object value)` - Converts to long array / 转换为 long 数组
- `public static String[] toStrArray(Object value)` - Converts to String array / 转换为 String 数组
- `public static <T> List<T> toList(Object value, Class<T> elementType)` - Converts to List / 转换为 List
- `public static <T> Set<T> toSet(Object value, Class<T> elementType)` - Converts to Set / 转换为 Set
- `public static <T> T convert(Object value, Class<T> clazz)` - Generic type conversion / 泛型转换
- `public static <T> T convert(Object value, TypeReference<T> typeRef)` - Generic type conversion (using TypeReference) / 泛型转换（使用 TypeReference）

### Converter
`public interface Converter<T>` - Type Converter Interface - Core interface for type conversion / 类型转换器接口 - 类型转换的核心接口


### ConverterRegistry
`public final class ConverterRegistry` - Converter Registry - Manages registration and retrieval of type converters / 转换器注册表 - 管理类型转换器的注册和获取

- `public static void register(Type type, Converter<?> converter)` - Registers a converter / 注册转换器
- `public static <T> Converter<T> getConverter(Type type)` - Gets a converter for the specified type / 获取转换器
- `public static boolean hasConverter(Type type)` - Checks whether a converter exists for the type / 检查是否存在转换器
- `public static void unregister(Type type)` - Removes a converter / 移除转换器
- `public static int size()` - Gets the number of registered converters / 获取所有已注册类型数量

### TypeReference
`public abstract class TypeReference<T>` - Type Reference - Captures generic type information at runtime / 类型引用 - 运行时捕获泛型类型信息

- `public Type getType()` - Gets the full generic type / 获取完整的泛型类型
- `public Class<T> getRawType()` - Gets the raw type (erased generic type) / 获取原始类型
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### TypeUtil
`public final class TypeUtil` - Type Utility Class - Type checking, conversion and metadata operations / 类型工具类 - 类型检查、转换和元数据操作

- `public static boolean isPrimitive(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if the type is a primitive / 检查是否为原始类型
- `public static boolean isWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if the type is a wrapper / 检查是否为包装类型
- `public static boolean isPrimitiveOrWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if the type is a primitive or wrapper / 检查是否为原始类型或包装类型
- `public static boolean isNumber(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if the type is a number / 检查是否为数字类型
- `public static boolean isCollection(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if the type is a collection / 检查是否为集合类型
- `public static boolean isMap(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if the type is a Map / 检查是否为 Map 类型
- `public static boolean isArray(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if the type is an array / 检查是否为数组类型
- `public static boolean isString(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if the type is a String / 检查是否为字符串类型
- `public static boolean isDateTime(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if the type is a date/time type / 检查是否为日期时间类型
- `public static Class<?> getWrapperClass(Class<?> primitiveType)` - Gets the wrapper class / 获取包装类型
- `public static Class<?> getPrimitiveClass(Class<?> wrapperType)` - Gets the primitive class / 获取原始类型
- `public static <T> T getDefaultValue(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets the default value for the type / 获取类型的默认值
- `public static <T> T convert(Object value, Class<T> targetType)` - Converts the type / 类型转换
- `public static <T> Optional<T> convertOptional(Object value, Class<T> targetType)` - Safely converts the type, returns Optional / 安全类型转换，返回 Optional
- `public static Type[] getGenericTypes(Type type)` - Gets the generic type arguments / 获取泛型类型参数
- `public static Class<?> getRawType(Type type)` - Gets the raw type of a generic type / 获取泛型的原始类型
- `public static Type getFieldGenericType(Field field)` - Gets the generic type of a field / 获取字段的泛型类型
- `public static Type getMethodReturnGenericType(Method method)` - Gets the generic return type of a method / 获取方法返回值的泛型类型
- `public static Type[] getSuperclassGenericTypes(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets the generic type arguments of the superclass / 获取父类的泛型参数
- `public static Type[] getInterfaceGenericTypes(Class<?> clazz, Class<?> interfaceClass)` - Gets the generic type arguments of an interface / 获取接口的泛型参数
- `public static boolean isAssignable(Class<?> superType, Class<?> subType)` - Checks if the type is assignable / 检查类型是否可赋值

### ArrayConverter
`public class ArrayConverter<T>` - Array Type Converter - Converts various sources to arrays / 数组类型转换器 - 将各种来源转换为数组

- `public ArrayConverter(Class<T> componentType)` - Creates a converter for the given component type / 为给定组件类型创建转换器
- `public ArrayConverter(Class<T> componentType, String separator)` - Creates a converter with custom separator / 使用自定义分隔符创建转换器
- `public T[] convert(Object value, T[] defaultValue)` - Converts a value to an array / 将值转换为数组
- `public static Converter<int[]> intArrayConverter()` - Returns an int[] converter / int[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<long[]> longArrayConverter()` - Returns a long[] converter / long[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<double[]> doubleArrayConverter()` - Returns a double[] converter / double[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<float[]> floatArrayConverter()` - Returns a float[] converter / float[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<boolean[]> booleanArrayConverter()` - Returns a boolean[] converter / boolean[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<byte[]> byteArrayConverter()` - Returns a byte[] converter / byte[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<short[]> shortArrayConverter()` - Returns a short[] converter / short[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<char[]> charArrayConverter()` - Returns a char[] converter / char[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<String[]> stringArrayConverter()` - Returns a String[] converter / String[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<Integer[]> integerArrayConverter()` - Returns an Integer[] converter / Integer[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<Long[]> longObjArrayConverter()` - Returns a Long[] converter / Long[] 转换器
- `public static Converter<Double[]> doubleObjArrayConverter()` - Returns a Double[] converter / Double[] 转换器
- `public static <E> Converter<E[]> of(Class<E> componentType)` - Creates an array converter for the given element type / 为给定元素类型创建数组转换器
- `public static <E> Converter<E[]> of(Class<E> componentType, String separator)` - Creates an array converter with custom separator / 使用自定义分隔符创建数组转换器

### DateConverter
`public class DateConverter<T>` - Date/Time Type Converter - Converts between Java 8+ and legacy date types / 日期时间类型转换器 - 转换 Java 8+ 和旧版日期类型

- `public DateConverter(Class<T> targetType)` - Creates a converter for the given target type / 为给定目标类型创建转换器
- `public T convert(Object value, T defaultValue)` - Converts a value to the target date/time type / 将值转换为目标日期时间类型
- `public static Converter<Date> dateConverter()` - Returns a java.util.Date converter / java.util.Date 转换器
- `public static Converter<java.sql.Date> sqlDateConverter()` - Returns a java.sql.Date converter / java.sql.Date 转换器
- `public static Converter<java.sql.Time> sqlTimeConverter()` - Returns a java.sql.Time converter / java.sql.Time 转换器
- `public static Converter<Timestamp> timestampConverter()` - Returns a java.sql.Timestamp converter / Timestamp 转换器
- `public static Converter<Calendar> calendarConverter()` - Returns a Calendar converter / Calendar 转换器
- `public static Converter<LocalDate> localDateConverter()` - Returns a LocalDate converter / LocalDate 转换器
- `public static Converter<LocalDateTime> localDateTimeConverter()` - Returns a LocalDateTime converter / LocalDateTime 转换器
- `public static Converter<LocalTime> localTimeConverter()` - Returns a LocalTime converter / LocalTime 转换器
- `public static Converter<Instant> instantConverter()` - Returns an Instant converter / Instant 转换器
- `public static Converter<ZonedDateTime> zonedDateTimeConverter()` - Returns a ZonedDateTime converter / ZonedDateTime 转换器
- `public static Converter<OffsetDateTime> offsetDateTimeConverter()` - Returns an OffsetDateTime converter / OffsetDateTime 转换器

### NumberConverter
`public class NumberConverter<T` - Number Type Converter - Converts between all numeric types / 数字类型转换器 - 支持所有数字类型的转换

- `public NumberConverter(Class<T> targetType)` - Creates a converter for the given numeric type / 为给定数字类型创建转换器
- `public T convert(Object value, T defaultValue)` - Converts a value to the target numeric type / 将值转换为目标数字类型
- `public static Converter<Byte> byteConverter()` - Returns a Byte converter / 返回 Byte 转换器
- `public static Converter<Short> shortConverter()` - Returns a Short converter / 返回 Short 转换器
- `public static Converter<Integer> integerConverter()` - Returns an Integer converter / 返回 Integer 转换器
- `public static Converter<Long> longConverter()` - Returns a Long converter / 返回 Long 转换器
- `public static Converter<Float> floatConverter()` - Returns a Float converter / 返回 Float 转换器
- `public static Converter<Double> doubleConverter()` - Returns a Double converter / 返回 Double 转换器
- `public static Converter<BigDecimal> bigDecimalConverter()` - Returns a BigDecimal converter / 返回 BigDecimal 转换器
- `public static Converter<BigInteger> bigIntegerConverter()` - Returns a BigInteger converter / 返回 BigInteger 转换器
- `public static Converter<AtomicInteger> atomicIntegerConverter()` - Returns an AtomicInteger converter / 返回 AtomicInteger 转换器
- `public static Converter<AtomicLong> atomicLongConverter()` - Returns an AtomicLong converter / 返回 AtomicLong 转换器

### StringConverter
`public class StringConverter` - String Type Converter - Converts any type to String representation / 字符串类型转换器 - 将任意类型转换为字符串表示

- `public StringConverter()` - Creates a default string converter / 创建默认字符串转换器
- `public StringConverter(Charset charset, String arraySeparator)` - Creates a converter with custom charset and separator / 使用自定义字符集和分隔符创建转换器
- `public String convert(Object value, String defaultValue)` - Converts a value to its string representation / 将值转换为字符串表示
- `public static StringConverter getInstance()` - Gets the default instance / 获取默认实例
- `public static StringConverter of(Charset charset)` - Creates a converter with a custom charset / 创建带自定义字符集的转换器
- `public static StringConverter of(String separator)` - Creates a converter with a custom separator / 创建带自定义分隔符的转换器
- `public static StringConverter of(Charset charset, String separator)` - Creates a fully customized converter / 创建完全自定义的转换器

### ExceptionUtil
`public final class ExceptionUtil` - Exception Utility - Exception chain analysis and handling utilities / 异常工具类 - 异常链分析和处理工具

- `public static Throwable getRootCause(Throwable throwable)` - Gets the root cause of the exception / 获取异常的根本原因
- `public static String getStackTrace(Throwable throwable)` - Gets the stack trace as a string / 获取异常的堆栈跟踪字符串
- `public static List<Throwable> getCausalChain(Throwable throwable)` - Gets the causal chain of the exception / 获取异常的因果链
- `public static Throwable unwrap(Throwable throwable)` - Unwraps a nested exception / 解包嵌套异常
- `public static <T extends Throwable> T unwrap(Throwable throwable, Class<T> exceptionType)` - Unwraps an exception of a specific type / 解包特定类型的异常
- `public static void wrapAndThrow(CheckedRunnable runnable)` - Wraps checked exception as runtime exception and throws / 包装受检异常为运行时异常并抛出
- `public static <T> T wrapAndReturn(CheckedSupplier<T> supplier)` - Wraps checked exception and returns result / 包装受检异常为运行时异常并返回结果
- `public static <T extends Throwable> RuntimeException sneakyThrow(Throwable throwable)` - Silently throws a checked exception / 静默抛出受检异常
- `public static boolean contains(Throwable throwable, Class<? extends Throwable> exceptionType)` - Checks if the exception chain contains the specified type / 判断异常链中是否包含指定类型的异常
- `public static String getMessage(Throwable throwable)` - Gets the exception message, returns class name if null / 获取异常消息，如果为 null 则返回异常类名
- `public static String getRootCauseMessage(Throwable throwable)` - Gets the root cause message / 获取根本原因的消息

### OpenException
`public class OpenException` - OpenException - Unified exception base class for OpenCode components / OpenException - OpenCode 组件的统一异常基类

- `public OpenException(String message)` - Creates an exception with message / 创建异常
- `public OpenException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception with message and cause / 创建异常（带原因）
- `public OpenException(String component, String errorCode, String message)` - Creates an exception with component and error code / 创建异常（带组件和错误码）
- `public OpenException(String component, String errorCode, String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception with full parameters / 创建异常（完整参数）
- `public String getErrorCode()` - Gets the error code / 获取错误码
- `public String getComponent()` - Gets the component name / 获取组件名称
- `public String getRawMessage()` - Gets the raw message (without component and error code prefix) / 获取原始消息（不含组件和错误码前缀）
- `public String getMessage()` - Gets the formatted exception message / 获取格式化的异常消息

### OpenIOException
`public class OpenIOException` - IO Exception Wrapper - Wrap checked IOException as unchecked / IO 异常包装 - 将受检 IOException 包装为非受检异常

- `public OpenIOException(String message)` - Creates an IO exception / 创建 IO 异常
- `public OpenIOException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an IO exception wrapping the original IOException / 创建 IO 异常（包装原始 IOException）
- `public OpenIOException(String errorCode, String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an IO exception with error code / 创建 IO 异常（指定错误码）
- `public static OpenIOException wrap(IOException cause)` - Wraps an IOException / 包装 IOException
- `public static OpenIOException readFailed(Path path, Throwable cause)` - Creates a "read failed" exception / 创建"读取失败"异常
- `public static OpenIOException readFailed(String resource, Throwable cause)` - Creates a "read failed" exception / 创建"读取失败"异常
- `public static OpenIOException writeFailed(Path path, Throwable cause)` - Creates a "write failed" exception / 创建"写入失败"异常
- `public static OpenIOException writeFailed(String resource, Throwable cause)` - Creates a "write failed" exception / 创建"写入失败"异常
- `public static OpenIOException fileNotFound(Path path)` - Creates a "file not found" exception / 创建"文件未找到"异常
- `public static OpenIOException fileNotFound(String resource)` - Creates a "file not found" exception / 创建"文件未找到"异常
- `public static OpenIOException closeFailed(String resource, Throwable cause)` - Creates a "close resource failed" exception / 创建"关闭资源失败"异常

### OpenIllegalArgumentException
`public class OpenIllegalArgumentException` - Illegal Argument Exception - Parameter validation exception / 参数校验异常 - 方法参数验证异常

- `public OpenIllegalArgumentException(String message)` - Creates an argument exception / 创建参数异常
- `public OpenIllegalArgumentException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an argument exception with cause / 创建参数异常（带原因）
- `public static OpenIllegalArgumentException notNull(String paramName)` - Creates a "parameter cannot be null" exception / 创建"参数不能为 null"异常
- `public static OpenIllegalArgumentException notEmpty(String paramName)` - Creates a "parameter cannot be empty" exception / 创建"参数不能为空"异常
- `public static OpenIllegalArgumentException notBlank(String paramName)` - Creates a "parameter cannot be blank" exception / 创建"参数不能为空白"异常
- `public static OpenIllegalArgumentException positive(String paramName, Number value)` - Creates a "parameter must be positive" exception / 创建"参数必须为正数"异常
- `public static OpenIllegalArgumentException nonNegative(String paramName, Number value)` - Creates a "parameter must be non-negative" exception / 创建"参数必须为非负数"异常
- `public static OpenIllegalArgumentException outOfRange(String paramName, Number value, Number min, Number max)` - Creates a "parameter out of range" exception / 创建"参数超出范围"异常
- `public static OpenIllegalArgumentException indexOutOfBounds(int index, int size)` - Creates an "index out of bounds" exception / 创建"索引超出范围"异常

### OpenIllegalStateException
`public class OpenIllegalStateException` - Illegal State Exception - Object state validation exception / 状态异常 - 对象状态验证异常

- `public OpenIllegalStateException(String message)` - Creates an illegal state exception with the given message / 创建状态异常
- `public OpenIllegalStateException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an illegal state exception with message and cause / 创建状态异常（带原因）
- `public static OpenIllegalStateException notInitialized(String componentName)` - Creates a not-initialized exception / 创建"未初始化"异常
- `public static OpenIllegalStateException alreadyClosed(String resourceName)` - Creates an already-closed exception / 创建"已关闭"异常
- `public static OpenIllegalStateException alreadyExists(String itemName, Object key)` - Creates an already-exists exception / 创建"已存在"异常
- `public static OpenIllegalStateException notFound(String itemName, Object key)` - Creates a not-found exception / 创建"未找到"异常
- `public static OpenIllegalStateException invalidState(String expected, String actual)` - Creates an invalid-state exception / 创建"无效状态"异常

### OpenTimeoutException
`public class OpenTimeoutException` - Timeout Exception - Operation timeout exception / 超时异常 - 操作超时异常

- `public OpenTimeoutException(String message)` - Creates a timeout exception with the given message / 创建超时异常
- `public OpenTimeoutException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates a timeout exception with message and cause / 创建超时异常（带原因）
- `public OpenTimeoutException(String message, Duration timeout)` - Creates a timeout exception with timeout duration / 创建超时异常（带超时时长）
- `public OpenTimeoutException(String message, Duration timeout, Throwable cause)` - Creates a timeout exception with all parameters / 创建超时异常（完整参数）
- `public Duration getTimeout()` - Gets the timeout duration / 获取超时时长
- `public static OpenTimeoutException of(String operation, Duration timeout)` - Creates a timeout exception for the operation / 创建超时异常
- `public static OpenTimeoutException of(String operation, Duration timeout, Throwable cause)` - Creates a timeout exception with cause / 创建超时异常（带原因）

### OpenUnsupportedOperationException
`public class OpenUnsupportedOperationException` - Unsupported Operation Exception - Operation not supported exception / 不支持的操作异常 - 操作不支持时抛出的异常

- `public OpenUnsupportedOperationException(String message)` - Creates an unsupported operation exception with message / 创建不支持操作异常
- `public OpenUnsupportedOperationException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an unsupported operation exception with cause / 创建不支持操作异常（带原因）
- `public static OpenUnsupportedOperationException immutable()` - Creates an immutable-object exception / 创建"不可变对象"异常
- `public static OpenUnsupportedOperationException readOnly()` - Creates a read-only exception / 创建"只读"异常
- `public static OpenUnsupportedOperationException notImplemented(String methodName)` - Creates a not-implemented exception / 创建"未实现"异常
- `public static OpenUnsupportedOperationException unsupportedType(Class<?> type)` - Creates an unsupported-type exception / 创建"不支持的类型"异常
- `public static OpenUnsupportedOperationException unsupported(String operation)` - Creates an unsupported-operation exception / 创建"不支持的操作"异常

### CheckedCallable
`public interface CheckedCallable<V>` - Checked Callable - Enhanced Callable with convenience methods / 可抛出受检异常的 Callable 接口


### CheckedConsumer
`public interface CheckedConsumer<T>` - Checked Consumer - Consumer that can throw checked exceptions / 可抛出受检异常的 Consumer 接口


### CheckedFunction
`public interface CheckedFunction<T, R>` - Checked Function - Function that can throw checked exceptions / 可抛出受检异常的 Function 接口


### CheckedPredicate
`public interface CheckedPredicate<T>` - Checked Predicate - Predicate that can throw checked exceptions / 可抛出受检异常的 Predicate 接口


### CheckedRunnable
`public interface CheckedRunnable` - Checked Runnable - Runnable that can throw checked exceptions / 可抛出受检异常的 Runnable 接口


### CheckedSupplier
`public interface CheckedSupplier<T>` - Checked Supplier - Supplier that can throw checked exceptions / 可抛出受检异常的 Supplier 接口


### InternalCache
`public interface InternalCache<K, V>` - Internal Cache Interface - Contract for internal cache implementations / 内部缓存接口 - 内部缓存实现的契约接口


### InternalLRUCache
`public class InternalLRUCache<K, V>` - Internal LRU Cache - Thread-safe LRU cache implementation / 内部 LRU 缓存 - 线程安全的 LRU 缓存实现

- `public InternalLRUCache(int maxSize)` - Creates an LRU cache with the given maximum size / 创建指定最大容量的 LRU 缓存
- `public static <K, V> InternalLRUCache<K, V> create(int maxSize)` - Creates an LRU cache instance / 创建 LRU 缓存实例
- `public V get(K key)` - Gets the value associated with the key / 获取键对应的值
- `public V computeIfAbsent(K key, Function<K, V> mappingFunction)` - Gets the value, computing it with the mapping function if absent / 获取值，不存在时使用映射函数计算并放入
- `public V put(K key, V value)` - Puts a key-value pair into the cache / 放入键值对
- `public V putIfAbsent(K key, V value)` - Puts the value only if the key is absent / 仅在键不存在时放入
- `public V remove(K key)` - Removes the entry for the key / 移除键对应的条目
- `public boolean containsKey(K key)` - Checks if the cache contains the given key / 检查缓存是否包含指定键
- `public int size()` - Gets the current size of the cache / 获取缓存当前大小
- `public void clear()` - Clears all entries from the cache / 清空缓存中的所有条目
- `public int getMaxSize()` - Gets the maximum capacity / 获取最大容量

### Page
`public class Page<T>` - Page - Pagination result container / 分页 - 分页结果容器

- `public Page()` - Creates an empty page / 创建空分页
- `public Page(long current, long size)` - Creates a page with current page number and page size / 创建指定页码和页大小的分页
- `public static <T> Page<T> of(long current, long size)` - Creates a page instance / 创建分页实例
- `public long getCurrent()` - Gets the current page number / 获取当前页码
- `public Page<T> setCurrent(long current)` - Sets the current page number / 设置当前页码
- `public long getSize()` - Gets the page size / 获取每页大小
- `public Page<T> setSize(long size)` - Sets the page size / 设置每页大小
- `public long getTotal()` - Gets the total record count / 获取总记录数
- `public Page<T> setTotal(long total)` - Sets the total record count / 设置总记录数
- `public List<T> getRecords()` - Gets the records on the current page / 获取当前页记录列表
- `public Page<T> setRecords(List<T> records)` - Sets the records on the current page / 设置当前页记录列表
- `public long getPages()` - Gets the total page count / 获取总页数
- `public boolean hasNext()` - Returns true if there is a next page / 是否有下一页
- `public boolean hasPrevious()` - Returns true if there is a previous page / 是否有上一页
- `public long getOffset()` - Gets the offset (record index) of the current page / 获取当前页起始偏移量
- `public String toString()` - Converts to string / 转为字符串

### PageRequest
`public record PageRequest(long page, long size, Sort sort)` - PageRequest - Immutable pagination request with sorting / 分页请求 - 带排序的不可变分页请求

- `public static PageRequest of(long page, long size)` - Creates a PageRequest with page number and page size / 创建分页请求（页码和页大小）
- `public static PageRequest of(long page, long size, Sort sort)` - Creates a PageRequest with page number, page size and sort / 创建分页请求（页码、页大小和排序）
- `public static PageRequest ofSize(long size)` - Creates a PageRequest starting from the first page with the given size / 创建从第一页开始的分页请求
- `public long getOffset()` - Gets the record offset for the current page / 获取当前页的记录偏移量
- `public boolean isFirst()` - Returns true if this is the first page / 判断是否为第一页
- `public PageRequest next()` - Returns the PageRequest for the next page / 获取下一页的分页请求
- `public PageRequest previous()` - Returns the PageRequest for the previous page / 获取上一页的分页请求
- `public PageRequest first()` - Returns the PageRequest for the first page / 获取第一页的分页请求
- `public PageRequest withSort(Sort newSort)` - Returns a new PageRequest with the given sort / 返回指定排序的新分页请求
- `public PageRequest withPage(long newPage)` - Returns a new PageRequest for the given page number / 返回指定页码的新分页请求
- `public <T> Page<T> toPage()` - Converts to an empty Page container / 转换为空的 Page 容器
- `public String toString()` - Converts to string / 转为字符串

### Sort
`public final class Sort` - Sort - Sort specification for queries / 排序 - 查询排序规范

- `public record Order(String property, Direction direction)` - A single sort order: property + direction. / 单个排序规范：属性 + 方向。
- `public static final Sort UNSORTED = new Sort(Collections.emptyList());` - Constant representing an unsorted sort / 表示未排序的常量
- `public static Sort by(String property)` - Creates an ascending sort by the given property / 创建按指定属性升序排序
- `public static Sort by(Direction direction, String property)` - Creates a sort by the given property and direction / 创建按指定属性和方向排序
- `public static Sort by(Direction direction, String... properties)` - Creates a sort by multiple properties with the given direction / 创建按多个属性和方向排序
- `public static Sort by(Order... orders)` - Creates a sort from the given orders / 从多个排序规则创建排序
- `public static Sort by(List<Order> orders)` - Creates a sort from a list of orders / 从排序规则列表创建排序
- `public static Sort unsorted()` - Returns an unsorted instance / 返回无排序实例
- `public List<Order> getOrders()` - Gets the list of sort orders / 获取排序规则列表
- `public boolean isUnsorted()` - Returns true if no sort orders are specified / 判断是否为无排序
- `public Sort and(Sort other)` - Combines this sort with another sort / 合并两个排序规则
- `public String toSql()` - Renders this Sort as a SQL ORDER BY fragment (without the ORDER BY keyword) / 将此排序转换为 SQL ORDER BY 片段（不包含 ORDER BY 关键字）
- `public String toString()` - Converts to string / 转为字符串
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - Checks equality / 比较是否相等
- `public int hashCode()` - Computes hash code / 计算哈希码

### Booleans
`public final class Booleans` - Boolean Array Utility Class - Guava-style operations for boolean primitive arrays / 布尔数组工具类 - Guava 风格的布尔原始类型数组操作

- `public static boolean[] concat(boolean[]... arrays)` - Concatenates multiple boolean arrays / 合并多个 boolean 数组
- `public static boolean contains(boolean[] array, boolean target)` - Checks if the array contains the target value / 检查数组是否包含目标值
- `public static int indexOf(boolean[] array, boolean target)` - Finds the first index of the target value / 查找目标值的首次出现索引
- `public static int lastIndexOf(boolean[] array, boolean target)` - Finds the last index of the target value / 查找目标值的最后出现索引
- `public static int compare(boolean a, boolean b)` - Compares two boolean values (false < true) / 比较两个 boolean 值（false < true）
- `public static List<Boolean> asList(boolean... array)` - Converts a boolean array to a List / 将 boolean 数组转换为 List
- `public static boolean[] toArray(Collection<Boolean> collection)` - Converts a Collection to a boolean array / 将集合转换为 boolean 数组
- `public static void reverse(boolean[] array)` - Reverses the boolean array in place / 反转 boolean 数组
- `public static int countTrue(boolean... array)` - Counts the number of true values in the array / 统计数组中 true 的个数
- `public static int countFalse(boolean... array)` - Counts the number of false values in the array / 统计数组中 false 的个数
- `public static boolean and(boolean... array)` - Returns the logical AND of all elements / 返回所有元素的逻辑与
- `public static boolean or(boolean... array)` - Returns the logical OR of all elements / 返回所有元素的逻辑或
- `public static boolean xor(boolean... array)` - Returns the logical XOR of all elements / 返回所有元素的逻辑异或
- `public static String join(String separator, boolean... array)` - Joins array elements into a string with the given separator / 使用分隔符将数组连接为字符串
- `public static boolean[] ensureNonNull(boolean[] array)` - Returns the array itself if non-null, otherwise an empty array / 确保数组非 null，null 时返回空数组

### Bytes
`public final class Bytes` - Byte Array Utility Class - Guava-style operations for byte primitive arrays / 字节数组工具类 - Guava 风格的字节原始类型数组操作

- `public static byte[] concat(byte[]... arrays)` - Concatenates multiple arrays / 合并多个数组
- `public static boolean contains(byte[] array, byte target)` - Checks whether the array contains the specified element / 检查数组是否包含指定元素
- `public static int indexOf(byte[] array, byte target)` - Finds the index of the specified element / 查找元素索引
- `public static int indexOf(byte[] array, byte target, int start, int end)` - Finds the index of the element within the specified range / 在指定范围内查找元素索引
- `public static int indexOf(byte[] array, byte[] target)` - Finds the position of a sub-array / 查找子数组位置
- `public static int lastIndexOf(byte[] array, byte target)` - Finds the index of the element searching from the end / 从后向前查找元素索引
- `public static byte constrainToRange(byte value, byte min, byte max)` - Constrains the value to the specified range / 约束值在指定范围内
- `public static int toUnsignedInt(byte value)` - Converts to an unsigned int / 转为无符号 int
- `public static long toUnsignedLong(byte value)` - Converts to an unsigned long / 转为无符号 long
- `public static List<Byte> asList(byte... array)` - Converts to a List / 转为 List
- `public static byte[] toArray(Collection<? extends Number> collection)` - Converts a Collection to an array / 从 Collection 转为数组
- `public static void reverse(byte[] array)` - Reverses the array / 反转数组
- `public static void reverse(byte[] array, int fromIndex, int toIndex)` - Reverses the specified range of the array / 反转数组指定范围
- `public static int compare(byte[] a, byte[] b)` - Compares two byte arrays / 比较两个字节数组
- `public static int compareUnsigned(byte a, byte b)` - Unsigned comparison / 无符号比较
- `public static boolean equals(byte[] a, byte[] b)` - Checks whether two byte arrays are equal / 比较字节数组是否相等
- `public static String join(String separator, byte... array)` - Joins array elements into a string / 数组转字符串
- `public static byte[] ensureNonNull(byte[] array)` - Returns the array itself if non-null, otherwise an empty array / 确保数组非 null，null 时返回空数组
- `public static int hashCode(byte[] array)` - Computes the hash code of a byte array / 计算字节数组哈希码
- `public static byte[] subarray(byte[] array, int start, int end)` - Returns a sub-array / 获取子数组
- `public static byte[] ensureCapacity(byte[] array, int minLength, int padding)` - Ensures that array has minimum capacity, expanding if needed / 确保数组具有最小容量，如果需要则扩展

### OpenRandom
`public final class OpenRandom` - Random Utility Class - Comprehensive random generation utilities / 随机工具类 - 全面的随机生成工具

- `public static int randomInt(int bound)` - Generates a random integer [0, bound) / 生成随机整数 [0, bound)
- `public static int randomInt(int origin, int bound)` - Generates a random integer [origin, bound) / 生成随机整数 [origin, bound)
- `public static long randomLong(long bound)` - Generates a random long [0, bound) / 生成随机长整数 [0, bound)
- `public static long randomLong(long origin, long bound)` - Generates a random long [origin, bound) / 生成随机长整数 [origin, bound)
- `public static double randomDouble()` - Generates a random double [0, 1) / 生成随机浮点数 [0, 1)
- `public static double randomDouble(double bound)` - Generates a random double [0, bound) / 生成随机浮点数 [0, bound)
- `public static double randomDouble(double origin, double bound)` - Generates a random double [origin, bound) / 生成随机浮点数 [origin, bound)
- `public static boolean randomBoolean()` - Generates a random boolean / 生成随机布尔值
- `public static byte[] randomBytes(int length)` - Generates a random byte array / 生成随机字节数组
- `public static byte[] secureBytes(int length)` - Generates a secure random byte array / 生成安全随机字节数组
- `public static int secureInt(int bound)` - Generates a secure random integer / 生成安全随机整数
- `public static long secureLong()` - Generates a secure random long / 生成安全随机长整数
- `public static String randomAlphanumeric(int length)` - Generates a random alphanumeric string / 生成随机字母数字字符串
- `public static String secureAlphanumeric(int length)` - Generates a secure random alphanumeric string / 生成安全随机字母数字字符串
- `public static String randomNumeric(int length)` - Generates a random numeric string / 生成随机数字字符串
- `public static String randomAlphabetic(int length)` - Generates a random alphabetic string / 生成随机字母字符串
- `public static String randomUpperCase(int length)` - Generates a random uppercase string / 生成随机大写字母字符串
- `public static String randomLowerCase(int length)` - Generates a random lowercase string / 生成随机小写字母字符串
- `public static String randomString(int length, String chars)` - Generates a random string (custom character set) / 生成随机字符串（自定义字符集）
- `public static String secureString(int length, String chars)` - Generates a secure random string (custom character set) / 生成安全随机字符串（自定义字符集）
- `public static String uuid()` - Generates a UUID / 生成 UUID
- `public static String simpleUUID()` - Generates a simple UUID (without hyphens) / 生成简单 UUID（无横线）
- `public static String secureUUID()` - Generates a secure UUID (based on SecureRandom) / 生成安全 UUID（基于 SecureRandom）
- `public static <T> T randomElement(List<T> list)` - Selects a random element from a list / 从列表随机选择元素
- `public static <T> T randomElement(T... array)` - Selects a random element from an array / 从数组随机选择元素
- `public static <T> List<T> randomElements(List<T> list, int count)` - Selects multiple random elements from a collection / 从集合随机选择多个元素
- `public static <T> void shuffle(List<T> list)` - Shuffles a list / 打乱列表顺序
- `public static <T> void shuffle(T[] array)` - Shuffles an array / 打乱数组顺序
- `public static LocalDate randomDate(int startYear, int endYear)` - Generates a random date [startYear, endYear) / 生成随机日期 [startYear, endYear)
- `public static LocalDate randomDate(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Generates a random date (specified range) / 生成随机日期（指定范围）

- `public static String numericRange(int min, int max)` - Generates a numeric verification code within a range / 生成范围内的数字验证码
- `public static String generate(int length, String chars)` - Generates a verification code with a custom character set / 生成自定义字符集验证码
- `public static Builder builder()` - Gets the verification code builder / 获取验证码构建器

### ConstructorUtil
`public final class ConstructorUtil` - Constructor Utility Class - Constructor reflection operations / 构造器工具类 - 构造器反射操作

- `public static <T> List<Constructor<T>> getAllConstructors(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets all constructors / 获取所有构造器
- `public static <T> List<Constructor<T>> getPublicConstructors(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets public constructors / 获取公共构造器
- `public static <T> Optional<Constructor<T>> getDefaultConstructor(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets the default constructor (no-arg) / 获取默认构造器（无参）
- `public static <T> Optional<Constructor<T>> getConstructor(Class<T> clazz, Class<?>... paramTypes)` - Gets the constructor with specified parameter types / 获取指定参数类型的构造器
- `public static <T> List<Constructor<T>> getConstructorsWithAnnotation(Class<T> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Gets constructors with the specified annotation / 获取带有指定注解的构造器
- `public static <T> Optional<Constructor<T>> getMinArgsConstructor(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets the constructor with the fewest parameters / 获取参数数量最少的构造器
- `public static <T> Optional<Constructor<T>> getMaxArgsConstructor(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets the constructor with the most parameters / 获取参数数量最多的构造器
- `public static boolean hasDefaultConstructor(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if a default constructor exists / 检查是否有默认构造器
- `public static boolean isPublic(Constructor<?> constructor)` - Checks if the constructor is public / 检查构造器是否为 public
- `public static boolean isPrivate(Constructor<?> constructor)` - Checks if the constructor is private / 检查构造器是否为 private
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Constructor<T> constructor, Object... args)` - Creates an instance / 创建实例
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates an instance using the default constructor / 使用默认构造器创建实例
- `public static String[] getParameterNames(Constructor<?> constructor)` - Gets constructor parameter names (requires -parameters compile flag) / 获取构造器参数名（需要 -parameters 编译标志）

### FieldUtil
`public final class FieldUtil` - Field Utility Class - Field reflection operations / 字段工具类 - 字段反射操作

- `public static List<Field> getAllFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all fields (including superclass) / 获取所有字段（包括父类）
- `public static List<Field> getDeclaredFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets declared fields (excluding superclass) / 获取声明的字段（不包括父类）

- `public static List<Field> getFieldsWithAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Gets fields with the specified annotation / 获取带有指定注解的字段
- `public static List<Field> getFieldsByType(Class<?> clazz, Class<?> fieldType)` - Gets fields of the specified type / 获取指定类型的字段
- `public static List<Field> getStaticFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets static fields / 获取静态字段
- `public static List<Field> getInstanceFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets instance fields (non-static) / 获取实例字段（非静态）
- `public static List<Field> getPublicFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets public fields / 获取公共字段
- `public static Type getGenericType(Field field)` - Gets the generic type of a field / 获取字段的泛型类型
- `public static <T> T getValue(Object obj, Field field)` - Gets the field value / 获取字段值
- `public static void setValue(Object obj, Field field, Object value)` - Sets the field value / 设置字段值
- `public static boolean isFinal(Field field)` - Checks if the field is final / 检查字段是否为 final
- `public static boolean isStatic(Field field)` - Checks if the field is static / 检查字段是否为 static
- `public static boolean isTransient(Field field)` - Checks if the field is transient / 检查字段是否为 transient
- `public static boolean isVolatile(Field field)` - Checks if the field is volatile / 检查字段是否为 volatile
- `public static List<String> getFieldNames(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets the list of field names / 获取字段名列表
- `public static Map<String, Field> getFieldMap(Class<?> clazz)` - Creates a field name to field mapping / 创建字段名到字段的映射

`public final class MethodUtil` - Method Utility Class - Method reflection operations / 方法工具类 - 方法反射操作

- `public static List<Method> getAllMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all methods (including superclass) / 获取所有方法（包括父类）
- `public static List<Method> getDeclaredMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets declared methods (excluding superclass) / 获取声明的方法（不包括父类）

- `public static List<Method> getMethodsWithAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Gets methods with the specified annotation / 获取带有指定注解的方法
- `public static List<Method> getMethodsByReturnType(Class<?> clazz, Class<?> returnType)` - Gets methods with the specified return type / 获取指定返回类型的方法
- `public static List<Method> getGetterMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets getter methods / 获取 Getter 方法
- `public static List<Method> getSetterMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets setter methods / 获取 Setter 方法
- `public static List<Method> getStaticMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets static methods / 获取静态方法
- `public static List<Method> getPublicMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets public methods / 获取公共方法
- `public static boolean isGetter(Method method)` - Checks if the method is a getter / 检查是否为 Getter 方法
- `public static boolean isSetter(Method method)` - Checks if the method is a setter / 检查是否为 Setter 方法
- `public static String getPropertyNameFromGetter(Method method)` - Gets the property name from a getter method name / 从 Getter 方法名获取属性名
- `public static String getPropertyNameFromSetter(Method method)` - Gets the property name from a setter method name / 从 Setter 方法名获取属性名
- `public static Type getGenericReturnType(Method method)` - Gets the generic return type of a method / 获取方法的泛型返回类型
- `public static Type[] getGenericParameterTypes(Method method)` - Gets the generic parameter types of a method / 获取方法的泛型参数类型
- `public static <T> T invoke(Object obj, Method method, Object... args)` - Invokes a method / 调用方法
- `public static <T> T invokeStatic(Method method, Object... args)` - Invokes a static method / 调用静态方法
- `public static boolean isAbstract(Method method)` - Checks if the method is abstract / 检查方法是否为 abstract
- `public static boolean isSynchronized(Method method)` - Checks if the method is synchronized / 检查方法是否为 synchronized
- `public static boolean isNative(Method method)` - Checks if the method is native / 检查方法是否为 native
- `public static boolean isDefault(Method method)` - Checks if the method is a default interface method / 检查方法是否为 default 接口方法

- `public static boolean isProtected(Member member)` - Checks if the modifier is protected / 检查是否为 protected
- `public static boolean isStatic(int modifiers)` - Checks if the modifier is static / 检查是否为 static
- `public static boolean isStatic(Member member)` - Checks if the modifier is static / 检查是否为 static
- `public static boolean isFinal(int modifiers)` - Checks if the modifier is final / 检查是否为 final

- `public static boolean isSynchronized(int modifiers)` - Checks if the modifier is synchronized / 检查是否为 synchronized
- `public static boolean isVolatile(int modifiers)` - Checks if the modifier is volatile / 检查是否为 volatile
- `public static boolean isTransient(int modifiers)` - Checks if the modifier is transient / 检查是否为 transient
- `public static boolean isNative(int modifiers)` - Checks if the modifier is native / 检查是否为 native
- `public static boolean isInterface(int modifiers)` - Checks if the modifier is interface / 检查是否为 interface

### RecordUtil
`public final class RecordUtil` - Record Utility Class - Java Record type operations / Record 工具类 - Java Record 类型操作

- `public static boolean isRecord(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if the class is a Record type / 检查类是否为 Record 类型
- `public static boolean isRecord(Object obj)` - Checks if the object is a Record instance / 检查对象是否为 Record 实例
- `public static RecordComponent[] getComponents(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets all components of the Record / 获取 Record 的所有组件
- `public static List<String> getComponentNames(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets the list of Record component names / 获取 Record 组件名列表
- `public static Map<String, Class<?>> getComponentTypes(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets the Record component type mapping / 获取 Record 组件类型映射
- `public static <T> T getComponentValue(Object record, String componentName)` - Gets the Record component value / 获取 Record 组件值
- `public static Map<String, Object> toMap(Object record)` - Converts a Record to Map / Record 转 Map
- `public static <T extends Record> T fromMap(Map<String, ?> map, Class<T> recordClass)` - Converts a Map to Record / Map 转 Record
- `public static <T extends Record> T copyWith(T record, String componentName, Object newValue)` - Copies a Record and modifies the specified component / 复制 Record 并修改指定组件
- `public static <T extends Record> T copyWith(T record, Map<String, Object> changes)` - Copies a Record and modifies multiple components / 复制 Record 并修改多个组件
- `public static boolean equals(Object record1, Object record2)` - Compares two Records for equality (based on components) / 比较两个 Record 是否相等（基于组件）
- `public static int getComponentCount(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets the Record component count / 获取 Record 组件数量
- `public static boolean hasComponent(Class<?> recordClass, String componentName)` - Checks if the Record has the specified component / 检查 Record 是否有指定组件
- `public static Type getComponentGenericType(Class<?> recordClass, String componentName)` - Gets the generic type of a component / 获取组件的泛型类型
