- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates an instance (no-arg constructor) / 创建实例（无参构造）
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz, Object... args)` - Creates an instance (with constructor arguments) / 创建实例（带参构造）
- `public static <T> T invoke(Object obj, String methodName, Object... args)` - Invokes a method / 调用方法
- `public static <T> T invokeStatic(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Object... args)` - Invokes a static method / 调用静态方法
- `public static <T> T getFieldValue(Object obj, String fieldName)` - Gets the field value / 获取字段值
- `public static void setFieldValue(Object obj, String fieldName, Object value)` - Sets the field value / 设置字段值
- `public static <T> T getStaticFieldValue(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Gets the static field value / 获取静态字段值
- `public static void setStaticFieldValue(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName, Object value)` - Sets the static field value / 设置静态字段值
- `public static Field[] getFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all fields (including superclass) / 获取所有字段（包括父类）
- `public static Field getField(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Gets the specified field / 获取指定字段
- `public static Method[] getMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all methods (including superclass) / 获取所有方法（包括父类）
- `public static Method getMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Class<?>... paramTypes)` - Gets the specified method / 获取指定方法
- `public static Constructor<?>[] getConstructors(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all constructors / 获取所有构造器
- `public static <T> Constructor<T> getDefaultConstructor(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets the default constructor / 获取默认构造器

### UnsafeUtil
`public final class UnsafeUtil` - Unsafe Utility Class - Modern low-level operations utility / 底层操作工具类 - 现代化的底层操作工具

- `public static boolean isUsingFFM()` - Checks if FFM API is being used / 检查是否正在使用 FFM API
- `public static String getMemoryBackendName()` - Gets the name of the current memory backend / 获取当前使用的内存后端名称
- `public static int getJavaVersion()` - Gets the current Java version / 获取当前 Java 版本
- `public static VarHandle findVarHandle(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName, Class<?> fieldType)` - Gets the VarHandle for a field / 获取字段的 VarHandle
- `public static VarHandle findStaticVarHandle(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName, Class<?> fieldType)` - Gets the VarHandle for a static field / 获取静态字段的 VarHandle
- `public static VarHandle arrayVarHandle(Class<?> arrayClass)` - Gets the VarHandle for an array / 获取数组的 VarHandle
- `public static boolean compareAndSetInt(VarHandle vh, Object obj, int expect, int update)` - CAS sets int value (new API, no warnings) / CAS 设置 int 值 (新 API，无警告)
- `public static boolean compareAndSetLong(VarHandle vh, Object obj, long expect, long update)` - CAS sets long value (new API, no warnings) / CAS 设置 long 值 (新 API，无警告)
- `public static boolean compareAndSetObject(VarHandle vh, Object obj, Object expect, Object update)` - CAS sets object reference (new API, no warnings) / CAS 设置对象引用 (新 API，无警告)
- `public static boolean compareAndSetArrayInt(int[] array, int index, int expect, int update)` - CAS sets array element int / CAS 设置数组元素 int
- `public static boolean compareAndSetArrayLong(long[] array, int index, long expect, long update)` - CAS sets array element long / CAS 设置数组元素 long
- `public static boolean compareAndSetArrayObject(Object[] array, int index, Object expect, Object update)` - CAS sets array element Object / CAS 设置数组元素 Object
- `public static int getIntVolatile(VarHandle vh, Object obj)` - Gets int field value (volatile, new API) / 获取 int 字段值 (volatile，新 API)
- `public static void putIntVolatile(VarHandle vh, Object obj, int value)` - Sets int field value (volatile, new API) / 设置 int 字段值 (volatile，新 API)
- `public static long getLongVolatile(VarHandle vh, Object obj)` - Gets long field value (volatile, new API) / 获取 long 字段值 (volatile，新 API)
- `public static void putLongVolatile(VarHandle vh, Object obj, long value)` - Sets long field value (volatile, new API) / 设置 long 字段值 (volatile，新 API)
- `public static Object getObjectVolatile(VarHandle vh, Object obj)` - Gets object reference (volatile, new API) / 获取对象引用 (volatile，新 API)
- `public static void putObjectVolatile(VarHandle vh, Object obj, Object value)` - Sets object reference (volatile, new API) / 设置对象引用 (volatile，新 API)
- `public static int arrayBaseOffset(Class<?> arrayClass)` - Gets the array base offset / 获取数组基础偏移量
- `public static int arrayIndexScale(Class<?> arrayClass)` - Gets the array element scale factor / 获取数组元素缩放因子
- `public static boolean isAvailable()` - Checks if Unsafe is available / 检查 Unsafe 是否可用
- `public static Object getUnsafe()` - Gets the Unsafe instance / 获取 Unsafe 实例
- `public static <T> T allocateInstance(Class<T> clazz)` - Allocates an instance (without calling constructor) / 分配实例（不调用构造器）
- `public static void throwException(Throwable t)` - Throws an exception (unchecked) - uses sneaky throw, no Unsafe needed / 抛出异常（无需检查）- 使用 sneaky throw，不需要 Unsafe
- `public static int pageSize()` - Gets the page size / 获取页大小
- `public static long objectFieldOffset(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Gets the field offset (legacy API compatible) / 获取字段偏移量 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static long objectFieldOffset(Field field)` - Gets the field offset (legacy API compatible) / 获取字段偏移量 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static long staticFieldOffset(Field field)` - Gets the static field offset (legacy API compatible) / 获取静态字段偏移量 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static boolean compareAndSwapInt(Object obj, long offset, int expect, int update)` - CAS sets int value (legacy API compatible) / CAS 设置 int 值 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static boolean compareAndSwapLong(Object obj, long offset, long expect, long update)` - CAS sets long value (legacy API compatible) / CAS 设置 long 值 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static boolean compareAndSwapObject(Object obj, long offset, Object expect, Object update)` - CAS sets object reference (legacy API compatible) / CAS 设置对象引用 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static int getIntVolatile(Object obj, long offset)` - Gets object int field value (legacy API compatible) / 获取对象的 int 字段值 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static void putIntVolatile(Object obj, long offset, int value)` - Sets object int field value (legacy API compatible) / 设置对象的 int 字段值 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static long getLongVolatile(Object obj, long offset)` - Gets object long field value (legacy API compatible) / 获取对象的 long 字段值 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static void putLongVolatile(Object obj, long offset, long value)` - Sets object long field value (legacy API compatible) / 设置对象的 long 字段值 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static Object getObjectVolatile(Object obj, long offset)` - Gets object reference field value (legacy API compatible) / 获取对象的引用字段值 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static void putObjectVolatile(Object obj, long offset, Object value)` - Sets object reference field value (legacy API compatible) / 设置对象的引用字段值 (兼容旧 API)
- `public static long allocateMemory(long bytes)` - Allocates direct memory / 分配直接内存
- `public static long reallocateMemory(long address, long bytes)` - Reallocates direct memory / 重新分配直接内存
- `public static void freeMemory(long address)` - Frees direct memory / 释放直接内存
- `public static void setMemory(long address, long bytes, byte value)` - Sets memory value / 设置内存值
- `public static void copyMemory(long srcAddress, long destAddress, long bytes)` - Copies memory / 复制内存
- `public static void putByte(long address, byte value)` - Writes a byte to memory / 写入 byte 到内存
- `public static byte getByte(long address)` - Reads a byte from memory / 从内存读取 byte
- `public static void putShort(long address, short value)` - Writes a short to memory / 写入 short 到内存
- `public static short getShort(long address)` - Reads a short from memory / 从内存读取 short
- `public static void putInt(long address, int value)` - Writes an int to memory / 写入 int 到内存
- `public static int getInt(long address)` - Reads an int from memory / 从内存读取 int
- `public static void putLong(long address, long value)` - Writes a long to memory / 写入 long 到内存
- `public static long getLong(long address)` - Reads a long from memory / 从内存读取 long
- `public static void putFloat(long address, float value)` - Writes a float to memory / 写入 float 到内存
- `public static float getFloat(long address)` - Reads a float from memory / 从内存读取 float
- `public static void putDouble(long address, double value)` - Writes a double to memory / 写入 double 到内存
- `public static double getDouble(long address)` - Reads a double from memory / 从内存读取 double

### Singleton
`public final class Singleton` - Singleton Container - Global singleton instance registry / 单例容器 - 全局单例实例注册表

- `public static <T> T get(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets a singleton instance (by type) / 获取单例实例（按类型）
- `public static <T> T get(Class<T> clazz, Supplier<T> supplier)` - Gets a singleton instance, creates if absent / 获取单例实例，不存在时创建
- `public static <T> void register(Class<T> clazz, T instance)` - Registers a singleton instance (by type) / 注册单例实例（按类型）
- `public static <T> T registerIfAbsent(Class<T> clazz, T instance)` - Registers a singleton instance (if absent) / 注册单例实例（如果不存在）
- `public static void remove(Class<?> clazz)` - Removes a singleton instance (by type) / 移除单例实例（按类型）
- `public static boolean contains(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if a singleton exists (by type) / 检查单例是否存在（按类型）
- `public static <T> T get(String name)` - Gets a singleton instance (by name) / 获取单例实例（按名称）
- `public static <T> T get(String name, Supplier<T> supplier)` - Gets a singleton instance, creates if absent (by name) / 获取单例实例，不存在时创建（按名称）
- `public static void register(String name, Object instance)` - Registers a singleton instance (by name) / 注册单例实例（按名称）
- `public static <T> T registerIfAbsent(String name, T instance)` - Registers a singleton instance (if absent, by name) / 注册单例实例（如果不存在，按名称）
- `public static void remove(String name)` - Removes a singleton instance (by name) / 移除单例实例（按名称）
- `public static boolean contains(String name)` - Checks if a singleton exists (by name) / 检查单例是否存在（按名称）
- `public static void clear()` - Clears all singletons / 清除所有单例
- `public static int size()` - Gets the count of all type-based singletons / 获取所有类型单例数量
- `public static int namedSize()` - Gets the count of all named singletons / 获取所有命名单例数量

### SpiLoader
`public final class SpiLoader` - SPI Loader - Service Provider Interface loading utility / SPI 加载器 - 服务提供者接口加载工具

- `public static <T> List<T> load(Class<T> serviceClass)` - Loads SPI service implementations / 加载 SPI 服务实现
- `public static <T> List<T> load(Class<T> serviceClass, ClassLoader classLoader)` - Loads SPI service implementations (with specified ClassLoader) / 加载 SPI 服务实现（使用指定 ClassLoader）
- `public static <T> Optional<T> loadFirst(Class<T> serviceClass)` - Loads the first SPI service implementation / 加载第一个 SPI 服务实现
- `public static <T> T loadFirstOrDefault(Class<T> serviceClass, T defaultValue)` - Loads the first SPI service implementation, or uses the default / 加载第一个 SPI 服务实现，或使用默认值
- `public static <T> List<T> reload(Class<T> serviceClass)` - Forces reload of SPI services / 强制重新加载 SPI 服务
- `public static <T> boolean hasService(Class<T> serviceClass)` - Checks if the SPI service exists / 检查 SPI 服务是否存在
- `public static <T> int count(Class<T> serviceClass)` - Gets the SPI service count / 获取 SPI 服务数量
- `public static <T, S extends T> List<S> loadByType(Class<T> serviceClass, Class<S> targetType)` - Filters SPI services by type / 按类型过滤 SPI 服务
- `public static <T> Stream<T> loadStream(Class<T> serviceClass)` - Lazily loads SPI service implementations as a Stream without eagerly materializing / 延迟加载 SPI 服务实现为 Stream，不急切实体化
- `public static <T> Stream<T> loadStream(Class<T> serviceClass, ClassLoader classLoader)` - Lazily loads SPI service implementations as a Stream with a specified ClassLoader / 使用指定的 ClassLoader 延迟加载 SPI 服务实现为 Stream
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears the cache / 清除缓存
- `public static void clearCache(Class<?> serviceClass)` - Clears the cache for the specified class / 清除指定类的缓存

### OptionalUtil
`public final class OptionalUtil` - Optional Utility - Enhanced Optional operations / Optional 工具类 - 增强的 Optional 操作

- `public static <T> Optional<T> firstPresent(Optional<T>... optionals)` - Returns the first present Optional / 返回第一个存在值的 Optional
- `public static <T> Optional<T> firstPresentLazy(Supplier<Optional<T>>... suppliers)` - Returns the first present Optional (using Supplier for lazy evaluation) / 返回第一个存在值的 Optional（使用 Supplier 进行延迟求值）
- `public static <T, R> Optional<R> mapIfPresent(Optional<T> optional, Function<T, R> mapper)` - Maps if present / 存在时映射
- `public static <T> Stream<T> stream(Optional<T> optional)` - Converts to Stream / 转为 Stream
- `public static <T, U, R> Optional<R> combine(Optional<T> opt1, Optional<U> opt2, BiFunction<T, U, R> combiner)` - Combines two Optionals / 组合两个 Optional
- `public static <T, U, V, R> Optional<R> combine3(Optional<T> opt1, Optional<U> opt2, Optional<V> opt3,` - Combines three Optionals / 组合三个 Optional
- `public static <T> T orElseGet(Optional<T> optional, Supplier<T> supplier)` - Gets the value or computes a default / 获取值或计算默认值
- `public static <T> T orNull(Optional<T> optional)` - Gets the value or returns null / 获取值或返回 null
- `public static <T, X extends Throwable> T orElseThrow(Optional<T> optional, Supplier<X> exceptionSupplier)` - Throws an exception if empty / 如果为空则抛出异常
- `public static <T, R> Optional<R> flatMapNullable(Optional<T> optional, Function<T, R> mapper)` - Transforms the value inside Optional, handling null / 转换 Optional 内的值，处理 null
- `public static <T, R> Optional<R> filterAndMap(Optional<T> optional, java.util.function.Predicate<T> predicate, Function<T, R> mapper)` - Filters and maps / 过滤并映射
- `public static <T> void ifPresentOrElse(Optional<T> optional, java.util.function.Consumer<T> action, Runnable emptyAction)` - Executes an action if the value is present / 执行操作，如果存在值
- `public static <T> Optional<T> flatten(Optional<Optional<T>> optional)` - Flattens Optional> to Optional / 将 Optional> 扁平化为 Optional
- `public static boolean allPresent(Optional<?>... optionals)` - Checks if all Optionals have a value present / 检查所有 Optional 是否都存在值
- `public static boolean anyPresent(Optional<?>... optionals)` - Checks if any Optional has a value present / 检查是否有任意 Optional 存在值

### ParallelStreamUtil
`public final class ParallelStreamUtil` - Parallel Stream Utility - Smart parallel/sequential stream selection / 并行流工具类 - 智能选择并行/顺序流

- `public static int getRecommendedThreshold()` - Gets the recommended parallel threshold / 获取推荐的并行阈值
- `public static <T> Stream<T> stream(Collection<T> collection)` - Selects sequential or parallel stream based on collection size / 根据集合大小智能选择顺序或并行流
- `public static <T> Stream<T> stream(Collection<T> collection, int threshold)` - Selects sequential or parallel stream based on collection size (custom threshold) / 根据集合大小智能选择顺序或并行流（自定义阈值）
- `public static boolean isParallelRecommended(int size)` - Checks if parallel stream is recommended / 检查是否推荐使用并行流
- `public static boolean isParallelRecommended(int size, int threshold)` - Checks if parallel stream is recommended (custom threshold) / 检查是否推荐使用并行流（自定义阈值）
- `public static int getAvailableProcessors()` - Gets the available processor count / 获取可用处理器数量
- `public static int getParallelism()` - Gets the ForkJoinPool parallelism / 获取 ForkJoinPool 并行度
- `public static <T> Stream<T> sequentialStream(Collection<T> collection)` - Forces a sequential stream / 强制使用顺序流
- `public static <T> Stream<T> parallelStream(Collection<T> collection)` - Forces a parallel stream / 强制使用并行流
- `public static <T> Stream<T> toParallelIf(Stream<T> stream, boolean condition)` - Converts the stream to parallel if the condition is met / 将流转为并行流（如果条件满足）
- `public static <T> Stream<T> toSequential(Stream<T> stream)` - Converts the stream to sequential / 将流转为顺序流

### NamedThreadFactory
`public class NamedThreadFactory` - Named Thread Factory - Custom thread factory with naming support / 命名线程工厂 - 支持命名的自定义线程工厂

- `public NamedThreadFactory(String namePrefix)` - Creates a factory with the given thread name prefix / 创建指定名称前缀的线程工厂
- `public NamedThreadFactory(String namePrefix, boolean daemon)` - Creates a factory with the given prefix and daemon flag / 创建指定名称前缀和守护线程标志的工厂
- `public NamedThreadFactory(String namePrefix, boolean daemon, int priority)` - Creates a factory with the given prefix, daemon flag and priority / 创建指定名称、守护线程标志和优先级的工厂
- `public Thread newThread(Runnable r)` - Creates a new named thread for the given Runnable / 为给定 Runnable 创建命名线程
- `public static NamedThreadFactory daemon(String namePrefix)` - Creates a daemon thread factory / 创建守护线程工厂
- `public static NamedThreadFactory nonDaemon(String namePrefix)` - Creates a non-daemon thread factory / 创建非守护线程工厂
- `public static Builder builder()` - Builder / 构建器

### OpenThread
`public final class OpenThread` - Thread Utility Class - Thread pool creation and management / 线程工具类 - 线程池创建和管理

- `public static ExecutorService createFixedThreadPool(int nThreads, String namePrefix)` - Creates a fixed-size thread pool / 创建固定大小线程池
- `public static ExecutorService createCachedThreadPool(String namePrefix)` - Creates a cached thread pool / 创建缓存线程池
- `public static ExecutorService createSingleThreadExecutor(String namePrefix)` - Creates a single-thread executor / 创建单线程执行器
- `public static ScheduledExecutorService createScheduledThreadPool(int corePoolSize, String namePrefix)` - Creates a scheduled thread pool / 创建调度线程池
- `public static ExecutorService createVirtualThreadExecutor()` - Creates a virtual thread executor (JDK 21+) / 创建虚拟线程执行器 (JDK 21+)
- `public static ExecutorService createVirtualThreadExecutor(String namePrefix)` - Creates a virtual thread executor (with name prefix) / 创建虚拟线程执行器（带名称前缀）
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> runAsync(Runnable runnable)` - Executes a task asynchronously / 异步执行任务
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> runAsync(Runnable runnable, Executor executor)` - Executes a task asynchronously (with specified executor) / 异步执行任务（指定执行器）
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> supplyAsync(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Executes asynchronously and returns a result / 异步执行并返回结果
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> supplyAsync(Supplier<T> supplier, Executor executor)` - Executes asynchronously and returns a result (with specified executor) / 异步执行并返回结果（指定执行器）
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> executeAsync(Supplier<T> supplier, Duration timeout)` - Executes asynchronously with timeout / 带超时的异步执行
- `public static void sleep(Duration duration)` - Puts the thread to sleep / 线程睡眠
- `public static void sleepMillis(long millis)` - Puts the thread to sleep (milliseconds) / 线程睡眠（毫秒）
- `public static void sleepSeconds(long seconds)` - Puts the thread to sleep (seconds) / 线程睡眠（秒）
- `public static boolean sleepInterruptibly(Duration duration)` - Interruptible sleep / 可中断睡眠
- `public static Thread currentThread()` - Gets the current thread / 获取当前线程
- `public static String currentThreadName()` - Gets the current thread name / 获取当前线程名称
- `public static long currentThreadId()` - Gets the current thread ID / 获取当前线程 ID
- `public static boolean isVirtualThread()` - Checks if the current thread is a virtual thread / 检查当前线程是否为虚拟线程
- `public static boolean isVirtualThread(Thread thread)` - Checks if the specified thread is a virtual thread / 检查指定线程是否为虚拟线程
- `public static Thread[] getAllThreads()` - Gets all threads / 获取所有线程
- `public static Thread.State getThreadState(long threadId)` - Gets the thread state / 获取线程状态
- `public static boolean shutdownGracefully(ExecutorService executor, Duration timeout)` - Gracefully shuts down the thread pool / 优雅关闭线程池
- `public static void shutdownNow(ExecutorService executor)` - Immediately shuts down the thread pool / 立即关闭线程池
- `public static boolean isInterrupted()` - Checks if the current thread is interrupted / 检查当前线程是否被中断
- `public static boolean interrupted()` - Checks and clears the interrupt status / 检查并清除中断状态
- `public static void interrupt(Thread thread)` - Interrupts the thread / 中断线程

### ScopedValueUtil
`public final class ScopedValueUtil` - ScopedValue Utility - JDK 25 Scoped Values support (JEP 506) / ScopedValue 工具类 - JDK 25 作用域值支持 (JEP 506)

- `public static <T> ScopedValue<T> newScopedValue()` - Create a new ScopedValue instance / 创建新的 ScopedValue 实例
- `public static <T> void runWhere(ScopedValue<T> scopedValue, T value, Runnable task)` - Bind a value to a ScopedValue and execute a Runnable task / 将值绑定到 ScopedValue 并执行 Runnable 任务
- `public static <T, R, X extends Throwable> R callWhere(ScopedValue<T> scopedValue, T value,` - Bind a value to a ScopedValue and execute a CallableOp task / 将值绑定到 ScopedValue 并执行 CallableOp 任务
- `public static <T1, T2> void runWhere(ScopedValue<T1> sv1, T1 v1,` - Bind two values to two ScopedValues and execute a Runnable task / 将两个值绑定到两个 ScopedValue 并执行 Runnable 任务
- `public static <T1, T2, R, X extends Throwable> R callWhere(ScopedValue<T1> sv1, T1 v1,` - Bind two values to two ScopedValues and execute a CallableOp task / 将两个值绑定到两个 ScopedValue 并执行 CallableOp 任务
- `public static <T1, T2, T3> void runWhere(ScopedValue<T1> sv1, T1 v1,` - Bind three values to three ScopedValues and execute a Runnable task / 将三个值绑定到三个 ScopedValue 并执行 Runnable 任务
- `public static <T> boolean isBound(ScopedValue<T> scopedValue)` - Check if a ScopedValue is bound in the current scope / 检查 ScopedValue 是否在当前作用域中绑定
- `public static <T> T getOrDefault(ScopedValue<T> scopedValue, T defaultValue)` - Get the value of a ScopedValue, or return a default value if not bound / 获取 ScopedValue 的值，未绑定时返回默认值
- `public static <T> T get(ScopedValue<T> scopedValue)` - Get the value of a ScopedValue / 获取 ScopedValue 的值
- `public static <T> ScopedValue.Carrier where(ScopedValue<T> scopedValue, T value)` - Create a ScopedValue.Carrier with a single binding / 创建带有单个绑定的 ScopedValue.Carrier

### StructuredTaskUtil
`public final class StructuredTaskUtil` - StructuredTaskScope Utility - JDK 25 Structured Concurrency support (JEP 505) / 结构化任务工具类 - JDK 25 结构化并发支持 (JEP 505)

- `public static <T> List<T> invokeAll(List<Callable<T>> tasks)` - Execute all tasks in parallel, all must succeed / 并行执行所有任务，全部成功才返回
- `public static <T> List<T> invokeAll(List<Callable<T>> tasks, Duration timeout)` - Execute all tasks in parallel with timeout, all must succeed / 并行执行所有任务（带超时），全部成功才返回
- `public static <T> T invokeAny(List<Callable<T>> tasks)` - Execute tasks in parallel, first to succeed wins / 并行执行任务，任一成功即返回
- `public static <T> T invokeAny(List<Callable<T>> tasks, Duration timeout)` - Execute tasks in parallel with timeout, first to succeed wins / 并行执行任务（带超时），任一成功即返回
- `public static <T, U, R> R parallel(Callable<T> task1, Callable<U> task2,` - Execute two tasks in parallel and combine their results / 并行执行两个任务并合并结果
- `public static <T, U, R> R parallel(Callable<T> task1, Callable<U> task2,` - Execute two tasks in parallel with timeout and combine their results / 并行执行两个任务（带超时）并合并结果
- `public static <T1, T2, T3, R> R parallel(Callable<T1> task1, Callable<T2> task2, Callable<T3> task3,` - Execute three tasks in parallel and combine their results / 并行执行三个任务并合并结果
- `public static <T> T run(Callable<T> task)` - Execute a single task with structured concurrency semantics / 使用结构化并发语义执行单个任务
- `public static <T> T run(Callable<T> task, Duration timeout)` - Execute a single task with timeout / 执行单个任务（带超时）

### ThreadLocalUtil
`public final class ThreadLocalUtil` - ThreadLocal Utility - Global named ThreadLocal management / ThreadLocal 工具类 - 全局命名 ThreadLocal 管理

- `public static <T> T get(String key)` - Gets the ThreadLocal value / 获取 ThreadLocal 值
- `public static <T> T get(String key, T defaultValue)` - Gets the ThreadLocal value, returns default when absent / 获取 ThreadLocal 值，不存在时返回默认值
- `public static <T> T getOrCompute(String key, Supplier<T> supplier)` - Gets the ThreadLocal value, computes via Supplier when absent / 获取 ThreadLocal 值，不存在时通过 Supplier 计算
- `public static <T> void set(String key, T value)` - Sets the ThreadLocal value / 设置 ThreadLocal 值
- `public static void remove(String key)` - Removes the specified ThreadLocal / 移除指定 ThreadLocal
- `public static void clear()` - Clears all ThreadLocals for the current thread / 清除当前线程的所有 ThreadLocal
- `public static boolean contains(String key)` - Checks if the ThreadLocal exists / 检查 ThreadLocal 是否存在
- `public static <T> ThreadLocal<T> create()` - Creates a ThreadLocal / 创建 ThreadLocal
- `public static <T> ThreadLocal<T> createWithInitial(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Creates a ThreadLocal with initial value / 创建带初始值的 ThreadLocal
- `public static <T> InheritableThreadLocal<T> createInheritable()` - Creates an InheritableThreadLocal / 创建 InheritableThreadLocal
- `public static <T> InheritableThreadLocal<T> createInheritableWithInitial(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Creates an InheritableThreadLocal with initial value / 创建带初始值的 InheritableThreadLocal
- `public static <T> void runWithContext(String key, T value, Runnable runnable)` - Executes in the specified context / 在指定上下文中执行
- `public static <T, R> R callWithContext(String key, T value, Supplier<R> supplier)` - Executes in the specified context and returns a result / 在指定上下文中执行并返回结果
- `public static java.util.Set<String> keys()` - Gets all ThreadLocal keys / 获取所有 ThreadLocal 的 key

### Pair
`public record Pair<L, R>(L left, R right)` - Pair - Immutable two-element tuple (Record implementation) / 二元组 - 不可变的两元素元组（Record 实现）

- `public static <L, R> Pair<L, R> of(L left, R right)` - Creates a Pair / 创建二元组
- `public static <K, V> Pair<K, V> fromEntry(Map.Entry<K, V> entry)` - Creates a Pair from Map.Entry / 从 Map.Entry 创建二元组
- `public static <L, R> Pair<L, R> empty()` - Creates an empty Pair / 创建空二元组
- `public L first()` - Gets the first element (alias for left) / 获取第一个元素（左值的别名）
- `public R second()` - Gets the second element (alias for right) / 获取第二个元素（右值的别名）
- `public L key()` - Gets the key (alias for left, for Map scenarios) / 获取键（左值的别名，用于 Map 场景）
- `public R value()` - Gets the value (alias for right, for Map scenarios) / 获取值（右值的别名，用于 Map 场景）
- `public Pair<R, L> swap()` - Swaps left and right values / 交换左右值
- `public <T> Pair<T, R> mapLeft(Function<? super L, ? extends T> mapper)` - Maps the left value / 映射左值
- `public <T> Pair<L, T> mapRight(Function<? super R, ? extends T> mapper)` - Maps the right value / 映射右值
- `public <T, U> Pair<T, U> map(Function<? super L, ? extends T> leftMapper,` - Maps both left and right values / 同时映射左右值
- `public <T> T apply(BiFunction<? super L, ? super R, ? extends T> function)` - Applies a bi-function / 应用二元函数
- `public boolean hasNull()` - Checks if it contains a null value / 检查是否包含 null 值
- `public boolean allNonNull()` - Checks if all values are non-null / 检查是否都非 null
- `public Map.Entry<L, R> toEntry()` - Converts to Map.Entry / 转换为 Map.Entry
- `public Object[] toArray()` - Converts to an array / 转换为数组
- `public String toString()` - Converts to string / 转为字符串

### Quadruple
`public record Quadruple<A, B, C, D>(A first, B second, C third, D fourth)` - Quadruple - Immutable four-element tuple (Record implementation) / 四元组 - 不可变的四元素元组（Record 实现）

- `public static <A, B, C, D> Quadruple<A, B, C, D> of(A first, B second, C third, D fourth)` - Creates a Quadruple / 创建四元组
- `public static <A, B, C, D> Quadruple<A, B, C, D> empty()` - Creates an empty Quadruple / 创建空四元组
- `public <T> Quadruple<T, B, C, D> mapFirst(Function<? super A, ? extends T> mapper)` - Maps the first element / 映射第一个元素
- `public <T> Quadruple<A, T, C, D> mapSecond(Function<? super B, ? extends T> mapper)` - Maps the second element / 映射第二个元素
- `public <T> Quadruple<A, B, T, D> mapThird(Function<? super C, ? extends T> mapper)` - Maps the third element / 映射第三个元素
- `public <T> Quadruple<A, B, C, T> mapFourth(Function<? super D, ? extends T> mapper)` - Maps the fourth element / 映射第四个元素
- `public Pair<A, B> toFirstPair()` - Extracts the first two elements as a Pair / 提取前两个元素为 Pair
- `public Pair<C, D> toLastPair()` - Extracts the last two elements as a Pair / 提取后两个元素为 Pair
- `public Triple<A, B, C> toFirstTriple()` - Extracts the first three elements as a Triple / 提取前三个元素为 Triple
- `public Triple<B, C, D> toLastTriple()` - Extracts the last three elements as a Triple / 提取后三个元素为 Triple
- `public boolean hasNull()` - Checks if it contains a null value / 检查是否包含 null 值
- `public boolean allNonNull()` - Checks if all values are non-null / 检查是否都非 null
- `public Object[] toArray()` - Converts to an array / 转换为数组
- `public String toString()` - Converts to string / 转为字符串

### Triple
`public record Triple<A, B, C>(A first, B second, C third)` - Triple - Immutable three-element tuple (Record implementation) / 三元组 - 不可变的三元素元组（Record 实现）

- `public static <A, B, C> Triple<A, B, C> of(A first, B second, C third)` - Creates a Triple / 创建三元组
- `public static <A, B, C> Triple<A, B, C> empty()` - Creates an empty Triple / 创建空三元组
- `public A left()` - Gets the left value (alias for first) / 获取左值（第一个元素的别名）
- `public B middle()` - Gets the middle value (alias for second) / 获取中值（第二个元素的别名）
- `public C right()` - Gets the right value (alias for third) / 获取右值（第三个元素的别名）
- `public <T> Triple<T, B, C> mapFirst(Function<? super A, ? extends T> mapper)` - Maps the first element / 映射第一个元素
- `public <T> Triple<A, T, C> mapSecond(Function<? super B, ? extends T> mapper)` - Maps the second element / 映射第二个元素
- `public <T> Triple<A, B, T> mapThird(Function<? super C, ? extends T> mapper)` - Maps the third element / 映射第三个元素
- `public <T, U, V> Triple<T, U, V> map(Function<? super A, ? extends T> firstMapper,` - Maps all elements simultaneously / 同时映射所有元素
- `public <R> R apply(TriFunction<? super A, ? super B, ? super C, ? extends R> function)` - Applies a tri-function / 应用三元函数
- `public Pair<A, B> toFirstPair()` - Extracts the first two elements as a Pair / 提取前两个元素为 Pair
- `public Pair<B, C> toLastPair()` - Extracts the last two elements as a Pair / 提取后两个元素为 Pair
- `public boolean hasNull()` - Checks if it contains a null value / 检查是否包含 null 值
- `public boolean allNonNull()` - Checks if all values are non-null / 检查是否都非 null
- `public Object[] toArray()` - Converts to an array / 转换为数组
- `public String toString()` - Converts to string / 转为字符串

### TupleUtil
`public final class TupleUtil` - Tuple Factory Utility - Convenience methods for creating tuples / 元组工厂工具类 - 提供创建元组的便捷方法

- `public static <L, R> Pair<L, R> pair(L left, R right)` - Creates a Pair / 创建二元组
- `public static <K, V> Pair<K, V> pair(Map.Entry<K, V> entry)` - Creates a Pair from Map.Entry / 从 Map.Entry 创建二元组
- `public static <L, R> Pair<L, R> emptyPair()` - Creates an empty Pair / 创建空二元组
- `public static <A, B, C> Triple<A, B, C> triple(A first, B second, C third)` - Creates a Triple / 创建三元组
- `public static <A, B, C> Triple<A, B, C> emptyTriple()` - Creates an empty Triple / 创建空三元组
- `public static <A, B, C, D> Quadruple<A, B, C, D> quadruple(A first, B second, C third, D fourth)` - Creates a Quadruple / 创建四元组
- `public static <A, B, C, D> Quadruple<A, B, C, D> emptyQuadruple()` - Creates an empty Quadruple / 创建空四元组

## 2. opencode-base-string

字符串高级工具，提供命名转换、模板渲染、脱敏、差异对比、转义、正则、相似度、中文处理

### OpenNaming
`public final class OpenNaming` - Naming Convention Facade Utility / 命名转换门面工具类

- `public static String toCamelCase(String name)` - Convert to camelCase (first letter lowercase). / 转换为驼峰命名（首字母小写）。
- `public static String toPascalCase(String name)` - Convert to PascalCase (first letter uppercase). / 转换为帕斯卡命名（首字母大写）。
- `public static String toSnakeCase(String name)` - Convert to snake_case (underscore separated lowercase). / 转换为蛇形命名（下划线分隔小写）。
- `public static String toUpperSnakeCase(String name)` - Convert to UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (constant naming). / 转换为大写蛇形命名（常量命名）。
- `public static String toKebabCase(String name)` - Convert to kebab-case (hyphen separated). / 转换为短横线命名。
- `public static String toDotCase(String name)` - Convert to dot.case. / 转换为点分隔命名。
- `public static String toPathCase(String name)` - Convert to path/case. / 转换为路径命名。
- `public static String toTitleCase(String name)` - Convert to Title Case (space separated, each word capitalized) / 转换为标题形式（空格分隔，每个单词首字母大写）
- `public static String toSentenceCase(String name)` - Convert to Sentence case (space separated, first word capitalized) / 转换为句子形式（空格分隔，首个单词首字母大写）
- `public static String convert(String name, NamingCase from, NamingCase to)` - Convert naming style. / 转换命名风格。
- `public static String convert(String name, NamingCase to)` - Auto-detect and convert to target naming style. / 自动检测并转换为目标命名风格。
- `public static NamingCase detect(String name)` - Detect naming case of a string. / 检测字符串的命名风格。
- `public static String[] splitWords(String name)` - Split compound name into words. / 将复合名称分割为单词。
- `public static String joinWords(String[] words, NamingCase case_)` - Join words with naming case. / 使用命名风格连接单词。
- `public static String tableToClass(String tableName)` - Convert database table name to Java class name. / 将数据库表名转换为Java类名。
- `public static String columnToField(String columnName)` - Convert database column name to Java field name. / 将数据库字段名转换为Java属性名。
- `public static String classToTable(String className)` - Convert Java class name to database table name. / 将Java类名转换为数据库表名。
- `public static String fieldToColumn(String fieldName)` - Convert Java field name to database column name. / 将Java属性名转换为数据库字段名。
- `public static String classToPath(String className)` - Convert Java class name to URL path. / 将Java类名转换为URL路径。

### OpenString
`public final class OpenString` - Enhanced String Utility Facade / 字符串增强工具门面类

- `public static String padLeft(String str, int minLength, char padChar)` - Pad string on the left to reach minimum length. / 在字符串左侧填充以达到最小长度。
- `public static String padRight(String str, int minLength, char padChar)` - Pad string on the right to reach minimum length. / 在字符串右侧填充以达到最小长度。
- `public static String center(String str, int minLength, char padChar)` - Center string within the given minimum length using the pad character / 使用填充字符将字符串居中到指定最小长度
- `public static String left(String str, int length)` - Get the leftmost length characters of a string. / 获取字符串最左侧的 length 个字符。
- `public static String right(String str, int length)` - Get the rightmost length characters of a string. / 获取字符串最右侧的 length 个字符。
- `public static String mid(String str, int start, int end)` - Extracts substring from start index to end index / 截取从start到end的子字符串
- `public static String truncate(String str, int maxLength)` - Truncates string to max length with ellipsis / 截断字符串到最大长度并加省略号
- `public static String truncate(String str, int maxLength, String ellipsis)` - Truncates string with custom ellipsis / 截断字符串并使用自定义省略号
- `public static String truncateMiddle(String str, int maxLength)` - Truncates the middle of the string / 截断字符串中间部分
- `public static String truncateByBytes(String str, int maxBytes, String charset)` - Truncates string by byte length / 按字节长度截断字符串
- `public static String capitalize(String str)` - Capitalizes the first letter of the string / 将字符串首字母大写
- `public static String uncapitalize(String str)` - Uncapitalizes the first letter of the string / 将字符串首字母小写
- `public static String swapCase(String str)` - Swaps the case of each character in the string / 交换字符串中每个字符的大小写
- `public static String toTitleCase(String str)` - Converts to Title Case (each word capitalized) / 转换为标题形式（每个单词首字母大写）
- `public static String reverse(String str)` - Reverses the string / 反转字符串
- `public static String shuffle(String str)` - Shuffles characters randomly / 随机打乱字符顺序
- `public static String shuffle(String str, Random random)` - Shuffles characters using the given Random / 使用指定Random随机打乱字符顺序
- `public static int countMatches(String str, String subStr)` - Counts occurrences of a substring / 统计子字符串出现的次数
- `public static int countMatches(String str, char ch)` - Counts occurrences of a character / 统计字符出现的次数
- `public static Map<Character, Integer> charFrequency(String str)` - Returns frequency map of each character / 返回每个字符的出现频率映射
- `public static Map<String, Integer> wordFrequency(String str)` - Returns frequency map of each word / 返回每个单词的出现频率映射
- `public static String removeWhitespace(String str)` - Removes all whitespace characters / 移除所有空白字符
- `public static String normalizeWhitespace(String str)` - Normalizes whitespace (collapses multiple spaces) / 规范化空白字符（合并多个空格）
- `public static String removeInvisibleChars(String str)` - Removes invisible/control characters / 移除不可见字符和控制字符
- `public static String removeSpecialChars(String str)` - Removes special characters / 移除特殊字符
- `public static String keepDigits(String str)` - Keeps only digit characters / 只保留数字字符
- `public static String keepLetters(String str)` - Keeps only letter characters / 只保留字母字符
- `public static String keepAlphanumeric(String str)` - Keeps only alphanumeric characters / 只保留字母和数字字符
- `public static String keepChinese(String str)` - Keeps only Chinese characters / 只保留中文字符
- `public static boolean isNumeric(String str)` - Checks if string contains only digits / 检查字符串是否只包含数字
- `public static boolean isAlpha(String str)` - Checks if string contains only letters / 检查字符串是否只包含字母
- `public static boolean isAlphanumeric(String str)` - Checks if string contains only letters and digits / 检查字符串是否只包含字母和数字
- `public static boolean isAscii(String str)` - Checks if string contains only ASCII characters / 检查字符串是否只包含ASCII字符
- `public static boolean containsChinese(String str)` - Checks if string contains Chinese characters / 检查字符串是否包含中文字符
- `public static boolean isAllChinese(String str)` - Checks if string consists entirely of Chinese characters / 检查字符串是否全为中文字符
- `public static boolean isAllLowerCase(String str)` - Checks if string is all lowercase / 检查字符串是否全为小写
- `public static boolean isAllUpperCase(String str)` - Checks if string is all uppercase / 检查字符串是否全为大写
- `public static boolean isMixedCase(String str)` - Checks if string has mixed case / 检查字符串是否大小写混合
- `public static boolean isPalindrome(String str)` - Checks if string is a palindrome / 检查字符串是否为回文
- `public static boolean isPalindromeIgnoreCase(String str)` - Checks if string is a palindrome ignoring case / 检查字符串是否为忽略大小写的回文
- `public static String ensurePrefix(String str, String prefix)` - Ensures string starts with the given prefix / 确保字符串以指定前缀开头
- `public static String ensureSuffix(String str, String suffix)` - Ensures string ends with the given suffix / 确保字符串以指定后缀结尾
- `public static String ensureWrap(String str, String wrap)` - Ensures string is wrapped with given string / 确保字符串被指定字符串包裹
- `public static String removePrefix(String str, String prefix)` - Removes the given prefix if present / 移除指定前缀（如果存在）
- `public static String removeSuffix(String str, String suffix)` - Removes the given suffix if present / 移除指定后缀（如果存在）
- `public static String commonPrefix(String... strs)` - Returns the longest common prefix of all strings / 返回所有字符串的最长公共前缀
- `public static String commonSuffix(String... strs)` - Returns the longest common suffix of all strings / 返回所有字符串的最长公共后缀
- `public static List<Integer> findAll(String str, String subStr)` - Finds all positions of substring occurrences / 查找所有子字符串出现的位置
- `public static int indexOfNth(String str, String subStr, int n)` - Finds the index of the nth occurrence of substring / 查找子字符串第n次出现的索引
- `public static int lastIndexOfNth(String str, String subStr, int n)` - Finds the last nth occurrence index of substring / 查找子字符串倒数第n次出现的索引
- `public static String substringBefore(String str, String separator)` - Gets substring before the first separator / 获取第一个分隔符之前的子字符串
- `public static String substringAfter(String str, String separator)` - Gets substring after the first separator / 获取第一个分隔符之后的子字符串
- `public static String substringBeforeLast(String str, String separator)` - Gets substring before the last separator / 获取最后一个分隔符之前的子字符串
- `public static String substringAfterLast(String str, String separator)` - Gets substring after the last separator / 获取最后一个分隔符之后的子字符串
- `public static String substringBetween(String str, String open, String close)` - Gets substring between open and close tags / 获取开始和结束标记之间的子字符串
- `public static String[] substringsBetween(String str, String open, String close)` - Gets all substrings between open and close tags / 获取所有开始和结束标记之间的子字符串
- `public static String wrap(String str, char wrapChar)` - Wraps string with given character / 使用指定字符包裹字符串
- `public static String wrap(String str, String wrapStr)` - Wraps string with given string / 使用指定字符串包裹字符串
- `public static String unwrap(String str, char wrapChar)` - Removes wrapping character from both ends / 移除两端的包裹字符
- `public static String unwrap(String str, String wrapStr)` - Removes wrapping string from both ends / 移除两端的包裹字符串
- `public static String chomp(String str)` - Removes trailing newline characters / 移除末尾换行符
- `public static String chop(String str)` - Removes the last character / 移除最后一个字符
- `public static String stripAccents(String str)` - Removes accent marks from characters / 移除字符的重音符号
- `public static String getDigits(String str)` - Extracts only digit characters / 提取字符串中的数字字符
- `public static String rotate(String str, int shift)` - Rotates string by the given shift / 按指定位移旋转字符串
- `public static String difference(String str1, String str2)` - Returns the portion of str2 that differs from str1 / 返回str2中与str1不同的部分
- `public static int indexOfDifference(String str1, String str2)` - Returns the index where two strings differ / 返回两个字符串开始不同的索引
- `public static String abbreviateMiddle(String str, String middle, int maxLength)` - Abbreviates string by replacing the middle / 通过替换中间部分来缩写字符串
- `public static boolean isRepeated(String str)` - Checks if the string consists of a repeated pattern / 检查字符串是否由重复模式组成
- `public static String getRepeatedPattern(String str)` - Gets the smallest repeated pattern in the string / 获取字符串中最小的重复模式
- `public static String defaultIfBlank(String str, String defaultStr)` - Returns defaultStr if str is blank / 如果str为空白则返回defaultStr
- `public static String defaultIfEmpty(String str, String defaultStr)` - Returns defaultStr if str is empty / 如果str为空则返回defaultStr
- `public static String firstNonBlank(String... strs)` - Returns the first non-blank string / 返回第一个非空白字符串
- `public static String firstNonEmpty(String... strs)` - Returns the first non-empty string / 返回第一个非空字符串

- `public static String render(String template, Map<String, Object> values)` - Renders template with given variable map / 使用给定变量映射渲染模板
- `public static String render(String template, Map<String, Object> values, String defaultValue)` - Renders template with default value for missing variables / 渲染模板，缺失变量使用默认值
- `public static String format(String template, Map<String, Object> values)` - Formats template with named variables / 使用命名变量格式化模板
- `public static String format(String template, Object... args)` - Formats template with positional arguments / 使用位置参数格式化模板
- `public static StringTemplate of(String template)` - Creates a StringTemplate instance / 创建 StringTemplate 实例
- `public static PlaceholderTemplate placeholder(String template, String prefix, String suffix)` - Creates a PlaceholderTemplate with custom delimiters / 使用自定义分隔符创建占位符模板

- `public static String renderInline(String template, Map<String, Object> context)` - Renders an inline template directly / 直接渲染内联模板
- `public static void registerFilter(String name, TemplateFilter filter)` - Registers a named template filter / 注册具名模板过滤器
- `public static TemplateFilter getFilter(String name)` - Gets a registered template filter by name / 按名称获取已注册的模板过滤器
- `public static void register(String name, String template)` - Registers a named template for later use / 注册具名模板供后续使用
- `public static String renderNamed(String templateName, Map<String, Object> context)` - Renders a previously registered named template / 渲染已注册的具名模板
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears the compiled template cache / 清除已编译的模板缓存

### CharMatcher
`public abstract class CharMatcher` - Character Matcher (Guava Style) / 字符匹配器（Guava风格）

- `public static CharMatcher any()` - Returns a matcher that matches any character / 返回匹配任意字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher none()` - Returns a matcher that matches no character / 返回不匹配任何字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher whitespace()` - Returns a matcher for whitespace characters / 返回匹配空白字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher breakingWhitespace()` - Returns a matcher for line-breaking whitespace / 返回匹配换行空白字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher invisible()` - Returns a matcher for invisible/control characters / 返回匹配不可见字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher digit()` - Returns a matcher for ASCII digit characters / 返回匹配ASCII数字字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher javaLetter()` - Returns a matcher for Java letter characters / 返回匹配Java字母字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher javaDigit()` - Returns a matcher for Java digit characters / 返回匹配Java数字字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher javaLetterOrDigit()` - Returns a matcher for Java letter or digit characters / 返回匹配Java字母或数字字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher javaUpperCase()` - Returns a matcher for uppercase Java letters / 返回匹配Java大写字母的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher javaLowerCase()` - Returns a matcher for lowercase Java letters / 返回匹配Java小写字母的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher ascii()` - Returns a matcher for ASCII characters / 返回匹配ASCII字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher is(char match)` - Returns a matcher that matches exactly the given character / 返回精确匹配指定字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher isNot(char match)` - Returns a matcher that matches any character except the given one / 返回匹配除指定字符外所有字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher anyOf(CharSequence sequence)` - Returns a matcher for any character in the sequence / 返回匹配序列中任意字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher noneOf(CharSequence sequence)` - Returns a matcher for characters not in the sequence / 返回匹配不在序列中的字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher inRange(char startInclusive, char endInclusive)` - Returns a matcher for characters in the given range / 返回匹配指定范围内字符的匹配器
- `public static CharMatcher forPredicate(Predicate<Character> predicate)` - Returns a matcher backed by a predicate / 返回由断言支持的字符匹配器
- `public abstract boolean matches(char c);` - Returns true if this matcher matches the given character / 如果此匹配器匹配给定字符则返回true
- `public CharMatcher and(CharMatcher other)` - Returns a matcher that matches characters matched by both matchers / 返回匹配两个匹配器都匹配字符的匹配器
- `public CharMatcher or(CharMatcher other)` - Returns a matcher that matches characters matched by either matcher / 返回匹配任一匹配器匹配字符的匹配器
- `public CharMatcher negate()` - Returns a matcher that matches characters this matcher does not match / 返回匹配此匹配器不匹配字符的匹配器
- `public boolean matchesAnyOf(CharSequence sequence)` - Returns true if any character in the sequence matches / 如果序列中有任意字符匹配则返回true
- `public boolean matchesAllOf(CharSequence sequence)` - Returns true if all characters in the sequence match / 如果序列中所有字符都匹配则返回true
- `public boolean matchesNoneOf(CharSequence sequence)` - Returns true if no character in the sequence matches / 如果序列中没有字符匹配则返回true
- `public int indexIn(CharSequence sequence)` - Returns the index of the first matching character / 返回第一个匹配字符的索引
- `public int indexIn(CharSequence sequence, int start)` - Returns the index of the first matching character starting from start / 从start开始查找第一个匹配字符的索引
- `public int lastIndexIn(CharSequence sequence)` - Returns the index of the last matching character / 返回最后一个匹配字符的索引
- `public int countIn(CharSequence sequence)` - Counts the number of matching characters in the sequence / 统计序列中匹配字符的数量
- `public String removeFrom(CharSequence sequence)` - Removes all matching characters from the sequence / 从序列中移除所有匹配的字符
- `public String retainFrom(CharSequence sequence)` - Retains only matching characters from the sequence / 仅保留序列中匹配的字符
- `public String replaceFrom(CharSequence sequence, char replacement)` - Replaces all matching characters with the given character / 用指定字符替换所有匹配字符
- `public String replaceFrom(CharSequence sequence, CharSequence replacement)` - Replaces all matching characters with the given string / 用指定字符串替换所有匹配字符
- `public String collapseFrom(CharSequence sequence, char replacement)` - Collapses consecutive matching characters to one replacement / 将连续匹配字符折叠为一个替换字符
- `public String trimFrom(CharSequence sequence)` - Removes leading and trailing matching characters / 移除首尾匹配字符
- `public String trimLeadingFrom(CharSequence sequence)` - Removes leading matching characters / 移除开头匹配字符
- `public String trimTrailingFrom(CharSequence sequence)` - Removes trailing matching characters / 移除末尾匹配字符
- `public String trimAndCollapseFrom(CharSequence sequence, char replacement)` - Trims and collapses matching characters / 移除首尾并折叠中间匹配字符

### Joiner
`public final class Joiner` - String Joiner (Guava Style) / 字符串连接器（Guava风格）

- `public static Joiner on(String separator)` - Creates a Joiner with the given string separator / 使用给定字符串分隔符创建连接器
- `public static Joiner on(char separator)` - Creates a Joiner with the given character separator / 使用给定字符分隔符创建连接器
- `public Joiner skipNulls()` - Returns a Joiner that skips null elements / 返回跳过null元素的连接器
- `public Joiner useForNull(String nullText)` - Returns a Joiner that uses the given text for null elements / 返回使用指定文本替代null元素的连接器
- `public String join(Iterable<?> parts)` - Joins all elements of the iterable / 连接可迭代对象中的所有元素
- `public String join(Iterator<?> parts)` - Joins all elements of the iterator / 连接迭代器中的所有元素
- `public String join(Object[] parts)` - Joins all elements of the array / 连接数组中的所有元素
- `public String join(Object first, Object second, Object... rest)` - Joins the given elements / 连接给定的元素
- `public <A extends Appendable> A appendTo(A appendable, Iterable<?> parts)` - Appends joined elements to an Appendable / 将连接元素追加到Appendable
- `public <A extends Appendable> A appendTo(A appendable, Iterator<?> parts)` - Appends joined iterator elements to an Appendable / 将迭代器连接元素追加到Appendable
- `public StringBuilder appendTo(StringBuilder builder, Iterable<?> parts)` - Appends joined elements to a StringBuilder / 将连接元素追加到StringBuilder
- `public MapJoiner withKeyValueSeparator(String keyValueSeparator)` - Returns a MapJoiner with the given key-value separator / 返回使用给定键值分隔符的MapJoiner
- `public MapJoiner withKeyValueSeparator(char keyValueSeparator)` - Returns a MapJoiner with the given key-value separator character / 返回使用给定键值分隔符字符的MapJoiner

### Splitter
`public final class Splitter` - String Splitter - Fluent string splitting with configurable options. / 字符串分割器...

- `public static Splitter on(char separator)` - Creates a Splitter that splits on the given character / 使用给定字符作为分隔符创建分割器
- `public static Splitter on(String separator)` - Creates a Splitter that splits on the given string / 使用给定字符串作为分隔符创建分割器
- `public static Splitter on(Pattern pattern)` - Creates a Splitter that splits on the given pattern / 使用给定正则模式作为分隔符创建分割器
- `public static Splitter onPattern(String regex)` - Creates a Splitter that splits on the given regex / 使用给定正则表达式作为分隔符创建分割器
- `public static Splitter on(CharMatcher separatorMatcher)` - Creates a Splitter that splits on matched characters / 使用字符匹配器作为分隔符创建分割器
- `public static Splitter fixedLength(int length)` - Creates a Splitter that splits into fixed-length pieces / 创建按固定长度分割的分割器
- `public Splitter omitEmptyStrings()` - Returns a Splitter that omits empty strings / 返回省略空字符串的分割器
- `public Splitter trimResults()` - Returns a Splitter that trims whitespace from results / 返回去除结果首尾空白的分割器
- `public Splitter trimResults(CharMatcher trimmer)` - Returns a Splitter that trims results using the given matcher / 返回使用匹配器去除结果首尾字符的分割器
- `public Splitter limit(int maxItems)` - Returns a Splitter that limits the number of split results / 返回限制分割结果数量的分割器
- `public Iterable<String> split(CharSequence sequence)` - Splits the sequence into parts / 将序列分割为多个部分
- `public List<String> splitToList(CharSequence sequence)` - Splits the sequence and returns as a List / 分割序列并返回为List
- `public Stream<String> splitToStream(CharSequence sequence)` - Splits the sequence and returns as a Stream / 分割序列并返回为Stream
- `public MapSplitter withKeyValueSeparator(String keyValueSeparator)` - Returns a MapSplitter with the given key-value separator / 返回使用给定键值分隔符的MapSplitter
- `public MapSplitter withKeyValueSeparator(char keyValueSeparator)` - Returns a MapSplitter with the given key-value separator character / 返回使用给定键值分隔符字符的MapSplitter

### OpenMask
`public final class OpenMask` - Data Masking Utility - Provides data desensitization and masking methods. / 数...

- `public static String mobile(String mobile)` - Masks a mobile phone number (keeps first 3 and last 4) / 脶化手机号（保留前3位和后4位）
- `public static String maskMobile(String mobile)` - Masks a mobile phone number / 脶化手机号
- `public static String idCard(String idCard)` - Masks an ID card number (keeps first 6 and last 4) / 脶化身份证号（保留前6位和后4位）
- `public static String maskIdCard(String idCard)` - Masks an ID card number / 脶化身份证号
- `public static String email(String email)` - Masks an email address (keeps first char and domain) / 脶化电子邮件地址（保留首字符和域名）
- `public static String maskEmail(String email)` - Masks an email address / 脶化电子邮件地址
- `public static String bankCard(String cardNo)` - Masks a bank card number (keeps first 4 and last 4) / 脶化银行卡号（保留前4位和后4位）
- `public static String maskBankCard(String cardNo)` - Masks a bank card number / 脶化银行卡号
- `public static String chineseName(String name)` - Masks a Chinese name (keeps first character) / 脶化中文姓名（保留姓氏）
- `public static String maskName(String name)` - Masks a name / 脶化姓名
- `public static String maskAddress(String address)` - Masks an address (keeps first 6 characters) / 脶化地址（保留前6个字符）
- `public static String mask(String str, int startKeep, int endKeep, char maskChar)` - Masks string keeping given prefix and suffix lengths / 保留首尾指定长度并脶化中间
- `public static String maskMiddle(String str, int keepLen, char maskChar)` - Masks middle portion of string, keeping given length at each end / 脶化中间部分，保留两端指定长度

- `public boolean hasPattern(String pattern)` - Checks if a pattern exists. / 检查模式是否存在。

- `public boolean isWeakMatch()` - Checks if this is a weak match (score < 0.6). / 检查是否为弱匹配（分数 < 0.6）。

### OpenRegex
`public final class OpenRegex` - Regex Facade - Unified entry point for regex matching and validation operatio...

- `public static boolean matches(String str, String regex)` - Checks if string fully matches the regex pattern / 检查字符串是否完全匹配正则表达式
- `public static boolean matches(String str, Pattern pattern)` - Checks if string fully matches the compiled pattern / 检查字符串是否完全匹配已编译的模式
- `public static boolean contains(String str, String regex)` - Checks if string contains a match for the regex / 检查字符串是否包含正则匹配
- `public static String findFirst(String str, String regex)` - Finds first match of the regex in the string / 查找字符串中第一个正则匹配
- `public static List<String> findAll(String str, String regex)` - Finds all matches of the regex in the string / 查找字符串中所有正则匹配
- `public static String findGroup(String str, String regex, int group)` - Finds specified capturing group from first match / 从第一个匹配中获取指定捕获组
- `public static List<String[]> findAllGroups(String str, String regex)` - Finds all matches with all capturing groups / 查找所有匹配及其捕获组
- `public static Map<String, String> findNamedGroups(String str, String regex)` - Finds named capturing groups from first match / 从第一个匹配中获取命名捕获组
- `public static String replaceFirst(String str, String regex, String replacement)` - Replaces first match with replacement string / 替换第一个匹配项
- `public static String replaceAll(String str, String regex, String replacement)` - Replaces all matches with replacement string / 替换所有匹配项
- `public static String replaceAll(String str, String regex, java.util.function.Function<String, String> replacer)` - Replaces all matches using a function / 使用函数替换所有匹配项
- `public static String[] split(String str, String regex)` - Splits string around matches of the regex / 按正则表达式分割字符串
- `public static String[] split(String str, String regex, int limit)` - Splits string with a limit on result count / 按正则分割字符串并限制结果数量
- `public static String escape(String str)` - Escapes special regex metacharacters in string / 转义字符串中的正则元字符
- `public static Pattern compile(String regex)` - Compiles regex pattern with length validation / 编译正则表达式模式并验证长度
- `public static Pattern compileIgnoreCase(String regex)` - Compiles case-insensitive regex pattern / 编译不区分大小写的正则表达式
- `public static int countMatches(String str, String regex)` - Counts number of regex matches in string / 统计字符串中正则匹配的数量
- `public static List<int[]> findPositions(String str, String regex)` - Finds start and end positions of all matches / 查找所有匹配的起止位置
- `public static boolean isEmail(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid email address. / 检查字符串是否为有效的电子邮件地址。
- `public static boolean isUrl(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid URL. / 检查字符串是否为有效的URL。
- `public static boolean isMobile(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid mobile phone number (China). / 检查字符串是否为有效的手机号码（中国）。
- `public static boolean isIdCard(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid ID card number (China). / 检查字符串是否为有效的身份证号码（中国）。
- `public static boolean isIpv4(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid IPv4 address. / 检查字符串是否为有效的IPv4地址。
- `public static boolean isUuid(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid UUID format. / 检查字符串是否为有效的UUID格式。

### RegexPattern
`public final class RegexPattern` - Regex Pattern Constants - Provides pre-compiled common regex patterns. / 正则模式...

- `public static final Pattern INTEGER = Pattern.compile("^-?\\d+$");` - Pattern for integer numbers (positive or negative) / 整数模式（正数或负数）
- `public static final Pattern POSITIVE_INTEGER = Pattern.compile("^\\d+$");` - Pattern for positive integers only / 正整数模式
- `public static final Pattern DECIMAL = Pattern.compile("^-?\\d+\\.\\d+$");` - Pattern for decimal numbers / 小数模式
- `public static final Pattern NUMBER = Pattern.compile("^-?\\d+(\\.\\d+)?$");` - Pattern for any number (integer or decimal) / 任意数字模式（整数或小数）
- `public static final Pattern LETTERS = Pattern.compile("^[a-zA-Z]+$");` - Pattern for letters only (A-Z, a-z) / 纯字母模式
- `public static final Pattern LOWER_LETTERS = Pattern.compile("^[a-z]+$");` - Pattern for lowercase letters only / 小写字母模式
- `public static final Pattern UPPER_LETTERS = Pattern.compile("^[A-Z]+$");` - Pattern for uppercase letters only / 大写字母模式
- `public static final Pattern ALPHANUMERIC = Pattern.compile("^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$");` - Pattern for alphanumeric characters / 字母数字模式
- `public static final Pattern CHINESE = Pattern.compile("^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]+$");` - Pattern for Chinese characters only / 纯中文字符模式
- `public static final Pattern IDENTIFIER = Pattern.compile("^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$");` - Pattern for valid programming identifiers / 编程标识符模式
- `public static final Pattern UUID = Pattern.compile("^[0-9a-fA-F]` - Pattern for UUID format / UUID格式模式
- `public static final Pattern EMAIL = Pattern.compile("^[a-zA-Z0-9._%+-]+@[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+\\.[a-zA-Z]` - Pattern for email addresses / 邮箱地址模式
- `public static final Pattern URL = Pattern.compile("^https?://[\\w.-]+(?:/[\\w./?%&=-]*)?$");` - Pattern for HTTP/HTTPS URLs / HTTP/HTTPS链接模式
- `public static final Pattern IPV4 = Pattern.compile("^(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4]\\d|[01]?\\d\\d?)\\.)`- Pattern for IPv4 addresses / IPv4地址模式
- `public static final Pattern IPV6 = Pattern.compile(` - Pattern for IPv6 addresses / IPv6地址模式
- `public static final Pattern DOMAIN = Pattern.compile("^[a-zA-Z0-9][-a-zA-Z0-9]` - Pattern for domain names / 域名模式
- `public static final Pattern MOBILE_CN = Pattern.compile("^1[3-9]\\d` - Pattern for China mainland mobile numbers / 中国大陆手机号模式
- `public static final Pattern MOBILE_HK = Pattern.compile("^[5-9]\\d` - Pattern for Hong Kong mobile numbers / 香港手机号模式
- `public static final Pattern MOBILE_TW = Pattern.compile("^09\\d` - Pattern for Taiwan mobile numbers / 台湾手机号模式
- `public static final Pattern ID_CARD_CN = Pattern.compile("^\\d` - Pattern for China 18-digit ID card numbers / 中国18位身份证号模式
- `public static final Pattern POSTAL_CODE_CN = Pattern.compile("^\\d` - Pattern for China postal codes / 中国邮政编码模式
- `public static final Pattern ID_CARD_HK = Pattern.compile("^[A-Z]` - Pattern for Hong Kong ID card numbers / 香港身份证号模式
- `public static final Pattern ID_CARD_TW = Pattern.compile("^[A-Z]\\d` - Pattern for Taiwan ID card numbers / 台湾身份证号模式
- `public static final Pattern CREDIT_CODE_CN = Pattern.compile("^[0-9A-HJ-NPQRTUWXY]` - Pattern for China unified social credit codes / 中国统一社会信用代码模式
- `public static final Pattern PHONE_US = Pattern.compile("^\\d` - Pattern for US phone numbers / 美国电话号码模式
- `public static final Pattern PHONE_INTL = Pattern.compile("^\\+?[1-9]\\d` - Pattern for international phone numbers / 国际电话号码模式
- `public static final Pattern DATE = Pattern.compile("^\\d` - Pattern for date format (YYYY-MM-DD) / 日期格式模式（YYYY-MM-DD）
- `public static final Pattern TIME = Pattern.compile("^\\d` - Pattern for time format (HH:mm:ss) / 时间格式模式（HH:mm:ss）
- `public static final Pattern DATETIME = Pattern.compile("^\\d` - Pattern for datetime format / 日期时间格式模式
- `public static boolean isEmail(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid email address / 检查字符串是否为有效邮箱地址
- `public static boolean isUrl(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid URL / 检查字符串是否为有效URL
- `public static boolean isMobile(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid mobile phone number (China) / 检查字符串是否为有效的中国手机号
- `public static boolean isMobileHK(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid Hong Kong mobile number / 检查字符串是否为有效的香港手机号

- `public static boolean isPhoneIntl(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid international phone number / 检查字符串是否为有效的国际电话号
- `public static boolean isIdCard(String str)` - Checks if string is a valid ID card number (China) / 检查字符串是否为有效的中国身份证号

- `public static double levenshteinSimilarity(String s1, String s2)` - Calculates similarity ratio based on Levenshtein distance / 基于Levenshtein距离计算相似度

- `public StringTemplate setAll(Map<String, Object> values)` - Sets multiple variable values from a map / 从映射批量设置多个变量值
- `public StringTemplate defaultValue(String defaultValue)` - Sets the default value for undefined variables / 设置未定义变量的默认值
- `public StringTemplate strict(boolean strict)` - Sets strict mode for missing variables / 设置缺失变量的严格模式

- `public boolean hasVariable(String name)` - Checks if a variable exists in the template / 检查模板中是否存在指定变量

### TemplateContext
`public final class TemplateContext` - Template Context - Holds variables and state for template rendering. / 模板上下文 - 保存模板渲染的变量和状态。

- `public void set(String name, Object value)` - Sets a variable value in the context / 在上下文中设置变量值
- `public TemplateFilter getFilter(String name)` - Gets a registered filter by name / 根据名称获取已注册的过滤器
- `public void registerFilter(String name, TemplateFilter filter)` - Registers a filter with the given name / 使用给定名称注册过滤器
- `public Map<String, Object> getVariables()` - Returns all variables in the context / 返回上下文中的所有变量

- `public TemplateEngine variablePrefix(String prefix)` - Set variable prefix / 设置变量前缀
- `public TemplateEngine variableSuffix(String suffix)` - Set variable suffix / 设置变量后缀
