### AbstractMultiset
`public abstract class AbstractMultiset<E>` - AbstractMultiset - Abstract Multiset Base Class / AbstractMultiset - 抽象多重集合基类

- `public boolean add(E element)` - Adds a single occurrence of an element / 添加元素的单个出现
- `public boolean remove(Object element)` - Removes a single occurrence of an element / 移除元素的单个出现
- `public boolean containsAll(Collection<?> c)` - Checks if this multiset contains all elements in the collection / 检查是否包含集合中的所有元素
- `public boolean addAll(Collection<? extends E> c)` - Adds all elements from the collection / 添加集合中的所有元素
- `public boolean removeAll(Collection<?> c)` - Removes all elements that are also in the collection / 移除也在集合中的所有元素
- `public boolean retainAll(Collection<?> c)` - Retains only elements that are in the collection / 仅保留在集合中的元素
- `public Object[] toArray()` - Converts to an Object array / 转换为Object数组
- `public <T> T[] toArray(T[] a)` - Converts to a typed array / 转换为类型化数组
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - Checks equality with another object / 检查与另一对象是否相等
- `public int hashCode()` - Computes the hash code / 计算哈希码
- `public String toString()` - Returns a string representation / 返回字符串表示

### ArrayTable
`public final class ArrayTable<R, C, V>` - ArrayTable - Fixed-size Array-based Table Implementation / ArrayTable - 固定大小基于数组的表实现。

- `public static <R, C, V> ArrayTable<R, C, V> create(` - Create an ArrayTable with the specified row and column keys. / 使用指定的行和列键创建 ArrayTable。
- `public static <R, C, V> ArrayTable<R, C, V> create(Table<R, C, V> table)` - Create an ArrayTable copying from another table. / 从另一个表复制创建 ArrayTable。
- `public V get(Object rowKey, Object columnKey)` - Gets the value at the specified row and column / 获取指定行列位置的值
- `public boolean contains(Object rowKey, Object columnKey)` - Checks if the table contains a cell at the given row and column / 检查表中是否包含指定行列的单元格
- `public boolean containsRow(Object rowKey)` - Checks if the table contains the specified row / 检查表中是否包含指定行
- `public boolean containsColumn(Object columnKey)` - Checks if the table contains the specified column / 检查表中是否包含指定列
- `public boolean containsValue(Object value)` - Checks if the table contains the specified value / 检查表中是否包含指定值
- `public V put(R rowKey, C columnKey, V value)` - Puts a value at the specified row and column / 在指定行列位置放入值
- `public void putAll(Table<? extends R, ? extends C, ? extends V> table)` - Copies all cells from another table / 从另一个表复制所有单元格
- `public V remove(Object rowKey, Object columnKey)` - Removes the value at the specified row and column / 移除指定行列位置的值
- `public Map<C, V> row(R rowKey)` - Returns a view of all columns and values for the specified row / 返回指定行的所有列值视图
- `public Map<R, V> column(C columnKey)` - Returns a view of all rows and values for the specified column / 返回指定列的所有行值视图
- `public Set<Cell<R, C, V>> cellSet()` - Returns a set view of all cells in the table / 返回表中所有单元格的集合视图
- `public Set<R> rowKeySet()` - Returns a set of all row keys / 返回所有行键的集合
- `public Set<C> columnKeySet()` - Returns a set of all column keys / 返回所有列键的集合
- `public Collection<V> values()` - Returns a collection of all values in the table / 返回表中所有值的集合
- `public Map<R, Map<C, V>> rowMap()` - Returns a map associating each row key with its column-to-value map / 返回行键到列值映射的映射
- `public Map<C, Map<R, V>> columnMap()` - Returns a map associating each column key with its row-to-value map / 返回列键到行值映射的映射
- `public int size()` - Returns the number of cells in the table / 返回表中的单元格数量
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the table is empty / 检查表是否为空
- `public void clear()` - Removes all cells from the table / 清空表中的所有单元格
- `public List<R> rowKeyList()` - Return all row keys in order. / 按顺序返回所有行键。
- `public List<C> columnKeyList()` - Return all column keys in order. / 按顺序返回所有列键。
- `public V at(int rowIndex, int columnIndex)` - Return the value at the given indices. / 返回给定索引处的值。
- `public V set(int rowIndex, int columnIndex, V value)` - Set the value at the given indices. / 设置给定索引处的值。
- `public V erase(int rowIndex, int columnIndex)` - Erase the value at the given indices. / 擦除给定索引处的值。
- `public V[][] toArray(V[][] array)` - Return the values as a 2D array. / 以二维数组形式返回值。
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - Checks equality with another table / 检查与另一个表是否相等
- `public int hashCode()` - Returns the hash code of the table / 返回表的哈希码
- `public String toString()` - Returns a string representation of the table / 返回表的字符串表示

### ClassToInstanceMap
`public interface ClassToInstanceMap<B>` - ClassToInstanceMap - Class to Instance Map Interface / ClassToInstanceMap - 类型到实例的映射接口。


### ConcurrentHashMultiset
`public final class ConcurrentHashMultiset<E>` - ConcurrentHashMultiset - Thread-safe Multiset Implementation / ConcurrentHashMultiset - 线程安全的多重集实现。

- `public static <E> ConcurrentHashMultiset<E> create()` - Create an empty ConcurrentHashMultiset. / 创建空 ConcurrentHashMultiset。
- `public static <E> ConcurrentHashMultiset<E> create(int initialCapacity)` - Create a ConcurrentHashMultiset with initial capacity. / 创建指定初始容量的 ConcurrentHashMultiset。
- `public static <E> ConcurrentHashMultiset<E> create(Iterable<? extends E> elements)` - Create a ConcurrentHashMultiset from elements. / 从元素创建 ConcurrentHashMultiset。
- `public int count(Object element)` - Returns the occurrence count of the element / 返回元素的出现次数
- `public int add(E element, int occurrences)` - Adds the specified number of occurrences of the element / 添加指定数量的元素出现次数
- `public int remove(Object element, int occurrences)` - Removes the specified number of occurrences of the element / 移除指定数量的元素出现次数
- `public int setCount(E element, int count)` - Sets the count of the element to the specified value / 设置元素的计数为指定值
- `public boolean setCount(E element, int oldCount, int newCount)` - Conditionally sets the count if old count matches / 如果旧计数匹配则条件性设置新计数
- `public Set<E> elementSet()` - Returns a set of distinct elements in the multiset / 返回多重集中不同元素的集合
- `public Set<Entry<E>> entrySet()` - Returns a set of element-count entries / 返回元素计数条目的集合
- `public int size()` - Returns the total number of element occurrences / 返回元素出现的总次数
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the multiset is empty / 检查多重集是否为空
- `public boolean contains(Object o)` - Checks if the multiset contains the element / 检查多重集是否包含指定元素
- `public boolean add(E element)` - Adds a single occurrence of the element / 添加元素的单次出现
- `public boolean remove(Object element)` - Removes a single occurrence of the element / 移除元素的单次出现
- `public Iterator<E> iterator()` - Returns an iterator over all element occurrences / 返回遍历所有元素出现的迭代器
- `public void clear()` - Removes all elements from the multiset / 清空多重集中的所有元素
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - Checks equality with another object / 检查与另一个对象是否相等
- `public int hashCode()` - Returns the hash code of the multiset / 返回多重集的哈希码
- `public String toString()` - Returns a string representation of the multiset / 返回多重集的字符串表示

### EvictingQueue
`public final class EvictingQueue<E>` - EvictingQueue - Fixed-size Queue with Automatic Eviction / EvictingQueue - 自动驱逐的固定大小队列。

- `public static <E> EvictingQueue<E> create(int maxSize)` - Create an EvictingQueue with the specified maximum size. / 创建具有指定最大容量的 EvictingQueue。
- `public static <E> EvictingQueue<E> create(int maxSize, Collection<? extends E> collection)` - Create an EvictingQueue from existing elements with specified maximum size. / 从现有元素创建指定最大容量的 EvictingQueue。
- `public static <E> Builder<E> builder(int maxSize)` - Create a builder for customized EvictingQueue. / 创建自定义 EvictingQueue 的构建器。
- `public boolean offer(E e)` - Adds element to queue. If at capacity, the oldest element is evicted. / 向队列添加元素。如果已满，则驱逐最旧元素。
- `public boolean add(E e)` - Adds element to queue. Always returns true. / 向队列添加元素。始终返回 true。
- `public E poll()` - Retrieves and removes the head element, or null if empty / 获取并移除队头元素，空时返回null
- `public E peek()` - Retrieves but does not remove the head element, or null if empty / 获取但不移除队头元素，空时返回null
- `public int size()` - Returns the number of elements in the queue / 返回队列中的元素数量
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the queue is empty / 检查队列是否为空
- `public void clear()` - Removes all elements from the queue / 清空队列中的所有元素
- `public Iterator<E> iterator()` - Returns an iterator over the elements / 返回遍历元素的迭代器
- `public boolean contains(Object o)` - Checks if the queue contains the element / 检查队列是否包含指定元素
- `public boolean remove(Object o)` - Removes the first occurrence of the element / 移除第一次出现的元素
- `public Object[] toArray()` - Converts the queue to an Object array / 将队列转换为Object数组
- `public <T> T[] toArray(T[] a)` - Converts the queue to a typed array / 将队列转换为类型化数组
- `public int maxSize()` - Returns the maximum size of this queue. / 返回此队列的最大容量。
- `public int remainingCapacity()` - Returns the remaining capacity of this queue. / 返回此队列的剩余容量。
- `public boolean isFull()` - Returns true if the queue is at maximum capacity. / 如果队列已达到最大容量，则返回 true。
- `public E peekLast()` - Returns the element at the tail of the queue (most recently added). / 返回队列尾部的元素（最近添加的）。
- `public List<E> toList()` - Returns a list containing all elements in FIFO order. / 返回包含所有元素的列表，按 FIFO 顺序排列。

### Interner
`public abstract class Interner<E>` - Interner - Object Interning (Pooling) Utility / Interner - 对象驻留（池化）工具

- `public abstract E intern(E sample);` - Returns a canonical instance for the given object. / 返回给定对象的规范实例。
- `public static <E> Interner<E> strong()` - Creates a strong interner that uses equals() for equivalence. / 创建使用 equals() 进行等价性判断的强引用驻留器。
- `public static <E> Interner<E> weak()` - Creates a weak interner that uses equals() for equivalence. / 创建使用 equals() 进行等价性判断的弱引用驻留器。
- `public static <E> Builder<E> newBuilder()` - Creates a new interner builder. / 创建新的驻留器构建器。
- `public Function<E, E> asFunction()` - Creates a function that interns its input using this interner. / 创建使用此驻留器驻留其输入的函数。

- `public static <E> LinkedHashMultiset<E> create(Iterable<? extends E> elements)` - Create a LinkedHashMultiset from elements. / 从元素创建 LinkedHashMultiset。
- `public int count(Object element)` - Returns the occurrence count of the element / 返回元素的出现次数
- `public int add(E element, int occurrences)` - Adds the specified number of occurrences of the element / 添加指定数量的元素出现次数
- `public int remove(Object element, int occurrences)` - Removes the specified number of occurrences of the element / 移除指定数量的元素出现次数
- `public int setCount(E element, int count)` - Sets the count of the element to the specified value / 设置元素的计数为指定值
- `public boolean setCount(E element, int oldCount, int newCount)` - Conditionally sets the count if old count matches / 如果旧计数匹配则条件性设置新计数
- `public Set<E> elementSet()` - Returns a set of distinct elements in the multiset / 返回多重集中不同元素的集合
- `public Set<Entry<E>> entrySet()` - Returns a set of element-count entries / 返回元素计数条目的集合
- `public int size()` - Returns the total number of element occurrences / 返回元素出现的总次数
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the multiset is empty / 检查多重集是否为空
- `public boolean contains(Object o)` - Checks if the multiset contains the element / 检查多重集是否包含指定元素
- `public Iterator<E> iterator()` - Returns an iterator over all element occurrences / 返回遍历所有元素出现的迭代器
- `public void clear()` - Removes all elements from the multiset / 清空多重集中的所有元素

### ListMultimap
`public interface ListMultimap<K, V>` - ListMultimap - List-based Multimap Interface / ListMultimap - 基于列表的多值映射接口


### MinMaxPriorityQueue
`public final class MinMaxPriorityQueue<E>` - MinMaxPriorityQueue - Double-ended Priority Queue / MinMaxPriorityQueue - 双端优先队列

- `public static <E extends Comparable<? super E>> MinMaxPriorityQueue<E> create()` - Create an unbounded MinMaxPriorityQueue using natural ordering. / 使用自然顺序创建无界MinMaxPriorityQueue。
- `public static <E extends Comparable<? super E>> MinMaxPriorityQueue<E> create(Collection<? extends E> collection)` - Create an unbounded MinMaxPriorityQueue from collection. / 从集合创建无界MinMaxPriorityQueue。
- `public static <E> Builder<E> builder()` - Create a builder for customized MinMaxPriorityQueue. / 创建自定义MinMaxPriorityQueue的构建器。
- `public static <E> Builder<E> orderedBy(Comparator<? super E> comparator)` - Create a builder with specified comparator. / 使用指定比较器创建构建器。
- `public static <E> Builder<E> maximumSize(int maximumSize)` - Create a bounded queue that keeps the smallest N elements. / 创建保留最小 N 个元素的有界队列。
- `public E peekFirst()` - Returns the smallest element without removing it. / 返回最小元素但不移除。
- `public E peekLast()` - Returns the largest element without removing it. / 返回最大元素但不移除。
- `public E pollFirst()` - Removes and returns the smallest element. / 移除并返回最小元素。
- `public E pollLast()` - Removes and returns the largest element. / 移除并返回最大元素。
- `public E removeFirst()` - Removes and returns the smallest element, throwing if empty. / 移除并返回最小元素，如果为空则抛出异常。
- `public E removeLast()` - Removes and returns the largest element, throwing if empty. / 移除并返回最大元素，如果为空则抛出异常。
- `public boolean offer(E e)` - Adds the element to the queue, evicting largest if at capacity / 向队列添加元素，达到容量时驱逐最大元素
- `public E poll()` - Retrieves and removes the smallest element, or null if empty / 获取并移除最小元素，空时返回null
- `public E peek()` - Retrieves but does not remove the smallest element, or null if empty / 获取但不移除最小元素，空时返回null
- `public int size()` - Returns the number of elements in the queue / 返回队列中的元素数量
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the queue is empty / 检查队列是否为空
- `public void clear()` - Removes all elements from the queue / 清空队列中的所有元素
- `public Iterator<E> iterator()` - Returns an iterator over the elements in the queue / 返回遍历队列元素的迭代器
- `public int maximumSize()` - Returns the maximum size of this queue, or Integer.MAX_VALUE if unbounded. / 返回此队列的最大容量，无界时返回Integer.MAX_VALUE。
- `public boolean isBounded()` - Returns true if this queue is bounded. / 如果此队列有界，则返回 true。

### MultimapBuilder
`public final class MultimapBuilder` - MultimapBuilder - Fluent Multimap Builder / MultimapBuilder - 流式多值映射构建器

- `public static KeyBuilder hashKeys()` - Use hash map for keys. / 使用哈希映射存储键。
- `public static KeyBuilder hashKeys(int expectedKeys)` - Use hash map for keys with expected size. / 使用指定预期大小的哈希映射存储键。
- `public static KeyBuilder linkedHashKeys()` - Use linked hash map for keys. / 使用链式哈希映射存储键。
- `public static KeyBuilder linkedHashKeys(int expectedKeys)` - Use linked hash map for keys with expected size. / 使用指定预期大小的链式哈希映射存储键。
- `public static KeyBuilder treeKeys()` - Use tree map for keys (natural ordering). / 使用树形映射存储键（自然排序）。
- `public static <K> KeyBuilder treeKeys(Comparator<? super K> comparator)` - Use tree map for keys with custom comparator. / 使用自定义比较器的树形映射存储键。

### MutableClassToInstanceMap
`public final class MutableClassToInstanceMap<B>` - MutableClassToInstanceMap - Mutable Class to Instance Map Implementation / MutableClassToInstanceMap - 可变的类型到实例映射实现。

- `public static <B> MutableClassToInstanceMap<B> create()` - Create a new MutableClassToInstanceMap backed by a HashMap. / 创建由HashMap支持的新MutableClassToInstanceMap。
- `public static <B> MutableClassToInstanceMap<B> create(Map<Class<? extends B>, B> backingMap)` - Create a new MutableClassToInstanceMap backed by the given map. / 创建由给定映射支持的新MutableClassToInstanceMap。
- `public <T extends B> T getInstance(Class<T> type)` - Gets the instance associated with the specified type / 获取与指定类型关联的实例
- `public <T extends B> T putInstance(Class<T> type, T value)` - Associates an instance with its type class / 将实例与其类型类关联
- `public int size()` - Returns the number of type-instance mappings / 返回类型实例映射的数量
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the map is empty / 检查映射是否为空
- `public boolean containsKey(Object key)` - Checks if the map contains the specified type / 检查映射是否包含指定类型
- `public boolean containsValue(Object value)` - Checks if the map contains the specified instance / 检查映射是否包含指定实例
- `public B get(Object key)` - Gets the instance for the specified type / 获取指定类型的实例
- `public B put(Class<? extends B> key, B value)` - Puts an instance for the specified type / 为指定类型放入实例
- `public B remove(Object key)` - Removes the instance for the specified type / 移除指定类型的实例
- `public void putAll(Map<? extends Class<? extends B>, ? extends B> m)` - Copies all mappings from another map / 从另一个映射复制所有条目
- `public void clear()` - Removes all type-instance mappings / 清空所有类型实例映射
- `public Set<Class<? extends B>> keySet()` - Returns a set of all type keys / 返回所有类型键的集合
- `public Collection<B> values()` - Returns a collection of all instances / 返回所有实例的集合
- `public Set<Entry<Class<? extends B>, B>> entrySet()` - Returns a set of all type-instance entries / 返回所有类型实例条目的集合
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - Checks equality with another object / 检查与另一个对象是否相等
- `public int hashCode()` - Returns the hash code of the map / 返回映射的哈希码
- `public String toString()` - Returns a string representation of the map / 返回映射的字符串表示

`public interface NavigableMultiset<E>` - NavigableMultiset - Navigable Multiset Interface / NavigableMultiset - 可导航多重集合接口


### RangeMap

### RangeSet

### SetMultimap

### SortedSetMultimap

### TreeBasedTable
`public final class TreeBasedTable<R, C, V>` - TreeBasedTable - Tree-based Table Implementation / TreeBasedTable - 基于树的表实现

- `public static <R, C, V> TreeBasedTable<R, C, V> create(` - Create an empty TreeBasedTable with custom comparators. / 创建自定义比较器的空TreeBasedTable。
- `public V get(Object rowKey, Object columnKey)` - Gets the value at the specified row and column / 获取指定行列位置的值
- `public boolean contains(Object rowKey, Object columnKey)` - Checks if the table contains a cell at the given row and column / 检查表中是否包含指定行列的单元格
- `public boolean containsRow(Object rowKey)` - Checks if the table contains the specified row / 检查表中是否包含指定行
- `public boolean containsColumn(Object columnKey)` - Checks if the table contains the specified column / 检查表中是否包含指定列
- `public boolean containsValue(Object value)` - Checks if the table contains the specified value / 检查表中是否包含指定值
- `public V put(R rowKey, C columnKey, V value)` - Puts a value at the specified row and column / 在指定行列位置放入值
- `public void putAll(Table<? extends R, ? extends C, ? extends V> table)` - Copies all cells from another table / 从另一个表复制所有单元格
- `public V remove(Object rowKey, Object columnKey)` - Removes the value at the specified row and column / 移除指定行列位置的值
- `public Map<C, V> row(R rowKey)` - Returns a sorted map view of all columns and values for the specified row / 返回指定行的所有列值排序映射视图
- `public Map<R, V> column(C columnKey)` - Returns a sorted map view of all rows and values for the specified column / 返回指定列的所有行值排序映射视图
- `public Set<Cell<R, C, V>> cellSet()` - Returns a set view of all cells in the table / 返回表中所有单元格的集合视图
- `public Set<R> rowKeySet()` - Returns a sorted set of all row keys / 返回所有行键的排序集合
- `public Set<C> columnKeySet()` - Returns a sorted set of all column keys / 返回所有列键的排序集合
- `public Collection<V> values()` - Returns a collection of all values in the table / 返回表中所有值的集合
- `public Map<R, Map<C, V>> rowMap()` - Returns a sorted map associating each row key with its column-to-value map / 返回行键到列值排序映射的排序映射
- `public Map<C, Map<R, V>> columnMap()` - Returns a sorted map associating each column key with its row-to-value map / 返回列键到行值排序映射的排序映射
- `public int size()` - Returns the number of cells in the table / 返回表中的单元格数量
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the table is empty / 检查表是否为空
- `public void clear()` - Removes all cells from the table / 清空表中的所有单元格
- `public Comparator<? super R> rowComparator()` - Return the row comparator. / 返回行比较器。
- `public Comparator<? super C> columnComparator()` - Return the column comparator. / 返回列比较器。
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - Checks equality with another table / 检查与另一个表是否相等
- `public int hashCode()` - Returns the hash code of the table / 返回表的哈希码
- `public String toString()` - Returns a string representation of the table / 返回表的字符串表示

### TreeMultiset
`public final class TreeMultiset<E>` - TreeMultiset - Tree-based Multiset Implementation / TreeMultiset - 基于树的多重集合实现

- `public static <E extends Comparable<? super E>> TreeMultiset<E> create()` - Create an empty TreeMultiset with natural ordering. / 创建自然排序的空 TreeMultiset。
- `public static <E> TreeMultiset<E> create(Comparator<? super E> comparator)` - Create an empty TreeMultiset with custom comparator. / 创建自定义比较器的空 TreeMultiset。
- `public static <E extends Comparable<? super E>> TreeMultiset<E> create(Iterable<? extends E> elements)` - Create a TreeMultiset from elements with natural ordering. / 从元素创建自然排序的TreeMultiset。
- `public int count(Object element)` - Returns the occurrence count of the element / 返回元素的出现次数
- `public int add(E element, int occurrences)` - Adds the specified number of occurrences of the element / 添加指定数量的元素出现次数
- `public int remove(Object element, int occurrences)` - Removes the specified number of occurrences of the element / 移除指定数量的元素出现次数
- `public int setCount(E element, int count)` - Sets the count of the element to the specified value / 设置元素的计数为指定值
- `public boolean setCount(E element, int oldCount, int newCount)` - Conditionally sets the count if old count matches / 如果旧计数匹配则条件性设置新计数
- `public NavigableSet<E> elementSet()` - Returns a navigable set of distinct elements / 返回不同元素的可导航集合
- `public Set<Entry<E>> entrySet()` - Returns a set of element-count entries / 返回元素计数条目的集合
- `public E first()` - Returns the smallest element in the multiset / 返回多重集中的最小元素
- `public E last()` - Returns the largest element in the multiset / 返回多重集中的最大元素
- `public E lower(E e)` - Returns the greatest element less than the given element / 返回小于给定元素的最大元素
- `public E higher(E e)` - Returns the smallest element greater than the given element / 返回大于给定元素的最小元素
- `public E floor(E e)` - Returns the greatest element less than or equal to the given element / 返回小于或等于给定元素的最大元素
- `public E ceiling(E e)` - Returns the smallest element greater than or equal to the given element / 返回大于或等于给定元素的最小元素
- `public Entry<E> pollFirstEntry()` - Removes and returns the entry for the smallest element / 移除并返回最小元素的条目
- `public Entry<E> pollLastEntry()` - Removes and returns the entry for the largest element / 移除并返回最大元素的条目
- `public Comparator<? super E> comparator()` - Returns the comparator used to order elements / 返回用于排序元素的比较器
- `public int size()` - Returns the total number of element occurrences / 返回元素出现的总次数
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the multiset is empty / 检查多重集是否为空
- `public boolean contains(Object o)` - Checks if the multiset contains the element / 检查多重集是否包含指定元素
- `public Iterator<E> iterator()` - Returns an iterator over all element occurrences / 返回遍历所有元素出现的迭代器
- `public void clear()` - Removes all elements from the multiset / 清空多重集中的所有元素

### TreeRangeMap
`public final class TreeRangeMap<K` - TreeRangeMap - Tree-based Range Map Implementation / TreeRangeMap - 基于树的范围映射实现

- `public static <K extends Comparable<? super K>, V> TreeRangeMap<K, V> create()` - Create an empty TreeRangeMap. / 创建空 TreeRangeMap。
- `public V get(K key)` - Gets the value associated with the key within any range / 获取包含指定键的范围关联的值
- `public Map.Entry<Range<K>, V> getEntry(K key)` - Gets the range-value entry containing the key / 获取包含指定键的范围值条目
- `public Range<K> span()` - Returns the minimal range enclosing all ranges in the map / 返回包含映射中所有范围的最小范围
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the map contains no ranges / 检查映射是否不包含任何范围
- `public Map<Range<K>, V> asMapOfRanges()` - Returns a view of this map as a map from ranges to values / 返回范围到值的映射视图
- `public Map<Range<K>, V> asDescendingMapOfRanges()` - Returns a descending view as a map from ranges to values / 返回范围到值的降序映射视图
- `public RangeMap<K, V> subRangeMap(Range<K> range)` - Returns a view of the portion within the specified range / 返回指定范围内的部分视图
- `public void put(Range<K> range, V value)` - Maps a range to a value, replacing any existing mappings / 将范围映射到值，替换现有映射
- `public void putCoalescing(Range<K> range, V value)` - Maps a range, coalescing with adjacent ranges of same value / 映射范围，与相邻同值范围合并
- `public void putAll(RangeMap<K, ? extends V> rangeMap)` - Copies all mappings from another range map / 从另一个范围映射复制所有映射
- `public void remove(Range<K> range)` - Removes all associations within the specified range / 移除指定范围内的所有关联
- `public void clear()` - Removes all mappings from the map / 清空映射中的所有映射
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - Checks equality with another range map / 检查与另一个范围映射是否相等
- `public int hashCode()` - Returns the hash code of the range map / 返回范围映射的哈希码
- `public String toString()` - Returns a string representation of the range map / 返回范围映射的字符串表示

### TreeRangeSet
`public final class TreeRangeSet<C` - TreeRangeSet - Tree-based Range Set Implementation / TreeRangeSet - 基于树的范围集合实现

- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> TreeRangeSet<C> create()` - Create an empty TreeRangeSet. / 创建空 TreeRangeSet。
- `public static <C extends Comparable<? super C>> TreeRangeSet<C> create(Iterable<Range<C>> ranges)` - Create a TreeRangeSet with the given ranges. / 使用给定范围创建 TreeRangeSet。
- `public boolean contains(C value)` - Checks if any range contains the value / 检查是否有任何范围包含该值
- `public Range<C> rangeContaining(C value)` - Returns the range containing the value, or null / 返回包含该值的范围，或返回null
- `public boolean encloses(Range<C> otherRange)` - Checks if any range encloses the given range / 检查是否有任何范围包含给定范围
- `public boolean enclosesAll(RangeSet<C> other)` - Checks if this set encloses all ranges of another set / 检查是否包含另一个集合的所有范围
- `public boolean intersects(Range<C> otherRange)` - Checks if any range intersects the given range / 检查是否有任何范围与给定范围相交
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the set contains no ranges / 检查集合是否不包含任何范围
- `public Set<Range<C>> asRanges()` - Returns a view of this set as a set of ranges / 返回范围集合的视图
- `public Set<Range<C>> asDescendingSetOfRanges()` - Returns a descending view of ranges / 返回范围的降序视图
- `public RangeSet<C> complement()` - Returns the complement of this range set / 返回此范围集合的补集
- `public RangeSet<C> subRangeSet(Range<C> view)` - Returns a view of the intersection with the specified range / 返回与指定范围的交集视图
- `public Range<C> span()` - Returns the minimal range enclosing all ranges / 返回包含所有范围的最小范围
- `public void add(Range<C> range)` - Adds a range to this set / 向此集合添加范围
- `public void remove(Range<C> range)` - Removes a range from this set / 从此集合移除范围
- `public void addAll(RangeSet<C> other)` - Adds all ranges from another set / 添加另一个集合的所有范围
- `public void removeAll(RangeSet<C> other)` - Removes all ranges from another set / 移除另一个集合的所有范围
- `public void clear()` - Removes all ranges from the set / 清空集合中的所有范围
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - Checks equality with another range set / 检查与另一个范围集合是否相等
- `public int hashCode()` - Returns the hash code of the range set / 返回范围集合的哈希码
- `public String toString()` - Returns a string representation of the range set / 返回范围集合的字符串表示

### TreeSetMultimap
`public class TreeSetMultimap<K, V>` - TreeSetMultimap - SortedSetMultimap Implementation using TreeSet / TreeSetMultimap - 使用 TreeSet 的 SortedSetMultimap 实现。

- `public static <K, V extends Comparable<? super V>> TreeSetMultimap<K, V> create()` - Create an empty TreeSetMultimap with natural ordering for values. / 创建具有值自然排序的空TreeSetMultimap。
- `public static <K, V> TreeSetMultimap<K, V> create(Comparator<? super V> valueComparator)` - Create an empty TreeSetMultimap with a custom value comparator. / 创建具有自定义值比较器的空TreeSetMultimap。
- `public static <K, V> TreeSetMultimap<K, V> create(Comparator<? super K> keyComparator,` - Create an empty TreeSetMultimap with sorted keys and values. / 创建具有排序键和值的空TreeSetMultimap。
- `public static <K, V extends Comparable<? super V>> TreeSetMultimap<K, V> create(` - Create a TreeSetMultimap from an existing multimap. / 从现有多重映射创建 TreeSetMultimap。
- `public static <K, V> TreeSetMultimap<K, V> create(Multimap<? extends K, ? extends V> multimap,` - Create a TreeSetMultimap from an existing multimap with custom comparator. / 从现有多重映射使用自定义比较器创建TreeSetMultimap。
- `public SortedSet<V> get(K key)` - Returns a sorted set view of values for the specified key / 返回指定键的排序值集合视图
- `public SortedSet<V> removeAll(Object key)` - Removes and returns all values for the specified key / 移除并返回指定键的所有值
- `public SortedSet<V> replaceValues(K key, Iterable<? extends V> values)` - Replaces all values for a key with new values / 用新值替换键的所有值
- `public Set<Map.Entry<K, V>> entries()` - Returns a set view of all key-value entries / 返回所有键值条目的集合视图
- `public Comparator<? super V> valueComparator()` - Returns the comparator used for ordering values / 返回用于排序值的比较器
- `public Map<K, Collection<V>> asMap()` - Returns a map view of the multimap / 返回多重映射的映射视图
- `public Map<K, SortedSet<V>> asMapOfSortedSets()` - Returns a view of this multimap as a map from keys to sorted sets of values. / 返回从键到排序值集合的映射视图。
- `public Optional<V> first(K key)` - Returns the first (lowest) value for the given key. / 返回给定键的第一个（最小）值。
- `public Optional<V> last(K key)` - Returns the last (highest) value for the given key. / 返回给定键的最后一个（最大）值。
- `public SortedSet<V> headSet(K key, V toValue)` - Returns a view of values strictly less than the given value. / 返回严格小于给定值的值视图。
- `public SortedSet<V> tailSet(K key, V fromValue)` - Returns a view of values greater than or equal to the given value. / 返回大于或等于给定值的值视图。
- `public SortedSet<V> subSet(K key, V fromValue, V toValue)` - Returns a view of values in the given range. / 返回给定范围内的值视图。

### CollectorUtil
`public final class CollectorUtil` - CollectorUtil - Custom Collector Utilities / CollectorUtil - 自定义收集器工具

- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, ArrayList<T>> toArrayList()` - Collector to ArrayList. / 收集到 ArrayList。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, ArrayList<T>> toArrayList(int capacity)` - Collector to ArrayList with initial capacity. / 收集到带初始容量的 ArrayList。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, LinkedList<T>> toLinkedList()` - Collector to LinkedList. / 收集到 LinkedList。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, List<T>> toUnmodifiableList()` - Collector to unmodifiable list. / 收集到不可修改列表。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, HashSet<T>> toHashSet()` - Collector to HashSet. / 收集到 HashSet。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, LinkedHashSet<T>> toLinkedHashSet()` - Collector to LinkedHashSet. / 收集到 LinkedHashSet。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<? super T>> Collector<T, ?, TreeSet<T>> toTreeSet()` - Collector to TreeSet with natural ordering. / 收集到自然排序的 TreeSet。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, TreeSet<T>> toTreeSet(Comparator<? super T> comparator)` - Collector to TreeSet with custom comparator. / 收集到自定义比较器的 TreeSet。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Set<T>> toUnmodifiableSet()` - Collector to unmodifiable set. / 收集到不可修改集合。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, LinkedHashMap<K, V>> toLinkedHashMap(` - Collector to LinkedHashMap. / 收集到 LinkedHashMap。
- `public static <T, K extends Comparable<? super K>, V> Collector<T, ?, TreeMap<K, V>> toTreeMap(` - Collector to TreeMap with natural ordering. / 收集到自然排序的 TreeMap。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, TreeMap<K, V>> toTreeMap(` - Collector to TreeMap with custom comparator. / 收集到自定义比较器的 TreeMap。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, Map<K, V>> toUnmodifiableMap(` - Collector to unmodifiable map. / 收集到不可修改映射。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Long> counting()` - Collector to count elements. / 收集以计数元素。
- `public static Collector<CharSequence, ?, String> joining(CharSequence delimiter)` - Collector to join strings. / 收集以连接字符串。
- `public static Collector<CharSequence, ?, String> joining(` - Collector to join strings with prefix and suffix. / 收集以连接带前缀和后缀的字符串。
- `public static <T, A, R> Collector<T, A, R> of(` - Create a custom collector. / 创建自定义收集器。
- `public static <T, R> Collector<T, R, R> of(` - Create a custom collector without finisher. / 创建不带完成器的自定义收集器。

### GroupingUtil
`public final class GroupingUtil` - GroupingUtil - Collection Grouping Utilities / GroupingUtil - 集合分组工具

- `public static <T, K> Map<K, List<T>> groupBy(Iterable<T> items, Function<? super T, ? extends K> keyFunction)` - Group items by a key function. / 按键函数分组项目。
- `public static <T, K, V> Map<K, List<V>> groupBy(Iterable<T> items,` - Group items by a key function with value transformation. / 按键函数分组项目并转换值。
- `public static <T, K1, K2> Map<K1, Map<K2, List<T>>> groupByNested(` - Group items by two levels of keys. / 按两级键分组项目。
- `public static <T, K> Map<K, T> indexBy(Iterable<T> items, Function<? super T, ? extends K> keyFunction)` - Index items by a unique key. / 按唯一键索引项目。
- `public static <T, K> Map<K, T> indexByFirst(Iterable<T> items, Function<? super T, ? extends K> keyFunction)` - Index items by a key, keeping the first value for duplicates. / 按键索引项目，重复时保留第一个值。
- `public static <T, K> Map<K, T> indexByLast(Iterable<T> items, Function<? super T, ? extends K> keyFunction)` - Index items by a key, keeping the last value for duplicates. / 按键索引项目，重复时保留最后一个值。
- `public static <T, K> Map<K, Long> countBy(Iterable<T> items, Function<? super T, ? extends K> keyFunction)` - Count items by key. / 按键计数项目。
- `public static <T> long count(Iterable<T> items, Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Count items matching predicate. / 计数匹配谓词的项目。
- `public static <T> Map<T, Long> frequency(Iterable<T> items)` - Get frequency map of elements. / 获取元素的频率映射。
- `public static <T> T mostFrequent(Iterable<T> items)` - Get most frequent element. / 获取最频繁的元素。
- `public static <T> T leastFrequent(Iterable<T> items)` - Get least frequent element. / 获取最不频繁的元素。
- `public static <T, K> Map<K, Set<T>> groupByToSet(Iterable<T> items, Function<? super T, ? extends K> keyFunction)` - Group items into sets by key. / 按键将项目分组为集合。
- `public static <T, K extends Comparable<? super K>> Map<K, List<T>> groupBySorted(` - Group items by key with sorted keys. / 按键分组项目并排序键。
- `public static <T, K> Map<K, List<T>> groupBySorted(` - Group items by key with custom sorted keys. / 按键分组项目并使用自定义排序。

### MoreCollectorUtil
`public final class MoreCollectorUtil` - MoreCollectorUtil - Additional Collector Utilities / MoreCollectorUtil - 附加收集器工具

- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Optional<T>> first()` - Collector to get the first element. / 收集以获取第一个元素。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Optional<T>> last()` - Collector to get the last element. / 收集以获取最后一个元素。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, T> onlyElement()` - Collector to get only element (throws if not exactly one). / 收集以获取唯一元素（如果不是恰好一个则抛出异常）。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Optional<T>> elementAt(int index)` - Collector to get element at index. / 收集以获取指定索引的元素。
- `public static <T, U extends Comparable<? super U>> Collector<T, ?, Optional<T>> minBy(` - Collector to get minimum by key. / 收集以按键获取最小值。
- `public static <T, U extends Comparable<? super U>> Collector<T, ?, Optional<T>> maxBy(` - Collector to get maximum by key. / 收集以按键获取最大值。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, MinMax<T>> minMax(Comparator<? super T> comparator)` - Collector to get min and max. / 收集以获取最小值和最大值。
- `public record MinMax<T>(T min, T max)` - MinMax result container. / MinMax 结果容器。
- `public static <T, K> Collector<T, ?, Map<K, List<T>>> toMultimap(` - Collector to multimap (key to list of values). / 收集到多值映射（键到值列表）。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, Map<K, List<V>>> toMultimap(` - Collector to multimap with value transformation. / 收集到带值转换的多值映射。
- `public static <T, K> Collector<T, ?, Map<K, Set<T>>> toMultimapSet(` - Collector to multimap with set values. / 收集到带集合值的多值映射。
- `public static <T, A, R> Collector<T, ?, R> filtering(` - Collector that filters before collecting. / 在收集前过滤的收集器。
- `public static <T, U, A, R> Collector<T, ?, R> mapping(` - Collector that transforms before collecting. / 在收集前转换的收集器。
- `public static <T, A, R, RR> Collector<T, A, RR> collectingAndThen(` - Collector that transforms the result. / 转换结果的收集器。
- `public static <T, R> Collector<T, ?, R> fold(R identity, BiFunction<R, ? super T, R> folder)` - Collector to fold elements. / 折叠元素的收集器。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, T> reducing(T identity, BinaryOperator<T> reducer)` - Collector to reduce with identity. / 带恒等值的归约收集器。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Long> distinctCount()` - Collector to get distinct count. / 获取不同计数的收集器。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Boolean> allMatch(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Collector to check if all match predicate. / 检查是否所有元素都匹配谓词的收集器。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Boolean> anyMatch(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Collector to check if any match predicate. / 检查是否有元素匹配谓词的收集器。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Boolean> noneMatch(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Collector to check if none match predicate. / 检查是否没有元素匹配谓词的收集器。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Optional<T>> toOptional()` - Collector to Optional (returns empty if empty, value if single, throws if multiple). / 收集到Optional（空时返回空，单个时返回值，多个时抛出异常）。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableList<T>> toImmutableList()` - Collector to ImmutableList. / 收集到 ImmutableList。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableSet<T>> toImmutableSet()` - Collector to ImmutableSet. / 收集到 ImmutableSet。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<? super T>> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableSortedSet<T>> toImmutableSortedSet()` - Collector to ImmutableSortedSet using natural ordering. / 使用自然排序收集到ImmutableSortedSet。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableSortedSet<T>> toImmutableSortedSet(Comparator<? super T> comparator)` - Collector to ImmutableSortedSet. / 收集到 ImmutableSortedSet。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableMap<K, V>> toImmutableMap(` - Collector to ImmutableMap. / 收集到 ImmutableMap。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableMap<K, V>> toImmutableMap(` - Collector to ImmutableMap with merge function. / 收集到带合并函数的 ImmutableMap。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableBiMap<K, V>> toImmutableBiMap(` - Collector to ImmutableBiMap. / 收集到 ImmutableBiMap。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableMultiset<T>> toImmutableMultiset()` - Collector to ImmutableMultiset. / 收集到 ImmutableMultiset。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableListMultimap<K, V>> toImmutableListMultimap(` - Collector to ImmutableListMultimap. / 收集到 ImmutableListMultimap。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableSetMultimap<K, V>> toImmutableSetMultimap(` - Collector to ImmutableSetMultimap. / 收集到 ImmutableSetMultimap。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableListMultimap<K, V>> flatteningToImmutableListMultimap(` - Collector to ImmutableListMultimap with flattening. / 收集到带扁平化的ImmutableListMultimap。
- `public static <T, K, V> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableSetMultimap<K, V>> flatteningToImmutableSetMultimap(` - Collector to ImmutableSetMultimap with flattening. / 收集到带扁平化的ImmutableSetMultimap。
- `public static <T, R, C, V> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableTable<R, C, V>> toImmutableTable(` - Collector to ImmutableTable. / 收集到 ImmutableTable。
- `public static <T, R, C, V> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableTable<R, C, V>> toImmutableTable(` - Collector to ImmutableTable with merge function. / 收集到带合并函数的 ImmutableTable。
- `public static <T, K> Collector<T, ?, ImmutableMap<K, T>> indexing(Function<? super T, ? extends K> keyMapper)` - Collector to create unique index map. / 收集到唯一索引映射。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, List<T>> minK(int k, Comparator<? super T> comparator)` - Collector to get the minimum k elements. / 收集以获取最小的 k 个元素。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, List<T>> maxK(int k, Comparator<? super T> comparator)` - Collector to get the maximum k elements. / 收集以获取最大的 k 个元素。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, List<List<T>>> partitionBySize(int size)` - Collector to partition by size. / 按大小分区的收集器。
- `public static <T> Collector<T, ?, Map<Boolean, List<T>>> partitioningBy(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Collector to partition by predicate. / 按谓词分区的收集器。

### PartitionUtil
`public final class PartitionUtil` - PartitionUtil - Collection Partitioning Utilities / PartitionUtil - 集合分区工具

- `public static <T> Map<Boolean, List<T>> partition(Collection<T> items, Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Partition a collection by a predicate. / 按谓词分区集合。
- `public static <T> List<List<T>> partitionBy(Collection<T> items, Predicate<? super T>... predicates)` - Partition a collection by multiple predicates. / 按多个谓词分区集合。
- `public static <T> List<List<T>> partitionBySize(List<T> list, int size)` - Partition a list into chunks of specified size. / 将列表分区为指定大小的块。
- `public static <T> List<List<T>> partitionBySize(Iterable<T> iterable, int size)` - Partition an iterable into chunks of specified size. / 将可迭代对象分区为指定大小的块。
- `public static <T> List<List<T>> partitionIntoN(List<T> list, int n)` - Partition a list into n approximately equal parts. / 将列表分区为 n 个大致相等的部分。
- `public static <T> List<List<T>> slidingWindow(List<T> list, int windowSize)` - Create sliding windows over a list. / 在列表上创建滑动窗口。
- `public static <T> List<List<T>> slidingWindow(List<T> list, int windowSize, int step)` - Create sliding windows over a list with specified step. / 在列表上创建指定步长的滑动窗口。
- `public static <T> Map<String, Object> headTail(List<T> list)` - Partition into head and tail. / 分区为头部和尾部。
- `public static <T> Map<String, Object> initLast(List<T> list)` - Partition into init and last. / 分区为初始部分和最后元素。
- `public static <T> List<List<T>> splitAt(List<T> list, int index)` - Split at specified index. / 在指定索引处分割。
- `public static <T> List<T> takeWhile(List<T> list, Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Take while predicate is true. / 在谓词为真时获取。
- `public static <T> List<T> dropWhile(List<T> list, Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Drop while predicate is true. / 在谓词为真时丢弃。
- `public static <T> List<List<T>> span(List<T> list, Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Span - partition into takeWhile and dropWhile. / Span - 分区为 takeWhile 和 dropWhile。

### SkipList
`public final class SkipList<K, V>` - SkipList - Skip List Implementation / SkipList - 跳表实现

- `public static <K extends Comparable<? super K>, V> SkipList<K, V> create()` - Create an empty SkipList with natural ordering. / 创建自然排序的空 SkipList。
- `public static <K, V> SkipList<K, V> create(Comparator<? super K> comparator)` - Create an empty SkipList with custom comparator. / 创建自定义比较器的空 SkipList。
- `public V put(K key, V value)` - Put a key-value pair. / 放入键值对。
- `public V get(K key)` - Get the value for a key. / 获取键对应的值。
- `public boolean containsKey(K key)` - Check if the key exists. / 检查键是否存在。
- `public V remove(K key)` - Remove a key. / 移除键。
- `public int size()` - Return the size of this skip list. / 返回此跳表的大小。
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Check if this skip list is empty. / 检查此跳表是否为空。
- `public void clear()` - Clear this skip list. / 清空此跳表。
- `public K firstKey()` - Get the first (smallest) key. / 获取第一个（最小）键。
- `public K lastKey()` - Get the last (largest) key. / 获取最后一个（最大）键。
- `public Iterator<Entry<K, V>> iterator()` - Returns an iterator over the entries / 返回遍历条目的迭代器

### TreeTraversalUtil
`public final class TreeTraversalUtil` - TreeTraversalUtil - Tree Traversal Utilities / TreeTraversalUtil - 树遍历工具

- `public static <T> void preOrder(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter, Consumer<T> action)` - Perform pre-order traversal. / 执行前序遍历。
- `public static <T> void preOrderIterative(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter, Consumer<T> action)` - Perform pre-order traversal iteratively (non-recursive). / 执行迭代式（非递归）前序遍历。
- `public static <T> List<T> collectPreOrder(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter)` - Collect all nodes in pre-order. / 按前序收集所有节点。
- `public static <T> void postOrder(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter, Consumer<T> action)` - Perform post-order traversal. / 执行后序遍历。
- `public static <T> List<T> collectPostOrder(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter)` - Collect all nodes in post-order. / 按后序收集所有节点。
- `public static <T> void levelOrder(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter, Consumer<T> action)` - Perform level-order (BFS) traversal. / 执行层序（广度优先）遍历。
- `public static <T> List<T> collectLevelOrder(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter)` - Collect all nodes in level-order. / 按层序收集所有节点。
- `public static <T> List<List<T>> collectByLevel(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter)` - Collect nodes by level. / 按层收集节点。
- `public static <T> int depth(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter)` - Calculate the depth (height) of the tree. / 计算树的深度（高度）。
- `public static <T> int count(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter)` - Count the total number of nodes. / 计算节点总数。
- `public static <T> T find(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter, java.util.function.Predicate<T> predicate)` - Find a node by predicate. / 根据谓词查找节点。
- `public static <T> List<T> findAll(T root, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter, java.util.function.Predicate<T> predicate)` - Find all nodes matching predicate. / 查找所有匹配谓词的节点。
- `public static <T> List<T> pathTo(T root, T target, Function<T, ? extends Iterable<T>> childrenGetter)` - Get the path from root to a node. / 获取从根到节点的路径。

### Trie
`public final class Trie<V>` - Trie - Prefix Tree Implementation / Trie - 前缀树实现

- `public static <V> Trie<V> create()` - Create an empty Trie. / 创建空 Trie。
- `public V put(String key, V value)` - Put a key-value pair. / 放入键值对。
- `public V get(String key)` - Get the value for a key. / 获取键对应的值。
- `public boolean containsKey(String key)` - Check if the key exists. / 检查键是否存在。
- `public V remove(String key)` - Remove a key. / 移除键。
- `public boolean hasPrefix(String prefix)` - Check if any key starts with the prefix. / 检查是否有键以该前缀开头。
- `public List<String> keysWithPrefix(String prefix)` - Get all keys with the prefix. / 获取所有具有该前缀的键。
- `public List<String> keys()` - Get all keys. / 获取所有键。
- `public String longestPrefixOf(String input)` - Get the longest prefix of the input that is in the trie. / 获取输入中在字典树中的最长前缀。
- `public int size()` - Return the size of this trie. / 返回此字典树的大小。
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Check if this trie is empty. / 检查此字典树是否为空。
- `public void clear()` - Clear this trie. / 清空此字典树。

---

## 4. opencode-base-io

文件和IO工具，提供文件读写、路径操作、流处理、资源加载、MIME检测、校验和

### OpenFileVisitors
`public final class OpenFileVisitors` - File Visitors Utility Class / 文件访问器工具类

- `public static FileVisitor<Path> deleteVisitor()` - Creates a delete visitor that removes all files and directories / 创建删除所有文件和目录的删除访问器
- `public static FileVisitor<Path> copyVisitor(Path source, Path target, CopyOption... options)` - Creates a copy visitor that copies files and directories / 创建复制文件和目录的复制访问器
- `public static FileVisitor<Path> actionVisitor(Consumer<Path> action)` - Creates an action visitor that performs an action on each file / 创建对每个文件执行操作的操作访问器
- `public static FileVisitor<Path> filteredVisitor(BiPredicate<Path, BasicFileAttributes> filter, Consumer<Path> action)` - Creates a filtered action visitor / 创建带过滤器的操作访问器
- `public static CountingVisitor countingVisitor()` - Creates a counting visitor that counts files and directories / 创建统计文件和目录的计数访问器
- `public static SizeVisitor sizeVisitor()` - Creates a size calculating visitor / 创建计算大小的访问器

### OpenIO
`public final class OpenIO` - File and Directory Operations Utility Class / 文件和目录操作工具类

- `public static byte[] readBytes(Path path)` - Reads file as byte array / 读取文件为字节数组
- `public static String readString(Path path, Charset charset)` - Reads file as string / 读取文件为字符串
- `public static String readString(Path path)` - Reads file as UTF-8 string / 读取文件为UTF-8字符串
- `public static List<String> readLines(Path path, Charset charset)` - Reads file as list of lines / 读取文件为行列表
- `public static List<String> readLines(Path path)` - Reads file as list of lines (UTF-8) / 读取文件为行列表（UTF-8）
- `public static Stream<String> lines(Path path, Charset charset)` - Returns a stream of lines from file / 返回文件的行流
- `public static Stream<String> lines(Path path)` - Returns a stream of lines from file (UTF-8) / 返回文件的行流（UTF-8）
- `public static String readFirstLine(Path path)` - Reads the first line of file / 读取文件首行
- `public static void writeBytes(Path path, byte[] bytes, OpenOption... options)` - Writes byte array to file / 写入字节数组到文件
- `public static void writeString(Path path, CharSequence content, Charset charset, OpenOption... options)` - Writes string to file / 写入字符串到文件
- `public static void writeString(Path path, CharSequence content, OpenOption... options)` - Writes string to file (UTF-8) / 写入字符串到文件（UTF-8）
- `public static void writeLines(Path path, Iterable<? extends CharSequence> lines, Charset charset, OpenOption... options)` - Writes lines to file / 写入行到文件
- `public static void writeLines(Path path, Iterable<? extends CharSequence> lines, OpenOption... options)` - Writes lines to file (UTF-8) / 写入行到文件（UTF-8）
- `public static void append(Path path, CharSequence content)` - Appends content to file / 追加内容到文件
- `public static void appendLines(Path path, Iterable<? extends CharSequence> lines)` - Appends lines to file / 追加行到文件
- `public static boolean exists(Path path, LinkOption... options)` - Checks if path exists / 检查路径是否存在
- `public static boolean isFile(Path path)` - Checks if path is a file / 检查路径是否为文件
- `public static boolean isDirectory(Path path)` - Checks if path is a directory / 检查路径是否为目录
- `public static boolean isEmptyDirectory(Path path)` - Checks if directory is empty / 检查目录是否为空
- `public static boolean isSymbolicLink(Path path)` - Checks if path is a symbolic link / 检查路径是否为符号链接
- `public static boolean isHidden(Path path)` - Checks if path is hidden / 检查路径是否隐藏
- `public static boolean isReadable(Path path)` - Checks if path is readable / 检查路径是否可读
- `public static boolean isWritable(Path path)` - Checks if path is writable / 检查路径是否可写
- `public static boolean isSameFile(Path path1, Path path2)` - Checks if two paths point to the same file / 检查两个路径是否指向同一文件
- `public static Path createFile(Path path)` - Creates a file / 创建文件
- `public static Path createDirectory(Path path)` - Creates a directory / 创建目录
- `public static Path createDirectories(Path path)` - Creates directories including parents / 创建目录（包含父目录）
- `public static void delete(Path path)` - Deletes a file or empty directory / 删除文件或空目录
- `public static boolean deleteIfExists(Path path)` - Deletes file if exists / 删除文件（如果存在）
- `public static void deleteRecursively(Path path)` - Deletes directory recursively / 递归删除目录
- `public static Path copy(Path source, Path target, CopyOption... options)` - Copies a file / 复制文件
- `public static void copyRecursively(Path source, Path target, CopyOption... options)` - Copies directory recursively / 递归复制目录
- `public static Path move(Path source, Path target, CopyOption... options)` - Moves a file / 移动文件
- `public static long size(Path path)` - Gets file size / 获取文件大小
- `public static long directorySize(Path path)` - Gets directory size recursively / 递归获取目录大小
- `public static Instant getLastModifiedTime(Path path)` - Gets last modified time / 获取最后修改时间
- `public static void setLastModifiedTime(Path path, Instant time)` - Sets last modified time / 设置最后修改时间
- `public static Stream<Path> list(Path dir)` - Lists directory contents / 列出目录内容
- `public static Stream<Path> walk(Path start, int maxDepth)` - Walks directory tree / 遍历目录树
- `public static Stream<Path> walk(Path start)` - Walks directory tree with unlimited depth / 遍历目录树（无深度限制）
- `public static Stream<Path> glob(Path start, String pattern)` - Finds files matching glob pattern / 查找匹配glob模式的文件
- `public static Stream<Path> find(Path start, String regex)` - Finds files matching regex pattern / 查找匹配正则表达式的文件
- `public static Stream<Path> find(Path start, int maxDepth, java.util.function.BiPredicate<Path, BasicFileAttributes> matcher)` - Finds files with custom matcher / 使用自定义匹配器查找文件

### OpenMimeType

- `public static Optional<String> fromContent(byte[] data)` - Detect MIME type from byte array content / 从字节数组内容检测 MIME 类型
- `public static Optional<String> fromContent(InputStream input)` - Detect MIME type from input stream / 从输入流检测 MIME 类型

- `public static boolean isImage(String mimeType)` - Check if MIME type is image / 检查 MIME 类型是否为图片

- `public static boolean isVideo(String mimeType)` - Check if MIME type is video / 检查 MIME 类型是否为视频
- `public static boolean isBinary(String mimeType)` - Check if MIME type is binary / 检查 MIME 类型是否为二进制
- `public static Optional<String> getExtension(String mimeType)` - Get file extension for MIME type / 获取 MIME 类型对应的文件扩展名

- `public static String getExtension(Path path)` - Gets the file extension / 获取文件扩展名

- `public static Path relativize(Path base, Path target)` - Gets relative path / 获取相对路径
- `public static Path resolve(Path base, String other)` - Resolves path / 解析路径
- `public static Path getParent(Path path)` - Gets parent directory / 获取父目录
- `public static Path getRoot(Path path)` - Gets root path / 获取根路径
- `public static boolean isAbsolute(Path path)` - Checks if path is absolute / 检查是否为绝对路径
- `public static Path toAbsolute(Path path)` - Converts to absolute path / 转换为绝对路径
- `public static Path toRealPath(Path path)` - Gets real path (resolves symbolic links) / 获取真实路径（解析符号链接）
- `public static boolean isSubPath(Path parent, Path child)` - Checks if child is a sub path of parent / 检查子路径是否为父路径的子路径
- `public static Path uniqueFile(Path dir, String baseName, String extension)` - Generates a unique filename in directory / 在目录中生成唯一文件名
- `public static String getFileName(Path path)` - Gets file name from path / 从路径获取文件名
- `public static boolean isSameFile(Path path1, Path path2)` - Checks if two paths point to the same file / 检查两个路径是否指向同一文件
- `public static int getNameCount(Path path)` - Gets path name count / 获取路径名称数量
- `public static Path join(String first, String... more)` - Joins multiple path segments / 连接多个路径段
- `public static Path join(Path base, String... more)` - Joins path with more segments / 连接路径与更多段

- `public static long copy(InputStream input, OutputStream output)` - Copies input stream to output stream / 复制输入流到输出流
- `public static long copy(InputStream input, OutputStream output, int bufferSize)` - Copies input stream to output stream with buffer size / 使用指定缓冲区大小复制输入流到输出流
- `public static long copy(Reader reader, Writer writer)` - Copies Reader to Writer / 复制Reader到Writer
- `public static long copyToFile(InputStream input, Path file)` - Copies input stream to file / 复制输入流到文件
- `public static byte[] toByteArray(InputStream input)` - Reads input stream as byte array / 读取输入流为字节数组

- `public static String toString(InputStream input, Charset charset)` - Reads input stream as string / 读取输入流为字符串
- `public static String toString(InputStream input)` - Reads input stream as UTF-8 string / 读取输入流为UTF-8字符串
- `public static String toString(Reader reader)` - Reads reader as string / 读取Reader为字符串
- `public static void write(byte[] data, OutputStream output)` - Writes byte array to output stream / 写入字节数组到输出流
- `public static void write(String data, OutputStream output, Charset charset)` - Writes string to output stream / 写入字符串到输出流
- `public static void write(String data, Writer writer)` - Writes string to writer / 写入字符串到Writer
- `public static void closeQuietly(Closeable closeable)` - Closes safely, ignoring exceptions / 安全关闭，忽略异常
- `public static void closeQuietly(Closeable... closeables)` - Closes multiple closeables safely / 安全关闭多个可关闭对象
- `public static BufferedInputStream buffer(InputStream input)` - Wraps as buffered input stream / 包装为缓冲输入流
- `public static BufferedOutputStream buffer(OutputStream output)` - Wraps as buffered output stream / 包装为缓冲输出流
- `public static Reader toReader(InputStream input, Charset charset)` - Converts input stream to reader / 将输入流转换为Reader
- `public static Writer toWriter(OutputStream output, Charset charset)` - Converts output stream to writer / 将输出流转换为Writer
- `public static InputStream toInputStream(String data, Charset charset)` - Converts string to input stream / 将字符串转换为输入流
- `public static InputStream toInputStream(byte[] data)` - Converts byte array to input stream / 将字节数组转换为输入流
- `public static long skip(InputStream input, long skip)` - Skips bytes from input stream / 从输入流跳过字节
- `public static long drain(InputStream input)` - Drains all remaining bytes from input stream / 排空输入流中的所有剩余字节
- `public static boolean contentEquals(InputStream input1, InputStream input2)` - Compares two input streams for content equality / 比较两个输入流的内容是否相同
- `public static boolean contentEquals(Reader reader1, Reader reader2)` - Compares two readers for content equality / 比较两个Reader的内容是否相同

### BatchResult

- `public boolean hasFailures()` - Check if any operation failed / 检查是否有失败
- `public boolean isPartialSuccess()` - Check if operation was partially successful / 检查是否部分成功

- `public double successRate()` - Get success rate / 获取成功率

- `public Optional<Throwable> getFailure(Path path)` - Get exception for a specific path / 获取特定路径的异常
- `public String summary()` - Get summary string / 获取摘要字符串
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string
- `public static Builder builder(String operation)` - Create a builder / 创建构建器

- `public static BatchResult deleteGlob(Path dir, String pattern)` - Delete files matching glob pattern / 删除匹配 glob 模式的文件
- `public static ParallelBuilder parallel()` - Create a parallel batch operation builder / 创建并行批量操作构建器
- `public static List<Path> collectFiles(Path dir)` - Collect files from directory / 从目录收集文件
- `public static List<Path> collectGlob(Path dir, String pattern)` - Collect files matching glob pattern / 收集匹配 glob 模式的文件

- `public boolean matches(Checksum other)` - Checks if this checksum matches another / 检查此校验和是否与另一个匹配
- `public boolean matches(String hexString)` - Checks if this checksum matches a hex string / 检查此校验和是否与十六进制字符串匹配
- `public static Checksum fromHex(String algorithm, String hexString)` - Creates a checksum from hex string / 从十六进制字符串创建校验和
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### OpenIOOperationException
`public class OpenIOOperationException` - IO Operation Exception (Unchecked) / IO操作异常（非受检）

- `public OpenIOOperationException(String message)` - Creates an exception with message / 创建带消息的异常
- `public OpenIOOperationException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception with message and cause / 创建带消息和原因的异常
- `public OpenIOOperationException(String operation, String path, String message)` - Creates an exception with operation, path and message / 创建带操作、路径和消息的异常
- `public OpenIOOperationException(String operation, String path, String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception with operation, path, message and cause / 创建带操作、路径、消息和原因的异常
- `public String operation()` - Gets the operation type / 获取操作类型
- `public String path()` - Gets the path involved / 获取涉及的路径
- `public static OpenIOOperationException fileNotFound(Path path)` - Creates a file not found exception / 创建文件未找到异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException resourceNotFound(String resource)` - Creates a resource not found exception / 创建资源未找到异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException readFailed(Path path, Throwable cause)` - Creates a read failed exception / 创建读取失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException readFailed(Throwable cause)` - Creates a read failed exception for stream / 创建流读取失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException writeFailed(Path path, Throwable cause)` - Creates a write failed exception / 创建写入失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException writeFailed(Throwable cause)` - Creates a write failed exception for stream / 创建流写入失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException copyFailed(Path source, Path target, Throwable cause)` - Creates a copy failed exception / 创建复制失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException moveFailed(Path source, Path target, Throwable cause)` - Creates a move failed exception / 创建移动失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException deleteFailed(Path path, Throwable cause)` - Creates a delete failed exception / 创建删除失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException createFileFailed(Path path, Throwable cause)` - Creates a create file failed exception / 创建文件创建失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException createDirectoryFailed(Path path, Throwable cause)` - Creates a create directory failed exception / 创建目录创建失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException streamOperationFailed(String operation, Throwable cause)` - Creates a stream operation failed exception / 创建流操作失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException sizeLimitExceeded(long maxSize, long actualSize)` - Creates a size limit exceeded exception / 创建大小超限异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException invalidPath(String path, Throwable cause)` - Creates an invalid path exception / 创建无效路径异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException watchFailed(Path path, Throwable cause)` - Creates a watch failed exception / 创建监听失败异常
- `public static OpenIOOperationException checksumFailed(String algorithm, Throwable cause)` - Creates a checksum failed exception / 创建校验和计算失败异常

- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a new builder. / 创建新的构建器。
- `public record Chunk(` - Represents a chunk of file data. / 表示文件数据块。
- `public static void writeInChunks(Path path, byte[] data, int chunkSize,` - Writes data to a file in chunks. / 分块写入数据到文件。
- `public static void copyInChunks(Path source, Path target, int chunkSize,` - Copies a file in chunks. / 分块复制文件。

### FileComparator
`public final class FileComparator` - File Content Comparator - Compares files by content / 文件内容比较器 - 按内容比较文件

- `public static boolean contentEquals(Path file1, Path file2)` - Compares two files byte-by-byte. / 逐字节比较两个文件。
- `public static boolean hashEquals(Path file1, Path file2, String algorithm)` - Compares two files using hash. / 使用哈希比较两个文件。
- `public static byte[] computeHash(Path file, String algorithm)` - Computes the hash of a file. / 计算文件的哈希值。
- `public static String computeHashHex(Path file, String algorithm)` - Computes the hash of a file as hexadecimal string. / 计算文件的哈希值并返回十六进制字符串。
- `public static boolean linesEqual(Path file1, Path file2, Charset charset)` - Compares two text files line by line. / 逐行比较两个文本文件。
- `public static boolean linesEqual(Path file1, Path file2)` - Compares two text files line by line using UTF-8. / 使用UTF-8逐行比较两个文本文件。
- `public static LineDiff diffLines(Path file1, Path file2, Charset charset)` - Generates a diff between two text files. / 生成两个文本文件之间的差异。
- `public static LineDiff diffLines(Path file1, Path file2)` - Generates a diff between two text files using UTF-8. / 使用UTF-8生成两个文本文件之间的差异。
- `public static DirectoryDiff compareDirectories(Path dir1, Path dir2)` - Compares two directories. / 比较两个目录。
- `public static DirectoryDiff compareDirectories(Path dir1, Path dir2, Predicate<Path> filter)` - Compares two directories with a filter. / 使用过滤器比较两个目录。
- `public record LineDiff(` - Result of comparing lines between two files. / 两个文件之间行比较的结果。
- `public record LineEntry(int lineNumber, String content)` - A line entry with line number. / 带有行号的行条目。
- `public record LineChange(int lineNumber, String oldContent, String newContent)` - A line change between two files. / 两个文件之间的行变化。
- `public record DirectoryDiff(` - Result of comparing two directories. / 比较两个目录的结果。

- `public FileReader charset(Charset charset)` - Sets the charset / 设置字符集
- `public byte[] asBytes()` - Reads file as byte array / 读取文件为字节数组
- `public String asString()` - Reads file as string / 读取文件为字符串
- `public List<String> asLines()` - Reads file as list of lines / 读取文件为行列表
- `public Stream<String> asLineStream()` - Reads file as stream of lines / 读取文件为行流
- `public BufferedReader asBufferedReader()` - Gets a buffered reader / 获取缓冲读取器
- `public InputStream asInputStream()` - Gets an input stream / 获取输入流
- `public String firstLine()` - Reads first line of file / 读取文件首行
- `public String lastLine()` - Reads last line of file / 读取文件末行
- `public boolean exists()` - Checks if file exists / 检查文件是否存在
- `public long size()` - Gets file size / 获取文件大小
- `public Path getPath()` - Gets the path / 获取路径

### FileWatcher
`public final class FileWatcher` - File Watcher / 文件监听器

- `public static FileWatcher watch(Path path)` - Creates a file watcher for the given path / 为给定路径创建文件监听器
- `public static FileWatcher watch(String path)` - Creates a file watcher for the given path string / 为给定路径字符串创建文件监听器
- `public FileWatcher filter(String pattern)` - Sets file name filter pattern / 设置文件名过滤模式
- `public FileWatcher onCreate(Consumer<Path> handler)` - Sets handler for create events / 设置创建事件处理器
- `public FileWatcher onModify(Consumer<Path> handler)` - Sets handler for modify events / 设置修改事件处理器
- `public FileWatcher onDelete(Consumer<Path> handler)` - Sets handler for delete events / 设置删除事件处理器
- `public FileWatcher onAny(Consumer<FileEvent> handler)` - Sets handler for any event / 设置任意事件处理器
- `public void start()` - Starts watching / 开始监听
- `public void stop()` - Stops watching and releases OS file watch handles (inotify/kqueue). / 停止监听并释放OS文件监听句柄(inotify/kqueue)。
- `public void close()` - 关闭资源 / Close resource
- `public boolean isRunning()` - Checks if watcher is running / 检查监听器是否正在运行
- `public Path getWatchPath()` - Gets the watch path / 获取监听路径
- `public record FileEvent(Path path, WatchEvent.Kind<?> kind)` - File Event / 文件事件

### FileWriter
`public final class FileWriter` - File Writer Utility / 文件写入器

- `public static FileWriter of(Path path)` - Creates a file writer for the given path / 为给定路径创建文件写入器
- `public static FileWriter of(String path)` - Creates a file writer for the given path string / 为给定路径字符串创建文件写入器
- `public FileWriter charset(Charset charset)` - Sets the charset / 设置字符集
- `public FileWriter append()` - Enables append mode / 启用追加模式
- `public FileWriter append(boolean append)` - Sets append mode / 设置追加模式
- `public FileWriter noCreateParents()` - Disables automatic parent directory creation / 禁用自动创建父目录
- `public void write(byte[] bytes)` - Writes byte array to file / 写入字节数组到文件
- `public void write(CharSequence content)` - Writes string to file / 写入字符串到文件
- `public void writeLines(Iterable<? extends CharSequence> lines)` - Writes lines to file / 写入行到文件
- `public BufferedWriter asBufferedWriter()` - Gets a buffered writer / 获取缓冲写入器
- `public OutputStream asOutputStream()` - Gets an output stream / 获取输出流
- `public Path getPath()` - Gets the path / 获取路径

### MoreFiles
`public final class MoreFiles` - More File Utilities - Advanced file operations / 更多文件工具 - 高级文件操作

- `public static void writeAtomically(Path path, String content, Charset charset)` - Writes content atomically to a file. / 原子地将内容写入文件。
- `public static void writeAtomically(Path path, String content)` - Writes content atomically to a file (UTF-8). / 原子地将内容写入文件（UTF-8）。
- `public static void writeAtomically(Path path, byte[] data)` - Writes bytes atomically to a file. / 原子地将字节写入文件。
- `public static void writeAtomically(Path path, Iterable<String> lines, Charset charset)` - Writes lines atomically to a file. / 原子地将行写入文件。
- `public static void writeAtomically(Path path, Iterable<String> lines)` - Writes lines atomically to a file (UTF-8). / 原子地将行写入文件（UTF-8）。
- `public static void writeAtomically(Path path, InputStream input)` - Writes from an InputStream atomically to a file. / 原子地从 InputStream 写入文件。
- `public static void touch(Path path)` - Creates an empty file or updates its last modified time. / 创建空文件或更新其最后修改时间。
- `public static void deleteRecursively(Path path)` - Deletes a file or directory recursively. / 递归删除文件或目录。
- `public static void deleteRecursively(Path path, Predicate<Path> filter)` - Deletes files recursively that match the filter. / 递归删除匹配过滤器的文件。
- `public static boolean deleteIfExists(Path path)` - Deletes if exists, returning whether deletion occurred. / 如果存在则删除，返回是否发生删除。
- `public static boolean deleteDirectoryIfEmpty(Path path)` - Deletes a directory only if it's empty. / 仅当目录为空时删除。
- `public static FileTreeTraversal fileTree(Path root)` - Creates a file tree traversal builder. / 创建文件树遍历构建器。
- `public static Stream<Path> listFilesRecursively(Path path)` - Returns all files (not directories) under the path recursively. / 递归返回路径下的所有文件（不包括目录）。
- `public static Stream<Path> listDirectoriesRecursively(Path path)` - Returns all directories under the path recursively. / 递归返回路径下的所有目录。
- `public static void walkFileTree(Path path, Consumer<Path> action)` - Walks the file tree and applies the action to each file. / 遍历文件树并对每个文件应用操作。
- `public static boolean contentEquals(Path path1, Path path2)` - Checks if two files have equal content. / 检查两个文件内容是否相等。
- `public static boolean isEmptyDirectory(Path path)` - Checks if a directory is empty. / 检查目录是否为空。
- `public static Path createParentDirectories(Path path)` - Creates parent directories if they don't exist. / 如果父目录不存在则创建。
- `public static String getFileExtension(Path path)` - Gets file extension (with dot). / 获取文件扩展名（带点）。
- `public static String getNameWithoutExtension(Path path)` - Gets filename without extension. / 获取不带扩展名的文件名。

### OpenFileLock
`public final class OpenFileLock` - File Locking Utility Class / 文件锁定工具类

- `public static FileLockHandle lock(Path path)` - Acquire exclusive lock on file / 获取文件的独占锁
- `public static FileLockHandle lock(Path path, boolean shared)` - Acquire lock on file / 获取文件锁
- `public static FileLockHandle lockShared(Path path)` - Acquire shared (read) lock on file / 获取文件的共享（读）锁
- `public static Optional<FileLockHandle> tryLock(Path path)` - Try to acquire exclusive lock without blocking / 尝试获取独占锁（不阻塞）
- `public static Optional<FileLockHandle> tryLock(Path path, boolean shared)` - Try to acquire lock without blocking / 尝试获取锁（不阻塞）
- `public static Optional<FileLockHandle> tryLock(Path path, Duration timeout)` - Try to acquire lock with timeout / 尝试在超时时间内获取锁
- `public static Optional<FileLockHandle> tryLock(Path path, Duration timeout, boolean shared)` - Try to acquire lock with timeout / 尝试在超时时间内获取锁
- `public static FileLockHandle lockFile(Path path)` - Create a lock file for coordination / 创建用于协调的锁文件
- `public static Optional<FileLockHandle> tryLockFile(Path path, Duration timeout)` - Try to create a lock file with timeout / 尝试在超时时间内创建锁文件
- `public static Path getLockFilePath(Path path)` - Get lock file path for a resource / 获取资源的锁文件路径
- `public static <T> T withLock(Path path, Supplier<T> action)` - Execute action with exclusive lock / 持有独占锁执行操作
- `public static void withLock(Path path, Runnable action)` - Execute action with exclusive lock (no return value) / 持有独占锁执行操作（无返回值）
- `public static <T> T withSharedLock(Path path, Supplier<T> action)` - Execute action with shared lock / 持有共享锁执行操作
- `public static <T> Optional<T> tryWithLock(Path path, Duration timeout, Supplier<T> action)` - Try to execute action with lock, with timeout / 尝试在超时时间内持有锁执行操作
- `public static boolean isLocked(Path path)` - Check if file is locked / 检查文件是否被锁定
- `public static boolean isExclusivelyLocked(Path path)` - Check if file is locked with shared lock / 检查文件是否被共享锁定

### DownloadProgress
`public final class DownloadProgress` - Download Progress - Download Progress Information / 下载进度 - 下载进度信息

- `public DownloadProgress(long totalBytes, long downloadedBytes, double percentage,` - Creates a download progress. / 创建下载进度。
- `public static DownloadProgress of(long totalBytes, long downloadedBytes, long speed)` - Creates a progress instance. / 创建进度实例。
- `public static DownloadProgress completed(long totalBytes)` - Creates a completed progress. / 创建完成的进度。
- `public static DownloadProgress unknown(long downloadedBytes, long speed)` - Creates an unknown progress. / 创建未知的进度。
- `public long getTotalBytes()` - Gets the total bytes. / 获取总字节数。
- `public long getDownloadedBytes()` - Gets the downloaded bytes. / 获取已下载字节。
- `public double getPercentage()` - Gets the completion percentage. / 获取完成百分比。
- `public long getSpeed()` - Gets the download speed. / 获取下载速度。
- `public long getRemainingTime()` - Gets the remaining time. / 获取剩余时间。
- `public boolean isComplete()` - Checks if download is complete. / 检查下载是否完成。
- `public boolean isTotalKnown()` - Checks if total size is known. / 检查总大小是否已知。
- `public String formattedPercentage()` - Gets formatted percentage. / 获取格式化的百分比。
- `public String formattedSpeed()` - Gets formatted speed. / 获取格式化的速度。
- `public String formattedTotalBytes()` - Gets formatted total bytes. / 获取格式化的总字节数。
- `public String formattedDownloadedBytes()` - Gets formatted downloaded bytes. / 获取格式化的已下载字节。
- `public String formattedRemainingTime()` - Gets formatted remaining time. / 获取格式化的剩余时间。
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### UploadProgress
`public record UploadProgress(String fileName, long bytesUploaded, long totalBytes, long elapsedMs)` - Upload Progress - Snapshot of an upload operation's current progress / 上传进度 - 上传操作当前进度的快照

- `public String formattedPercentage()` - Returns the upload percentage as a formatted string (e.g., "42.5%"). / 以格式化字符串返回上传百分比（例如"42.5%"）。
- `public double throughputBytesPerSec()` - Returns the current upload throughput in bytes per second. / 返回当前上传吞吐量（字节/秒）。
- `public double percentage()` - Returns the upload percentage as a double (0.0 to 100.0). / 以双精度浮点数返回上传百分比（0.0到00.0）。
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### ClassPathResource
`public final class ClassPathResource` - Classpath Resource Implementation / 类路径资源实现

- `public ClassPathResource(String path)` - Creates a classpath resource with default classloader / 使用默认类加载器创建类路径资源
- `public ClassPathResource(String path, ClassLoader classLoader)` - Creates a classpath resource with specific classloader / 使用指定类加载器创建类路径资源
- `public boolean exists()` - Checks if the resource exists / 检查资源是否存在
- `public boolean isReadable()` - Checks if the resource is readable / 检查资源是否可读
- `public InputStream getInputStream()` - Gets the input stream for the resource / 获取资源的输入流
- `public URL getURL()` - Gets the URL of the resource / 获取资源的URL
- `public Path getPath()` - Gets the path of the resource / 获取资源的路径

- `public String getFilename()` - Gets the filename of the resource / 获取资源的文件名
- `public long contentLength()` - Gets the content length of the resource / 获取资源的内容长度
- `public long lastModified()` - Gets the last modified time of the resource / 获取资源的最后修改时间
- `public Resource createRelative(String relativePath)` - Creates a relative resource / 创建相对资源
- `public String getClassPath()` - Gets the classpath / 获取类路径
- `public ClassLoader getClassLoader()` - Gets the classloader / 获取类加载器
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### Marshaller
