### ByteSink
`public abstract class ByteSink` - Abstract Byte Sink - A writable destination for bytes / 抽象字节接收器 - 可写的字节目标

- `public abstract OutputStream openStream();` - Opens a new OutputStream for writing. / 打开新的输出流进行写入。
- `public CharSink asCharSink(Charset charset)` - Returns a view of this sink as a CharSink with the given charset. / 返回使用给定字符集作为CharSink的视图。
- `public CharSink asCharSink()` - Returns a view of this sink as a CharSink with UTF-8 charset. / 返回使用UTF-8字符集作为CharSink的视图。
- `public void write(byte[] bytes)` - Writes all bytes from a byte array. / 从字节数组写入所有字节。
- `public long writeFrom(InputStream input)` - Writes all bytes from an InputStream. / 从输入流写入所有字节。
- `public static ByteSink toPath(Path path)` - Creates a ByteSink for writing to a file path. / 创建用于写入文件路径的ByteSink。
- `public static ByteSink toPathAppend(Path path)` - Creates a ByteSink for appending to a file path. / 创建用于追加到文件路径的ByteSink。
- `public static ByteSink nullSink()` - Creates a ByteSink that discards all written data. / 创建丢弃所有写入数据的ByteSink。

### ByteSource
`public abstract class ByteSource` - Abstract Byte Source - A readable source of bytes / 抽象字节源 - 可读的字节来源

- `public abstract InputStream openStream();` - Opens a new InputStream for reading. / 打开新的输入流进行读取。
- `public CharSource asCharSource(Charset charset)` - Returns a view of the contents as a CharSource with the given charset. / 返回使用给定字符集作为CharSource的内容视图。
- `public CharSource asCharSource()` - Returns a view of the contents as a CharSource with UTF-8 charset. / 返回使用UTF-8字符集作为CharSource的内容视图。
- `public Optional<Long> sizeIfKnown()` - Returns the size of this source in bytes, if known. / 返回此源的字节大小（如果已知）。
- `public long size()` - Returns the size of this source in bytes. / 返回此源的字节大小。
- `public byte[] read()` - Reads the entire contents as a byte array. / 将整个内容读取为字节数组。
- `public long copyTo(OutputStream output)` - Copies the contents to an OutputStream. / 将内容复制到输出流。
- `public long copyTo(ByteSink sink)` - Copies the contents to a ByteSink. / 将内容复制到ByteSink。
- `public boolean contentEquals(ByteSource other)` - Checks if this source has the same content as another. / 检查此源是否与另一个源具有相同的内容。
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the source is empty. / 检查源是否为空。
- `public byte[] hash(String algorithm)` - Computes the hash of the contents using the specified algorithm. / 使用指定算法计算内容的哈希值。
- `public ByteSource slice(long offset, long length)` - Returns a ByteSource that returns a slice of this source. / 返回此源的一个切片的ByteSource。
- `public static ByteSource concat(ByteSource... sources)` - Returns a concatenated ByteSource. / 返回连接后的ByteSource。
- `public static ByteSource concat(Iterable<? extends ByteSource> sources)` - Returns a concatenated ByteSource. / 返回连接后的ByteSource。
- `public static ByteSource wrap(byte[] bytes)` - Creates a ByteSource from a byte array. / 从字节数组创建ByteSource。
- `public static ByteSource empty()` - Creates an empty ByteSource. / 创建空的ByteSource。
- `public static ByteSource fromPath(Path path)` - Creates a ByteSource from a file path. / 从文件路径创建ByteSource。
- `public static ByteSource fromUrl(URL url)` - Creates a ByteSource from a URL. / 从URL创建ByteSource。
- `public static ByteSource fromResource(String resourcePath)` - Creates a ByteSource from a classpath resource. / 从类路径资源创建ByteSource。
- `public static ByteSource fromResource(String resourcePath, ClassLoader classLoader)` - Creates a ByteSource from a classpath resource. / 从类路径资源创建ByteSource。

### CharSink
`public abstract class CharSink` - Abstract Character Sink - A writable destination for characters / 抽象字符接收器 - 可写的字符目标

- `public abstract Writer openStream();` - Opens a new Writer for writing. / 打开新的Writer进行写入。
- `public BufferedWriter openBufferedStream()` - Opens a new BufferedWriter for writing. / 打开新的BufferedWriter进行写入。
- `public void write(CharSequence charSequence)` - Writes a character sequence. / 写入字符序列。
- `public long writeFrom(Reader reader)` - Writes all characters from a Reader. / 从Reader写入所有字符。
- `public void writeLines(Iterable<? extends CharSequence> lines)` - Writes lines with the system line separator. / 使用系统行分隔符写入多行。
- `public void writeLines(Iterable<? extends CharSequence> lines, String lineSeparator)` - Writes lines with a custom line separator. / 使用自定义行分隔符写入多行。
- `public void writeLines(Stream<? extends CharSequence> lines)` - Writes lines from a stream with the system line separator. / 使用系统行分隔符从流写入多行。
- `public void writeLines(Stream<? extends CharSequence> lines, String lineSeparator)` - Writes lines from a stream with a custom line separator. / 使用自定义行分隔符从流写入多行。
- `public static CharSink toPath(Path path)` - Creates a CharSink for writing to a file path with UTF-8 encoding. / 创建用于使用UTF-8编码写入文件路径的CharSink。
- `public static CharSink toPath(Path path, Charset charset)` - Creates a CharSink for writing to a file path. / 创建用于写入文件路径的CharSink。
- `public static CharSink toPathAppend(Path path)` - Creates a CharSink for appending to a file path with UTF-8 encoding. / 创建用于使用UTF-8编码追加到文件路径的CharSink。
- `public static CharSink toPathAppend(Path path, Charset charset)` - Creates a CharSink for appending to a file path. / 创建用于追加到文件路径的CharSink。
- `public static CharSink nullSink()` - Creates a CharSink that discards all written data. / 创建丢弃所有写入数据的CharSink。

### CharSource
`public abstract class CharSource` - Abstract Character Source - A readable source of characters / 抽象字符源 - 可读的字符来源

- `public abstract Reader openStream();` - Opens a new Reader for reading. / 打开新的Reader进行读取。
- `public BufferedReader openBufferedStream()` - Opens a new BufferedReader for reading. / 打开新的BufferedReader进行读取。
- `public Optional<Long> lengthIfKnown()` - Returns the length of this source in characters, if known. / 返回此源的字符长度（如果已知）。
- `public long length()` - Returns the length of this source in characters. / 返回此源的字符长度。
- `public String read()` - Reads the entire contents as a string. / 将整个内容读取为字符串。
- `public Optional<String> readFirstLine()` - Reads the first line. / 读取第一行。
- `public List<String> readLines()` - Reads all lines as a list. / 将所有行读取为列表。
- `public Stream<String> lines()` - Returns a stream of lines. / 返回行的流。
- `public long countLines()` - Counts the number of lines. / 统计行数。
- `public long copyTo(Writer writer)` - Copies the contents to a Writer. / 将内容复制到Writer。
- `public long copyTo(CharSink sink)` - Copies the contents to a CharSink. / 将内容复制到CharSink。
- `public long copyTo(Appendable appendable)` - Copies the contents to an Appendable. / 将内容复制到Appendable。
- `public boolean contentEquals(CharSource other)` - Checks if this source has the same content as another. / 检查此源是否与另一个源具有相同的内容。
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the source is empty. / 检查源是否为空。
- `public void forEachLine(java.util.function.Consumer<String> processor)` - Processes each line with a consumer. / 使用消费者处理每一行。
- `public static CharSource concat(CharSource... sources)` - Returns a concatenated CharSource. / 返回连接后的CharSource。
- `public static CharSource concat(Iterable<? extends CharSource> sources)` - Returns a concatenated CharSource. / 返回连接后的CharSource。
- `public static CharSource wrap(CharSequence string)` - Creates a CharSource from a string. / 从字符串创建CharSource。
- `public static CharSource empty()` - Creates an empty CharSource. / 创建空的CharSource。
- `public static CharSource fromPath(Path path)` - Creates a CharSource from a file path with UTF-8 encoding. / 从文件路径创建使用UTF-8编码的CharSource。
- `public static CharSource fromPath(Path path, Charset charset)` - Creates a CharSource from a file path. / 从文件路径创建CharSource。
- `public static CharSource fromUrl(URL url)` - Creates a CharSource from a URL with UTF-8 encoding. / 从URL创建使用UTF-8编码的CharSource。
- `public static CharSource fromUrl(URL url, Charset charset)` - Creates a CharSource from a URL. / 从URL创建CharSource。
- `public static CharSource fromResource(String resourcePath)` - Creates a CharSource from a classpath resource with UTF-8 encoding. / 从类路径资源创建使用UTF-8编码的CharSource。
- `public static CharSource fromResource(String resourcePath, Charset charset)` - Creates a CharSource from a classpath resource. / 从类路径资源创建CharSource。
- `public static CharSource fromResource(String resourcePath, Charset charset, ClassLoader classLoader)` - Creates a CharSource from a classpath resource. / 从类路径资源创建CharSource。

### BoundedInputStream
`public class BoundedInputStream` - Bounded Input Stream / 限制大小输入流

- `public BoundedInputStream(InputStream in, long maxSize)` - Creates a bounded input stream / 创建限制大小输入流
- `public BoundedInputStream(InputStream in, long maxSize, boolean throwOnExceeding)` - Creates a bounded input stream with exception option / 创建带异常选项的限制大小输入流
- `public int read()` - Reads a single byte / 读取单个字节
- `public int read(byte[] b, int off, int len)` - Reads bytes into buffer / 读取字节到缓冲区
- `public long skip(long n)` - Skips n bytes / 跳过n个字节
- `public int available()` - Returns the number of available bytes / 返回可用字节数
- `public synchronized void mark(int readlimit)` - Marks the current position / 标记当前位置
- `public synchronized void reset()` - Resets to the marked position / 重置到标记位置
- `public long getBytesRead()` - Gets the number of bytes read / 获取已读取字节数
- `public long getRemaining()` - Gets the remaining bytes that can be read / 获取剩余可读字节数
- `public long getMaxSize()` - Gets the maximum size limit / 获取最大大小限制
- `public boolean isLimitReached()` - Checks if the limit has been reached / 检查是否已达到限制

### CountingInputStream
`public class CountingInputStream` - Counting Input Stream / 计数输入流

- `public CountingInputStream(InputStream in)` - Creates a counting input stream / 创建计数输入流
- `public int read()` - Reads a single byte and increments the count / 读取单个字节并增加计数
- `public int read(byte[] b, int off, int len)` - Reads bytes into buffer and increments the count / 读取字节到缓冲区并增加计数
- `public long skip(long n)` - Skips n bytes / 跳过n个字节
- `public synchronized void mark(int readlimit)` - Marks the current position / 标记当前位置
- `public synchronized void reset()` - Resets to the marked position / 重置到标记位置
- `public long getCount()` - Gets the number of bytes read / 获取已读取字节数
- `public long resetCount()` - Resets the counter and returns the previous count / 重置计数器并返回之前的计数

### FastByteArrayOutputStream
`public class FastByteArrayOutputStream` - Fast Byte Array Output Stream / 高性能字节数组输出流

- `public FastByteArrayOutputStream()` - Creates a stream with default capacity / 创建默认容量的流
- `public FastByteArrayOutputStream(int initialCapacity)` - Creates a stream with specified initial capacity / 创建指定初始容量的流
- `public void write(int b)` - Writes a single byte / 写入单个字节
- `public void write(byte[] b, int off, int len)` - Writes bytes from buffer / 写入缓冲区中的字节
- `public int size()` - Gets the current size / 获取当前大小
- `public byte[] toByteArray()` - Gets the byte array (may share internal buffer) / 获取字节数组（可能共享内部缓冲区）
- `public byte[] toByteArrayCopy()` - Gets a copy of the byte array / 获取字节数组副本
- `public void writeTo(OutputStream out)` - Writes content to another output stream / 将内容写入另一个输出流
- `public void reset()` - Resets the stream / 重置流
- `public InputStream toInputStream()` - Converts to input stream / 转换为输入流
- `public byte[] getBuffer()` - Gets the internal buffer (for advanced use) / 获取内部缓冲区（高级用法）
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string
- `public String toString(String charsetName)` - Converts to string with charset / 使用字符集转换为字符串

### TeeInputStream
`public class TeeInputStream` - Tee Input Stream / 分流输入流

- `public TeeInputStream(InputStream in, OutputStream branch)` - Creates a tee input stream / 创建分流输入流
- `public TeeInputStream(InputStream in, OutputStream branch, boolean closeBranch)` - Creates a tee input stream with close option / 创建带关闭选项的分流输入流
- `public int read()` - Reads a single byte and writes it to the branch / 读取单个字节并写入分支流
- `public int read(byte[] b, int off, int len)` - Reads bytes and writes them to the branch / 读取字节并写入分支流
- `public void close()` - Closes the stream and the branch / 关闭流和分支流
- `public OutputStream getBranch()` - Gets the branch output stream / 获取分支输出流
- `public void flushBranch()` - Flushes the branch output stream / 刷新分支输出流

### AutoDeleteTempFile
`public class AutoDeleteTempFile` - Auto Delete Temp File / 自动删除临时文件

- `public Path getPath()` - Gets the file path / 获取文件路径
- `public File toFile()` - Gets the file as File object / 获取File对象
- `public void write(byte[] content)` - Writes byte content to the file / 写入字节内容到文件
- `public void write(String content)` - Writes string content to the file (UTF-8) / 写入字符串内容到文件（UTF-8）
- `public void write(String content, Charset charset)` - Writes string content to the file with charset / 使用指定字符集写入字符串内容到文件
- `public byte[] read()` - Reads file content as bytes / 读取文件内容为字节
- `public String readString()` - Reads file content as string (UTF-8) / 读取文件内容为字符串（UTF-8）
- `public String readString(Charset charset)` - Reads file content as string with charset / 使用指定字符集读取文件内容为字符串
- `public boolean exists()` - Checks if the file exists / 检查文件是否存在
- `public long size()` - Gets file size / 获取文件大小
- `public boolean delete()` - Deletes the file immediately / 立即删除文件
- `public void close()` - 关闭资源 / Close resource
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### OpenTempFile
`public final class OpenTempFile` - Temp File Utility Class / 临时文件工具类

- `public static Path createTempFile(String prefix, String suffix)` - Creates a temporary file / 创建临时文件
- `public static Path createTempFile(Path dir, String prefix, String suffix)` - Creates a temporary file in specified directory / 在指定目录创建临时文件
- `public static Path createTempDirectory(String prefix)` - Creates a temporary directory / 创建临时目录
- `public static Path createTempDirectory(Path dir, String prefix)` - Creates a temporary directory in specified parent / 在指定父目录创建临时目录
- `public static AutoDeleteTempFile createAutoDeleteTempFile(String prefix, String suffix)` - Creates an auto-delete temporary file / 创建自动删除临时文件
- `public static AutoDeleteTempFile createAutoDeleteTempFile(Path dir, String prefix, String suffix)` - Creates an auto-delete temporary file in specified directory / 在指定目录创建自动删除临时文件
- `public static Path createTempFileFromStream(InputStream input, String prefix, String suffix)` - Creates a temporary file from input stream / 从输入流创建临时文件
- `public static Path getTempDirectory()` - Gets the system temp directory / 获取系统临时目录
- `public static int cleanupOldTempFiles(Path dir, Duration maxAge, String pattern)` - Cleans up old temporary files / 清理过期临时文件
- `public static int cleanupOldTempFiles(Duration maxAge, String pattern)` - Cleans up all files matching pattern in temp directory / 清理临时目录中匹配模式的所有文件
- `public static boolean isInTempDirectory(Path path)` - Checks if a path is in the temp directory / 检查路径是否在临时目录中

---

## 5. opencode-base-functional

函数式编程工具，提供Try、Either、Option、Validation、Lazy、Pipeline、模式匹配、Lens

### OpenFunctional
`public final class OpenFunctional` - OpenFunctional - Unified entry point for functional programming utilities / OpenFunctional - 函数式编程工具的统一入口点

- `public static <T> Try<T> tryOf(cloud.opencode.base.core.func.CheckedSupplier<T> supplier)` - Create a Try from a supplier / 从供应商创建 Try
- `public static <T> Try<T> success(T value)` - Create a successful Try / 创建成功的 Try
- `public static <T> Try<T> failure(Throwable throwable)` - Create a failed Try / 创建失败的 Try
- `public static <L, R> Either<L, R> left(L value)` - Create a Left Either / 创建 Left Either
- `public static <L, R> Either<L, R> right(R value)` - Create a Right Either / 创建 Right Either
- `public static <T> Option<T> some(T value)` - Create a Some Option / 创建 Some Option
- `public static <T> Option<T> none()` - Create a None Option / 创建 None Option
- `public static <T> Option<T> option(T value)` - Create an Option from nullable value / 从可空值创建 Option
- `public static <E, T> Validation<E, T> valid(T value)` - Create a valid Validation / 创建有效的 Validation
- `public static <E, T> Validation<E, T> invalid(E error)` - Create an invalid Validation / 创建无效的 Validation
- `public static <T> Lazy<T> lazy(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Create a Lazy computation / 创建惰性计算
- `public static <T> OpenMatch.Matcher<T> match(T value)` - Start pattern matching / 开始模式匹配
- `public static <T, R> Pattern<T, R> typePattern(Class<R> type)` - Create a type pattern / 创建类型模式
- `public static <T, U, R> Case<T, R> caseOf(Class<U> type, Function<? super U, ? extends R> action)` - Create a type case / 创建类型分支
- `public static <T, R> Case<T, R> when(Predicate<? super T> predicate,` - Create a predicate case / 创建谓词分支
- `public static <A, B, C> Function<A, C> compose(Function<A, B> f, Function<B, C> g)` - Compose two functions / 组合两个函数
- `public static <A, B, C> Function<A, Function<B, C>> curry(BiFunction<A, B, C> f)` - Curry a BiFunction / 柯里化 BiFunction
- `public static <T, R> Function<T, R> memoize(Function<T, R> f)` - Memoize a function / 记忆化函数
- `public static <T, R> Function<T, R> memoize(Function<T, R> f, int maxSize)` - Memoize a function with custom cache size / 记忆化函数（自定义缓存大小）
- `public static <T, U, R> CheckedBiFunction<T, U, R> checkedBiFunction(` - Create a CheckedBiFunction / 创建可抛异常的双参函数
- `public static <T, U> CheckedBiConsumer<T, U> checkedBiConsumer(` - Create a CheckedBiConsumer / 创建可抛异常的双参消费者
- `public static <T, U, R> BiFunction<T, U, R> uncheckedBiFunction(` - Convert a CheckedBiFunction to a standard BiFunction / 将CheckedBiFunction转换为标准BiFunction
- `public static <S, A> Lens<S, A> lens(Function<S, A> getter, BiFunction<S, A, S> setter)` - Create a lens / 创建透镜
- `public static <S, A> OptionalLens<S, A> optionalLens(` - Create an optional lens / 创建可选透镜
- `public static <T> Pipeline.PipelineBuilder<T> pipeline(T value)` - Start a pipeline with a value / 以值开始管道
- `public static <T> PipeUtil.Pipe<T> pipe(T value)` - Start a pipe chain / 开始管道链
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> async(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Run async on Virtual Thread / 在虚拟线程上异步运行
- `public static <T> Try<T> asyncTimeout(Supplier<T> supplier, Duration timeout)` - Run async with timeout / 带超时异步运行
- `public static <T> LazyAsync<T> lazyAsync(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Create a lazy async computation / 创建惰性异步计算
- `public static <T, R> List<R> parallelMap(List<T> items, Function<T, R> mapper)` - Parallel map over a list / 并行映射列表
- `public static <R extends Record, T> Lens<R, T> recordLens(Class<R> recordClass,` - Create a lens for a record component / 为 record 组件创建透镜
- `public static <R extends Record> R copyRecord(R record,` - Copy a record with modifications / 带修改复制 record
- `public static java.util.Map<String, Object> recordToMap(Record record)` - Convert record to map / 将 record 转换为 map

### AsyncFunctionUtil
`public final class AsyncFunctionUtil` - AsyncFunctionUtil - Virtual Thread based async utilities / AsyncFunctionUtil - 基于虚拟线程的异步工具

- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> async(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Run a supplier asynchronously on a Virtual Thread / 在虚拟线程上异步运行供应商
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> asyncRun(Runnable runnable)` - Run a runnable asynchronously on a Virtual Thread / 在虚拟线程上异步运行可运行对象
- `public static <T> Try<T> asyncWithTimeout(Supplier<T> supplier, Duration timeout)` - Run a supplier asynchronously with timeout / 带超时异步运行供应商
- `public static <T, R> List<R> parallelMap(List<T> items, Function<T, R> mapper)` - Map a function over a list in parallel / 并行地将函数映射到列表
- `public static <T, R> Try<List<R>> parallelMapTry(List<T> items, Function<T, R> mapper)` - Map a function over a list in parallel with error handling / 并行地将函数映射到列表，带错误处理
- `public static <T> List<CompletableFuture<T>> runAll(Supplier<T>... suppliers)` - Run multiple suppliers in parallel / 并行运行多个供应商
- `public static List<CompletableFuture<Void>> runAllAsync(Runnable... runnables)` - Run multiple runnables in parallel / 并行运行多个可运行对象
- `public static <T> Try<List<T>> awaitAll(List<CompletableFuture<T>> futures)` - Wait for all futures to complete / 等待所有 Future 完成
- `public static <T> Try<List<T>> awaitAll(List<CompletableFuture<T>> futures, Duration timeout)` - Wait for all futures with timeout / 带超时等待所有 Future
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> awaitFirst(List<CompletableFuture<T>> futures)` - Wait for first successful result / 等待第一个成功结果
- `public static <T, R> CompletableFuture<R> thenAsync(CompletableFuture<T> future,` - Chain async operations / 链接异步操作
- `public static <T, R> CompletableFuture<R> thenFlatAsync(CompletableFuture<T> future,` - Chain async operations with async mapper / 使用异步映射器链接异步操作
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> recover(CompletableFuture<T> future,` - Recover from failure asynchronously / 异步从失败恢复
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> recoverAsync(CompletableFuture<T> future,` - Recover from failure with async operation / 使用异步操作从失败恢复
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> delay(Duration duration)` - Delay execution / 延迟执行
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> completed(T value)` - Create a completed future with value / 创建带值的已完成 Future
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> failed(Throwable throwable)` - Create a failed future / 创建失败的 Future
- `public static ExecutorService executor()` - Get the Virtual Thread executor / 获取虚拟线程执行器

### Future
`public final class Future<T>` - Future - Functional wrapper for CompletableFuture / Future - CompletableFuture的函数式包装器

- `public static <T> Future<T> of(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Create a Future from a supplier (uses ForkJoinPool). / 从供应商创建Future（使用ForkJoinPool）。
- `public static <T> Future<T> of(Supplier<T> supplier, Executor executor)` - Create a Future from a supplier with custom executor. / 使用自定义执行器从供应商创建 Future。
- `public static <T> Future<T> ofVirtual(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Create a Future from a supplier using virtual threads. / 使用虚拟线程从供应商创建 Future。
- `public static <T> Future<T> fromCallable(Callable<T> callable)` - Create a Future from a callable. / 从 Callable 创建 Future。
- `public static <T> Future<T> successful(T value)` - Create a successful Future with the given value. / 使用给定值创建成功的 Future。
- `public static <T> Future<T> failed(Throwable exception)` - Create a failed Future with the given exception. / 使用给定异常创建失败的 Future。
- `public static <T> Future<T> fromCompletableFuture(CompletableFuture<T> cf)` - Create a Future from a CompletableFuture. / 从 CompletableFuture 创建 Future。
- `public static <T> Future<T> never()` - Create a Future that never completes. / 创建永不完成的 Future。
- `public <R> Future<R> map(Function<? super T, ? extends R> mapper)` - Map the value to a new value. / 将值映射为新值。
- `public <R> Future<R> flatMap(Function<? super T, ? extends Future<R>> mapper)` - FlatMap to another Future. / 扁平映射到另一个 Future。
- `public Future<T> filter(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Filter the value. / 过滤值。
- `public Future<T> onSuccess(Consumer<? super T> action)` - Execute side effect on success. / 成功时执行副作用。
- `public Future<T> onFailure(Consumer<? super Throwable> action)` - Execute side effect on failure. / 失败时执行副作用。
- `public Future<T> onComplete(BiConsumer<? super T, ? super Throwable> action)` - Execute side effect on completion. / 完成时执行副作用。
- `public Future<T> recover(Function<? super Throwable, ? extends T> recovery)` - Recover from any failure. / 从任何失败恢复。
- `public <E extends Throwable> Future<T> recover(` - Recover from specific exception type. / 从特定异常类型恢复。
- `public Future<T> recoverWith(Function<? super Throwable, ? extends Future<T>> recovery)` - Recover with another Future. / 使用另一个 Future 恢复。
- `public Future<T> orElse(T fallback)` - Provide a fallback value on failure. / 失败时提供备用值。
- `public Future<T> orElse(Future<T> fallback)` - Provide a fallback Future on failure. / 失败时提供备用 Future。
- `public Future<T> timeout(Duration duration)` - Apply a timeout to this Future. / 对此 Future 应用超时。
- `public Future<T> timeout(Duration duration, T defaultValue)` - Apply a timeout with default value. / 应用超时并使用默认值。
- `public Try<T> await()` - Await the result, returning a Try. / 等待结果，返回 Try。
- `public Try<T> await(Duration duration)` - Await the result with timeout, returning a Try. / 使用超时等待结果，返回 Try。
- `public T get()` - Get the value, throwing if failed. / 获取值，如果失败则抛出异常。
- `public T getOrElse(T defaultValue)` - Get the value with default on failure. / 获取值，失败时使用默认值。
- `public boolean isCompleted()` - Check if completed. / 检查是否完成。
- `public boolean isSuccess()` - Check if completed successfully. / 检查是否成功完成。
- `public boolean isFailure()` - Check if failed. / 检查是否失败。
- `public Option<T> toOption()` - Convert to Option (None on failure). / 转换为 Option（失败时为 None）。
- `public Try<T> toTry()` - Convert to Try. / 转换为 Try。
- `public CompletableFuture<T> toCompletableFuture()` - Get the underlying CompletableFuture. / 获取底层的 CompletableFuture。
- `public static <A, B, R> Future<R> zip(` - Zip two futures into one. / 将两个 Future 合并为一个。
- `public <U, R> Future<R> zipWith(Future<U> other, BiFunction<? super T, ? super U, ? extends R> zipper)` - Zip this future with another. / 将此 Future 与另一个合并。
- `public static <T> Future<List<T>> sequence(Future<T>... futures)` - Combine a list of futures into a future of list. / 将 Future 列表组合为列表的 Future。
- `public static <T> Future<List<T>> sequence(List<Future<T>> futures)` - Combine a list of futures into a future of list. / 将 Future 列表组合为列表的 Future。
- `public static <A, B> Future<List<B>> traverse(` - Transform a collection into a future of list using a mapping function. / 使用映射函数将集合转换为列表的Future。
- `public static <T> Future<T> firstCompleted(Future<T>... futures)` - Return the first completed future. / 返回第一个完成的 Future。
- `public <R> Future<R> andThenVirtual(Function<? super T, ? extends R> action)` - Run action after completion on a virtual thread. / 完成后在虚拟线程上运行操作。
- `public <R> Future<R> flatMapVirtual(Function<? super T, ? extends Future<R>> mapper)` - FlatMap on virtual thread. / 在虚拟线程上扁平映射。

### LazyAsync
`public final class LazyAsync<T>` - LazyAsync - Lazy asynchronous computation / LazyAsync - 惰性异步计算

- `public static <T> LazyAsync<T> of(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Create a lazy async computation / 创建惰性异步计算
- `public static <T> LazyAsync<T> completed(T value)` - Create an already completed lazy async / 创建已完成的惰性异步
- `public static <T> LazyAsync<T> failed(Throwable throwable)` - Create a failed lazy async / 创建失败的惰性异步
- `public CompletableFuture<T> start()` - Start the computation if not already started / 如果尚未启动则启动计算
- `public T force()` - Get the result, starting computation if needed / 获取结果，必要时启动计算
- `public Try<T> get(Duration timeout)` - Get the result with timeout / 带超时获取结果
- `public Try<T> toTry()` - Get the result as Try (blocking) / 获取结果为 Try（阻塞）
- `public boolean isStarted()` - Check if computation has been started / 检查计算是否已启动
- `public boolean isRunning()` - Check if computation is running / 检查计算是否正在运行
- `public boolean isCompleted()` - Check if computation is complete / 检查计算是否完成
- `public boolean isFailed()` - Check if computation failed / 检查计算是否失败
- `public State state()` - Get the current state / 获取当前状态
- `public <U> LazyAsync<U> map(Function<? super T, ? extends U> mapper)` - Transform the result lazily / 惰性转换结果
- `public <U> LazyAsync<U> flatMap(Function<? super T, LazyAsync<U>> mapper)` - Flat-map to another lazy async / 扁平映射到另一个惰性异步
- `public LazyAsync<T> recover(Function<Throwable, T> recovery)` - Recover from failure / 从失败恢复
- `public LazyAsync<T> orElse(LazyAsync<T> fallback)` - Provide fallback on failure / 失败时提供回退
- `public static <T1, T2, R> LazyAsync<R> combine(` - Combine two lazy async computations / 组合两个惰性异步计算
- `public static <T> LazyAsync<T> race(LazyAsync<T> la1, LazyAsync<T> la2)` - Race two lazy async computations / 竞争两个惰性异步计算
- `public CompletableFuture<T> getFuture()` - Get the underlying future if started / 获取底层 Future（如果已启动）
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### OpenFunctionalException
`public class OpenFunctionalException` - OpenFunctionalException - Base exception for functional operations / OpenFunctionalException - 函数式操作的基础异常

- `public OpenFunctionalException(String message)` - Create exception with message / 创建带消息的异常
- `public OpenFunctionalException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Create exception with message and cause / 创建带消息和原因的异常
- `public OpenFunctionalException(String errorCode, String message)` - Create exception with error code and message / 创建带错误码和消息的异常
- `public OpenFunctionalException(String errorCode, String message, Throwable cause)` - Create exception with error code, message and cause / 创建带错误码、消息和原因的异常
- `public static OpenFunctionalException computationFailed(String message)` - Create exception for computation failure / 为计算失败创建异常
- `public static OpenFunctionalException computationFailed(String message, Throwable cause)` - Create exception for computation failure with cause / 为带原因的计算失败创建异常
- `public static OpenFunctionalException noValue(String message)` - Create exception for missing value / 为缺少值创建异常
- `public static OpenFunctionalException invalidState(String message)` - Create exception for invalid state / 为无效状态创建异常
- `public static OpenFunctionalException mappingFailed(Throwable cause)` - Create exception for mapping failure / 为映射失败创建异常
- `public static OpenFunctionalException filterFailed(String message)` - Create exception for filter failure / 为过滤失败创建异常

### OpenMatchException
`public class OpenMatchException` - OpenMatchException - Exception for pattern matching failures / OpenMatchException - 模式匹配失败异常

- `public OpenMatchException(String message)` - Create exception with message / 创建带消息的异常
- `public OpenMatchException(String message, Object unmatchedValue)` - Create exception with message and unmatched value / 创建带消息和未匹配值的异常
- `public OpenMatchException(String errorCode, String message, Object unmatchedValue)` - Create exception with error code, message and unmatched value / 创建带错误码、消息和未匹配值的异常
- `public Object unmatchedValue()` - Get the value that was not matched / 获取未匹配的值
- `public static OpenMatchException noMatch(Object value)` - Create exception for no matching pattern / 为没有匹配模式创建异常
- `public static OpenMatchException exhaustive(Object value, Class<?> sealedType)` - Create exception for non-exhaustive sealed type matching / 为密封类型非完备匹配创建异常
- `public static OpenMatchException guardFailed(Object value)` - Create exception for guard condition failure / 为守卫条件失败创建异常
- `public static OpenMatchException typeMismatch(Object value, Class<?> expectedType)` - Create exception for type mismatch / 为类型不匹配创建异常

### CheckedBiConsumer
`public interface CheckedBiConsumer<T, U>` - CheckedBiConsumer - BiConsumer that can throw checked exceptions / CheckedBiConsumer - 可抛出受检异常的BiConsumer


### CheckedBiFunction
`public interface CheckedBiFunction<T, U, R>` - CheckedBiFunction - BiFunction that can throw checked exceptions / CheckedBiFunction - 可抛出受检异常的BiFunction


### CheckedFunction
`public interface CheckedFunction<T, R>` - CheckedFunction - Function that can throw checked exceptions / CheckedFunction - 可抛出受检异常的Function


### FunctionUtil
`public final class FunctionUtil` - FunctionUtil - Function composition, currying, and memoization utilities / FunctionUtil - 函数组合、柯里化和记忆化工具

- `public static <A, B, C> Function<A, C> compose(` - Compose two functions: g(f(x)) / 组合两个函数：g(f(x))
- `public static <A, B, C, D> Function<A, D> compose(` - Compose three functions: h(g(f(x))) / 组合三个函数：h(g(f(x)))
- `public static <A, B, R> Function<A, Function<B, R>> curry(BiFunction<A, B, R> f)` - Curry a BiFunction to a curried function / 将 BiFunction 柯里化
- `public static <T1, T2, T3, R> Function<T1, Function<T2, Function<T3, R>>> curry(` - Curry a TriFunction to a curried function / 将 TriFunction 柯里化
- `public static <A, B, R> BiFunction<A, B, R> uncurry(Function<A, Function<B, R>> f)` - Uncurry a curried function back to BiFunction / 将柯里化函数还原为 BiFunction
- `public static <A, B, R> Function<B, R> partial(BiFunction<A, B, R> f, A a)` - Partial application - fix the first argument / 部分应用 - 固定第一个参数
- `public static <A, B, R> Function<A, R> partialRight(BiFunction<A, B, R> f, B b)` - Partial application - fix the second argument / 部分应用 - 固定第二个参数
- `public static <A, B, R> BiFunction<B, A, R> flip(BiFunction<A, B, R> f)` - Flip the arguments of a BiFunction / 翻转 BiFunction 的参数
- `public static <T, R> Function<T, R> memoize(Function<T, R> f)` - Memoize a function - cache results for repeated calls / 记忆化函数 - 缓存重复调用的结果
- `public static <T, R> Function<T, R> memoize(Function<T, R> f, int maxSize)` - Memoize a function with specified maximum cache size / 使用指定最大缓存大小记忆化函数
- `public static <T> Supplier<T> memoize(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Memoize a Supplier - cache the result of first call / 记忆化 Supplier - 缓存首次调用的结果
- `public static <T, R> Function<T, R> unchecked(CheckedFunction<T, R> f)` - Convert CheckedFunction to standard Function (wrapping exceptions) / 将CheckedFunction转换为标准Function（包装异常）
- `public static <T, U, R> BiFunction<T, U, R> unchecked(CheckedBiFunction<T, U, R> f)` - Convert CheckedBiFunction to standard BiFunction (wrapping exceptions) / 将CheckedBiFunction转换为标准BiFunction（包装异常）
- `public static <T> Function<T, T> identity()` - Identity function - returns its input unchanged / 恒等函数 - 原样返回输入
- `public static <T, R> Function<T, R> constant(R value)` - Constant function - always returns the same value / 常量函数 - 始终返回相同的值
- `public static <T> java.util.function.Predicate<T> not(` - Predicate negation / 谓词取反

### TriFunction
`public interface TriFunction<T1, T2, T3, R>` - TriFunction - Three-argument function / TriFunction - 三参函数


### Either
`public sealed interface Either<L, R>` - Either Monad - Represents one of two possible values (Left or Right) / Either单子 - 表示两个可能值之一（Left或Right）


### For
`public final class For` - For - For-comprehension for simplified flatMap operations / For - 简化flatMap操作的For表达式

- `public static <T> OptionFor1<T> of(Option<T> option)` - Start a for-comprehension with an Option. / 使用 Option 开始 for 表达式。
- `public static <T> TryFor1<T> of(Try<T> t)` - Start a for-comprehension with a Try. / 使用 Try 开始 for 表达式。
- `public static <T> IterableFor1<T> of(Iterable<T> iterable)` - Start a for-comprehension with an Iterable. / 使用 Iterable 开始 for 表达式。
- `public static <T> SequenceFor1<T> of(Sequence<T> sequence)` - Start a for-comprehension with a Sequence. / 使用 Sequence 开始 for 表达式。

### Lazy
`public final class Lazy<T>` - Lazy - Lazy evaluation container / Lazy - 惰性求值容器

- `public static <T> Lazy<T> of(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Create a Lazy from supplier / 从供应商创建 Lazy
- `public static <T> Lazy<T> value(T value)` - Create an already-evaluated Lazy with value / 创建已求值的 Lazy
- `public T get()` - Get the value, computing if necessary / 获取值，必要时进行计算
- `public boolean isEvaluated()` - Check if the value has been evaluated / 检查值是否已被求值
- `public <U> Lazy<U> map(Function<? super T, ? extends U> mapper)` - Transform the value lazily / 惰性转换值
- `public <U> Lazy<U> flatMap(Function<? super T, Lazy<U>> mapper)` - Transform to another Lazy lazily / 惰性转换为另一个 Lazy
- `public Lazy<T> filter(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Filter the value lazily / 惰性过滤值
- `public T getOrElse(T defaultValue)` - Get value or default if evaluation throws / 获取值或默认值（如果求值抛出异常）
- `public T getOrElse(Supplier<? extends T> supplier)` - Get value or compute default if evaluation throws / 获取值或计算默认值（如果求值抛出异常）
- `public Try<T> toTry()` - Convert to Try / 转换为 Try
- `public Option<T> toOption()` - Convert to Option / 转换为 Option
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### Option
`public sealed interface Option<T>` - Option Monad - Enhanced Optional with more functional operations / Option单子 - 增强型Optional，提供更多函数式操作


### Sequence
`public final class Sequence<T>` - Sequence - Lazy evaluated sequence / Sequence - 惰性求值序列

- `public static <T> Sequence<T> empty()` - Create an empty sequence. / 创建空序列。
- `public static <T> Sequence<T> of(T... elements)` - Create a sequence from elements. / 从元素创建序列。
- `public static <T> Sequence<T> from(Iterable<T> iterable)` - Create a sequence from iterable. / 从可迭代对象创建序列。
- `public static <T> Sequence<T> fromStream(Stream<T> stream)` - Create a sequence from stream (single-use). / 从流创建序列（一次性使用）。
- `public static <T> Sequence<T> iterate(T seed, UnaryOperator<T> f)` - Create an infinite sequence by repeatedly applying a function. / 通过重复应用函数创建无限序列。
- `public static <T> Sequence<T> generate(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Create an infinite sequence from a supplier. / 从供应商创建无限序列。
- `public static Sequence<Integer> range(int start, int end)` - Create a sequence of integers from start (inclusive) to end (exclusive). / 创建从开始（包含）到结束（排除）的整数序列。
- `public static Sequence<Integer> rangeClosed(int start, int end)` - Create a sequence of integers from start (inclusive) to end (inclusive). / 创建从开始（包含）到结束（包含）的整数序列。
- `public <R> Sequence<R> map(Function<? super T, ? extends R> mapper)` - Map each element to a new value. / 将每个元素映射为新值。
- `public <R> Sequence<R> flatMap(Function<? super T, ? extends Sequence<R>> mapper)` - Map each element to a sequence and flatten. / 将每个元素映射为序列并展平。
- `public Sequence<T> filter(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Filter elements matching the predicate. / 过滤匹配谓词的元素。
- `public Sequence<T> filterNot(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Filter elements not matching the predicate. / 过滤不匹配谓词的元素。
- `public Sequence<T> take(int n)` - Take only the first n elements. / 只取前 n 个元素。
- `public Sequence<T> takeWhile(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Take elements while predicate is true. / 取元素直到谓词为假。
- `public Sequence<T> drop(int n)` - Drop the first n elements. / 丢弃前 n 个元素。
- `public Sequence<T> dropWhile(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Drop elements while predicate is true. / 丢弃元素直到谓词为假。
- `public Sequence<T> distinct()` - Remove duplicate elements. / 移除重复元素。
- `public Sequence<T> sorted()` - Sort the sequence by natural order. / 按自然顺序排序序列。
- `public Sequence<T> sorted(Comparator<? super T> comparator)` - Sort the sequence by comparator. / 按比较器排序序列。
- `public <U, R> Sequence<R> zip(Sequence<U> other, BiFunction<? super T, ? super U, ? extends R> zipper)` - Zip with another sequence. / 与另一个序列合并。
- `public Sequence<IndexedValue<T>> zipWithIndex()` - Zip with index. / 与索引合并。
- `public <R> R fold(R initial, BiFunction<? super R, ? super T, ? extends R> folder)` - Fold elements from left with initial value. / 从左侧使用初始值折叠元素。
- `public Optional<T> reduce(BinaryOperator<T> reducer)` - Reduce elements (no initial value). / 归约元素（无初始值）。
- `public List<T> toList()` - Collect to a list. / 收集为列表。
- `public Set<T> toSet()` - Collect to a set. / 收集为集合。
- `public <R, A> R collect(Collector<? super T, A, R> collector)` - Collect using a collector. / 使用收集器收集。
- `public Optional<T> find(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Find first element matching predicate. / 查找第一个匹配谓词的元素。
- `public Optional<T> first()` - Find first element. / 查找第一个元素。
- `public Optional<T> last()` - Find last element. / 查找最后一个元素。
- `public boolean any(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Check if any element matches predicate. / 检查是否有任何元素匹配谓词。
- `public boolean all(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Check if all elements match predicate. / 检查是否所有元素都匹配谓词。
- `public boolean none(Predicate<? super T> predicate)` - Check if no elements match predicate. / 检查是否没有元素匹配谓词。
- `public long count()` - Count elements. / 计数元素。
- `public void forEach(Consumer<? super T> action)` - Perform action on each element. / 对每个元素执行操作。
- `public Stream<T> toStream()` - Convert to stream. / 转换为流。
- `public Iterator<T> iterator()` - Returns an iterator over elements / 返回遍历元素的迭代器
- `public record IndexedValue<T>(int index, T value)` - Value with its index. / 带索引的值。

### Trampoline
`public sealed interface Trampoline<T>` - Trampoline - Stack-safe recursion using trampolining / Trampoline - 使用蹦床模式的栈安全递归


### Try
`public sealed interface Try<T>` - Try Monad - Encapsulates computations that may fail / Try Monad - 封装可能失败的计算


### Validation
`public sealed interface Validation<E, T>` - Validation Monad - Accumulating error validation / Validation Monad - 累积错误的验证


### Lens
`public final class Lens<S, A>` - Lens - Functional lens for immutable data access and modification / Lens - 用于不可变数据访问和修改的函数式透镜

- `public static <S, A> Lens<S, A> of(Function<S, A> getter, BiFunction<S, A, S> setter)` - Create a lens from getter and setter / 从 getter 和 setter 创建透镜
- `public static <S> Lens<S, S> identity()` - Create an identity lens / 创建恒等透镜
- `public A get(S source)` - Get the focused value from the source / 从源获取聚焦的值
- `public S set(S source, A value)` - Set the focused value, returning a new source / 设置聚焦的值，返回新的源
- `public S modify(S source, UnaryOperator<A> modifier)` - Modify the focused value using a function / 使用函数修改聚焦的值
- `public UnaryOperator<S> modifier(UnaryOperator<A> modifier)` - Create a modifier function for this lens / 为此透镜创建修改器函数
- `public <B> Lens<S, B> andThen(Lens<A, B> other)` - Compose with another lens (this lens first, then other) / 与另一个透镜组合（先应用此透镜，然后其他）
- `public <T> Lens<T, A> compose(Lens<T, S> other)` - Compose with another lens (other lens first, then this) / 与另一个透镜组合（先应用其他，然后应用此）
- `public OptionalLens<S, A> asOptional()` - Convert to an OptionalLens / 转换为 OptionalLens
- `public Function<S, A> getter()` - Get the getter function / 获取 getter 函数
- `public BiFunction<S, A, S> setter()` - Get the setter function / 获取 setter 函数
- `public static <S, A> Lens<S, A> forRecord(Function<S, A> getter,` - Create a lens for a record component / 为 record 组件创建透镜
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### OptionalLens
`public final class OptionalLens<S, A>` - OptionalLens - Functional lens for optional data access / OptionalLens - 用于可选数据访问的函数式透镜

- `public static <S, A> OptionalLens<S, A> of(Function<S, Optional<A>> getter,` - Create an optional lens from getter and setter / 从 getter 和 setter 创建可选透镜
- `public static <S, A> OptionalLens<S, A> ofNullable(Function<S, A> getter,` - Create an optional lens from nullable getter / 从可空 getter 创建可选透镜
- `public static <S, A> OptionalLens<S, A> fromLens(Lens<S, A> lens)` - Create from a regular lens / 从常规透镜创建
- `public Optional<A> get(S source)` - Get the optional focused value / 获取可选的聚焦值
- `public A getOrElse(S source, A defaultValue)` - Get the focused value or default / 获取聚焦值或默认值
- `public boolean isPresent(S source)` - Check if the focused value is present / 检查聚焦值是否存在
- `public S set(S source, A value)` - Set the focused value / 设置聚焦值
- `public S setIfPresent(S source, Optional<A> value)` - Set the focused value if present in Optional / 如果 Optional 中存在则设置聚焦值
- `public S modify(S source, UnaryOperator<A> modifier)` - Modify the focused value if present / 如果存在则修改聚焦值
- `public S modifyOrSet(S source, UnaryOperator<A> modifier, A defaultValue)` - Modify the focused value, or set default if not present / 修改聚焦值，如果不存在则设置默认值
- `public <B> OptionalLens<S, B> andThen(OptionalLens<A, B> other)` - Compose with another optional lens / 与另一个可选透镜组合
- `public <B> OptionalLens<S, B> andThen(Lens<A, B> other)` - Compose with a regular lens / 与常规透镜组合
- `public <T> OptionalLens<T, A> compose(OptionalLens<T, S> other)` - Compose with this lens (other first, then this) / 与此透镜组合（先其他，然后此）
- `public <T> OptionalLens<T, A> compose(Lens<T, S> other)` - Compose with a regular lens (other first, then this) / 与常规透镜组合（先其他，然后此）
- `public Function<S, Optional<A>> getter()` - Get the getter function / 获取 getter 函数
- `public BiFunction<S, A, S> setter()` - Get the setter function / 获取 setter 函数
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### Case
`public final class Case<T, R>` - Case - Match case definition combining pattern and action / Case - 组合模式和动作的匹配分支定义

- `public static <T, U, R> Case<T, R> type(Class<U> type, Function<? super U, ? extends R> action)` - Create a case for type matching / 创建类型匹配分支
- `public static <T, R> Case<T, R> when(Predicate<? super T> predicate,` - Create a case for predicate matching / 创建谓词匹配分支
- `public static <T, R> Case<T, R> equals(T expected, Function<? super T, ? extends R> action)` - Create a case for value equality matching / 创建值相等匹配分支
- `public static <T, R> Case<T, R> isNull(Function<? super T, ? extends R> action)` - Create a case for null matching / 创建 null 匹配分支
- `public static <T, R> Case<T, R> otherwise(Function<? super T, ? extends R> action)` - Create a default case that always matches / 创建始终匹配的默认分支
- `public static <T, U, R> Case<T, R> of(Pattern<T, U> pattern,` - Create a case from a custom pattern / 从自定义模式创建分支
- `public Optional<R> apply(T value)` - Try to apply this case to a value / 尝试将此分支应用于值
- `public boolean matches(T value)` - Check if this case matches the value / 检查此分支是否匹配值
- `public Pattern<T, ?> pattern()` - Get the pattern / 获取模式
- `public Function<? super T, ? extends R> action()` - Get the action / 获取动作

### OpenMatch
`public final class OpenMatch` - OpenMatch - Pattern matching entry point / OpenMatch - 模式匹配入口

- `public static <T> Matcher<T> of(T value)` - Start pattern matching on a value / 开始对值进行模式匹配

### Pattern
`public interface Pattern<T, R>` - Pattern - Pattern interface for matching values / Pattern - 用于匹配值的模式接口


### PipeUtil
`public final class PipeUtil` - PipeUtil - Utility methods for pipeline operations / PipeUtil - 管道操作的工具方法

- `public static <T> Pipe<T> pipe(T value)` - Start a pipe chain with a value / 以值开始管道链
- `public static <T> T when(boolean condition, T value, UnaryOperator<T> function)` - Execute transformation conditionally / 条件执行转换
- `public static <T, R> R whenNonNull(T value, Function<? super T, ? extends R> function)` - Execute transformation if value is non-null / 如果值非空则执行转换
- `public static <T, R> R whenNonNullOrElse(T value, Function<? super T, ? extends R> function, R defaultValue)` - Execute transformation if value is non-null, with default / 如果值非空则执行转换，带默认值
- `public static <T> T whenMatches(T value, Predicate<? super T> predicate, UnaryOperator<T> function)` - Execute transformation if predicate matches / 如果谓词匹配则执行转换
- `public static <T> T tap(T value, Consumer<? super T> consumer)` - Execute side effect and return value / 执行副作用并返回值
- `public static <T> T tapIfPresent(T value, Consumer<? super T> consumer)` - Execute side effect if value is non-null / 如果值非空则执行副作用
- `public static <T, R> List<R> transform(Collection<T> collection, Function<? super T, ? extends R> mapper)` - Transform a collection / 转换集合
- `public static <T, R> List<R> filterAndTransform(Collection<T> collection,` - Filter and transform a collection / 过滤并转换集合
- `public static <T> List<T> filterNonNull(Collection<T> collection)` - Filter a collection removing nulls / 过滤集合移除 null
- `public static <T, U, R> Function<T, R> chain(Function<? super T, ? extends U> first,` - Chain two functions / 链接两个函数
- `public static <T, U, V, R> Function<T, R> chain(Function<? super T, ? extends U> first,` - Chain three functions / 链接三个函数
- `public static <T> UnaryOperator<T> sequence(UnaryOperator<T>... transformations)` - Create a transformation that applies multiple transformations in order / 创建按顺序应用多个转换的转换
- `public static <T, R> R apply(T value, Function<? super T, ? extends R> function)` - Apply a value to a function (reverse application) / 将值应用于函数（反向应用）

### Pipeline
`public final class Pipeline<T, R>` - Pipeline - Composable data transformation pipeline / Pipeline - 可组合的数据转换管道

- `public static <T> PipelineBuilder<T> of(T value)` - Create a pipeline starting with a value / 创建以值开始的管道
- `public static <T> Pipeline<T, T> identity()` - Create an identity pipeline / 创建恒等管道
- `public static <T, R> Pipeline<T, R> from(Function<T, R> function)` - Create a pipeline from a function / 从函数创建管道
- `public static <T> CollectionPipeline<T, T> ofCollection(Collection<T> collection)` - Create a collection pipeline / 创建集合管道
- `public R apply(T input)` - Apply the pipeline to a value / 将管道应用于值
- `public Try<R> applyTry(T input)` - Apply the pipeline safely, returning Try / 安全地应用管道，返回 Try
- `public <U> Pipeline<T, U> andThen(Function<? super R, ? extends U> mapper)` - Chain another transformation / 链接另一个转换
- `public <V> Pipeline<V, R> compose(Pipeline<V, T> before)` - Compose with another pipeline / 与另一个管道组合
- `public Function<T, R> toFunction()` - Get the underlying function / 获取底层函数

### RecordUtil
`public final class RecordUtil` - RecordUtil - Utilities for working with Java Records / RecordUtil - 用于处理Java Records的工具

- `public static boolean isRecord(Class<?> clazz)` - Check if a class is a record / 检查类是否为 record
- `public static boolean isRecordInstance(Object obj)` - Check if an object is a record instance / 检查对象是否为 record 实例
- `public static List<String> componentNames(Class<? extends Record> recordClass)` - Get the names of record components / 获取 record 组件的名称
- `public static List<Class<?>> componentTypes(Class<? extends Record> recordClass)` - Get the types of record components / 获取 record 组件的类型
- `public static int componentCount(Class<? extends Record> recordClass)` - Get record component count / 获取 record 组件数量
- `public static List<Object> componentValues(Record record)` - Get all component values from a record / 从 record 获取所有组件值
- `public static <T> T getComponent(Record record, String componentName)` - Get a specific component value by name / 按名称获取特定组件值
- `public static <T> Try<T> getComponentTry(Record record, String componentName)` - Get component value as Try / 获取组件值为 Try
- `public static <R extends Record> R copy(R record, Map<String, Object> modifications)` - Copy a record with modifications / 带修改复制 record
- `public static <R extends Record> R copyWith(R record, String componentName, Object newValue)` - Copy a record modifying single component / 复制 record 修改单个组件
- `public static <R extends Record, T> R copyTransforming(R record, String componentName,` - Copy a record transforming a component / 复制 record 转换组件
- `public static <R extends Record, T> Lens<R, T> lens(Class<R> recordClass, String componentName)` - Create a lens for a record component / 为 record 组件创建透镜
- `public static <R extends Record> Map<String, Lens<R, ?>> lenses(Class<R> recordClass)` - Create lenses for all components / 为所有组件创建透镜
- `public static Map<String, Object> toMap(Record record)` - Convert record to Map / 将 record 转换为 Map
- `public static <R extends Record> R fromMap(Class<R> recordClass, Map<String, Object> map)` - Create record from Map / 从 Map 创建 record
- `public static Try<Map<String, Object>> toMapTry(Record record)` - Convert record to Map as Try / 将 record 转换为 Map 作为 Try
- `public static <R extends Record> Try<R> fromMapTry(Class<R> recordClass, Map<String, Object> map)` - Create record from Map as Try / 从 Map 创建 record 作为 Try
- `public static Map<String, Object[]> diff(Record r1, Record r2)` - Compare two records by components / 按组件比较两个 record
- `public static <R extends Record> Function<Object[], R> factory(Class<R> recordClass)` - Create a factory function for a record type / 为 record 类型创建工厂函数
- `public static <R extends Record, A, B> BiFunction<A, B, R> factory2(Class<R> recordClass)` - Create a two-argument factory for records with 2 components / 为有2个组件的record创建双参数工厂
- `public static boolean hasComponent(Class<? extends Record> recordClass, String componentName)` - Check if record has component with name / 检查 record 是否有指定名称的组件

---

## 6. opencode-base-crypto

密码学组件，提供对称/非对称加密、摘要、签名、密码哈希、JWT、PGP、密钥交换、SSL

### OpenAsymmetric
`public final class OpenAsymmetric` - Asymmetric encryption facade for encrypt/decrypt operations - Provides convenient API for asymmetric encryption / 非对称加密门面 - 提供便捷的非对称加密API

- `public static OpenAsymmetric rsaOaep()` - Create RSA-OAEP cipher (recommended) / 创建 RSA-OAEP 加密（推荐）
- `public static OpenAsymmetric rsa()` - Create RSA-PKCS1 cipher / 创建 RSA-PKCS1 加密
- `public static OpenAsymmetric ecc()` - Create ECC cipher (ECIES) / 创建 ECC 加密（ECIES）
- `public static OpenAsymmetric sm2()` - Create SM2 cipher (requires Bouncy Castle) / 创建 SM2 加密（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenAsymmetric of(AsymmetricAlgorithm algorithm)` - Create cipher by algorithm enum / 根据算法枚举创建加密器
- `public OpenAsymmetric setPrivateKey(PrivateKey privateKey)` - Set private key for decryption / 设置解密私钥
- `public OpenAsymmetric setPublicKey(PublicKey publicKey)` - Set public key for encryption / 设置加密公钥
- `public OpenAsymmetric setKeyPair(KeyPair keyPair)` - Set key pair / 设置密钥对
- `public byte[] encrypt(byte[] plaintext)` - Encrypt data with public key / 使用公钥加密数据
- `public byte[] encrypt(String plaintext)` - Encrypt string (UTF-8) / 加密字符串（UTF-8）
- `public String encryptHex(byte[] plaintext)` - Encrypt and return as hex string / 加密并返回十六进制字符串
- `public String encryptHex(String plaintext)` - Encrypt string and return as hex string / 加密字符串并返回十六进制字符串
- `public String encryptBase64(byte[] plaintext)` - Encrypt and return as Base64 string / 加密并返回 Base64 字符串
- `public String encryptBase64(String plaintext)` - Encrypt string and return as Base64 string / 加密字符串并返回 Base64 字符串
- `public byte[] decrypt(byte[] ciphertext)` - Decrypt data with private key / 使用私钥解密数据
- `public String decryptToString(byte[] ciphertext)` - Decrypt and return as string (UTF-8) / 解密并返回字符串（UTF-8）
- `public byte[] decryptHex(String hexCiphertext)` - Decrypt hex-encoded ciphertext / 解密十六进制编码的密文
- `public String decryptHexToString(String hexCiphertext)` - Decrypt hex-encoded ciphertext to string / 解密十六进制编码的密文为字符串
- `public byte[] decryptBase64(String base64Ciphertext)` - Decrypt Base64-encoded ciphertext / 解密 Base64 编码的密文
- `public String decryptBase64ToString(String base64Ciphertext)` - Decrypt Base64-encoded ciphertext to string / 解密 Base64 编码的密文为字符串
- `public KeyPair generateKeyPair()` - Generate key pair for this algorithm / 生成此算法的密钥对
- `public OpenAsymmetric withGeneratedKeyPair()` - Generate key pair and set it / 生成密钥对并设置
- `public String getAlgorithm()` - Get algorithm name / 获取算法名称
- `public int getMaxEncryptSize()` - Get maximum encrypt size in bytes / 获取最大加密大小（字节）

### OpenCrypto
`public final class OpenCrypto` - Main facade class for cryptographic operations - Provides simplified access to cryptographic primitives / 加密操作的主门面类 - 提供对加密原语的简化访问

- `public static OpenDigest sha256()` - SHA-256 digester / SHA-256 摘要器
- `public static OpenDigest sha384()` - SHA-384 digester / SHA-384 摘要器
- `public static OpenDigest sha512()` - SHA-512 digester / SHA-512 摘要器
- `public static OpenDigest sha3_256()` - SHA3-256 digester / SHA3-256 摘要器
- `public static OpenDigest sha3_512()` - SHA3-512 digester / SHA3-512 摘要器
- `public static OpenDigest sm3()` - SM3 digester (requires Bouncy Castle) / SM3 摘要器（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenDigest blake2b()` - BLAKE2b digester (requires Bouncy Castle) / BLAKE2b 摘要器（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenDigest blake3()` - BLAKE3 digester (requires Bouncy Castle) / BLAKE3 摘要器（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenDigest digester(DigestAlgorithm algorithm)` - Custom digester by algorithm / 自定义摘要器
- `public static AeadCipher aesGcm()` - AES-GCM cipher (recommended) / AES-GCM 加密（推荐）
- `public static AeadCipher aesGcm256()` - AES-256-GCM cipher / AES-256-GCM 加密
- `public static OpenSymmetric aesCbc()` - AES-CBC cipher / AES-CBC 加密
- `public static AeadCipher chacha20Poly1305()` - ChaCha20-Poly1305 cipher / ChaCha20-Poly1305 加密
- `public static AeadCipher sm4Gcm()` - SM4-GCM cipher (requires Bouncy Castle) / SM4-GCM 加密（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static Sm4Cipher sm4Cbc()` - SM4-CBC cipher (requires Bouncy Castle) / SM4-CBC 加密（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenSymmetric symmetric(SymmetricAlgorithm algorithm)` - Custom symmetric cipher / 自定义对称加密
- `public static OpenAsymmetric rsaOaep()` - RSA-OAEP-SHA256 cipher (recommended) / RSA-OAEP-SHA256 加密（推荐）
- `public static OpenAsymmetric rsa()` - RSA-PKCS1 cipher / RSA-PKCS1 加密
- `public static OpenAsymmetric sm2()` - SM2 cipher (requires Bouncy Castle) / SM2 加密（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenAsymmetric asymmetric(AsymmetricAlgorithm algorithm)` - Custom asymmetric cipher / 自定义非对称加密
- `public static OpenSign ed25519()` - Ed25519 signer (recommended) / Ed25519 签名（推荐）
- `public static OpenSign ed448()` - Ed448 signer / Ed448 签名
- `public static OpenSign ecdsaP256()` - ECDSA P-256 signer / ECDSA P-256 签名
- `public static OpenSign ecdsaP384()` - ECDSA P-384 signer / ECDSA P-384 签名
- `public static OpenSign sha256WithRsa()` - RSA-SHA256 signer / RSA-SHA256 签名
- `public static OpenSign rsaPss()` - RSA-PSS-SHA256 signer / RSA-PSS-SHA256 签名
- `public static OpenSign sm2Sign()` - SM2 signer (requires Bouncy Castle) / SM2 签名（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenSign signer(SignatureAlgorithm algorithm)` - Custom signer / 自定义签名器
- `public static PasswordHash argon2()` - Argon2id password hash (recommended) / Argon2id 密码哈希（推荐）
- `public static PasswordHash bcrypt()` - BCrypt password hash / BCrypt 密码哈希
- `public static PasswordHash scrypt()` - SCrypt password hash / SCrypt 密码哈希
- `public static PasswordHash pbkdf2()` - PBKDF2 password hash / PBKDF2 密码哈希
- `public static Mac hmacSha256(byte[] key)` - HMAC-SHA256 / HMAC-SHA256
- `public static Mac hmacSha512(byte[] key)` - HMAC-SHA512 / HMAC-SHA512
- `public static Hkdf hkdf()` - HKDF-SHA256 / HKDF-SHA256
- `public static Pbkdf2 pbkdf2Kdf()` - PBKDF2-SHA256 KDF / PBKDF2-SHA256 密钥派生
- `public static Argon2Kdf argon2Kdf()` - Argon2 KDF (requires Bouncy Castle) / Argon2 密钥派生（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static KeyExchangeEngine x25519()` - X25519 key exchange (recommended) / X25519 密钥协商（推荐）
- `public static KeyExchangeEngine ecdhP256()` - ECDH P-256 key exchange / ECDH P-256 密钥协商
- `public static EnvelopeCrypto envelope()` - Envelope encryption (RSA + AES-GCM) / 信封加密（RSA + AES-GCM）
- `public static HybridCrypto hybrid()` - Hybrid encryption (public key encrypts symmetric key) / 混合加密（公钥加密对称密钥）

### OpenDigest
`public final class OpenDigest` - Message digest facade for computing hash digests - Provides convenient API for hash computation / 消息摘要门面 - 提供便捷的哈希计算API

- `public static OpenDigest sha256()` - Create SHA-256 digester / 创建 SHA-256 摘要器
- `public static OpenDigest sha384()` - Create SHA-384 digester / 创建 SHA-384 摘要器
- `public static OpenDigest sha512()` - Create SHA-512 digester / 创建 SHA-512 摘要器
- `public static OpenDigest sha3_256()` - Create SHA3-256 digester / 创建 SHA3-256 摘要器
- `public static OpenDigest sha3_512()` - Create SHA3-512 digester / 创建 SHA3-512 摘要器
- `public static OpenDigest sm3()` - Create SM3 digester (requires Bouncy Castle) / 创建 SM3 摘要器（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenDigest blake2b(int digestLength)` - Create BLAKE2b digester (requires Bouncy Castle) / 创建BLAKE2b摘要器（需要Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenDigest blake3()` - Create BLAKE3 digester (requires Bouncy Castle) / 创建BLAKE3摘要器（需要Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenDigest of(DigestAlgorithm algorithm)` - Create digester by algorithm enum / 根据算法枚举创建摘要器
- `public byte[] digest(byte[] data)` - Compute digest of byte array / 计算字节数组的摘要
- `public byte[] digest(String data)` - Compute digest of string (UTF-8) / 计算字符串的摘要（UTF-8）
- `public String digestHex(byte[] data)` - Compute digest and return as hex string / 计算摘要并返回十六进制字符串
- `public String digestHex(String data)` - Compute digest of string and return as hex string / 计算字符串摘要并返回十六进制字符串
- `public String digestBase64(byte[] data)` - Compute digest and return as Base64 string / 计算摘要并返回 Base64 字符串
- `public String digestBase64(String data)` - Compute digest of string and return as Base64 string / 计算字符串摘要并返回 Base64 字符串
- `public byte[] digestFile(Path file)` - Compute digest of file / 计算文件摘要
- `public String digestFileHex(Path file)` - Compute digest of file and return as hex string / 计算文件摘要并返回十六进制字符串
- `public byte[] digest(InputStream input)` - Compute digest of input stream / 计算输入流摘要
- `public String digestHex(InputStream input)` - Compute digest of input stream and return as hex string / 计算输入流摘要并返回十六进制字符串
- `public OpenDigest update(byte[] data)` - Update digest with data / 更新摘要数据
- `public OpenDigest update(byte[] data, int offset, int length)` - Update digest with partial data / 更新摘要部分数据
- `public OpenDigest update(String data)` - Update digest with string (UTF-8) / 更新摘要字符串（UTF-8）
- `public OpenDigest update(ByteBuffer buffer)` - Update digest with ByteBuffer / 更新摘要 ByteBuffer
- `public byte[] doFinal()` - Complete computation and return digest / 完成计算并返回摘要
- `public String doFinalHex()` - Complete computation and return as hex string / 完成计算并返回十六进制字符串
- `public String doFinalBase64()` - Complete computation and return as Base64 string / 完成计算并返回 Base64 字符串
- `public OpenDigest reset()` - Reset digest state / 重置摘要状态
- `public String getAlgorithm()` - Get algorithm name / 获取算法名称
- `public int getDigestLength()` - Get digest length in bytes / 获取摘要长度（字节）

### OpenJwt
`public final class OpenJwt` - OpenJWT Facade - Simplified API for JWT operations / OpenJWT门面类 - 简化的JWT操作API

- `public static String sign(String subject, String secret, Duration expiration)` - Creates a JWT with HMAC-SHA256. / 使用 HMAC-SHA256 创建 JWT。
- `public static String sign(JwtClaims claims, String secret)` - Creates a JWT with HMAC-SHA256 using JwtClaims. / 使用 JwtClaims 和 HMAC-SHA256 创建 JWT。
- `public static String sign(JwtClaims claims, String secret, JwtAlgorithm algorithm)` - Creates a JWT with specified HMAC algorithm. / 使用指定的 HMAC 算法创建 JWT。
- `public static String signRsa(String subject, PrivateKey privateKey, Duration expiration)` - Creates a JWT with RSA-SHA256. / 使用 RSA-SHA256 创建 JWT。
- `public static String signRsa(JwtClaims claims, PrivateKey privateKey)` - Creates a JWT with RSA-SHA256 using JwtClaims. / 使用 JwtClaims 和 RSA-SHA256 创建 JWT。
- `public static String signRsa(JwtClaims claims, PrivateKey privateKey, JwtAlgorithm algorithm)` - Creates a JWT with specified RSA algorithm. / 使用指定的 RSA 算法创建 JWT。
- `public static String signEc(String subject, PrivateKey privateKey, Duration expiration)` - Creates a JWT with ECDSA-SHA256. / 使用 ECDSA-SHA256 创建 JWT。
- `public static String signEc(JwtClaims claims, PrivateKey privateKey)` - Creates a JWT with ECDSA-SHA256 using JwtClaims. / 使用 JwtClaims 和 ECDSA-SHA256 创建 JWT。
- `public static String signEc(JwtClaims claims, PrivateKey privateKey, JwtAlgorithm algorithm)` - Creates a JWT with specified ECDSA algorithm. / 使用指定的 ECDSA 算法创建 JWT。
- `public static JwtClaims verify(String token, String secret)` - Verifies a JWT with HMAC secret. / 使用 HMAC 密钥验证 JWT。
- `public static JwtClaims verify(String token, PublicKey publicKey)` - Verifies a JWT with public key. / 使用公钥验证 JWT。
- `public static JwtClaims parseUnsafe(String token)` - Parses a JWT without verification (unsafe). / 解析 JWT 但不验证（不安全）。
- `public static KeyPair generateRsaKeyPair()` - Generates an RSA key pair for JWT signing. / 生成用于 JWT 签名的 RSA 密钥对。
- `public static KeyPair generateRsaKeyPair(int keySize)` - Generates an RSA key pair with specified key size. / 生成指定密钥大小的 RSA 密钥对。
- `public static KeyPair generateEcKeyPair()` - Generates an EC key pair for JWT signing. / 生成用于 JWT 签名的 EC 密钥对。
- `public static KeyPair generateEcKeyPair(String curveName)` - Generates an EC key pair with specified curve. / 生成指定曲线的 EC 密钥对。
- `public static JwtUtil.Builder builder()` - Creates a new JWT builder for advanced configuration. / 创建新的 JWT 构建器用于高级配置。
- `public static JwtClaims.Builder claims()` - Creates a new claims builder. / 创建新的声明构建器。

### OpenPasswordHash
`public final class OpenPasswordHash` - Password hashing facade for secure password storage - Provides convenient API for password hashing and verification / 密码哈希门面类 - 提供便捷的密码哈希和验证 API

- `public static OpenPasswordHash argon2()` - Create Argon2id password hasher (recommended) / 创建 Argon2id 密码哈希器（推荐）
- `public static OpenPasswordHash bcrypt()` - Create BCrypt password hasher / 创建 BCrypt 密码哈希器
- `public static OpenPasswordHash bcrypt(int cost)` - Create BCrypt password hasher with custom cost / 创建自定义代价的 BCrypt 密码哈希器
- `public static OpenPasswordHash scrypt()` - Create SCrypt password hasher / 创建 SCrypt 密码哈希器
- `public static OpenPasswordHash pbkdf2()` - Create PBKDF2 password hasher / 创建 PBKDF2 密码哈希器
- `public static OpenPasswordHash pbkdf2(int iterations)` - Create PBKDF2 password hasher with custom iterations / 创建自定义迭代次数的 PBKDF2 密码哈希器
- `public static OpenPasswordHash of(PasswordHashAlgorithm algorithm)` - Create password hasher by algorithm enum / 根据算法枚举创建密码哈希器
- `public String hash(String password)` - Hash password / 哈希密码
- `public String hash(char[] password)` - Hash password from char array (more secure) / 从字符数组哈希密码（更安全）
- `public boolean verify(String password, String hash)` - Verify password against hash / 验证密码与哈希
- `public boolean verify(char[] password, String hash)` - Verify password from char array against hash / 验证字符数组密码与哈希
- `public boolean needsRehash(String hash)` - Check if hash needs to be upgraded / 检查哈希是否需要升级
- `public static PasswordPolicy defaultPolicy()` - Get default password policy / 获取默认密码策略
- `public static PasswordPolicy strongPolicy()` - Get strong password policy / 获取强密码策略
- `public String getAlgorithm()` - Get algorithm name / 获取算法名称

### OpenPgp
`public final class OpenPgp` - OpenPGP Facade - Simplified API for PGP encryption and decryption / OpenPGP 门面类 - 简化的 PGP 加密和解密 API

- `public static PgpKeyPair generateKeyPair(String userId, String passphrase)` - Generates a new PGP key pair with default 4096-bit RSA. / 使用默认的 4096 位 RSA 生成新的 PGP 密钥对。
- `public static PgpKeyPair generateKeyPair(String userId, String passphrase, int keySize)` - Generates a new PGP key pair with specified key size. / 使用指定密钥大小生成新的 PGP 密钥对。
- `public static String encrypt(String plaintext, PGPPublicKey publicKey)` - Encrypts a message using the public key. / 使用公钥加密消息。
- `public static String encrypt(String plaintext, String armoredPublicKey)` - Encrypts a message using the armored public key. / 使用装甲格式的公钥加密消息。
- `public static String encrypt(String plaintext, PgpKeyPair keyPair)` - Encrypts a message using the key pair's public key. / 使用密钥对的公钥加密消息。
- `public static byte[] encrypt(byte[] data, PGPPublicKey publicKey)` - Encrypts binary data using the public key. / 使用公钥加密二进制数据。
- `public static String encryptArmored(byte[] data, PGPPublicKey publicKey)` - Encrypts binary data and returns armored ASCII. / 加密二进制数据并返回装甲 ASCII。
- `public static String decrypt(String armoredMessage, PGPSecretKey secretKey, String passphrase)` - Decrypts an armored message using the secret key. / 使用私钥解密装甲消息。
- `public static String decrypt(String armoredMessage, String armoredSecretKey, String passphrase)` - Decrypts an armored message using the armored secret key. / 使用装甲格式的私钥解密消息。
- `public static String decrypt(String armoredMessage, PgpKeyPair keyPair, String passphrase)` - Decrypts an armored message using the key pair. / 使用密钥对解密装甲消息。
- `public static byte[] decrypt(byte[] encryptedData, PGPSecretKey secretKey, String passphrase)` - Decrypts binary data using the secret key. / 使用私钥解密二进制数据。
- `public static String exportPublicKey(PgpKeyPair keyPair)` - Exports the public key to armored ASCII format. / 将公钥导出为装甲 ASCII 格式。
- `public static String exportPublicKey(PGPPublicKey publicKey)` - Exports the public key to armored ASCII format. / 将公钥导出为装甲 ASCII 格式。
- `public static String exportSecretKey(PgpKeyPair keyPair)` - Exports the secret key to armored ASCII format. / 将私钥导出为装甲 ASCII 格式。
- `public static String exportSecretKey(PGPSecretKey secretKey)` - Exports the secret key to armored ASCII format. / 将私钥导出为装甲 ASCII 格式。
- `public static PGPPublicKey importPublicKey(String armoredKey)` - Imports a public key from armored ASCII format. / 从装甲 ASCII 格式导入公钥。
- `public static PgpKeyPair importKeyPair(String armoredSecretKey, String passphrase)` - Imports a key pair from armored ASCII format. / 从装甲 ASCII 格式导入密钥对。
- `public static String keyIdHex(PGPPublicKey publicKey)` - Returns the key ID in hexadecimal format. / 返回十六进制格式的密钥 ID。
- `public static String fingerprintHex(PGPPublicKey publicKey)` - Returns the key fingerprint in hexadecimal format. / 返回十六进制格式的密钥指纹。
- `public static PgpCipher cipher()` - Creates a new PGP cipher builder for advanced configuration. / 创建新的 PGP 加密器构建器用于高级配置。

### OpenSign
`public final class OpenSign` - Digital signature facade for signing and verification - Provides convenient API for digital signatures / 数字签名门面类 - 提供便捷的数字签名和验证 API

- `public static OpenSign ed25519()` - Create Ed25519 signer (recommended) / 创建 Ed25519 签名器（推荐）
- `public static OpenSign ed448()` - Create Ed448 signer / 创建 Ed448 签名器
- `public static OpenSign ecdsaP256()` - Create ECDSA P-256 signer / 创建 ECDSA P-256 签名器
- `public static OpenSign ecdsaP384()` - Create ECDSA P-384 signer / 创建 ECDSA P-384 签名器
- `public static OpenSign ecdsaP521()` - Create ECDSA P-521 signer / 创建 ECDSA P-521 签名器
- `public static OpenSign sha256WithRsa()` - Create RSA-SHA256 signer / 创建 RSA-SHA256 签名器
- `public static OpenSign sha384WithRsa()` - Create RSA-SHA384 signer / 创建 RSA-SHA384 签名器
- `public static OpenSign sha512WithRsa()` - Create RSA-SHA512 signer / 创建 RSA-SHA512 签名器
- `public static OpenSign rsaPss()` - Create RSA-PSS signer / 创建 RSA-PSS 签名器
- `public static OpenSign rsaPssSha384()` - Create RSA-PSS-SHA384 signer / 创建 RSA-PSS-SHA384 签名器
- `public static OpenSign rsaPssSha512()` - Create RSA-PSS-SHA512 signer / 创建 RSA-PSS-SHA512 签名器
- `public static OpenSign sm2()` - Create SM2 signer (requires Bouncy Castle) / 创建 SM2 签名器（需要 Bouncy Castle）
- `public static OpenSign of(SignatureAlgorithm algorithm)` - Create signer by algorithm enum / 根据算法枚举创建签名器
- `public OpenSign setPrivateKey(PrivateKey privateKey)` - Set private key for signing / 设置签名私钥
- `public OpenSign setPublicKey(PublicKey publicKey)` - Set public key for verification / 设置验签公钥
- `public OpenSign setKeyPair(KeyPair keyPair)` - Set key pair for signing and verification / 设置签名和验签的密钥对
- `public byte[] sign(byte[] data)` - Sign data / 签名数据
- `public byte[] sign(String data)` - Sign string (UTF-8) / 签名字符串（UTF-8）
