### EncryptedEnvelope
`public final class EncryptedEnvelope` - Encrypted envelope data structure - Contains encrypted key, IV, ciphertext and authentication tag / 加密信封数据结构 - 包含加密密钥、IV、密文和认证标签

- `public EncryptedEnvelope(byte[] encryptedKey, byte[] iv, byte[] ciphertext, byte[] tag)` - Constructs an encrypted envelope with the specified components. / 使用指定组件构造加密信封
- `public byte[] encryptedKey()` - Returns the encrypted data encryption key. / 返回加密的数据加密密钥
- `public byte[] iv()` - Returns the initialization vector. / 返回初始化向量
- `public byte[] ciphertext()` - Returns the ciphertext. / 返回密文
- `public byte[] tag()` - Returns the authentication tag. / 返回认证标签
- `public String toBase64()` - Serializes this envelope to a Base64 encoded string. / 将此信封序列化为 Base64 编码字符串
- `public static EncryptedEnvelope fromBase64(String base64)` - Deserializes an encrypted envelope from a Base64 encoded string. / 从 Base64 编码字符串反序列化加密信封。
- `public byte[] toBytes()` - Serializes this envelope to a byte array. / 将此信封序列化为字节数组
- `public static EncryptedEnvelope fromBytes(byte[] bytes)` - Deserializes an encrypted envelope from a byte array. / 从字节数组反序列化加密信封
- `public boolean equals(Object obj)` - Checks equality with another object / 检查与另一个对象是否相等
- `public int hashCode()` - Computes hash code for the envelope / 计算信封的哈希码
- `public String toString()` - Returns string representation of the envelope / 返回信封的字符串表示

### EnvelopeCrypto
`public final class EnvelopeCrypto` - Envelope encryption implementation - Combines asymmetric and symmetric encryption for secure data exchange / 信封加密实现 - 结合非对称和对称加密用于安全数据交换

- `public static EnvelopeCrypto rsaAesGcm()` - Create envelope crypto with RSA-OAEP and AES-GCM (Recommended) / 创建使用 RSA-OAEP 和 AES-GCM 的信封加密（推荐）
- `public static EnvelopeCrypto ecdhAesGcm()` - Create envelope crypto with ECDH key agreement and AES-GCM. / 创建使用 ECDH 密钥协商和 AES-GCM 的信封加密。
- `public static EnvelopeCrypto x25519ChaCha20()` - Create envelope crypto with X25519 key agreement and ChaCha20-Poly1305. / 创建使用 X25519 密钥协商和 ChaCha20-Poly1305 的信封加密。
- `public EnvelopeCrypto setRecipientPublicKey(PublicKey publicKey)` - Set recipient public key for encryption / 设置接收者公钥用于加密
- `public EnvelopeCrypto setRecipientPrivateKey(PrivateKey privateKey)` - Set recipient private key for decryption / 设置接收者私钥用于解密
- `public EncryptedEnvelope encrypt(byte[] plaintext)` - Encrypt plaintext using envelope encryption / 使用信封加密加密明文
- `public EncryptedEnvelope encrypt(byte[] plaintext, byte[] aad)` - Encrypt plaintext using envelope encryption with additional authenticated data / 使用信封加密加密明文（支持附加认证数据）
- `public String encryptBase64(byte[] plaintext)` - Encrypt plaintext and return Base64 encoded result / 加密明文并返回 Base64 编码结果
- `public byte[] decrypt(EncryptedEnvelope envelope)` - Decrypt encrypted envelope / 解密加密信封
- `public byte[] decrypt(EncryptedEnvelope envelope, byte[] aad)` - Decrypt encrypted envelope with additional authenticated data / 解密加密信封，支持附加认证数据
- `public byte[] decryptBase64(String base64Envelope)` - Decrypt Base64 encoded encrypted envelope / 解密 Base64 编码的加密信封
- `public AsymmetricAlgorithm getAsymmetricAlgorithm()` - Get the asymmetric algorithm / 获取非对称算法
- `public SymmetricAlgorithm getSymmetricAlgorithm()` - Get the symmetric algorithm / 获取对称算法

### HybridCrypto
`public final class HybridCrypto` - Hybrid encryption implementation - Simplified envelope encryption with transparent key management / 混合加密实现 - 透明密钥管理的简化信封加密

- `public static HybridCrypto rsaAes()` - Create hybrid crypto with RSA and AES (Recommended) / 创建使用 RSA 和 AES 的混合加密（推荐）
- `public static HybridCrypto ecdhAes()` - Create hybrid crypto with ECDH and AES / 创建使用 ECDH 和 AES 的混合加密
- `public static HybridCrypto x25519ChaCha20()` - Create hybrid crypto with X25519 and ChaCha20 / 创建使用 X25519 和 ChaCha20 的混合加密
- `public static Builder builder()` - Create a new builder for custom configuration / 创建用于自定义配置的构建器
- `public HybridCrypto setRecipientPublicKey(PublicKey publicKey)` - Set recipient public key for encryption / 设置接收者公钥用于加密
- `public HybridCrypto setRecipientPrivateKey(PrivateKey privateKey)` - Set recipient private key for decryption / 设置接收者私钥用于解密
- `public byte[] encrypt(byte[] plaintext)` - Encrypt plaintext using hybrid encryption / 使用混合加密加密明文
- `public String encryptBase64(byte[] plaintext)` - Encrypt plaintext and return Base64 encoded result / 加密明文并返回 Base64 编码结果
- `public byte[] decrypt(byte[] ciphertext)` - Decrypt ciphertext using hybrid encryption / 使用混合加密解密密文
- `public byte[] decryptBase64(String base64Ciphertext)` - Decrypt Base64 encoded ciphertext / 解密 Base64 编码的密文
- `public AsymmetricAlgorithm getAsymmetricAlgorithm()` - Get the asymmetric algorithm / 获取非对称算法
- `public SymmetricAlgorithm getSymmetricAlgorithm()` - Get the symmetric algorithm / 获取对称算法

### OpenCryptoException
`public class OpenCryptoException` - Base exception for cryptographic operations - Runtime exception for encryption, decryption and key operations / 加密操作基础异常 - 加密、解密和密钥操作的运行时异常

- `public OpenCryptoException(String message)` - Constructs a new OpenCryptoException with the specified message. / 使用指定消息构造新的加密异常。
- `public OpenCryptoException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Constructs a new OpenCryptoException with the specified message and cause. / 使用指定消息和原因构造新的加密异常。
- `public OpenCryptoException(String algorithm, String operation, String message)` - Constructs a new OpenCryptoException with algorithm, operation and message. / 使用算法、操作和消息构造新的加密异常。
- `public OpenCryptoException(String algorithm, String operation, String message, Throwable cause)` - Constructs a new OpenCryptoException with algorithm, operation, message and cause. / 使用算法、操作、消息和原因构造新的加密异常。
- `public String algorithm()` - Returns the cryptographic algorithm associated with this exception. / 返回与此异常关联的加密算法。
- `public String operation()` - Returns the operation being performed when this exception occurred. / 返回发生异常时正在执行的操作。
- `public static OpenCryptoException algorithmNotAvailable(String algorithm)` - Creates an exception for when a cryptographic algorithm is not available. / 创建加密算法不可用时的异常。
- `public static OpenCryptoException encryptionFailed(String algorithm, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception for encryption failures. / 创建加密失败时的异常
- `public static OpenCryptoException decryptionFailed(String algorithm, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception for decryption failures. / 创建解密失败时的异常
- `public static OpenCryptoException authenticationFailed(String algorithm)` - Creates an exception for authentication failures. / 创建身份验证失败时的异常
- `public static OpenCryptoException paddingError(String algorithm)` - Creates an exception for padding errors. / 创建填充错误时的异常
- `public static OpenCryptoException invalidIv(String algorithm, int expected, int actual)` - Creates an exception for invalid initialization vector (IV). / 创建无效初始化向量时的异常
- `public static OpenCryptoException dataTooLong(String algorithm, int maxSize)` - Creates an exception for data that exceeds maximum size. / 创建数据超过最大长度时的异常

### OpenKeyException
`public class OpenKeyException` - Exception for key-related operations - Runtime exception for key generation, parsing and validation / 密钥操作异常 - 密钥生成、解析和验证的运行时异常

- `public OpenKeyException(String message)` - Constructs a new OpenKeyException with the specified message. / 使用指定消息构造新的密钥异常
- `public OpenKeyException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Constructs a new OpenKeyException with the specified message and cause. / 使用指定消息和原因构造新的密钥异常。
- `public OpenKeyException(String keyType, String message)` - Constructs a new OpenKeyException with key type and message. / 使用密钥类型和消息构造新的密钥异常
- `public OpenKeyException(String keyType, String message, Throwable cause)` - Constructs a new OpenKeyException with key type, message and cause. / 使用密钥类型、消息和原因构造新的密钥异常。
- `public String keyType()` - Returns the key type associated with this exception. / 返回与此异常关联的密钥类型
- `public static OpenKeyException generationFailed(String keyType, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception for key generation failures. / 创建密钥生成失败时的异常
- `public static OpenKeyException parseFailed(String keyType, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception for key parsing failures. / 创建密钥解析失败时的异常
- `public static OpenKeyException insufficientStrength(String keyType, int minBits, int actualBits)` - Creates an exception for insufficient key strength. / 创建密钥强度不足时的异常
- `public static OpenKeyException invalidFormat(String keyType, String format)` - Creates an exception for invalid key format. / 创建密钥格式无效时的异常
- `public static OpenKeyException typeMismatch(String expected, String actual)` - Creates an exception for key type mismatch. / 创建密钥类型不匹配时的异常
- `public static OpenKeyException keyNotSet(String operation)` - Creates an exception for when a required key is not set. / 创建必需密钥未设置时的异常

### OpenSignatureException
`public class OpenSignatureException` - Exception for digital signature operations - Runtime exception for signature generation and verification / 数字签名操作异常 - 签名生成和验证的运行时异常

- `public OpenSignatureException(String message)` - Constructs a new OpenSignatureException with the specified message. / 使用指定消息构造新的签名异常。
- `public OpenSignatureException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Constructs a new OpenSignatureException with the specified message and cause. / 使用指定消息和原因构造新的签名异常。
- `public OpenSignatureException(String algorithm, String message)` - Constructs a new OpenSignatureException with algorithm and message. / 使用算法和消息构造新的签名异常。
- `public OpenSignatureException(String algorithm, String message, Throwable cause)` - Constructs a new OpenSignatureException with algorithm, message and cause. / 使用算法、消息和原因构造新的签名异常。
- `public String algorithm()` - Returns the signature algorithm associated with this exception. / 返回与此异常关联的签名算法
- `public static OpenSignatureException signFailed(String algorithm, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception for signature generation failures. / 创建签名生成失败时的异常
- `public static OpenSignatureException verifyFailed(String algorithm, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception for signature verification failures. / 创建签名验证失败时的异常
- `public static OpenSignatureException invalidSignature(String algorithm)` - Creates an exception for invalid signatures. / 创建签名无效时的异常
- `public static OpenSignatureException invalidFormat(String algorithm, String format)` - Creates an exception for invalid signature format. / 创建签名格式无效时的异常

### Blake2Hash
`public final class Blake2Hash` - BLAKE2 hash function implementation - High-speed cryptographic hash function / BLAKE2 哈希函数实现 - 高速加密哈希函数

- `public static Blake2Hash blake2b(int digestLength)` - Create BLAKE2b hash function with custom digest length / 创建指定摘要长度的 BLAKE2b 哈希函数
- `public static Blake2Hash blake2b256()` - Create BLAKE2b-256 hash function (256-bit digest) / 创建 BLAKE2b-256 哈希函数（256 位摘要）
- `public static Blake2Hash blake2b512()` - Create BLAKE2b-512 hash function (512-bit digest) / 创建 BLAKE2b-512 哈希函数（512 位摘要）
- `public static Blake2Hash blake2s(int digestLength)` - Create BLAKE2s hash function with custom digest length / 创建指定摘要长度的 BLAKE2s 哈希函数
- `public static Blake2Hash blake2s256()` - Create BLAKE2s-256 hash function (256-bit digest) / 创建 BLAKE2s-256 哈希函数（256 位摘要）
- `public byte[] hash(byte[] data)` - Computes hash of a byte array / 计算字节数组的哈希
- `public byte[] hash(String data)` - Computes hash of a string (UTF-8) / 计算字符串的哈希（UTF-8）
- `public String hashHex(byte[] data)` - Computes hash and returns as hex string / 计算哈希并返回十六进制字符串
- `public String hashHex(String data)` - Computes hash of a string and returns as hex / 计算字符串哈希并返回十六进制
- `public String hashBase64(byte[] data)` - Computes hash and returns as Base64 string / 计算哈希并返回 Base64 字符串
- `public int getDigestLength()` - Gets the digest length in bytes / 获取摘要长度（字节）
- `public String getAlgorithm()` - Gets the algorithm name / 获取算法名称

### HmacFunction
`public final class HmacFunction` - HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) function implementation - Keyed hash for message authentication / HMAC 函数实现 - 用于消息认证的带密钥哈希

- `public static HmacFunction hmacSha256(byte[] key)` - Create HMAC-SHA256 function / 创建 HMAC-SHA256 函数

- `public String macHex(byte[] data)` - Compute MAC and return as hexadecimal string / 计算消息认证码并返回十六进制字符串
- `public String macBase64(byte[] data)` - Compute MAC and return as Base64 string / 计算消息认证码并返回 Base64 字符串
- `public boolean verify(byte[] data, byte[] mac)` - Verify MAC for given data using constant-time comparison / 使用恒定时间比较验证给定数据的消息认证码
- `public String getAlgorithm()` - Get the HMAC algorithm name / 获取 HMAC 算法名称

### JwtAlgorithm
`public enum JwtAlgorithm` - JWT Algorithm - Supported algorithms for JWT signing / JWT 算法 - 支持的 JWT 签名算法

- `public String jcaName()` - Returns the JCA algorithm name. / 返回 JCA 算法名称。
- `public String type()` - Returns the algorithm type ("symmetric" or "asymmetric"). / 返回算法类型（"symmetric" 或 "asymmetric"）。
- `public boolean isSymmetric()` - Checks if this is a symmetric algorithm. / 检查是否为对称算法。
- `public boolean isAsymmetric()` - Checks if this is an asymmetric algorithm. / 检查是否为非对称算法。
- `public static JwtAlgorithm fromName(String name)` - Parses algorithm from string name. / 从字符串名称解析算法。

### JwtClaims
`public final class JwtClaims` - JWT Claims - Container for JWT claims (payload) / JWT 声明 - JWT 声明（载荷）容器

- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a new claims builder. / 创建新的声明构建器。
- `public static JwtClaims of(Map<String, Object> claims)` - Creates claims from a map. / 从映射创建声明。
- `public static JwtClaims empty()` - Creates empty claims. / 创建空声明。
- `public String issuer()` - Returns the issuer claim. / 返回签发者声明。
- `public String subject()` - Returns the subject claim. / 返回主题声明。
- `public List<String> audience()` - Returns the audience claim. / 返回受众声明。
- `public Instant expiration()` - Returns the expiration time. / 返回过期时间。
- `public Instant notBefore()` - Returns the not-before time. / 返回生效时间。
- `public Instant issuedAt()` - Returns the issued-at time. / 返回签发时间。
- `public String jwtId()` - Returns the JWT ID. / 返回 JWT ID。
- `public Object get(String name)` - Returns a claim value. / 返回声明值。
- `public String getString(String name)` - Returns a claim value as String. / 返回字符串类型的声明值。
- `public Integer getInt(String name)` - Returns a claim value as Integer. / 返回整数类型的声明值。
- `public Long getLong(String name)` - Returns a claim value as Long. / 返回长整数类型的声明值。
- `public Boolean getBoolean(String name)` - Returns a claim value as Boolean. / 返回布尔类型的声明值。
- `public Instant getInstant(String name)` - Returns a claim value as Instant. / 返回 Instant 类型的声明值。
- `public <T> List<T> getList(String name)` - Returns a claim value as List. / 返回列表类型的声明值。
- `public boolean contains(String name)` - Checks if a claim is present. / 检查声明是否存在。
- `public Set<String> names()` - Returns all claim names. / 返回所有声明名称。
- `public Map<String, Object> asMap()` - Returns the claims as a map. / 返回声明映射。
- `public boolean isExpired()` - Checks if the token has expired. / 检查令牌是否已过期。
- `public boolean isNotYetValid()` - Checks if the token is not yet valid. / 检查令牌是否尚未生效。
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - Checks equality with another object / 检查与另一个对象是否相等
- `public int hashCode()` - Computes hash code for the claims / 计算声明的哈希码
- `public String toString()` - Returns string representation of the claims / 返回声明的字符串表示

### JwtUtil
`public final class JwtUtil` - JWT Utility - Creates and verifies JSON Web Tokens / JWT 工具类 - 创建和验证 JSON Web Token

- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a new JWT builder. / 创建新的 JWT 构建器。
- `public static JwtClaims verify(String token, String secret)` - Verifies a JWT with HMAC secret and returns claims. / 使用 HMAC 密钥验证 JWT 并返回声明。
- `public static JwtClaims verify(String token, byte[] secret)` - Verifies a JWT with HMAC secret bytes and returns claims. / 使用 HMAC 密钥字节验证 JWT 并返回声明。
- `public static JwtClaims verify(String token, PublicKey publicKey)` - Verifies a JWT with public key and returns claims. / 使用公钥验证 JWT 并返回声明。
- `public static JwtClaims parseUnsafe(String token)` - Parses a JWT without verification (unsafe). / 解析 JWT 但不验证（不安全）。
- `public static JwtParts parse(String token)` - Parses JWT parts without verification. / 解析 JWT 部分但不验证。
- `public static String quickSign(String subject, String secret, Duration expiration)` - Creates a quick JWT with HMAC-SHA256. / 使用 HMAC-SHA256 快速创建 JWT。
- `public static String quickSign(JwtClaims claims, String secret)` - Creates a quick JWT with claims. / 使用声明快速创建 JWT。
- `public record JwtParts(` - JWT Parts - Holds parsed JWT components / JWT 部分 - 保存解析后的 JWT 组件

### Argon2Kdf
`public final class Argon2Kdf` - Argon2 key derivation function implementation - Winner of the Password Hashing Competition / Argon2 密钥派生函数实现 - 密码哈希竞赛获胜者

- `public static Argon2Kdf argon2id()` - Creates Argon2id instance with default OWASP recommended parameters / 创建使用 OWASP 推荐参数的 Argon2id 实例
- `public static Argon2Kdf argon2d()` - Creates Argon2d instance with default parameters / 创建使用默认参数的 Argon2d 实例
- `public static Argon2Kdf argon2i()` - Creates Argon2i instance with default parameters / 创建使用默认参数的 Argon2i 实例
- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a builder for Argon2Kdf configuration / 创建 Argon2Kdf 配置构建器
- `public static boolean isBouncyCastleAvailable()` - Check if Bouncy Castle provider is available. / 检查 Bouncy Castle 提供商是否可用。
- `public byte[] deriveKey(byte[] password, byte[] salt, int length)` - Derives a key from password and salt using Argon2 algorithm / 使用 Argon2 算法从密码和盐值派生密钥
- `public byte[] deriveKey(byte[] password, byte[] salt, byte[] secret, byte[] ad, int length)` - Derives a key from password and salt with optional additional data and secret / 从密码和盐值派生密钥，支持附加数据和密钥
- `public byte[] deriveKey(char[] password, byte[] salt, int length)` - Derives a key from password (as char array) and salt / 从密码（字符数组）和盐值派生密钥
- `public byte[] deriveKey(String password, byte[] salt, int length)` - Derives a key from password string and salt / 从密码字符串和盐值派生密钥
- `public static byte[] generateSalt()` - Generates a cryptographically secure random salt / 生成密码学安全的随机盐值
- `public static byte[] generateSalt(int length)` - Generates a cryptographically secure random salt with custom length / 生成自定义长度的密码学安全随机盐值
- `public String getAlgorithm()` - Gets the algorithm name / 获取算法名称
- `public Argon2Type getType()` - Gets the Argon2 variant type / 获取 Argon2 变体类型
- `public int getIterations()` - Gets the time cost parameter (iterations) / 获取时间成本参数（迭代次数）
- `public int getMemory()` - Gets the memory cost parameter in KB / 获取内存成本参数（KB）
- `public int getParallelism()` - Gets the parallelism parameter / 获取并行度参数
- `public static int getDefaultSaltLength()` - Gets the default salt length / 获取默认盐值长度
- `public static int getMinMemory()` - Gets the minimum memory requirement in KB / 获取最小内存需求（KB）
- `public byte[] derive(byte[] inputKeyMaterial, byte[] salt, byte[] info, int length)` - Derives key material with the given parameters / 使用给定参数派生密鑰材料
- `public byte[] derive(byte[] inputKeyMaterial, int length)` - Derives key material with no salt and info / 无盐和附加信息的密鑰派生

### Hkdf
`public final class Hkdf` - HMAC-based Key Derivation Function (HKDF) implementation - RFC 5869 compliant key derivation / HKDF 密钥派生函数实现 - 符合 RFC 5869 规范

- `public static Hkdf sha256()` - Creates an HKDF instance with SHA-256 / 使用 SHA-256 创建 HKDF 实例
- `public static Hkdf sha384()` - Creates an HKDF instance with SHA-384 / 使用 SHA-384 创建 HKDF 实例
- `public static Hkdf sha512()` - Creates an HKDF instance with SHA-512 / 使用 SHA-512 创建 HKDF 实例
- `public byte[] deriveKey(byte[] ikm, byte[] info, int length)` - Derives key material from input keying material (IKM) / 从输入密钥材料派生密钥
- `public byte[] deriveKey(byte[] ikm, byte[] salt, byte[] info, int length)` - Derives key material from input keying material (IKM) with optional salt / 从输入密钥材料派生密钥（支持可选盐值）
- `public byte[] extract(byte[] salt, byte[] ikm)` - HKDF-Extract: Extracts a pseudorandom key from input key material / HKDF-提取：从输入密钥材料提取伪随机密钥
- `public byte[] expand(byte[] prk, byte[] info, int length)` - HKDF-Expand: Expands a pseudorandom key to desired length / HKDF-扩展：将伪随机密钥扩展到所需长度
- `public String getAlgorithm()` - Gets the algorithm name / 获取算法名称
- `public int getHashLength()` - Gets the hash output length / 获取哈希输出长度
- `public byte[] extractAndExpand(byte[] salt, byte[] ikm, byte[] info, int length)` - HKDF-Extract-and-Expand: Combines extract and expand in one call / HKDF-提取并扩展：在一次调用中合并提取和扩展
- `public byte[][] deriveKeys(byte[] salt, byte[] ikm, byte[][] infos, int[] lengths)` - Derives multiple keys from the same input key material with different info contexts / 从同一输入密钥材料派生多个不同上下文的密钥
- `public byte[] derive(byte[] inputKeyMaterial, byte[] salt, byte[] info, int length)` - Derives key material with the given parameters / 使用给定参数派生密鑰材料
- `public byte[] derive(byte[] inputKeyMaterial, int length)` - Derives key material with no salt and info / 无盐和附加信息的密鑰派生

### SecureKeyStore
`public final class SecureKeyStore` - Secure key store for managing cryptographic keys - Store and retrieve keys securely / 安全密钥存储 - 安全地存储和检索加密密钥

- `public static SecureKeyStore create()` - Create a new empty key store / 创建新的空密钥存储
- `public static SecureKeyStore load(Path path, char[] password)` - Load key store from file / 从文件加载密钥存储
- `public void store(String alias, SecretKey key, char[] password)` - Store secret key in key store / 在密钥存储中存储对称密钥
- `public void store(String alias, KeyPair keyPair, char[] password)` - Store key pair in key store / 在密钥存储中存储密钥对
- `public void store(String alias, PrivateKey privateKey, char[] password, Certificate[] chain)` - Store private key with certificate chain in key store / 在密钥存储中存储带证书链的私钥
- `public SecretKey getSecretKey(String alias, char[] password)` - Get secret key from key store / 从密钥存储中获取对称密钥
- `public KeyPair getKeyPair(String alias, char[] password)` - Get key pair from key store / 从密钥存储中获取密钥对
- `public PrivateKey getPrivateKey(String alias, char[] password)` - Get private key from key store / 从密钥存储中获取私钥
- `public PublicKey getPublicKey(String alias)` - Get public key from key store / 从密钥存储中获取公钥
- `public boolean containsAlias(String alias)` - Check if key store contains entry with given alias / 检查密钥存储是否包含给定别名的条目
- `public void deleteEntry(String alias)` - Delete entry from key store / 从密钥存储中删除条目
- `public Set<String> aliases()` - Get all aliases in key store / 获取密钥存储中的所有别名
- `public void save(Path path, char[] password)` - Save key store to file / 保存密钥存储到文件
- `public void close()` - Close the key store and clear sensitive data / 关闭密钥存储并清除敏感数据

- `public String getAlgorithm()` - Gets the algorithm name / 获取算法名称
- `public CurveType getCurve()` - Gets the curve type used by this engine / 获取此引擎使用的曲线类型

- `public PublicKey getPublicKey()` - Gets the public key from the private key (if set). / 从私钥获取公钥（如果已设置）。

### HmacSha256
`public final class HmacSha256` - HMAC-SHA256 implementation - Hash-based Message Authentication Code using SHA-256 / HMAC-SHA256 实现 - 使用 SHA-256 的基于哈希的消息认证码

- `public static HmacSha256 of(byte[] key)` - Creates a new HMAC-SHA256 instance with the given key / 使用给定密钥创建新的 HMAC-SHA256 实例

- `public byte[] compute(byte[] data)` - Computes MAC for byte array / 计算字节数组的 MAC
- `public byte[] compute(String data)` - Computes MAC for string / 计算字符串的 MAC
- `public String computeHex(byte[] data)` - Computes MAC and returns as hex string / 计算 MAC 并返回十六进制字符串
- `public String computeBase64(byte[] data)` - Computes MAC and returns as Base64 string / 计算 MAC 并返回 Base64 字符串

- `public boolean verifyHex(byte[] data, String macHex)` - Verifies MAC using hex string / 使用十六进制字符串验证 MAC
- `public boolean verifyBase64(byte[] data, String macBase64)` - Verifies MAC using Base64 string / 使用 Base64 字符串验证 MAC
- `public Mac update(byte[] data)` - Updates MAC with additional data / 使用更多数据更新 MAC
- `public Mac update(String data)` - Updates MAC with additional string data / 使用更多字符串数据更新 MAC
- `public byte[] doFinal()` - Finalizes and returns the MAC value / 完成并返回 MAC 值
- `public String doFinalHex()` - Finalizes and returns the MAC as hex string / 完成并返回十六进制格式的 MAC
- `public String doFinalBase64()` - Finalizes and returns the MAC as Base64 string / 完成并返回 Base64 格式的 MAC
- `public Mac reset()` - Resets the MAC state / 重置 MAC 状态
- `public String getAlgorithm()` - Gets the algorithm name / 获取算法名称
- `public int getMacLength()` - Gets the MAC length in bytes / 获取 MAC 长度（字节）

### Argon2Hash
`public final class Argon2Hash` - Argon2 password hashing implementation - Modern memory-hard password hashing / Argon2 密码哈希实现 - 现代内存硬化密码哈希

- `public static Argon2Hash argon2id()` - Create Argon2id hasher with default parameters (recommended for most use cases) / 使用默认参数创建 Argon2id 哈希器（推荐用于大多数场景）
- `public static Argon2Hash argon2i()` - Create Argon2i hasher with default parameters (resistant to side-channel attacks) / 使用默认参数创建 Argon2i 哈希器（抵抗侧信道攻击）
- `public static Argon2Hash argon2d()` - Create Argon2d hasher with default parameters (resistant to GPU attacks) / 使用默认参数创建 Argon2d 哈希器（抵抗 GPU 攻击）
- `public static Builder builder()` - Create a builder for custom Argon2 configuration / 创建用于自定义 Argon2 配置的构建器
- `public String hash(char[] password)` - Hashes a password char array / 对密码字符数组进行哈希
- `public String hash(String password)` - Hashes a password string / 对密码字符串进行哈希
- `public boolean verify(char[] password, String hash)` - Verifies a password char array against hash / 验证密码字符数组与哈希是否匹配
- `public boolean verify(String password, String hash)` - Verifies a password string against hash / 验证密码字符串与哈希是否匹配
- `public boolean needsRehash(String hash)` - Checks if hash needs to be rehashed with updated parameters / 检查哈希是否需要使用更新参数重新哈希
- `public String getAlgorithm()` - Gets the algorithm name / 获取算法名称

### PgpCipher
`public final class PgpCipher` - PGP Cipher - Provides PGP encryption and decryption operations / PGP 加密器 - 提供 PGP 加密和解密操作

- `public static PgpCipher create()` - Creates a new PGP cipher instance. / 创建新的 PGP 加密器实例。
- `public PgpCipher withPublicKey(PGPPublicKey publicKey)` - Sets the public key for encryption. / 设置用于加密的公钥。
- `public PgpCipher withPublicKey(String armoredKey)` - Sets the public key from armored ASCII string. / 从装甲 ASCII 字符串设置公钥。
- `public PgpCipher withSecretKey(PGPSecretKey secretKey, String passphrase)` - Sets the secret key for decryption. / 设置用于解密的私钥。
- `public PgpCipher withSecretKey(String armoredKey, String passphrase)` - Sets the secret key from armored ASCII string. / 从装甲 ASCII 字符串设置私钥。
- `public PgpCipher withKeyPair(PgpKeyPair keyPair, String passphrase)` - Sets the key pair for both encryption and decryption. / 设置用于加密和解密的密钥对。
- `public PgpCipher withSymmetricAlgorithm(PgpAlgorithm.Symmetric algorithm)` - Sets the symmetric algorithm for encryption. / 设置用于加密的对称算法。
- `public PgpCipher withIntegrityCheck(boolean enabled)` - Enables or disables integrity check. / 启用或禁用完整性检查。
- `public PgpCipher withCompression(boolean enabled)` - Enables or disables compression. / 启用或禁用压缩。
- `public String encryptArmored(String plaintext)` - Encrypts data and returns armored ASCII string. / 加密数据并返回装甲 ASCII 字符串。
- `public String encryptArmored(byte[] data)` - Encrypts data and returns armored ASCII string. / 加密数据并返回装甲 ASCII 字符串。
- `public byte[] encrypt(byte[] data)` - Encrypts data and returns raw bytes. / 加密数据并返回原始字节。
- `public String encryptBase64(byte[] data)` - Encrypts data and returns Base64 encoded string. / 加密数据并返回 Base64 编码字符串。
- `public String decryptArmored(String armoredData)` - Decrypts armored ASCII data. / 解密装甲 ASCII 数据。
- `public byte[] decryptArmoredToBytes(String armoredData)` - Decrypts armored ASCII data to bytes. / 解密装甲 ASCII 数据为字节。
- `public byte[] decrypt(byte[] encryptedData)` - Decrypts raw encrypted bytes. / 解密原始加密字节。
- `public byte[] decryptBase64(String base64Data)` - Decrypts Base64 encoded data. / 解密 Base64 编码数据。
- `public String decryptBase64ToString(String base64Data)` - Decrypts Base64 encoded data to string. / 解密 Base64 编码数据为字符串。
- `public PGPPublicKey getPublicKey()` - Returns the configured public key. / 返回配置的公钥。
- `public PGPSecretKey getSecretKey()` - Returns the configured secret key. / 返回配置的私钥。
- `public PgpAlgorithm.Symmetric getSymmetricAlgorithm()` - Returns the symmetric algorithm. / 返回对称算法。

`public record PgpKeyPair(` - PGP Key Pair - Holds PGP public and secret key pair / PGP 密钥对 - 保存 PGP 公钥和私钥对

- `public static PgpKeyPair fromSecretKey(PGPSecretKey secretKey, String userId)` - Creates a PGP key pair from secret key (derives public key automatically). / 从私钥创建 PGP 密钥对（自动派生公钥）。
- `public String keyIdHex()` - Returns the key ID as hexadecimal string. / 返回十六进制格式的密钥 ID。
- `public boolean canEncrypt()` - Checks if this key pair can be used for encryption. / 检查此密钥对是否可用于加密。
- `public boolean canSign()` - Checks if this key pair can be used for signing. / 检查此密钥对是否可用于签名。

### PgpKeyUtil
`public final class PgpKeyUtil` - PGP Key Utility - Manages PGP key generation, import, and export / PGP 密钥工具 - 管理 PGP 密钥生成、导入和导出

- `public static PgpKeyPair generateKeyPair(String userId, String passphrase)` - Generates a new PGP key pair with RSA algorithm. / 使用 RSA 算法生成新的 PGP 密钥对。
- `public static PgpKeyPair generateKeyPair(String userId, String passphrase, int keySize)` - Generates a new PGP key pair with RSA algorithm and specified key size. / 使用 RSA 算法和指定密钥大小生成新的 PGP 密钥对。
- `public static PGPPublicKey importPublicKey(String armoredKey)` - Imports a PGP public key from armored ASCII format. / 从装甲 ASCII 格式导入 PGP 公钥。
- `public static PGPPublicKey importPublicKey(byte[] keyData)` - Imports a PGP public key from byte array. / 从字节数组导入 PGP 公钥。
- `public static PGPSecretKey importSecretKey(String armoredKey, String passphrase)` - Imports a PGP secret key from armored ASCII format. / 从装甲 ASCII 格式导入 PGP 私钥。
- `public static PgpKeyPair importKeyPair(String armoredSecretKey, String passphrase)` - Imports a PGP key pair from armored ASCII format. / 从装甲 ASCII 格式导入 PGP 密钥对。
- `public static String exportPublicKey(PGPPublicKey publicKey)` - Exports a PGP public key to armored ASCII format. / 将 PGP 公钥导出为装甲 ASCII 格式。
- `public static String exportSecretKey(PGPSecretKey secretKey)` - Exports a PGP secret key to armored ASCII format. / 将 PGP 私钥导出为装甲 ASCII 格式。
- `public static byte[] exportPublicKeyBytes(PGPPublicKey publicKey)` - Exports a PGP public key to raw bytes. / 将 PGP 公钥导出为原始字节。
- `public static PGPPrivateKey extractPrivateKey(PGPSecretKey secretKey, String passphrase)` - Extracts the private key from a PGP secret key. / 从 PGP 私钥中提取私钥。
- `public static String keyIdHex(PGPPublicKey key)` - Returns the key ID as hexadecimal string. / 返回十六进制格式的密钥 ID。
- `public static String fingerprintHex(PGPPublicKey key)` - Returns the key fingerprint as hexadecimal string. / 返回十六进制格式的密钥指纹。

### NonceGenerator
`public final class NonceGenerator` - Nonce (Number Used Once) generator providing various nonce generation strategies / Nonce 生成器 - 提供各种 Nonce 生成策略

- `public static byte[] random(int length)` - Generates a random nonce of the specified length. / 生成指定长度的随机 nonce。
- `public static byte[] random(int length, SecureRandom random)` - Generates a random nonce of the specified length using the provided SecureRandom. / 使用提供的 SecureRandom 生成指定长度的随机 nonce。
- `public static byte[] counter(long counter, int length)` - Generates a counter-based nonce by encoding a counter value into bytes. / 通过将计数器值编码为字节来生成基于计数器的 nonce。
- `public static byte[] timestamp(int randomLength)` - Generates a timestamp-based nonce combining current timestamp with random bytes. / 生成结合当前时间戳和随机字节的 nonce。
- `public static byte[] timestamp(int randomLength, SecureRandom random)` - Generates a timestamp-based nonce combining current timestamp with random bytes using SecureRandom. / 使用 SecureRandom 生成结合时间戳和随机字节的 nonce。
- `public static byte[] hybrid(int totalLength)` - Generates a hybrid nonce combining timestamp with random bytes. / 生成结合时间戳和随机字节的混合 nonce。
- `public static byte[] hybrid(int totalLength, SecureRandom random)` - Generates a hybrid nonce combining timestamp with random bytes using SecureRandom. / 使用 SecureRandom 生成混合 nonce。
- `public static byte[] forAesGcm()` - Generates a 12-byte (96-bit) random nonce suitable for AES-GCM. / 生成适用于 AES-GCM 的 12 字节（96 位）随机 nonce。
- `public static byte[] forAesGcm(SecureRandom random)` - Generates a 12-byte (96-bit) random nonce suitable for AES-GCM using SecureRandom. / 使用 SecureRandom 生成适用于 AES-GCM 的 12 字节 nonce。
- `public static byte[] forChaCha20()` - Generates a 12-byte (96-bit) random nonce suitable for ChaCha20-Poly1305. / 生成适用于 ChaCha20-Poly1305 的 12 字节（96 位）随机 nonce。
- `public static byte[] forChaCha20(SecureRandom random)` - Generates a 12-byte (96-bit) random nonce suitable for ChaCha20-Poly1305 using SecureRandom. / 使用 SecureRandom 生成适用于 ChaCha20-Poly1305 的 nonce。

- `public static String generateBase64(int length)` - Generates random bytes and returns them as a Base64 encoded string. / 生成随机字节并返回 Base64 编码字符串。

- `public static String generateBase64Url(int length)` - Generates random bytes and returns them as a URL-safe Base64 encoded string. / 生成随机字节并返回 URL 安全的 Base64 编码字符串。
- `public static String generateBase64Url(int length, SecureRandom random)` - Generates random bytes using the specified SecureRandom and returns them as URL-safe Base64. / 使用指定的 SecureRandom 生成随机字节并返回 URL 安全 Base64。

### SecureRandoms
`public final class SecureRandoms` - Secure random number generator factory providing various SecureRandom instances / 安全随机数生成器工厂 - 提供各种 SecureRandom 实例

- `public static SecureRandom getDefault()` - Gets the default SecureRandom instance. / 获取默认的 SecureRandom 实例。
- `public static SecureRandom getStrong()` - Gets a strong SecureRandom instance using the strongest available algorithm. / 获取使用最强可用算法的强 SecureRandom 实例。
- `public static SecureRandom getDrbg()` - Gets a DRBG (Deterministic Random Bit Generator) SecureRandom instance with default parameters. / 获取使用默认参数的 DRBG SecureRandom 实例。
- `public static SecureRandom getDrbg(int strength,` - Gets a DRBG SecureRandom instance with custom configuration. / 获取自定义配置的 DRBG SecureRandom 实例。
- `public static SecureRandom getInstance(String algorithm)` - Gets a SecureRandom instance for the specified algorithm. / 获取指定算法的 SecureRandom 实例。
- `public static SecureRandom getInstance(String algorithm, String provider)` - Gets a SecureRandom instance for the specified algorithm and provider. / 获取指定算法和提供者的 SecureRandom 实例。
- `public static byte[] generateSeed(int numBytes)` - Generates random seed bytes using the default SecureRandom. / 使用默认 SecureRandom 生成随机种子字节。
- `public static byte[] nextBytes(int numBytes)` - Generates random bytes using a thread-local cached SecureRandom. / 使用线程本地缓存的 SecureRandom 生成随机字节。

### KeyRotation
`public final class KeyRotation<K>` - Key Rotation Manager - Automated key version management and rotation / 密钥轮换管理器 - 自动化密钥版本管理和轮换

- `public VersionedKey<K> getCurrentKey()` - Gets the current (latest) key for encryption. / 获取当前（最新）密钥用于加密。
- `public VersionedKey<K> getKeyByVersion(long version)` - Gets a key by its version number. / 根据版本号获取密钥。
- `public long getCurrentVersion()` - Gets the current version number. / 获取当前版本号。
- `public Set<Long> getAvailableVersions()` - Gets all available versions. / 获取所有可用版本。
- `public String getKeyId()` - Gets the key ID. / 获取密钥 ID。
- `public synchronized VersionedKey<K> rotate()` - Manually triggers a key rotation. / 手动触发密钥轮换。
- `public synchronized VersionedKey<K> addKey(K key)` - Adds an existing key as a new version. / 将现有密钥添加为新版本。
- `public synchronized void importKey(long version, K key, Instant createdAt)` - Imports a key with a specific version. / 导入具有特定版本的密钥。
- `public synchronized int retireOldVersions()` - Retires keys older than the grace period. / 退役超过宽限期的密钥。
- `public synchronized int deleteRetiredKeys()` - Removes retired keys permanently. / 永久删除已退役的密钥。
- `public synchronized void startAutoRotation()` - Starts automatic key rotation. / 启动自动密钥轮换。
- `public synchronized void stopAutoRotation()` - Stops automatic key rotation. / 停止自动密钥轮换。
- `public boolean isRotationNeeded()` - Checks if a rotation is needed based on the interval. / 根据间隔检查是否需要轮换。
- `public Duration getTimeUntilNextRotation()` - Gets the time until next rotation. / 获取到下次轮换的时间。
- `public void close()` - Stops auto rotation and releases resources / 停止自动轮换并释放资源
- `public static <K> Builder<K> builder()` - Creates a new builder. / 创建新的构建器。
- `public static KeyRotation<SecretKey> forAes(String keyId, int keyBits)` - Creates a key rotation for AES keys. / 为 AES 密钥创建密钥轮换。
- `public static KeyRotation<KeyPair> forRsa(String keyId, int keyBits)` - Creates a key rotation for RSA key pairs. / 为 RSA 密钥对创建密钥轮换。
- `public record VersionedKey<K>(` - A versioned key with metadata. / 带元数据的版本化密钥。
- `public record RotationEvent(` - Event triggered during key rotation. / 密钥轮换期间触发的事件。

### SealedBox
`public final class SealedBox` - Sealed Box - Anonymous public-key encryption (NaCl/Libsodium style) / 密封盒 - 匿名公钥加密（NaCl/Libsodium 风格）

- `public static byte[] seal(byte[] plaintext, PublicKey recipientPublicKey)` - Seals (encrypts) a message for a recipient. / 为接收者密封（加密）消息。
- `public static byte[] seal(String plaintext, PublicKey recipientPublicKey)` - Seals (encrypts) a string message for a recipient. / 为接收者密封（加密）字符串消息。
- `public static byte[] open(byte[] sealed, KeyPair recipientKeyPair)` - Opens (decrypts) a sealed message. / 打开（解密）密封的消息。
- `public static String openAsString(byte[] sealed, KeyPair recipientKeyPair)` - Opens (decrypts) a sealed message and returns as string. / 打开（解密）密封的消息并返回字符串。
- `public static KeyPair generateKeyPair()` - Generates a key pair suitable for SealedBox. / 生成适用于 SealedBox 的密钥对。
- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a new builder. / 创建新的构建器。
- `public byte[] encrypt(byte[] plaintext, PublicKey recipientPublicKey)` - Encrypts a message for a recipient. / 为接收者加密消息。
- `public byte[] decrypt(byte[] sealed, KeyPair recipientKeyPair)` - Decrypts a sealed message. / 解密密封的消息。

### SecretBox
`public final class SecretBox` - Secret Box - Simplified symmetric encryption (NaCl/Libsodium style) / 秘密盒 - 简化的对称加密（NaCl/Libsodium 风格）

- `public static SecretKey generateKey()` - Generates a new 256-bit secret key. / 生成新的 256 位密钥。
- `public static SecretKey keyFromBytes(byte[] keyBytes)` - Creates a secret key from raw bytes. / 从原始字节创建密钥。
- `public static byte[] encrypt(byte[] plaintext, SecretKey key)` - Encrypts a message. / 加密消息。
- `public static byte[] encrypt(String plaintext, SecretKey key)` - Encrypts a string message. / 加密字符串消息。
- `public static byte[] encryptWithAad(byte[] plaintext, SecretKey key, byte[] aad)` - Encrypts with additional authenticated data (AAD). / 使用附加认证数据（AAD）加密。
- `public static byte[] decrypt(byte[] encrypted, SecretKey key)` - Decrypts a message. / 解密消息。
- `public static String decryptAsString(byte[] encrypted, SecretKey key)` - Decrypts a message and returns as string. / 解密消息并返回字符串。
- `public static byte[] decryptWithAad(byte[] encrypted, SecretKey key, byte[] aad)` - Decrypts with additional authenticated data (AAD). / 使用附加认证数据（AAD）解密。

### EcdsaSignature
`public final class EcdsaSignature` - ECDSA signature implementation - Elliptic Curve Digital Signature Algorithm / ECDSA 签名实现 - 椭圆曲线数字签名算法

- `public static EcdsaSignature p256()` - Create ECDSA signature with P-256 curve (SHA-256, recommended for most uses) / 创建使用 P-256 曲线的 ECDSA 签名（SHA-256，推荐用于大多数场景）
- `public static EcdsaSignature p384()` - Create ECDSA signature with P-384 curve (SHA-384, higher security) / 创建使用 P-384 曲线的 ECDSA 签名（SHA-384，更高安全性）
- `public static EcdsaSignature p521()` - Create ECDSA signature with P-521 curve (SHA-512, maximum security) / 创建使用 P-521 曲线的 ECDSA 签名（SHA-512，最高安全性）
- `public static EcdsaSignature withCurve(CurveType curve)` - Create ECDSA signature with custom curve type / 创建使用自定义曲线类型的 ECDSA 签名
- `public static EcdsaSignature p256WithGeneratedKeyPair()` - Create ECDSA P-256 signature with generated key pair / 创建带有生成密钥对的 ECDSA P-256 签名
- `public static EcdsaSignature p384WithGeneratedKeyPair()` - Create ECDSA P-384 signature with generated key pair / 创建带有生成密钥对的 ECDSA P-384 签名
- `public static EcdsaSignature p521WithGeneratedKeyPair()` - Create ECDSA P-521 signature with generated key pair / 创建带有生成密钥对的 ECDSA P-521 签名
- `public EcdsaSignature withGeneratedKeyPair()` - Generate a new EC key pair for the configured curve / 为配置的曲线生成新的 EC 密钥对
- `public SignatureEngine setPrivateKey(PrivateKey privateKey)` - Sets the private key for signing / 设置用于签名的私钥
- `public SignatureEngine setPrivateKey(byte[] encodedKey)` - Sets the private key from encoded bytes / 从编码字节设置私钥
- `public SignatureEngine setPrivateKeyPem(String pem)` - Sets the private key from PEM string / 从 PEM 字符串设置私钥
- `public SignatureEngine setPublicKey(PublicKey publicKey)` - Sets the public key for verification / 设置用于验证的公钥
- `public SignatureEngine setPublicKey(byte[] encodedKey)` - Sets the public key from encoded bytes / 从编码字节设置公钥
- `public SignatureEngine setPublicKeyPem(String pem)` - Sets the public key from PEM string / 从 PEM 字符串设置公钥
- `public SignatureEngine setKeyPair(KeyPair keyPair)` - Sets both private and public keys from key pair / 从密钥对设置私钥和公钥

- `public byte[] sign(String data)` - Signs the string data / 对字符串数据签名
- `public String signBase64(byte[] data)` - Signs data and returns Base64 encoded signature / 对数据签名并返回 Base64 编码的签名
- `public String signBase64(String data)` - Signs string and returns Base64 encoded signature / 对字符串签名并返回 Base64 编码的签名
- `public String signHex(byte[] data)` - Signs data and returns hex encoded signature / 对数据签名并返回十六进制编码的签名
- `public byte[] signFile(Path file)` - Signs a file and returns signature bytes / 对文件签名并返回签名字节
- `public byte[] sign(InputStream input)` - Signs data from input stream / 对输入流中的数据签名
- `public boolean verify(byte[] data, byte[] signature)` - Verifies signature for byte array data / 验证字节数组数据的签名
- `public boolean verify(String data, byte[] signature)` - Verifies signature for string data / 验证字符串数据的签名
- `public boolean verifyBase64(byte[] data, String base64Signature)` - Verifies Base64 encoded signature / 验证 Base64 编码的签名
- `public boolean verifyBase64(String data, String base64Signature)` - Verifies Base64 encoded signature for string / 验证字符串的 Base64 编码签名
- `public boolean verifyHex(byte[] data, String hexSignature)` - Verifies hex encoded signature / 验证十六进制编码的签名
- `public boolean verifyFile(Path file, byte[] signature)` - Verifies signature for a file / 验证文件的签名
- `public SignatureEngine update(byte[] data)` - Updates the signature with additional data / 使用额外数据更新签名
- `public SignatureEngine update(String data)` - Updates the signature with additional string data / 使用额外字符串数据更新签名
- `public byte[] doSign()` - Finalizes and returns signature after streaming updates / 完成流式更新后返回签名
- `public String doSignBase64()` - Finalizes and returns Base64 signature after streaming updates / 完成流式更新后返回 Base64 签名
- `public boolean doVerify(byte[] signature)` - Finalizes and verifies signature after streaming updates / 完成流式更新后验证签名

### SignatureEngine

### Sm2Signature
`public final class Sm2Signature` - SM2 signature implementation (Chinese national cryptographic standard). / SM2 签名实现（中国国家密码标准）。

## 7. opencode-base-hash

哈希组件，提供MurmurHash、xxHash、FNV、布隆过滤器、一致性哈希、SimHash

### Funnel
`public interface Funnel<T>` - Object serialization funnel for hashing / 用于哈希的对象序列化通道


### HashCode
`public abstract class HashCode` - Hash computation result wrapper / 哈希计算结果封装

- `public abstract int bits();` - Gets the number of bits in this hash / 获取此哈希的位数
- `public abstract int asInt();` - Converts to int (uses lower 32 bits) / 转换为int（使用低32位）
- `public abstract long asLong();` - Converts to long (uses lower 64 bits) / 转换为long（使用低64位）
- `public abstract long padToLong();` - Converts to long with padding for 32-bit hashes / 32位哈希填充后转换为long
- `public abstract byte[] asBytes();` - Converts to byte array / 转换为字节数组
- `public abstract int writeBytesTo(byte[] dest, int offset);` - Writes hash bytes to a destination array / 将哈希字节写入目标数组
- `public String toHex()` - Converts to hexadecimal string / 转换为十六进制字符串
- `public static HashCode fromInt(int hash)` - Creates a HashCode from an int value / 从int值创建HashCode
- `public static HashCode fromLong(long hash)` - Creates a HashCode from a long value / 从long值创建HashCode
- `public static HashCode fromBytes(byte[] bytes)` - Creates a HashCode from a byte array / 从字节数组创建HashCode
- `public static HashCode fromHex(String hex)` - Creates a HashCode from a hexadecimal string / 从十六进制字符串创建HashCode
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### HashFunction
`public interface HashFunction` - Hash function interface / 哈希函数接口


### Hasher
`public interface Hasher` - Streaming hash calculator interface / 流式哈希计算器接口


### OpenHash
`public final class OpenHash` - Hash utility facade class / 哈希工具门面类

- `public static HashFunction murmur3_32()` - MurmurHash3 32-bit / MurmurHash3 32位
- `public static HashFunction murmur3_32(int seed)` - MurmurHash3 32-bit with seed / 带种子的MurmurHash3 32位
- `public static HashFunction murmur3_128()` - MurmurHash3 128-bit / MurmurHash3 128位
- `public static HashFunction murmur3_128(int seed)` - MurmurHash3 128-bit with seed / 带种子的MurmurHash3 128位
- `public static HashFunction xxHash64()` - xxHash 64-bit / xxHash 64位
- `public static HashFunction xxHash64(long seed)` - xxHash 64-bit with seed / 带种子的xxHash 64位
- `public static HashFunction fnv1a_32()` - FNV-1a 32-bit / FNV-1a 32位
- `public static HashFunction fnv1a_64()` - FNV-1a 64-bit / FNV-1a 64位
- `public static HashFunction crc32()` - CRC32 / CRC32
- `public static HashFunction crc32c()` - CRC32C (Castagnoli) / CRC32C (Castagnoli)
- `public static HashFunction md5()` - MD5 (for checksums only, not secure) / MD5（仅用于校验，不安全）
- `public static HashFunction sha1()` - SHA-1 (for checksums only, not secure) / SHA-1（仅用于校验，不安全）
- `public static HashFunction sha256()` - SHA-256 / SHA-256
- `public static HashFunction sha512()` - SHA-512 / SHA-512
- `public static HashFunction sha3_256()` - SHA3-256 / SHA3-256
- `public static HashFunction sha3_512()` - SHA3-512 / SHA3-512
- `public static HashCode hash(CharSequence input, Charset charset, HashFunction function)` - Hashes a string / 哈希字符串
- `public static HashCode hash(byte[] input, HashFunction function)` - Hashes a byte array / 哈希字节数组
- `public static HashCode combineOrdered(HashCode... hashCodes)` - Combines hash codes in order / 按顺序组合哈希码
- `public static HashCode combineUnordered(HashCode... hashCodes)` - Combines hash codes unordered (XOR) / 无序组合哈希码（XOR）
- `public static <T> ConsistentHashBuilder<T> consistentHash()` - Creates a consistent hash ring builder / 创建一致性哈希环构建器
- `public static <T> BloomFilterBuilder<T> bloomFilter()` - Creates a bloom filter builder / 创建布隆过滤器构建器
- `public static <T> BloomFilterBuilder<T> bloomFilter(Funnel<? super T> funnel)` - Creates a bloom filter builder with funnel / 使用funnel创建布隆过滤器构建器
- `public static <T> CountingBloomFilter.Builder<T> countingBloomFilter()` - Creates a counting bloom filter builder / 创建计数布隆过滤器构建器
- `public static <T> CountingBloomFilter.Builder<T> countingBloomFilter(Funnel<? super T> funnel)` - Creates a counting bloom filter builder with funnel / 使用funnel创建计数布隆过滤器构建器
- `public static SimHashBuilder simHash()` - Creates a SimHash builder / 创建SimHash构建器

### BitArray
`public final class BitArray` - Bit array implementation for bloom filter / 布隆过滤器的位数组实现

- `public BitArray(long bitSize)` - Creates a non-thread-safe bit array / 创建非线程安全的位数组
- `public BitArray(long bitSize, boolean threadSafe)` - Creates a bit array with optional thread safety / 创建可选线程安全的位数组
- `public BitArray(long bitSize, long[] data)` - Creates a bit array from existing data / 从现有数据创建位数组
- `public boolean set(long index)` - Sets a bit to true / 将位设置为true
- `public boolean get(long index)` - Gets a bit value / 获取位值
- `public boolean clear(long index)` - Clears a bit / 清除位
- `public long bitSize()` - Gets the number of bits / 获取位数
- `public long bitCount()` - Gets the number of set bits (population count) / 获取已设置的位数（人口计数）
- `public void clearAll()` - Clears all bits / 清除所有位
- `public BitArray or(BitArray other)` - Performs OR operation with another bit array / 与另一个位数组执行OR操作
- `public byte[] toBytes()` - Converts to byte array for serialization / 转换为字节数组用于序列化
- `public static BitArray fromBytes(byte[] bytes)` - Creates a bit array from byte array / 从字节数组创建位数组

### BloomFilter
`public final class BloomFilter<T>` - Bloom filter implementation / 布隆过滤器实现

- `public boolean put(T element)` - Adds an element to the filter / 向过滤器添加元素
- `public int putAll(Iterable<? extends T> elements)` - Adds multiple elements to the filter / 向过滤器添加多个元素
- `public boolean test(T element)` - Tests if an element might be in the filter / 测试元素是否可能在过滤器中
- `public boolean mightContain(T element)` - Tests if an element might be in the filter / 测试元素是否可能在过滤器中
- `public double expectedFpp()` - Gets the expected false positive probability based on current fill / 根据当前填充获取...
- `public long approximateElementCount()` - Gets the approximate number of elements inserted / 获取大约的已插入元素数量
- `public long bitSize()` - Gets the bit array size / 获取位数组大小
- `public int hashCount()` - Gets the number of hash functions / 获取哈希函数数量
- `public BloomFilter<T> merge(BloomFilter<T> other)` - Merges another bloom filter into this one / 将另一个布隆过滤器合并到此过滤器
- `public byte[] toBytes()` - Serializes to byte array / 序列化为字节数组
- `public static <T> BloomFilter<T> fromBytes(byte[] bytes, Funnel<? super T> funnel)` - Deserializes from byte array / 从字节数组反序列化
- `public static <T> BloomFilterBuilder<T> builder(Funnel<? super T> funnel)` - Creates a builder / 创建构建器

### BloomFilterBuilder
`public final class BloomFilterBuilder<T>` - Builder for bloom filter / 布隆过滤器构建器

- `public BloomFilterBuilder(Funnel<? super T> funnel)` - Creates a builder with the given funnel / 使用给定的 funnel 创建构建器
- `public BloomFilterBuilder<T> expectedInsertions(long expectedInsertions)` - Sets the expected number of insertions / 设置预期插入数量
- `public BloomFilterBuilder<T> fpp(double fpp)` - Sets the false positive probability (0.0 - 1.0) / 设置误判率（0.0 - 1.0）
- `public BloomFilterBuilder<T> hashFunction(HashFunction hashFunction)` - Sets the hash function / 设置哈希函数
- `public BloomFilterBuilder<T> threadSafe(boolean threadSafe)` - Sets whether to use thread-safe bit array / 设置是否使用线程安全的位数组
- `public BloomFilter<T> build()` - Builds the bloom filter / 构建布隆过滤器

### CountingBloomFilter
`public final class CountingBloomFilter<T>` - Counting bloom filter implementation / 计数布隆过滤器实现

- `public boolean put(T element)` - Adds an element to the filter / 向过滤器添加元素
- `public boolean remove(T element)` - Removes an element from the filter / 从过滤器移除元素
- `public boolean mightContain(T element)` - Tests if an element might be in the filter / 测试元素是否可能在过滤器中
- `public int count(T element)` - Gets the minimum count for an element / 获取元素的最小计数
- `public void clear()` - Clears all counters / 清除所有计数器
- `public static <T> Builder<T> builder(Funnel<? super T> funnel)` - Creates a builder / 创建构建器

### ConsistentHash
`public final class ConsistentHash<T>` - Consistent hash ring implementation / 一致性哈希环实现

- `public T get(Object key)` - Gets the node for a key / 获取键对应的节点
- `public List<T> get(Object key, int replicas)` - Gets multiple nodes for a key (for replicas) / 获取键对应的多个节点（用于副本）
- `public T locate(long hashValue)` - Locates the node for a given hash value / 根据哈希值定位节点
- `public List<T> locateAll(long hashValue, int count)` - Locates multiple nodes for a given hash value / 根据哈希值定位多个节点
- `public VirtualNode<T> getVirtualNode(long hashValue)` - Gets the virtual node for a hash value / 获取哈希值对应的虚拟节点
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Checks if the hash ring is empty / 检查哈希环是否为空
- `public int getVirtualNodeCount()` - Gets the total virtual node count / 获取虚拟节点总数
- `public void addNode(String nodeId, T nodeData)` - Adds a node with default weight / 添加默认权重的节点
- `public void addNode(String nodeId, T nodeData, int weight)` - Adds a weighted node / 添加带权重的节点
- `public void removeNode(String nodeId)` - Removes a node / 移除节点
- `public Set<HashNode<T>> getNodes()` - Gets all physical nodes / 获取所有物理节点
- `public int getNodeCount()` - Gets the physical node count / 获取物理节点数量
- `public void clear()` - Clears all nodes / 清空所有节点
- `public Map<String, Integer> getDistribution(Collection<?> keys)` - Gets key distribution across nodes / 获取键在节点间的分布
- `public int getMigrationCount(String nodeId, Collection<?> keys)` - Gets the migration count if a node is removed / 获取如果移除节点需要迁移的键数量
- `public static <T> ConsistentHashBuilder<T> builder()` - Creates a builder / 创建构建器

### ConsistentHashBuilder
`public final class ConsistentHashBuilder<T>` - Builder for consistent hash ring / 一致性哈希环构建器

- `public ConsistentHashBuilder<T> hashFunction(HashFunction hashFunction)` - Sets the hash function / 设置哈希函数
- `public ConsistentHashBuilder<T> virtualNodeCount(int count)` - Sets the virtual node count per physical node / 设置每个物理节点的虚拟节点数
- `public ConsistentHashBuilder<T> addNode(String nodeId, T nodeData)` - Adds a node with default weight / 添加默认权重的节点
- `public ConsistentHashBuilder<T> addNode(String nodeId, T nodeData, int weight)` - Adds a weighted node / 添加带权重的节点
- `public ConsistentHashBuilder<T> addNodes(Collection<HashNode<T>> nodes)` - Adds multiple nodes / 添加多个节点
- `public ConsistentHashBuilder<T> concurrent(boolean concurrent)` - Sets whether to use concurrent mode / 设置是否使用并发模式
- `public ConsistentHash<T> build()` - Builds the consistent hash ring / 构建一致性哈希环

- `public static <T> HashNode<T> of(String id, T data, int weight)` - Creates a weighted node / 创建带权重的节点

- `public static OpenHashException invalidBloomFilterConfig(String reason)` - Creates an invalid bloom filter configuration exception / 创建无效布隆过滤器配置异常

- `public SimHashBuilder bits(int bits)` - Sets the fingerprint bit size (32 or 64) / 设置指纹位大小（32或64）

`public interface Tokenizer` - Tokenizer interface for SimHash text processing / SimHash 文本处理的分词器接口

## 8. opencode-base-lock

锁组件，提供可重入锁、读写锁、自旋锁、分段锁、命名锁工厂、分布式锁

### Lock
`public interface Lock<T>` - Unified Lock Interface for Local and Distributed Locks / 本地锁和分布式锁的统一抽象接口


### LockConfig
`public record LockConfig(` - Lock Configuration Record - Immutable Lock Settings / 锁配置记录 - 不可变锁设置

- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a new configuration builder / 创建新的配置构建器
- `public static LockConfig defaults()` - Gets default configuration with reasonable defaults / 获取具有合理默认值的默认配置

### LockGuard
`public record LockGuard<T>(Lock<T> lock, T token)` - Lock Guard for Automatic Resource Release / 锁守卫 - 用于自动资源释放

- `public void close()` - Releases the lock when the guard is closed / 当守卫关闭时释放锁

### LockType
`public enum LockType` - Lock Type Enumeration / 锁类型枚举


### OpenLock
`public final class OpenLock` - OpenLock Facade - Unified Entry Point for Lock Component / OpenLock 门面 - 锁组件统一入口

- `public static Lock<Long> lock()` - Creates a local reentrant lock with default configuration / 使用默认配置创建本地可重入锁
- `public static Lock<Long> lock(LockConfig config)` - Creates a local lock with specified configuration / 使用指定配置创建本地锁
- `public static Lock<Long> fairLock()` - Creates a fair lock that grants access in FIFO order / 创建按FIFO顺序授予访问权限的公平锁
- `public static ReadWriteLock<Long> readWriteLock()` - Creates a read-write lock allowing concurrent readers / 创建允许并发读取的读写锁
- `public static ReadWriteLock<Long> readWriteLock(LockConfig config)` - Creates a read-write lock with specified configuration / 使用指定配置创建读写锁
- `public static Lock<Long> spinLock()` - Creates a spin lock for very short critical sections / 为极短临界区创建自旋锁
- `public static Lock<Long> spinLock(int maxSpinCount)` - Creates a spin lock with custom max spin count / 使用自定义最大自旋次数创建自旋锁
- `public static <K> SegmentLock<K> segmentLock()` - Creates a segment lock with default 16 segments / 使用默认16个分段创建分段锁
- `public static <K> SegmentLock<K> segmentLock(int segments)` - Creates a segment lock with specified number of segments / 使用指定分段数创建分段锁
- `public static NamedLockFactory namedLockFactory()` - Creates a named lock factory with default settings / 使用默认设置创建命名锁工厂
- `public static NamedLockFactory namedLockFactory(int stripes)` - Creates a named lock factory with specified stripe count / 使用指定条纹数创建命名锁工厂
- `public static LockGroup.Builder lockGroup()` - Creates a lock group builder for atomic multi-lock acquisition / 创建用于原子多锁获取的锁...
- `public static LockManager manager()` - Gets the default singleton lock manager / 获取默认单例锁管理器
- `public static LockManager manager(LockConfig config)` - Creates a new lock manager with specified configuration / 使用指定配置创建新的锁管理器
- `public static void execute(Runnable action)` - Executes action with a new temporary lock / 使用新的临时锁执行操作
- `public static <R> R executeWithResult(Supplier<R> supplier)` - Executes supplier with a new temporary lock and returns result / 使用新的临时锁执行并返回结果
- `public static LockConfig.Builder configBuilder()` - Creates a lock configuration builder / 创建锁配置构建器
- `public static LockConfig defaultConfig()` - Gets default lock configuration / 获取默认锁配置
- `public static DistributedLockConfig.Builder distributedConfigBuilder()` - Creates a distributed lock configuration builder / 创建分布式锁配置构建器
- `public static DistributedLockConfig defaultDistributedConfig()` - Gets default distributed lock configuration / 获取默认分布式锁配置

### ReadWriteLock
`public interface ReadWriteLock<T>` - Read-Write Lock Interface for Concurrent Read Access / 读写锁接口 - 支持并发读取访问


### DistributedLock
`public interface DistributedLock` - Distributed Lock Interface with TTL and Extension Support / 支持TTL和延长的分布式锁接口


### DistributedLockConfig
`public record DistributedLockConfig(` - Distributed Lock Configuration Record / 分布式锁配置记录

- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a new configuration builder / 创建新的配置构建器
- `public static DistributedLockConfig defaults()` - Gets the default configuration with reasonable defaults / 获取具有合理默认值的默认配置

### OpenLockAcquireException
`public class OpenLockAcquireException` - Lock Acquisition Exception for Non-Timeout Failures / 非超时失败的锁获取异常

- `public OpenLockAcquireException(String message)` - Constructs a new acquire exception with message / 使用消息构造新的获取异常
- `public OpenLockAcquireException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Constructs a new acquire exception with message and cause / 使用消息和原因构造新的获取异常
- `public OpenLockAcquireException(String message, String lockName, Throwable cause)` - Constructs a new acquire exception with lock name and cause / 使用锁名称和原因构造新的获取异常

### OpenLockException
`public class OpenLockException` - Base Lock Exception for All Lock-Related Errors / 所有锁相关错误的基础锁异常

- `public OpenLockException(String message)` - Constructs a new lock exception with message / 使用消息构造新的锁异常
- `public OpenLockException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Constructs a new lock exception with message and cause / 使用消息和原因构造新的锁异常
- `public OpenLockException(String message, String lockName, LockErrorType errorType)` - Constructs a new lock exception with full details / 使用完整详情构造新的锁异常
- `public OpenLockException(String message, String lockName, LockErrorType errorType, Throwable cause)` - Constructs a new lock exception with full details and cause / 使用完整详情和原因构造新的锁异常
- `public String lockName()` - Gets the name of the lock that caused the exception / 获取导致异常的锁名称
- `public LockErrorType errorType()` - Gets the type of lock error that occurred / 获取发生的锁错误类型

`public class OpenLockTimeoutException` - Lock Timeout Exception for Acquisition Timeout / 获取超时的锁超时异常

- `public OpenLockTimeoutException(String message)` - Constructs a new timeout exception with message / 使用消息构造新的超时异常
- `public OpenLockTimeoutException(String message, Duration waitTime)` - Constructs a new timeout exception with wait time / 使用等待时间构造新的超时异常
- `public OpenLockTimeoutException(String message, String lockName, Duration waitTime)` - Constructs a new timeout exception with lock name and wait time / 使用锁名称和等待时间构...
- `public Duration waitTime()` - Gets the time spent waiting before the timeout occurred / 获取超时发生前的等待时间

### LocalLock
`public class LocalLock` - Local Lock Implementation Based on JDK ReentrantLock / 基于JDK ReentrantLock的本地锁实现

- `public LocalLock()` - Creates a local lock with default configuration / 使用默认配置创建本地锁
- `public LocalLock(LockConfig config)` - Creates a local lock with specified configuration / 使用指定配置创建本地锁
- `public LockGuard<Long> lock()` - Acquires the lock and returns a guard / 获取锁并返回一个锁守卫
- `public LockGuard<Long> lock(Duration timeout)` - Acquires the lock with timeout / 带超时获取锁
- `public boolean tryLock()` - Tries to acquire the lock without waiting / 尝试获取锁（不等待）
- `public boolean tryLock(Duration timeout)` - Tries to acquire the lock within timeout / 尝试在超时内获取锁
- `public LockGuard<Long> lockInterruptibly()` - Acquires the lock in an interruptible manner / 以可中断方式获取锁
- `public void unlock()` - Releases the lock / 释放锁
- `public boolean isHeldByCurrentThread()` - Checks if the lock is held by current thread / 检查当前线程是否持有锁
- `public Optional<Long> getToken()` - Gets the current lock token / 获取当前锁令牌
- `public int getHoldCount()` - Gets the hold count for current thread / 获取当前线程的持有计数
- `public boolean isFair()` - Checks if this lock uses fair ordering policy / 检查此锁是否使用公平排序策略
- `public boolean hasQueuedThreads()` - Checks if any threads are waiting to acquire this lock / 检查是否有线程正在等待获取此锁
- `public int getQueueLength()` - Gets the estimated number of threads waiting to acquire this lock / 获取等待获取此锁的...
- `public Optional<LockMetrics> getMetrics()` - Gets the lock metrics if metrics collection is enabled / 如果启用了指标收集，则获取锁指标

### LocalReadWriteLock
`public class LocalReadWriteLock` - Local Read-Write Lock Implementation Based on JDK ReentrantReadWriteLock / 基于...

- `public LocalReadWriteLock()` - Creates a read-write lock with default configuration / 使用默认配置创建读写锁
- `public LocalReadWriteLock(LockConfig config)` - Creates a read-write lock with specified configuration / 使用指定配置创建读写锁
- `public Lock<Long> readLock()` - Gets the read lock / 获取读锁
- `public Lock<Long> writeLock()` - Gets the write lock / 获取写锁
- `public int getReadLockCount()` - Gets the total number of read locks held / 获取持有的读锁总数
- `public int getReadHoldCount()` - Gets the number of read locks held by the current thread / 获取当前线程持有的读锁数量
- `public boolean isWriteLocked()` - Checks if the write lock is held by any thread / 检查写锁是否被任何线程持有
- `public boolean isWriteLockedByCurrentThread()` - Checks if the write lock is held by the current thread / 检查当前线程是否持有写锁
- `public int getWriteHoldCount()` - Gets the number of write locks held by the current thread / 获取当前线程持有的写锁数量

### SegmentLock

- `public int getSegmentIndex(K key)` - Gets the segment index for the specified key / 获取指定键对应的分段索引

- `public boolean tryLock(Duration timeout)` - Tries to acquire the spin lock within timeout / 尝试在超时内获取自旋锁

### LockGroup
`public class LockGroup` - Lock Group for Atomic Multi-Lock Acquisition with Deadlock Prevention / 带死锁预防...

- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a new lock group builder / 创建新的锁组构建器
- `public LockGroupGuard lockAll()` - Acquires all locks in the group atomically / 原子获取组内所有锁
- `public boolean tryLockAll()` - Tries to acquire all locks without waiting / 无等待尝试获取所有锁
- `public boolean tryLockAll(Duration timeout)` - Tries to acquire all locks with specified timeout / 使用指定超时尝试获取所有锁
- `public void releaseAll()` - Releases all acquired locks in reverse order / 按相反顺序释放所有已获取的锁
- `public int size()` - Gets the total number of locks in the group / 获取锁组中的锁总数
- `public int acquiredCount()` - Gets the number of currently acquired locks / 获取当前已获取的锁数量
- `public void close()` - Releases all acquired locks and closes the group / 释放所有已获取的锁并关闭锁组
- `public record LockGroupGuard(LockGroup group) implements AutoCloseable` - Lock Group Guard for Automatic Resource Release / 锁组守卫 - 用于自动资源释放

### LockManager
`public class LockManager` - Lock Manager for Centralized Lock Creation and Management / 集中式锁创建和管理的锁管理器

- `public LockManager()` - Creates a lock manager with default configuration / 使用默认配置创建锁管理器
- `public LockManager(LockConfig localConfig)` - Creates a lock manager with specified configuration / 使用指定配置创建锁管理器

- `public boolean hasLock(String name)` - Checks if a lock with the given name exists / 检查给定名称的锁是否存在
- `public boolean removeLock(String name)` - Removes a lock by name and closes it / 按名称移除锁并关闭它

- `public void close()` - Closes the lock manager and releases all managed locks / 关闭锁管理器并释放所有托管锁

### DefaultLockMetrics
`public class DefaultLockMetrics` - Default Lock Metrics Implementation with Lock-Free Statistics / 使用无锁统计的默认锁指标实现

- `public void recordAcquire(Duration waitTime)` - Records a successful lock acquisition / 记录成功的锁获取
- `public void recordRelease()` - Records a lock release / 记录锁释放
- `public void recordTimeout()` - Records a lock acquisition timeout / 记录锁获取超时
- `public long getAcquireCount()` - Gets the total acquire count / 获取总获取计数
- `public long getReleaseCount()` - Gets the total release count / 获取总释放计数
- `public long getTimeoutCount()` - Gets the total timeout count / 获取总超时计数
- `public long getContentionCount()` - Gets the total contention count / 获取总竞争计数
- `public Duration getAverageWaitTime()` - Gets the average wait time / 获取平均等待时间
- `public Duration getMaxWaitTime()` - Gets the maximum wait time / 获取最大等待时间
- `public int getCurrentHoldCount()` - Gets the current hold count / 获取当前持有计数
- `public LockStats snapshot()` - Creates an immutable metrics snapshot / 创建不可变的指标快照
- `public void reset()` - Resets all statistics / 重置所有统计数据

### LockMetrics
`public interface LockMetrics` - Lock Metrics Interface for Lock Usage Statistics / 锁使用统计的锁指标接口

## 9. opencode-base-pool

对象池组件，提供通用对象池、键值对象池、线程本地池、软引用池、虚拟线程池

- `public static <K, V> KeyedObjectPool<K, V> createKeyedPool(` - Creates a keyed object pool with custom configuration. / 使用自定义配置创建键控对象池。
- `public static <T> ObjectPool<T> createThreadLocalPool(` - Creates a thread-local pool (one object per thread). / 创建线程本地池（每线程一个对象）。
- `public static <T> ObjectPool<T> createSoftReferencePool(` - Creates a soft reference pool (GC-friendly). / 创建软引用池（GC友好）。
- `public static <T> ObjectPool<T> createSoftReferencePool(` - Creates a soft reference pool with custom configuration. / 使用自定义配置创建软引用池。
- `public static <T> ObjectPool<T> createVirtualThreadPool(` - Creates a virtual thread optimized pool with default configuration. / 使用默认配置创...
- `public static <T> ObjectPool<T> createVirtualThreadPool(` - Creates a virtual thread optimized pool with custom configuration. / 使用自定义配置创...
- `public static PoolConfig.Builder configBuilder()` - Creates a pool configuration builder. / 创建池配置构建器。
- `public static PoolConfig defaultConfig()` - Gets the default pool configuration. / 获取默认池配置。
- `public static <T> EvictionPolicy<T> idleTimeEviction(Duration maxIdleTime)` - Creates an idle time eviction policy. / 创建空闲时间驱逐策略。
- `public static <T> EvictionPolicy<T> lruEviction(int maxObjects)` - Creates an LRU eviction policy. / 创建LRU驱逐策略。
- `public static <T> EvictionPolicy<T> lfuEviction(long minBorrowCount)` - Creates an LFU eviction policy. / 创建LFU驱逐策略。
- `public static <T> EvictionPolicy<T> allEviction(EvictionPolicy<T>... policies)` - Creates a composite eviction policy (all must match). / 创建组合驱逐策略（全部必须匹配）。
- `public static <T> EvictionPolicy<T> anyEviction(EvictionPolicy<T>... policies)` - Creates a composite eviction policy (any can match). / 创建组合驱逐策略（任一匹配即可）。

- `public Optional<Instant> borrowTime()` - Gets borrow time / 获取借用时间
- `public Optional<Instant> returnTime()` - Gets return time / 获取归还时间
- `public boolean isVirtualThread()` - Checks if on virtual thread / 检查是否在虚拟线程上

- `public static OpenPoolException passivateFailed(String poolName, Throwable cause)` - Creates object passivation failed exception. / 创建对象钝化失败异常。

- `public static ValidationPolicy recommended()` - Creates a recommended validation policy (borrow + idle). / 创建推荐的验证策略（借出 + 空闲）。
- `public static ValidationPolicy strict()` - Creates a strict validation policy (all validations). / 创建严格的验证策略（所有验证）。
- `public boolean hasAnyValidation()` - Checks if any validation is enabled. / 检查是否启用了任何验证。

### WaitPolicy
`public enum WaitPolicy` - WaitPolicy - Wait Policy Enumeration / WaitPolicy - 等待策略枚举


### PooledObjectTracker
`public class PooledObjectTracker<T>` - PooledObjectTracker - Pooled Object Tracker / PooledObjectTracker - 池化对象追踪器

- `public PooledObjectTracker()` - Creates a tracker with default settings. / 使用默认设置创建追踪器。
- `public PooledObjectTracker(` - Creates a tracker with custom settings. / 使用自定义设置创建追踪器。
- `public void trackBorrow(PooledObject<T> pooledObject)` - Tracks a borrowed object. / 追踪借用的对象。
- `public void trackReturn(PooledObject<T> pooledObject)` - Tracks a returned object. / 追踪归还的对象。
- `public List<TrackedObject<T>> getTrackedObjects()` - Gets all currently tracked objects. / 获取所有当前追踪的对象。
- `public List<TrackedObject<T>> getAbandonedObjects()` - Gets abandoned objects (borrowed longer than timeout). / 获取废弃对象（借用超过超时时间）。
- `public int checkAndHandleAbandoned()` - Checks for abandoned objects and invokes callback. / 检查废弃对象并调用回调。
- `public int getTrackedCount()` - Gets the number of currently tracked objects. / 获取当前追踪的对象数量。
- `public void clear()` - Clears all tracked objects. / 清除所有追踪对象。
- `public record TrackedObject<T>(` - Tracked object information. / 追踪对象信息。

### TenantCache
`public class TenantCache<K, V>` - Tenant Cache - Multi-tenant cache with isolation and per-tenant limits / 租户缓存...

- `public static <K, V> Builder<K, V> builder(String name)` - Create builder for TenantCache / 创建 TenantCache 构建器
- `public V get(String tenantId, K key)` - Get value for tenant and key / 获取租户和键对应的值
- `public V get(String tenantId, K key, Function<? super K, ? extends V> loader)` - Get value with loader / 使用加载器获取值
- `public void put(String tenantId, K key, V value)` - Put value for tenant / 为租户放入值
- `public void put(String tenantId, K key, V value, Duration ttl)` - Put value with custom TTL / 使用自定义 TTL 放入值
- `public void putAll(String tenantId, Map<? extends K, ? extends V> map)` - Put all entries for tenant / 为租户批量放入
- `public void invalidate(String tenantId, K key)` - Invalidate key for tenant / 使租户的键失效
- `public void invalidateAll(String tenantId)` - Invalidate all keys for tenant / 使租户的所有键失效
- `public void invalidateAll()` - Invalidate all entries for all tenants / 使所有租户的所有条目失效
- `public boolean containsKey(String tenantId, K key)` - Check if key exists for tenant / 检查租户的键是否存在
- `public Cache<K, V> forTenant(String tenantId)` - Get tenant-scoped cache view / 获取租户作用域的缓存视图
- `public Set<String> tenants()` - Get all active tenant IDs / 获取所有活跃租户 ID
- `public long tenantSize(String tenantId)` - Get tenant cache size / 获取租户缓存大小
- `public CacheStats tenantStats(String tenantId)` - Get tenant statistics / 获取租户统计信息
- `public CacheStats aggregatedStats()` - Get aggregated stats across all tenants / 获取所有租户的聚合统计
- `public void removeTenant(String tenantId)` - Remove tenant and all its cached data / 移除租户及其所有缓存数据
- `public void setTenantQuota(String tenantId, long maxSize)` - Set tenant quota / 设置租户配额
- `public void setTenantQuota(String tenantId, long maxSize, Duration ttl)` - Set tenant quota with TTL / 设置带 TTL 的租户配额
- `public String name()` - Get cache name / 获取缓存名称
- `public long totalSize()` - Get total size across all tenants / 获取所有租户的总大小
- `public void cleanUp()` - Clean up all tenant caches / 清理所有租户缓存

### AccessPatternAnalyzer
`public class AccessPatternAnalyzer<K>` - Access Pattern Analyzer - Analyzes cache access patterns / 访问模式分析器 - 分析缓存访问模式

- `public static <K> Builder<K> builder()` - Create a builder / 创建构建器
- `public static <K> AccessPatternAnalyzer<K> create()` - Create with default settings / 使用默认设置创建
- `public void recordAccess(K key)` - Record an access to a key / 记录键的访问
- `public void recordAccess(K key, long count)` - Record multiple accesses to a key / 记录键的多次访问
- `public void recordMiss(K key)` - Record a miss (access but not found) / 记录未命中（访问但未找到）
- `public Set<K> getHotKeys()` - Get hot keys (frequently accessed) / 获取热点键（频繁访问）
- `public Set<K> getColdKeys()` - Get cold keys (not accessed recently) / 获取冷数据键（最近未访问）
- `public List<KeyAccessCount<K>> getTopK()` - Get top K most accessed keys / 获取访问最多的 Top K 键
- `public List<KeyAccessCount<K>> getTopK(int k)` - Get top K most accessed keys / 获取访问最多的 Top K 键
- `public List<KeyAccessCount<K>> getBottomK(int k)` - Get bottom K least accessed keys / 获取访问最少的 Bottom K 键
- `public long getAccessCount(K key)` - Get access count for a specific key / 获取特定键的访问计数
- `public long getMissCount(K key)` - Get miss count for a specific key / 获取特定键的未命中计数
- `public Instant getLastAccess(K key)` - Get last access time for a key / 获取键的最后访问时间
- `public AccessPatternReport<K> analyze()` - Generate full analysis report / 生成完整分析报告
- `public void remove(K key)` - Remove tracking for a key / 移除键的跟踪
- `public void clear()` - Clear all tracking data / 清除所有跟踪数据
- `public int pruneCold(Duration age)` - Prune cold entries older than specified age / 修剪超过指定年龄的冷条目
- `public int size()` - Get tracked key count / 获取跟踪的键数量
- `public record KeyAccessCount<K>(K key, long count)` - Key with access count / 带访问计数的键
- `public record AccessPatternReport<K>(` - Access pattern analysis report / 访问模式分析报告

### BulkOperations
`public class BulkOperations<K, V>` - Bulk Operations - Enhanced bulk operations for cache / 批量操作 - 缓存的增强批量操作

- `public static <K, V> BulkOperations<K, V> on(Cache<K, V> cache)` - Create bulk operations for a cache / 为缓存创建批量操作
- `public boolean bulkPutAll(Map<? extends K, ? extends V> entries)` - Bulk put all entries with best-effort rollback on failure. / 批量放置所有条目，失败时尽最大努...
- `public Map<K, V> atomicInvalidateAll(Iterable<? extends K> keys)` - Atomic invalidate all - either all succeed or none / 原子使全部无效 - 要么全部成功，要么都不
- `public boolean putAllIfAllPresent(Map<? extends K, ? extends V> entries)` - Put all only if all keys are already present / 仅当所有键都已存在时才放置全部
- `public boolean putAllIfAllAbsent(Map<? extends K, ? extends V> entries)` - Put all only if all keys are absent / 仅当所有键都不存在时才放置全部
- `public BulkPutResult<K> putAllIfAbsent(Map<? extends K, ? extends V> entries)` - Put entries that are absent, skip existing / 放置不存在的条目，跳过已存在的
- `public boolean invalidateAllIfMatch(Map<? extends K, ? extends V> expected)` - Invalidate all only if all values match expected / 仅当所有值与预期匹配时才使全部无效
- `public int batchProcess(Iterable<? extends K> keys, int batchSize,` - Process keys in batches / 分批处理键
- `public CompletableFuture<BatchResult> batchProcessParallel(` - Process keys in parallel batches / 并行分批处理键
- `public Map<K, V> computeAll(Iterable<? extends K> keys,` - Compute values for all specified keys / 为所有指定的键计算值
- `public Map<K, V> computeAllIfAbsent(Iterable<? extends K> keys,` - Compute values for all absent keys / 为所有不存在的键计算值
- `public int replaceAllMatching(java.util.function.BiPredicate<K, V> predicate,` - Replace all values matching predicate / 替换所有匹配谓词的值
- `public void putAllWithTtl(Map<? extends K, ? extends TtlValue<V>> entries)` - Put all with individual TTLs / 放置全部并带有各自的 TTL
- `public record BulkPutResult<K>(Set<K> inserted, Set<K> skipped)` - Result of bulk put operation / 批量放置操作的结果

`public class DeadLetterQueue<K>` - Dead Letter Queue - Tracks failed cache load operations / 死信队列 - 跟踪失败的缓存加载操作

- `public static <K> Builder<K> builder()` - Create a builder / 创建构建器

- `public void startRetryProcessor()` - Start automatic retry processor / 启动自动重试处理器
- `public void stopRetryProcessor()` - Stop automatic retry processor / 停止自动重试处理器
- `public int processRetries()` - Process pending retries / 处理待处理的重试
- `public boolean retry(K key)` - Retry a single failed entry / 重试单个失败的条目
- `public List<FailedEntry<K>> drain(int maxEntries)` - Drain up to N entries from the DLQ / 从 DLQ 排空最多 N 个条目
- `public List<FailedEntry<K>> drainAll()` - Drain all entries / 排空所有条目
- `public List<FailedEntry<K>> drainMatching(java.util.function.Predicate<FailedEntry<K>> predicate)` - Drain entries matching predicate / 排空匹配谓词的条目
- `public boolean contains(K key)` - Check if key is in DLQ / 检查键是否在 DLQ 中
- `public FailedEntry<K> get(K key)` - Get failed entry for key / 获取键的失败条目
- `public Set<K> getFailedKeys()` - Get all failed keys / 获取所有失败的键
- `public int size()` - Get current queue size / 获取当前队列大小
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Check if DLQ is empty / 检查 DLQ 是否为空
- `public DlqAnalysis<K> analyze()` - Analyze DLQ contents / 分析 DLQ 内容
- `public DlqStats getStats()` - Get DLQ statistics / 获取 DLQ 统计
- `public void close()` - Closes the DLQ and stops retry processor / 关闭 DLQ 并停止重试处理器

## 11. opencode-base-json

JSON组件，支持多provider（Jackson/Gson等），序列化/反序列化、JSONPath、diff/patch

### JsonConfig
`public final class JsonConfig` - JSON Config - Configuration for JSON Processing / JSON 配置 - JSON 处理的配置

- `public static final JsonConfig DEFAULT = builder().build();` - Default configuration / 默认配置
- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a new builder. / 创建新的构建器。
- `public Builder toBuilder()` - Creates a builder initialized with this config. / 创建使用此配置初始化的构建器。
- `public boolean isEnabled(JsonFeature feature)` - Returns whether a feature is enabled. / 返回特性是否启用。
- `public Set<JsonFeature> getEnabledFeatures()` - Returns the enabled features. / 返回启用的特性。
- `public JsonNaming.Strategy getNamingStrategy()` - Returns the naming strategy. / 返回命名策略。
- `public String getDateFormat()` - Returns the date format pattern. / 返回日期格式模式。
- `public ZoneId getTimezone()` - Returns the timezone. / 返回时区。
- `public int getMaxDepth()` - Returns the maximum nesting depth. / 返回最大嵌套深度。
- `public int getMaxStringLength()` - Returns the maximum string length. / 返回最大字符串长度。
- `public int getMaxSize()` - Returns the maximum array/object size. / 返回最大数组/对象大小。
- `public String getIndent()` - Returns the indentation string. / 返回缩进字符串。

### JsonNode

### OpenJson
`public final class OpenJson` - OpenJson - Unified JSON Processing Facade / OpenJson - 统一 JSON 处理门面

- `public static OpenJson withConfig(JsonConfig config)` - Creates a new OpenJson instance with the specified configuration / 使用指定配置创建新的 OpenJson 实例

- `public static String toJson(Object obj)` - Serializes an object to JSON string. / 将对象序列化为 JSON 字符串。
- `public static byte[] toJsonBytes(Object obj)` - Serializes an object to JSON bytes. / 将对象序列化为 JSON 字节数组。
