- `public static void toJson(Object obj, Writer writer)` - Serializes an object to a Writer. / 将对象序列化到 Writer。
- `public static String toPrettyJson(Object obj)` - Serializes an object to pretty-printed JSON. / 将对象序列化为美化的 JSON。
- `public static <T> T fromJson(String json, Class<T> clazz)` - Deserializes JSON string to an object. / 将 JSON 字符串反序列化为对象。
- `public static <T> T fromJson(String json, TypeReference<T> typeReference)` - Deserializes JSON string using TypeReference. / 使用 TypeReference 反序列化 JSON 字符串。
- `public static <T> T fromJson(byte[] json, Class<T> clazz)` - Deserializes JSON bytes to an object. / 将 JSON 字节数组反序列化为对象。
- `public static <T> T fromJson(InputStream input, Class<T> clazz)` - Deserializes from InputStream. / 从输入流反序列化。
- `public static <T> T fromJson(Reader reader, Class<T> clazz)` - Deserializes from Reader. / 从 Reader 反序列化。
- `public static <T> List<T> fromJsonArray(String json, Class<T> elementType)` - Deserializes JSON array to List. / 将 JSON 数组反序列化为 List。
- `public static <K, V> Map<K, V> fromJsonMap(String json, Class<K> keyType, Class<V> valueType)` - Deserializes JSON object to Map. / 将 JSON 对象反序列化为 Map。
- `public static JsonNode parse(String json)` - Parses JSON string to JsonNode tree. / 将 JSON 字符串解析为 JsonNode 树。
- `public static JsonNode parse(byte[] json)` - Parses JSON bytes to JsonNode tree. / 将 JSON 字节数组解析为 JsonNode 树。
- `public static JsonNode toTree(Object obj)` - Converts object to JsonNode tree. / 将对象转换为 JsonNode 树。
- `public static <T> T treeToValue(JsonNode node, Class<T> clazz)` - Converts JsonNode to object. / 将 JsonNode 转换为对象。
- `public static JsonNode at(JsonNode node, String pointer)` - Evaluates a JSON Pointer against a node. / 对节点求值 JSON Pointer。
- `public static List<JsonNode> select(JsonNode node, String path)` - Selects nodes using JSONPath. / 使用 JSONPath 选择节点。
- `public static JsonNode selectFirst(JsonNode node, String path)` - Selects first matching node using JSONPath. / 使用 JSONPath 选择第一个匹配的节点。
- `public static JsonDiff.DiffResult diff(JsonNode source, JsonNode target)` - Computes diff between two JSON documents. / 计算两个 JSON 文档之间的差异。
- `public static JsonNode patch(JsonNode target, JsonPatch patch)` - Applies a JSON Patch to a document. / 将 JSON Patch 应用于文档。
- `public static JsonNode mergePatch(JsonNode target, JsonNode patch)` - Applies a JSON Merge Patch to a document. / 将 JSON Merge Patch 应用于文档。
- `public static JsonSchemaValidator.ValidationResult validate(JsonNode data, JsonNode schema)` - Validates JSON against a schema. / 根据 schema 验证 JSON。
- `public static void validateOrThrow(JsonNode data, JsonNode schema)` - Validates and throws if invalid. / 验证，如果无效则抛出异常。
- `public static JsonReader createReader(InputStream input)` - Creates a JsonReader for an InputStream. / 为输入流创建 JsonReader。
- `public static JsonReader createReader(Reader reader)` - Creates a JsonReader for a Reader. / 为 Reader 创建 JsonReader。

- `public JsonNode parseTree(String json)` - Parses JSON to tree. / 将 JSON 解析为树。
- `public JsonNode parseTree(byte[] json)` - Parses JSON bytes to tree. / 将 JSON 字节数组解析为树。
- `public JsonNode valueToTree(Object obj)` - Converts an object to a JsonNode tree / 将对象转换为JsonNode树 - Converts object to tree. / 将对象转换为树。
- `public <T> T treeToObject(JsonNode node, Class<T> clazz)` - Converts tree to object. / 将树转换为对象。
- `public JsonConfig getConfig()` - Returns the configuration. / 返回配置。
- `public JsonProvider getProvider()` - Returns the provider. / 返回提供者。

- `public Class<? super T> getRawType()` - Returns the raw class of the referenced type. / 返回引用类型的原始类。
- `public boolean isParameterized()` - Returns whether this is a parameterized type. / 返回此是否为参数化类型。
- `public Type[] getTypeArguments()` - Returns the type arguments if this is a parameterized type. / 如果是参数化类型则返回类型参数。

- `public static JsonSchemaException missingRequired(String path, String property)` - Creates an exception for a required property error. / 创建必需属性错误的异常。
- `public static JsonSchemaException patternMismatch(String path, String pattern, String value)` - Creates an exception for a pattern mismatch error. / 创建模式不匹配错误的异常。
- `public static JsonSchemaException constraintViolation(String path, String constraint, String message)` - Creates an exception for a constraint violation error. / 创建约束违反错误的异常。

### BuiltinJsonReader
`public final class BuiltinJsonReader` - Built-in JSON Reader - Character-Based Streaming JSON Pull Parser / 内置 JSON 读...

- `public BuiltinJsonReader(Reader reader)` - Creates a new reader from the given character source. / 从给定的字符源创建新的读取器。
- `public void beginObject()` - Begins reading a JSON object / 开始读取JSON对象
- `public void endObject()` - Ends reading a JSON object / 结束读取JSON对象
- `public void beginArray()` - Begins reading a JSON array / 开始读取JSON数组
- `public void endArray()` - Ends reading a JSON array / 结束读取JSON数组
- `public boolean hasNext()` - Returns true if more elements exist in the current scope / 若当前作用域中还有更多元素则返回true
- `public JsonToken peek()` - Returns the type of the next token without consuming it / 返回下一个token的类型而不消费它
- `public String nextName()` - Returns the next key name in a JSON object / 返回JSON对象中的下一个键名
- `public String nextString()` - Returns the next string value / 返回下一个字符串值
- `public boolean nextBoolean()` - Returns the next boolean value / 返回下一个布尔值
- `public void nextNull()` - Consumes the next null token / 消费下一个null token
- `public int nextInt()` - Returns the next int value / 返回下一个int值
- `public long nextLong()` - Returns the next long value / 返回下一个long值
- `public double nextDouble()` - Returns the next double value / 返回下一个double值
- `public BigInteger nextBigInteger()` - Returns the next BigInteger value / 返回下一个BigInteger值
- `public BigDecimal nextBigDecimal()` - Returns the next BigDecimal value / 返回下一个BigDecimal值
- `public Number nextNumber()` - Returns the next numeric value / 返回下一个数值
- `public void skipValue()` - Skips the next value / 跳过下一个值
- `public String getPath()` - Returns the current JSON path / 返回当前JSON路径
- `public int getLineNumber()` - Returns the current line number / 返回当前行号
- `public int getColumnNumber()` - Returns the current column number / 返回当前列号
- `public void setLenient(boolean lenient)` - Sets lenient mode for parsing / 设置宽松解析模式
- `public boolean isLenient()` - Returns whether lenient mode is enabled / 返回是否启用宽松模式
- `public void close()` - Closes the reader and releases resources / 关闭读取器并释放资源

- `public BuiltinJsonWriter(Writer writer)` - Creates a new writer that writes to the given output. / 创建写入给定输出的新写入器。
- `public JsonWriter beginObject()` - Begins writing a JSON object / 开始写入JSON对象
- `public JsonWriter endObject()` - Ends writing a JSON object / 结束写入JSON对象
- `public JsonWriter beginArray()` - Begins writing a JSON array / 开始写入JSON数组
- `public JsonWriter endArray()` - Ends writing a JSON array / 结束写入JSON数组

- `public JsonWriter value(String value)` - Writes a string value / 写入字符串值
- `public JsonWriter value(boolean value)` - Writes a boolean value / 写入布尔值
- `public JsonWriter value(int value)` - Writes an int value / 写入int值
- `public JsonWriter value(long value)` - Writes a long value / 写入long值
- `public JsonWriter value(double value)` - Writes a double value / 写入double值
- `public JsonWriter value(Number value)` - Writes a numeric value / 写入数值
- `public JsonWriter nullValue()` - Writes a null value / 写入null值
- `public JsonWriter jsonValue(String json)` - Writes a raw JSON value / 写入原始JSON值
- `public JsonWriter setIndent(String indent)` - Sets the indentation string for pretty printing / 设置美化打印的缩进字符串
- `public JsonWriter setSerializeNulls(boolean serializeNulls)` - Sets whether null values should be serialized / 设置是否序列化null值
- `public JsonWriter setLenient(boolean lenient)` - Sets lenient mode for writing / 设置宽松写入模式
- `public boolean isLenient()` - Returns whether lenient mode is enabled / 返回是否启用宽松模式
- `public JsonWriter setHtmlSafe(boolean htmlSafe)` - Sets whether output should be HTML-safe / 设置输出是否为HTML安全
- `public boolean isHtmlSafe()` - Returns whether HTML-safe mode is enabled / 返回是否启用HTML安全模式
- `public void flush()` - Flushes the underlying writer / 刷新底层写入器
- `public void close()` - Closes the writer and releases resources / 关闭写入器并释放资源

- `public XmlBuilder namespace(String namespaceURI, String prefix)` - Adds a namespace declaration to the current element. / 向当前元素添加命名空间声明。
- `public XmlBuilder defaultNamespace(String namespaceURI)` - Sets the default namespace on the current element. / 在当前元素上设置默认命名空间。
- `public XmlBuilder startElement(String name)` - Starts a new child element. / 开始新的子元素。
- `public XmlBuilder startElement(String namespaceURI, String name)` - Starts a new child element with namespace. / 开始带命名空间的新子元素。
- `public XmlBuilder startElement(String namespaceURI, String prefix, String localName)` - Starts a new child element with prefix and namespace. / 开始带前缀和命名空间的新子元素。
- `public XmlBuilder end()` - Ends the current element and returns to the parent. / 结束当前元素并返回到父元素。
- `public XmlBuilder element(String name, String text)` - Adds a complete element with text content. / 添加带文本内容的完整元素。
- `public XmlBuilder element(String name, Number value)` - Adds a complete element with number content. / 添加带数字内容的完整元素。
- `public XmlBuilder element(String name, boolean value)` - Adds a complete element with boolean content. / 添加带布尔内容的完整元素。
- `public XmlBuilder elementIfNotNull(String name, String text)` - Adds a complete element if value is not null. / 如果值不为 null 则添加完整元素。
- `public XmlBuilder emptyElement(String name)` - Adds an empty element. / 添加空元素。
- `public XmlBuilder configure(Consumer<XmlBuilder> configurer)` - Configures the current element using a consumer. / 使用消费者配置当前元素。
- `public XmlBuilder attribute(String name, String value)` - Adds an attribute to the current element. / 向当前元素添加属性。
- `public XmlBuilder attribute(String namespaceURI, String name, String value)` - Adds an attribute with namespace to the current element. / 向当前元素添加带命名空间的属性。
- `public XmlBuilder attribute(String name, Number value)` - Adds an attribute with number value. / 添加带数字值的属性。
- `public XmlBuilder attribute(String name, boolean value)` - Adds an attribute with boolean value. / 添加带布尔值的属性。
- `public XmlBuilder attributeIfNotNull(String name, String value)` - Adds an attribute if value is not null. / 如果值不为 null 则添加属性。
- `public XmlBuilder text(String text)` - Adds text content to the current element. / 向当前元素添加文本内容。
- `public XmlBuilder cdata(String data)` - Adds CDATA content to the current element. / 向当前元素添加 CDATA 内容。
- `public XmlBuilder comment(String comment)` - Adds a comment to the current element. / 向当前元素添加注释。
- `public XmlBuilder processingInstruction(String target, String data)` - Adds a processing instruction. / 添加处理指令。
- `public XmlDocument build()` - Builds and returns the XML document. / 构建并返回 XML 文档。
- `public XmlElement buildElement()` - Builds and returns the root element. / 构建并返回根元素。
- `public String toXml()` - Builds and returns the XML string. / 构建并返回 XML 字符串。
- `public String toXml(int indent)` - Builds and returns the formatted XML string. / 构建并返回格式化的 XML 字符串。
- `public Document getDocument()` - Gets the underlying DOM Document. / 获取底层 DOM Document。
- `public org.w3c.dom.Element getCurrentElement()` - Gets the current element being built. / 获取正在构建的当前元素。

- `public int getEventType()` - Gets the current event type. / 获取当前事件类型。

- `public boolean isEndElement(String localName)` - Checks if the current event is an end element with the given name. / 检查当前事件是否...
- `public boolean isCharacters()` - Checks if the current event is characters. / 检查当前事件是否是字符。
- `public boolean isWhiteSpace()` - Checks if the current event is whitespace. / 检查当前事件是否是空白字符。
- `public String getLocalName()` - Gets the local name of the current element. / 获取当前元素的本地名称。
- `public String getNamespaceURI()` - Gets the namespace URI of the current element. / 获取当前元素的命名空间 URI。
- `public String getPrefix()` - Gets the prefix of the current element. / 获取当前元素的前缀。

- `public Map<String, String> getAttributes()` - Gets all attributes as a map. / 获取所有属性作为映射。
- `public String getText()` - Gets the text content of the current element. / 获取当前元素的文本内容。

- `public void read()` - Reads the entire document using registered callbacks. / 使用注册的回调读取整个文档。
- `public boolean skipToNextStartElement()` - Skips to the next start element. / 跳转到下一个开始元素。
- `public boolean skipTo(String elementName)` - Skips to a specific element. / 跳转到特定元素。
- `public void require(String localName)` - Requires the current element to be a start element with the given name. / 要求当...
- `public XMLStreamReader getUnderlyingReader()` - Gets the underlying XMLStreamReader. / 获取底层 XMLStreamReader。

- `public List<XmlElement> asElements()` - Returns all elements. / 返回所有元素。
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Returns whether the result is empty. / 返回结果是否为空。
- `public int count()` - Returns the count of matched elements. / 返回匹配元素的数量。

## 13. opencode-base-yml

YAML组件，提供解析、生成、多文档、占位符替换、类型绑定、安全加载

- `public int asInt()` - Converts this node to an int / 将此节点转换为int
- `public int asInt(int defaultValue)` - Converts this node to an int, returning default if null / 将此节点转换为int，为null时返回默认值
- `public long asLong()` - Converts this node to a long / 将此节点转换为long
- `public long asLong(long defaultValue)` - Converts this node to a long, returning default if null / 将此节点转换为long，为null时返回默认值
- `public boolean asBoolean()` - Converts this node to a boolean / 将此节点转换为boolean
- `public boolean asBoolean(boolean defaultValue)` - Converts this node to a boolean, returning default if null / 将此节点转换为boolean，为null时返回默认值
- `public double asDouble()` - Converts this node to a double / 将此节点转换为double
- `public double asDouble(double defaultValue)` - Converts this node to a double, returning default if null / 将此节点转换为double，为null时返回默认值
- `public YmlNode get(String key)` - Gets a child node by key / 按键获取子节点
- `public YmlNode get(int index)` - Gets a child node by index / 按索引获取子节点
- `public YmlNode at(String path)` - Gets a node at the given dot-separated path / 获取给定点分隔路径处的节点
- `public boolean has(String key)` - Returns whether this node has a child with the given key / 返回此节点是否有给定键的子节点

- `public Map<String, Object> toMap()` - Converts this node to a Map / 将此节点转换为Map
- `public List<Object> toList()` - Converts this node to a List / 将此节点转换为List
- `public String toYaml()` - Converts this node to a YAML string / 将此节点转换为YAML字符串

- `public static YmlSecurityException nestingDepthExceeded(int depth, int limit)` - Creates an exception for nesting depth exceeded. / 为嵌套深度超限创建异常。
- `public static YmlSecurityException documentSizeExceeded(long size, long limit)` - Creates an exception for document size exceeded. / 为文档大小超限创建异常。

### YmlSecurity
`public final class YmlSecurity` - YML Security - Security utilities for YAML processing / YML 安全 - YAML 处理的安全工具

- `public static void validate(String yamlContent)` - Validates YAML content for security issues / 验证 YAML 内容的安全问题

- `public static int countAliases(String yamlContent)` - Counts aliases in YAML content / 计算 YAML 内容中的别名数量

- `public static YmlConfig createSafeConfig(long maxSize, int maxAliases)` - Creates a safe YAML configuration with custom limits / 使用自定义限制创建安全的 YAML 配置
- `public static String sanitize(String yamlContent)` - Sanitizes YAML content by removing dangerous patterns / 通过移除危险模式净化 YAML 内容
- `public static boolean isSafeType(String typeName)` - Checks if a type is safe for deserialization / 检查类型是否可以安全反序列化

### SnakeYamlProvider
`public final class SnakeYamlProvider` - SnakeYAML Provider - YAML provider using SnakeYAML library / SnakeYAML 提供者 - 使用 SnakeYAML 库的 YAML 提供者

- `public SnakeYamlProvider()` - Creates a new SnakeYAML provider with default configuration / 使用默认配置创建新的 SnakeYAML 提供者

- `public Map<String, Object> load(String yamlStr)` - Loads a YAML string to a Map / 将YAML字符串加载为Map
- `public <T> T load(String yamlStr, Class<T> clazz)` - Loads a YAML string to an object of the given class / 将YAML字符串加载为指定类的对象

- `public List<Map<String, Object>> loadAll(String yamlStr)` - Loads all YAML documents from a string / 从字符串加载所有YAML文档
- `public <T> List<T> loadAll(String yamlStr, Class<T> clazz)` - Loads all YAML documents from a string as objects / 从字符串加载所有YAML文档为对象
- `public String dump(Object obj)` - Dumps an object to a YAML string / 将对象转储为YAML字符串
- `public String dump(Object obj, YmlConfig dumpConfig)` - Dumps an object to a YAML string with config / 使用配置将对象转储为YAML字符串
- `public void dump(Object obj, OutputStream output)` - Dumps an object to YAML and writes to an OutputStream / 将对象转储为YAML并写入输出流
- `public void dump(Object obj, Writer writer)` - Dumps an object to YAML and writes to a Writer / 将对象转储为YAML并写入Writer
- `public String dumpAll(Iterable<?> documents)` - Dumps multiple documents to a YAML string / 将多个文档转储为YAML字符串
- `public YmlNode parseTree(String yamlStr)` - Parses a YAML string into a node tree / 将YAML字符串解析为节点树
- `public YmlNode parseTree(InputStream input)` - Parses YAML from an InputStream into a node tree / 从输入流解析YAML为节点树
- `public boolean isValid(String yamlStr)` - Checks if the YAML string is valid / 检查YAML字符串是否有效
- `public YmlProvider configure(YmlConfig newConfig)` - Returns a new provider configured with the given config / 返回使用给定配置的新提供者
- `public YmlConfig getConfig()` - Returns the current YAML configuration / 返回当前YAML配置

### SnakeYmlNode
`public final class SnakeYmlNode` - SnakeYAML Node Implementation - Wraps SnakeYAML Node for YmlNode interface / SnakeYAML 节点实现 - 封装 SnakeYAML 节点以实现 YmlNode 接口

- `public static SnakeYmlNode of(Node node)` - Creates a SnakeYmlNode from a SnakeYAML Node / 从 SnakeYAML Node 创建 SnakeYmlNode
- `public static SnakeYmlNode ofValue(Object value)` - Creates a SnakeYmlNode from a raw value. / 从原始值创建 SnakeYmlNode。
- `public static SnakeYmlNode nullNode()` - Returns the null node instance. / 返回空节点实例。
- `public Node getSnakeNode()` - Gets the underlying SnakeYAML Node. / 获取底层 SnakeYAML 节点。
- `public Tag getTag()` - Gets the YAML tag of this node. / 获取此节点的 YAML 标签。
- `public String getTagString()` - Gets the tag string of this node. / 获取此节点的标签字符串。
- `public String getAnchor()` - Gets the anchor of this node. / 获取此节点的锚点。
- `public int getStartLine()` - Gets the start line number (1-based). / 获取开始行号（从1开始）。
- `public int getStartColumn()` - Gets the start column number (1-based). / 获取开始列号（从1开始）。
- `public int getEndLine()` - Gets the end line number (1-based). / 获取结束行号（从1开始）。
- `public boolean hasAnchor()` - Checks if this node has an anchor. / 检查此节点是否有锚点。
- `public NodeType getType()` - Returns the node type / 返回节点类型
- `public String asText()` - Converts this node to a text string / 将此节点转换为文本字符串
- `public String asText(String defaultValue)` - Converts this node to text, returning default if null / 将此节点转换为文本，为null时返回默认值
- `public int asInt()` - Converts this node to an int / 将此节点转换为int
- `public int asInt(int defaultValue)` - Converts this node to an int, returning default if null / 将此节点转换为int，为null时返回默认值
- `public long asLong()` - Converts this node to a long / 将此节点转换为long
- `public long asLong(long defaultValue)` - Converts this node to a long, returning default if null / 将此节点转换为long，为null时返回默认值
- `public boolean asBoolean()` - Converts this node to a boolean / 将此节点转换为boolean
- `public boolean asBoolean(boolean defaultValue)` - Converts this node to a boolean, returning default if null / 将此节点转换为boolean，为null时返回默认值
- `public double asDouble()` - Converts this node to a double / 将此节点转换为double
- `public double asDouble(double defaultValue)` - Converts this node to a double, returning default if null / 将此节点转换为double，为null时返回默认值
- `public YmlNode get(String key)` - Gets a child node by key / 按键获取子节点
- `public YmlNode get(int index)` - Gets a child node by index / 按索引获取子节点
- `public YmlNode at(String path)` - Gets a node at the given dot-separated path / 获取给定点分隔路径处的节点
- `public boolean has(String key)` - Returns whether this node has a child with the given key / 返回此节点是否有给定键的子节点
- `public int size()` - Returns the number of child nodes / 返回子节点数量
- `public Set<String> keys()` - Returns all keys of this map node / 返回此映射节点的所有键
- `public List<YmlNode> values()` - Returns all child nodes of this node / 返回此节点的所有子节点
- `public <T> T toObject(Class<T> clazz)` - Converts this node to an object of the specified class / 将此节点转换为指定类的对象
- `public Map<String, Object> toMap()` - Converts this node to a Map / 将此节点转换为Map
- `public List<Object> toList()` - Converts this node to a List / 将此节点转换为List
- `public String toYaml()` - Converts this node to a YAML string / 将此节点转换为YAML字符串
- `public Object getRawValue()` - Returns the raw underlying value / 返回底层原始值
- `public Iterator<YmlNode> iterator()` - Returns an iterator over child nodes / 返回子节点的迭代器
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code

## 14. opencode-base-serialization

序列化组件，支持多格式（JSON/XML/YAML/Protobuf/Kryo等），深拷贝

### OpenSerializer
`public final class OpenSerializer` - OpenSerializer - Unified Serialization Facade / 统一序列化门面

- `public static boolean isDeepCloneAvailable()` - Checks if DeepClone module is available. / 检查 DeepClone 模块是否可用。
- `public static void register(Serializer serializer)` - Registers a serializer. / 注册序列化器。
- `public static void setDefault(String format)` - Sets the default serializer by format name. / 按格式名称设置默认序列化器。
- `public static void setDefault(Serializer serializer)` - Sets the default serializer. / 设置默认序列化器。
- `public static void setConfig(SerializerConfig config)` - Sets the global configuration. / 设置全局配置。
- `public static SerializerConfig getConfig()` - Gets the global configuration. / 获取全局配置。
- `public static Serializer get(String format)` - Gets a serializer by format name. / 按格式名称获取序列化器。
- `public static Serializer getDefault()` - Gets the default serializer. / 获取默认序列化器。
- `public static Set<String> getFormats()` - Gets all registered format names. / 获取所有已注册的格式名称。
- `public static boolean hasFormat(String format)` - Checks if a format is available. / 检查格式是否可用。
- `public static byte[] serialize(Object obj)` - Serializes an object to byte array using the default serializer / 使用默认序列化器将对象序列化为字节数组
- `public static byte[] serialize(Object obj, String format)` - Serializes an object to byte array using the specified format / 使用指定格式将对象序列化为字节数组
- `public static String serializeToString(Object obj)` - Serializes an object to string using the default serializer / 使用默认序列化器将对象序列化为字符串
- `public static String serializeToString(Object obj, String format)` - Serializes an object to string using the specified format. / 使用指定格式将对象序列化为字符串。
- `public static <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, Class<T> type)` - Deserializes byte array to an object using the default serializer / 使用默认序列化器将字节数组反序列化为对象
- `public static <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, Class<T> type, String format)` - Deserializes byte array to an object using the specified format / 使用指定格式将字节数组反序列化为对象
- `public static <T> T deserialize(String data, Class<T> type)` - Deserializes string to an object using the default serializer / 使用默认序列化器将字符串反序列化为对象
- `public static <T> T deserialize(String data, Class<T> type, String format)` - Deserializes string to an object using the specified format / 使用指定格式将字符串反序列化为对象
- `public static <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, TypeReference<T> typeRef)` - Deserializes byte array to a generic type using the default serializer / 使用默认序列化器将字节数组反序列化为泛型类型
- `public static <T> T deserialize(String data, TypeReference<T> typeRef)` - Deserializes string to a generic type using the default serializer / 使用默认序列化器将字符串反序列化为泛型类型
- `public static <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, TypeReference<T> typeRef, String format)` - Deserializes byte array to a generic type using the specified format / 使用指定格式将字节数组反序列化为泛型类型
- `public static <T> List<T> deserializeList(byte[] data, Class<T> elementType)` - Deserializes byte array to a List. / 将字节数组反序列化为 List。
- `public static <T> List<T> deserializeList(String data, Class<T> elementType)` - Deserializes string to a List. / 将字符串反序列化为 List。
- `public static <T> Set<T> deserializeSet(byte[] data, Class<T> elementType)` - Deserializes byte array to a Set. / 将字节数组反序列化为 Set。
- `public static <K, V> Map<K, V> deserializeMap(byte[] data, Class<K> keyType, Class<V> valueType)` - Deserializes byte array to a Map. / 将字节数组反序列化为 Map。
- `public static <K, V> Map<K, V> deserializeMap(String data, Class<K> keyType, Class<V> valueType)` - Deserializes string to a Map. / 将字符串反序列化为 Map。
- `public static <T> T deepCopy(T obj)` - Creates a deep copy of an object. / 创建对象的深拷贝。
- `public static <T> T deepCopy(T obj, String format)` - Creates a deep copy of an object using the specified serializer / 使用指定的序列化器创建对象的深拷贝
- `public static <T> T convert(Object source, Class<T> targetType)` - Converts an object to another type using serialization. / 使用序列化将对象转换为另一种类型。
- `public static <T> T convert(Object source, TypeReference<T> typeRef)` - Converts an object to a generic type using serialization. / 使用序列化将对象转换为泛型类型。
- `public static <T> T convert(Object source, Class<T> targetType, String format)` - Converts an object to another type using the specified format / 使用指定格式将对象转换为另一种类型

### Serializer
`public interface Serializer` - Serializer - Core Serialization Interface / 序列化器 - 核心序列化接口


### SerializerConfig
`public final class SerializerConfig` - SerializerConfig - Serialization Configuration / 序列化配置

- `public static final SerializerConfig DEFAULT = new SerializerConfig(` - Default configuration instance / 默认配置实例
- `public static SerializerConfig defaults()` - Returns the default configuration. / 返回默认配置。
- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a new builder. / 创建新的构建器。
- `public Builder toBuilder()` - Creates a builder initialized with this configuration. / 创建用此配置初始化的构建器。
- `public boolean isIncludeTypeInfo()` - Returns whether type information should be included. / 返回是否应包含类型信息。
- `public boolean isCompressionEnabled()` - Returns whether compression is enabled. / 返回是否启用压缩。
- `public CompressionAlgorithm getCompressionAlgorithm()` - Returns the compression algorithm. / 返回压缩算法。
- `public int getCompressionThreshold()` - Returns the compression threshold in bytes. / 返回压缩阈值（字节）。
- `public boolean isFailOnUnknownProperties()` - Returns whether to fail on unknown properties. / 返回是否对未知属性失败。
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### TypeReference
`public abstract class TypeReference<T>` - TypeReference - Generic Type Reference for Deserialization / 类型引用 - 用于反序列化的泛型类型引用

- `public static <T> TypeReference<T> of(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates a TypeReference from a Class. / 从 Class 创建 TypeReference。
- `public static <T> TypeReference<T> of(Type type)` - Creates a TypeReference from a Type. / 从 Type 创建 TypeReference。
- `public static <T> TypeReference<List<T>> listOf(Class<T> elementType)` - Creates a TypeReference for List type. / 为 List 类型创建 TypeReference。
- `public static <T> TypeReference<Set<T>> setOf(Class<T> elementType)` - Creates a TypeReference for Set type. / 为 Set 类型创建 TypeReference。
- `public static <K, V> TypeReference<Map<K, V>> mapOf(Class<K> keyType, Class<V> valueType)` - Creates a TypeReference for Map type. / 为 Map 类型创建 TypeReference。
- `public static <T> TypeReference<Collection<T>> collectionOf(Class<T> elementType)` - Creates a TypeReference for Collection type. / 为 Collection 类型创建 TypeReference。
- `public static <T> TypeReference<Optional<T>> optionalOf(Class<T> elementType)` - Creates a TypeReference for Optional type. / 为 Optional 类型创建 TypeReference。
- `public Type getType()` - Returns the referenced type. / 返回引用的类型。
- `public Class<?> getRawType()` - Returns the raw class of the referenced type. / 返回引用类型的原始类。
- `public boolean isParameterized()` - Returns whether this is a parameterized type. / 返回此是否为参数化类型。
- `public Type[] getTypeArguments()` - Returns the type arguments if this is a parameterized type. / 如果是参数化类型则返回类型参数。
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### JdkSerializer
`public class JdkSerializer` - JdkSerializer - JDK Native Serialization / JDK 原生序列化器

- `public byte[] serialize(Object obj)` - Serializes an object to bytes using JDK serialization / 使用JDK序列化将对象序列化为字节数组
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, Class<T> type)` - Deserializes bytes to an object of the given class / 将字节数组反序列化为指定类的对象
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, TypeReference<T> typeRef)` - Deserializes bytes to a generic type / 将字节数组反序列化为泛型类型
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, Type type)` - Deserializes bytes to the given type / 将字节数组反序列化为指定类型
- `public String getFormat()` - Returns the serialization format name ("jdk") / 返回序列化格式名称（"jdk"）
- `public String getMimeType()` - Returns the MIME type for this serializer / 返回此序列化器的MIME类型
- `public boolean supports(Class<?> type)` - Returns whether the given type is supported / 返回是否支持给定类型

### JdkSerializerProvider
`public class JdkSerializerProvider` - JdkSerializerProvider - SPI Provider for JDK Serializer / JDK 序列化器 SPI 提供者

- `public Serializer create()` - Creates a new JDK serializer instance / 创建新的JDK序列化器实例
- `public int getPriority()` - Returns the provider priority / 返回提供者优先级

### KryoSerializer
`public class KryoSerializer` - KryoSerializer - High Performance Kryo Serialization / Kryo 高性能序列化器

- `public KryoSerializer()` - Creates a new KryoSerializer with default configuration (non-secure mode) / 使用默认配置（非安全模式）创建新的 KryoSerializer
- `public KryoSerializer(int poolSize)` - Creates a new KryoSerializer with custom pool size / 创建带自定义池大小的新 KryoSerializer
- `public KryoSerializer(int poolSize, boolean secureMode)` - Creates a new KryoSerializer with secure mode option / 创建带安全模式选项的新 KryoSerializer
- `public static KryoSerializer secure()` - Creates a secure KryoSerializer that requires class registration / 创建需要类注册的安全 KryoSerializer
- `public byte[] serialize(Object obj)` - Serializes an object to bytes using Kryo / 使用Kryo将对象序列化为字节数组
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, Class<T> type)` - Deserializes bytes to an object of the given class / 将字节数组反序列化为指定类的对象
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, TypeReference<T> typeRef)` - Deserializes bytes to a generic type / 将字节数组反序列化为泛型类型
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, Type type)` - Deserializes bytes to the given type / 将字节数组反序列化为指定类型
- `public String getFormat()` - Returns the serialization format name ("kryo") / 返回序列化格式名称（"kryo"）
- `public String getMimeType()` - Returns the MIME type for this serializer / 返回此序列化器的MIME类型
- `public KryoSerializer register(Class<?>... classes)` - Registers classes for better serialization performance. / 注册类以获得更好的序列化性能。
- `public KryoSerializer register(Class<?> clazz, int id)` - Registers a class with a specific ID. / 注册带特定 ID 的类。
- `public KryoSerializer allow(Class<?>... classes)` - Adds classes to the allowed whitelist (for secure mode). / 将类添加到允许的白名单（用于安全模式）。
- `public boolean isSecureMode()` - Returns whether this serializer is in secure mode. / 返回此序列化器是否处于安全模式。

### KryoSerializerProvider
`public class KryoSerializerProvider` - KryoSerializerProvider - SPI Provider for Kryo Serializer / Kryo 序列化器 SPI 提供者

- `public Serializer create()` - Creates a new Kryo serializer instance / 创建新的Kryo序列化器实例
- `public int getPriority()` - Returns the provider priority / 返回提供者优先级
- `public boolean isAvailable()` - Checks if Kryo is available on the classpath / 检查Kryo是否在classpath上可用

### ProtobufSerializer
`public class ProtobufSerializer` - ProtobufSerializer - Google Protocol Buffers Serialization / Protobuf 序列化器

- `public byte[] serialize(Object obj)` - Serializes a Protobuf message to bytes / 将Protobuf消息序列化为字节数组
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, Class<T> type)` - Deserializes bytes to a Protobuf message / 将字节数组反序列化为Protobuf消息
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, TypeReference<T> typeRef)` - Deserializes bytes to a generic Protobuf type / 将字节数组反序列化为泛型Protobuf类型
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, Type type)` - Deserializes bytes to the given Protobuf type / 将字节数组反序列化为指定Protobuf类型
- `public String getFormat()` - Returns the serialization format name ("protobuf") / 返回序列化格式名称（"protobuf"）
- `public String getMimeType()` - Returns the MIME type for this serializer / 返回此序列化器的MIME类型
- `public boolean supports(Class<?> type)` - Returns whether the given type is a Protobuf message / 返回给定类型是否为Protobuf消息

### ProtobufSerializerProvider
`public class ProtobufSerializerProvider` - ProtobufSerializerProvider - SPI Provider for Protobuf Serializer / Protobuf 序列化器 SPI 提供者

- `public Serializer create()` - Creates a new Protobuf serializer instance / 创建新的Protobuf序列化器实例
- `public int getPriority()` - Returns the provider priority / 返回提供者优先级
- `public boolean isAvailable()` - Checks if Protobuf is available on the classpath / 检查Protobuf是否在classpath上可用

### CompressedSerializer
`public class CompressedSerializer` - CompressedSerializer - Compression Decorator for Serializers / 压缩序列化装饰器

- `public CompressedSerializer(Serializer delegate, CompressionAlgorithm algorithm)` - Creates a compressed serializer with default threshold (1024 bytes) / 创建带默认阈值（1024字节）的压缩序列化器
- `public CompressedSerializer(Serializer delegate, CompressionAlgorithm algorithm, int threshold)` - Creates a compressed serializer with custom threshold. / 创建带自定义阈值的压缩序列化器。
- `public byte[] serialize(Object obj)` - Serializes an object with compression / 使用压缩将对象序列化
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, Class<T> type)` - Deserializes compressed bytes to an object / 将压缩字节数组反序列化为对象
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, TypeReference<T> typeRef)` - Deserializes compressed bytes to a generic type / 将压缩字节数组反序列化为泛型类型
- `public <T> T deserialize(byte[] data, Type type)` - Deserializes compressed bytes to the given type / 将压缩字节数组反序列化为指定类型
- `public String getFormat()` - Returns the serialization format name / 返回序列化格式名称
- `public String getMimeType()` - Returns the MIME type for this serializer / 返回此序列化器的MIME类型
- `public boolean supports(Class<?> type)` - Returns whether the given type is supported / 返回是否支持给定类型
- `public boolean isTextBased()` - Returns whether this serializer produces text-based output / 返回此序列化器是否产生基于文本的输出
- `public Serializer getDelegate()` - Returns the delegate serializer. / 返回委托的序列化器。
- `public CompressionAlgorithm getAlgorithm()` - Returns the compression algorithm. / 返回压缩算法。
- `public int getThreshold()` - Returns the compression threshold. / 返回压缩阈值。

### CompressionAlgorithm
`public enum CompressionAlgorithm` - CompressionAlgorithm - Compression Algorithm Enumeration / 压缩算法枚举

- `public String getName()` - Returns the algorithm name. / 返回算法名称。
- `public byte getId()` - Returns the algorithm identifier. / 返回算法标识符。
- `public boolean isBuiltIn()` - Returns whether this algorithm is built-in to JDK. / 返回此算法是否为 JDK 内置。
- `public boolean isAvailable()` - Checks if this algorithm is available on the current classpath / 检查此算法在当前类路径上是否可用
- `public static CompressionAlgorithm fromId(byte id)` - Returns the algorithm from its identifier. / 从标识符返回算法。
- `public static CompressionAlgorithm fromName(String name)` - Returns the algorithm from its name. / 从名称返回算法。

### OpenSerializationException
`public class OpenSerializationException` - OpenSerializationException - Serialization Exception / 序列化异常

- `public OpenSerializationException(String message)` - Creates a serialization exception with message. / 创建带消息的序列化异常。
- `public OpenSerializationException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates a serialization exception with message and cause. / 创建带消息和原因的序列化异常。
- `public OpenSerializationException(String message, String format, Class<?> targetType, Throwable cause)` - Creates a serialization exception with full details. / 创建带完整详情的序列化异常。
- `public String getFormat()` - Returns the serialization format. / 返回序列化格式。
- `public Class<?> getTargetType()` - Returns the target type. / 返回目标类型。
- `public static OpenSerializationException serializeFailed(Object obj, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for serialization failure. / 创建序列化失败异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException serializeFailed(Object obj, String format, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for serialization failure with format. / 创建带格式的序列化失败异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException deserializeFailed(byte[] data, Class<?> type, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for deserialization failure. / 创建反序列化失败异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException deserializeFailed(byte[] data, Class<?> type, String format, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for deserialization failure with format. / 创建带格式的反序列化失败异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException serializerNotFound(String format)` - Creates exception when serializer is not found. / 创建序列化器未找到异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException unsupportedType(Type type, String format)` - Creates exception for unsupported type. / 创建不支持类型异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException unsupportedType(Class<?> type, String format)` - Creates exception for unsupported type. / 创建不支持类型异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException compressionFailed(Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for compression failure. / 创建压缩失败异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException compressionFailed(String algorithm, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for compression failure with algorithm. / 创建带算法的压缩失败异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException decompressionFailed(Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for decompression failure. / 创建解压失败异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException decompressionFailed(String algorithm, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for decompression failure with algorithm. / 创建带算法的解压失败异常。
- `public static OpenSerializationException missingDependency(String format, String dependency)` - Creates exception for missing dependency. / 创建缺少依赖异常。

## 15. opencode-base-date

日期时间工具，提供日期创建、解析、格式化、计算、范围、季度、周、计时器

### DateTimes
`public final class DateTimes` - Static Factory for Date and Time Types / 日期时间类型的静态工厂

- `public static LocalDate date(int year, int month, int dayOfMonth)` - Creates a LocalDate / 创建LocalDate
- `public static LocalDate date(int year, Month month, int dayOfMonth)` - Creates a LocalDate using Month enum / 使用Month枚举创建LocalDate
- `public static LocalDate today()` - Gets today's date / 获取今天的日期
- `public static LocalDate yesterday()` - Gets yesterday's date / 获取昨天的日期
- `public static LocalDate tomorrow()` - Gets tomorrow's date / 获取明天的日期
- `public static LocalTime time(int hour, int minute)` - Creates a LocalTime / 创建LocalTime
- `public static LocalTime time(int hour, int minute, int second)` - Creates a LocalTime with seconds / 创建带秒的LocalTime
- `public static LocalTime midnight()` - Gets midnight (00:00:00) / 获取午夜（00:00:00）
- `public static LocalTime noon()` - Gets noon (12:00:00) / 获取中午（12:00:00）
- `public static LocalDateTime dateTime(int year, int month, int dayOfMonth, int hour, int minute)` - Creates a LocalDateTime / 创建LocalDateTime
- `public static LocalDateTime dateTime(int year, int month, int dayOfMonth, int hour, int minute, int second)` - Creates a LocalDateTime with seconds / 创建带秒的LocalDateTime
- `public static LocalDateTime dateTime(LocalDate date, LocalTime time)` - Creates a LocalDateTime from date and time / 从日期和时间创建LocalDateTime
- `public static LocalDateTime now()` - Gets the current datetime / 获取当前日期时间
- `public static YearMonth yearMonth(int year, int month)` - Creates a YearMonth / 创建YearMonth
- `public static Year year(int year)` - Creates a Year / 创建Year
- `public static YearMonth currentYearMonth()` - Gets the current YearMonth / 获取当前YearMonth
- `public static Year currentYear()` - Gets the current Year / 获取当前Year
- `public static Quarter quarter(int quarter)` - Creates a Quarter / 创建Quarter
- `public static YearQuarter yearQuarter(int year, int quarter)` - Creates a YearQuarter / 创建YearQuarter
- `public static YearQuarter yearQuarter(int year, Quarter quarter)` - Creates a YearQuarter with Quarter enum / 使用Quarter枚举创建YearQuarter
- `public static YearQuarter currentQuarter()` - Gets the current YearQuarter / 获取当前YearQuarter
- `public static YearWeek yearWeek(int weekBasedYear, int week)` - Creates a YearWeek / 创建YearWeek
- `public static YearWeek currentWeek()` - Gets the current YearWeek / 获取当前YearWeek
- `public static Instant instant()` - Gets the current Instant / 获取当前Instant
- `public static Instant instant(long epochMilli)` - Creates an Instant from epoch milliseconds / 从毫秒时间戳创建Instant
- `public static Instant instant(long epochSecond, long nanoAdjust)` - Creates an Instant from epoch seconds / 从秒时间戳创建Instant
- `public static Duration nanos(long nanos)` - Creates a Duration of the specified nanoseconds / 创建指定纳秒数的Duration
- `public static Duration millis(long millis)` - Creates a Duration of the specified milliseconds / 创建指定毫秒数的Duration
- `public static Duration seconds(long seconds)` - Creates a Duration of the specified seconds / 创建指定秒数的Duration
- `public static Duration minutes(long minutes)` - Creates a Duration of the specified minutes / 创建指定分钟数的Duration
- `public static Duration hours(long hours)` - Creates a Duration of the specified hours / 创建指定小时数的Duration
- `public static Duration days(long days)` - Creates a Duration of the specified days / 创建指定天数的Duration
- `public static Period periodDays(int days)` - Creates a Period of the specified days / 创建指定天数的Period
- `public static Period weeks(int weeks)` - Creates a Period of the specified weeks / 创建指定周数的Period
- `public static Period months(int months)` - Creates a Period of the specified months / 创建指定月数的Period
- `public static Period years(int years)` - Creates a Period of the specified years / 创建指定年数的Period
- `public static Period period(int years, int months, int days)` - Creates a Period from years, months, and days / 从年、月、日创建Period
- `public static LocalDateRange dateRange(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Creates a LocalDateRange / 创建LocalDateRange
- `public static LocalDateTimeRange dateTimeRange(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)` - Creates a LocalDateTimeRange / 创建LocalDateTimeRange
- `public static Interval interval(Instant start, Instant end)` - Creates an Interval / 创建Interval
- `public static Interval interval(Instant start, Duration duration)` - Creates an Interval from start and duration / 从开始时刻和时长创建Interval
- `public static PeriodDuration periodDuration(Period period, Duration duration)` - Creates a PeriodDuration from Period and Duration / 从 Period 和 Duration 创建 PeriodDuration
- `public static PeriodDuration between(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)` - Creates a PeriodDuration between two LocalDateTimes / 计算两个 LocalDateTime 之间的 PeriodDuration

### OpenDate
`public final class OpenDate` - Core Date Utility Class - Main Entry Point for OpenCode Date Module / 核心日期工具类 - OpenCode 日期模块的主入口

- `public static LocalDate today()` - Gets the current date / 获取当前日期
- `public static LocalDate today(ZoneId zone)` - Gets the current date for the specified zone / 获取指定时区的当前日期
- `public static LocalDateTime now()` - Gets the current datetime / 获取当前日期时间
- `public static LocalDateTime now(ZoneId zone)` - Gets the current datetime for the specified zone / 获取指定时区的当前日期时间
- `public static long currentTimeMillis()` - Gets the current time in milliseconds / 获取当前时间戳（毫秒）
- `public static long currentTimeSeconds()` - Gets the current time in seconds / 获取当前时间戳（秒）
- `public static Instant instant()` - Gets the current Instant / 获取当前Instant
- `public static LocalDate of(int year, int month, int dayOfMonth)` - Creates a LocalDate / 创建LocalDate
- `public static LocalDateTime of(int year, int month, int dayOfMonth, int hour, int minute, int second)` - Creates a LocalDateTime / 创建LocalDateTime
- `public static LocalDateTime ofEpochMilli(long epochMilli)` - Creates a LocalDateTime from epoch milliseconds / 从毫秒时间戳创建LocalDateTime
- `public static LocalDateTime ofEpochSecond(long epochSecond)` - Creates a LocalDateTime from epoch seconds / 从秒时间戳创建LocalDateTime
- `public static LocalDateTime from(Date date)` - Converts a Date to LocalDateTime / 将Date转换为LocalDateTime
- `public static LocalDateTime from(Calendar calendar)` - Converts a Calendar to LocalDateTime / 将Calendar转换为LocalDateTime
- `public static LocalDateTime parse(String text)` - Parses a string to LocalDateTime using smart format detection / 使用智能格式检测将字符串解析为 LocalDateTime
- `public static LocalDate parseDate(String text)` - Parses a string to LocalDate using smart format detection / 使用智能格式检测将字符串解析为 LocalDate
- `public static LocalTime parseTime(String text)` - Parses a string to LocalTime using smart format detection / 使用智能格式检测将字符串解析为 LocalTime
- `public static LocalDateTime parse(String text, String pattern)` - Parses a string to LocalDateTime using the specified pattern / 使用指定模式将字符串解析为 LocalDateTime
- `public static String format(Temporal temporal)` - Formats a temporal to the default format (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss) / 将时间对象格式化为默认格式（yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss）
- `public static String format(Temporal temporal, String pattern)` - Formats a temporal to the specified pattern / 将时间对象格式化为指定模式
- `public static String formatIso(Temporal temporal)` - Formats a temporal to ISO format / 将时间对象格式化为ISO格式
- `public static String formatChinese(Temporal temporal)` - Formats a temporal to Chinese format / 将时间对象格式化为中文格式
- `public static <T extends Temporal> T truncate(T temporal, TemporalUnit unit)` - Truncates a temporal to the specified unit / 将时间对象截断到指定单位
- `public static LocalDateTime truncateToDay(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Truncates a LocalDateTime to the start of day / 将LocalDateTime截断到当天开始
- `public static LocalDateTime truncateToHour(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Truncates a LocalDateTime to the start of hour / 将LocalDateTime截断到小时开始
- `public static LocalDateTime truncateToMinute(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Truncates a LocalDateTime to the start of minute / 将LocalDateTime截断到分钟开始
- `public static LocalDateTime plusYears(LocalDateTime dateTime, long years)` - Adds years to a LocalDateTime / 在LocalDateTime上加年
- `public static LocalDateTime plusMonths(LocalDateTime dateTime, long months)` - Adds months to a LocalDateTime / 在LocalDateTime上加月
- `public static LocalDateTime plusWeeks(LocalDateTime dateTime, long weeks)` - Adds weeks to a LocalDateTime / 在LocalDateTime上加周
- `public static LocalDateTime plusDays(LocalDateTime dateTime, long days)` - Adds days to a LocalDateTime / 在LocalDateTime上加天
- `public static LocalDateTime plusHours(LocalDateTime dateTime, long hours)` - Adds hours to a LocalDateTime / 在LocalDateTime上加小时
- `public static LocalDateTime plusMinutes(LocalDateTime dateTime, long minutes)` - Adds minutes to a LocalDateTime / 在LocalDateTime上加分钟
- `public static LocalDateTime plusSeconds(LocalDateTime dateTime, long seconds)` - Adds seconds to a LocalDateTime / 在LocalDateTime上加秒
- `public static LocalDate startOfMonth(LocalDate date)` - Gets the first day of the month / 获取月份的第一天
- `public static LocalDate endOfMonth(LocalDate date)` - Gets the last day of the month / 获取月份的最后一天
- `public static LocalDate startOfYear(LocalDate date)` - Gets the first day of the year / 获取年份的第一天
- `public static LocalDate endOfYear(LocalDate date)` - Gets the last day of the year / 获取年份的最后一天
- `public static LocalDate startOfWeek(LocalDate date)` - Gets the first day of the week (Monday) / 获取周的第一天（周一）
- `public static LocalDate endOfWeek(LocalDate date)` - Gets the last day of the week (Sunday) / 获取周的最后一天（周日）
- `public static LocalDate startOfQuarter(LocalDate date)` - Gets the first day of the quarter / 获取季度的第一天
- `public static LocalDate endOfQuarter(LocalDate date)` - Gets the last day of the quarter / 获取季度的最后一天
- `public static boolean isBetween(LocalDate date, LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Checks if a date is between two dates (inclusive) / 检查日期是否在两个日期之间（包含）
- `public static boolean isBetween(LocalDateTime dateTime, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)` - Checks if a datetime is between two datetimes (inclusive) / 检查日期时间是否在两个日期时间之间...
- `public static boolean isToday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is today / 检查日期是否为今天
- `public static boolean isYesterday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is yesterday / 检查日期是否为昨天
- `public static boolean isTomorrow(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is tomorrow / 检查日期是否为明天
- `public static boolean isWeekend(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a weekend (Saturday or Sunday) / 检查日期是否为周末（周六或周日）
- `public static boolean isLeapYear(int year)` - Checks if a year is a leap year / 检查年份是否为闰年
- `public static long daysBetween(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Gets the number of days between two dates / 获取两个日期之间的天数
- `public static long monthsBetween(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Gets the number of months between two dates / 获取两个日期之间的月数
- `public static long yearsBetween(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Gets the number of years between two dates / 获取两个日期之间的年数
- `public static Period periodBetween(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Gets the Period between two dates / 获取两个日期之间的Period
- `public static Duration durationBetween(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)` - Gets the Duration between two datetimes / 获取两个日期时间之间的Duration
- `public static long toEpochMilli(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Converts a LocalDateTime to epoch milliseconds / 将LocalDateTime转换为毫秒时间戳
- `public static long toEpochSecond(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Converts a LocalDateTime to epoch seconds / 将LocalDateTime转换为秒时间戳
- `public static Date toDate(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Converts a LocalDateTime to java.util.Date / 将LocalDateTime转换为java.util.Date
- `public static Date toDate(LocalDate date)` - Converts a LocalDate to java.util.Date / 将LocalDate转换为java.util.Date
- `public static LocalDateRange range(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Creates a LocalDateRange from start to end / 创建从开始到结束的LocalDateRange
- `public static YearQuarter currentQuarter()` - Gets the current YearQuarter / 获取当前YearQuarter
- `public static YearWeek currentWeek()` - Gets the current YearWeek / 获取当前YearWeek

### StopWatch
`public class StopWatch` - High-precision StopWatch for performance timing / 高精度计时器，用于性能计时

- `public StopWatch()` - Creates a StopWatch with no name / 创建无名称的StopWatch
- `public StopWatch(String name)` - Creates a StopWatch with the specified name / 创建具有指定名称的StopWatch
- `public static StopWatch createStarted()` - Creates and starts a StopWatch / 创建并启动StopWatch
- `public static StopWatch createStarted(String name)` - Creates and starts a named StopWatch / 创建并启动命名的StopWatch
- `public static Duration time(Runnable runnable)` - Times the execution of a Runnable / 计时Runnable的执行
- `public static Duration time(String taskName, Runnable runnable)` - Times the execution of a Runnable with a task name / 使用任务名称计时Runnable的执行
- `public void start(String taskName)` - Starts timing a new task / 开始计时新任务
- `public Duration stop()` - Stops timing the current task / 停止计时当前任务
- `public void reset()` - Resets the stopwatch / 重置计时器
- `public Duration split(String newTaskName)` - Splits the current lap and starts a new one / 分割当前圈并开始新的一圈
- `public boolean isRunning()` - Checks if the stopwatch is currently running / 检查计时器是否正在运行
- `public String getName()` - Gets the name of this stopwatch / 获取计时器的名称
- `public int getTaskCount()` - Gets the number of completed tasks / 获取已完成任务的数量
- `public List<TaskInfo> getTasks()` - Gets the list of completed tasks / 获取已完成任务的列表
- `public long getTotalTimeNanos()` - Gets the total elapsed time in nanoseconds / 获取总经过时间（纳秒）
- `public long getTotalTimeMillis()` - Gets the total elapsed time in milliseconds / 获取总经过时间（毫秒）
- `public double getTotalTimeSeconds()` - Gets the total elapsed time in seconds / 获取总经过时间（秒）
- `public Duration getTotalDuration()` - Gets the total elapsed time as Duration / 获取总经过时间作为Duration
- `public long getCurrentTimeNanos()` - Gets the current elapsed time in nanoseconds (if running) / 获取当前经过时间（纳秒，如果正在运行）
- `public String formatTime()` - Formats the total time as a human-readable string / 将总时间格式化为人类可读的字符串
- `public String prettyPrint()` - Creates a pretty-printed summary of all tasks / 创建所有任务的漂亮打印摘要
- `public String shortSummary()` - Creates a short summary string / 创建简短的摘要字符串
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string
- `public record TaskInfo(String name, long timeNanos)` - Information about a timed task / 计时任务的信息

- `public static long toEpochMilli(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Converts LocalDateTime to epoch milliseconds / 将LocalDateTime转换为纪元毫秒
- `public static long toEpochSecond(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Converts LocalDateTime to epoch seconds / 将LocalDateTime转换为纪元秒

- `public static boolean isBetween(LocalDate date, LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Checks if a date is between two dates (inclusive) / 检查日期是否在两个日期之间（包含边界）
- `public static boolean isBetween(LocalDateTime dateTime, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)` - Checks if a date-time is between two date-times (inclusive) / 检查日期时间是否在两个日期时间...
- `public static LocalDate max(LocalDate a, LocalDate b)` - Gets the maximum of two dates / 获取两个日期中的较大值
- `public static LocalDate min(LocalDate a, LocalDate b)` - Gets the minimum of two dates / 获取两个日期中的较小值

- `public static LocalDateTime min(LocalDateTime a, LocalDateTime b)` - Gets the minimum of two date-times / 获取两个日期时间中的较小值

- `public static LocalDateTime endOfDay(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Gets the end of day for a date-time / 获取日期时间的当天结束
- `public static LocalDateTime startOfMonth(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Gets the start of month for a date-time / 获取日期时间的当月开始
- `public static LocalDateTime endOfMonth(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Gets the end of month for a date-time / 获取日期时间的当月结束

- `public static LocalDateTime endOfYear(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Gets the end of year for a date-time / 获取日期时间的当年结束
- `public static LocalDateTime startOfWeek(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Gets the start of week for a date-time (Monday) / 获取日期时间的当周开始（周一）
- `public static LocalDateTime endOfWeek(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Gets the end of week for a date-time (Sunday) / 获取日期时间的当周结束（周日）

- `public static long monthsBetween(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Calculates months between two dates / 计算两个日期之间的月数
- `public static long yearsBetween(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Calculates years between two dates / 计算两个日期之间的年数
- `public static long hoursBetween(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)` - Calculates hours between two date-times / 计算两个日期时间之间的小时数
- `public static long minutesBetween(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)` - Calculates minutes between two date-times / 计算两个日期时间之间的分钟数
- `public static boolean isWeekend(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a weekend / 检查日期是否为周末
- `public static boolean isWeekday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a weekday / 检查日期是否为工作日（周一到周五）
- `public static boolean isLeapYear(int year)` - Checks if a year is a leap year / 检查年份是否为闰年

- `public static int daysInMonth(int year, int month)` - Gets the number of days in a month / 获取月份的天数
- `public static int daysInMonth(YearMonth yearMonth)` - Gets the number of days in a month / 获取月份的天数
- `public static int getQuarter(int month)` - Gets the quarter for a month (1-4) / 获取月份的季度（1-4）
- `public static int getQuarter(LocalDate date)` - Gets the quarter for a date (1-4) / 获取日期的季度（1-4）

### BusinessDayAdjuster
`public final class BusinessDayAdjuster` - Advanced business day adjuster with holiday and special workday support / 高级工作日调整器，支持假日和特殊工作日

- `public static BusinessDayAdjuster plusDays(int days)` - Creates an adjuster that adds the specified number of business days / 创建添加指定工作日数的调整器
- `public static BusinessDayAdjuster minusDays(int days)` - Creates an adjuster that subtracts the specified number of business days / 创建减去指定工作日数的调整器
- `public static BusinessDayAdjuster nextBusinessDay()` - Creates an adjuster that finds the next business day / 创建查找下一个工作日的调整器
- `public static BusinessDayAdjuster previousBusinessDay()` - Creates an adjuster that finds the previous business day / 创建查找上一个工作日的调整器
- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a builder for customized business day adjusters / 创建自定义工作日调整器的构建器
- `public Temporal adjustInto(Temporal temporal)`
- `public boolean isBusinessDay(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a business day / 检查日期是否为工作日
- `public boolean isHoliday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a holiday / 检查日期是否为假日
- `public boolean isSpecialWorkday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a special workday / 检查日期是否为特殊工作日
- `public long countBusinessDays(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Counts business days between two dates (exclusive of end date) / 计算两个日期之间的工作日数（不包含结束日期）
- `public LocalDate nextFrom(LocalDate date)` - Finds the next business day from a given date / 从给定日期查找下一个工作日
- `public LocalDate previousFrom(LocalDate date)` - Finds the previous business day from a given date / 从给定日期查找上一个工作日
- `public LocalDate nthBusinessDayOfMonth(int year, int month, int n)` - Finds the nth business day of the month / 查找月份的第N个工作日

### DateAdjusters
`public final class DateAdjusters` - Extended temporal adjusters for common date operations / 扩展的时间调整器，用于常见日期操作

- `public static TemporalAdjuster startOfYear()` - Returns the start of the year adjuster / 返回年初调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster endOfYear()` - Returns the end of the year adjuster / 返回年末调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster startOfQuarter()` - Returns the start of the current quarter adjuster / 返回当前季度开始调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster endOfQuarter()` - Returns the end of the current quarter adjuster / 返回当前季度结束调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster startOfQuarter(int quarter)` - Returns the start of a specific quarter adjuster / 返回特定季度开始调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster startOfMonth()` - Returns the start of the month adjuster (alias for firstDayOfMonth) / 返回月初调整器（firstDayOfMonth 的别名）
- `public static TemporalAdjuster endOfMonth()` - Returns the end of the month adjuster (alias for lastDayOfMonth) / 返回月末调整器（lastDayOfMonth 的别名）
- `public static TemporalAdjuster startOfWeek()` - Returns the start of the week adjuster (Monday) / 返回周初调整器（周一）
- `public static TemporalAdjuster startOfWeek(DayOfWeek firstDayOfWeek)` - Returns the start of the week adjuster for a specific first day / 返回特定首日的周初调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster endOfWeek()` - Returns the end of the week adjuster (Sunday) / 返回周末调整器（周日）
- `public static TemporalAdjuster endOfWeek(DayOfWeek lastDayOfWeek)` - Returns the end of the week adjuster for a specific last day / 返回特定末日的周末调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster dayOfMonth(int day)` - Returns the nth day of the month adjuster / 返回月份第N天调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster nthDayOfWeekInMonth(int ordinal, DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)` - Returns the nth weekday of the month adjuster / 返回月份第N个工作日调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster nextOrSame(DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)` - Returns an adjuster for the next or same occurrence of a day of week / 返回下一个或相同星期几的调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster previousOrSame(DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)` - Returns an adjuster for the previous or same occurrence of a day of week / 返回上一个或相同星期几的调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster next(DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)` - Returns an adjuster for the next occurrence of a day of week (strictly after) / 返回下一个星期几的调整器（严格之后）
- `public static TemporalAdjuster previous(DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)` - Returns an adjuster for the previous occurrence of a day of week (strictly before) / 返回上一个星期几的调整器（严格之前）
- `public static TemporalAdjuster startOfFirstHalf()` - Returns the start of the first half of the year / 返回上半年开始
- `public static TemporalAdjuster endOfFirstHalf()` - Returns the end of the first half of the year / 返回上半年结束
- `public static TemporalAdjuster startOfSecondHalf()` - Returns the start of the second half of the year / 返回下半年开始
- `public static TemporalAdjuster endOfSecondHalf()` - Returns the end of the second half of the year / 返回下半年结束
- `public static TemporalAdjuster nextMonthDay(Month month, int day)` - Returns an adjuster to the next occurrence of a specific month and day / 返回下一个指定月份和日期的调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster plusBusinessDays(int days)` - Returns an adjuster for adding/subtracting business days / 返回添加/减去工作日的调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster nearestWeekday()` - Returns an adjuster to the nearest weekday / 返回最近工作日的调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster plus(long amount, ChronoUnit unit)` - Returns an adjuster that adds the specified number of units / 返回添加指定数量单位的调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster minus(long amount, ChronoUnit unit)` - Returns an adjuster that subtracts the specified number of units / 返回减去指定数量单位的调整器

### TemporalAdjusters
`public final class TemporalAdjusters` - Temporal Adjusters - Extended temporal adjusters for business use cases / 时间调整器 - 用于业务用例的扩展时间调整器

- `public static TemporalAdjuster firstDayOfMonth()` - Returns the first day of month adjuster. / 返回月初调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster lastDayOfMonth()` - Returns the last day of month adjuster. / 返回月末调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster firstDayOfNextMonth()` - Returns the first day of next month adjuster. / 返回下月初调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster firstDayOfYear()` - Returns the first day of year adjuster. / 返回年初调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster lastDayOfYear()` - Returns the last day of year adjuster. / 返回年末调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster firstDayOfNextYear()` - Returns the first day of next year adjuster. / 返回下年初调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster next(DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)` - Returns the next day of week adjuster. / 返回下一个周几调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster nextOrSame(DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)` - Returns the next or same day of week adjuster. / 返回下一个或相同周几调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster previous(DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)` - Returns the previous day of week adjuster. / 返回上一个周几调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster previousOrSame(DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)` - Returns the previous or same day of week adjuster. / 返回上一个或相同周几调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster dayOfWeekInMonth(int ordinal, DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)` - Returns the nth day of week in month adjuster. / 返回月内第N个周几调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster firstDayOfQuarter()` - Returns the first day of quarter adjuster. / 返回季度首日调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster lastDayOfQuarter()` - Returns the last day of quarter adjuster. / 返回季度末日调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster firstDayOfNextQuarter()` - Returns the first day of next quarter adjuster. / 返回下季度首日调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster firstDayOfHalf()` - Returns the first day of half-year adjuster. / 返回半年首日调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster lastDayOfHalf()` - Returns the last day of half-year adjuster. / 返回半年末日调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster firstDayOfWeek()` - Returns the first day of week adjuster (Monday). / 返回周首日调整器（周一）。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster firstDayOfWeek(DayOfWeek firstDayOfWeek)` - Returns the first day of week adjuster for specific first day. / 返回指定首日的周首日调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster lastDayOfWeek()` - Returns the last day of week adjuster (Sunday). / 返回周末日调整器（周日）。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster lastDayOfWeek(DayOfWeek lastDayOfWeek)` - Returns the last day of week adjuster for specific last day. / 返回指定末日的周末日调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster nextWorkday()` - Returns the next workday adjuster (skips weekends). / 返回下一个工作日调整器（跳过周末）。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster previousWorkday()` - Returns the previous workday adjuster (skips weekends). / 返回上一个工作日调整器（跳过周末）。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster nextOrSameWorkday()` - Returns the next or same workday adjuster. / 返回下一个或相同工作日调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster plusWorkdays(int days)` - Returns an adjuster that adds workdays. / 返回添加工作日的调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster minusWorkdays(int days)` - Returns an adjuster that subtracts workdays. / 返回减去工作日的调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster startOfDay()` - Returns the start of day adjuster (00:00:00.000000000) / 返回日初调整器（00:00:00.000000000）
- `public static TemporalAdjuster endOfDay()` - Returns the end of day adjuster (23:59:59.999999999) / 返回日末调整器（23:59:59.999999999）
- `public static TemporalAdjuster noon()` - Returns the noon adjuster (12:00:00). / 返回正午调整器（12:00:00）。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster atHour(int hour)` - Returns an adjuster to specific hour. / 返回指定小时调整器。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster compose(TemporalAdjuster... adjusters)` - Composes multiple adjusters into one. / 将多个调整器组合成一个。
- `public static TemporalAdjuster andThen(TemporalAdjuster first, TemporalAdjuster second)` - Returns an adjuster that applies first adjuster then second / 返回先应用第一个调整器再应用第二个的调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster of(TemporalAdjuster adjuster)` - Creates adjuster from lambda. / 从lambda创建调整器。

### WorkdayAdjuster
`public final class WorkdayAdjuster` - Temporal adjuster for workday calculations / 工作日计算的时间调整器

- `public static WorkdayAdjuster plusDays(int days)` - Creates an adjuster that adds the specified number of workdays / 创建添加指定工作日数的调整器
- `public static WorkdayAdjuster plusDays(int days, Set<LocalDate> holidays)` - Creates an adjuster that adds workdays with custom holidays / 创建添加工作日并考虑自定义假日...
- `public static WorkdayAdjuster plusDays(int days, Predicate<LocalDate> holidayPredicate)` - Creates an adjuster that adds workdays with custom holiday predicate / 创建添加工作...
- `public static WorkdayAdjuster minusDays(int days)` - Creates an adjuster that subtracts the specified number of workdays / 创建减去指定工...
- `public static WorkdayAdjuster nextWorkday()` - Creates an adjuster that finds the next workday / 创建查找下一个工作日的调整器
- `public static WorkdayAdjuster nextWorkday(Set<LocalDate> holidays)` - Creates an adjuster that finds the next workday with custom holidays / 创建查找下一...
- `public static WorkdayAdjuster previousWorkday()` - Creates an adjuster that finds the previous workday / 创建查找上一个工作日的调整器
- `public static TemporalAdjuster nearestWorkday()` - Creates an adjuster that finds the nearest workday (or same if already a workday) / 创建查找最近工作日的调整器（如果已是工作日则保持不变）
- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a builder for customized workday adjusters / 创建自定义工作日调整器的构建器
- `public Temporal adjustInto(Temporal temporal)`
- `public boolean isWorkday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a workday / 检查日期是否为工作日
- `public long countWorkdays(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Counts workdays between two dates (exclusive of end date) / 计算两个日期之间的工作日数（不包含结束日期）

### AgeBetween
`public final class AgeBetween` - Calculates age from a birth date to a reference date / 从出生日期到参考日期计算年龄

- `public static AgeBetween fromBirth(LocalDate birthDate)` - Creates an AgeBetween from birth date to today / 从出生日期到今天创建AgeBetween
- `public static AgeBetween fromBirth(LocalDateTime birthDateTime)` - Creates an AgeBetween from birth date to today (from LocalDateTime) / 从出生日期时间到今天创建 AgeBetween
- `public static AgeBetween at(LocalDate birthDate, LocalDate referenceDate)` - Creates an AgeBetween from birth date to a specific reference date / 从出生日期到指定参考日期创建 AgeBetween
- `public static int ageInYears(LocalDate birthDate)` - Calculates age in years from birth date to today / 从出生日期到今天计算年龄（年）

- `public int getMonths()` - Gets the months component (0-11) / 获取月份组件（0-11）
- `public int getDays()` - Gets the days component (0-30) / 获取天数组件（0-30）
- `public long getTotalMonths()` - Gets the total age in months / 获取总月数的年龄
- `public long getTotalDays()` - Gets the total age in days / 获取总天数的年龄
- `public long getTotalWeeks()` - Gets the total age in weeks / 获取总周数的年龄
- `public boolean isBirthdayToday()` - Checks if today is the birthday / 检查今天是否是生日
- `public LocalDate getNextBirthday()` - Gets the next birthday date / 获取下一个生日日期

- `public LocalDate getLastBirthday()` - Gets the last birthday date / 获取上一个生日日期

- `public String getChineseZodiac()` - Gets the Chinese zodiac animal / 获取中国生肖
- `public String getChineseZodiacChinese()` - Gets the Chinese zodiac animal in Chinese / 获取中国生肖（中文）
- `public AgeDetail toDetail()` - Gets a detailed age breakdown / 获取详细的年龄分解
- `public LocalDate getBirthDate()` - Gets the birth date / 获取出生日期
- `public LocalDate getReferenceDate()` - Gets the reference date / 获取参考日期
- `public Period getPeriod()` - Gets the period / 获取Period
- `public String format()` - Formats the age as a string / 将年龄格式化为字符串
- `public String formatChinese()` - Formats the age as a Chinese string / 将年龄格式化为中文字符串

### AgeDetail
`public final class AgeDetail` - Detailed age information including statistics and milestones / 详细年龄信息，包括统计数据和里程碑

- `public long getTotalWeeks()` - Gets the total weeks lived / 获取生存的总周数
- `public long getTotalMonths()` - Gets the total months lived / 获取生存的总月数

- `public long getTotalMinutes()` - Gets the total minutes lived (approximate) / 获取生存的总分钟数（近似值）
- `public long getTotalSeconds()` - Gets the total seconds lived (approximate) / 获取生存的总秒数（近似值）

### DateBetween
`public final class DateBetween` - Calculates the difference between two dates or date-times / 计算两个日期或日期时间之间的差异

- `public static DateBetween of(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Creates a DateBetween from two LocalDate objects / 从两个LocalDate对象创建DateBetween
- `public static DateBetween of(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)` - Creates a DateBetween from two LocalDateTime objects / 从两个 LocalDateTime 对象创建 DateBetween
- `public static DateBetween between(Temporal start, Temporal end)` - Creates a DateBetween from any two Temporal objects / 从任意两个 Temporal 对象创建 DateBetween
- `public long days()` - Gets the number of days between start and end (signed) / 获取开始和结束之间的天数（带符号）
- `public long absDays()` - Gets the absolute number of days between start and end / 获取开始和结束之间的天数绝对值
- `public long weeks()` - Gets the number of complete weeks between start and end (signed) / 获取开始和结束之间的周数（带符号）
- `public long absWeeks()` - Gets the absolute number of weeks between start and end / 获取开始和结束之间的周数绝对值
- `public long months()` - Gets the number of complete months between start and end (signed) / 获取开始和结束之间的月数（带符号）
- `public long absMonths()` - Gets the absolute number of months between start and end / 获取开始和结束之间的月数绝对值
- `public long years()` - Gets the number of complete years between start and end (signed) / 获取开始和结束之间的年数（带符号）
- `public long absYears()` - Gets the absolute number of years between start and end / 获取开始和结束之间的年数绝对值
- `public long hours()` - Gets the number of hours between start and end (signed) / 获取开始和结束之间的小时数（带符号）
- `public long minutes()` - Gets the number of minutes between start and end (signed) / 获取开始和结束之间的分钟数（带符号）
- `public long seconds()` - Gets the number of seconds between start and end (signed) / 获取开始和结束之间的秒数（带符号）
- `public long millis()` - Gets the number of milliseconds between start and end (signed) / 获取开始和结束之间的毫秒数（带符号）
- `public Period toPeriod()` - Converts to a Period (for LocalDate only) / 转换为Period（仅用于LocalDate）
- `public Duration toDuration()` - Converts to a Duration (for LocalDateTime only) / 转换为Duration（仅用于LocalDateTime）
- `public DateDiff toDateDiff()` - Gets a detailed breakdown of the difference / 获取差异的详细分解
- `public Temporal getStart()` - Gets the start temporal / 获取开始时间
- `public Temporal getEnd()` - Gets the end temporal / 获取结束时间
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### CronExpression
`public final class CronExpression` - A cron expression parser and scheduler / Cron表达式解析器和调度器

- `public static CronExpression parse(String expression)` - Parses a cron expression / 解析cron表达式
- `public static CronExpression daily(int hour, int minute)` - Creates a cron expression for a specific time / 为特定时间创建cron表达式
- `public static CronExpression everyMinutes(int minutes)` - Creates a cron expression for every N minutes / 为每N分钟创建cron表达式
- `public static CronExpression everyHours(int hours)` - Creates a cron expression for every N hours / 为每N小时创建cron表达式
- `public LocalDateTime nextExecution()` - Gets the next execution time after now / 获取当前之后的下一次执行时间
- `public LocalDateTime nextExecution(LocalDateTime after)` - Gets the next execution time after the specified time / 获取指定时间之后的下一次执行时间
- `public LocalDateTime previousExecution()` - Gets the previous execution time before now / 获取当前之前的上一次执行时间
- `public LocalDateTime previousExecution(LocalDateTime before)` - Gets the previous execution time before the specified time / 获取指定时间之前的上一次执行时间
- `public List<LocalDateTime> nextExecutions(int count)` - Gets the next N execution times / 获取接下来的N次执行时间
- `public List<LocalDateTime> nextExecutions(LocalDateTime after, int count)` - Gets the next N execution times after the specified time / 获取指定时间之后的N次执行时间
- `public boolean matches(LocalDateTime dateTime)` - Checks if the expression matches the specified date-time / 检查表达式是否匹配指定的日期时间
- `public String getExpression()` - Gets the original expression string / 获取原始表达式字符串
- `public Set<Integer> getMinutes()` - Gets the allowed minutes / 获取允许的分钟
- `public Set<Integer> getHours()` - Gets the allowed hours / 获取允许的小时
- `public Set<Integer> getDaysOfMonth()` - Gets the allowed days of month / 获取允许的日期
- `public Set<Integer> getMonths()` - Gets the allowed months / 获取允许的月份
- `public Set<Integer> getDaysOfWeek()` - Gets the allowed days of week / 获取允许的星期几
- `public String describe()` - Gets a human-readable description of the cron expression / 获取cron表达式的人类可读描述
- `public boolean equals(Object obj)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

- `public static String describeInChinese(String expression)` - Gets a Chinese description of a Cron expression / 获取Cron表达式的中文描述
- `public static String dailyAt(int hour, int minute)` - Creates a Cron expression for running at a specific time every day / 创建每天在特定时...
- `public static String weekdaysAt(int hour, int minute)` - Creates a Cron expression for running at a specific time on weekdays / 创建工作日在...
- `public static String everyMinutes(int minutes)` - Creates a Cron expression for running every N minutes / 创建每N分钟运行的Cron表达式
- `public static String everyHours(int hours)` - Creates a Cron expression for running every N hours / 创建每N小时运行的Cron表达式

- `public boolean isPositive()` - Checks if this is positive / 检查是否为正数

### Quarter
`public enum Quarter` - Quarter Enum representing the four quarters of a year / 季度枚举，表示一年中的四个季度

- `public static Quarter of(int quarter)` - Gets the Quarter from a numeric value (1-4) / 从数值(1-4)获取季度
- `public static Quarter ofMonth(int month)` - Gets the Quarter from a month value (1-12) / 从月份值(1-12)获取季度

- `public static Quarter from(TemporalAccessor temporal)` - Gets the Quarter from a TemporalAccessor / 从TemporalAccessor获取季度
- `public int getValue()` - Gets the quarter value (1-4) / 获取季度值(1-4)
- `public int firstMonth()` - Gets the first month of this quarter (1, 4, 7, or 10) / 获取季度的第一个月(1, 4, 7, 或 10)
- `public int lastMonth()` - Gets the last month of this quarter (3, 6, 9, or 12) / 获取季度的最后一个月(3, 6, 9, 或 12)
- `public Month firstMonthOfQuarter()` - Gets the first Month enum of this quarter / 获取季度的第一个Month枚举
- `public Month lastMonthOfQuarter()` - Gets the last Month enum of this quarter / 获取季度的最后一个Month枚举
- `public int length(boolean leapYear)` - Gets the length of this quarter in days / 获取季度的天数
- `public Quarter next()` - Gets the next quarter / 获取下一个季度
- `public Quarter previous()` - Gets the previous quarter / 获取上一个季度
- `public Quarter plus(int quarters)` - Adds quarters to this quarter / 在此季度基础上加季度数
- `public Quarter minus(int quarters)` - Subtracts quarters from this quarter / 在此季度基础上减季度数

- `public ValueRange range(TemporalField field)` - Gets the range of valid values for the specified field / 获取指定字段的有效值范围
- `public Quarter queryFrom(TemporalAccessor temporal)` - Queries the temporal for the Quarter / 从时间对象查询季度
- `public static TemporalQuery<Quarter> query()` - Gets a query for extracting the Quarter from a temporal / 获取从时间对象提取季度的查询
- `public boolean contains(int month)` - Checks if the given month is in this quarter / 检查给定月份是否在此季度内
- `public boolean contains(Month month)` - Checks if the given Month is in this quarter / 检查给定Month是否在此季度内

### HolidayCalendar
`public final class HolidayCalendar` - A calendar for managing and querying holidays / 管理和查询假日的日历

- `public static HolidayCalendar empty()` - Creates an empty calendar / 创建空日历
- `public static HolidayCalendar of(Collection<Holiday> holidays)` - Creates a calendar from a collection of holidays / 从假日集合创建日历
- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a builder / 创建构建器
- `public boolean isHoliday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a holiday / 检查日期是否为假日
- `public boolean isPublicHoliday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a public holiday / 检查日期是否为公共假日
- `public boolean isSpecialWorkday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a special workday / 检查日期是否为特殊工作日
- `public boolean isWeekend(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a weekend / 检查日期是否为周末
- `public boolean isWorkday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a workday / 检查日期是否为工作日
- `public Holiday getHoliday(LocalDate date)` - Gets the holiday for a date / 获取日期的假日
- `public Optional<Holiday> findHoliday(LocalDate date)` - Gets the holiday for a date as Optional / 获取日期的假日（Optional形式）
- `public List<Holiday> getAllHolidays()` - Gets all holidays / 获取所有假日
- `public List<Holiday> getHolidays(int year)` - Gets holidays for a specific year / 获取特定年份的假日
- `public List<Holiday> getHolidays(int year, Month month)` - Gets holidays for a specific year and month / 获取特定年份和月份的假日
- `public List<Holiday> getHolidaysByType(Holiday.HolidayType type)` - Gets holidays of a specific type / 获取特定类型的假日
- `public List<Holiday> getHolidaysInRange(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Gets holidays in a date range / 获取日期范围内的假日
- `public LocalDate nextWorkday(LocalDate date)` - Gets the next workday after the specified date / 获取指定日期之后的下一个工作日
- `public LocalDate previousWorkday(LocalDate date)` - Gets the previous workday before the specified date / 获取指定日期之前的上一个工作日
- `public LocalDate addWorkdays(LocalDate date, int days)` - Adds workdays to a date / 向日期添加工作日
- `public long countWorkdays(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Counts workdays between two dates / 计算两个日期之间的工作日数
- `public String getName()` - Gets the calendar name / 获取日历名称
- `public Set<LocalDate> getSpecialWorkdays()` - Gets all special workdays / 获取所有特殊工作日
- `public Set<DayOfWeek> getWeekendDays()` - Gets the weekend days / 获取周末天数
- `public Predicate<LocalDate> asHolidayPredicate()` - Creates a predicate for checking holidays / 创建检查假日的谓词
- `public Predicate<LocalDate> asWorkdayPredicate()` - Creates a predicate for checking workdays / 创建检查工作日的谓词
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### HolidayProvider
`public interface HolidayProvider` - Interface for providing holiday data / 节假日数据提供者接口


### HolidayUtil
`public final class HolidayUtil` - Utility class for holiday operations / 节假日工具类

- `public static void setDefaultProvider(HolidayProvider provider)` - Sets the default holiday provider / 设置默认节假日提供者
