- `public static boolean isWeekend(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is a weekend (Saturday or Sunday) / 检查日期是否为周末（星期六或星期日）
- `public static boolean isAdjustedWorkday(LocalDate date)` - Checks if a date is an adjusted workday (补班日) / 检查日期是否为调休工作日（补班日）
- `public static LocalDate plusWorkdays(LocalDate date, int workdays)` - Adds workdays to a date / 向日期添加工作日
- `public static LocalDate minusWorkdays(LocalDate date, int workdays)` - Subtracts workdays from a date / 从日期减去工作日
- `public static long workdaysBetween(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Calculates the number of workdays between two dates / 计算两个日期之间的工作日数
- `public static LocalDate nextWorkday(LocalDate date)` - Gets the next workday after the given date / 获取给定日期之后的下一个工作日
- `public static LocalDate previousWorkday(LocalDate date)` - Gets the previous workday before the given date / 获取给定日期之前的上一个工作日
- `public static LocalDate nextOrSameWorkday(LocalDate date)` - Gets the next workday on or after the given date / 获取给定日期当天或之后的下一个工作日
- `public static List<Holiday> getHolidays(int year)` - Gets all holidays for a specific year / 获取指定年份的所有节假日
- `public static List<Holiday> getHolidays(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Gets holidays in a date range / 获取日期范围内的节假日

## 16. opencode-base-lunar

农历组件，提供公历农历互转、节气、节日、生肖、干支、星座

- `public String getDayName()` - Get day name / 获取日期名

## 17. opencode-base-cron

Cron表达式组件，提供解析、验证、下次执行时间计算、描述、构建器

### CronBuilder
`public final class CronBuilder` - Cron Builder - Fluent API for Building Cron Expressions / Cron构建器 - 构建Cron表达式...

- `public static CronBuilder create()` - Creates a new builder / 创建新构建器
- `public static CronBuilder every()` - Creates a new builder with fluent "every" semantics / 创建具有"每"语义的新构建器
- `public static CronBuilder everySeconds(int n)` - Creates schedule that fires every N seconds (6-field cron) / 创建每N秒触发的调度（6字段cron）
- `public static CronBuilder everyMinutes(int n)` - Creates schedule that fires every N minutes / 创建每N分钟触发的调度
- `public static CronBuilder everyHours(int n)` - Creates schedule that fires every N hours / 创建每N小时触发的调度
- `public static CronBuilder everyDays(int n)` - Creates schedule that fires every N days at midnight / 创建每N天午夜触发的调度
- `public CronBuilder at(int hour, int minute)` - Sets hour and minute for execution / 设置执行的小时和分钟
- `public CronBuilder second(int s)` - Sets the second field (enables 6-field cron format) / 设置秒字段（启用6字段cron格式）
- `public CronBuilder minute(int m)` - Sets the minute field / 设置分钟字段
- `public CronBuilder hour(int h)` - Sets the hour field / 设置小时字段
- `public CronBuilder day()` - Sets to every day (default, no-op) / 设置为每天（默认，无操作）
- `public CronBuilder dayOfMonth(int d)` - Sets the day-of-month field / 设置月中日字段
- `public CronBuilder month(int m)` - Sets the month field / 设置月份字段
- `public CronBuilder lastDayOfMonth()` - Sets to the last day of the month (L) / 设置为月最后一天（L）
- `public CronBuilder lastDayOfMonth(int offset)` - Sets to N days before the last day of month (L-N) / 设置为月最后一天前N天（L-N）
- `public CronBuilder nearestWeekday(int day)` - Sets to the nearest weekday to a specific day (nW) / 设置为最接近指定日的工作日（nW）
- `public CronBuilder lastWeekdayOfMonth()` - Sets to the last weekday of the month (LW) / 设置为月最后一个工作日（LW）
- `public CronBuilder monday()` - Sets to Monday / 设置为星期一
- `public CronBuilder tuesday()` - Sets to Tuesday / 设置为星期二
- `public CronBuilder wednesday()` - Sets to Wednesday / 设置为星期三
- `public CronBuilder thursday()` - Sets to Thursday / 设置为星期四
- `public CronBuilder friday()` - Sets to Friday / 设置为星期五
- `public CronBuilder saturday()` - Sets to Saturday / 设置为星期六
- `public CronBuilder sunday()` - Sets to Sunday / 设置为星期日
- `public CronBuilder weekdays()` - Sets to weekdays (Monday-Friday) / 设置为工作日（周一到周五）
- `public CronBuilder weekends()` - Sets to weekends (Saturday-Sunday) / 设置为周末（周六和周日）
- `public CronBuilder dayOfWeek(DayOfWeek dow)` - Sets the day of week from DayOfWeek / 从 DayOfWeek 设置星期几
- `public CronBuilder nthDayOfWeek(DayOfWeek dow, int nth)` - Sets to the Nth occurrence of a day of week in the month (n#m) / 设置为月中第N个某星期几...
- `public CronBuilder lastDayOfWeek(DayOfWeek dow)` - Sets to the last occurrence of a day of week in the month (nL) / 设置为月中最后一个某星期...
- `public CronBuilder secondRange(int from, int to)` - Sets the second field to a range (enables 6-field cron) / 设置秒字段为范围（启用6字段cron）
- `public CronBuilder minuteRange(int from, int to)` - Sets the minute field to a range / 设置分钟字段为范围
- `public CronBuilder hourRange(int from, int to)` - Sets the hour field to a range / 设置小时字段为范围
- `public String buildExpression()` - Builds the cron expression string / 构建Cron表达式字符串
- `public CronExpression build()` - Builds and parses the cron expression into a CronExpression / 构建并解析Cron表达式为 C...

### CronExpression
`public final class CronExpression` - Cron Expression - Full-Featured Cron Expression Parser and Evaluator / Cron表达...

- `public static CronExpression parse(String expression)` - Parse a cron expression / 解析Cron表达式
- `public boolean matches(ZonedDateTime time)` - Check if a time matches this cron expression / 检查时间是否匹配此Cron表达式
- `public ZonedDateTime nextExecution(ZonedDateTime from)` - Gets the next execution time after the given time / 获取给定时间之后的下次执行时间
- `public List<ZonedDateTime> nextExecutions(ZonedDateTime from, int count)` - Gets the next N execution times after the given time / 获取给定时间之后的下N次执行时间
- `public ZonedDateTime previousExecution(ZonedDateTime from)` - Gets the previous execution time before the given time / 获取给定时间之前的上次执行时间
- `public List<ZonedDateTime> previousExecutions(ZonedDateTime from, int count)` - Gets the previous N execution times before the given time / 获取给定时间之前的前N次执行时间
- `public String describe()` - Gets a human-readable description of this expression / 获取此表达式的人类可读描述
- `public String getExpression()` - Gets the original expression string / 获取原始表达式字符串
- `public boolean hasSeconds()` - Checks if this expression uses 6-field format (with seconds) / 检查此表达式是否使用6字段格...
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### CronField
`public enum CronField` - Cron Field Definition - Enum for Cron Expression Fields / Cron字段定义 - Cron表达式字段枚举

- `public String displayName()` - Gets the display name of this field / 获取此字段的显示名称
- `public int min()` - Gets the minimum value / 获取最小值
- `public int max()` - Gets the maximum value / 获取最大值
- `public String resolveAliases(String field)` - Resolves name aliases in a field string (case-insensitive) / 解析字段字符串中的名称别名（不区...
- `public boolean isInRange(int value)` - Checks if the given value is within the valid range / 检查给定值是否在有效范围内

### CronMacro
`public final class CronMacro` - Cron Macro - Predefined Cron Expression Shortcuts / Cron宏 - 预定义的Cron表达式快捷方式

- `public static String resolve(String input)` - Resolves a macro to its cron expression / 将宏解析为Cron表达式
- `public static boolean isMacro(String input)` - Checks if the input is a known macro / 检查输入是否是已知宏

### CronValidator
`public final class CronValidator` - Cron Validator - Cron Expression Validation Utility / Cron验证器 - Cron表达式验证工具类

- `public static void validate(String expression)` - Validates a cron expression / 验证Cron表达式
- `public static void validate(String expression, Duration minInterval)` - Validates a cron expression with a minimum interval check / 验证Cron表达式并检查最小间隔
- `public static boolean isValid(String expression)` - Checks if a cron expression is valid / 检查Cron表达式是否有效
- `public static Duration getEstimatedInterval(String expression)` - Gets the estimated interval between consecutive executions / 获取连续执行之间的预估间隔

### OpenCron
`public final class OpenCron` - OpenCron - Cron Expression Facade / OpenCron - Cron表达式门面类

- `public static CronExpression parse(String expression)` - Parses a cron expression / 解析Cron表达式
- `public static boolean isValid(String expression)` - Checks if a cron expression is valid / 检查Cron表达式是否有效
- `public static void validate(String expression)` - Validates a cron expression, throwing on failure / 验证Cron表达式，失败时抛出异常
- `public static void validate(String expression, Duration minInterval)` - Validates a cron expression with minimum interval check / 验证Cron表达式并检查最小间隔
- `public static ZonedDateTime nextExecution(String expression, ZonedDateTime from)` - Gets the next execution time / 获取下次执行时间
- `public static List<ZonedDateTime> nextExecutions(String expression, ZonedDateTime from, int count)` - Gets the next N execution times / 获取下N次执行时间
- `public static ZonedDateTime previousExecution(String expression, ZonedDateTime from)` - Gets the previous execution time / 获取上次执行时间
- `public static List<ZonedDateTime> previousExecutions(String expression, ZonedDateTime from, int count)` - Gets the previous N execution times / 获取前N次执行时间
- `public static Duration getEstimatedInterval(String expression)` - Gets the estimated interval between executions / 获取执行之间的预估间隔
- `public static String describe(String expression)` - Gets a human-readable description of a cron expression / 获取Cron表达式的人类可读描述
- `public static CronBuilder builder()` - Creates a new cron expression builder / 创建新的Cron表达式构建器

### OpenCronException
`public class OpenCronException` - Cron Exception - Exception for Cron Expression Errors / Cron异常 - Cron表达式错误异常

- `public OpenCronException(String message)` - Constructs exception with message / 构造带消息的异常
- `public OpenCronException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Constructs exception with message and cause / 构造带消息和原因的异常
- `public OpenCronException(String message, String expression, String field, Throwable cause)` - Constructs exception with all diagnostic fields / 构造带所有诊断字段的异常
- `public String getExpression()` - Gets the cron expression that caused the error / 获取导致错误的Cron表达式
- `public String getField()` - Gets the problematic field name / 获取有问题的字段名称
- `public static OpenCronException parseError(String expression, String reason)` - Creates exception for parse errors / 为解析错误创建异常
- `public static OpenCronException parseError(String expression, String reason, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for parse errors with cause / 为带原因的解析错误创建异常
- `public static OpenCronException fieldError(String field, int value, int min, int max)` - Creates exception for invalid field values / 为无效字段值创建异常
- `public static OpenCronException fieldError(String field, String fieldValue, String reason)` - Creates exception for invalid field expression / 为无效字段表达式创建异常
- `public static OpenCronException unknownMacro(String macro)` - Creates exception for unknown macro / 为未知宏创建异常

## 18. opencode-base-money

金额组件，提供不可变金额对象、多币种支持、汇率换算、中文大写转换

### Currency
`public enum Currency` - Currency / 货币类型

- `public String getSymbol()` - Get currency symbol / 获取货币符号
- `public String getNameZh()` - Get Chinese name / 获取中文名称
- `public String getNameEn()` - Get English name / 获取英文名称
- `public String getName()` - Get name (Chinese) / 获取名称（中文）
- `public String getCode()` - Get ISO 4217 currency code / 获取 ISO 4217 货币代码
- `public int getScale()` - Get decimal scale / 获取小数位数
- `public static Currency of(String code)` - Get currency by code / 根据代码获取货币
- `public static boolean isSupported(String code)` - Check if currency code is supported / 检查货币代码是否支持

### Money
`public record Money(BigDecimal amount, Currency currency)` - Money / 金额

- `public static Money of(BigDecimal amount, Currency currency)` - Create money from BigDecimal and currency / 从 BigDecimal 和货币创建金额
- `public static Money of(BigDecimal amount)` - Create money from BigDecimal (default CNY) / 从 BigDecimal 创建金额（默认人民币）
- `public static Money of(String amount, Currency currency)` - Create money from string and currency / 从字符串和货币创建金额
- `public static Money of(String amount)` - Create money from string (default CNY) / 从字符串创建金额（默认人民币）
- `public static Money of(long amount, Currency currency)` - Create money from long and currency / 从长整型和货币创建金额
- `public static Money of(long amount)` - Create money from long (default CNY) / 从长整型创建金额（默认人民币）
- `public static Money ofYuan(long yuan)` - Create money from yuan (CNY) / 从元创建金额（人民币）
- `public static Money ofCents(long cents)` - Create money from cents (CNY, 1 yuan = 100 cents) / 从分创建金额（人民币，1元 = 100分）
- `public static Money zero(Currency currency)` - Create zero money with currency / 创建零金额
- `public static Money zero()` - Create zero money (default CNY) / 创建零金额（默认人民币）
- `public Money add(Money other)` - Add money / 加法
- `public Money subtract(Money other)` - Subtract money / 减法
- `public Money multiply(BigDecimal multiplier)` - Multiply by BigDecimal / 乘以 BigDecimal
- `public Money multiply(long multiplier)` - Multiply by long / 乘以长整型
- `public Money multiply(double multiplier)` - Multiply by double / 乘以双精度浮点数
- `public Money divide(BigDecimal divisor)` - Divide by BigDecimal / 除以 BigDecimal
- `public Money divide(long divisor)` - Divide by long / 除以长整型
- `public Money divide(double divisor)` - Divide by double / 除以双精度浮点数
- `public Money negate()` - Negate / 取反
- `public Money abs()` - Absolute value / 绝对值
- `public Money round()` - Round to currency scale / 按货币精度四舍五入
- `public int compareTo(Money other)` - 比较排序 / Compare for ordering
- `public boolean isGreaterThan(Money other)` - Check if greater than / 是否大于
- `public boolean isLessThan(Money other)` - Check if less than / 是否小于
- `public boolean isGreaterOrEqual(Money other)` - Check if greater than or equal / 是否大于等于
- `public boolean isLessOrEqual(Money other)` - Check if less than or equal / 是否小于等于
- `public boolean isPositive()` - Check if positive / 是否为正
- `public boolean isNegative()` - Check if negative / 是否为负
- `public boolean isZero()` - Check if zero / 是否为零
- `public long toCents()` - Convert to cents (smallest unit) / 转换为分（最小单位）
- `public Money convertTo(Currency target, BigDecimal rate)` - Convert to target currency / 转换为目标货币
- `public String format()` - Format with currency symbol / 带货币符号格式化
- `public String formatNumber()` - Format number only / 仅格式化数字
- `public String toChineseUpperCase()` - Convert to Chinese uppercase / 转换为中文大写
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### OpenMoney
`public final class OpenMoney` - OpenMoney / 金额工具门面类

- `public static Money of(String amount)` - Create money from string (default CNY) / 从字符串创建金额（默认人民币）
- `public static Money of(String amount, Currency currency)` - Create money from string and currency / 从字符串和货币创建金额
- `public static Money ofCents(long cents)` - Create money from cents / 从分创建金额
- `public static Money zero()` - Create zero money / 创建零金额
- `public static Money zero(Currency currency)` - Create zero money with currency / 创建指定货币的零金额
- `public static String toChineseUpperCase(BigDecimal amount)` - Convert amount to Chinese uppercase / 将金额转换为中文大写
- `public static String toChineseUpperCase(Money money)` - Convert money to Chinese uppercase / 将金额转换为中文大写
- `public static List<Money> allocate(Money total, int... ratios)` - Allocate money by ratios / 按比例分摊金额
- `public static List<Money> split(Money total, int parts)` - Split money evenly / 平均分摊金额
- `public static List<Money> allocateByPercent(Money total, int... percentages)` - Allocate by percentages / 按百分比分摊
- `public static Money sum(Collection<Money> moneys)` - Calculate sum of money collection / 计算金额集合的和
- `public static Money average(Collection<Money> moneys)` - Calculate average of money collection / 计算金额集合的平均值
- `public static Money max(Collection<Money> moneys)` - Find maximum money / 找最大金额
- `public static Money min(Collection<Money> moneys)` - Find minimum money / 找最小金额
- `public static Money applyDiscount(Money money, BigDecimal discountRate)` - Apply discount / 应用折扣
- `public static Money calculateTax(Money money, BigDecimal taxRate)` - Calculate tax / 计算税额
- `public static Money addTax(Money money, BigDecimal taxRate)` - Add tax / 加税
- `public static Money convert(Money money, Currency target, BigDecimal rate)` - Convert money to target currency / 将金额转换为目标货币
- `public static Money convert(Money money, Currency target, ExchangeRateProvider provider)` - Convert money using exchange rate provider / 使用汇率提供者转换金额
- `public static ExchangeRate rate(Currency source, Currency target, BigDecimal rate)` - Create exchange rate / 创建汇率
- `public static String format(Money money)` - Format money / 格式化金额
- `public static String formatWithCode(Money money)` - Format money with currency code / 带货币代码格式化金额
- `public static String formatAccounting(Money money)` - Format money in accounting style / 会计格式化金额
- `public static String formatCompact(Money money)` - Format money in compact style / 紧凑格式化金额
- `public static BigDecimal validateAndParse(String amountStr)` - Validate and parse amount string / 验证并解析金额字符串
- `public static void validatePositive(Money money)` - Validate money is positive / 验证金额为正
- `public static void validateNonNegative(Money money)` - Validate money is non-negative / 验证金额非负
- `public static boolean isValid(String amountStr)` - Check if amount string is valid / 检查金额字符串是否有效
- `public static boolean areEqual(Money m1, Money m2)` - Check if amounts are equal / 检查金额是否相等

### AllocationUtil
`public final class AllocationUtil` - Allocation Util / 分摊工具类

- `public static List<Money> allocate(Money total, int... ratios)` - Allocate money by ratios / 按比例分摊金额
- `public static List<Money> allocateByPercent(Money total, int... percentages)` - Allocate money by percentages / 按百分比分摊金额
- `public static List<Money> split(Money total, int parts)` - Split money evenly / 平均分摊金额

### MoneyCalcUtil

- `public static Money sum(Collection<Money> moneys)` - Calculate sum of money collection / 计算金额集合的和
- `public static Money sum(Collection<Money> moneys, Currency currency)` - Calculate sum with specified currency / 按指定货币计算和

- `public static Money applyDiscount(Money money, BigDecimal discountRate)` - Apply discount / 应用折扣

- `public static Money calculateTax(Money money, BigDecimal taxRate)` - Calculate tax / 计算税额
- `public static Money addTax(Money money, BigDecimal taxRate)` - Add tax / 加税

### CurrencyMismatchException

### ExchangeRate
`public record ExchangeRate(Currency source, Currency target, BigDecimal rate, LocalDateTime timestamp)` - Exchange Rate / 汇率

- `public static ExchangeRate of(Currency source, Currency target, BigDecimal rate)` - Create exchange rate / 创建汇率
- `public static ExchangeRate of(Currency source, Currency target, String rate)` - Create exchange rate from string / 从字符串创建汇率
- `public static ExchangeRate of(Currency source, Currency target, BigDecimal rate, LocalDateTime timestamp)` - Create exchange rate with timestamp / 创建带时间戳的汇率

## 20. opencode-base-event

事件总线组件，支持同步/异步事件发布、注解订阅、优先级、事件存储

### DataEvent
`public class DataEvent<T>` - Generic Data Event / 泛型数据事件

- `public DataEvent(T data)` - Create data event with payload / 创建带载荷的数据事件
- `public DataEvent(T data, String source)` - Create data event with payload and source / 创建带载荷和来源的数据事件
- `public T getData()` - Get the data payload / 获取数据载荷
- `public Class<?> getDataType()` - Get the data type / 获取数据类型
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### Event
`public abstract class Event` - Event Base Class / 事件基类

- `public String getId()` - Get unique event ID / 获取唯一事件ID
- `public Instant getTimestamp()` - Get event timestamp / 获取事件时间戳
- `public String getSource()` - Get event source / 获取事件来源
- `public boolean isCancelled()` - Check if event is cancelled / 检查事件是否已取消
- `public void cancel()` - Cancel the event to stop further processing / 取消事件以停止后续处理
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### EventListener
`public interface EventListener<E` - Event Listener Interface / 事件监听器接口


### OpenEvent
`public final class OpenEvent` - OpenEvent - Event Bus / 事件总线

- `public static OpenEvent getDefault()` - Get the default singleton instance / 获取默认单例实例
- `public static OpenEvent create()` - Create a new OpenEvent instance / 创建新的OpenEvent实例
- `public static Builder builder()` - Create a builder for custom configuration / 创建用于自定义配置的构建器
- `public void register(Object subscriber)` - Register an object's @Subscribe methods as event listeners / 将对象的@Subscribe方法...
- `public <E extends Event> void on(Class<E> eventType, EventListener<E> listener)` - Register a lambda listener for an event type / 为事件类型注册Lambda监听器
- `public <E extends Event> void on(Class<E> eventType, EventListener<E> listener, boolean async)` - Register a lambda listener with async option / 使用异步选项注册Lambda监听器
- `public <E extends Event> void on(Class<E> eventType, EventListener<E> listener,` - Register a lambda listener with async and priority options / 使用异步和优先级选项注册Lamb...
- `public void unregister(Object subscriber)` - Unregister all listeners from a subscriber / 从订阅者注销所有监听器
- `public void publish(Event event)` - Publish an event synchronously / 同步发布事件
- `public CompletableFuture<Void> publishAsync(Event event)` - Publish an event asynchronously / 异步发布事件
- `public <T> void publish(T data)` - Publish data as a DataEvent / 将数据作为DataEvent发布
- `public <T> void publish(T data, String source)` - Publish data as a DataEvent with source / 将数据作为带来源的DataEvent发布
- `public boolean publishAndWait(Event event, Duration timeout)` - Publish and wait for processing to complete / 发布并等待处理完成
- `public void setEventStore(EventStore store)` - Set the event store / 设置事件存储
- `public EventStore getEventStore()` - Get the event store / 获取事件存储
- `public void setExceptionHandler(EventExceptionHandler handler)` - Set the exception handler / 设置异常处理器
- `public void close()` - Shuts down the async executor and dispatchers, releasing resources. / 关闭异步执行器...

### WaitableEvent
`public class WaitableEvent` - Waitable Event Wrapper / 可等待事件包装器

- `public WaitableEvent(Event event, CountDownLatch latch)` - Create waitable event wrapper / 创建可等待事件包装器
- `public WaitableEvent(Event event)` - Create waitable event with new latch / 创建带新锁存器的可等待事件
- `public Event getWrappedEvent()` - Get the wrapped event / 获取被包装的事件
- `public CountDownLatch getLatch()` - Get the countdown latch / 获取倒计时锁存器
- `public void complete()` - Signal that event processing is complete / 通知事件处理完成
- `public boolean await(long timeout)` - Wait for event processing to complete / 等待事件处理完成
- `public void await()` - Wait for event processing to complete indefinitely / 无限期等待事件处理完成
- `public boolean isCancelled()` - 判断cancelled
- `public void cancel()`
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### AsyncDispatcher
`public class AsyncDispatcher` - Asynchronous Event Dispatcher / 异步事件分发器

- `public AsyncDispatcher()` - Create async dispatcher with default virtual thread executor / 使用默认虚拟线程执行器创建异...
- `public AsyncDispatcher(ExecutorService executor)` - Create async dispatcher with custom executor / 使用自定义执行器创建异步分发器
- `public void dispatch(Event event, List<Consumer<Event>> listeners)` - Dispatch event to listeners asynchronously / 异步将事件分发到监听器
- `public CompletableFuture<Void> dispatchAsync(Event event, List<Consumer<Event>> listeners)` - Dispatch event and return a future for completion / 分发事件并返回完成的Future
- `public boolean isAsync()` - 判断async
- `public void shutdown()` - Shutdown the dispatcher and release resources / 关闭分发器并释放资源
- `public ExecutorService getExecutor()` - Get the underlying executor service / 获取底层执行器服务

- `public SyncDispatcher(boolean stopOnError)` - Create sync dispatcher with error handling configuration / 使用错误处理配置创建同步分发器
- `public void dispatch(Event event, List<Consumer<Event>> listeners)` - Dispatch event to listeners synchronously / 同步将事件分发到监听器
- `public boolean isAsync()` - 判断async

- `public Event getEvent()` - Get the related event (if available) / 获取相关事件（如果可用）

- `public void handleException(Event event, Throwable exception, String listenerName)` - Handle exception with retry logic / 使用重试逻辑处理异常
- `public void processDeadLetters(Consumer<FailedEvent> handler)` - Process dead letter queue / 处理死信队列
- `public int getDeadLetterQueueSize()` - Get dead letter queue size / 获取死信队列大小
- `public void clearDeadLetterQueue()` - Clear dead letter queue / 清除死信队列

### HeartbeatMonitor
`public class HeartbeatMonitor` - Generic heartbeat monitor that detects missed heartbeats. / 通用心跳监控器，用于检测心跳超时。

- `public static Builder builder()` - Create a new builder. / 创建新的构建器。
- `public void watch(String id, Duration expectedInterval)` - Register an item to be watched for missed heartbeats. / 注册一个需要监控心跳的项目。
- `public void heartbeat(String id)` - Record a heartbeat for the given item. / 为指定项目记录一次心跳。
- `public void unwatch(String id)` - Stop watching the given item. / 停止监控指定项目。
- `public Set<String> getMissedIds()` - Return the IDs of items that have missed their heartbeat (exceeded their expe...
- `public int watchedCount()` - Return the number of items currently being watched. / 返回当前正在监控的项目数量。
- `public synchronized void start()` - Start the periodic heartbeat checker. / 启动周期性心跳检查。
- `public synchronized void stop()` - Stop the periodic heartbeat checker. / 停止周期性心跳检查。
- `public void close()` - Alias for #stop(), implements AutoCloseable. / #stop() 的别名，实现 AutoCloseable。

### Saga
`public final class Saga<T>` - Saga - Distributed Transaction Orchestration Pattern / Saga - 分布式事务编排模式

- `public SagaResult<T> execute(T context)` - Executes the saga synchronously. / 同步执行 saga。
- `public CompletableFuture<SagaResult<T>> executeAsync(T context)` - Executes the saga asynchronously. / 异步执行 saga。
- `public String getName()` - Gets the saga name. / 获取 saga 名称。
- `public int getStepCount()` - Gets the number of steps. / 获取步骤数量。
- `public List<String> getStepNames()` - Gets the step names. / 获取步骤名称。
- `public static <T> Builder<T> builder()` - Creates a new builder. / 创建新的构建器。

### SagaResult
`public record SagaResult<T>(` - Saga Result - The result of a saga execution / Saga 结果 - saga 执行的结果

- `public boolean isSuccess()` - Checks if the saga completed successfully. / 检查 saga 是否成功完成。
- `public boolean isCompensated()` - Checks if the saga failed and was compensated. / 检查 saga 是否失败并已补偿。
- `public boolean isFailed()` - Checks if the saga failed. / 检查 saga 是否失败。
- `public Duration getDuration()` - Gets the execution duration. / 获取执行时长。
- `public String getErrorMessage()` - Gets the error message if any. / 获取错误消息（如果有）。

## 21. opencode-base-config

配置管理组件，支持多数据源（文件/类路径/环境变量）、类型安全、动态刷新

### Config
`public interface Config` - Unified Configuration Access Interface / 统一配置访问接口


### ConfigBuilder
`public class ConfigBuilder` - Configuration Builder / 配置构建器

- `public ConfigBuilder addClasspathResource(String resource)` - Add classpath resource / 添加类路径资源

- `public ConfigBuilder addFile(Path file)` - Add file / 添加文件
- `public ConfigBuilder addFiles(Path... files)` - Add multiple files / 添加多个文件

- `public ConfigBuilder addSource(ConfigSource source)` - Add custom configuration source / 添加自定义配置源
- `public <T> ConfigBuilder registerConverter(Class<T> type, ConfigConverter<T> converter)` - Register type converter / 注册类型转换器
- `public ConfigBuilder disablePlaceholders()` - Disable placeholder resolution / 禁用占位符解析
- `public ConfigBuilder enableHotReload()` - Enable hot reload / 启用热重载

- `public ConfigBuilder addValidator(ConfigValidator validator)` - Add validator / 添加验证器
- `public ConfigBuilder required(String... keys)` - Add required keys validation / 添加必填键验证
- `public Config build()` - Build configuration / 构建配置

- `public OpenConfigException(String message)` - Create exception with message / 创建带消息的异常

## 25. opencode-base-email

邮件组件，提供发送（SMTP）和接收（IMAP/POP3），支持模板、附件、异步

### Attachment
`public interface Attachment` - Email Attachment Interface / 邮件附件接口


### Email
`public record Email(` - Email Entity Record / 邮件实体记录

- `public static Builder builder()` - Create a new builder / 创建新的构建器
- `public boolean hasAttachments()` - Check if email has attachments / 检查邮件是否有附件
- `public boolean hasInlineAttachments()` - Check if email has inline attachments / 检查邮件是否有内嵌附件
- `public List<String> getAllRecipients()` - Get all recipients (to + cc + bcc) / 获取所有收件人

### EmailConfig
`public record EmailConfig(` - Email Configuration Record / 邮件配置记录

- `public static Builder builder()` - Create a new builder / 创建新的构建器
- `public boolean requiresAuth()` - Check if authentication is required / 检查是否需要认证

- `public boolean hasDkim()` - Check if DKIM signing is configured / 检查是否配置了DKIM签名

- `public boolean isUnread()` - Check if email is unread / 检查邮件是否未读
- `public EmailFlags withSeen(boolean seen)` - Create a copy with seen flag set / 创建设置已读标记的副本
- `public EmailFlags withFlagged(boolean flagged)` - Create a copy with flagged status set / 创建设置标记状态的副本
- `public EmailFlags withDeleted(boolean deleted)` - Create a copy with deleted flag set / 创建设置删除标记的副本
- `public EmailFlags withAnswered(boolean answered)` - Create a copy with answered flag set / 创建设置已回复标记的副本

- `public boolean isPop3()` - Check if POP3 protocol is used / 检查是否使用POP3协议

- `public static EmailRateLimiter.RateLimitQuota getRateLimitQuota(String recipient)` - Get remaining rate limit quota for recipient / 获取收件人的剩余频率限制配额

- `public static EmailConfig getConfig()` - Get current configuration / 获取当前配置
- `public static void send(Email email)` - Send email / 发送邮件
- `public static SendResult sendWithResult(Email email)` - Send email and return result with message ID / 发送邮件并返回包含消息ID的结果
- `public static void sendText(String to, String subject, String content)` - Send simple text email / 发送简单文本邮件
- `public static void sendHtml(String to, String subject, String htmlContent)` - Send HTML email / 发送HTML邮件
- `public static void sendTemplate(String to, String subject,` - Send template email / 发送模板邮件
- `public static void sendToMultiple(List<String> recipients, String subject, String content)` - Send to multiple recipients / 发送给多个收件人
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> sendAsync(Email email)` - Send email asynchronously / 异步发送邮件
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> sendAsync(Email email,` - Send email asynchronously with callback / 使用回调异步发送邮件
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> sendTextAsync(String to, String subject, String content)` - Send simple text email asynchronously / 异步发送简单文本邮件
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> sendHtmlAsync(String to, String subject, String htmlContent)` - Send HTML email asynchronously / 异步发送HTML邮件
- `public static List<CompletableFuture<Void>> sendAllAsync(List<Email> emails)` - Send multiple emails asynchronously / 异步发送多封邮件
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> sendAllAndWait(List<Email> emails)` - Send multiple emails and wait for completion / 发送多封邮件并等待完成
- `public static void configureReceiver(EmailReceiveConfig config)` - Configure email receiver / 配置邮件接收器
- `public static void configureReceiver(String host, String username, String password, boolean useImap)` - Quick receiver configuration / 快速接收器配置
- `public static void configureReceiver(EmailReceiveConfig config, EmailReceiver receiver)` - Configure receiver with custom implementation / 使用自定义实现配置接收器
- `public static boolean isReceiverConfigured()` - Check if receiver is configured / 检查接收器是否已配置
- `public static EmailReceiveConfig getReceiveConfig()` - Get current receive configuration / 获取当前接收配置
- `public static List<ReceivedEmail> receiveUnread()` - Receive unread emails from default folder / 从默认文件夹接收未读邮件
- `public static List<ReceivedEmail> receive(EmailQuery query)` - Receive emails with query / 使用查询接收邮件
- `public static List<ReceivedEmail> receiveAll()` - Receive all emails from default folder / 从默认文件夹接收所有邮件
- `public static ReceivedEmail receiveById(String messageId)` - Receive email by message ID / 通过消息ID接收邮件
- `public static int getMessageCount(String folder)` - Get message count in folder / 获取文件夹中的消息数量
- `public static int getUnreadCount(String folder)` - Get unread message count in folder / 获取文件夹中的未读消息数量
- `public static void markAsRead(String messageId)` - Mark email as read / 标记邮件为已读
- `public static void markAsUnread(String messageId)` - Mark email as unread / 标记邮件为未读
- `public static void setFlagged(String messageId, boolean flagged)` - Set email flagged status / 设置邮件标记状态
- `public static void delete(String messageId)` - Delete email / 删除邮件
- `public static void moveToFolder(String messageId, String targetFolder)` - Move email to folder (IMAP only) / 移动邮件到文件夹（仅IMAP）
- `public static List<String> listFolders()` - List available folders / 列出可用文件夹
- `public static CompletableFuture<List<ReceivedEmail>> receiveUnreadAsync()` - Receive unread emails asynchronously / 异步接收未读邮件
- `public static CompletableFuture<List<ReceivedEmail>> receiveAsync(EmailQuery query)` - Receive emails asynchronously with query / 使用查询异步接收邮件
- `public static CompletableFuture<List<ReceivedEmail>> receiveAsync(` - Receive emails asynchronously with callback / 使用回调异步接收邮件
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> markAsReadAsync(String messageId)` - Mark email as read asynchronously / 异步标记邮件为已读
- `public static CompletableFuture<Void> deleteAsync(String messageId)` - Delete email asynchronously / 异步删除邮件
- `public static EmailIdleMonitor createMonitor(EmailListener listener)` - Create email monitor for real-time notifications / 创建邮件监控器用于实时通知
- `public static EmailIdleMonitor createMonitor(String folder, EmailListener listener)` - Create email monitor for specific folder / 为特定文件夹创建邮件监控器
- `public static EmailQuery.Builder query()` - Create email query builder / 创建邮件查询构建器
- `public static EmailReceiveConfig.Builder receiveConfig()` - Create receive configuration builder / 创建接收配置构建器
- `public static Email.Builder email()` - Create email builder with default from address / 创建带默认发件人的邮件构建器
- `public static EmailConfig.Builder config()` - Create configuration builder / 创建配置构建器
- `public static void shutdown()` - Shutdown all resources (call on application shutdown) / 关闭所有资源（应用关闭时调用）
- `public static void shutdownSender()` - Shutdown only sender resources / 仅关闭发送器资源
- `public static void shutdownReceiver()` - Shutdown only receiver resources / 仅关闭接收器资源

### ReceivedEmail
`public record ReceivedEmail(` - Received Email Record / 接收的邮件记录

- `public boolean hasTextContent()` - Check if email has text content / 检查邮件是否有文本内容
- `public boolean hasHtmlContent()` - Check if email has HTML content / 检查邮件是否有HTML内容
- `public String getContent()` - Get the best available content (prefer HTML) / 获取最佳可用内容（优先HTML）
- `public String getTextOrHtmlContent()` - Get the best available content (prefer text) / 获取最佳可用内容（优先文本）
- `public boolean hasAttachments()` - Check if email has attachments / 检查邮件是否有附件
- `public int getAttachmentCount()` - Get attachment count / 获取附件数量
- `public boolean isUnread()` - Check if email is unread / 检查邮件是否未读
- `public boolean isFlagged()` - Check if email is flagged/starred / 检查邮件是否已标记/星标
- `public boolean isAnswered()` - Check if email has been answered / 检查邮件是否已回复
- `public String getHeader(String name)` - Get header value by name / 根据名称获取邮件头值
- `public List<String> getAllRecipients()` - Get all recipients (to + cc + bcc) / 获取所有收件人
- `public static Builder builder()` - Create a new builder / 创建新的构建器

- `public static EmailReceiveException parseFailed(String messageId, Throwable cause)` - Create exception for message parse failure / 创建消息解析失败异常

- `public void resetAll()` - Reset all rate limits / 重置所有频率限制
- `public int getMaxPerMinute()` - Get max per minute limit / 获取每分钟最大限制
- `public int getMaxPerHour()` - Get max per hour limit / 获取每小时最大限制
- `public int getMaxPerDay()` - Get max per day limit / 获取每天最大限制
- `public record RateLimitQuota(int minuteRemaining, int hourRemaining, int dayRemaining)` - Rate limit quota record / 频率限制配额记录

## 26. opencode-base-sms

短信组件，提供多provider短信发送、模板管理、批量发送、手机号验证

### OpenSms
`public final class OpenSms` - Open SMS / 开放短信

- `public static OpenSms of(SmsConfig config)` - Create from config / 从配置创建
- `public static OpenSms of(SmsProvider provider)` - Create from provider / 从提供商创建
- `public static OpenSms console()` - Create console mock instance / 创建控制台模拟实例
- `public SmsResult send(String phoneNumber, String content)` - Send SMS / 发送短信
- `public SmsResult send(SmsMessage message)` - Send SMS message / 发送短信消息
- `public List<SmsResult> sendBatch(List<SmsMessage> messages)` - Send batch SMS / 批量发送短信
- `public List<SmsResult> sendToAll(List<String> phoneNumbers, String content)` - Send to multiple recipients / 发送给多个收件人
- `public OpenSms registerTemplate(String id, String content)` - Register template / 注册模板
- `public OpenSms registerTemplate(SmsTemplate template)` - Register template / 注册模板

- `public List<SmsResult> sendTemplateToAll(String templateId, List<String> phoneNumbers, Map<String, String> variables)` - Send template to multiple recipients / 使用模板发送给多个收件人

- `public boolean hasPrevious()` - Check if has previous page / 检查是否有上一页

- `public boolean isLast()` - Check if last page / 检查是否最后一页

- `public int getPreviousPage()` - Get previous page number / 获取上一页页码

- `public int getPage()` - Get page number / 获取页码
- `public int getSize()` - Get page size / 获取页大小
- `public long getTotal()` - Get total count / 获取总数
- `public int getTotalPages()` - Get total pages / 获取总页数
- `public boolean hasNext()` - Check if has next page / 检查是否有下一页
- `public boolean hasPrevious()` - Check if has previous page / 检查是否有上一页
- `public boolean isFirst()` - Check if first page / 检查是否第一页
- `public boolean isLast()` - Check if last page / 检查是否最后一页
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Check if empty / 检查是否为空

- `public T getLast()` - Get last item / 获取最后一项

- `public UrlBuilder queryParam(String name, String value)` - Adds a query parameter. / 添加查询参数。
- `public UrlBuilder queryParamIfNotNull(String name, String value)` - Adds a query parameter if value is not null. / 如果值不为 null，添加查询参数。

## 29. opencode-base-captcha

验证码组件，支持数字/字母/算术/中文/GIF/滑块/点选/旋转等

### Captcha
`public record Captcha(` - Captcha - CAPTCHA data container / 验证码 - 验证码数据容器

- `public int getWidth()` - Gets the image width from metadata. / 从元数据获取图像宽度。
- `public int getHeight()` - Gets the image height from metadata. / 从元数据获取图像高度。

## 30. opencode-base-parallel

并行计算组件，提供虚拟线程并行执行、结构化并发、管道、速率限制

### OpenParallel
`public final class OpenParallel` - Open Parallel - Parallel Computing Utility / Open 并行 - 并行计算工具

- `public boolean tryAcquire()` - Tries to acquire a permit without waiting. / 尝试获取许可，不等待。
- `public boolean tryAcquire(Duration timeout)` - Tries to acquire a permit with timeout. / 尝试获取许可，带超时。

### AsyncPipeline
`public final class AsyncPipeline<T>` - Async Pipeline - Asynchronous Processing Pipeline / 异步流水线 - 异步处理流水线

- `public AsyncPipeline(CompletableFuture<T> future)` - Constructs a new async pipeline. / 构造新的异步流水线。
- `public static <T> AsyncPipeline<T> of(CompletableFuture<T> future)` - Creates a pipeline from a CompletableFuture. / 从 CompletableFuture 创建流水线。
- `public static <T> AsyncPipeline<T> completed(T value)` - Creates a pipeline with a completed value. / 使用已完成的值创建流水线。
- `public static <T> AsyncPipeline<T> failed(Throwable error)` - Creates a pipeline with a failed value. / 使用失败值创建流水线。
- `public <R> AsyncPipeline<R> then(Function<T, R> fn)` - Applies a transformation function. / 应用转换函数。
- `public <R> AsyncPipeline<R> thenAsync(Function<T, CompletableFuture<R>> fn)` - Applies an async transformation function. / 应用异步转换函数。
- `public AsyncPipeline<T> peek(Consumer<T> action)` - Peeks at the value without transforming it. / 查看值但不转换。
- `public AsyncPipeline<T> filter(java.util.function.Predicate<T> predicate)` - Filters the value. / 过滤值。
- `public AsyncPipeline<T> onError(Function<Throwable, T> handler)` - Handles errors with a recovery function. / 使用恢复函数处理错误。
- `public AsyncPipeline<T> onErrorAsync(Function<Throwable, CompletableFuture<T>> handler)` - Handles errors with an async recovery function. / 使用异步恢复函数处理错误。
- `public <R> AsyncPipeline<R> handle(java.util.function.BiFunction<T, Throwable, R> handler)` - Handles both success and error. / 同时处理成功和错误。
- `public <U, R> AsyncPipeline<R> combine(AsyncPipeline<U> other,` - Combines with another pipeline. / 与另一个流水线组合。
- `public AsyncPipeline<T> runAfter(AsyncPipeline<?> other)` - Runs after another pipeline completes. / 在另一个流水线完成后运行。
- `public T get()` - Gets the result, blocking if necessary. / 获取结果，如有必要则阻塞。
- `public T get(Duration timeout)` - Gets the result with timeout. / 带超时获取结果。
- `public T getOrDefault(T defaultValue)` - Gets the result or default on error. / 获取结果或错误时返回默认值。
- `public java.util.Optional<T> getOptional()` - Gets the result as Optional. / 获取结果为 Optional。
- `public CompletableFuture<T> toFuture()` - Gets the underlying CompletableFuture. / 获取底层 CompletableFuture。
- `public boolean isDone()` - Checks if the pipeline is completed. / 检查流水线是否完成。
- `public boolean isCompletedExceptionally()` - Checks if the pipeline completed exceptionally. / 检查流水线是否异常完成。
- `public boolean cancel(boolean mayInterruptIfRunning)` - Cancels the pipeline. / 取消流水线。

- `public ScheduledScope<T> forkAll(Iterable<? extends Callable<T>> tasks)` - Forks multiple tasks immediately. / 立即分叉多个任务。
- `public ScheduledScope<T> forkDelayed(Duration delay, Callable<T> task)` - Forks a task after a delay. / 延迟后分叉任务。
- `public ScheduledScope<T> forkAt(Instant instant, Callable<T> task)` - Forks a task at a specific instant. / 在指定时刻分叉任务。

- `public ScheduledScope<T> forkPeriodicUntil(Duration period, Instant deadline, Callable<T> task)` - Forks a periodic task until deadline or scope close. / 分叉周期性任务，直到截止时间或作用域关闭。
- `public ScheduledScope<T> forkWithFixedDelay(Duration delay, int count, Callable<T> task)` - Forks a periodic task with delay between completion and next execution. / 分叉周...
- `public List<T> joinAll()` - Waits for all scheduled tasks to complete and joins. / 等待所有已调度任务完成并等待结果。
- `public List<T> joinAll(Duration timeout)` - Waits for all tasks with timeout. / 带超时等待所有任务。

- `public Duration getRemainingTime()` - Gets the remaining time until deadline. / 获取距截止时间的剩余时间。

## 31. opencode-base-reflect

反射工具模块，提供类信息、方法/字段操作、Bean属性、代理、Lambda、Record

### AnnotationUtil
`public final class AnnotationUtil` - Annotation Utility Class / 注解工具类

- `public static <A extends Annotation> A getAnnotation(AnnotatedElement element, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Gets annotation (cached) / 获取注解（缓存）
- `public static <A extends Annotation> Optional<A> findAnnotation(AnnotatedElement element, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Gets annotation as Optional / 获取注解为Optional
- `public static boolean hasAnnotation(AnnotatedElement element, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Checks if annotation is present / 检查注解是否存在
- `public static Annotation[] getAnnotations(AnnotatedElement element)` - Gets all annotations / 获取所有注解
- `public static Annotation[] getDeclaredAnnotations(AnnotatedElement element)` - Gets declared annotations / 获取声明的注解
- `public static <A extends Annotation> A[] getRepeatableAnnotations(AnnotatedElement element,` - Gets repeatable annotations / 获取可重复注解
- `public static <A extends Annotation> A findMetaAnnotation(AnnotatedElement element, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Finds annotation including meta-annotations / 查找注解包含元注解
- `public static boolean hasMetaAnnotation(AnnotatedElement element, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Checks if has meta-annotation / 检查是否有元注解
- `public static Object getAttributeValue(Annotation annotation, String attributeName)` - Gets annotation attribute value / 获取注解属性值
- `public static <T> T getAttributeValue(Annotation annotation, String attributeName, Class<T> type)` - Gets annotation attribute value with type / 获取注解属性值（指定类型）
- `public static Map<String, Object> getAttributes(Annotation annotation)` - Gets all annotation attributes as map / 获取所有注解属性为Map
- `public static Object getValue(Annotation annotation)` - Gets annotation "value" attribute / 获取注解"value"属性
- `public static <T> T getValue(Annotation annotation, Class<T> type)` - Gets annotation "value" attribute with type / 获取注解"value"属性（指定类型）
- `public static boolean isRepeatable(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Checks if annotation is repeatable / 检查注解是否可重复
- `public static Class<? extends Annotation> getRepeatableContainer(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets repeatable container class / 获取可重复注解容器类
- `public static Class<? extends Annotation> getAnnotationType(Annotation annotation)` - Gets annotation type / 获取注解类型
- `public static List<Method> getAttributeMethods(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets annotation attribute methods / 获取注解属性方法
- `public static <A extends Annotation> A findAnnotationOnClass(Class<?> clazz, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Finds annotation on class hierarchy / 在类层次结构中查找注解
- `public static <A extends Annotation> List<A> findAllAnnotationsOnClass(Class<?> clazz, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Collects all annotations of type on class hierarchy / 收集类层次结构中所有指定类型的注解
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears annotation cache / 清除注解缓存

### ClassUtil
`public final class ClassUtil` - Class Utility Class / 类工具类

- `public static Class<?> forName(String className)` - Loads class by name (cached) / 按名称加载类（缓存）
- `public static Optional<Class<?>> forNameSafe(String className)` - Loads class by name safely / 安全按名称加载类
- `public static Class<?> forName(String className, ClassLoader classLoader)` - Loads class by name with class loader / 使用类加载器按名称加载类
- `public static boolean exists(String className)` - Checks if class exists / 检查类是否存在
- `public static List<Class<?>> getAllSuperclasses(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all superclasses (cached) / 获取所有父类（缓存）
- `public static List<Class<?>> getAllInterfaces(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all interfaces including inherited (cached) / 获取所有接口包含继承（缓存）
- `public static List<Class<?>> getClassHierarchy(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets full class hierarchy (cached) / 获取完整类层次结构（缓存）
- `public static boolean isPrimitive(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if primitive type / 检查是否为原始类型
- `public static boolean isWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if wrapper type / 检查是否为包装类型
- `public static boolean isPrimitiveOrWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if primitive or wrapper / 检查是否为原始类型或包装类型
- `public static boolean isRecord(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if Record class / 检查是否为Record类
- `public static boolean isSealed(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if sealed class / 检查是否为密封类
- `public static boolean isEnum(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if enum type / 检查是否为枚举类型
- `public static boolean isArray(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if array type / 检查是否为数组类型
- `public static boolean isInterface(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if interface / 检查是否为接口
- `public static boolean isAbstract(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if abstract class / 检查是否为抽象类
- `public static boolean isFinal(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if final class / 检查是否为final类
- `public static boolean isAnonymous(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if anonymous class / 检查是否为匿名类
- `public static boolean isInnerClass(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if inner class / 检查是否为内部类
- `public static boolean isFunctionalInterface(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if functional interface / 检查是否为函数式接口
- `public static Class<?> primitiveToWrapper(Class<?> primitiveType)` - Converts primitive to wrapper / 原始类型转包装类型
- `public static Class<?> wrapperToPrimitive(Class<?> wrapperType)` - Converts wrapper to primitive / 包装类型转原始类型
- `public static Class<?> getComponentType(Class<?> arrayClass)` - Gets array component type / 获取数组组件类型
- `public static Class<?> getArrayClass(Class<?> componentType)` - Gets array class for component type / 获取组件类型的数组类
- `public static String getSimpleName(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets simple name / 获取简单名称
- `public static String getCanonicalNameOrName(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets canonical name or name / 获取规范名称或名称
- `public static String getPackageName(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets package name / 获取包名
- `public static boolean isSamePackage(Class<?> class1, Class<?> class2)` - Checks if same package / 检查是否在同一包
- `public static boolean isAssignableFrom(Class<?> target, Class<?> source)` - Checks if assignable from / 检查是否可从另一类赋值
- `public static Class<?> getCommonSuperclass(Class<?> class1, Class<?> class2)` - Gets common superclass / 获取公共父类
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears all caches / 清除所有缓存
- `public static void clearCache(Class<?> clazz)` - Clears cache for specific class / 清除特定类的缓存

### ConstructorUtil
`public final class ConstructorUtil` - Constructor Utility Class / 构造器工具类

- `public static <T> Constructor<T>[] getDeclaredConstructors(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets all declared constructors / 获取所有声明的构造器
- `public static <T> Constructor<T> getConstructor(Class<T> clazz, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets constructor by parameter types (cached) / 按参数类型获取构造器（缓存）
- `public static <T> Constructor<T> getConstructorOrThrow(Class<T> clazz, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets constructor or throws exception / 获取构造器或抛出异常
- `public static <T> Constructor<T> getDefaultConstructor(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets default (no-arg) constructor / 获取默认（无参）构造器
- `public static <T> Constructor<T> findMatchingConstructor(Class<T> clazz, Object... args)` - Finds best matching constructor for arguments / 查找最佳匹配的构造器
- `public static <T> List<Constructor<T>> getConstructors(Class<T> clazz, Predicate<Constructor<T>> predicate)` - Gets constructors matching predicate / 获取匹配条件的构造器
- `public static <T> List<Constructor<T>> getConstructorsWithAnnotation(Class<T> clazz,` - Gets constructors with annotation / 获取带注解的构造器
- `public static <T> List<Constructor<T>> getPublicConstructors(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets public constructors / 获取公共构造器
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Constructor<T> constructor, Object... args)` - Creates new instance using constructor / 使用构造器创建新实例
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates new instance using default constructor / 使用默认构造器创建新实例
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz, Object... args)` - Creates new instance with arguments (auto-matching) / 使用参数创建新实例（自动匹配）
- `public static <T> Optional<T> newInstanceSafe(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates new instance safely / 安全创建新实例
- `public static Class<?>[] getParameterTypes(Constructor<?> constructor)` - Gets constructor parameter types / 获取构造器参数类型
- `public static int getParameterCount(Constructor<?> constructor)` - Gets constructor parameter count / 获取构造器参数数量
- `public static boolean isPublic(Constructor<?> constructor)` - Checks if constructor is public / 检查构造器是否为公共
- `public static boolean isPrivate(Constructor<?> constructor)` - Checks if constructor is private / 检查构造器是否为私有
- `public static boolean hasDefaultConstructor(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class has default constructor / 检查类是否有默认构造器
- `public static boolean isInstantiable(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is instantiable / 检查类是否可实例化
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears constructor cache / 清除构造器缓存
- `public static void clearCache(Class<?> clazz)` - Clears cache for specific class / 清除特定类的缓存

- `public static List<Field> getStaticFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets static fields / 获取静态字段
- `public static Object getFieldValue(Object object, String fieldName)` - Gets field value by name, with unified Record/Class support. / 按名称获取字段值，统一支持 ...
- `public static Object getValue(Field field, Object target)` - Gets field value / 获取字段值
- `public static <T> T getValue(Field field, Object target, Class<T> type)` - Gets field value with type cast / 获取字段值并转型
- `public static void setValue(Field field, Object target, Object value)` - Sets field value / 设置字段值
- `public static Object getStaticValue(Field field)` - Gets static field value / 获取静态字段值
- `public static void setStaticValue(Field field, Object value)` - Sets static field value / 设置静态字段值
- `public static Class<?> getType(Field field)` - Gets field type / 获取字段类型
- `public static Type getGenericType(Field field)` - Gets field generic type / 获取字段泛型类型
- `public static boolean isStatic(Field field)` - Checks if field is static / 检查字段是否为静态
- `public static boolean isFinal(Field field)` - Checks if field is final / 检查字段是否为final
- `public static boolean isTransient(Field field)` - Checks if field is transient / 检查字段是否为transient
- `public static boolean isVolatile(Field field)` - Checks if field is volatile / 检查字段是否为volatile
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears field cache / 清除字段缓存
- `public static void clearCache(Class<?> clazz)` - Clears cache for specific class / 清除特定类的缓存

### MethodUtil
`public final class MethodUtil` - Method Utility Class / 方法工具类

- `public static Method[] getDeclaredMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all declared methods (no inheritance) / 获取所有声明的方法（不含继承）
- `public static List<Method> getAllMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all methods including inherited (cached) / 获取所有方法包含继承（缓存）
- `public static Method getMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets method by name and parameter types (cached) / 按名称和参数类型获取方法（缓存）
- `public static Method getMethodOrThrow(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets method or throws exception / 获取方法或抛出异常
- `public static List<Method> getMethodsByName(Class<?> clazz, String methodName)` - Finds method by name (any parameters) / 按名称查找方法（任意参数）
- `public static List<Method> getMethods(Class<?> clazz, Predicate<Method> predicate)` - Gets methods matching predicate / 获取匹配条件的方法
- `public static List<Method> getMethodsWithAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets methods with annotation / 获取带注解的方法
- `public static List<Method> getMethodsWithReturnType(Class<?> clazz, Class<?> returnType)` - Gets methods with specific return type / 获取特定返回类型的方法
- `public static List<Method> getGetters(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets getter methods / 获取getter方法
- `public static List<Method> getSetters(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets setter methods / 获取setter方法
- `public static Object invoke(Method method, Object target, Object... args)` - Invokes method / 调用方法
- `public static <T> T invoke(Method method, Object target, Class<T> returnType, Object... args)` - Invokes method with type cast / 调用方法并转型
- `public static Object invokeStatic(Method method, Object... args)` - Invokes static method / 调用静态方法
- `public static Class<?> getReturnType(Method method)` - Gets method return type / 获取方法返回类型
- `public static Type getGenericReturnType(Method method)` - Gets method generic return type / 获取方法泛型返回类型
- `public static Class<?>[] getParameterTypes(Method method)` - Gets method parameter types / 获取方法参数类型
- `public static int getParameterCount(Method method)` - Gets method parameter count / 获取方法参数数量
- `public static String getMethodSignature(Method method)` - Gets method signature / 获取方法签名
- `public static boolean isGetter(Method method)` - Checks if method is getter / 检查是否为getter方法
- `public static boolean isSetter(Method method)` - Checks if method is setter / 检查是否为setter方法
- `public static String getPropertyName(Method method)` - Gets property name from getter/setter / 从getter/setter获取属性名
- `public static boolean isStatic(Method method)` - Checks if method is static / 检查方法是否为静态
- `public static boolean isAbstract(Method method)` - Checks if method is abstract / 检查方法是否为抽象
- `public static boolean isDefault(Method method)` - Checks if method is default interface method / 检查是否为接口默认方法
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears method cache / 清除方法缓存
- `public static void clearCache(Class<?> clazz)` - Clears cache for specific class / 清除特定类的缓存

### OpenAnnotation
`public final class OpenAnnotation` - Annotation Facade Entry Class / 注解门面入口类

- `public static <A extends Annotation> A getAnnotation(AnnotatedElement element, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Gets an annotation from an element / 从元素获取注解
- `public static <A extends Annotation> Optional<A> findAnnotation(AnnotatedElement element, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Gets an annotation from an element (Optional) / 从元素获取注解（Optional）
- `public static Annotation[] getAnnotations(AnnotatedElement element)` - Gets all annotations from an element / 获取元素的所有注解
- `public static Annotation[] getDeclaredAnnotations(AnnotatedElement element)` - Gets declared annotations from an element / 获取元素声明的注解（不含继承）
- `public static <A extends Annotation> A[] getAnnotationsByType(AnnotatedElement element, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Gets annotations by type (including repeatable) / 按类型获取注解（包含可重复注解）
- `public static <A extends Annotation> Optional<A> findAnnotationInherited(Class<?> clazz, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Finds annotation including inherited (for classes) / 查找注解（包含继承，用于类）
- `public static <A extends Annotation> Optional<A> findAnnotationOnMethod(Method method, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Finds annotation on method including overridden methods / 查找方法注解（包含被重写的方法）
- `public static boolean isAnnotationPresent(AnnotatedElement element, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Checks if annotation is present / 检查注解是否存在
- `public static boolean isAnyAnnotationPresent(AnnotatedElement element, Class<? extends Annotation>... annotationClasses)` - Checks if any of the annotations are present / 检查是否存在任一注解
- `public static boolean isAllAnnotationsPresent(AnnotatedElement element, Class<? extends Annotation>... annotationClasses)` - Checks if all annotations are present / 检查是否所有注解都存在
- `public static Object getAttributeValue(Annotation annotation, String attributeName)` - Gets annotation attribute value / 获取注解属性值
- `public static <T> T getAttributeValue(Annotation annotation, String attributeName, Class<T> type)` - Gets annotation attribute value with type / 获取注解属性值（带类型）
- `public static Map<String, Object> getAttributeValues(Annotation annotation)` - Gets all attribute values as a map / 获取所有属性值（Map形式）
- `public static Object getDefaultValue(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass, String attributeName)` - Gets the default value of an annotation attribute / 获取注解属性的默认值
- `public static boolean isMetaAnnotationPresent(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation,` - Checks if annotation is a meta-annotation of another / 检查是否为元注解
- `public static <A extends Annotation> Optional<A> findMetaAnnotation(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation,` - Finds meta-annotation on an annotation / 在注解上查找元注解
- `public static List<Annotation> getMetaAnnotations(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Gets all meta-annotations on an annotation / 获取注解上的所有元注解
- `public static boolean isRuntimeRetained(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Checks if annotation is runtime-retained / 检查注解是否运行时保留
- `public static boolean isRepeatable(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Checks if annotation is repeatable / 检查注解是否可重复
- `public static Optional<Class<? extends Annotation>> getRepeatableContainer(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets the container annotation for a repeatable annotation / 获取可重复注解的容器注解
- `public static List<Method> getAttributes(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets all annotation attributes (methods) / 获取所有注解属性（方法）
- `public static List<Field> getAnnotatedFields(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets all annotated fields in a class / 获取类中所有被注解的字段
- `public static List<Method> getAnnotatedMethods(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets all annotated methods in a class / 获取类中所有被注解的方法
- `public static List<Constructor<?>> getAnnotatedConstructors(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets all annotated constructors in a class / 获取类中所有被注解的构造器
- `public static List<java.lang.reflect.Parameter> getAnnotatedParameters(Method method, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets all annotated parameters in a method / 获取方法中所有被注解的参数
- `public static List<Annotation> filterAnnotations(AnnotatedElement element, Predicate<Annotation> predicate)` - Filters annotations by predicate / 按谓词过滤注解
- `public static List<Annotation> getAnnotationsWithMeta(AnnotatedElement element, Class<? extends Annotation> metaAnnotation)` - Gets annotations annotated with a specific meta-annotation / 获取被特定元注解标注的注解
