- `public static boolean isPrimitive(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if primitive type / 检查是否为原始类型
- `public static boolean isWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if wrapper type / 检查是否为包装类型
- `public static boolean isPrimitiveOrWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if primitive or wrapper type / 检查是否为原始类型或包装类型
- `public static boolean isArray(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if array / 检查是否为数组
- `public static boolean isEnum(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if enum / 检查是否为枚举
- `public static boolean isAnnotation(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if annotation / 检查是否为注解
- `public static boolean isInterface(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if interface / 检查是否为接口
- `public static boolean isAbstract(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if abstract / 检查是否为抽象类
- `public static boolean isFinal(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if final / 检查是否为final类
- `public static boolean isInnerClass(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if inner class / 检查是否为内部类
- `public static boolean isAnonymousClass(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if anonymous class / 检查是否为匿名类
- `public static boolean isRecord(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if Record (JDK 16+) / 检查是否为Record（JDK 16+）
- `public static boolean isSealed(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if Sealed class (JDK 17+) / 检查是否为Sealed类（JDK 17+）
- `public static boolean isFunctionalInterface(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if functional interface / 检查是否为函数式接口
- `public static boolean isAssignable(Class<?> target, Class<?> source)` - Checks if target is assignable from source / 检查是否可赋值
- `public static boolean isAssignable(Class<?> target, Class<?> source, boolean autoboxing)` - Checks if target is assignable from source with autoboxing option / 检查是否可赋值（支...
- `public static List<Class<?>> getAllSuperclasses(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all superclasses (excluding Object) / 获取所有父类（不含Object）
- `public static List<Class<?>> getAllInterfaces(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all interfaces / 获取所有接口
- `public static List<Class<?>> getClassHierarchy(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets class hierarchy (from current to Object) / 获取继承层次（从当前类到Object）
- `public static Class<?> primitiveToWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Converts primitive to wrapper / 原始类型转包装类型
- `public static Class<?> wrapperToPrimitive(Class<?> clazz)` - Converts wrapper to primitive / 包装类型转原始类型
- `public static Class<?> getComponentType(Class<?> arrayClass)` - Gets array component type / 获取数组组件类型
- `public static Class<?> getArrayClass(Class<?> componentType)` - Gets array class for component type / 获取数组类型
- `public static boolean isInstantiable(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class can be instantiated / 检查是否可实例化
- `public static boolean hasDefaultConstructor(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class has default constructor / 检查是否有默认构造器

### OpenConstructor
`public final class OpenConstructor` - Constructor Facade Entry Class / 构造器门面入口类

- `public static <T> Constructor<T> getConstructor(Class<T> clazz, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets a constructor (exact parameter types) / 获取构造器（精确参数类型）
- `public static <T> Constructor<T> getConstructor(Class<T> clazz, boolean forceAccess, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets a constructor with optional force access / 获取构造器（可选强制访问）
- `public static <T> Constructor<T> getMatchingConstructor(Class<T> clazz, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets a matching constructor (compatible parameter types) / 获取匹配构造器（兼容参数类型）
- `public static <T> Constructor<T> getDefaultConstructor(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets the default (no-arg) constructor / 获取无参构造器
- `public static <T> List<Constructor<T>> getConstructors(Class<T> clazz)` - Gets all constructors / 获取所有构造器
- `public static <T> List<Constructor<T>> getConstructorsWithAnnotation(Class<T> clazz,` - Gets constructors with specific annotation / 按注解获取构造器
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates an instance using default constructor / 创建实例（使用无参构造器）
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz, Object... args)` - Creates an instance with auto-matching constructor / 创建实例（自动匹配构造器）
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz, Class<?>[] parameterTypes, Object... args)` - Creates an instance with specified parameter types / 创建实例（指定参数类型）
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Constructor<T> constructor, Object... args)` - Creates an instance using Constructor object / 创建实例（Constructor对象）
- `public static <T> T newInstanceForced(Class<T> clazz, Object... args)` - Forces creation of an instance (bypasses private constructors) / 强制创建实例（绕过私有构造器）
- `public static boolean hasDefaultConstructor(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class has default constructor / 检查是否有无参构造器
- `public static boolean hasConstructor(Class<?> clazz, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Checks if class has constructor with specified parameters / 检查是否有指定参数构造器
- `public static List<String> getParameterNames(Constructor<?> constructor)` - Gets constructor parameter names / 获取构造器参数名称
- `public static Class<?>[] getParameterTypes(Constructor<?> constructor)` - Gets constructor parameter types / 获取构造器参数类型
- `public static <T> Optional<Method> findFactoryMethod(Class<T> clazz, String methodName)` - Finds a static factory method / 查找静态工厂方法
- `public static <T> List<Method> findFactoryMethods(Class<T> clazz)` - Finds all static factory methods / 查找所有静态工厂方法
- `public static <T> T newInstanceByFactory(Class<T> clazz, String factoryMethod, Object... args)` - Creates an instance via factory method / 通过工厂方法创建实例
- `public static <T> Invokable<T, T> toInvokable(Constructor<T> constructor)` - Converts to Invokable / 转为Invokable

### OpenField
`public final class OpenField` - Field Facade Entry Class / 字段门面入口类

- `public static Field getField(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Gets a field (including inherited) / 获取字段（包含继承）
- `public static Field getField(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName, boolean forceAccess)` - Gets a field with optional force access / 获取字段（可选强制访问）
- `public static Field getDeclaredField(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Gets a declared field (not inherited) / 获取声明的字段（不含继承）
- `public static List<Field> getAllFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all fields (including inherited) / 获取所有字段（包含继承）
- `public static List<Field> getDeclaredFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets declared fields (not inherited) / 获取声明的字段（不含继承）
- `public static List<Field> getFieldsWithAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets fields with specific annotation / 按注解获取字段
- `public static List<Field> getFieldsOfType(Class<?> clazz, Class<?> fieldType)` - Gets fields of specific type / 按类型获取字段
- `public static List<Field> getFieldsWithModifiers(Class<?> clazz, int... modifiers)` - Gets fields with specific modifiers / 按修饰符获取字段
- `public static Object readField(Object target, String fieldName)` - Reads field value / 读取字段值
- `public static Object readField(Object target, String fieldName, boolean forceAccess)` - Reads field value with optional force access / 读取字段值（可选强制访问）
- `public static Object readField(Field field, Object target)` - Reads field value using Field object / 读取字段值（Field对象）
- `public static <T> T readField(Object target, String fieldName, Class<T> valueType)` - Reads field value with type safety / 读取字段值（泛型安全）
- `public static Object readStaticField(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Reads static field / 读取静态字段
- `public static <T> T readStaticField(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName, Class<T> valueType)` - Reads static field with type safety / 读取静态字段（泛型安全）
- `public static void writeField(Object target, String fieldName, Object value)` - Writes field value / 写入字段值
- `public static void writeField(Object target, String fieldName, Object value, boolean forceAccess)` - Writes field value with optional force access / 写入字段值（可选强制访问）
- `public static void writeField(Field field, Object target, Object value)` - Writes field value using Field object / 写入字段值（Field对象）
- `public static void writeStaticField(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName, Object value)` - Writes static field / 写入静态字段
- `public static void removeFinalAndWrite(Object target, String fieldName, Object value)` - Removes final modifier and writes value / 移除final修饰符并写入值
- `public static Class<?> getFieldType(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Gets field type / 获取字段类型
- `public static Type getFieldGenericType(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Gets field generic type / 获取字段泛型类型
- `public static TypeToken<?> getFieldTypeToken(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Gets field TypeToken / 获取字段TypeToken
- `public static boolean hasField(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Checks if field exists / 检查字段是否存在
- `public static void forEach(Class<?> clazz, Consumer<Field> action)` - Iterates all fields (including inherited) / 遍历所有字段（含继承）
- `public static Optional<Field> findFirst(Class<?> clazz, Predicate<Field> predicate)` - Finds first matching field / 查找第一个匹配字段
- `public static Stream<Field> stream(Class<?> clazz)` - Creates a field stream / 创建字段流
- `public static Map<String, Object> readFieldsToMap(Object target)` - Reads all fields to Map / 批量读取为Map
- `public static Map<String, Object> readFields(Object target, String... fieldNames)` - Reads specific fields / 批量读取指定字段
- `public static void writeFieldsFromMap(Object target, Map<String, Object> values)` - Writes fields from Map / 从Map批量写入

### OpenMethod
`public final class OpenMethod` - Method Facade Entry Class / 方法门面入口类

- `public static Method getMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets a method (exact parameter types) / 获取方法（精确参数类型匹配）
- `public static Method getMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, boolean forceAccess, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets a method with optional force access / 获取方法（可选强制访问）
- `public static Method getMatchingMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets a matching method (compatible parameter types) / 获取匹配方法（兼容参数类型）
- `public static List<Method> getAllMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all methods (including inherited) / 获取所有方法（包含继承）
- `public static List<Method> getDeclaredMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets declared methods (not inherited) / 获取声明方法（不含继承）
- `public static List<Method> getMethodsWithAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Gets methods with specific annotation / 按注解获取方法
- `public static List<Method> getOverloadMethods(Class<?> clazz, String methodName)` - Gets overloaded methods by name / 按名称获取所有重载方法
- `public static List<Method> getGetters(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all getter methods / 获取所有Getter方法
- `public static List<Method> getSetters(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all setter methods / 获取所有Setter方法
- `public static Object invokeMethod(Object target, String methodName, Object... args)` - Invokes a method / 调用方法
- `public static Object invokeMethod(Object target, boolean forceAccess, String methodName, Object... args)` - Invokes a method with optional force access / 调用方法（可选强制访问）
- `public static <T> T invokeMethod(Object target, String methodName, Class<T> returnType, Object... args)` - Invokes a method with type-safe return / 调用方法（泛型安全）
- `public static Object invokeStaticMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Object... args)` - Invokes a static method / 调用静态方法
- `public static <T> T invokeStaticMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Class<T> returnType, Object... args)` - Invokes a static method with type-safe return / 调用静态方法（泛型安全）
- `public static boolean hasMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Checks if a method exists / 检查方法是否存在
- `public static boolean isGetter(Method method)` - Checks if a method is a getter / 检查是否为Getter方法
- `public static boolean isSetter(Method method)` - Checks if a method is a setter / 检查是否为Setter方法
- `public static void forEach(Class<?> clazz, Consumer<Method> action)` - Iterates all methods / 遍历所有方法
- `public static Optional<Method> findFirst(Class<?> clazz, Predicate<Method> predicate)` - Finds first matching method / 查找第一个匹配方法
- `public static Stream<Method> stream(Class<?> clazz)` - Creates a method stream / 创建方法流
- `public static <T> Invokable<T, Object> toInvokable(Method method)` - Converts to Invokable / 转为Invokable

### OpenModifier
`public final class OpenModifier` - Modifier Facade Entry Class / 修饰符门面入口类

- `public static boolean isPublic(int modifiers)` - Checks if public / 检查是否public
- `public static boolean isPublic(Member member)` - Checks if member is public / 检查成员是否public
- `public static boolean isPublic(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is public / 检查类是否public
- `public static boolean isPrivate(int modifiers)` - Checks if private / 检查是否private
- `public static boolean isPrivate(Member member)` - Checks if member is private / 检查成员是否private
- `public static boolean isPrivate(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is private / 检查类是否private
- `public static boolean isProtected(int modifiers)` - Checks if protected / 检查是否protected
- `public static boolean isProtected(Member member)` - Checks if member is protected / 检查成员是否protected
- `public static boolean isProtected(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is protected / 检查类是否protected
- `public static boolean isPackagePrivate(int modifiers)` - Checks if package-private (default access) / 检查是否包私有（默认访问）
- `public static boolean isPackagePrivate(Member member)` - Checks if member is package-private / 检查成员是否包私有
- `public static boolean isPackagePrivate(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is package-private / 检查类是否包私有
- `public static boolean isStatic(int modifiers)` - Checks if static / 检查是否static
- `public static boolean isStatic(Member member)` - Checks if member is static / 检查成员是否static
- `public static boolean isFinal(int modifiers)` - Checks if final / 检查是否final
- `public static boolean isFinal(Member member)` - Checks if member is final / 检查成员是否final
- `public static boolean isFinal(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is final / 检查类是否final
- `public static boolean isAbstract(int modifiers)` - Checks if abstract / 检查是否abstract
- `public static boolean isAbstract(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is abstract / 检查类是否abstract
- `public static boolean isAbstract(Method method)` - Checks if method is abstract / 检查方法是否abstract
- `public static boolean isSynchronized(int modifiers)` - Checks if synchronized / 检查是否synchronized
- `public static boolean isSynchronized(Method method)` - Checks if method is synchronized / 检查方法是否synchronized
- `public static boolean isVolatile(int modifiers)` - Checks if volatile / 检查是否volatile
- `public static boolean isVolatile(Field field)` - Checks if field is volatile / 检查字段是否volatile
- `public static boolean isTransient(int modifiers)` - Checks if transient / 检查是否transient
- `public static boolean isTransient(Field field)` - Checks if field is transient / 检查字段是否transient
- `public static boolean isNative(int modifiers)` - Checks if native / 检查是否native
- `public static boolean isNative(Method method)` - Checks if method is native / 检查方法是否native
- `public static boolean isInterface(int modifiers)` - Checks if interface / 检查是否interface
- `public static boolean isStrict(int modifiers)` - Checks if strict (strictfp) / 检查是否strictfp
- `public static boolean isSynthetic(Method method)` - Checks if method is synthetic / 检查方法是否合成
- `public static boolean isSynthetic(Field field)` - Checks if field is synthetic / 检查字段是否合成
- `public static boolean isSynthetic(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is synthetic / 检查类是否合成
- `public static String toString(int modifiers)` - Converts modifiers to string / 修饰符转字符串
- `public static List<String> toList(int modifiers)` - Gets modifier names as list / 获取修饰符名称列表
- `public static AccessLevel getAccessLevel(int modifiers)` - Gets access level from modifiers / 从修饰符获取访问级别
- `public static AccessLevel getAccessLevel(Member member)` - Gets access level from member / 从成员获取访问级别
- `public static AccessLevel getAccessLevel(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets access level from class / 从类获取访问级别
- `public static boolean isAccessAtLeast(int modifiers, AccessLevel level)` - Checks if access is at least the specified level / 检查访问级别是否至少为指定级别
- `public static boolean isOverridable(Method method)` - Checks if method can be overridden / 检查方法是否可被重写
- `public static boolean isExtendable(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class can be extended / 检查类是否可被继承

### OpenReflect
`public final class OpenReflect` - Reflection Main Facade Entry Class / 反射主门面入口类

- `public static Class<?> forName(String className)` - Loads a class by name / 按名称加载类
- `public static Optional<Class<?>> forNameSafe(String className)` - Loads a class by name (Optional) / 按名称加载类（Optional）
- `public static boolean classExists(String className)` - Checks if class exists / 检查类是否存在
- `public static <T> TypeToken<T> typeOf(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates a TypeToken for a class / 为类创建TypeToken
- `public static Field getField(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Gets a field / 获取字段
- `public static List<Field> getAllFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all fields (including inherited) / 获取所有字段（包含继承）
- `public static Object readField(Object target, String fieldName)` - Reads a field value / 读取字段值
- `public static void writeField(Object target, String fieldName, Object value)` - Writes a field value / 写入字段值
- `public static Method getMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets a method / 获取方法
- `public static List<Method> getAllMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all methods (including inherited) / 获取所有方法（包含继承）
- `public static Object invokeMethod(Object target, String methodName, Object... args)` - Invokes a method / 调用方法
- `public static Object invokeStaticMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Object... args)` - Invokes a static method / 调用静态方法
- `public static <T> Constructor<T> getConstructor(Class<T> clazz, Class<?>... parameterTypes)` - Gets a constructor / 获取构造器
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates a new instance / 创建新实例
- `public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz, Object... args)` - Creates a new instance with arguments / 创建新实例（带参数）
- `public static <A extends Annotation> A getAnnotation(AnnotatedElement element, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Gets an annotation / 获取注解
- `public static <A extends Annotation> Optional<A> findAnnotation(AnnotatedElement element, Class<A> annotationClass)` - Finds an annotation (Optional) / 查找注解（Optional）
- `public static boolean hasAnnotation(AnnotatedElement element, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Checks if annotation is present / 检查注解是否存在
- `public static boolean isPublic(Member member)` - Checks if public / 检查是否public
- `public static boolean isPrivate(Member member)` - Checks if private / 检查是否private
- `public static boolean isStatic(Member member)` - Checks if static / 检查是否static
- `public static boolean isFinal(Member member)` - Checks if final / 检查是否final
- `public static <T> Invokable<T, Object> toInvokable(Method method)` - Creates an Invokable from a method / 从方法创建Invokable
- `public static <T> Invokable<T, T> toInvokable(Constructor<T> constructor)` - Creates an Invokable from a constructor / 从构造器创建Invokable
- `public static boolean isPrimitive(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is primitive / 检查是否为原始类型
- `public static boolean isWrapper(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is wrapper / 检查是否为包装类型
- `public static boolean isRecord(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is a record / 检查是否为Record类
- `public static boolean isSealed(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if class is sealed / 检查是否为密封类
- `public static Class<?> primitiveToWrapper(Class<?> primitiveType)` - Converts primitive to wrapper / 原始类型转包装类型
- `public static Class<?> wrapperToPrimitive(Class<?> wrapperType)` - Converts wrapper to primitive / 包装类型转原始类型
- `public static List<Class<?>> getAllSuperclasses(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all superclasses / 获取所有父类
- `public static List<Class<?>> getAllInterfaces(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all interfaces (including inherited) / 获取所有接口（包含继承）
- `public static List<Class<?>> getClassHierarchy(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets the full class hierarchy / 获取完整类层次结构
- `public static <T extends AccessibleObject> T makeAccessible(T accessible)` - Makes an accessible object accessible / 设置可访问对象为可访问
- `public static boolean isSamePackage(Class<?> class1, Class<?> class2)` - Checks if two classes are in the same package / 检查两个类是否在同一包中
- `public static String getSimpleName(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets the simple name of a class (handles arrays and inner classes) / 获取类的简单名称...
- `public static String getCanonicalNameOrName(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets the canonical name or falls back to name / 获取规范名称或回退到名称

### ReflectCache
`public final class ReflectCache` - Reflection Cache - Centralized Cache for Reflection Results / 反射缓存 - 反射结果的集中缓存

- `public static Optional<Field[]> getFields(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets cached fields for a class / 获取类的缓存字段
- `public static void cacheFields(Class<?> clazz, Field[] fields)` - Caches fields for a class / 缓存类的字段
- `public static Optional<Method[]> getMethods(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets cached methods for a class / 获取类的缓存方法
- `public static void cacheMethods(Class<?> clazz, Method[] methods)` - Caches methods for a class / 缓存类的方法
- `public static Optional<Constructor<?>[]> getConstructors(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets cached constructors for a class / 获取类的缓存构造器
- `public static void cacheConstructors(Class<?> clazz, Constructor<?>[] constructors)` - Caches constructors for a class / 缓存类的构造器
- `public static <T> Optional<TypeToken<T>> getTypeToken(Type type)` - Gets cached TypeToken for a type / 获取类型的缓存类型令牌
- `public static <T> void cacheTypeToken(Type type, TypeToken<T> token)` - Caches TypeToken for a type / 缓存类型的类型令牌
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears all caches / 清除所有缓存
- `public static void clearCache(Class<?> clazz)` - Clears cache for a specific class / 清除特定类的缓存
- `public static CacheStats getCacheStats()` - Gets cache statistics / 获取缓存统计
- `public record CacheStats(` - Cache Statistics Record / 缓存统计记录

### ReflectUtil
`public final class ReflectUtil` - Reflection Utility Class / 反射工具类

- `public static <T extends AccessibleObject> T setAccessible(T accessible)` - Makes accessible object accessible / 设置可访问性
- `public static <T extends AccessibleObject> T setAccessible(T accessible, Object target)` - Makes accessible object accessible with target check / 设置可访问性（检查目标）
- `public static boolean isAccessible(AccessibleObject accessible, Object target)` - Checks if accessible / 检查是否可访问
- `public static Class<?> getDeclaringClass(Member member)` - Gets declaring class of member / 获取成员的声明类
- `public static String getName(Member member)` - Gets member name / 获取成员名称
- `public static int getModifiers(Member member)` - Gets member modifiers / 获取成员修饰符
- `public static Type resolveReturnType(Method method, Class<?> targetClass)` - Resolves generic return type of method / 解析方法的泛型返回类型
- `public static Type[] resolveParameterTypes(Executable executable, Class<?> targetClass)` - Resolves generic parameter types / 解析泛型参数类型
- `public static Type resolveType(Type type, Class<?> targetClass)` - Resolves type variable in context of target class / 在目标类上下文中解析类型变量
- `public static Object newArray(Class<?> componentType, int length)` - Creates array instance / 创建数组实例
- `public static Object newArray(Class<?> componentType, int... dimensions)` - Creates multi-dimensional array / 创建多维数组
- `public static int getArrayLength(Object array)` - Gets array length / 获取数组长度
- `public static Object getArrayElement(Object array, int index)` - Gets array element / 获取数组元素
- `public static void setArrayElement(Object array, int index, Object value)` - Sets array element / 设置数组元素
- `public static Throwable unwrapInvocationTargetException(Throwable ex)` - Unwraps InvocationTargetException / 解包InvocationTargetException
- `public static <T extends Throwable> RuntimeException sneakyThrow(Throwable ex)` - Rethrows exception as unchecked / 将异常作为非受检异常重新抛出
- `public static boolean isAssignable(Class<?>[] parameterTypes, Object[] args)` - Checks if parameter types match / 检查参数类型是否匹配
- `public static boolean isAssignable(Class<?> target, Class<?> source)` - Checks if types are assignable (with primitive widening) / 检查类型是否可赋值（含原始类型拓宽）
- `public static Class<?> primitiveToWrapper(Class<?> primitiveType)` - Converts primitive to wrapper / 原始类型转包装类型
- `public static Class<?> wrapperToPrimitive(Class<?> wrapperType)` - Converts wrapper to primitive / 包装类型转原始类型
- `public static Object getDefaultValue(Class<?> type)` - Gets default value for type / 获取类型的默认值

### BeanAccessor
`public class BeanAccessor<T>` - Bean Property Accessor (via getter/setter) / Bean属性访问器（通过getter/setter）

- `public BeanAccessor(String name, Class<T> declaringClass, Method getter, Method setter)` - Creates a BeanAccessor / 创建BeanAccessor
- `public static <T> BeanAccessor<T> of(Class<T> clazz, String propertyName)` - Creates a BeanAccessor for a property / 为属性创建BeanAccessor
- `public Method getGetter()` - Gets the getter method / 获取getter方法
- `public Method getSetter()` - Gets the setter method / 获取setter方法
- `public String getName()` - 获取name
- `public Class<?> getType()` - 获取type
- `public Type getGenericType()` - 获取generic type
- `public Class<T> getDeclaringClass()` - 获取declaring class
- `public boolean isReadable()` - 判断readable
- `public boolean isWritable()` - 判断writable
- `public Object get(T target)` - 获取 / Get
- `public void set(T target, Object value)`
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### FieldAccessor
`public class FieldAccessor<T>` - Field-based Property Accessor / 基于字段的属性访问器

- `public FieldAccessor(Field field)` - Creates a FieldAccessor / 创建FieldAccessor
- `public static <T> FieldAccessor<T> of(Class<T> clazz, String fieldName)` - Creates a FieldAccessor for a field / 为字段创建FieldAccessor
- `public Field getField()` - Gets the underlying Field / 获取底层Field
- `public String getName()` - 获取name
- `public Class<?> getType()` - 获取type
- `public Type getGenericType()` - 获取generic type
- `public Class<T> getDeclaringClass()` - 获取declaring class
- `public boolean isReadable()` - 判断readable
- `public boolean isWritable()` - 判断writable
- `public Object get(T target)` - 获取 / Get
- `public void set(T target, Object value)`
- `public Object getStatic()` - Gets static field value / 获取静态字段值
- `public void setStatic(Object value)` - Sets static field value / 设置静态字段值
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

- `public static <T> MethodHandleAccessor<T> of(Class<T> clazz, String fieldName)` - Creates a MethodHandleAccessor for a field by name / 按名称为字段创建MethodHandleAcce...

### PropertyAccessor
`public interface PropertyAccessor<T>` - Property Accessor Interface / 属性访问器接口


### PropertyAccessors
`public final class PropertyAccessors` - Property Accessors Factory / 属性访问器工厂

- `public static <T> PropertyAccessor<T> create(Class<T> clazz, String propertyName)` - Creates a property accessor with auto strategy / 以自动策略创建属性访问器
- `public static <T> PropertyAccessor<T> create(Class<T> clazz, String propertyName, Strategy strategy)` - Creates a property accessor with specified strategy / 以指定策略创建属性访问器
- `public static <T> Map<String, PropertyAccessor<T>> createAll(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates all property accessors for a class / 为类创建所有属性访问器
- `public static <T> Map<String, PropertyAccessor<T>> createAll(Class<T> clazz, Strategy strategy)` - Creates all property accessors for a class with strategy / 以策略为类创建所有属性访问器
- `public static <T> Map<String, FieldAccessor<T>> createFieldAccessors(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates field-based accessors for all fields / 为所有字段创建基于字段的访问器
- `public static <T> Map<String, BeanAccessor<T>> createBeanAccessors(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates bean-based accessors for all properties / 为所有属性创建基于bean的访问器
- `public static <T> Map<String, VarHandleAccessor<T>> createVarHandleAccessors(Class<T> clazz)` - Creates VarHandle-based accessors for all fields / 为所有字段创建基于VarHandle的访问器

### VarHandleAccessor
`public class VarHandleAccessor<T>` - VarHandle-based Property Accessor / 基于VarHandle的属性访问器

- `public static <T> VarHandleAccessor<T> fromField(Field field)` - Creates a VarHandleAccessor from a field / 从字段创建VarHandleAccessor
- `public static <T> VarHandleAccessor<T> of(Class<T> clazz, String fieldName)` - Creates a VarHandleAccessor for a field by name / 按名称为字段创建VarHandleAccessor
- `public VarHandle getVarHandle()` - Gets the underlying VarHandle / 获取底层VarHandle
- `public String getName()` - 获取name
- `public Class<?> getType()` - 获取type
- `public Type getGenericType()` - 获取generic type
- `public Class<T> getDeclaringClass()` - 获取declaring class
- `public boolean isReadable()` - 判断readable
- `public boolean isWritable()` - 判断writable
- `public boolean isStatic()` - Checks if this is a static field / 检查是否为静态字段
- `public Object get(T target)` - 获取 / Get
- `public void set(T target, Object value)`
- `public Object getVolatile(T target)` - Gets value with volatile semantics / 以volatile语义获取值
- `public void setVolatile(T target, Object value)` - Sets value with volatile semantics / 以volatile语义设置值
- `public Object getAndSet(T target, Object newValue)` - Atomically gets and sets value / 原子获取并设置值
- `public boolean compareAndSet(T target, Object expectedValue, Object newValue)` - Atomically compares and sets value / 原子比较并设置值
- `public Object compareAndExchange(T target, Object expectedValue, Object newValue)` - Atomically compares and exchanges value / 原子比较并交换值
- `public Object getAndAdd(T target, Object delta)` - Atomically adds to value (for numeric types) / 原子加法（用于数值类型）
- `public Object getAcquire(T target)` - Gets value with acquire semantics / 以获取语义获取值
- `public void setRelease(T target, Object value)` - Sets value with release semantics / 以释放语义设置值
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### BeanCopier
`public class BeanCopier<S, T>` - Bean Copier / Bean复制器

- `public static <S, T> Builder<S, T> builder(Class<S> sourceClass, Class<T> targetClass)` - Creates a BeanCopier builder / 创建BeanCopier构建器
- `public static <S, T> BeanCopier<S, T> create(Class<S> sourceClass, Class<T> targetClass)` - Creates a simple BeanCopier / 创建简单BeanCopier
- `public void copy(S source, T target)` - Copies properties from source to target / 从源复制属性到目标
- `public T copy(S source)` - Copies and creates a new target instance / 复制并创建新的目标实例
- `public List<T> copyList(List<S> sources)` - Copies a list of objects / 复制对象列表
- `public Class<S> getSourceClass()` - Gets the source class / 获取源类
- `public Class<T> getTargetClass()` - Gets the target class / 获取目标类

### BeanDiff
`public final class BeanDiff` - BeanDiff - Before/after bean field change detection / Bean 差异 - Bean 字段前后变更检测

- `public record Change(String field, Object before, Object after)` - A single field change: the field name, before-value, and after-value. / 单个字段变...
- `public record Result(Map<String, Change> changes)` - The result of a diff operation, containing all detected field changes. / 差异操作...
- `public static <T> Result diff(T before, T after)` - Computes the diff between before and after beans. / No fields are excluded ex...
- `public static <T> Result diff(T before, T after, Class<? extends Annotation> excludeAnnotation)` - Computes the diff, excluding fields annotated with the given annotation. / 计算...
- `public static <T> Result diff(T before, T after, Predicate<Field> fieldFilter)` - Computes the diff with a custom field filter. / 使用自定义字段过滤器计算差异。

### BeanMap
`public class BeanMap<T>` - Bean Map / Bean映射

- `public BeanMap(T bean, Map<String, PropertyDescriptor> descriptors)` - Creates a BeanMap / 创建BeanMap
- `public BeanMap(T bean, Map<String, PropertyDescriptor> descriptors, boolean ignoreUnknownProperties)` - Creates a BeanMap with configuration / 创建带配置的BeanMap
- `public static <T> BeanMap<T> from(T bean)` - Creates a BeanMap from a bean / 从bean创建BeanMap
- `public T getBean()` - Gets the underlying bean / 获取底层bean
- `public Object get(Object key)` - 获取 / Get
- `public Object put(String key, Object value)` - 放入 / Put
- `public boolean containsKey(Object key)` - 是否包含键 / Contains key
- `public Set<String> keySet()`
- `public Set<Entry<String, Object>> entrySet()`
- `public int size()` - Returns the number of child nodes / 返回子节点数量
- `public <U> void copyTo(U target)` - Copies all properties to another bean / 复制所有属性到另一个bean
- `public void copyFrom(Map<String, ?> source)` - Copies properties from a Map / 从Map复制属性
- `public Map<String, Object> toMap()` - Converts to a regular Map / 转换为普通Map
- `public Map<String, Object> getReadableProperties()` - Gets only readable properties as Map / 仅获取可读属性为Map
- `public PropertyDescriptor getPropertyDescriptor(String name)` - Gets property descriptor by name / 按名称获取属性描述符

### BeanPath
`public final class BeanPath` - Bean Path Navigator / Bean路径导航器

- `public static Object get(Object bean, String path)` - Gets a nested property value / 获取嵌套属性值
- `public static <T> T get(Object bean, String path, Class<T> type)` - Gets a nested property value with type / 获取嵌套属性值（带类型）
- `public static <T> T getOrDefault(Object bean, String path, T defaultValue)` - Gets a nested property value or default / 获取嵌套属性值或默认值
- `public static void set(Object bean, String path, Object value)` - Sets a nested property value / 设置嵌套属性值
- `public static boolean hasPath(Object bean, String path)` - Checks if a path exists and is readable / 检查路径是否存在且可读
- `public static List<Object> getPathValues(Object bean, String path)` - Gets all values along a path / 获取路径上的所有值
- `public static void copy(Object source, String sourcePath, Object target, String targetPath)` - Copies a property from one path to another / 从一个路径复制属性到另一个路径

### BeanUtil
`public final class BeanUtil` - Bean Utility Class / Bean工具类

- `public static List<Method> getGetters(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all getter methods (cached) / 获取所有getter方法（缓存）
- `public static List<Method> getSetters(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all setter methods (cached) / 获取所有setter方法（缓存）
- `public static Method getGetter(Class<?> clazz, String propertyName)` - Gets getter for a property (cached) / 获取属性的getter（缓存）
- `public static Method getSetter(Class<?> clazz, String propertyName)` - Gets setter for a property (cached) / 获取属性的setter（缓存）
- `public static Object getPropertyValue(Object bean, String propertyName)` - Gets property value using getter / 使用getter获取属性值
- `public static Optional<Object> getPropertyValueSafe(Object bean, String propertyName)` - Gets property value safely / 安全获取属性值
- `public static void setPropertyValue(Object bean, String propertyName, Object value)` - Sets property value using setter / 使用setter设置属性值
- `public static boolean setPropertyValueSafe(Object bean, String propertyName, Object value)` - Sets property value safely / 安全设置属性值
- `public static boolean isGetter(Method method)` - Checks if method is a getter / 检查方法是否为getter
- `public static boolean isSetter(Method method)` - Checks if method is a setter / 检查方法是否为setter
- `public static String extractPropertyName(Method method)` - Extracts property name from getter/setter / 从getter/setter提取属性名
- `public static Set<String> getReadablePropertyNames(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all readable property names / 获取所有可读属性名
- `public static Set<String> getWritablePropertyNames(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all writable property names / 获取所有可写属性名
- `public static Set<String> getAllPropertyNames(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all property names (readable or writable) / 获取所有属性名（可读或可写）
- `public static Class<?> getPropertyType(Class<?> clazz, String propertyName)` - Gets property type from getter / 从getter获取属性类型
- `public static boolean isReadable(Class<?> clazz, String propertyName)` - Checks if property is readable / 检查属性是否可读
- `public static boolean isWritable(Class<?> clazz, String propertyName)` - Checks if property is writable / 检查属性是否可写
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears all caches / 清除所有缓存
- `public static void clearCache(Class<?> clazz)` - Clears cache for specific class / 清除特定类的缓存

### OpenBean
`public final class OpenBean` - Bean Facade Entry Class / Bean门面入口类

- `public static Map<String, PropertyDescriptor> getPropertyDescriptors(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all property descriptors for a class / 获取类的所有属性描述符
- `public static PropertyDescriptor getPropertyDescriptor(Class<?> clazz, String propertyName)` - Gets a property descriptor by name / 按名称获取属性描述符
- `public static Set<String> getPropertyNames(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all property names / 获取所有属性名
- `public static Set<String> getReadablePropertyNames(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets readable property names / 获取可读属性名
- `public static Set<String> getWritablePropertyNames(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets writable property names / 获取可写属性名
- `public static Object getProperty(Object bean, String propertyName)` - Gets a property value / 获取属性值
- `public static <T> T getProperty(Object bean, String propertyName, Class<T> type)` - Gets a property value with type / 获取属性值（带类型）
- `public static void setProperty(Object bean, String propertyName, Object value)` - Sets a property value / 设置属性值
- `public static boolean setPropertyIfWritable(Object bean, String propertyName, Object value)` - Sets a property value if writable / 如果可写则设置属性值
- `public static void copyProperties(Object source, Object target)` - Copies properties from source to target / 从源复制属性到目标
- `public static void copyProperties(Object source, Object target, String... excludeProperties)` - Copies properties excluding specified ones / 复制属性（排除指定属性）
- `public static <T> T copyProperties(Object source, Class<T> targetClass)` - Copies and creates a new instance / 复制并创建新实例
- `public static Map<String, Object> toMap(Object bean)` - Converts a bean to a Map / 将bean转换为Map
- `public static <T> BeanMap<T> asBeanMap(T bean)` - Creates a BeanMap view / 创建BeanMap视图
- `public static void populate(Object bean, Map<String, ?> map)` - Populates a bean from a Map / 从Map填充bean
- `public static <T> T fromMap(Map<String, ?> map, Class<T> clazz)` - Creates a bean from a Map / 从Map创建bean
- `public static <S, T> BeanCopier<S, T> createCopier(Class<S> sourceClass, Class<T> targetClass)` - Creates a BeanCopier / 创建BeanCopier
- `public static boolean hasProperty(Class<?> clazz, String propertyName)` - Checks if bean has a property / 检查bean是否有属性
- `public static void clearCache(Class<?> clazz)` - Clears the descriptor cache for a class / 清除类的描述符缓存
- `public static void clearAllCache()` - Clears all descriptor cache / 清除所有描述符缓存

### PropertyConverter
`public final class PropertyConverter` - Property Type Converter / 属性类型转换器

- `public static <T> T convert(Object value, Class<T> targetType)` - Converts a value to the target type / 将值转换为目标类型
- `public static <T> T convertSafe(Object value, Class<T> targetType)` - Converts a value, returning null if conversion fails / 转换值，如果转换失败返回null
- `public static <T> T convertOrDefault(Object value, Class<T> targetType, T defaultValue)` - Converts a value with a default value if conversion fails / 转换值，如果转换失败返回默认值

- `public static <S, T> void registerConverter(Class<S> sourceType, Class<T> targetType,` - Registers a custom converter / 注册自定义转换器

### PropertyDescriptor
`public class PropertyDescriptor` - Property Descriptor / 属性描述符

- `public PropertyDescriptor(String name, Class<?> propertyType, Type genericType,` - Creates a PropertyDescriptor / 创建PropertyDescriptor
- `public String getName()` - Gets the property name / 获取属性名
- `public Class<?> getPropertyType()` - Gets the property type / 获取属性类型
- `public Type getGenericType()` - Gets the generic type / 获取泛型类型
- `public Method getReadMethod()` - Gets the read method (getter) / 获取读取方法（getter）
- `public Method getWriteMethod()` - Gets the write method (setter) / 获取写入方法（setter）

- `public Class<?> getDeclaringClass()` - Gets the declaring class / 获取声明类

- `public boolean isWritable()` - Checks if property is writable / 检查属性是否可写
- `public Object getValue(Object target)` - Gets the property value / 获取属性值
- `public void setValue(Object target, Object value)` - Sets the property value / 设置属性值
- `public <A extends Annotation> Optional<A> getAnnotation(Class<A> annotationClass)` - Gets an annotation from this property / 从此属性获取注解
- `public boolean hasAnnotation(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Checks if property has annotation / 检查属性是否有注解
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### OpenReflectException
`public class OpenReflectException` - Reflection Operation Exception (Unchecked) / 反射操作异常（非受检）

- `public OpenReflectException(String message)` - Creates an exception with message / 创建带消息的异常
- `public OpenReflectException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception with message and cause / 创建带消息和原因的异常
- `public OpenReflectException(Class<?> targetType, String memberName, String operation, String message)` - Creates an exception with target, member, operation and message / 创建带目标、成员、操作...
- `public OpenReflectException(Class<?> targetType, String memberName, String operation, String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception with target, member, operation, message and cause / 创建带目...
- `public Class<?> targetType()` - Gets the target type / 获取目标类型
- `public String memberName()` - Gets the member name / 获取成员名称
- `public String operation()` - Gets the operation type / 获取操作类型
- `public static OpenReflectException fieldNotFound(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)` - Creates a field not found exception / 创建字段未找到异常
- `public static OpenReflectException fieldAccessFailed(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName, Throwable cause)` - Creates a field access failed exception / 创建字段访问失败异常
- `public static OpenReflectException methodNotFound(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Class<?>[] paramTypes)` - Creates a method not found exception / 创建方法未找到异常
- `public static OpenReflectException methodInvokeFailed(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Throwable cause)` - Creates a method invoke failed exception / 创建方法调用失败异常
- `public static OpenReflectException constructorNotFound(Class<?> clazz, Class<?>[] paramTypes)` - Creates a constructor not found exception / 创建构造器未找到异常
- `public static OpenReflectException instantiationFailed(Class<?> clazz, Throwable cause)` - Creates an instantiation failed exception / 创建实例化失败异常
- `public static OpenReflectException classNotFound(String className)` - Creates a class not found exception / 创建类未找到异常
- `public static OpenReflectException classLoadFailed(String className, Throwable cause)` - Creates a class load failed exception / 创建类加载失败异常
- `public static OpenReflectException typeCastFailed(Class<?> targetType, Object value)` - Creates a type cast failed exception / 创建类型转换失败异常
- `public static OpenReflectException copyFailed(Class<?> sourceType, Class<?> targetType, Throwable cause)` - Creates a copy failed exception / 创建复制失败异常
- `public static OpenReflectException proxyCreationFailed(Class<?> interfaceType, Throwable cause)` - Creates a proxy creation failed exception / 创建代理创建失败异常
- `public static OpenReflectException annotationNotFound(Class<?> clazz, Class<?> annotationType)` - Creates an annotation not found exception / 创建注解未找到异常
- `public static OpenReflectException lambdaParseFailed(String reason)` - Creates a lambda parse failed exception / 创建Lambda解析失败异常
- `public static OpenReflectException recordOperationFailed(Class<?> recordClass, String operation, Throwable cause)` - Creates a record operation failed exception / 创建Record操作失败异常
- `public static OpenReflectException illegalAccess(Class<?> clazz, String memberName, Throwable cause)` - Creates an illegal access exception / 创建非法访问异常

### Invokable
`public abstract class Invokable<T, R>` - Invokable - Fluent Wrapper for Method/Constructor (Similar to Guava Invokable...

- `public static <T> Invokable<T, Object> from(Method method)` - Creates an Invokable from a Method / 从Method创建Invokable
- `public static <T> Invokable<T, T> from(Constructor<T> constructor)` - Creates an Invokable from a Constructor / 从Constructor创建Invokable
- `public abstract TypeToken<T> getDeclaringClass();` - Gets the declaring class as TypeToken / 获取声明类的TypeToken
- `public abstract TypeToken<? extends R> getReturnType();` - Gets the return type as TypeToken / 获取返回类型的TypeToken
- `public abstract List<Parameter> getParameters();` - Gets the parameter list / 获取参数列表
- `public abstract List<TypeToken<?>> getParameterTypes();` - Gets the parameter types / 获取参数类型
- `public abstract List<TypeToken<? extends Throwable>> getExceptionTypes();` - Gets the exception types / 获取异常类型
- `public abstract TypeVariable<?>[] getTypeParameters();` - Gets the type parameters / 获取类型参数
- `public abstract R invoke(T receiver, Object... args) throws InvocationTargetException, IllegalAccessException;` - Invokes the method/constructor / 调用方法/构造器
- `public R invokeForced(T receiver, Object... args)` - Invokes ignoring access modifiers / 调用（忽略访问修饰符）
- `public Optional<R> invokeSafe(T receiver, Object... args)` - Safely invokes returning Optional / 安全调用返回Optional
- `public Invokable<T, R> setAccessible(boolean flag)` - Sets accessible flag / 设置可访问标志
- `public boolean isPublic()` - Checks if public / 检查是否为public
- `public boolean isProtected()` - Checks if protected / 检查是否为protected
- `public boolean isPrivate()` - Checks if private / 检查是否为private
- `public boolean isPackagePrivate()` - Checks if package-private / 检查是否为包私有
- `public boolean isStatic()` - Checks if static / 检查是否为static
- `public boolean isFinal()` - Checks if final / 检查是否为final
- `public boolean isAbstract()` - Checks if abstract / 检查是否为abstract
- `public boolean isNative()` - Checks if native / 检查是否为native
- `public boolean isSynchronized()` - Checks if synchronized / 检查是否为synchronized
- `public abstract boolean isVarArgs();` - Checks if varargs / 检查是否为可变参数
- `public abstract boolean isSynthetic();` - Checks if synthetic / 检查是否为合成
- `public abstract String getName();` - Gets the name / 获取名称
- `public abstract int getModifiers();` - Gets the modifiers / 获取修饰符
- `public abstract Class<?> getDeclaringClassRaw();` - Gets the declaring class as raw Class / 获取声明类的原始Class
- `public boolean isOverridable()` - Checks if overridable (not final, not private, not static) / 检查是否可重写（非final、非...
- `public boolean isAnnotationPresent(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - 判断annotation present
- `public <A extends Annotation> A getAnnotation(Class<A> annotationClass)` - 获取annotation
- `public Annotation[] getAnnotations()` - 获取annotations
- `public <A extends Annotation> A[] getAnnotationsByType(Class<A> annotationClass)` - 获取annotations by type

- `public static <T> Predicate<T> alwaysFalse()` - Creates a predicate that always returns false / 创建总是返回false的谓词

### OpenProxy
`public final class OpenProxy` - Proxy Facade Entry Class / 代理门面入口类

- `public static <T> T create(Class<T> interfaceClass, MethodInterceptor interceptor)` - Creates a proxy for an interface with interceptor / 为接口创建带拦截器的代理
- `public static <T> T create(Class<T> interfaceClass, InvocationHandler handler)` - Creates a proxy for an interface with handler / 为接口创建带处理器的代理
- `public static <T> T wrap(Class<T> interfaceClass, T target)` - Creates a proxy wrapping a target object / 创建包装目标对象的代理
- `public static <T> T wrap(Class<T> interfaceClass, T target, MethodInterceptor interceptor)` - Creates a proxy wrapping a target with interceptor / 创建带拦截器的包装目标对象的代理
- `public static Object create(InvocationHandler handler, Class<?>... interfaces)` - Creates a proxy for multiple interfaces / 为多个接口创建代理
- `public static <T> ProxyFactory<T> factory(Class<T> interfaceClass)` - Creates a factory for building proxies / 创建构建代理的工厂
- `public static boolean isProxy(Object object)` - Checks if an object is a proxy / 检查对象是否为代理
- `public static InvocationHandler getHandler(Object proxy)` - Gets the invocation handler of a proxy / 获取代理的调用处理器
- `public static Class<?>[] getInterfaces(Object proxy)` - Gets the interfaces implemented by a proxy / 获取代理实现的接口
- `public static boolean implementsInterface(Object proxy, Class<?> interfaceClass)` - Checks if proxy implements an interface / 检查代理是否实现接口
- `public static <T> T unwrap(Object proxy)` - Unwraps a proxy to get the underlying target / 解包代理获取底层目标
- `public static <T> T createNoOp(Class<T> interfaceClass)` - Creates a no-op proxy that returns default values / 创建返回默认值的空操作代理
- `public static <T> RecordingProxy<T> createRecording(Class<T> interfaceClass)` - Creates a mock proxy that records method calls / 创建记录方法调用的模拟代理
- `public record RecordingProxy<T>(T proxy, List<MethodCall> calls)` - Recording proxy wrapper / 记录代理包装器
- `public record MethodCall(Method method, Object[] args)` - Method call record / 方法调用记录

### ProxyFactory
`public class ProxyFactory<T>` - Proxy Factory / 代理工厂

- `public static <T> ProxyFactory<T> forInterface(Class<T> interfaceClass)` - Creates a ProxyFactory for an interface / 为接口创建ProxyFactory
- `public ProxyFactory<T> implement(Class<?> interfaceClass)` - Adds an additional interface / 添加额外接口
- `public ProxyFactory<T> classLoader(ClassLoader classLoader)` - Sets the ClassLoader / 设置ClassLoader
- `public ProxyFactory<T> target(Object target)` - Sets a target object for delegation / 设置委托的目标对象
- `public ProxyFactory<T> intercept(MethodInterceptor interceptor)` - Sets the default interceptor / 设置默认拦截器
- `public ProxyFactory<T> intercept(String methodName, MethodInterceptor interceptor)` - Sets an interceptor for a specific method / 为特定方法设置拦截器
- `public ProxyFactory<T> intercept(String methodName, Class<?>[] parameterTypes, MethodInterceptor interceptor)` - Sets an interceptor for a specific method with parameter types / 为特定方法（带参数类型）...
- `public ProxyFactory<T> handler(InvocationHandler handler)` - Sets a custom invocation handler / 设置自定义调用处理器
- `public T create()` - Creates the proxy / 创建代理

`public final class ProxyUtil` - Proxy Utility Class / 代理工具类

- `public static Class<?> getProxyClass(ClassLoader loader, Class<?>... interfaces)` - Gets or creates proxy class (cached) / 获取或创建代理类（缓存）
- `public static Object newProxyInstance(ClassLoader loader, Class<?>[] interfaces, InvocationHandler handler)` - Creates a proxy instance / 创建代理实例
- `public static <T> T newProxyInstance(Class<T> interfaceClass, InvocationHandler handler)` - Creates a proxy instance for a single interface / 为单个接口创建代理实例
- `public static boolean isProxyClass(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if a class is a proxy class / 检查类是否为代理类
- `public static boolean isProxy(Object obj)` - Checks if an object is a proxy instance / 检查对象是否为代理实例
- `public static InvocationHandler getInvocationHandler(Object proxy)` - Gets the invocation handler of a proxy / 获取代理的调用处理器

- `public static List<Class<?>> getProxyInterfaceList(Object proxy)` - Gets interfaces implemented by a proxy as list / 获取代理实现的接口列表
- `public static boolean implementsInterface(Object proxy, Class<?> interfaceClass)` - Checks if proxy implements an interface / 检查代理是否实现接口
- `public static boolean isProxyable(Class<?> clazz)` - Validates that a class is an interface suitable for proxying / 验证类是否为适合代理的接口
- `public static boolean areProxyable(Class<?>... interfaces)` - Validates multiple interfaces for proxying / 验证多个接口是否适合代理

- `public static boolean isEqualsMethod(Method method)` - Checks if a method is equals / 检查方法是否为equals
- `public static boolean isHashCodeMethod(Method method)` - Checks if a method is hashCode / 检查方法是否为hashCode
- `public static boolean isToStringMethod(Method method)` - Checks if a method is toString / 检查方法是否为toString
- `public static Object getDefaultReturnValue(Class<?> returnType)` - Gets the default return value for a type / 获取类型的默认返回值
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears proxy class cache / 清除代理类缓存
- `public static int getCacheSize()` - Gets cache size / 获取缓存大小

### OpenRecord
`public final class OpenRecord` - Record Facade Entry Class / Record门面入口类

- `public static boolean isRecord(Class<?> clazz)` - Checks if a class is a record / 检查类是否为record
- `public static boolean isRecordInstance(Object obj)` - Checks if an object is a record instance / 检查对象是否为record实例

- `public static RecordComponent getComponent(Class<?> recordClass, String componentName)` - Gets component by name / 按名称获取组件
- `public static RecordComponent getComponent(Class<?> recordClass, int index)` - Gets component by index / 按索引获取组件
- `public static List<String> getComponentNames(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets component names / 获取组件名称
- `public static List<Class<?>> getComponentTypes(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets component types / 获取组件类型
- `public static int getComponentCount(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets number of components / 获取组件数量
- `public static Object getValue(Record record, String componentName)` - Gets component value from a record / 从record获取组件值
- `public static <T> T getValue(Record record, String componentName, Class<T> type)` - Gets component value with type / 获取组件值（带类型）
- `public static Object[] getValues(Record record)` - Gets all component values / 获取所有组件值
- `public static Map<String, Object> toMap(Record record)` - Converts record to map / 将record转换为map
- `public static <T extends Record> RecordBuilder<T> builder(Class<T> recordClass)` - Creates a record builder / 创建record构建器
- `public static <T extends Record> T create(Class<T> recordClass, Object... values)` - Creates a record from values / 从值创建record
- `public static <T extends Record> T fromMap(Class<T> recordClass, Map<String, ?> values)` - Creates a record from a map / 从map创建record
- `public static <T extends Record> T copy(T record)` - Creates a copy of a record / 创建record的副本
- `public static <T extends Record> T copyWith(T record, Map<String, ?> modifications)` - Creates a copy with modified values / 创建带修改值的副本
- `public static <T extends Record> T copyWith(T record, String componentName, Object newValue)` - Creates a copy with a single modified value / 创建带单个修改值的副本
- `public static Map<String, Object[]> diff(Record record1, Record record2)` - Compares two records component by component / 逐组件比较两个record
- `public static boolean valuesEqual(Record record1, Record record2)` - Checks if two records have the same values / 检查两个record是否有相同的值

### RecordBuilder
`public class RecordBuilder<T` - Record Builder / Record构建器

- `public RecordBuilder(Class<T> recordClass)` - Creates a RecordBuilder / 创建RecordBuilder
- `public static <T extends Record> RecordBuilder<T> of(Class<T> recordClass)` - Creates a RecordBuilder for a record class / 为record类创建RecordBuilder
- `public static <T extends Record> RecordBuilder<T> from(T record)` - Creates a RecordBuilder copying from an existing record / 从现有record复制创建Record...
- `public RecordBuilder<T> set(String name, Object value)` - Sets a component value by name / 按名称设置组件值
- `public RecordBuilder<T> set(int index, Object value)` - Sets a component value by index / 按索引设置组件值
- `public RecordBuilder<T> setAll(Map<String, ?> map)` - Sets multiple values from a map / 从map设置多个值
- `public RecordBuilder<T> copyFrom(T record)` - Sets all values from an existing record / 从现有record设置所有值
- `public RecordBuilder<T> setIfAbsent(String name, Object value)` - Sets a value if absent / 如果不存在则设置值
- `public RecordBuilder<T> setIfNotNull(String name, Object value)` - Sets a value if not null / 如果非null则设置值
- `public RecordBuilder<T> clear(String name)` - Clears a specific value / 清除特定值
- `public RecordBuilder<T> clearAll()` - Clears all values / 清除所有值
- `public Object getValue(String name)` - Gets the current value for a component / 获取组件的当前值
- `public boolean hasValue(String name)` - Checks if a value is set / 检查是否已设置值
- `public Class<T> getRecordClass()` - Gets the record class / 获取record类
- `public List<RecordComponent> getComponents()` - Gets the components / 获取组件
- `public T build()` - Builds the record instance / 构建record实例
- `public T buildValidated()` - Builds the record with validation / 构建record（带验证）

### RecordComponent
`public class RecordComponent` - Record Component Wrapper / Record组件包装器

- `public Class<?> getType()` - Gets the component type / 获取组件类型

- `public Object getValue(Object record)` - Gets the value from a record instance / 从record实例获取值

- `public <A extends Annotation> A getAnnotation(Class<A> annotationClass)` - Gets an annotation from this component / 从此组件获取注解
- `public <A extends Annotation> Optional<A> findAnnotation(Class<A> annotationClass)` - Finds an annotation (Optional) / 查找注解（Optional）
- `public boolean hasAnnotation(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Checks if annotation is present / 检查注解是否存在
- `public Annotation[] getAnnotations()` - Gets all annotations on this component / 获取此组件上的所有注解
- `public java.lang.reflect.RecordComponent unwrap()` - Gets the underlying RecordComponent / 获取底层RecordComponent
- `public int getIndex()` - Gets the index of this component / 获取此组件的索引
- `public boolean isPrimitive()` - Checks if this component is primitive / 检查此组件是否为原始类型
- `public boolean isArray()` - Checks if this component is an array / 检查此组件是否为数组
- `public boolean equals(Object o)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

- `public static void requireRecord(Class<?> clazz)` - Requires class to be a record / 要求类为record

- `public static int getComponentCount(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets component count / 获取组件数量
- `public static List<String> getComponentNames(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets component names / 获取组件名称
- `public static Class<?>[] getComponentTypes(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets component types / 获取组件类型

- `public static java.lang.reflect.RecordComponent getComponent(Class<?> recordClass, int index)` - Gets component by index / 按索引获取组件
- `public static Method getAccessor(Class<?> recordClass, String componentName)` - Gets accessor method for a component (cached) / 获取组件的访问器方法（缓存）
- `public static List<Method> getAccessors(Class<?> recordClass)` - Gets all accessor methods / 获取所有访问器方法
- `public static Object getComponentValue(Record record, String componentName)` - Gets component value / 获取组件值

- `public static Object[] getComponentValues(Record record)` - Gets all component values / 获取所有组件值
- `public static <T extends Record> Constructor<T> getCanonicalConstructor(Class<T> recordClass)` - Gets canonical constructor (cached) / 获取规范构造器（缓存）
- `public static <T extends Record> T newInstance(Class<T> recordClass, Object... values)` - Creates a new record instance / 创建新的record实例
- `public static <T extends Record> T copy(T record)` - Creates a copy of a record / 创建record的副本
- `public static Map<String, Object> toMap(Record record)` - Converts record to map / 将record转换为map
- `public static <T extends Record> T fromMap(Class<T> recordClass, Map<String, ?> map)` - Creates record from map / 从map创建record
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clears all caches / 清除所有缓存
- `public static void clearCache(Class<?> clazz)` - Clears cache for specific class / 清除特定类的缓存

- `public boolean isInPackageOrSubpackage(String packageName)` - Checks if this class is in the given package or subpackage / 检查此类是否在给定包或子包中

- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### ClassPath

- `public static ClassPath from(ClassLoader classLoader)` - Creates a ClassPath from the given ClassLoader / 从给定ClassLoader创建ClassPath

- `public Set<ResourceInfo> getResources()` - Gets all resources / 获取所有资源
- `public Set<ClassInfo> getClassesInPackage(String packageName)` - Gets classes in the specified package (exact match) / 获取指定包中的类（精确匹配）
- `public Set<ClassInfo> getTopLevelClassesInPackage(String packageName)` - Gets top-level classes in the specified package / 获取指定包中的顶层类

- `public Set<ResourceInfo> getResourcesWithExtension(String extension)` - Gets resources with specific extension / 获取具有特定扩展名的资源
- `public ClassLoader getClassLoader()` - Gets the class loader / 获取类加载器
- `public Stream<ClassInfo> streamClasses()` - Streams all classes / 流式获取所有类

### ClassScanner
`public final class ClassScanner` - Class Scanner / 类扫描器

- `public static ClassScanner from(ClassPath classPath)` - Creates a scanner from ClassPath / 从ClassPath创建扫描器
- `public static ClassScanner from(ClassLoader classLoader)` - Creates a scanner from ClassLoader / 从ClassLoader创建扫描器
- `public static ClassScanner create()` - Creates a scanner using current context ClassLoader / 使用当前上下文ClassLoader创建扫描器
- `public ClassScanner inPackage(String packageName)` - Adds a base package to scan / 添加要扫描的基础包
- `public ClassScanner inPackages(String... packageNames)` - Adds multiple base packages to scan / 添加多个要扫描的基础包
- `public ClassScanner recursive(boolean recursive)` - Sets whether to scan recursively / 设置是否递归扫描
- `public ClassScanner includeInnerClasses(boolean include)` - Sets whether to include inner classes / 设置是否包含内部类
- `public ClassScanner filterInfo(Predicate<ClassInfo> predicate)` - Filters by ClassInfo predicate (before loading) / 按ClassInfo谓词过滤（加载前）
- `public ClassScanner filter(Predicate<Class<?>> predicate)` - Filters by Class predicate (after loading) / 按Class谓词过滤（加载后）
- `public ClassScanner withAnnotation(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)` - Filters for classes with annotation / 过滤具有注解的类
- `public ClassScanner subtypeOf(Class<?> superClass)` - Filters for subtypes of a class / 过滤某类的子类型
- `public ClassScanner implementing(Class<?> interfaceClass)` - Filters for implementations of an interface / 过滤接口的实现类
- `public ClassScanner interfacesOnly()` - Filters for interfaces only / 仅过滤接口
- `public ClassScanner concreteOnly()` - Filters for concrete classes only / 仅过滤具体类
- `public ClassScanner recordsOnly()` - Filters for record classes only / 仅过滤Record类
- `public ClassScanner enumsOnly()` - Filters for enum classes only / 仅过滤枚举类
- `public Set<ClassInfo> scanInfo()` - Scans and returns ClassInfo without loading classes / 扫描并返回ClassInfo（不加载类）
- `public Set<Class<?>> scan()` - Scans and returns loaded classes / 扫描并返回已加载的类
- `public Stream<Class<?>> stream()` - Scans and returns as stream / 扫描并返回为流
- `public List<Class<?>> toList()` - Scans and returns as list / 扫描并返回为列表

- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

- `public ResourceScanner inPackage(String packageName)` - Filters by package / 按包过滤

- `public Stream<ResourceInfo> stream()` - Scans and returns as stream / 扫描并返回为流

- `public static boolean validateHierarchy(Class<?> sealedClass)` - Validates that all permitted subclasses extend the sealed class / 验证所有许可子类都继承密封类
- `public static boolean isExhaustive(Class<?> sealedClass)` - Checks if the sealed hierarchy is exhaustive (all cases handled) / 检查密封层次结构是否...
- `public static List<Class<?>> getConcreteTypes(Class<?> sealedClass)` - Gets all concrete types for pattern matching / 获取模式匹配的所有具体类型
- `public static String generateSwitchTemplate(Class<?> sealedClass, String variableName)` - Generates a switch expression pattern matching template (as string) / 生成switc...

- `public Type getGenericComponentType()` - 获取generic component type

- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### ParameterizedTypeImpl
`public final class ParameterizedTypeImpl` - Parameterized Type Implementation / 参数化类型实现

- `public ParameterizedTypeImpl(Class<?> rawType, Type ownerType, Type... actualTypeArguments)` - Creates a parameterized type / 创建参数化类型
- `public Type[] getActualTypeArguments()` - 获取actual type arguments
- `public Type getRawType()` - 获取raw type
- `public Type getOwnerType()` - 获取owner type
- `public boolean equals(Object obj)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### TypeLiteral
`public abstract class TypeLiteral<T>` - Type Literal (Alternative to TypeToken) / 类型字面量（TypeToken的替代）

- `public Type getType()` - Gets the captured Type / 获取捕获的Type
- `public Class<? super T> getRawType()` - Gets the raw type / 获取原始类型
- `public TypeToken<T> toTypeToken()` - Converts to TypeToken / 转换为TypeToken
- `public boolean equals(Object obj)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### TypeResolver
`public final class TypeResolver` - Type Resolver / 类型解析器

- `public static Type resolveType(Type context, Type toResolve)` - Resolves a type in the context of another type / 在另一类型上下文中解析类型
- `public static Map<TypeVariable<?>, Type> getTypeVariableMap(Type type)` - Gets the type variable map for a type / 获取类型的类型变量映射
- `public static Type resolveReturnType(Type context, Method method)` - Resolves the return type of a method in a specific type context / 在特定类型上下文中解析...
- `public static Type[] resolveParameterTypes(Type context, Method method)` - Resolves the parameter types of a method in a specific type context / 在特定类型上下...
- `public static Type resolveFieldType(Type context, Field field)` - Resolves the type of a field in a specific type context / 在特定类型上下文中解析字段类型
- `public static Type getTypeArgument(Type type, int index)` - Gets the type argument at a specific index from a parameterized type / 从参数化类型...
- `public static Type findTypeArgument(Type type, Class<?> targetType, int index)` - Finds the type argument for a specific type variable in the inheritance chain...

### TypeToken
`public abstract class TypeToken<T>` - Generic Type Token (Similar to Guava TypeToken) / 泛型类型令牌（对标 Guava TypeToken）

- `public static <T> TypeToken<T> of(Class<T> type)` - Creates a TypeToken from Class / 从Class创建TypeToken
- `public static TypeToken<?> of(Type type)` - Creates a TypeToken from Type / 从Type创建TypeToken
- `public Type getType()` - Gets the underlying Type / 获取底层Type
- `public Class<? super T> getRawType()` - Gets the raw type (without generic parameters) / 获取原始类型（无泛型参数）
- `public TypeToken<?> getTypeParameter(int index)` - Gets the type parameter at the specified index / 获取指定索引的类型参数
- `public List<TypeToken<?>> getTypeParameters()` - Gets all type parameters / 获取所有类型参数
- `public TypeToken<?> getComponentType()` - Gets the component type (for arrays) / 获取组件类型（用于数组）
- `public boolean isPrimitive()` - Checks if this is a primitive type / 检查是否为原始类型
- `public boolean isArray()` - Checks if this is an array type / 检查是否为数组类型
- `public boolean isParameterized()` - Checks if this is a parameterized type / 检查是否为参数化类型
- `public boolean isWildcard()` - Checks if this is a wildcard type / 检查是否为通配符类型
- `public boolean isTypeVariable()` - Checks if this is a type variable / 检查是否为类型变量
- `public boolean isSupertypeOf(TypeToken<?> other)` - Checks if this type is a supertype of the specified type / 检查此类型是否为指定类型的父类型
- `public boolean isSubtypeOf(TypeToken<?> other)` - Checks if this type is a subtype of the specified type / 检查此类型是否为指定类型的子类型
- `public boolean isAssignableFrom(TypeToken<?> other)` - Checks if this type is assignable from the specified type / 检查此类型是否可从指定类型赋值
- `public TypeToken<?> resolveType(Type toResolve)` - Resolves a type in the context of this type / 在此类型上下文中解析类型
- `public TypeToken<T> wrap()` - Gets the wrapper type (for primitives) / 获取包装类型（对于原始类型）
- `public TypeToken<T> unwrap()` - Gets the primitive type (for wrappers) / 获取原始类型（对于包装类型）
- `public TypeToken<?> resolveFieldType(Field field)` - Resolves field type in context of this type / 在此类型上下文中解析字段类型
- `public TypeToken<?> resolveReturnType(Method method)` - Resolves method return type in context of this type / 在此类型上下文中解析方法返回类型
- `public List<TypeToken<?>> resolveParameterTypes(Method method)` - Resolves method parameter types in context of this type / 在此类型上下文中解析方法参数类型
- `public static <E> TypeToken<List<E>> listOf(TypeToken<E> elementType)` - Creates a List&lt;E&gt; TypeToken / 创建 List&lt;E&gt; TypeToken
- `public static <E> TypeToken<List<E>> listOf(Class<E> elementType)` - Creates a List&lt;E&gt; TypeToken / 创建 List&lt;E&gt; TypeToken
- `public static <E> TypeToken<Set<E>> setOf(TypeToken<E> elementType)` - Creates a Set&lt;E&gt; TypeToken / 创建 Set&lt;E&gt; TypeToken
- `public static <E> TypeToken<Set<E>> setOf(Class<E> elementType)` - Creates a Set&lt;E&gt; TypeToken / 创建 Set&lt;E&gt; TypeToken
- `public static <K, V> TypeToken<Map<K, V>> mapOf(TypeToken<K> keyType, TypeToken<V> valueType)` - Creates a Map&lt;K,V&gt; TypeToken / 创建 Map&lt;K,V&gt; TypeToken
- `public static <K, V> TypeToken<Map<K, V>> mapOf(Class<K> keyType, Class<V> valueType)` - Creates a Map&lt;K,V&gt; TypeToken / 创建 Map&lt;K,V&gt; TypeToken
- `public static <T> TypeToken<Optional<T>> optionalOf(TypeToken<T> valueType)` - Creates an Optional&lt;T&gt; TypeToken / 创建 Optional&lt;T&gt; TypeToken
- `public static <T> TypeToken<Optional<T>> optionalOf(Class<T> valueType)` - Creates an Optional&lt;T&gt; TypeToken / 创建 Optional&lt;T&gt; TypeToken
- `public boolean equals(Object obj)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### TypeUtil
`public final class TypeUtil` - Type Utility Class / 类型工具类

- `public static Class<?> getRawType(Type type)` - Gets the raw type from a Type / 从Type获取原始类型
- `public static boolean isPrimitive(Class<?> type)` - Checks if type is primitive / 检查是否为原始类型
- `public static boolean isWrapper(Class<?> type)` - Checks if type is wrapper / 检查是否为包装类型
- `public static Class<?> wrap(Class<?> type)` - Converts primitive to wrapper / 将原始类型转换为包装类型
- `public static Class<?> unwrap(Class<?> type)` - Converts wrapper to primitive / 将包装类型转换为原始类型
- `public static boolean isAssignableFrom(Type target, Type source)` - Checks if target type is assignable from source type / 检查目标类型是否可从源类型赋值
- `public static String toString(Type type)` - Converts Type to readable string / 将Type转换为可读字符串
- `public static TypeVariable<?>[] getTypeParameters(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets type parameters from a class / 从类获取类型参数
- `public static Type[] getActualTypeArguments(Type type)` - Gets actual type arguments from a parameterized type / 从参数化类型获取实际类型参数
- `public static boolean equals(Type type1, Type type2)` - Checks if two types are equal considering type parameters / 检查两个类型是否相等（考虑类型参数）

### TypeVariableUtil
`public final class TypeVariableUtil` - Type Variable Utility Class / 类型变量工具类

- `public static TypeVariable<?> getTypeVariable(Class<?> clazz, String name)` - Gets type variable by name from a class / 从类按名称获取类型变量
- `public static List<String> getTypeVariableNames(Class<?> clazz)` - Gets all type variable names from a class / 从类获取所有类型变量名
- `public static Type[] getBounds(TypeVariable<?> typeVariable)` - Gets the bounds of a type variable / 获取类型变量的边界
- `public static boolean hasBounds(TypeVariable<?> typeVariable)` - Checks if a type variable has non-Object bounds / 检查类型变量是否有非Object边界
- `public static Type getUpperBound(TypeVariable<?> typeVariable)` - Gets the upper bound of a type variable / 获取类型变量的上界
- `public static Class<?> getRawUpperBound(TypeVariable<?> typeVariable)` - Gets the raw upper bound class of a type variable / 获取类型变量的原始上界类
- `public static boolean containsTypeVariable(Type type)` - Checks if a type contains type variables / 检查类型是否包含类型变量
- `public static Set<TypeVariable<?>> collectTypeVariables(Type type)` - Collects all type variables from a type / 从类型收集所有类型变量
- `public static Map<String, Type> getTypeArgumentsByName(Type type)` - Creates a map of type variable names to their Types from a parameterized type...

### WildcardTypeImpl
`public final class WildcardTypeImpl` - Wildcard Type Implementation / 通配符类型实现

- `public WildcardTypeImpl(Type[] upperBounds, Type[] lowerBounds)` - Creates a wildcard type / 创建通配符类型
- `public static WildcardTypeImpl extendsOf(Type upperBound)` - Creates a wildcard with upper bound (? extends T) / 创建带上界的通配符（? extends T）
- `public static WildcardTypeImpl superOf(Type lowerBound)` - Creates a wildcard with lower bound (? super T) / 创建带下界的通配符（? super T）
- `public static WildcardTypeImpl unbounded()` - Creates an unbounded wildcard (?) / 创建无界通配符（?）
- `public Type[] getUpperBounds()` - 获取upper bounds
- `public Type[] getLowerBounds()` - 获取lower bounds
- `public boolean equals(Object obj)` - 比较是否相等 / Check equality
- `public int hashCode()` - 计算哈希码 / Compute hash code
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string
