## 32. opencode-base-deepclone

深拷贝组件，支持多种克隆策略（反射/序列化/Unsafe），批量克隆

### CloneContext
`public final class CloneContext` - Context for tracking clone state and handling circular references / 用于跟踪克隆状态和...

- `public static CloneContext create()` - Creates a new CloneContext / 创建新的CloneContext
- `public static CloneContext create(int maxDepth)` - Creates a new CloneContext with a max depth / 创建指定最大深度的CloneContext
- `public Map<Object, Object> getClonedObjects()` - Gets the map of cloned objects / 获取已克隆对象的映射
- `public boolean isCloned(Object original)` - Checks if an object has already been cloned / 检查对象是否已被克隆
- `public <T> T getCloned(Object original)` - Gets the cloned copy of an object / 获取对象的克隆副本
- `public void registerCloned(Object original, Object cloned)` - Registers a cloned object mapping / 注册克隆对象映射
- `public void incrementSkipped()` - Increments the skipped objects count / 增加跳过对象计数
- `public int getDepth()` - Gets the current clone depth / 获取当前克隆深度
- `public int getMaxDepth()` - Gets the maximum allowed depth / 获取允许的最大深度
- `public int incrementDepth()` - Increments the depth and returns the new value / 增加深度并返回新值
- `public int decrementDepth()` - Decrements the depth and returns the new value / 减少深度并返回新值
- `public boolean isMaxDepthExceeded()` - Checks if max depth has been exceeded / 检查是否超过最大深度
- `public List<String> getPath()` - Gets the current clone path / 获取当前克隆路径
- `public String getPathString()` - Gets the current path as a string / 获取当前路径字符串
- `public void pushPath(String element)` - Pushes an element onto the path / 将元素压入路径
- `public void popPath()` - Pops an element from the path / 从路径弹出元素
- `public CloneStatistics getStatistics()` - Gets clone statistics / 获取克隆统计信息
- `public record CloneStatistics(` - Clone statistics record / 克隆统计信息记录

### Cloner
`public interface Cloner` - Interface for object cloners / 对象克隆器接口


### ClonerBuilder
`public final class ClonerBuilder` - Builder for creating configured Cloner instances / 用于创建配置的Cloner实例的构建器

- `public ClonerBuilder reflective()` - Uses the reflective cloning strategy (default) / 使用反射克隆策略（默认）
- `public ClonerBuilder serializing()` - Uses the serialization cloning strategy / 使用序列化克隆策略
- `public ClonerBuilder unsafe()` - Uses the Unsafe cloning strategy / 使用Unsafe克隆策略
- `public ClonerBuilder registerImmutable(Class<?>... types)` - Registers types as immutable (will not be cloned) / 注册类型为不可变（不会被克隆）
- `public <T> ClonerBuilder registerHandler(Class<T> type, TypeHandler<T> handler)` - Registers a custom type handler / 注册自定义类型处理器
- `public <T> ClonerBuilder registerCloner(Class<T> type, UnaryOperator<T> cloner)` - Registers a custom cloning function for a type / 为类型注册自定义克隆函数
- `public ClonerBuilder cloneTransient(boolean cloneTransient)` - Sets whether to clone transient fields / 设置是否克隆transient字段
- `public ClonerBuilder useCache(boolean useCache)` - Sets whether to use caching / 设置是否使用缓存
- `public ClonerBuilder maxDepth(int maxDepth)` - Sets the maximum clone depth / 设置最大克隆深度
- `public Cloner build()` - Builds the configured Cloner instance / 构建配置的Cloner实例

### OpenClone
`public final class OpenClone` - Facade class for deep cloning operations / 深度克隆操作的门面类

- `public static <T> T clone(T original)` - Deep clones an object using the default reflective strategy / 使用默认反射策略深度克隆对象
- `public static <T> T cloneBySerialization(T original)` - Deep clones using serialization strategy / 使用序列化策略深度克隆
- `public static <T> T cloneByUnsafe(T original)` - Deep clones using Unsafe strategy (high performance) / 使用Unsafe策略深度克隆（高性能）
- `public static <T> T clone(T original, Cloner cloner)` - Deep clones using a specific cloner / 使用指定克隆器深度克隆
- `public static <T> List<T> cloneBatch(List<T> originals)` - Clones a list of objects / 克隆对象列表
- `public static <T> List<T> cloneBatchParallel(List<T> originals, int parallelism)` - Clones a list of objects in parallel using virtual threads / 使用虚拟线程并行克隆对象列表
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<T> cloneAsync(T original)` - Asynchronously clones an object / 异步克隆对象
- `public static <T> CompletableFuture<List<T>> cloneBatchAsync(List<T> originals)` - Asynchronously clones a batch of objects / 异步批量克隆对象
- `public static boolean isImmutable(Class<?> type)` - Checks if a type is immutable / 检查类型是否不可变
- `public static void registerImmutable(Class<?>... types)` - Registers types as immutable / 注册类型为不可变
- `public static Cloner getDefaultCloner()` - Gets the default cloner / 获取默认克隆器
- `public static ClonerBuilder builder()` - Creates a cloner builder / 创建克隆器构建器

### ReflectiveCloner
`public final class ReflectiveCloner` - Reflection-based deep cloner / 基于反射的深度克隆器

- `public static ReflectiveCloner create()` - Creates a ReflectiveCloner with default configuration / 使用默认配置创建ReflectiveCloner
- `public static ReflectiveCloner create(ReflectiveConfig config)` - Creates a ReflectiveCloner with specific configuration / 使用指定配置创建ReflectiveCl...
- `public static void clearCaches()` - Clears the static field and constructor caches. / Useful for reclaiming memor...
- `public String getStrategyName()` - 获取strategy name
- `public boolean supports(Class<?> type)`
- `public record ReflectiveConfig(` - Configuration for ReflectiveCloner / ReflectiveCloner的配置

### SerializingCloner
`public final class SerializingCloner` - Serialization-based deep cloner / 基于序列化的深度克隆器

- `public static SerializingCloner create()` - Creates a SerializingCloner / 创建SerializingCloner
- `public String getStrategyName()` - 获取strategy name
- `public boolean supports(Class<?> type)`

### UnsafeCloner
`public final class UnsafeCloner` - Unsafe-based high-performance deep cloner / 基于Unsafe的高性能深度克隆器

- `public static UnsafeCloner create()` - Creates an UnsafeCloner / 创建UnsafeCloner
- `public static boolean isAvailable()` - Checks if Unsafe is available / 检查Unsafe是否可用
- `public static <T> T allocateInstanceStatic(Class<T> type)` - Allocates an instance without calling constructor (static utility) / 不调用构造函数分...
- `public String getStrategyName()` - 获取strategy name
- `public boolean supports(Class<?> type)`

### DeepCloneable
`public interface DeepCloneable<T>` - Contract interface for objects that support deep cloning / 支持深度克隆的对象契约接口


### OpenDeepCloneException
`public class OpenDeepCloneException` - Exception for deep clone operations / 深度克隆操作异常

- `public OpenDeepCloneException(String message)` - Creates an exception with a message / 使用消息创建异常
- `public OpenDeepCloneException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception with a message and cause / 使用消息和原因创建异常
- `public OpenDeepCloneException(Class<?> targetType, String path, String message)` - Creates an exception with target type, path, and message / 使用目标类型、路径和消息创建异常
- `public OpenDeepCloneException(Class<?> targetType, String path, String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception with target type, path, message, and cause / 使用目标类型、路径、消...
- `public Class<?> getTargetType()` - Gets the target type being cloned / 获取正在克隆的目标类型
- `public String getPath()` - Gets the clone path where the error occurred / 获取发生错误的克隆路径
- `public static OpenDeepCloneException maxDepthExceeded(int depth, String path)` - Creates an exception for exceeding maximum clone depth / 创建超过最大克隆深度的异常
- `public static OpenDeepCloneException unsupportedType(Class<?> type)` - Creates an exception for unsupported type / 创建不支持类型的异常
- `public static OpenDeepCloneException instantiationFailed(Class<?> type, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception for instantiation failure / 创建实例化失败的异常
- `public static OpenDeepCloneException fieldAccessFailed(String field, Class<?> type, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception for field access failure / 创建字段访问失败的异常
- `public static OpenDeepCloneException serializationFailed(Class<?> type, Throwable cause)` - Creates an exception for serialization failure / 创建序列化失败的异常
- `public static OpenDeepCloneException circularReference(Class<?> type, String path)` - Creates an exception for circular reference detection / 创建循环引用检测的异常

### ArrayHandler
`public final class ArrayHandler` - Handler for cloning array types / 数组类型克隆处理器

- `public Object clone(Object array, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - 克隆对象 / Clone object
- `public Object clonePrimitiveArray(Object array, Class<?> componentType, int length)` - Clones a primitive type array / 克隆基本类型数组
- `public Object clonePrimitiveArray(Object array)` - Clones a primitive array (convenience method) / 克隆基本类型数组（便捷方法）
- `public <T> T[] cloneObjectArray(T[] array, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - Clones an object array / 克隆对象数组
- `public boolean supports(Class<?> type)`
- `public int priority()`

### CollectionHandler
`public final class CollectionHandler` - Handler for cloning Collection types / 集合类型克隆处理器

- `public Collection<?> clone(Collection<?> original, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - 克隆对象 / Clone object
- `public <T> List<T> cloneList(List<T> list, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - Clones a List / 克隆List
- `public <T> Set<T> cloneSet(Set<T> set, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - Clones a Set / 克隆Set
- `public <T> Queue<T> cloneQueue(Queue<T> queue, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - Clones a Queue / 克隆Queue
- `public <T> Collection<T> createInstance(Class<?> type, int size)` - Creates an instance of the specified collection type / 创建指定集合类型的实例
- `public boolean supports(Class<?> type)`
- `public int priority()`

### MapHandler
`public final class MapHandler` - Handler for cloning Map types / Map类型克隆处理器

- `public Map<?, ?> clone(Map<?, ?> original, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - 克隆对象 / Clone object
- `public <K, V> Map<K, V> cloneDeep(Map<K, V> map, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - Clones a Map with deep cloning of both keys and values / 克隆Map并深度克隆键和值
- `public <K, V> Map<K, V> cloneValues(Map<K, V> map, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - Clones a Map with only values deep cloned (keys are shared) / 克隆Map并仅深度克隆值（键共享）
- `public <K, V> Map<K, V> createInstance(Class<?> type, int size)` - Creates an instance of the specified map type / 创建指定Map类型的实例
- `public boolean supports(Class<?> type)`
- `public int priority()`

### RecordHandler
`public final class RecordHandler` - Handler for cloning Record types / Record类型克隆处理器

- `public Record clone(Record original, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - 克隆对象 / Clone object
- `public <T extends Record> T cloneRecord(T record, Cloner cloner, CloneContext context)` - Clones a Record / 克隆Record
- `public Object[] getComponents(Record record)` - Gets the component values of a Record / 获取Record的组件值
- `public <T extends Record> T createInstance(Class<T> type, Object[] values)` - Creates a new Record instance with the given component values / 使用给定的组件值创建新的R...
- `public boolean supports(Class<?> type)`
- `public int priority()`

### TypeHandler
`public interface TypeHandler<T>` - Interface for type-specific clone handlers / 特定类型克隆处理器接口


### CloneStrategyProvider
`public interface CloneStrategyProvider` - SPI interface for providing custom clone strategies / 提供自定义克隆策略的SPI接口


### CloneStrategy
`public interface CloneStrategy` - Strategy interface for object cloning (SPI) / 对象克隆策略接口（SPI）


### FieldCloneStrategy
`public enum FieldCloneStrategy` - Enumeration of field cloning strategies / 字段克隆策略枚举

- `public static FieldCloneStrategy fromAnnotations(Field field)` - Determines the clone strategy from field annotations / 从字段注解确定克隆策略

### TypeCloneStrategy
`public record TypeCloneStrategy<T>(` - Type-specific clone strategy configuration / 特定类型的克隆策略配置

- `public static <T> TypeCloneStrategy<T> deep(Class<T> type, UnaryOperator<T> cloner)` - Creates a deep clone strategy with a custom cloner / 使用自定义克隆器创建深度克隆策略
- `public static <T> TypeCloneStrategy<T> shallow(Class<T> type)` - Creates a shallow copy strategy (returns same reference) / 创建浅拷贝策略（返回相同引用）
- `public static <T> TypeCloneStrategy<T> immutable(Class<T> type)` - Creates an immutable strategy (returns same reference) / 创建不可变策略（返回相同引用）
- `public T apply(T original)` - Clones an object using this strategy / 使用此策略克隆对象

## 33. opencode-base-classloader

类加载组件，提供类隔离加载、热替换、类路径扫描、资源加载

### OpenClassLoader
`public final class OpenClassLoader` - OpenClassLoader - ClassLoader Facade / OpenClassLoader - 类加载器门面

- `public static ClassLoader getDefaultClassLoader()` - Get default classloader / 获取默认类加载器
- `public static ClassLoader getContextClassLoader()` - Get context classloader / 获取上下文类加载器
- `public static ClassLoader getClassLoader(Class<?> clazz)` - Get classloader for specified class / 获取指定类的类加载器
- `public static IsoClassLoader.Builder isolatedLoader()` - Create isolated classloader builder / 创建隔离类加载器构建器
- `public static HotSwapClassLoader hotSwapLoader()` - Create hot-swap classloader / 创建热替换类加载器
- `public static HotSwapClassLoader hotSwapLoader(ClassLoader parent)` - Create hot-swap classloader with parent / 使用父加载器创建热替换类加载器

- `public static <T> T withClassLoader(ClassLoader classLoader, Supplier<T> supplier)` - Execute operation with specified classloader as context classloader / 使用指定类加载...
- `public static void withClassLoader(ClassLoader classLoader, Runnable runnable)` - Execute operation with specified classloader as context classloader / 使用指定类加载...
- `public static boolean isVisible(Class<?> clazz, ClassLoader classLoader)` - Check if class is visible (loadable) by classloader / 检查类是否对类加载器可见（可加载）
- `public static List<ClassLoader> getClassLoaderHierarchy(ClassLoader classLoader)` - Get classloader hierarchy / 获取类加载器层次

- `public static Optional<Class<?>> loadClass(String className)` - Load class safely (returns Optional) / 安全加载类（返回 Optional）

### OpenClassScanner

- `public static ClassScanner of(String... basePackages)` - Create class scanner for multiple packages / 为多个包创建类扫描器

- `public static <T> Set<Class<? extends T>> scanImplementations(String basePackage, Class<T> interfaceType)` - Quick scan for interface implementations / 快速扫描接口实现

- `public static PackageScanner packageScanner(String basePackage)` - Create package scanner / 创建包扫描器

### OpenClassLoaderException
`public class OpenClassLoaderException` - ClassLoader Component Unified Exception / ClassLoader 组件统一异常

- `public OpenClassLoaderException(String message)` - Create exception with message / 创建带消息的异常
- `public OpenClassLoaderException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Create exception with message and cause / 创建带消息和原因的异常
- `public static OpenClassLoaderException classNotFound(String className)` - Create class not found exception / 创建类未找到异常
- `public static OpenClassLoaderException classNotFound(String className, Throwable cause)` - Create class not found exception with cause / 创建带原因的类未找到异常
- `public static OpenClassLoaderException classLoadFailed(String className, Throwable cause)` - Create class load failed exception / 创建类加载失败异常
- `public static OpenClassLoaderException resourceNotFound(String resourceName)` - Create resource not found exception / 创建资源未找到异常
- `public static OpenClassLoaderException resourceReadFailed(String resourceName, Throwable cause)` - Create resource read failed exception / 创建资源读取失败异常
- `public static OpenClassLoaderException metadataParseFailed(String className, Throwable cause)` - Create metadata parse failed exception / 创建元数据解析失败异常
- `public static OpenClassLoaderException scanFailed(String packageName, Throwable cause)` - Create scan failed exception / 创建扫描失败异常
- `public static OpenClassLoaderException classLoaderClosed()` - Create class loader closed exception / 创建类加载器已关闭异常
- `public Optional<String> getClassName()` - Get the class name associated with this exception / 获取与此异常关联的类名
- `public Optional<String> getResourceName()` - Get the resource name associated with this exception / 获取与此异常关联的资源名

### HotSwapClassLoader
`public class HotSwapClassLoader` - HotSwap ClassLoader - Supports dynamic class replacement / 热替换类加载器 - 支持类的动态替换

- `public HotSwapClassLoader()` - Create HotSwap classloader with default parent / 使用默认父加载器创建热替换类加载器
- `public HotSwapClassLoader(ClassLoader parent)` - Create HotSwap classloader with specified parent / 使用指定父加载器创建热替换类加载器

- `public static HotSwapClassLoader create(ClassLoader parent)` - Create HotSwap classloader with specified parent / 使用指定父加载器创建热替换类加载器
- `public Class<?> loadClass(String name, byte[] bytecode)` - Load or reload class from bytecode / 从字节码加载或重新加载类
- `public Class<?> reloadClass(String name, Path classFile)` - Reload class from file / 从文件重新加载类
- `public Class<?> loadClass(String name)` - 加载class
- `public int getVersion(String className)` - Get current version of class / 获取类的当前版本
- `public Set<String> getLoadedClassNames()` - Get all loaded class names / 获取所有已加载的类名
- `public boolean isLoaded(String className)` - Check if class is loaded / 检查类是否已加载
- `public Optional<byte[]> getBytecode(String className)` - Get bytecode of loaded class / 获取已加载类的字节码
- `public void unloadClass(String className)` - Unload class (will be reloaded on next access) / 卸载类（下次访问时重新加载）
- `public void clear()` - Clear all loaded classes / 清除所有已加载的类
- `public void close()` - 关闭资源 / Close resource
- `public boolean isClosed()` - Check if classloader is closed / 检查类加载器是否已关闭

### ResourceLoader

- `public List<Resource> loadAll(String locationPattern)` - Load all resources matching the location pattern / 加载所有匹配位置模式的资源
- `public ResourceLoader classLoader(ClassLoader classLoader)` - Set class loader / 设置类加载器

### AnnotationScanner
`public class AnnotationScanner` - Annotation Scanner - Scans for annotated elements / 注解扫描器 - 扫描带注解的元素

- `public static AnnotationScanner of(String basePackage)` - Create annotation scanner / 创建注解扫描器
- `public AnnotationScanner classLoader(ClassLoader classLoader)` - Set class loader / 设置类加载器
- `public AnnotationScanner includeInnerClasses(boolean include)` - Include inner classes / 包含内部类
- `public Set<Class<?>> scanClasses(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Scan classes with annotation / 扫描带注解的类
- `public Set<Method> scanMethods(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Scan methods with annotation / 扫描带注解的方法
- `public Set<Field> scanFields(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Scan fields with annotation / 扫描带注解的字段
- `public Set<Constructor<?>> scanConstructors(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Scan constructors with annotation / 扫描带注解的构造器
- `public Set<Class<?>> scanMetaAnnotated(Class<? extends Annotation> metaAnnotation)` - Scan classes with meta-annotation (annotation's annotation) / 扫描带元注解（注解的注解）的类
- `public Map<Method, List<Integer>> scanParameters(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Scan parameters with annotation / 扫描带注解的参数
- `public Set<Class<?>> scanClassesWithAnnotatedMethods(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Find all classes that have any method with the given annotation / 查找所有拥有带指定注解...
- `public Set<Class<?>> scanClassesWithAnnotatedFields(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Find all classes that have any field with the given annotation / 查找所有拥有带指定注解字段的类

### ClassScanner
`public class ClassScanner` - Class Scanner - Scans classes in specified packages / 类扫描器 - 扫描指定包下的类

- `public static ClassScanner of(String basePackage)` - Create scanner for single package / 为单个包创建扫描器
- `public static ClassScanner of(String... basePackages)` - Create scanner for multiple packages / 为多个包创建扫描器
- `public static ClassScanner of(ClassLoader classLoader, String basePackage)` - Create scanner with classloader / 使用类加载器创建扫描器
- `public ClassScanner includeJars(boolean include)` - Set whether to include JAR files / 设置是否包含 JAR 文件
- `public ClassScanner includeInnerClasses(boolean include)` - Set whether to include inner classes / 设置是否包含内部类
- `public ClassScanner parallel(boolean parallel)` - Set parallel scanning / 设置并行扫描
- `public ClassScanner excludePackage(String packageName)` - Add excluded package / 添加排除包
- `public ClassScanner classLoader(ClassLoader classLoader)` - Set class loader / 设置类加载器
- `public Set<Class<?>> scan()` - Scan all classes / 扫描所有类
- `public Set<Class<?>> scan(ScanFilter filter)` - Scan with filter / 使用过滤器扫描
- `public Set<Class<?>> scanWithAnnotation(Class<? extends Annotation> annotation)` - Scan for classes with annotation / 扫描带注解的类
- `public <T> Set<Class<? extends T>> scanSubTypes(Class<T> superType)` - Scan for subtypes / 扫描子类型
- `public <T> Set<Class<? extends T>> scanImplementations(Class<T> interfaceType)` - Scan for interface implementations / 扫描接口实现
- `public Stream<Class<?>> stream()` - Return class stream (lazy loading) / 返回类流（懒加载）
- `public Stream<String> classNameStream()` - Return class name stream (without loading) / 返回类名流（不加载类）

### PackageScanner
`public class PackageScanner` - Package Scanner - Scans package structure / 包扫描器 - 扫描包结构

- `public static PackageScanner of(String basePackage)` - Create package scanner / 创建包扫描器
- `public PackageScanner classLoader(ClassLoader classLoader)` - Set class loader / 设置类加载器
- `public PackageScanner useVirtualThreads(boolean useVirtualThreads)` - Enable virtual threads for parallel scanning / 启用虚拟线程进行并行扫描
- `public Set<String> findSubPackages()` - Find all sub-packages / 查找所有子包
- `public List<Class<?>> findClasses()` - Find all classes in package (non-recursive) / 查找包中的所有类（非递归）
- `public List<Class<?>> findClasses(boolean recursive)` - Find all classes in package / 查找包中的所有类
- `public List<String> findClassNames(boolean recursive)` - Find all class names in package / 查找包中的所有类名
- `public boolean exists()` - Check if package exists / 检查包是否存在
- `public String getBasePackage()` - Get base package name / 获取基础包名

### ScanFilter
`public interface ScanFilter` - Scan Filter - Filter interface for class scanning / 扫描过滤器 - 类扫描的过滤器接口

## 34. opencode-base-test

测试工具组件，提供断言、Mock、测试数据生成、基准测试

### OpenAssert
`public final class OpenAssert` - Assertion Entry Class - Provides comprehensive assertion methods / 断言入口类 - 提供...

- `public static void assertTrue(boolean condition)` - Asserts that condition is true / 断言条件为真
- `public static void assertTrue(boolean condition, String message)` - Asserts that condition is true with message / 断言条件为真（带消息）
- `public static void assertTrue(boolean condition, Supplier<String> messageSupplier)` - Asserts that condition is true with lazy message / 断言条件为真（延迟消息）
- `public static void assertFalse(boolean condition)` - Asserts that condition is false / 断言条件为假
- `public static void assertFalse(boolean condition, String message)` - Asserts that condition is false with message / 断言条件为假（带消息）
- `public static void assertNull(Object obj)` - Asserts that object is null / 断言对象为null
- `public static void assertNull(Object obj, String message)` - Asserts that object is null with message / 断言对象为null（带消息）
- `public static void assertNotNull(Object obj)` - Asserts that object is not null / 断言对象不为null
- `public static void assertNotNull(Object obj, String message)` - Asserts that object is not null with message / 断言对象不为null（带消息）
- `public static void assertEquals(Object expected, Object actual)` - Asserts that objects are equal / 断言对象相等
- `public static void assertEquals(Object expected, Object actual, String message)` - Asserts that objects are equal with message / 断言对象相等（带消息）
- `public static void assertNotEquals(Object unexpected, Object actual)` - Asserts that objects are not equal / 断言对象不相等
- `public static void assertSame(Object expected, Object actual)` - Asserts that objects are the same instance / 断言对象是相同实例
- `public static void assertNotSame(Object unexpected, Object actual)` - Asserts that objects are not the same instance / 断言对象不是相同实例
- `public static void assertEquals(double expected, double actual, double delta)` - Asserts that doubles are equal within delta / 断言双精度数在误差范围内相等
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> void assertGreaterThan(T actual, T expected)` - Asserts that actual is greater than expected / 断言实际值大于期望值
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> void assertLessThan(T actual, T expected)` - Asserts that actual is less than expected / 断言实际值小于期望值
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> void assertBetween(T actual, T min, T max)` - Asserts that actual is between min and max (inclusive) / 断言实际值在最小值和最大值之间（包含）
- `public static void assertEmpty(Collection<?> collection)` - Asserts that collection is empty / 断言集合为空
- `public static void assertNotEmpty(Collection<?> collection)` - Asserts that collection is not empty / 断言集合不为空
- `public static void assertSize(int expected, Collection<?> collection)` - Asserts collection size / 断言集合大小
- `public static void assertContains(Object element, Collection<?> collection)` - Asserts that collection contains element / 断言集合包含元素
- `public static void assertEmpty(Map<?, ?> map)` - Asserts that map is empty / 断言映射为空
- `public static void assertContainsKey(Object key, Map<?, ?> map)` - Asserts that map contains key / 断言映射包含键
- `public static void assertBlank(String str)` - Asserts that string is blank / 断言字符串为空白
- `public static void assertNotBlank(String str)` - Asserts that string is not blank / 断言字符串不为空白
- `public static void assertContains(String expected, String actual)` - Asserts that string contains substring / 断言字符串包含子串
- `public static void assertStartsWith(String prefix, String actual)` - Asserts that string starts with prefix / 断言字符串以前缀开始
- `public static void assertEndsWith(String suffix, String actual)` - Asserts that string ends with suffix / 断言字符串以后缀结束
- `public static void assertMatches(String regex, String actual)` - Asserts that string matches regex / 断言字符串匹配正则表达式
- `public static <T extends Throwable> T assertThrows(Class<T> expectedType, Executable executable)` - Asserts that executable throws expected exception / 断言可执行对象抛出预期异常
- `public static void assertDoesNotThrow(Executable executable)` - Asserts that executable does not throw / 断言可执行对象不抛出异常
- `public static void assertTimeout(Duration timeout, Executable executable)` - Asserts that executable completes within timeout / 断言可执行对象在超时内完成
- `public static void fail()` - Fails unconditionally / 无条件失败
- `public static void fail(String message)` - Fails unconditionally with message / 无条件失败（带消息）

### OpenData
`public final class OpenData` - Test Data Generation Entry Class - Provides test data generation capabilities...

- `public static int randomInt()` - Generates random int / 生成随机整数
- `public static int randomInt(int bound)` - Generates random int up to bound (exclusive) / 生成随机整数（不包含上界）
- `public static int randomInt(int min, int max)` - Generates random int in range / 生成范围内随机整数
- `public static long randomLong()` - Generates random long / 生成随机长整数
- `public static long randomLong(long min, long max)` - Generates random long in range / 生成范围内随机长整数
- `public static double randomDouble()` - Generates random double (0.0 to 1.0) / 生成随机双精度数（0.0到1.0）
- `public static double randomDouble(double min, double max)` - Generates random double in range / 生成范围内随机双精度数
- `public static boolean randomBoolean()` - Generates random boolean / 生成随机布尔值
- `public static String randomString(int length)` - Generates random alphanumeric string / 生成随机字母数字字符串
- `public static String randomString(int length, String characters)` - Generates random string from character set / 从字符集生成随机字符串
- `public static String randomAlphabetic(int length)` - Generates random alphabetic string (letters only) / 生成随机字母字符串（仅字母）
- `public static String randomNumeric(int length)` - Generates random numeric string (digits only) / 生成随机数字字符串（仅数字）
- `public static String uuid()` - Generates random UUID / 生成随机UUID
- `public static float randomFloat()` - Generates random float (0.0 to 1.0) / 生成随机浮点数（0.0到1.0）
- `public static float randomFloat(float min, float max)` - Generates random float in range / 生成范围内随机浮点数
- `public static byte[] randomBytes(int length)` - Generates random bytes / 生成随机字节数组
- `public static String randomHex(int length)` - Generates random hex string / 生成随机十六进制字符串
- `public static String chineseName()` - Generates random Chinese name / 生成随机中文姓名
- `public static String englishName()` - Generates random English name / 生成随机英文姓名
- `public static String email()` - Generates random email address / 生成随机电子邮件地址
- `public static String phone()` - Generates random Chinese phone number / 生成随机中国手机号
- `public static String city()` - Generates random city name / 生成随机城市名
- `public static int age(int min, int max)` - Generates random age in range / 生成范围内随机年龄
- `public static LocalDate pastDate(int daysBack)` - Generates random date in past / 生成过去的随机日期
- `public static LocalDate futureDate(int daysForward)` - Generates random date in future / 生成未来的随机日期
- `public static LocalDateTime pastDateTime(int hoursBack)` - Generates random datetime in past / 生成过去的随机日期时间
- `public static LocalDate birthday(int minAge, int maxAge)` - Generates random birthday for age range / 为年龄范围生成随机生日
- `public static LocalDate randomDate(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)` - Generates random date between start and end (inclusive) / 生成开始和结束日期之间的随机日期（包含）
- `public static LocalDateTime randomDateTime()` - Generates random datetime / 生成随机日期时间
- `public static LocalDateTime randomDateTime(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)` - Generates random datetime between start and end / 生成开始和结束日期时间之间的随机日期时间
- `public static BigDecimal randomMoney()` - Generates random money amount (0.00 to 10000.00) / 生成随机金额（0.00到10000.00）
- `public static BigDecimal randomMoney(double min, double max)` - Generates random money amount in range / 生成范围内的随机金额
- `public static BigDecimal randomPrice(int min, int max)` - Generates random price (formatted as X.99 or X.00) / 生成随机价格（格式为X.99或X.00）
- `public static <T> T pick(T[] array)` - Picks random element from array / 从数组中随机选择元素
- `public static <T> T pick(List<T> list)` - Picks random element from list / 从列表中随机选择元素
- `public static <T> T pick(Collection<T> collection)` - Picks random element from collection / 从集合中随机选择元素
- `public static <T> List<T> pickMany(List<T> list, int count)` - Picks random multiple elements from list / 从列表中随机选择多个元素
- `public static <T> List<T> shuffle(List<T> list)` - Shuffles list randomly / 随机打乱列表
- `public static <T> List<T> listOf(int count, Supplier<T> supplier)` - Generates list with random data / 生成包含随机数据的列表
- `public static void withSeed(long seed, Runnable action)` - Executes with seeded random for reproducibility / 使用种子随机执行以实现可重复性
- `public static <T> T withSeed(long seed, Supplier<T> supplier)` - Executes with seeded random and returns result / 使用种子随机执行并返回结果

### OpenMock

### ResourceLoader
`public final class ResourceLoader` - Resource Loader - Test resource loading utility / 资源加载器 - 测试资源加载工具

- `public static String loadString(String resourcePath)` - Loads a resource as a string using UTF-8 encoding. / 使用 UTF-8 编码将资源加载为字符串。
- `public static String loadString(String resourcePath, Charset charset)` - Loads a resource as a string with specified charset. / 使用指定字符集将资源加载为字符串。
- `public static Optional<String> loadStringOptional(String resourcePath)` - Loads a resource as a string, returning Optional. / 将资源加载为字符串，返回 Optional。
- `public static List<String> loadLines(String resourcePath)` - Loads a resource as a list of lines. / 将资源加载为行列表。
- `public static List<String> loadLines(String resourcePath, Charset charset)` - Loads a resource as a list of lines with specified charset. / 使用指定字符集将资源加载为行列表。
- `public static byte[] loadBytes(String resourcePath)` - Loads a resource as a byte array. / 将资源加载为字节数组。
- `public static Properties loadProperties(String resourcePath)` - Loads a properties file. / 加载属性文件。
- `public static InputStream getResourceStream(String resourcePath)` - Gets an InputStream for the resource. / 获取资源的输入流。
- `public static Optional<URL> getResourceURL(String resourcePath)` - Gets the URL for the resource. / 获取资源的 URL。
- `public static boolean exists(String resourcePath)` - Checks if a resource exists. / 检查资源是否存在。
- `public static String loadFile(Path path)` - Loads a file from filesystem as string. / 从文件系统加载文件为字符串。
- `public static String loadFile(Path path, Charset charset)` - Loads a file from filesystem as string with charset. / 使用字符集从文件系统加载文件为字符串。
- `public static List<String> loadFileLines(Path path)` - Loads file lines from filesystem. / 从文件系统加载文件行。
- `public static byte[] loadFileBytes(Path path)` - Loads file bytes from filesystem. / 从文件系统加载文件字节。

### TestContext
`public final class TestContext` - Test Context - ScopedValue-based Test Execution Context / 测试上下文 - 基于 ScopedVa...

- `public static final ScopedValue<TestContext> CURRENT = ScopedValue.newInstance();` - Current test context (ScopedValue) / 当前测试上下文 (ScopedValue)
- `public static TestContext create(String testName)` - Creates a new test context with test name / 使用测试名称创建新的测试上下文
- `public static TestContext create()` - Creates a new test context with default name / 使用默认名称创建新的测试上下文
- `public static <T, X extends Throwable> T run(TestContext context, CallableOp<T, X> task)` - Runs a callable within this context / 在此上下文中运行可调用对象
- `public static void run(TestContext context, Runnable task)` - Runs a runnable within this context / 在此上下文中运行可运行对象
- `public static Optional<TestContext> current()` - Gets the current test context / 获取当前测试上下文
- `public static TestContext currentOrCreate()` - Gets the current context or creates a new one / 获取当前上下文或创建新的
- `public static TestContext currentOrCreate(String testName)` - Gets the current context or creates one with specified name / 获取当前上下文或使用指定名称创建新的
- `public TestContext setVariable(String key, Object value)` - Sets a variable in the context / 在上下文中设置变量
- `public <T> Optional<T> getVariable(String key)` - Gets a variable from the context / 从上下文中获取变量
- `public <T> T getVariable(String key, T defaultValue)` - Gets a variable with default value / 获取变量，带默认值
- `public boolean hasVariable(String key)` - Checks if a variable exists / 检查变量是否存在
- `public TestContext removeVariable(String key)` - Removes a variable from the context / 从上下文中移除变量
- `public Map<String, Object> variables()` - Gets all variables as unmodifiable map / 获取所有变量（不可修改的映射）
- `public TestContext setAttribute(String key, Object value)` - Sets an attribute (metadata) in the context / 在上下文中设置属性（元数据）
- `public <T> Optional<T> getAttribute(String key)` - Gets an attribute from the context / 从上下文中获取属性
- `public <T> T getAttribute(String key, T defaultValue)` - Gets an attribute with default value / 获取属性，带默认值
- `public boolean hasAttribute(String key)` - Checks if an attribute exists / 检查属性是否存在
- `public Map<String, Object> attributes()` - Gets all attributes as unmodifiable map / 获取所有属性（不可修改的映射）
- `public TestContext onSuccess(Consumer<TestContext> callback)` - Registers a success callback / 注册成功回调
- `public TestContext onFailure(FailureCallback callback)` - Registers a failure callback / 注册失败回调
- `public String testName()` - Gets the test name / 获取测试名称
- `public Instant startTime()` - Gets the start time / 获取开始时间
- `public Optional<Instant> endTime()` - Gets the end time if test has completed / 获取结束时间（如果测试已完成）
- `public Duration duration()` - Gets the test duration / 获取测试持续时间
- `public String status()` - Gets the test status / 获取测试状态
- `public boolean isPassed()` - Checks if test passed / 检查测试是否通过
- `public boolean isFailed()` - Checks if test failed / 检查测试是否失败
- `public Optional<Throwable> exception()` - Gets the failure exception if test failed / 获取失败异常（如果测试失败）
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### AssertionResult
`public sealed interface AssertionResult` - Assertion Result - Sealed interface for assertion results / 断言结果 - 断言结果的密封接口


### CollectionAssert
`public final class CollectionAssert<E>` - Collection Assert - Fluent assertions for collections / 集合断言 - 集合的流式断言

- `public static <E> CollectionAssert<E> assertThat(Collection<E> actual)` - Creates assertion for collection. / 为集合创建断言。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> isNull()` - Asserts that collection is null. / 断言集合为null。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> isNotNull()` - Asserts that collection is not null. / 断言集合不为null。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> isEmpty()` - Asserts that collection is empty. / 断言集合为空。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> isNotEmpty()` - Asserts that collection is not empty. / 断言集合不为空。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> hasSize(int expectedSize)` - Asserts that collection has specified size. / 断言集合有指定大小。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> hasSizeGreaterThan(int size)` - Asserts that collection has size greater than. / 断言集合大小大于。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> hasSizeLessThan(int size)` - Asserts that collection has size less than. / 断言集合大小小于。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> contains(E element)` - Asserts that collection contains element. / 断言集合包含元素。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> doesNotContain(E element)` - Asserts that collection does not contain element. / 断言集合不包含元素。
- `public final CollectionAssert<E> containsAll(E... elements)` - Asserts that collection contains all elements. / 断言集合包含所有元素。
- `public final CollectionAssert<E> containsExactly(E... elements)` - Asserts that collection contains exactly the given elements. / 断言集合恰好包含给定元素。
- `public final CollectionAssert<E> containsExactlyInAnyOrder(E... elements)` - Asserts that collection contains exactly the given elements in any order. / 断...
- `public CollectionAssert<E> allMatch(Predicate<E> predicate)` - Asserts that collection contains only elements matching predicate. / 断言集合只包含匹...
- `public CollectionAssert<E> anyMatch(Predicate<E> predicate)` - Asserts that collection contains any element matching predicate. / 断言集合包含任何匹配...
- `public CollectionAssert<E> noneMatch(Predicate<E> predicate)` - Asserts that collection contains no element matching predicate. / 断言集合不包含匹配谓词...
- `public CollectionAssert<E> hasNoDuplicates()` - Asserts that collection has no duplicates. / 断言集合没有重复元素。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> isSorted(Comparator<E> comparator)` - Asserts that collection is sorted. / 断言集合已排序。
- `public CollectionAssert<E> isEqualTo(Collection<E> expected)` - Asserts that collection equals another. / 断言集合等于另一个。

### ExceptionAssert
`public final class ExceptionAssert` - Exception Assert - Fluent assertions for exceptions / 异常断言 - 异常的流式断言

- `public static ExceptionAssert assertThatThrownBy(ThrowableRunner runner)` - Creates assertion expecting exception to be thrown. / 创建期望抛出异常的断言。
- `public static ExceptionAssert assertThat(Throwable throwable)` - Creates assertion for exception. / 为异常创建断言。
- `public static ExceptionAssert assertThatCode(ThrowableRunner runner)` - Creates assertion for code that should not throw. / 创建不应抛出异常的代码的断言。
- `public ExceptionAssert doesNotThrowAnyException()` - Asserts that no exception is thrown. / 断言不抛出异常。
- `public ExceptionAssert isInstanceOf(Class<? extends Throwable> expectedType)` - Asserts that exception is instance of. / 断言异常是指定类型。
- `public ExceptionAssert isExactlyInstanceOf(Class<? extends Throwable> expectedType)` - Asserts that exception is exactly of type. / 断言异常恰好是指定类型。
- `public ExceptionAssert hasMessage(String expectedMessage)` - Asserts that exception has message. / 断言异常有指定消息。
- `public ExceptionAssert hasMessageContaining(String substring)` - Asserts that exception message contains. / 断言异常消息包含。
- `public ExceptionAssert hasMessageStartingWith(String prefix)` - Asserts that exception message starts with. / 断言异常消息以...开始。
- `public ExceptionAssert hasMessageEndingWith(String suffix)` - Asserts that exception message ends with. / 断言异常消息以...结束。
- `public ExceptionAssert hasCause()` - Asserts that exception has cause. / 断言异常有原因。
- `public ExceptionAssert hasNoCause()` - Asserts that exception has no cause. / 断言异常没有原因。
- `public ExceptionAssert hasCauseInstanceOf(Class<? extends Throwable> causeType)` - Asserts that exception has cause of type. / 断言异常有指定类型的原因。
- `public ExceptionAssert hasRootCauseInstanceOf(Class<? extends Throwable> rootCauseType)` - Asserts that exception has root cause of type. / 断言异常有指定类型的根原因。
- `public <T extends Throwable> T getThrowable()` - Gets the thrown exception for further inspection. / 获取抛出的异常以进行进一步检查。

### JsonAssert
`public final class JsonAssert` - JSON Assert - Fluent assertions for JSON strings / JSON断言 - JSON字符串的流式断言

- `public static JsonAssert assertThat(String actual)` - Creates assertion for JSON string. / 为JSON字符串创建断言。
- `public JsonAssert isNull()` - Asserts that JSON is null. / 断言JSON为null。
- `public JsonAssert isNotNull()` - Asserts that JSON is not null. / 断言JSON不为null。
- `public JsonAssert isValidJson()` - Asserts that string is valid JSON. / 断言字符串是有效的JSON。
- `public JsonAssert isJsonObject()` - Asserts that JSON is an object. / 断言JSON是对象。
- `public JsonAssert isJsonArray()` - Asserts that JSON is an array. / 断言JSON是数组。
- `public JsonAssert containsKey(String key)` - Asserts that JSON contains key. / 断言JSON包含键。
- `public JsonAssert doesNotContainKey(String key)` - Asserts that JSON does not contain key. / 断言JSON不包含键。
- `public JsonAssert containsValue(String value)` - Asserts that JSON contains string value. / 断言JSON包含字符串值。
- `public JsonAssert hasKeyValue(String key, String value)` - Asserts that JSON has key-value pair. / 断言JSON有键值对。
- `public JsonAssert hasKeyValue(String key, Number value)` - Asserts that JSON has key-value pair with number. / 断言JSON有数值键值对。
- `public JsonAssert hasKeyValue(String key, boolean value)` - Asserts that JSON has key-value pair with boolean. / 断言JSON有布尔键值对。
- `public JsonAssert hasNullValue(String key)` - Asserts that JSON has null value for key. / 断言JSON的键值为null。
- `public JsonAssert isEqualTo(String expected)` - Asserts that JSON equals another JSON (ignoring whitespace). / 断言JSON等于另一个JSO...
- `public JsonAssert hasLength(int length)` - Asserts that JSON has specified length. / 断言JSON有指定长度。
- `public JsonAssert isEmptyObject()` - Asserts that JSON is empty object. / 断言JSON是空对象。
- `public JsonAssert isEmptyArray()` - Asserts that JSON is empty array. / 断言JSON是空数组。

### NumberAssert
`public final class NumberAssert<T` - Number Assert - Fluent assertions for numbers / 数值断言 - 数值的流式断言

- `public static <T extends Number & Comparable<T>> NumberAssert<T> assertThat(T actual)` - Creates assertion for number. / 为数值创建断言。
- `public static NumberAssert<Integer> assertThat(int actual)` - Creates assertion for int. / 为int创建断言。
- `public static NumberAssert<Long> assertThat(long actual)` - Creates assertion for long. / 为long创建断言。
- `public static NumberAssert<Double> assertThat(double actual)` - Creates assertion for double. / 为double创建断言。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isNull()` - Asserts that number is null. / 断言数值为null。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isNotNull()` - Asserts that number is not null. / 断言数值不为null。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isEqualTo(T expected)` - Asserts that number equals another. / 断言数值等于另一个。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isZero()` - Asserts that number is zero. / 断言数值为零。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isNotZero()` - Asserts that number is not zero. / 断言数值不为零。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isPositive()` - Asserts that number is positive. / 断言数值为正。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isNegative()` - Asserts that number is negative. / 断言数值为负。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isNotNegative()` - Asserts that number is not negative. / 断言数值非负。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isNotPositive()` - Asserts that number is not positive. / 断言数值非正。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isGreaterThan(T other)` - Asserts that number is greater than. / 断言数值大于。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(T other)` - Asserts that number is greater than or equal to. / 断言数值大于等于。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isLessThan(T other)` - Asserts that number is less than. / 断言数值小于。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isLessThanOrEqualTo(T other)` - Asserts that number is less than or equal to. / 断言数值小于等于。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isBetween(T start, T end)` - Asserts that number is between (inclusive). / 断言数值在范围内（包含边界）。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isStrictlyBetween(T start, T end)` - Asserts that number is strictly between (exclusive). / 断言数值在范围内（不包含边界）。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isCloseTo(T expected, T offset)` - Asserts that number is close to with offset. / 断言数值接近（带偏移量）。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isEven()` - Asserts that number is even. / 断言数值为偶数。
- `public NumberAssert<T> isOdd()` - Asserts that number is odd. / 断言数值为奇数。

- `public static <T> ObjectAssertion<T> assertThat(T actual)`

### SoftAssert
`public final class SoftAssert` - Soft Assert - Collects assertion failures without throwing immediately / 软断言 ...

- `public SoftAssert()` - Creates a new SoftAssert instance / 创建新的SoftAssert实例
- `public SoftAssert isNull(Object actual)` - Asserts that the object is null / 断言对象为null
- `public SoftAssert isNull(Object actual, String message)` - Asserts that the object is null with custom message / 断言对象为null（带自定义消息）
- `public SoftAssert isNull(Object actual, Supplier<String> messageSupplier)` - Asserts that the object is null with lazy message / 断言对象为null（带延迟消息）
- `public SoftAssert isNotNull(Object actual)` - Asserts that the object is not null / 断言对象不为null
- `public SoftAssert isNotNull(Object actual, String message)` - Asserts that the object is not null with custom message / 断言对象不为null（带自定义消息）
- `public SoftAssert isNotNull(Object actual, Supplier<String> messageSupplier)` - Asserts that the object is not null with lazy message / 断言对象不为null（带延迟消息）
- `public SoftAssert isEqualTo(Object expected, Object actual)` - Asserts that two objects are equal / 断言两个对象相等
- `public SoftAssert isEqualTo(Object expected, Object actual, String message)` - Asserts that two objects are equal with custom message / 断言两个对象相等（带自定义消息）
- `public SoftAssert isEqualTo(Object expected, Object actual, Supplier<String> messageSupplier)` - Asserts that two objects are equal with lazy message / 断言两个对象相等（带延迟消息）
- `public SoftAssert isNotEqualTo(Object unexpected, Object actual)` - Asserts that two objects are not equal / 断言两个对象不相等
- `public SoftAssert isNotEqualTo(Object unexpected, Object actual, String message)` - Asserts that two objects are not equal with custom message / 断言两个对象不相等（带自定义消息）
- `public SoftAssert isNotEqualTo(Object unexpected, Object actual, Supplier<String> messageSupplier)` - Asserts that two objects are not equal with lazy message / 断言两个对象不相等（带延迟消息）
- `public SoftAssert isTrue(boolean condition)` - Asserts that the condition is true / 断言条件为真
- `public SoftAssert isTrue(boolean condition, String message)` - Asserts that the condition is true with custom message / 断言条件为真（带自定义消息）
- `public SoftAssert isTrue(boolean condition, Supplier<String> messageSupplier)` - Asserts that the condition is true with lazy message / 断言条件为真（带延迟消息）
- `public SoftAssert isFalse(boolean condition)` - Asserts that the condition is false / 断言条件为假
- `public SoftAssert isFalse(boolean condition, String message)` - Asserts that the condition is false with custom message / 断言条件为假（带自定义消息）
- `public SoftAssert isFalse(boolean condition, Supplier<String> messageSupplier)` - Asserts that the condition is false with lazy message / 断言条件为假（带延迟消息）
- `public SoftAssert isEmpty(String actual)` - Asserts that the string is empty / 断言字符串为空
- `public SoftAssert isEmpty(String actual, String message)` - Asserts that the string is empty with custom message / 断言字符串为空（带自定义消息）
- `public SoftAssert isNotEmpty(String actual)` - Asserts that the string is not empty / 断言字符串不为空
- `public SoftAssert isNotEmpty(String actual, String message)` - Asserts that the string is not empty with custom message / 断言字符串不为空（带自定义消息）
- `public SoftAssert contains(String actual, String substring)` - Asserts that the string contains the substring / 断言字符串包含子串
- `public SoftAssert contains(String actual, String substring, String message)` - Asserts that the string contains the substring with custom message / 断言字符串包含子...
- `public SoftAssert startsWith(String actual, String prefix)` - Asserts that the string starts with the prefix / 断言字符串以前缀开始
- `public SoftAssert startsWith(String actual, String prefix, String message)` - Asserts that the string starts with the prefix with custom message / 断言字符串以前缀...
- `public SoftAssert endsWith(String actual, String suffix)` - Asserts that the string ends with the suffix / 断言字符串以后缀结束
- `public SoftAssert endsWith(String actual, String suffix, String message)` - Asserts that the string ends with the suffix with custom message / 断言字符串以后缀结束...
- `public SoftAssert isGreaterThan(Number actual, Number expected)` - Asserts that the actual number is greater than the expected / 断言实际数值大于期望值
- `public SoftAssert isGreaterThan(Number actual, Number expected, String message)` - Asserts that the actual number is greater than the expected with custom messa...
- `public SoftAssert isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(Number actual, Number expected)` - Asserts that the actual number is greater than or equal to the expected / 断言实...
- `public SoftAssert isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(Number actual, Number expected, String message)` - Asserts that the actual number is greater than or equal to the expected with ...
- `public SoftAssert isLessThan(Number actual, Number expected)` - Asserts that the actual number is less than the expected / 断言实际数值小于期望值
- `public SoftAssert isLessThan(Number actual, Number expected, String message)` - Asserts that the actual number is less than the expected with custom message ...
- `public SoftAssert isLessThanOrEqualTo(Number actual, Number expected)` - Asserts that the actual number is less than or equal to the expected / 断言实际数值...
- `public SoftAssert isLessThanOrEqualTo(Number actual, Number expected, String message)` - Asserts that the actual number is less than or equal to the expected with cus...
- `public SoftAssert isBetween(Number actual, Number min, Number max)` - Asserts that the actual number is between min and max (inclusive) / 断言实际数值在最小...
- `public SoftAssert isBetween(Number actual, Number min, Number max, String message)` - Asserts that the actual number is between min and max (inclusive) with custom...
- `public void assertAll()` - Asserts all collected assertions, throwing if any failed / 断言所有收集的断言，如果有任何失败则抛出
- `public void assertAll(String heading)` - Asserts all collected assertions with a custom header message / 断言所有收集的断言（带自定...
- `public boolean hasFailures()` - Checks if there are any collected failures / 检查是否有任何收集的失败
- `public int getFailureCount()` - Gets the count of collected failures / 获取收集的失败数量
- `public List<AssertionError> getFailures()` - Gets an unmodifiable list of collected failures / 获取收集的失败的不可修改列表
- `public SoftAssert reset()` - Resets the soft assert by clearing all collected failures / 通过清除所有收集的失败来重置软断言
- `public String toString()` - Returns a string representation of this SoftAssert / 返回此SoftAssert的字符串表示

### StringAssert
`public final class StringAssert` - String Assert - Fluent assertions for strings / 字符串断言 - 字符串的流式断言

- `public static StringAssert assertThat(String actual)` - Creates assertion for string. / 为字符串创建断言。
- `public StringAssert isNull()` - Asserts that string is null. / 断言字符串为null。
- `public StringAssert isNotNull()` - Asserts that string is not null. / 断言字符串不为null。
- `public StringAssert isEmpty()` - Asserts that string is empty. / 断言字符串为空。
- `public StringAssert isNotEmpty()` - Asserts that string is not empty. / 断言字符串不为空。
- `public StringAssert isBlank()` - Asserts that string is blank. / 断言字符串为空白。
- `public StringAssert isNotBlank()` - Asserts that string is not blank. / 断言字符串不为空白。
- `public StringAssert hasLength(int length)` - Asserts that string has specified length. / 断言字符串有指定长度。
- `public StringAssert hasLengthBetween(int min, int max)` - Asserts that string has length between. / 断言字符串长度在范围内。
- `public StringAssert isEqualTo(String expected)` - Asserts that string equals another. / 断言字符串等于另一个。
- `public StringAssert isEqualToIgnoringCase(String expected)` - Asserts that string equals another ignoring case. / 断言字符串等于另一个（忽略大小写）。
- `public StringAssert contains(String substring)` - Asserts that string contains substring. / 断言字符串包含子字符串。
- `public StringAssert doesNotContain(String substring)` - Asserts that string does not contain substring. / 断言字符串不包含子字符串。
- `public StringAssert startsWith(String prefix)` - Asserts that string starts with prefix. / 断言字符串以前缀开始。
- `public StringAssert endsWith(String suffix)` - Asserts that string ends with suffix. / 断言字符串以后缀结束。
- `public StringAssert matches(String regex)` - Asserts that string matches regex. / 断言字符串匹配正则表达式。
- `public StringAssert matches(Pattern pattern)` - Asserts that string matches pattern. / 断言字符串匹配模式。
- `public StringAssert containsOnlyDigits()` - Asserts that string contains only digits. / 断言字符串只包含数字。
- `public StringAssert containsOnlyLetters()` - Asserts that string contains only letters. / 断言字符串只包含字母。
- `public StringAssert isUpperCase()` - Asserts that string is all uppercase. / 断言字符串全部大写。
- `public StringAssert isLowerCase()` - Asserts that string is all lowercase. / 断言字符串全部小写。
- `public StringAssert isEqualToIgnoringWhitespace(String expected)` - Asserts that trimmed strings are equal. / 断言去除空白后的字符串相等。

### Benchmark
`public final class Benchmark` - Benchmark / 基准测试

- `public static Duration time(Runnable runnable)` - Measure execution time of runnable / 测量可运行对象的执行时间
- `public static <T> TimedResult<T> time(Supplier<T> supplier)` - Measure execution time with result / 测量带结果的执行时间
- `public static BenchmarkResult run(String name, Runnable runnable, int warmupIterations, int measureIterations)` - Run benchmark with warmup and iterations / 运行带预热和迭代的基准测试
- `public static BenchmarkResult run(String name, Runnable runnable)` - Run benchmark with defaults / 使用默认值运行基准测试
- `public static ComparisonResult compare(String name1, Runnable runnable1, String name2, Runnable runnable2)` - Compare two implementations / 比较两个实现
- `public record TimedResult<T>(T result, Duration duration)` - Timed result / 计时结果
- `public record ComparisonResult(BenchmarkResult first, BenchmarkResult second)` - Comparison result / 比较结果

### BenchmarkResult
`public record BenchmarkResult(String name, long[] timesNanos)` - Benchmark Result - Immutable result of a benchmark run / 基准测试结果 - 基准测试运行的不可变结果

- `public int iterations()` - Gets the number of iterations. / 获取迭代次数。
- `public double averageMs()` - Gets the average time in milliseconds. / 获取平均时间（毫秒）。
- `public double averageNanos()` - Gets the average time in nanoseconds. / 获取平均时间（纳秒）。
- `public double minMs()` - Gets the minimum time in milliseconds. / 获取最小时间（毫秒）。
- `public double maxMs()` - Gets the maximum time in milliseconds. / 获取最大时间（毫秒）。
- `public double percentileMs(int percentile)` - Gets the percentile time in milliseconds. / 获取百分位时间（毫秒）。
- `public double medianMs()` - Gets the median time in milliseconds. / 获取中位数时间（毫秒）。
- `public double p95Ms()` - Gets the 95th percentile time in milliseconds. / 获取第95百分位时间（毫秒）。
- `public double p99Ms()` - Gets the 99th percentile time in milliseconds. / 获取第99百分位时间（毫秒）。
- `public long totalMs()` - Gets the total time in milliseconds. / 获取总时间（毫秒）。
- `public double throughputPerSecond()` - Gets the throughput (operations per second). / 获取吞吐量（每秒操作数）。
- `public double stdDevMs()` - Gets the standard deviation in milliseconds. / 获取标准差（毫秒）。
- `public String summary()` - Returns a formatted summary string. / 返回格式化的摘要字符串。
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### BenchmarkRunner
`public final class BenchmarkRunner` - Benchmark Runner - Configurable benchmark test runner / 基准测试运行器 - 可配置的基准测试运行器

- `public static BenchmarkRunner create()` - Creates new benchmark runner. / 创建新的基准测试运行器。
- `public static BenchmarkResult runSingle(String name, Runnable runnable)` - Creates and runs single benchmark. / 创建并运行单个基准测试。
- `public BenchmarkRunner warmup(int iterations)` - Sets warmup iterations. / 设置预热迭代次数。
- `public BenchmarkRunner iterations(int iterations)` - Sets measure iterations. / 设置测量迭代次数。
- `public BenchmarkRunner timeout(Duration timeout)` - Sets timeout for each benchmark. / 设置每个基准测试的超时时间。
- `public BenchmarkRunner output(PrintStream output)` - Sets output stream. / 设置输出流。
- `public BenchmarkRunner verbose()` - Enables verbose output. / 启用详细输出。
- `public BenchmarkRunner add(String name, Runnable runnable)` - Adds benchmark. / 添加基准测试。
- `public <T> BenchmarkRunner add(String name, Callable<T> callable)` - Adds benchmark with return value (result ignored). / 添加带返回值的基准测试（忽略结果）。
- `public List<BenchmarkResult> run()` - Runs all benchmarks. / 运行所有基准测试。
- `public List<BenchmarkResult> getResults()` - Gets the results (must call run() first). / 获取结果（必须先调用run()）。
- `public BenchmarkRunner printResults()` - Prints results to output stream. / 将结果打印到输出流。
- `public BenchmarkRunner printComparison()` - Prints comparison of results. / 打印结果比较。
- `public BenchmarkRunner onComplete(Consumer<List<BenchmarkResult>> consumer)` - Executes callback with results. / 使用结果执行回调。

`public final class ConcurrentTester` - Concurrent Tester / 并发测试器

- `public static ConcurrentResult runConcurrently(Runnable task, int threads, int iterations)` - Run task concurrently / 并发运行任务
- `public static ConcurrentResult runConcurrently(Consumer<Integer> task, int threads)` - Run task concurrently with index / 带索引并发运行任务
- `public static void assertThreadSafe(Runnable task, int threads, int iterations)` - Assert task is thread-safe / 断言任务是线程安全的
- `public record ConcurrentResult(` - Concurrent test result / 并发测试结果

`public final class ThreadSafetyChecker`

- `public static CheckResult checkCounter(` - Check if a counter is thread-safe / 检查计数器是否线程安全
- `public static boolean isThreadSafe(Runnable operation, int threads, int iterations)` - Check if object operations are thread-safe / 检查对象操作是否线程安全
- `public record CheckResult(boolean passed, int expected, int actual, int difference)` - Check result / 检查结果

- `public long nextLong()` - Returns a random long. / 返回随机长整数。
- `public long nextLong(long bound)` - Returns a random long between 0 and bound. / 返回0到边界之间的随机长整数。
- `public double nextDouble()` - Returns a random double between 0.0 and 1.0. / 返回0.0到1.0之间的随机双精度数。

- `public boolean nextBoolean(double trueProbability)` - Returns a random boolean with specified true probability. / 返回带指定真概率的随机布尔值。
- `public String nextString(int length)` - Returns a random string of specified length. / 返回指定长度的随机字符串。
- `public String nextDigits(int length)` - Returns a random string of digits. / 返回随机数字字符串。
- `public <T> T nextElement(T[] array)` - Returns a random element from the array. / 从数组返回随机元素。
- `public RepeatableRandom reset()` - Resets the random generator to the initial state. / 重置随机生成器到初始状态。

## 35. opencode-base-image

图片处理组件，提供图片读写、缩放、裁剪、旋转、转换、压缩、格式检测

### Image
`public class Image` - Image / 图片处理包装类

- `public Image(BufferedImage image)` - Create image wrapper / 创建图片包装器
- `public Image(BufferedImage image, ImageFormat format)` - Create image wrapper with format / 创建带格式的图片包装器
- `public static Image from(Path path)` - Create image from path / 从路径创建图片
- `public static Image from(byte[] bytes)` - Create image from bytes / 从字节数组创建图片
- `public static Image from(BufferedImage image)` - Create image from BufferedImage / 从BufferedImage创建图片
- `public BufferedImage getBufferedImage()` - Get the underlying BufferedImage / 获取底层BufferedImage
- `public BufferedImage copyBufferedImage()` - Get a copy of the underlying BufferedImage / 获取底层BufferedImage的副本
- `public ImageFormat getFormat()` - Get the image format / 获取图片格式
- `public Image format(ImageFormat format)` - Set the image format / 设置图片格式
- `public int getWidth()` - Get image width / 获取图片宽度
- `public int getHeight()` - Get image height / 获取图片高度
- `public ImageInfo getInfo()` - Get image info / 获取图片信息
- `public Image resize(int width, int height)` - Resize to exact dimensions / 调整到精确尺寸
- `public Image resizeToFit(int maxWidth, int maxHeight)` - Resize maintaining aspect ratio / 保持宽高比调整尺寸
- `public Image scale(double scale)` - Scale by percentage / 按百分比缩放
- `public Image scaleToWidth(int width)` - Scale to fit width / 缩放以适应宽度
- `public Image scaleToHeight(int height)` - Scale to fit height / 缩放以适应高度
- `public Image crop(int x, int y, int width, int height)` - Crop to specified region / 裁剪到指定区域
- `public Image cropCenter(int width, int height)` - Crop from center / 从中心裁剪
- `public Image cropSquare()` - Crop to square from center / 从中心裁剪为正方形
- `public Image rotate(double degrees)` - Rotate by degrees / 按角度旋转
- `public Image rotate90()` - Rotate 90 degrees clockwise / 顺时针旋转90度
- `public Image rotate180()` - Rotate 180 degrees / 旋转180度
- `public Image rotate270()` - Rotate 270 degrees (90 counter-clockwise) / 旋转270度（逆时针90度）
- `public Image flipHorizontal()` - Flip horizontally / 水平翻转
- `public Image flipVertical()` - Flip vertically / 垂直翻转
- `public Image watermark(TextWatermark watermark)` - Add text watermark / 添加文字水印
- `public Image watermark(String text, Position position)` - Add text watermark at position / 在指定位置添加文字水印
- `public Image watermark(ImageWatermark watermark)` - Add image watermark / 添加图片水印
- `public Image watermark(BufferedImage watermarkImage, Position position)` - Add image watermark at position / 在指定位置添加图片水印
- `public Image compress(float quality)` - Compress image with quality / 按质量压缩图片
- `public Image convert(ImageFormat targetFormat)` - Convert to specified format / 转换到指定格式
- `public Image grayscale()` - Convert to grayscale / 转换为灰度图
- `public void save(Path path)` - Save to path / 保存到路径
- `public void save(Path path, ImageFormat format)` - Save to path with format / 保存到路径（指定格式）
- `public void writeTo(OutputStream out)` - Write to output stream / 写入输出流
- `public void writeTo(OutputStream out, ImageFormat format)` - Write to output stream with format / 写入输出流（指定格式）
- `public byte[] toBytes()` - Convert to byte array / 转换为字节数组
- `public byte[] toBytes(ImageFormat format)` - Convert to byte array with format / 转换为字节数组（指定格式）
- `public String toBase64()` - Convert to Base64 string / 转换为Base64字符串
- `public String toBase64(ImageFormat format)` - Convert to Base64 string with format / 转换为Base64字符串（指定格式）
- `public Image copy()` - Create a copy of this image / 创建此图片的副本

### ImageFormat
`public enum ImageFormat` - Image Format / 图片格式枚举

- `public String getExtension()` - Get file extension / 获取文件扩展名
- `public String getMimeType()` - Get MIME type / 获取MIME类型
- `public boolean supportsTransparency()` - Check if format supports transparency / 检查格式是否支持透明度
- `public static ImageFormat fromExtension(String extension)` - Get format from file extension / 从文件扩展名获取格式
- `public static ImageFormat fromMimeType(String mimeType)` - Get format from MIME type / 从MIME类型获取格式
- `public static boolean isSupported(String extension)` - Check if extension is supported / 检查扩展名是否支持
- `public static boolean isWebPAvailable()` - Check if WebP support is available at runtime / 检查运行时是否支持 WebP
- `public boolean isAvailable()` - Check if this format is available at runtime / 检查此格式在运行时是否可用

- `public ImageInfo(int width, int height, ImageFormat format)` - Create image info with dimensions and format / 使用尺寸和格式创建图片信息
- `public double aspectRatio()` - Get aspect ratio / 获取宽高比
- `public long pixels()` - Get total pixels / 获取总像素数
- `public long estimatedMemorySize()` - Get estimated memory size in bytes (assuming ARGB) / 获取估算的内存大小（字节，假设ARGB）
- `public boolean isLandscape()` - Check if image is landscape orientation / 检查图片是否为横向
- `public boolean isPortrait()` - Check if image is portrait orientation / 检查图片是否为纵向
- `public boolean isSquare()` - Check if image is square / 检查图片是否为正方形
- `public String fileSizeFormatted()` - Get file size in human-readable format / 获取人类可读的文件大小
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

- `public static int[] getDimensions(Path path)` - Get image dimensions without fully loading / 获取图片尺寸（不完全加载）
- `public static void resize(Path input, Path output, int width, int height)` - Quick resize operation / 快速调整尺寸操作
- `public static void crop(Path input, Path output, int x, int y, int width, int height)` - Quick crop operation / 快速裁剪操作
- `public static void rotate(Path input, Path output, double degrees)` - Quick rotate operation / 快速旋转操作
- `public static void convert(Path input, Path output, ImageFormat format)` - Quick format conversion / 快速格式转换
- `public static void compress(Path input, Path output, float quality)` - Quick compress operation / 快速压缩操作
- `public static void thumbnail(Path input, Path output, int size)` - Quick thumbnail creation / 快速创建缩略图
- `public static cloud.opencode.base.image.thumbnail.ThumbnailBuilder thumbnail()` - Create a thumbnail builder / 创建缩略图构建器
- `public static void flipHorizontal(Path input, Path output)` - Quick horizontal flip / 快速水平翻转
- `public static void flipVertical(Path input, Path output)` - Quick vertical flip / 快速垂直翻转
- `public static void grayscale(Path input, Path output)` - Quick grayscale conversion / 快速灰度转换
- `public static byte[] toBytes(BufferedImage image, ImageFormat format)` - Convert image to byte array / 将图片转换为字节数组
- `public static byte[] toBytes(Path path)` - Convert image from path to byte array / 将路径中的图片转换为字节数组
- `public static ImageFormat detectFormat(Path path)` - Detect format from file path / 从文件路径检测格式
- `public static boolean isValidImage(Path path)` - Check if file is a valid image / 检查文件是否为有效图片
- `public static boolean isSupported(String extension)` - Check if format is supported / 检查格式是否支持
- `public static Image createBlank(int width, int height)` - Create a blank image / 创建空白图片

- `public static BufferedImage adjustContrast(BufferedImage image, float factor)` - Adjust contrast / 调整对比度

- `public static BufferedImage cropBottom(BufferedImage image, int height)` - Crop bottom portion / 裁剪底部部分

- `public static BufferedImage scaleToHeight(BufferedImage image, int height)` - Scale to fit height maintaining aspect ratio / 缩放以适应高度（保持宽高比）

## 36. opencode-base-pdf

PDF处理组件，提供PDF创建、读取、合并、拆分、表单填充、签名、文本提取

### OpenPdf
`public final class OpenPdf` - PDF Utility Entry Class / PDF 工具入口类

- `public static DocumentBuilder create()` - Creates a new PDF document builder. / 创建新的 PDF 文档构建器。
- `public static DocumentBuilder create(PageSize pageSize)` - Creates a new PDF document builder with specified page size. / 创建指定页面大小的 PDF ...
- `public static PdfDocument open(Path path)` - Opens an existing PDF document from file path. / 从文件路径打开已有 PDF 文档。
- `public static PdfDocument open(InputStream inputStream)` - Opens an existing PDF document from input stream. / 从输入流打开已有 PDF 文档。
- `public static PdfDocument open(byte[] bytes)` - Opens an existing PDF document from byte array. / 从字节数组打开已有 PDF 文档。
- `public static PdfDocument open(Path path, String password)` - Opens a password-protected PDF document. / 打开受密码保护的 PDF 文档。
- `public static PdfMerger merger()` - Creates a PDF merger. / 创建 PDF 合并器。
- `public static void merge(List<Path> sources, Path target)` - Merges multiple PDF files into one. / 将多个 PDF 文件合并为一个。
- `public static PdfDocument merge(List<PdfDocument> documents)` - Merges multiple PDF documents into one. / 将多个 PDF 文档合并为一个。
- `public static PdfSplitter splitter()` - Creates a PDF splitter. / 创建 PDF 拆分器。
- `public static List<PdfDocument> split(Path source, String... ranges)` - Splits a PDF by page ranges. / 按页面范围拆分 PDF。
- `public static List<PdfDocument> splitToPages(Path source)` - Splits a PDF into single pages. / 将 PDF 拆分为单页文档。
- `public static PdfDocument fillForm(Path source, Map<String, String> fields)` - Fills form fields in a PDF. / 填充 PDF 表单字段。
- `public static PdfDocument fillAndFlatten(Path source, Map<String, String> fields)` - Fills form and flattens (makes non-editable). / 填充表单并扁平化（使其不可编辑）。
- `public static Map<String, String> extractFormFields(Path source)` - Extracts form fields from a PDF. / 从 PDF 提取表单字段。
- `public static PdfSigner signer()` - Creates a PDF signer. / 创建 PDF 签名器。
- `public static PdfDocument sign(Path source, Path keyStore, char[] password, String alias)` - Signs a PDF document. / 对 PDF 文档进行签名。
- `public static List<SignatureInfo> verifySignatures(Path source)` - Verifies PDF signatures. / 验证 PDF 签名。
- `public static PdfExtractor extractor()` - Creates a PDF extractor. / 创建 PDF 提取器。
- `public static String extractText(Path source)` - Extracts all text from a PDF. / 从 PDF 提取所有文本。
- `public static String extractText(Path source, int... pageNumbers)` - Extracts text from specific pages. / 从指定页面提取文本。
- `public static List<byte[]> extractImages(Path source)` - Extracts images from a PDF. / 从 PDF 提取图像。
- `public static int getPageCount(Path source)` - Gets the page count of a PDF. / 获取 PDF 页数。
- `public static Metadata getMetadata(Path source)` - Gets PDF metadata. / 获取 PDF 元数据。
- `public static boolean isEncrypted(Path source)` - Checks if a PDF is encrypted. / 检查 PDF 是否加密。
- `public static boolean hasForm(Path source)` - Checks if a PDF contains forms. / 检查 PDF 是否包含表单。
- `public static boolean isSigned(Path source)` - Checks if a PDF is signed. / 检查 PDF 是否已签名。

### PdfDocument
`public interface PdfDocument` - PDF Document - Represents a PDF document with pages and content / PDF 文档 - 表示...


### PdfPage
`public interface PdfPage` - PDF Page - Represents a single page in a PDF document / PDF 页面 - 表示 PDF 文档中的单个页面


### PdfCell

- `public static PdfCell of(String content)` - Creates cell with content / 创建带内容的单元格
- `public static PdfCell empty()` - Creates empty cell / 创建空单元格
- `public static PdfCell builder()` - Creates a cell builder / 创建单元格构建器
- `public PdfCell content(String content)` - Sets cell content / 设置单元格内容
- `public PdfCell font(PdfFont font)` - Sets font / 设置字体

### PdfColor
`public record PdfColor(float red, float green, float blue, float alpha, ColorModel model)` - PDF Color - Color representation for PDF content / PDF 颜色 - PDF 内容的颜色表示

- `public static final PdfColor BLACK = rgb(0, 0, 0);`
- `public static final PdfColor WHITE = rgb(255, 255, 255);`
- `public static final PdfColor RED = rgb(255, 0, 0);`
- `public static final PdfColor GREEN = rgb(0, 255, 0);`
- `public static final PdfColor BLUE = rgb(0, 0, 255);`
- `public static final PdfColor GRAY = rgb(128, 128, 128);`
- `public static final PdfColor LIGHT_GRAY = rgb(192, 192, 192);`
- `public static final PdfColor DARK_GRAY = rgb(64, 64, 64);`
- `public static final PdfColor YELLOW = rgb(255, 255, 0);`
- `public static final PdfColor CYAN = rgb(0, 255, 255);`
- `public static final PdfColor MAGENTA = rgb(255, 0, 255);`
- `public static final PdfColor ORANGE = rgb(255, 200, 0);`
- `public static PdfColor rgb(int r, int g, int b)` - Creates RGB color from 0-255 values / 从 0-255 值创建 RGB 颜色
- `public static PdfColor rgb(float r, float g, float b)` - Creates RGB color from 0-1 values / 从 0-1 值创建 RGB 颜色
- `public static PdfColor rgba(int r, int g, int b, float alpha)` - Creates RGBA color with alpha / 创建带透明度的 RGBA 颜色
- `public static PdfColor gray(int gray)` - Creates grayscale color / 创建灰度颜色
- `public static PdfColor gray(float gray)` - Creates grayscale color from 0-1 value / 从 0-1 值创建灰度颜色
- `public static PdfColor hex(String hex)` - Creates color from hex string / 从十六进制字符串创建颜色
- `public static PdfColor from(java.awt.Color color)` - Creates color from java.awt.Color / 从 java.awt.Color 创建颜色
- `public float getRed()` - Gets red component (0-1) / 获取红色分量 (0-1)
- `public float getGreen()` - Gets green component (0-1) / 获取绿色分量 (0-1)
- `public float getBlue()` - Gets blue component (0-1) / 获取蓝色分量 (0-1)
- `public float getAlpha()` - Gets alpha (opacity) / 获取透明度
- `public ColorModel getModel()` - Gets color model / 获取颜色模型
- `public java.awt.Color toAwtColor()` - Converts to java.awt.Color / 转换为 java.awt.Color
- `public String toHex()` - Converts to hex string / 转换为十六进制字符串
- `public PdfColor darker(float factor)` - Creates a darker version of this color / 创建当前颜色的深色版本
- `public PdfColor lighter(float factor)` - Creates a lighter version of this color / 创建当前颜色的浅色版本
- `public PdfColor withAlpha(float newAlpha)` - Creates a color with different alpha / 创建具有不同透明度的颜色
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### DocumentBuilder
`public final class DocumentBuilder` - PDF Document Builder / PDF 文档构建器

- `public DocumentBuilder title(String title)` - Sets document title. / 设置文档标题。
- `public DocumentBuilder author(String author)` - Sets document author. / 设置文档作者。
- `public DocumentBuilder subject(String subject)` - Sets document subject. / 设置文档主题。
- `public DocumentBuilder keywords(String... keywords)` - Sets document keywords. / 设置文档关键词。
- `public DocumentBuilder creator(String creator)` - Sets document creator. / 设置文档创建者（软件）。
- `public DocumentBuilder pageSize(PageSize pageSize)` - Sets default page size. / 设置默认页面大小。
- `public DocumentBuilder orientation(Orientation orientation)` - Sets default page orientation. / 设置默认页面方向。
- `public DocumentBuilder margins(float top, float right, float bottom, float left)` - Sets default margins. / 设置默认边距。
- `public DocumentBuilder margins(float margin)` - Sets uniform margins. / 设置统一边距。
- `public DocumentBuilder defaultFont(PdfFont font)` - Sets default font. / 设置默认字体。
- `public DocumentBuilder embedFont(Path fontPath, String fontName)` - Embeds a TrueType font. / 嵌入 TrueType 字体。
- `public PageBuilder addPage()` - Adds a new page. / 添加新页面。
- `public PageBuilder addPage(PageSize pageSize)` - Adds a new page with specific size. / 添加指定大小的新页面。
- `public PageBuilder addPage(PageSize pageSize, Orientation orientation)` - Adds a new page with specific size and orientation. / 添加指定大小和方向的新页面。
- `public DocumentBuilder encrypt(String userPassword, String ownerPassword)` - Sets document encryption. / 设置文档加密。
- `public DocumentBuilder permissions(boolean allowPrinting, boolean allowCopying,` - Sets document permissions. / 设置文档权限。
- `public PdfDocument build()` - Builds the PDF document. / 构建 PDF 文档。
- `public void save(Path path)` - Builds and saves to file. / 构建并保存到文件。
- `public void save(OutputStream outputStream)` - Builds and writes to stream. / 构建并写入流。
- `public byte[] toBytes()` - Builds and returns as bytes. / 构建并返回字节数组。
- `public String getTitle()` - 获取title
- `public String getAuthor()` - 获取author
- `public String getSubject()` - 获取subject
- `public List<String> getKeywords()` - 获取keywords
- `public String getCreator()` - 获取creator
- `public PageSize getPageSize()` - 获取page size
- `public Orientation getOrientation()` - 获取orientation
- `public float getMarginTop()` - 获取margin top
- `public float getMarginRight()` - 获取margin right
- `public float getMarginBottom()` - 获取margin bottom
- `public float getMarginLeft()` - 获取margin left
- `public PdfFont getDefaultFont()` - 获取default font
- `public List<EmbeddedFontEntry> getEmbeddedFonts()` - 获取embedded fonts
- `public List<PageBuilder> getPages()` - 获取pages
- `public boolean isEncrypted()` - 判断encrypted
- `public static DocumentBuilder create()` - Creates a new document builder. / 创建新的文档构建器。
- `public static DocumentBuilder create(PageSize pageSize)` - Creates a new document builder with page size. / 创建指定页面大小的文档构建器。
- `public record EmbeddedFontEntry(Path path, String name)` - Embedded Font Entry / 嵌入字体条目
