- `public static Builder builder()` - Creates a builder for metadata / 创建元数据构建器
- `public Metadata withTitle(String newTitle)` - Creates a copy with updated title / 创建更新标题后的副本
- `public Metadata withAuthor(String newAuthor)` - Creates a copy with updated author / 创建更新作者后的副本

### Orientation
`public enum Orientation` - Page Orientation - Portrait or Landscape / 页面方向 - 纵向或横向

- `public boolean isPortrait()` - Checks if this is portrait orientation / 检查是否为纵向
- `public boolean isLandscape()` - Checks if this is landscape orientation / 检查是否为横向
- `public float[] apply(float width, float height)` - Applies orientation to page dimensions / 将方向应用于页面尺寸

### PageBuilder
`public final class PageBuilder` - PDF Page Builder / PDF 页面构建器

- `public PageBuilder text(String text, float x, float y)` - Adds text at position. / 在指定位置添加文本。
- `public PageBuilder text(String text, float x, float y, PdfFont font, float fontSize)` - Adds styled text. / 添加带样式的文本。
- `public PageBuilder text(PdfText pdfText)` - Adds a PdfText element. / 添加 PdfText 元素。
- `public PageBuilder paragraph(PdfParagraph paragraph)` - Adds a paragraph. / 添加段落。
- `public PageBuilder image(Path imagePath, float x, float y)` - Adds an image from file. / 从文件添加图像。
- `public PageBuilder image(Path imagePath, float x, float y, float width, float height)` - Adds an image with size. / 添加指定大小的图像。
- `public PageBuilder image(PdfImage pdfImage)` - Adds a PdfImage element. / 添加 PdfImage 元素。
- `public PageBuilder table(PdfTable table)` - Adds a table. / 添加表格。
- `public PdfTable.Builder tableBuilder(int columns)` - Creates table builder. / 创建表格构建器。
- `public PageBuilder line(float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2)` - Draws a line. / 绘制线条。
- `public PageBuilder line(PdfLine line)` - Draws a line with style. / 绘制带样式的线条。
- `public PageBuilder rectangle(float x, float y, float width, float height)` - Draws a rectangle. / 绘制矩形。
- `public PageBuilder filledRectangle(float x, float y, float width, float height, PdfColor color)` - Draws a filled rectangle. / 绘制填充矩形。
- `public PageBuilder rectangle(PdfRectangle rectangle)` - Draws a rectangle element. / 绘制矩形元素。
- `public PageBuilder ellipse(PdfEllipse ellipse)` - Draws an ellipse. / 绘制椭圆。
- `public DocumentBuilder endPage()` - Finishes current page and returns to document builder. / 完成当前页面并返回文档构建器。
- `public PageBuilder nextPage()` - Adds another page. / 添加另一个页面。
- `public PageBuilder nextPage(PageSize pageSize)` - Adds another page with specific size. / 添加指定大小的另一个页面。
- `public PageSize getPageSize()` - 获取page size
- `public Orientation getOrientation()` - 获取orientation
- `public List<PdfElement> getElements()` - 获取elements
- `public float getWidth()` - Gets page width in points. / 获取页面宽度（点）。
- `public float getHeight()` - Gets page height in points. / 获取页面高度（点）。

### PageSize
`public enum PageSize` - PDF Page Size - Standard page dimensions / PDF 页面大小 - 标准页面尺寸

- `public float getWidth()` - Gets width in points / 获取宽度（点）
- `public float getHeight()` - Gets height in points / 获取高度（点）
- `public float getWidthMm()` - Gets width in millimeters / 获取宽度（毫米）
- `public float getHeightMm()` - Gets height in millimeters / 获取高度（毫米）
- `public float getWidthInches()` - Gets width in inches / 获取宽度（英寸）
- `public float getHeightInches()` - Gets height in inches / 获取高度（英寸）
- `public float[] rotate()` - Creates a rotated (landscape) version of this page size / 创建旋转（横向）版本的页面大小
- `public static float[] custom(float widthPt, float heightPt)` - Creates a custom page size / 创建自定义页面大小
- `public static float[] customMm(float widthMm, float heightMm)` - Creates a custom page size from millimeters / 从毫米创建自定义页面大小
- `public static float[] customInches(float widthIn, float heightIn)` - Creates a custom page size from inches / 从英寸创建自定义页面大小

### OpenPdfException
`public class OpenPdfException` - PDF Exception - Base exception for all PDF operations / PDF 异常 - 所有 PDF 操作的基础异常

- `public OpenPdfException(String message)` - Creates exception with message / 创建带消息的异常
- `public OpenPdfException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception with message and cause / 创建带消息和原因的异常
- `public OpenPdfException(String operation, String message)` - Creates exception with operation and message / 创建带操作和消息的异常
- `public OpenPdfException(String operation, String message, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception with operation, message and cause / 创建带操作、消息和原因的异常
- `public OpenPdfException(String operation, int pageNumber, String message)` - Creates exception with operation, page number and message / 创建带操作、页码和消息的异常
- `public String operation()` - Gets the operation type / 获取操作类型
- `public Integer pageNumber()` - Gets the page number / 获取页码
- `public static OpenPdfException invalidFormat(String reason)` - Creates exception for invalid PDF format / 创建无效 PDF 格式异常
- `public static OpenPdfException readFailed(String path, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for read failure / 创建读取失败异常
- `public static OpenPdfException writeFailed(String path, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for write failure / 创建写入失败异常
- `public static OpenPdfException invalidPageNumber(int pageNumber, int totalPages)` - Creates exception for invalid page number / 创建无效页码异常
- `public static OpenPdfException passwordRequired()` - Creates exception for password required / 创建需要密码异常
- `public static OpenPdfException wrongPassword()` - Creates exception for wrong password / 创建密码错误异常
- `public static OpenPdfException signatureFailed(String reason, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for signature failure / 创建签名失败异常
- `public static OpenPdfException fieldNotFound(String fieldName)` - Creates exception for form field not found / 创建表单字段未找到异常
- `public static OpenPdfException unsupportedFeature(String feature)` - Creates exception for unsupported feature / 创建不支持功能异常
- `public static OpenPdfException mergeFailed(String reason, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for merge failure / 创建合并失败异常
- `public static OpenPdfException splitFailed(String reason, Throwable cause)` - Creates exception for split failure / 创建拆分失败异常

`public final class EmbeddedFont` - Embedded PDF Font - Custom font embedded in PDF / 嵌入式 PDF 字体 - 嵌入 PDF 中的自定义字体

- `public static EmbeddedFont fromBytes(String name, byte[] data, FontType type)` - Creates embedded font from byte array / 从字节数组创建嵌入字体

- `public String getName()` - 获取name
- `public String getPdfName()` - 获取pdf name
- `public boolean isEmbedded()` - 判断embedded
- `public boolean isHelvetica()` - Checks if this is a Helvetica variant / 检查是否为 Helvetica 变体
- `public boolean isTimes()` - Checks if this is a Times variant / 检查是否为 Times 变体
- `public boolean isCourier()` - Checks if this is a Courier variant / 检查是否为 Courier 变体
- `public boolean isMonospace()` - Checks if this is a monospace font / 检查是否为等宽字体
- `public boolean isBold()` - Checks if this is a bold variant / 检查是否为粗体变体
- `public boolean isItalic()` - Checks if this is an italic/oblique variant / 检查是否为斜体变体

### PdfExtractor
`public final class PdfExtractor` - PDF Content Extractor / PDF 内容提取器

- `public PdfExtractor source(Path path)` - Sets source PDF file. / 设置源 PDF 文件。
- `public PdfExtractor source(PdfDocument document)` - Sets source PDF document. / 设置源 PDF 文档。
- `public String extractText()` - Extracts all text from PDF. / 从 PDF 提取所有文本。
- `public String extractText(int... pageNumbers)` - Extracts text from specific pages. / 从指定页面提取文本。
- `public String extractTextRange(int startPage, int endPage)` - Extracts text from a page range. / 从页面范围提取文本。
- `public List<ExtractedImage> extractImages()` - Extracts all images from PDF. / 从 PDF 提取所有图像。
- `public List<ExtractedImage> extractImages(int... pageNumbers)` - Extracts images from specific pages. / 从指定页面提取图像。
- `public List<byte[]> extractImageBytes()` - Extracts images as byte arrays. / 将图像提取为字节数组。
- `public List<Path> saveImages(Path directory, String namePrefix)` - Saves extracted images to directory. / 将提取的图像保存到目录。
- `public Path getSourcePath()` - 获取source path
- `public PdfDocument getSourceDocument()` - 获取source document
- `public static PdfExtractor create()` - Creates a new extractor. / 创建新的提取器。
- `public static PdfExtractor of(Path path)` - Creates extractor for file. / 为文件创建提取器。
- `public static PdfExtractor of(PdfDocument document)` - Creates extractor for document. / 为文档创建提取器。
- `public record ExtractedImage(` - Extracted Image / 提取的图像

### PdfMerger
`public final class PdfMerger` - PDF Merger / PDF 合并器

- `public PdfMerger add(Path path)` - Adds a PDF file to merge. / 添加要合并的 PDF 文件。
- `public PdfMerger add(PdfDocument document)` - Adds a PDF document to merge. / 添加要合并的 PDF 文档。
- `public PdfMerger add(InputStream inputStream)` - Adds PDF from input stream. / 从输入流添加 PDF。
- `public PdfMerger addPages(Path path, String... pageRanges)` - Adds specific pages from a PDF. / 从 PDF 添加指定页面。
- `public PdfMerger addAll(List<Path> paths)` - Adds multiple PDF files. / 添加多个 PDF 文件。
- `public PdfMerger keepBookmarks(boolean keep)` - Keeps bookmarks from source documents. / 保留源文档的书签。
- `public PdfMerger keepAnnotations(boolean keep)` - Keeps annotations from source documents. / 保留源文档的注释。
- `public PdfMerger addOutlines(boolean add)` - Adds outline entries for each document. / 为每个文档添加大纲条目。
- `public PdfDocument merge()` - Merges and returns document. / 合并并返回文档。
- `public void mergeTo(Path target)` - Merges and saves to file. / 合并并保存到文件。
- `public void mergeTo(OutputStream outputStream)` - Merges and writes to stream. / 合并并写入流。
- `public List<MergeSource> getSources()` - 获取sources
- `public boolean isKeepBookmarks()` - 判断keep bookmarks
- `public boolean isKeepAnnotations()` - 判断keep annotations
- `public boolean isAddOutlines()` - 判断add outlines
- `public static PdfMerger create()` - Creates a new merger. / 创建新的合并器。
- `public record MergeSource(` - Merge Source / 合并源

### PdfSplitter
`public final class PdfSplitter` - PDF Splitter / PDF 拆分器

- `public PdfSplitter source(Path path)` - Sets source PDF file. / 设置源 PDF 文件。
- `public PdfSplitter source(PdfDocument document)` - Sets source PDF document. / 设置源 PDF 文档。
- `public List<PdfDocument> splitToPages()` - Splits into single pages. / 拆分为单页。
- `public List<PdfDocument> splitByRanges(String... ranges)` - Splits by page ranges. / 按页面范围拆分。
- `public List<PdfDocument> splitByPageCount(int pagesPerDocument)` - Splits by fixed page count per document. / 按固定页数拆分。
- `public List<PdfDocument> splitBySize(long maxSizeBytes)` - Splits by file size limit. / 按文件大小限制拆分。
- `public List<PdfDocument> splitByBookmarks(int level)` - Splits by bookmarks/outlines. / 按书签/大纲拆分。
- `public PdfDocument extractPages(int... pageNumbers)` - Extracts specific pages. / 提取指定页面。
- `public List<Path> splitAndSave(Path directory, String nameFormat)` - Splits and saves to directory with naming. / 拆分并使用命名保存到目录。
- `public List<Path> splitAndSave(Path directory, Function<Integer, String> nameFunction)` - Splits and saves with custom naming function. / 拆分并使用自定义命名函数保存。
- `public Path getSourcePath()` - 获取source path
- `public PdfDocument getSourceDocument()` - 获取source document
- `public static PdfSplitter create()` - Creates a new splitter. / 创建新的拆分器。
- `public static PdfSplitter of(Path path)` - Creates splitter for file. / 为文件创建拆分器。
- `public static PdfSplitter of(PdfDocument document)` - Creates splitter for document. / 为文档创建拆分器。

### PdfSigner
`public final class PdfSigner` - PDF Digital Signer / PDF 数字签名器

- `public PdfSigner keyStore(Path keyStorePath, char[] password, String type)` - Sets the key store for signing. / 设置签名用的密钥库。
- `public PdfSigner keyStore(InputStream keyStoreStream, char[] password, String type)` - Sets the key store from input stream. / 从输入流设置密钥库。
- `public PdfSigner alias(String alias)` - Sets the certificate alias to use. / 设置要使用的证书别名。
- `public PdfSigner keyPassword(char[] password)` - Sets private key password (if different from keystore). / 设置私钥密码（如果与密钥库不同）。
- `public PdfSigner appearance(SignatureAppearance appearance)` - Sets signature appearance. / 设置签名外观。
- `public PdfSigner reason(String reason)` - Sets signature reason. / 设置签名原因。
- `public PdfSigner location(String location)` - Sets signature location. / 设置签名位置。
- `public PdfSigner contact(String contact)` - Sets signature contact info. / 设置签名联系信息。
- `public PdfSigner fieldName(String fieldName)` - Sets signature field name. / 设置签名字段名。
- `public PdfSigner rectangle(int pageNumber, float x, float y, float width, float height)` - Sets signature rectangle position. / 设置签名矩形位置。
- `public PdfSigner timestamp(String tsaUrl)` - Enables timestamp. / 启用时间戳。
- `public PdfSigner timestamp(String tsaUrl, String username, String password)` - Enables timestamp with authentication. / 启用带认证的时间戳。
- `public PdfDocument sign(Path source)` - Signs a PDF document. / 对 PDF 文档签名。
- `public void sign(Path source, Path target)` - Signs and saves to file. / 签名并保存到文件。
- `public PdfDocument sign(PdfDocument document)` - Signs a PDF document object. / 对 PDF 文档对象签名。
- `public Path getKeyStorePath()` - 获取key store path
- `public String getKeyStoreType()` - 获取key store type
- `public String getAlias()` - 获取alias
- `public SignatureAppearance getAppearance()` - 获取appearance
- `public String getReason()` - 获取reason
- `public String getLocation()` - 获取location
- `public String getContact()` - 获取contact
- `public String getFieldName()` - 获取field name
- `public int getPageNumber()` - 获取page number
- `public float getX()` - 获取x
- `public float getY()` - 获取y
- `public float getWidth()` - 获取width
- `public float getHeight()` - 获取height
- `public String getTsaUrl()` - 获取tsa url
- `public static PdfSigner create()` - Creates a new signer. / 创建新的签名器。

- `public SignatureAppearance border(float width, Color color)` - Sets border. / 设置边框。
- `public SignatureAppearance showSignerName(boolean show)` - Shows signer name. / 显示签名者名称。
- `public SignatureAppearance showDate(boolean show)` - Shows signing date. / 显示签名日期。
- `public SignatureAppearance showReason(boolean show)` - Shows reason. / 显示原因。
- `public SignatureAppearance showLocation(boolean show)` - Shows location. / 显示位置。
- `public Path getImagePath()` - 获取image path

- `public Color getBackgroundColor()` - 获取background color

- `public boolean isShowDate()` - 判断show date
- `public boolean isShowReason()` - 判断show reason
- `public boolean isShowLocation()` - 判断show location

`public final class SignatureValidator` - PDF Signature Validator / PDF 签名验证器

- `public SignatureValidator trustedCertificates(List<X509Certificate> trustedCerts)` - Sets trusted certificates for validation. / 设置用于验证的受信任证书。
- `public SignatureValidator addTrustedCertificate(X509Certificate certificate)` - Adds a trusted certificate. / 添加受信任证书。
- `public SignatureValidator trustStore(Path trustStorePath, char[] password)` - Sets trust store for validation. / 设置用于验证的信任库。
- `public SignatureValidator checkRevocation(boolean enable)` - Enables certificate revocation checking. / 启用证书吊销检查。
- `public SignatureValidator checkOcsp(boolean enable)` - Enables OCSP checking. / 启用 OCSP 检查。

- `public List<ValidationResult> validate(PdfDocument document)` - Validates all signatures in a PDF document. / 验证 PDF 文档中的所有签名。
- `public ValidationResult validate(Path source, String fieldName)` - Validates a specific signature. / 验证特定签名。
- `public List<X509Certificate> getTrustedCertificates()` - 获取trusted certificates
- `public Path getTrustStorePath()` - 获取trust store path
- `public boolean isCheckRevocation()` - 判断check revocation
- `public boolean isCheckOcsp()` - 判断check ocsp
- `public static SignatureValidator create()` - Creates a new validator. / 创建新的验证器。

- `public static TimestampInfo of(Instant time)` - Creates a timestamp info with only time. / 创建仅包含时间的时间戳信息。

## 37. opencode-base-feature

功能开关组件，提供特性注册、启用/禁用、按用户/上下文条件判断

### Feature
`public record Feature(` - Feature Definition / 功能定义

- `public static Builder builder(String key)` - Create a builder for feature / 创建功能构建器
- `public boolean isEnabled()` - Check if this feature is enabled with empty context / 使用空上下文检查此功能是否启用
- `public boolean isEnabled(FeatureContext context)` - Check if this feature is enabled with context / 使用上下文检查此功能是否启用
- `public <T> T getMetadata(String key)` - Get metadata value / 获取元数据值
- `public <T> T getMetadata(String key, T defaultValue)` - Get metadata value with default / 获取元数据值，带默认值
- `public Feature withStrategy(EnableStrategy newStrategy)` - Create a copy with updated strategy / 创建具有更新策略的副本

### FeatureContext
`public record FeatureContext(` - Feature Context / 功能上下文

- `public static FeatureContext empty()` - Create an empty context / 创建空上下文
- `public static FeatureContext ofUser(String userId)` - Create a context with user ID only / 仅使用用户ID创建上下文
- `public static FeatureContext ofTenant(String tenantId)` - Create a context with tenant ID only / 仅使用租户ID创建上下文
- `public static FeatureContext of(String userId, String tenantId)` - Create a context with user and tenant / 使用用户和租户创建上下文
- `public static Builder builder()` - Create a new builder / 创建新的构建器
- `public <T> T getAttribute(String key)` - Get an attribute value / 获取属性值
- `public <T> T getAttribute(String key, T defaultValue)` - Get an attribute value with default / 获取属性值，带默认值
- `public boolean hasUserId()` - Check if context has user ID / 检查上下文是否有用户ID
- `public boolean hasTenantId()` - Check if context has tenant ID / 检查上下文是否有租户ID

### OpenFeature
`public class OpenFeature` - Open Feature / 开放功能

- `public static OpenFeature getInstance()` - Get singleton instance / 获取单例实例
- `public static OpenFeature create(FeatureStore store)` - Create new instance with custom store (for testing or custom usage) / 使用自定义存储...
- `public static void resetInstance()` - Reset singleton instance (for testing) / 重置单例实例（用于测试）
- `public void register(Feature feature)` - Register a feature / 注册功能
- `public void registerAll(Feature... features)` - Register multiple features / 注册多个功能
- `public boolean isEnabled(String key)` - Check if a feature is enabled / 检查功能是否启用
- `public boolean isEnabled(String key, FeatureContext context)` - Check if a feature is enabled for a context / 检查功能对上下文是否启用
- `public boolean isEnabledForUser(String key, String userId)` - Check if a feature is enabled for a specific user / 检查功能对特定用户是否启用
- `public void ifEnabled(String key, Runnable action)` - Execute action if feature is enabled / 如果功能启用则执行操作
- `public void ifEnabled(String key, FeatureContext context, Runnable action)` - Execute action if feature is enabled with context / 如果功能启用则执行操作（带上下文）
- `public <T> T ifEnabled(String key, Supplier<T> enabled, Supplier<T> disabled)` - Get value based on feature state / 根据功能状态获取值
- `public <T> T ifEnabled(String key, FeatureContext context, Supplier<T> enabled, Supplier<T> disabled)` - Get value based on feature state with context / 根据功能状态获取值（带上下文）
- `public Optional<Feature> get(String key)` - Get a feature by key / 根据键获取功能
- `public Feature getOrThrow(String key)` - Get a feature or throw if not found / 获取功能，如果未找到则抛出异常
- `public void enable(String key)` - Enable a feature / 启用功能
- `public void disable(String key)` - Disable a feature / 禁用功能
- `public void updateStrategy(String key, EnableStrategy strategy)` - Update feature strategy / 更新功能策略
- `public boolean delete(String key)` - Delete a feature / 删除功能
- `public Set<String> getAllKeys()` - Get all feature keys / 获取所有功能键
- `public Map<String, Feature> getAll()` - Get all features / 获取所有功能
- `public boolean exists(String key)` - Check if a feature exists / 检查功能是否存在
- `public int size()` - Get the feature count / 获取功能数量
- `public void clear()` - Clear all features / 清空所有功能
- `public void addListener(FeatureListener listener)` - Add a listener / 添加监听器
- `public void removeListener(FeatureListener listener)` - Remove a listener / 移除监听器
- `public FeatureStore getStore()` - Get the feature store / 获取功能存储
- `public void setStore(FeatureStore store)` - Set the feature store / 设置功能存储

### FeatureAuditEvent
`public record FeatureAuditEvent(` - Feature Audit Event / 功能审计事件

- `public boolean isStateChanged()` - Check if this event represents a state change / 检查此事件是否表示状态更改
- `public String toLogString()` - Format as log string / 格式化为日志字符串

### FileAuditLogger
`public class FileAuditLogger` - File Audit Logger / 文件审计日志记录器

- `public FileAuditLogger(Path logFile)` - Create file audit logger / 创建文件审计日志记录器
- `public void log(FeatureAuditEvent event)` - Log audit event to file / 将审计事件记录到文件
- `public Path getLogFile()` - Get the log file path / 获取日志文件路径

### MetricsFeatureListener
`public class MetricsFeatureListener` - Metrics Feature Listener / 指标功能监听器

- `public void onFeatureChanged(String key, boolean oldValue, boolean newValue)` - 监听feature changed
- `public long getTotalChanges()` - Get total number of changes / 获取总变更数
- `public long getEnableCount(String key)` - Get enable count for a feature / 获取功能的启用次数
- `public long getDisableCount(String key)` - Get disable count for a feature / 获取功能的禁用次数
- `public Map<String, Long> getAllEnableCounts()` - Get all enable counts / 获取所有启用计数
- `public Map<String, Long> getAllDisableCounts()` - Get all disable counts / 获取所有禁用计数
- `public void reset()` - Reset all metrics / 重置所有指标

### FeatureConfigException
`public class FeatureConfigException` - Feature Config Exception / 功能配置异常

- `public FeatureConfigException(String message)` - Create config exception with message / 使用消息创建配置异常
- `public FeatureConfigException(String message, FeatureErrorCode errorCode)` - Create config exception with message and error code / 使用消息和错误码创建配置异常
- `public FeatureConfigException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Create config exception with message and cause / 使用消息和原因创建配置异常

### FeatureErrorCode
`public enum FeatureErrorCode` - Feature Error Code / 功能错误码

- `public int getCode()` - Get error code / 获取错误码
- `public String getMessage()` - Get error message / 获取错误消息
- `public String getMessageZh()` - Get Chinese error message / 获取中文错误消息
- `public String getDescription()` - Get description (code: message) / 获取描述 (code: message)

### FeatureException
`public class FeatureException` - Feature Exception Base Class / 功能异常基类

- `public FeatureException(String message)` - Create exception with message / 使用消息创建异常
- `public FeatureException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Create exception with message and cause / 使用消息和原因创建异常
- `public FeatureException(String message, FeatureErrorCode errorCode)` - Create exception with message and error code / 使用消息和错误码创建异常
- `public FeatureException(String message, Throwable cause, String featureKey, FeatureErrorCode errorCode)` - Create exception with all parameters / 使用所有参数创建异常
- `public String getFeatureKey()` - Get the feature key / 获取功能键
- `public FeatureErrorCode getErrorCode()` - Get the error code / 获取错误码

### FeatureNotFoundException
`public class FeatureNotFoundException` - Feature Not Found Exception / 功能不存在异常

- `public FeatureNotFoundException(String featureKey)` - Create exception for feature key / 为功能键创建异常

### FeatureSecurityException
`public class FeatureSecurityException` - Feature Security Exception / 功能安全异常

- `public FeatureSecurityException(String message)` - Create security exception with message / 使用消息创建安全异常

## 38. opencode-base-timeseries

时序数据组件，提供时序记录、查询、降采样、异常检测、预测、变化点检测

### Aggregation
`public final class Aggregation` - Aggregation / 聚合

- `public static TimeSeries downsample(TimeSeries series, Duration interval, Function function)` - Downsample time series by aggregating points / 通过聚合点对时间序列进行降采样
- `public static TimeSeries movingAverage(TimeSeries series, int window)` - Calculate moving average / 计算移动平均
- `public static TimeSeries exponentialMovingAverage(TimeSeries series, double alpha)` - Calculate exponential moving average / 计算指数移动平均
- `public static Map<String, TimeSeries> rollingStats(TimeSeries series, int window)` - Calculate rolling statistics / 计算滚动统计

### BoundedTimeSeries

- `public BoundedTimeSeries(String name, int maxSize, Duration maxAge)` - Create bounded time series / 创建有界时间序列
- `public BoundedTimeSeries(String name, int maxSize)` - Create bounded time series with size limit only / 仅使用容量限制创建有界时间序列
- `public static BoundedTimeSeries of(String name, int maxSize, Duration maxAge)` - Create bounded time series / 创建有界时间序列
- `public static BoundedTimeSeries of(String name, int maxSize)` - Create bounded time series with size limit only / 仅使用容量限制创建有界时间序列
- `public TimeSeries add(DataPoint point)` - 添加 / Add
- `public TimeSeries addAll(Collection<DataPoint> points)` - 添加all
- `public int getMaxSize()` - Get maximum size / 获取最大容量
- `public Duration getMaxAge()` - Get maximum age / 获取最大时间
- `public int remainingCapacity()` - Get remaining capacity / 获取剩余容量
- `public boolean isFull()` - Check if series is full / 检查序列是否已满
- `public void remove(Instant timestamp)` - Remove data point by timestamp / 按时间戳移除数据点
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### DataPoint
`public record DataPoint(Instant timestamp, double value, Map<String, String> tags)` - Data Point / 数据点

- `public static DataPoint of(Instant timestamp, double value)` - Create data point with value only / 仅用值创建数据点
- `public static DataPoint now(double value)` - Create data point with current time / 用当前时间创建数据点
- `public static DataPoint of(long epochMillis, double value)` - Create data point from epoch milliseconds / 从纪元毫秒创建数据点
- `public static DataPoint of(Instant timestamp, double value, Map<String, String> tags)` - Create data point with tags / 用标签创建数据点

- `public boolean isNaN()` - Check if value is NaN / 检查值是否为NaN

- `public DataPoint withTag(String key, String value)` - Create new data point with additional tag / 创建带有额外标签的新数据点
- `public int compareTo(DataPoint other)` - 比较排序 / Compare for ordering

### OpenTimeSeries
`public final class OpenTimeSeries` - Open Time Series / 开放时间序列

- `public static TimeSeries get(String name)` - Get or create time series / 获取或创建时间序列
- `public static void record(String name, double value)` - Record data point now / 记录当前数据点
- `public static void record(String name, Instant timestamp, double value)` - Record data point with timestamp / 记录带时间戳的数据点
- `public static List<DataPoint> query(String name, Duration duration)` - Query range data / 查询范围数据
- `public static TimeSeriesStats stats(String name)` - Get statistics / 获取统计信息
- `public static void remove(String name)` - Remove time series / 删除时间序列
- `public static boolean exists(String name)` - Check if series exists / 检查序列是否存在
- `public static void cleanup(Duration retention)` - Cleanup old data across all series / 清理所有序列中的旧数据
- `public static List<String> getSeriesNames()` - Get all series names / 获取所有序列名称
- `public static void clearAll()` - Clear all series / 清除所有序列
- `public static TimeSeries create(String name)` - Create new time series (not stored) / 创建新的时间序列（不存储）
- `public static TimeSeries of(String name, Collection<DataPoint> points)` - Create time series with points (not stored) / 使用点创建时间序列（不存储）
- `public static BoundedTimeSeries bounded(String name, int maxSize, Duration maxAge)` - Create bounded time series / 创建有界时间序列
- `public static DataPoint point(Instant timestamp, double value)` - Create data point / 创建数据点
- `public static DataPoint point(double value)` - Create data point now / 创建当前数据点
- `public static TimeSeries downsample(TimeSeries series, Duration interval)` - Downsample series / 降采样序列
- `public static TimeSeries downsample(TimeSeries series, Duration interval, AggregationType aggregation)` - Downsample series with aggregation type / 使用聚合类型降采样序列
- `public static TimeSeries movingAverage(TimeSeries series, int window)` - Calculate moving average / 计算移动平均
- `public static TimeSeries ema(TimeSeries series, double alpha)` - Calculate exponential moving average / 计算指数移动平均
- `public static Map<String, TimeSeries> rollingStats(TimeSeries series, int window)` - Calculate rolling statistics / 计算滚动统计
- `public static List<DataPoint> detectAnomalies(TimeSeries series, double threshold)` - Detect anomalies by Z-Score / 使用Z-Score检测异常
- `public static TimeSeries merge(TimeSeries... series)` - Merge multiple series / 合并多个序列
- `public static TimeSeries fill(TimeSeries series, double fillValue)` - Fill NaN values / 填充NaN值
- `public static TimeSeries normalize(TimeSeries series)` - Normalize series to 0-1 range / 归一化序列到0-1范围
- `public static TimeSeries standardize(TimeSeries series)` - Standardize series (z-score normalization) / 标准化序列（Z分数归一化）
- `public static TimeSeries smaForecast(TimeSeries series, int windowSize, int steps)` - Forecast using Simple Moving Average / 使用简单移动平均进行预测
- `public static TimeSeries emaForecast(TimeSeries series, double alpha, int steps)` - Forecast using Exponential Moving Average / 使用指数移动平均进行预测
- `public static TimeSeries linearForecast(TimeSeries series, int steps)` - Forecast using Linear Regression / 使用线性回归进行预测
- `public static TimeSeries holtForecast(TimeSeries series, double alpha, double beta, int steps)` - Forecast using Double Exponential Smoothing (Holt's method) / 使用双指数平滑（Holt方法）...
- `public static ForecastUtil.ForecastResult forecastWithBounds(TimeSeries series, int windowSize,` - Forecast with confidence bounds using SMA / 使用SMA预测并带置信边界
- `public static TimeSeries lttb(TimeSeries series, int targetSize)` - Downsample using LTTB algorithm (preserves visual shape) / 使用LTTB算法降采样（保持视觉形状）
- `public static TimeSeries m4(TimeSeries series, Duration bucketDuration)` - Downsample using M4 algorithm (preserves min/max) / 使用M4算法降采样（保持最小/最大值）
- `public static TimeSeries peakPreserving(TimeSeries series, int targetSize)` - Downsample preserving peaks and valleys / 保持峰值和谷值的降采样
- `public static TimeSeries percentile(TimeSeries series, Duration bucketDuration, int percentile)` - Downsample using percentile (e.g., median) / 使用百分位降采样（例如中位数）
- `public static TimeSeries thresholdDownsample(TimeSeries series, double threshold)` - Downsample using threshold (only keep significant changes) / 使用阈值降采样（只保留显著变化）

### TimeSeries
`public class TimeSeries` - Time Series / 时间序列

- `public TimeSeries(String name)` - Create time series / 创建时间序列
- `public TimeSeries(String name, Collection<DataPoint> points)` - Create time series with initial points / 使用初始点创建时间序列
- `public TimeSeries add(DataPoint point)` - 添加 / Add
- `public TimeSeries add(Instant timestamp, double value)` - 添加 / Add
- `public TimeSeries addNow(double value)` - 添加now
- `public TimeSeries addAll(Collection<DataPoint> points)` - 添加all
- `public void remove(Instant timestamp)` - 移除 / Remove
- `public String getName()` - 获取name
- `public int size()` - Returns the number of child nodes / 返回子节点数量
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - 是否为空 / Check if empty
- `public double count()` - Get count as double / 获取计数（双精度）
- `public double count(Instant from, Instant to)` - Get count in time range / 获取时间范围内的计数
- `public Optional<DataPoint> get(Instant timestamp)` - 获取 / Get
- `public Optional<DataPoint> getFirst()` - 获取first
- `public Optional<DataPoint> getLast()` - 获取last
- `public DataPoint getLatest()` - Get latest data point (alias for getLast) / 获取最新的数据点（getLast的别名）
- `public List<DataPoint> getPoints()` - 获取points
- `public double[] getValues()` - 获取values
- `public Instant[] getTimestamps()` - 获取timestamps
- `public TimeSeries range(Instant from, Instant to)`
- `public TimeSeries last(Duration duration)`
- `public TimeSeries head(int n)`
- `public TimeSeries tail(int n)`
- `public double sum()` - 求和 / Sum
- `public double sum(Instant from, Instant to)` - Get sum in time range / 获取时间范围内的和
- `public OptionalDouble average()` - 平均值 / Average
- `public double average(Instant from, Instant to)` - Get average in time range / 获取时间范围内的平均值
- `public OptionalDouble min()` - 最小值 / Minimum
- `public OptionalDouble max()` - 最大值 / Maximum

- `public static int findOptimalLag(TimeSeries series1, TimeSeries series2, int maxLag)` - Find the optimal lag between two series. / 找到两个序列之间的最佳滞后。
- `public static double correlationAtLag(TimeSeries series1, TimeSeries series2, int lag)` - Calculate correlation with time lag applied. / 计算应用时间滞后的相关性。
- `public static double[] rollingCorrelation(TimeSeries series1, TimeSeries series2, int windowSize)` - Calculate rolling correlation between two series. / 计算两个序列之间的滚动相关。

## 39. opencode-base-tree

树形结构组件，提供树构建、遍历、查找、过滤、序列化、虚拟树

### DefaultTreeNode
`public class DefaultTreeNode<ID>` - Default Tree Node / 默认树节点

- `public DefaultTreeNode()` - Create empty node / 创建空节点
- `public DefaultTreeNode(ID id)` - Create node with ID / 使用ID创建节点
- `public DefaultTreeNode(ID id, ID parentId, String name)` - Create node with ID, parentId and name / 使用ID、父ID和名称创建节点
- `public ID getId()` - 获取id
- `public void setId(ID id)` - 设置id
- `public ID getParentId()` - 获取parent id
- `public void setParentId(ID parentId)` - 设置parent id
- `public String getName()` - 获取name
- `public void setName(String name)` - 设置name
- `public int getSort()` - 获取sort
- `public void setSort(int sort)` - 设置sort
- `public Map<String, Object> getExtra()` - 获取extra
- `public void setExtra(Map<String, Object> extra)` - 设置extra
- `public List<DefaultTreeNode<ID>> getChildren()` - 获取children
- `public void setChildren(List<DefaultTreeNode<ID>> children)` - 设置children
- `public DefaultTreeNode<ID> put(String key, Object value)` - Put extra attribute / 设置额外属性
- `public <V> V get(String key)` - Get extra attribute / 获取额外属性
- `public <V> V get(String key, V defaultValue)` - Get extra attribute with default / 获取额外属性（带默认值）
- `public boolean isRoot()` - Check if node is root / 检查是否为根节点
- `public boolean isLeaf()` - Check if node is leaf / 检查是否为叶子节点
- `public DefaultTreeNode<ID> addChild(DefaultTreeNode<ID> child)` - Add child node / 添加子节点
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### LightTreeNode
`public record LightTreeNode<ID>(` - Light Tree Node / 轻量级树节点

- `public static <ID> LightTreeNode<ID> of(ID id, ID parentId, String name)` - Create node / 创建节点
- `public static <ID> LightTreeNode<ID> root(ID id, String name)` - Create root node / 创建根节点
- `public boolean isRoot()` - Check if node is root / 检查是否为根节点
- `public boolean isLeaf()` - Check if node is leaf / 检查是否为叶子节点
- `public LightTreeNode<ID> withChild(LightTreeNode<ID> child)` - Add child and return new node / 添加子节点并返回新节点

### OpenTree
`public final class OpenTree` - Open Tree / 开放树

- `public static <T> TreeNode<T> node(T data)`
- `public static <T, ID> List<TreeNode<T>> build(` - 构建 / Build
- `public static <T, ID> TreeNode<T> buildSingle(` - 构建single
- `public static TreeNode<Map<String, Object>> fromMap(Map<String, Object> data, String childrenKey)` - 从...创建map
- `public static <T> List<T> flatten(TreeNode<T> root)` - 扁平化 / Flatten
- `public static <T> List<TreeBuilder.NodeWithDepth<T>> flattenWithDepth(TreeNode<T> root)`
- `public static <T> String print(TreeNode<T> root)`
- `public static <T> void printToConsole(TreeNode<T> root)`
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> List<T> buildTree(List<T> nodes)` - Build tree from flat list (default root detection) / 从扁平列表构建树（默认根节点检测）
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> List<T> buildTree(List<T> nodes, ID rootId)` - Build tree from flat list with specified root ID / 从扁平列表构建树（指定根节点ID）
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> List<T> buildTreeSorted(` - Build sorted tree / 构建排序树
- `public static List<DefaultTreeNode<Object>> buildTreeFromMaps(` - Build tree from maps / 从Map列表构建树
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ?>> void traversePreOrder(List<T> roots, Consumer<T> visitor)` - Pre-order traversal / 前序遍历
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ?>> void traversePostOrder(List<T> roots, Consumer<T> visitor)` - Post-order traversal / 后序遍历
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ?>> void traverseBreadthFirst(List<T> roots, Consumer<T> visitor)` - Breadth-first (level order) traversal / 广度优先（层序）遍历
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ?>> void traverseWithDepth(List<T> roots, BiConsumer<T, Integer> visitor)` - Traverse with depth information / 带深度信息的遍历
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> T find(List<T> roots, ID id)` - Find node by ID / 按ID查找节点
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ?>> List<T> findAll(List<T> roots, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Find all nodes matching predicate / 查找所有满足条件的节点
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> List<T> getPath(List<T> roots, ID id)` - Get path from root to specified node / 获取从根到指定节点的路径
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ?>> List<T> getLeaves(List<T> roots)` - Get all leaf nodes / 获取所有叶子节点
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> List<T> filter(List<T> roots, Predicate<T> predicate)` - Filter tree (keep matching nodes and their ancestors) / 过滤树（保留匹配节点及其祖先）
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ?>> List<T> flattenTree(List<T> roots)` - Flatten tree to list / 将树扁平化为列表
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ?>> int depth(List<T> roots)` - Calculate tree depth / 计算树深度
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ?>> int size(List<T> roots)` - Calculate total node count / 计算节点总数
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ?>> void sortTree(List<T> nodes, Comparator<T> comparator)` - Sort tree recursively / 递归排序树
- `public static <T, ID> VirtualTree<T, ID> virtualTree(` - Create a virtual tree root with lazy loading / 创建支持懒加载的虚拟树根节点
- `public static <T, ID> VirtualTree.Builder<T, ID> virtualTreeBuilder()` - Create a virtual tree builder / 创建虚拟树构建器
- `public static <T, ID> void preloadVirtualTree(VirtualTree<T, ID> root, int depth)` - Preload virtual tree to specified depth / 预加载虚拟树到指定深度
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> String toJson(List<T> roots)` - Serialize tree to JSON / 将树序列化为JSON
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> String toJson(` - Serialize tree to JSON with custom field extractor / 使用自定义字段提取器将树序列化为JSON
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> String toXml(List<T> roots)` - Serialize tree to XML / 将树序列化为XML
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> String toXml(` - Serialize tree to XML with custom field extractor / 使用自定义字段提取器将树序列化为XML
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> List<Map<String, Object>> toMaps(List<T> roots)` - Convert tree to list of maps / 将树转换为Map列表
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> List<Map<String, Object>> toFlatMaps(List<T> roots)` - Convert tree to flat list of maps (without hierarchy) / 将树扁平化为Map列表（无层级）
- `public static <T> String treeNodeToJson(TreeNode<T> root, Function<T, Map<String, Object>> dataSerializer)` - Serialize TreeNode to JSON / 将TreeNode序列化为JSON
- `public static <T> String treeNodeToXml(TreeNode<T> root, Function<T, Map<String, Object>> dataSerializer)` - Serialize TreeNode to XML / 将TreeNode序列化为XML

- `public static <T, ID> List<TreeNode<T>> build(` - Build tree from flat list / 从扁平列表构建树
- `public static <T, ID> TreeNode<T> buildSingle(` - Build single rooted tree / 构建单根树
- `public static TreeNode<Map<String, Object>> buildFromMap(Map<String, Object> data, String childrenKey)` - Build from nested map structure / 从嵌套映射结构构建

- `public static <T> List<NodeWithDepth<T>> flattenWithDepth(TreeNode<T> root)` - Flatten tree to list with depth info / 将树展平为带深度信息的列表
- `public record NodeWithDepth<T>(T data, int depth)` - Node with depth info / 带深度信息的节点

- `public void clearChildren()` - 清除children
- `public boolean isRoot()` - 判断root
- `public boolean isLeaf()` - 判断leaf
- `public int getChildCount()` - 获取child count
- `public boolean hasChildren()` - 是否有children
- `public int getDepth()` - 获取depth

- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> String print(List<T> roots)` - Print tree to string / 打印树为字符串

### TreeTraverser
`public final class TreeTraverser` - Tree Traverser - Advanced tree traversal utilities / 树遍历器 - 高级树遍历工具

- `public static <T> boolean traverse(TreeNode<T> root, ControlledVisitor<T> visitor)` - Traverses tree with control / 带控制的树遍历
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> boolean traverse(` - Traverses Treeable nodes with control / 带控制的Treeable节点遍历
- `public static <T> Stream<TreeNode<T>> stream(TreeNode<T> root)` - Creates a pre-order stream of TreeNode / 创建TreeNode的前序流
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> Stream<T> stream(List<T> roots)` - Creates a pre-order stream of Treeable nodes / 创建Treeable节点的前序流
- `public static <T> Stream<TreeNode<T>> parallelStream(TreeNode<T> root)` - Creates a parallel stream / 创建并行流
- `public static <T> Stream<TreeNode<T>> breadthFirstStream(TreeNode<T> root)` - Creates a breadth-first stream / 创建广度优先流
- `public static <T> Stream<TreeNode<T>> postOrderStream(TreeNode<T> root)` - Creates a post-order stream / 创建后序流
- `public static <T> Iterator<TreeNode<T>> preOrderIterator(TreeNode<T> root)` - Creates a pre-order iterator / 创建前序迭代器
- `public static <T extends Treeable<T, ID>, ID> Iterator<T> preOrderIterator(List<T> roots)` - Creates a pre-order iterator for Treeable / 创建Treeable的前序迭代器
- `public static <T> Iterator<TreeNode<T>> breadthFirstIterator(TreeNode<T> root)` - Creates a breadth-first iterator / 创建广度优先迭代器
- `public static <T> Iterator<TreeNode<T>> postOrderIterator(TreeNode<T> root)` - Creates a post-order iterator / 创建后序迭代器
- `public static <T, R> TreeNode<R> map(TreeNode<T> root, Function<T, R> mapper)` - Maps tree to new data type / 将树映射到新数据类型
- `public static <T, R> TreeNode<R> mapNode(TreeNode<T> root, Function<TreeNode<T>, R> mapper)` - Maps tree with node context / 带节点上下文的树映射
- `public static <T, R> Stream<R> flatMap(TreeNode<T> root, Function<TreeNode<T>, Stream<R>> mapper)` - Flat maps tree to stream / 扁平映射树到流
- `public static <T, R> R reduce(TreeNode<T> root, R identity, BiFunction<R, T, R> accumulator)` - Reduces tree to single value / 将树归约为单个值
- `public static <T, R> R reduce(TreeNode<T> root, R identity,` - Reduces tree with combiner (for parallel) / 带组合器的树归约（用于并行）
- `public static <T, R> R foldBottomUp(TreeNode<T> root,` - Folds tree bottom-up / 自底向上折叠树
- `public static <T> List<TreeNode<T>> getDescendants(TreeNode<T> node)` - Gets all descendants / 获取所有后代
- `public static <T> List<TreeNode<T>> getSiblings(TreeNode<T> node)` - Gets all siblings / 获取所有兄弟节点
- `public static <T> List<TreeNode<T>> getAncestors(TreeNode<T> node)` - Gets ancestors from parent to root / 获取从父节点到根节点的祖先
- `public static <T> int getDepth(TreeNode<T> node)` - Gets the depth of a node / 获取节点深度
- `public static <T> TreeNode<T> findLowestCommonAncestor(TreeNode<T> node1, TreeNode<T> node2)` - Finds lowest common ancestor / 查找最近公共祖先

### Treeable
`public interface Treeable<T, ID>` - Treeable Interface / 可树化接口


### AvlTree
`public class AvlTree<T>` - AVL Tree - Self-balancing binary search tree / AVL 树 - 自平衡二叉搜索树

- `public AvlTree()` - Creates an empty AVL tree with natural ordering. / 使用自然顺序创建空的 AVL 树。
- `public AvlTree(Comparator<? super T> comparator)` - Creates an empty AVL tree with the specified comparator. / 使用指定的比较器创建空的 AVL 树。
- `public int size()` - Returns the number of elements in the tree. / 返回树中的元素数量。
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Returns true if the tree is empty. / 如果树为空返回 true。
- `public void clear()` - Clears all elements from the tree. / 清除树中的所有元素。
- `public boolean insert(T data)` - Inserts an element into the tree. / 向树中插入元素。
- `public final void insert(T... elements)` - Inserts multiple elements into the tree. / 向树中插入多个元素。
- `public void insertAll(Collection<? extends T> elements)` - Inserts all elements from a collection. / 插入集合中的所有元素。
- `public boolean delete(T data)` - Deletes an element from the tree. / 从树中删除元素。
- `public Optional<T> deleteMin()` - Removes the minimum element from the tree. / 从树中删除最小元素。
- `public Optional<T> deleteMax()` - Removes the maximum element from the tree. / 从树中删除最大元素。
- `public boolean contains(T data)` - Returns true if the tree contains the specified element. / 如果树包含指定元素返回 true。
- `public Optional<T> search(T data)` - Searches for an element in the tree. / 在树中搜索元素。
- `public Optional<T> min()` - Returns the minimum element in the tree. / 返回树中的最小元素。
- `public Optional<T> max()` - Returns the maximum element in the tree. / 返回树中的最大元素。
- `public void inOrderTraversal(Consumer<T> action)` - Performs in-order traversal (sorted order). / 执行中序遍历（排序顺序）。
- `public void preOrderTraversal(Consumer<T> action)` - Performs pre-order traversal. / 执行前序遍历。
- `public void postOrderTraversal(Consumer<T> action)` - Performs post-order traversal. / 执行后序遍历。
- `public void levelOrderTraversal(Consumer<T> action)` - Performs level-order (breadth-first) traversal. / 执行层序（广度优先）遍历。
- `public List<T> toSortedList()` - Returns a sorted list of all elements. / 返回所有元素的排序列表。
- `public List<T> range(T from, T to)` - Returns all elements in the given range. / 返回给定范围内的所有元素。
- `public int height()` - Returns the height of the tree. / 返回树的高度。
- `public boolean isBalanced()` - Checks if the tree is balanced. / 检查树是否平衡。
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

### BalancedTreeUtil
`public final class BalancedTreeUtil` - Balanced Tree Util - Utilities for balanced binary search trees / 平衡树工具 - 平衡二...

- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> AvlTree<T> avlTreeOf(T... elements)` - Creates an AVL tree with the given elements. / 使用给定元素创建 AVL 树。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> AvlTree<T> avlTreeFrom(Collection<T> elements)` - Creates an AVL tree from a collection. / 从集合创建 AVL 树。
- `public static <T> AvlTree<T> avlTreeOf(Comparator<T> comparator, T... elements)` - Creates an AVL tree with a custom comparator. / 使用自定义比较器创建 AVL 树。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> RedBlackTree<T> redBlackTreeOf(T... elements)` - Creates a Red-Black tree with the given elements. / 使用给定元素创建红黑树。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> RedBlackTree<T> redBlackTreeFrom(Collection<T> elements)` - Creates a Red-Black tree from a collection. / 从集合创建红黑树。
- `public static <T> RedBlackTree<T> redBlackTreeOf(Comparator<T> comparator, T... elements)` - Creates a Red-Black tree with a custom comparator. / 使用自定义比较器创建红黑树。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> AvlTree<T> fromSortedArray(T[] sortedArray)` - Creates an AVL tree from a sorted array with optimal balance. / 从排序数组创建具有最优平衡...
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> AvlTree<T> fromSortedList(List<T> sortedList)` - Creates an AVL tree from a sorted list with optimal balance. / 从排序列表创建具有最优平衡的...
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> AvlTree<T> merge(AvlTree<T> tree1, AvlTree<T> tree2)` - Merges two AVL trees into a new tree. / 将两个 AVL 树合并成一个新树。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> RedBlackTree<T> merge(` - Merges two Red-Black trees into a new tree. / 将两个红黑树合并成一个新树。
- `public static <T> Optional<T> kthSmallest(AvlTree<T> tree, int k)` - Finds the kth smallest element in the tree. / 查找树中第 k 小的元素。
- `public static <T> Optional<T> kthLargest(AvlTree<T> tree, int k)` - Finds the kth largest element in the tree. / 查找树中第 k 大的元素。
- `public static <T> Optional<T> median(AvlTree<T> tree)` - Finds the median element in the tree. / 查找树中的中位数元素。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> Optional<T> floor(AvlTree<T> tree, T value)` - Finds the largest element less than or equal to the given value. / 查找小于或等于给定值...
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> Optional<T> ceiling(AvlTree<T> tree, T value)` - Finds the smallest element greater than or equal to the given value. / 查找大于或等...
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> AvlTree<T> intersection(` - Computes the intersection of two trees. / 计算两棵树的交集。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> AvlTree<T> union(` - Computes the union of two trees. / 计算两棵树的并集。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> AvlTree<T> difference(` - Computes the difference of two trees (tree1 - tree2). / 计算两棵树的差集（tree1 - tree2）。
- `public static <T extends Comparable<T>> boolean isValidBst(AvlTree<T> tree)` - Checks if the tree is a valid binary search tree. / 检查树是否是有效的二叉搜索树。
- `public static <T> TreeStats stats(AvlTree<T> tree)` - Returns tree statistics. / 返回树的统计信息。
- `public static <T> TreeStats stats(RedBlackTree<T> tree)` - Returns tree statistics for Red-Black tree. / 返回红黑树的统计信息。
- `public record TreeStats(int size, int height, boolean balanced)` - Tree statistics record. / 树统计信息记录。

### RedBlackTree
`public class RedBlackTree<T>` - Red-Black Tree - Self-balancing binary search tree / 红黑树 - 自平衡二叉搜索树

- `public RedBlackTree()` - Creates an empty Red-Black tree with natural ordering. / 使用自然顺序创建空的红黑树。
- `public RedBlackTree(Comparator<? super T> comparator)` - Creates an empty Red-Black tree with the specified comparator. / 使用指定的比较器创建空的红黑树。
- `public int size()` - Returns the number of elements in the tree. / 返回树中的元素数量。
- `public boolean isEmpty()` - Returns true if the tree is empty. / 如果树为空返回 true。
- `public void clear()` - Clears all elements from the tree. / 清除树中的所有元素。
- `public boolean insert(T data)` - Inserts an element into the tree. / 向树中插入元素。
- `public final void insert(T... elements)` - Inserts multiple elements into the tree. / 向树中插入多个元素。
- `public void insertAll(Collection<? extends T> elements)` - Inserts all elements from a collection. / 插入集合中的所有元素。
- `public boolean delete(T data)` - Deletes an element from the tree. / 从树中删除元素。
- `public boolean contains(T data)` - Returns true if the tree contains the specified element. / 如果树包含指定元素返回 true。
- `public Optional<T> search(T data)` - Searches for an element in the tree. / 在树中搜索元素。
- `public Optional<T> min()` - Returns the minimum element in the tree. / 返回树中的最小元素。
- `public Optional<T> max()` - Returns the maximum element in the tree. / 返回树中的最大元素。
- `public void inOrderTraversal(Consumer<T> action)` - Performs in-order traversal (sorted order). / 执行中序遍历（排序顺序）。
- `public void preOrderTraversal(Consumer<T> action)` - Performs pre-order traversal. / 执行前序遍历。
- `public void postOrderTraversal(Consumer<T> action)` - Performs post-order traversal. / 执行后序遍历。
- `public List<T> toSortedList()` - Returns a sorted list of all elements. / 返回所有元素的排序列表。
- `public List<T> range(T from, T to)` - Returns all elements in the given range. / 返回给定范围内的所有元素。
- `public int height()` - Returns the height of the tree. / 返回树的高度。

- `public void setChildren(List<VirtualTree<T, ID>> children)` - 设置children
- `public boolean isChildrenLoaded()` - Check if children are loaded / 检查子节点是否已加载
- `public void reloadChildren()` - Reload children (force refresh) / 重新加载子节点（强制刷新）
- `public void preload(int depth)` - Preload children to specified depth / 预加载到指定深度的子节点
- `public void unloadChildren()` - Unload children to free memory / 卸载子节点以释放内存
- `public T getData()` - Get the node data / 获取节点数据

- `public boolean isLeaf()` - Check if this is a leaf node / 检查是否为叶子节点
- `public int getChildCount()` - Get child count without loading all children / 获取子节点数量（不加载所有子节点）
- `public Optional<VirtualTree<T, ID>> findInCache(ID nodeId)` - Find node by ID in cache / 从缓存中查找节点
- `public Optional<VirtualTree<T, ID>> find(ID nodeId)` - Find node by ID (searches tree recursively) / 通过ID查找节点（递归搜索树）
- `public List<VirtualTree<T, ID>> findAll(Predicate<T> predicate)` - Find all nodes matching predicate / 查找所有匹配谓词的节点
- `public void traversePreOrder(Consumer<VirtualTree<T, ID>> visitor)` - Traverse in pre-order / 前序遍历
- `public void traversePostOrder(Consumer<VirtualTree<T, ID>> visitor)` - Traverse in post-order / 后序遍历
- `public void traverseBreadthFirst(Consumer<VirtualTree<T, ID>> visitor)` - Traverse level by level (breadth-first) / 层级遍历（广度优先）
- `public void traverseWithDepthLimit(Consumer<VirtualTree<T, ID>> visitor, int maxDepth)` - Traverse with depth limit (for controlled lazy loading) / 带深度限制的遍历（用于控制懒加载）
- `public CacheStats getCacheStats()` - Get cache statistics / 获取缓存统计
- `public void clearCache()` - Clear cache / 清除缓存
- `public int getLoadedNodeCount()` - Get total node count (loaded nodes only) / 获取总节点数（仅已加载的节点）
- `public record CacheStats(` - Cache Statistics / 缓存统计
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string

## 40. opencode-base-expression

表达式引擎，提供动态表达式求值、变量绑定、函数注册、沙盒执行

### Expression
`public interface Expression` - Expression Interface / 表达式接口


### ExpressionParser
`public interface ExpressionParser` - Expression Parser Interface / 表达式解析器接口


### OpenExpression
`public final class OpenExpression` - OpenExpression - Main Entry Point / OpenExpression - 主入口点

- `public static Object eval(String expression)` - Evaluate expression / 求值表达式
- `public static Object eval(String expression, Map<String, Object> variables)` - Evaluate expression with variables / 使用变量求值表达式
- `public static Object eval(String expression, Object rootObject)` - Evaluate expression with root object / 使用根对象求值表达式
- `public static Object eval(String expression, EvaluationContext context)` - Evaluate expression with context / 使用上下文求值表达式
- `public static <T> T eval(String expression, Class<T> targetType)` - Evaluate expression and convert to type / 求值表达式并转换为指定类型
- `public static <T> T eval(String expression, Map<String, Object> variables, Class<T> targetType)` - Evaluate expression with variables and convert to type / 使用变量求值表达式并转换为指定类型
- `public static <T> T eval(String expression, EvaluationContext context, Class<T> targetType)` - Evaluate expression with context and convert to type / 使用上下文求值表达式并转换为指定类型
- `public static ExpressionParser parser()` - Get the default expression parser / 获取默认表达式解析器
- `public static ExpressionParser newParser()` - Create a new parser / 创建新解析器
- `public static Expression parse(String expression)` - Parse expression / 解析表达式
- `public static FunctionRegistry functions()` - Get the global function registry / 获取全局函数注册表
- `public static Sandbox standardSandbox()` - Create a standard sandbox / 创建标准沙箱
- `public static Sandbox restrictiveSandbox()` - Create a restrictive sandbox / 创建限制性沙箱
- `public static Sandbox permissiveSandbox()` - Create a permissive sandbox / 创建宽松沙箱
- `public static StandardContext context()` - Create a new standard context / 创建新的标准上下文
- `public static StandardContext context(Object rootObject)` - Create a new standard context with root object / 使用根对象创建新的标准上下文
- `public static StandardContext.Builder contextBuilder()` - Create a context builder / 创建上下文构建器
- `public static boolean isValid(String expression)` - Check if expression is valid / 检查表达式是否有效
- `public static void clearCache()` - Clear the expression cache / 清除表达式缓存
- `public static int cacheSize()` - Get cache size / 获取缓存大小

`public class OpenExpressionException` - Expression Exception / 表达式异常

- `public OpenExpressionException(String message)` - Create exception with message / 创建带消息的异常
- `public OpenExpressionException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Create exception with message and cause / 创建带消息和原因的异常

- `public int getPosition()` - Get error position / 获取错误位置
- `public static OpenExpressionException parseError(String message, String expression, int position)` - Create parse error / 创建解析错误
- `public static OpenExpressionException parseError(String message, int position)` - Create parse error with position only / 创建只带位置的解析错误
- `public static OpenExpressionException evaluationError(String message, Throwable cause)` - Create evaluation error / 创建求值错误
- `public static OpenExpressionException evaluationError(String message)` - Create evaluation error / 创建求值错误
- `public static OpenExpressionException typeError(String expected, Object actual)` - Create type error / 创建类型错误

- `public static OpenExpressionException securityViolation(String message)` - Create security violation error / 创建安全违规错误
- `public static OpenExpressionException timeout(long millis)` - Create timeout error / 创建超时错误
- `public static OpenExpressionException divisionByZero()` - Create division by zero error / 创建除零错误
- `public static OpenExpressionException nullPointer(String context)` - Create null pointer error / 创建空指针错误

### ParserException
`public class ParserException` - Parser Exception / 解析异常

- `public ParserException(String message)` - Create parser exception / 创建解析异常
- `public ParserException(String message, int position)` - Create parser exception with position / 创建带位置的解析异常
- `public ParserException(String message, String expression, int position)` - Create parser exception with expression and position / 创建带表达式和位置的解析异常
- `public ParserException(String message, String expression, int line, int column, ErrorType errorType)` - Create parser exception with full details / 创建带完整详情的解析异常
- `public String getExpression()` - Get the expression / 获取表达式
- `public int getLine()` - Get the line number / 获取行号
- `public int getColumn()` - Get the column number / 获取列号
- `public ErrorType getErrorType()` - Get the error type / 获取错误类型
- `public static ParserException unexpectedToken(String token, int position)` - Create unexpected token error / 创建意外词法单元错误
- `public static ParserException unexpectedToken(String token, String expression, int position)` - Create unexpected token error with expression / 创建带表达式的意外词法单元错误
- `public static ParserException expectedToken(String expected, String actual, int position)` - Create expected token error / 创建期望词法单元错误
- `public static ParserException expectedToken(String expected, String actual,` - Create expected token error with expression / 创建带表达式的期望词法单元错误
- `public static ParserException unexpectedEnd(String expression)` - Create unexpected end of expression error / 创建表达式意外结束错误
- `public static ParserException invalidNumber(String value, int position)` - Create invalid number format error / 创建无效数字格式错误
- `public static ParserException unterminatedString(int position)` - Create unterminated string error / 创建未终止字符串错误
- `public static ParserException invalidEscapeSequence(String sequence, int position)` - Create invalid escape sequence error / 创建无效转义序列错误
- `public static ParserException unbalancedParentheses(int position)` - Create unbalanced parentheses error / 创建不平衡括号错误

### Token
`public record Token(TokenType type, Object value, int position, int length)` - Token Record / 词法单元记录

- `public static Token of(TokenType type, int position)` - Create a token with no value / 创建无值的词法单元
- `public static Token of(TokenType type, int position, int length)` - Create a token with position and length / 创建带位置和长度的词法单元
- `public static Token of(TokenType type, Object value, int position, int length)` - Create a token with value / 创建有值的词法单元
- `public boolean is(TokenType type)` - Check if this token is of given type / 检查此词法单元是否为给定类型
- `public boolean isAny(TokenType... types)` - Check if this token is any of given types / 检查此词法单元是否为给定类型之一
- `public String stringValue()` - Get string value / 获取字符串值
- `public Number numberValue()` - Get number value / 获取数字值

### TokenType

### Tokenizer
`public class Tokenizer` - Expression Tokenizer / 表达式词法分析器

- `public Tokenizer(String expression)` - Create tokenizer for expression / 为表达式创建词法分析器
- `public List<Token> tokenize()` - Tokenize the expression / 对表达式进行词法分析
- `public static List<Token> tokenize(String expression)` - Create tokenizer and tokenize / 创建词法分析器并进行分析

### AllowList
`public class AllowList` - Allow List / 白名单

- `public boolean isClassAllowed(String className)` - Check if class is allowed / 检查类是否被允许
- `public boolean isClassAllowed(Class<?> clazz)` - Check if class is allowed / 检查类是否被允许
- `public boolean isMethodAllowed(String methodName)` - Check if method is allowed / 检查方法是否被允许
- `public boolean isPropertyAllowed(String propertyName)` - Check if property is allowed / 检查属性是否被允许
- `public Set<String> getAllowedClasses()` - Get all allowed classes / 获取所有允许的类
- `public Set<String> getAllowedMethods()` - Get all allowed methods / 获取所有允许的方法
- `public Set<String> getAllowedProperties()` - Get all allowed properties / 获取所有允许的属性
- `public static Builder builder()` - Create a builder / 创建构建器
- `public static AllowList empty()` - Create an empty allow list (denies all) / 创建空白名单（拒绝所有）
- `public static AllowList allowAll()` - Create an allow-all list (allows everything) / 创建允许所有的白名单

### DefaultSandbox
`public class DefaultSandbox` - Default Security Sandbox / 默认安全沙箱

- `public static DefaultSandbox permissive()` - Create a permissive sandbox that allows everything / 创建允许所有操作的宽松沙箱
- `public static DefaultSandbox restrictive()` - Create a restrictive sandbox that denies by default / 创建默认拒绝的限制性沙箱
- `public static DefaultSandbox standard()` - Create a standard sandbox with sensible defaults / 创建具有合理默认值的标准沙箱
- `public boolean isClassAllowed(Class<?> clazz)` - 判断class allowed
- `public boolean isMethodAllowed(Object target, Method method)` - 判断method allowed
- `public boolean isPropertyAllowed(Object target, String property)` - 判断property allowed
- `public int getMaxExpressionLength()` - 获取max expression length
- `public int getMaxEvaluationDepth()` - 获取max evaluation depth
- `public long getMaxEvaluationTime()` - 获取max evaluation time
- `public static Builder builder()` - Create a builder / 创建构建器

### Sandbox
`public interface Sandbox` - Security Sandbox Interface / 安全沙箱接口


### SandboxException
`public class SandboxException` - Sandbox Exception / 沙箱异常

- `public SandboxException(String message)` - Create sandbox exception / 创建沙箱异常
- `public SandboxException(String message, ViolationType violationType, String violatedResource)` - Create sandbox exception with violation type / 创建带违规类型的沙箱异常
- `public SandboxException(String message, Throwable cause)` - Create sandbox exception with cause / 创建带原因的沙箱异常
- `public ViolationType getViolationType()` - Get the violation type / 获取违规类型
- `public String getViolatedResource()` - Get the violated resource / 获取被违规的资源
- `public static SandboxException classNotAllowed(String className)` - Create exception for denied class access / 创建拒绝类访问的异常
- `public static SandboxException classNotAllowed(Class<?> clazz)` - Create exception for denied class access / 创建拒绝类访问的异常
- `public static SandboxException methodNotAllowed(String methodName)` - Create exception for denied method access / 创建拒绝方法访问的异常
- `public static SandboxException methodNotAllowed(String className, String methodName)` - Create exception for denied method access with class context / 创建带类上下文的拒绝方法访问异常
- `public static SandboxException propertyNotAllowed(String propertyName)` - Create exception for denied property access / 创建拒绝属性访问的异常
- `public static SandboxException functionNotAllowed(String functionName)` - Create exception for denied function access / 创建拒绝函数访问的异常
- `public static SandboxException timeout(long timeoutMs)` - Create exception for execution timeout / 创建执行超时异常
- `public static SandboxException iterationLimitExceeded(int maxIterations)` - Create exception for iteration limit exceeded / 创建迭代限制超出异常
- `public static SandboxException expressionTooLong(int maxLength, int actualLength)` - Create exception for expression length exceeded / 创建表达式长度超出异常
- `public static SandboxException depthLimitExceeded(int maxDepth)` - Create exception for depth limit exceeded / 创建深度限制超出异常

## 41. opencode-base-rules

规则引擎，提供规则定义、分组、引擎执行、决策表、冲突解析

### OpenRules
`public final class OpenRules` - OpenRules Facade - Unified Entry Point for Rules Engine / OpenRules门面 - 规则引擎统一入口

- `public static RuleBuilder rule(String name)` - Creates a new rule builder with the given name / 使用给定名称创建新的规则构建器
- `public static RuleBuilder rule()` - Creates a new rule builder / 创建新的规则构建器
- `public static RuleGroupBuilder group(String name)` - Creates a new rule group builder with the given name / 使用给定名称创建新的规则组构建器
- `public static RuleEngineBuilder engine()` - Creates a new rule engine builder / 创建新的规则引擎构建器
- `public static RuleEngine defaultEngine()` - Creates a new default rule engine / 创建新的默认规则引擎
- `public static RuleEngine engineWith(Rule... rules)` - Creates a rule engine with the given rules / 使用给定规则创建规则引擎
- `public static RuleEngine engineWith(RuleGroup group)` - Creates a rule engine with the given rule group / 使用给定规则组创建规则引擎
- `public static DecisionTableBuilder decisionTable()` - Creates a new decision table builder / 创建新的决策表构建器
- `public static DecisionTableBuilder decisionTable(String name)` - Creates a new decision table builder with the given name / 使用给定名称创建新的决策表构建器
- `public static RuleContext context()` - Creates a new empty rule context / 创建新的空规则上下文
- `public static RuleContext contextOf(Object... keyValues)` - Creates a rule context with initial facts / 使用初始事实创建规则上下文
- `public static Condition condition(Predicate<RuleContext> predicate)` - Creates a condition from a predicate / 从谓词创建条件
- `public static Condition alwaysTrue()` - Creates an always-true condition / 创建始终为真的条件
- `public static Condition alwaysFalse()` - Creates an always-false condition / 创建始终为假的条件
- `public static Action action(Consumer<RuleContext> consumer)` - Creates an action from a consumer / 从消费者创建动作
- `public static Action noOp()` - Creates a no-op action / 创建无操作动作
- `public static ConflictResolver priorityResolver()` - Gets the priority-based conflict resolver / 获取基于优先级的冲突解决器
- `public static ConflictResolver orderResolver()` - Gets the order-based conflict resolver / 获取基于顺序的冲突解决器
- `public static RuleListener loggingListener()` - Creates a logging rule listener / 创建日志规则监听器
- `public static String version()` - Gets the library version / 获取库版本
- `public static String info()` - Gets the library information / 获取库信息

### Rule
`public interface Rule` - Rule Interface - Core Abstraction of Business Rule / 规则接口 - 业务规则的核心抽象


### RuleContext
`public final class RuleContext` - Rule Context - Manages Facts and Variables During Rule Execution / 规则上下文 - 管理...

- `public static RuleContext create()` - Creates an empty rule context / 创建空的规则上下文
- `public static RuleContext of(Map<String, Object> values)` - Creates a context from a map of values / 从值的Map创建上下文
- `public static RuleContext of(Object... keyValues)` - Creates a context from alternating key-value pairs / 从交替的键值对创建上下文
- `public static RuleContext withFacts(Object... facts)` - Creates a context with fact objects / 使用事实对象创建上下文
- `public RuleContext addFact(Object fact)` - Adds a fact object to the context / 向上下文添加事实对象
- `public RuleContext addFact(String name, Object fact)` - Adds a named fact object to the context / 向上下文添加命名的事实对象
- `public RuleContext put(String key, Object value)` - Sets a variable value in the context / 在上下文中设置变量值
- `public <T> T get(String key)` - Gets a variable value from the context / 从上下文获取变量值
- `public <T> T get(String key, T defaultValue)` - Gets a variable value with a default / 获取变量值，带默认值
- `public <T> Optional<T> getFact(Class<T> type)` - Gets a fact by type / 按类型获取事实
- `public <T> List<T> getFacts(Class<T> type)` - Gets all facts of a specific type / 获取特定类型的所有事实
- `public boolean contains(String key)` - Checks if a variable exists / 检查变量是否存在
- `public RuleContext setResult(String key, Object value)` - Sets a result value / 设置结果值
- `public <T> T getResult(String key)` - Gets a result value / 获取结果值
- `public <T> T getResult(String key, T defaultValue)` - Gets a result value with default / 获取结果值，带默认值
- `public Map<String, Object> getResults()` - Gets all results as an immutable map / 获取所有结果作为不可变Map
- `public Map<String, Object> getVariables()` - Gets all variables as an immutable map / 获取所有变量作为不可变Map
- `public FactStore facts()` - Gets the fact store / 获取事实存储
- `public RuleContext clearResults()` - Clears all results / 清除所有结果
- `public RuleContext clearVariables()` - Clears all variables / 清除所有变量

### RuleResult
`public record RuleResult(` - Rule Result - Immutable Record of Rule Execution Outcome / 规则结果 - 规则执行结果的不可变记录

- `public int firedCount()` - Gets the count of fired rules / 获取已触发规则的数量
- `public int skippedCount()` - Gets the count of skipped rules / 获取已跳过规则的数量
- `public int failedCount()` - Gets the count of failed rules / 获取已失败规则的数量
- `public boolean hasFired()` - Checks if any rules were fired / 检查是否有规则被触发
- `public boolean wasFired(String ruleName)` - Checks if a specific rule was fired / 检查特定规则是否被触发
- `public boolean wasSkipped(String ruleName)` - Checks if a specific rule was skipped / 检查特定规则是否被跳过
- `public boolean hasFailed(String ruleName)` - Checks if a specific rule failed / 检查特定规则是否失败
- `public <T> T getResult(String key)` - Gets a result value by key / 按键获取结果值
- `public <T> T getResult(String key, T defaultValue)` - Gets a result value with default / 获取结果值，带默认值
- `public boolean hasResult(String key)` - Checks if a result exists / 检查结果是否存在
- `public static Builder successBuilder()` - Creates a success result builder / 创建成功结果构建器
- `public static Builder failure()` - Creates a failure result builder / 创建失败结果构建器
- `public record RuleError(String ruleName, String message, Throwable cause)` - Rule Error - Details about a rule execution failure / 规则错误 - 规则执行失败的详细信息

- `public DecisionTableBuilder inputs(String... names)` - Adds multiple input columns / 添加多个输入列
- `public DecisionTableBuilder output(String name, Class<?> type)` - Adds an output column / 添加输出列

- `public int getOutputColumnCount()` - Gets the output column count / 获取输出列数

## 42. opencode-base-geo

地理位置组件，提供坐标转换（WGS84/GCJ02/BD09）、距离计算、地理围栏、GeoHash

### Coordinate
`public record Coordinate(` - Coordinate Point / 坐标点

- `public static Coordinate wgs84(double longitude, double latitude)` - Create WGS84 coordinate / 创建WGS84坐标
- `public static Coordinate gcj02(double longitude, double latitude)` - Create GCJ02 coordinate / 创建GCJ02坐标
- `public static Coordinate bd09(double longitude, double latitude)` - Create BD09 coordinate / 创建BD09坐标
- `public Coordinate to(CoordinateSystem target)` - Transform to target coordinate system / 转换到目标坐标系
- `public double distanceTo(Coordinate other)` - Calculate distance to another coordinate (meters) / 计算到另一个坐标的距离（米）
- `public String toGeoHash(int precision)` - Convert to GeoHash / 转换为GeoHash
- `public boolean isValid()` - Check if coordinate is valid / 检查坐标是否有效
- `public boolean isInChina()` - Check if coordinate is in China / 检查坐标是否在中国境内

### CoordinateSystem
`public enum CoordinateSystem` - Coordinate System Enumeration / 坐标系枚举

- `public String getCode()` - Get the code / 获取代码
- `public String getDescription()` - Get the description / 获取描述

### CoordinateUtil
`public final class CoordinateUtil` - Coordinate Utility Class / 坐标工具类

- `public static Coordinate transform(Coordinate coord, CoordinateSystem target)` - Transform coordinate to target system / 将坐标转换到目标坐标系
- `public static Coordinate wgs84ToGcj02(Coordinate wgs84)` - Transform WGS84 to GCJ02 / WGS84转GCJ02
- `public static Coordinate gcj02ToBd09(Coordinate gcj02)` - Transform GCJ02 to BD09 / GCJ02转BD09
- `public static Coordinate bd09ToGcj02(Coordinate bd09)` - Transform BD09 to GCJ02 / BD09转GCJ02
- `public static Coordinate gcj02ToWgs84(Coordinate gcj02)` - Transform GCJ02 to WGS84 / GCJ02转WGS84

### GeoUtil
`public final class GeoUtil` - GeoUtil - Geographic Utility Class / GeoUtil - 地理工具类

- `public static GeoFence createCircleFence(double longitude, double latitude, double radiusMeters)` - Create a circle fence / 创建圆形围栏
- `public static GeoFence createCircleFence(Coordinate center, double radiusMeters)` - Create a circle fence around a coordinate / 创建以坐标为中心的圆形围栏
- `public static GeoFence createRectangleFence(double minLng, double minLat,` - Create a rectangle fence / 创建矩形围栏
- `public static GeoFence createPolygonFence(List<Coordinate> vertices)` - Create a polygon fence from coordinates / 从坐标创建多边形围栏
- `public static GeoFence createPolygonFence(double... lngLatPairs)` - Create a polygon fence from longitude/latitude pairs / 从经纬度对创建多边形围栏
- `public static double[] getBoundingBox(List<Coordinate> coordinates)` - Calculate bounding box for a list of coordinates / 计算坐标列表的边界框
- `public static Coordinate getBoundingBoxCenter(double[] boundingBox)` - Calculate bounding box center / 计算边界框中心
- `public static double[] expandBoundingBox(double[] boundingBox, double meters)` - Expand bounding box by distance in meters / 按米数扩展边界框
- `public static <T> List<T> sortByDistance(List<T> items, Coordinate from,` - Sort items by distance from a point / 按距离从某点排序
- `public static <T> List<T> filterByDistance(List<T> items, Coordinate from,` - Filter items within distance from a point / 过滤某点距离内的项目
- `public static <T> T findNearest(List<T> items, Coordinate from,` - Find the nearest item to a point / 查找距离某点最近的项目
- `public static double calculatePolygonArea(List<Coordinate> vertices)` - Calculate approximate area of a polygon in square meters / 计算多边形的近似面积（平方米）
- `public static double calculatePolygonCircumference(List<Coordinate> vertices)` - Calculate circumference of a polygon in meters / 计算多边形的周长（米）
- `public static double toRadians(double degrees)` - Convert degrees to radians / 将度转换为弧度
- `public static double toDegrees(double radians)` - Convert radians to degrees / 将弧度转换为度
- `public static double metersToDegrees(double meters, double latitude)` - Convert meters to degrees at given latitude / 在给定纬度将米转换为度
- `public static double degreesToMeters(double degrees, double latitude)` - Convert degrees to meters at given latitude / 在给定纬度将度转换为米

### OpenGeo
`public final class OpenGeo` - OpenGeo - Facade Entry Point / OpenGeo - 门面入口类

- `public static double distance(Coordinate c1, Coordinate c2)` - Calculate distance between two coordinates in meters / 计算两个坐标之间的距离（米）
- `public static double distance(double lng1, double lat1, double lng2, double lat2)` - Calculate distance between two points by coordinates in meters / 计算两点之间的距离（米）
- `public static double distance(Coordinate c1, Coordinate c2, DistanceAccuracy accuracy)` - Calculate distance between two coordinates using specified accuracy level / 使用指定精度级别计算两坐标间距离
- `public static double distancePrecise(Coordinate c1, Coordinate c2)` - Calculate precise distance between two coordinates using Vincenty algorithm / 使用 Vincenty 算法计算两坐标间的精确距离
- `public static String formatDistance(double meters)` - Format distance for display / 格式化距离用于显示
- `public static Coordinate wgs84ToGcj02(double lng, double lat)` - Transform WGS84 to GCJ02 / WGS84转GCJ02
- `public static Coordinate gcj02ToBd09(double lng, double lat)` - Transform GCJ02 to BD09 / GCJ02转BD09
- `public static Coordinate bd09ToGcj02(double lng, double lat)` - Transform BD09 to GCJ02 / BD09转GCJ02
- `public static Coordinate wgs84ToBd09(double lng, double lat)` - Transform WGS84 to BD09 / WGS84转BD09
- `public static Coordinate bd09ToWgs84(double lng, double lat)` - Transform BD09 to WGS84 / BD09转WGS84
- `public static Coordinate gcj02ToWgs84(double lng, double lat)` - Transform GCJ02 to WGS84 / GCJ02转WGS84
- `public static boolean inCircle(Coordinate point, Coordinate center, double radius)` - Check if point is inside circular fence / 检查点是否在圆形围栏内
- `public static boolean inPolygon(Coordinate point, List<Coordinate> polygon)` - Check if point is inside polygon / 检查点是否在多边形内
- `public static boolean inRectangle(Coordinate point, Coordinate southwest, Coordinate northeast)` - Check if point is inside rectangle / 检查点是否在矩形内
- `public static String geoHash(double lng, double lat, int precision)` - Encode coordinate to GeoHash / 将坐标编码为GeoHash
- `public static Coordinate fromGeoHash(String hash)` - Decode GeoHash to coordinate / 将GeoHash解码为坐标
- `public static List<String> geoHashNeighbors(String hash)` - Get neighboring GeoHashes / 获取相邻的GeoHash
- `public static double[] geoHashBoundingBox(String hash)` - Get GeoHash bounding box / 获取GeoHash边界框
- `public static boolean isInChina(double lng, double lat)` - Check if coordinate is within China bounds / 检查坐标是否在中国境内
- `public static double bearing(Coordinate from, Coordinate to)` - Calculate bearing from one point to another in degrees / 计算从一点到另一点的方位角（度）
- `public static Coordinate destination(Coordinate start, double distance, double bearing)` - Calculate destination point given start, distance, and bearing / 根据起点、距离和方位角计算终点
- `public static Coordinate midpoint(Coordinate c1, Coordinate c2)` - Calculate the midpoint between two coordinates / 计算两个坐标之间的中点
- `public static boolean isValidCoordinate(double lng, double lat)` - Check if coordinate values are valid / 检查坐标值是否有效

- `public static Coordinate mask(Coordinate coordinate, double maxOffsetMeters)` - Mask coordinate with random offset within specified radius / 在指定半径内对坐标添加随机偏移
- `public static Coordinate reducePrecision(Coordinate coordinate, int decimalPlaces)` - Reduce coordinate precision by rounding to specified decimal places / 通过四舍五入到指定小数位来降低坐标精度

- `public static Coordinate maskToCity(Coordinate coordinate)` - Mask coordinate to city-level precision (~5km) / 将坐标模糊化到城市级精度（约5公里）
- `public static Coordinate maskToNeighborhood(Coordinate coordinate)` - Mask coordinate to neighborhood-level precision (~1km) / 将坐标模糊化到街区级精度（约1公里）

## 43. opencode-base-graph

### SafeGraphOperations

- `public static final Duration DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = Duration.ofSeconds(30);` - Default timeout duration / 默认超时时间
- `public static void setMaxVertices(int max)` - Configure maximum vertex count / 配置最大顶点数量
- `public static void setMaxEdges(int max)` - Configure maximum edge count / 配置最大边数量
- `public static void setMaxDepth(int max)` - Configure maximum traversal depth / 配置最大遍历深度
- `public static void setTimeout(Duration duration)` - Configure timeout duration / 配置超时时间
- `public static int getMaxVertices()` - Get current maximum vertex count / 获取当前最大顶点数量
- `public static int getMaxEdges()` - Get current maximum edge count / 获取当前最大边数量
- `public static int getMaxDepth()` - Get current maximum depth / 获取当前最大深度
- `public static Duration getTimeout()` - Get current timeout / 获取当前超时时间
- `public static <V> void safeAddVertex(Graph<V> graph, V vertex)` - Safely add a vertex with limit check / 安全添加顶点（带限制检查）
- `public static <V> void safeAddEdge(Graph<V> graph, V from, V to)` - Safely add an edge with limit check / 安全添加边（带限制检查）
- `public static <V> void safeAddEdge(Graph<V> graph, V from, V to, double weight)` - Safely add an edge with weight and limit check / 安全添加带权重的边（带限制检查）

- `public static <V> Map<V, Double> safeDijkstra(Graph<V> graph, V source)` - Safely compute Dijkstra distances with timeout / 安全计算Dijkstra距离（带超时）
- `public static <T> T executeWithTimeout(Callable<T> callable, String operationName)` - Execute a callable with timeout / 带超时执行可调用任务
- `public static <V> boolean wouldExceedVertexLimit(Graph<V> graph)` - Check if adding vertex would exceed limit / 检查添加顶点是否会超出限制
- `public static <V> boolean wouldExceedEdgeLimit(Graph<V> graph)` - Check if adding edge would exceed limit / 检查添加边是否会超出限制
- `public static void resetToDefaults()` - Reset all limits to defaults / 重置所有限制为默认值

- `public ValidationResult(List<String> warnings, List<String> errors)` - Create a validation result / 创建验证结果
- `public static ValidationResult success()` - Create a successful validation result / 创建成功的验证结果
- `public static ValidationResult error(String error)` - Create a validation result with a single error / 创建带单个错误的验证结果
- `public static ValidationResult warning(String warning)` - Create a validation result with a single warning / 创建带单个警告的验证结果
- `public List<String> warnings()` - Get the list of warnings / 获取警告列表
- `public List<String> errors()` - Get the list of errors / 获取错误列表
- `public boolean isValid()` - Check if validation passed (no errors) / 检查验证是否通过（无错误）
- `public boolean hasErrors()` - Check if there are errors / 检查是否有错误
- `public boolean hasWarnings()` - Check if there are warnings / 检查是否有警告
- `public int errorCount()` - Get the count of errors / 获取错误数量
- `public int warningCount()` - Get the count of warnings / 获取警告数量
- `public ValidationResult merge(ValidationResult other)` - Merge with another validation result / 与另一个验证结果合并
- `public String toString()` - 转为字符串 / Convert to string
